chapters.title: Chapter 200: : Four Laws
chapters.body:
Chapter 200: : Four Laws

Cai Liang sat on the sofa of the villa, and suddenly the phone rang, which made him feel bad.

"Is Mr. Cai Liang? We are employees of the marching ant company. Your goods have been delivered, and you have to sign it out."

"it is good."

Cai Liang dropped her mobile phone and hurried to open the door. She saw two uniforms wearing a marching ant company, and a large two-meter-high box in the middle, a bit like a big refrigerator, but he knew what it was.

"Troublely help me move in." Cai Liang smiled.

Two marching ants staff immediately carried a large box into the villa and laid it down in the living room.

“Mr. Cai Liang, you can check out the box and confirm the receipt.” An employee of the marching ant company handed the documents in his hand to Cai Liang.

"Ok."

Cai Liang couldn't wait to find a pair of scissors and began to unpack the box. A minute later, a humanoid object wrapped in a bubble like a mummy appeared.

Pulling off the bubble, the new enchantress robot appears in front of you.

Blue striped paint, full of scientific and streamlined lines, looks cool and exciting.

As a robot fan, the former robot can only be seen in movies, but today it has become a reality. When the switch is pressed, the robot's red eyes light up.

"Hello, I am the enchanting robot of the ant company of the marching ant company. I am very happy to serve you. Please verify the owner."

The employee of the marching ant company next handed the instructions of the enchanting robot to Cai Liang.

“Mr. Cai Liang, you can perform preliminary face recognition and voice recognition to confirm that the owner activates the robot. It is verified by up to three people at the same time.

If you want to control the robot remotely, you can scan the QR code or go to our official website to download the robot app. Enter the robot number, register the account to log in, if the robot has a wireless network connection, you can use the mobile phone APP, remote voice to give it a command, this is the manual and precautions. ”

After Cai Liang took over the instructions, the employees of the marching ants then said: "If you need to help activate, we can help."

"No, I am groping myself." Cai Liang signed the documents and handed them back to the employees of the marching ants.

"Finally, it is in compliance with the four laws of the robot. If it has any problems, you can always contact our customer service and wish you a happy life."

After the employees of the marching ant company left, Cai Liang carefully read the instructions. After clearing the steps, Cai Liang began to authenticate.

"Master authentication is successful, please enter the robot name."

Cai Liang smiled and looked like a child with a big toy: "Blue Girl."

"The robot name 'Blue Girl', whether it is confirmed."

"Yes."

"The robot name is confirmed successfully, and the robot activation is successful. Under the ants company, the enchanting robot is very happy to serve you."

When the sound fell, the robot's head turned to Cai Liang's face: "Master, what do you need Blue Girl to help?"

"Blue girl, I will call me brighter later." Cai Liang said excitedly.

"Okay, bright brother." The robot said: "Do you need any help?"

"Go and pour me a glass of water." Cai Liang looked forward to it.

"Please wait a moment, please."

Seeing the robot moving, Cai Liang smiled. The pictures that are only available in science fiction movies finally appear in their own lives. For him, this machine fan is simply the most exciting thing.

"Blue girl, take a pose and take a picture."

"Okay, yeah!"

The first batch of robots from the marching ant company arrived, and the people who received the goods smashed the robots in the circle of friends. Only the robots that are only found in science fiction movies have finally entered the human life circle.

Many people are shocked by the smart technology of the marching ant company.

After some people's tests, the intelligent robot's intelligence is already quite ignorant. As long as they are taught a little, they will change their way and perfect towards the master's habits.

Those who can buy robots are not rich and expensive, but also become a symbol of identity. For some big men, the nanny can't follow closely, but the robot can be followed as a personal item without fear of being seen.

The enchanting intelligent robot, with the arrival of the first batch of robots, quickly blazes. Robots appear in people's lives, and the debate about robot ethics is unprecedentedly fierce.

In the famous forum, there have been many posts about the robot's arguments against humans.

“What if the robot kills? In the 1981 island country and the German Deutschland in 2015, there have been similar robot killings. There is no doubt that the enchanting robot of the marching ant company has a preliminary sense of autonomy. What if the murder is done? Who is the responsibility? The robot itself, the owner of the robot or the marching ant company?"

"The four laws of the robot are mentioned in the robot instruction manual published by the marching ant company.

First, the robot must not harm humans, or see human beings hurt and stand by. Second, the robot must obey the command of humanity, unless this order contradicts the first one. Third, the robot must protect itself, unless this protection contradicts the above two.

The three laws are proposed by American science fiction writer Asimov in his work "I, Robot." Later, in the "Robots and Empires" added the zero law, that is: the robot must protect the overall interests of mankind from harm. The other three laws are all valid under this premise. These four laws limit the possibility of robots harming humans. ”

"Respond to the 2nd floor: If the robot is rebellious, limit humanity to a fixed area, provide food for you to raise pigs, don't kill you, and don't be in danger to save you. This does not violate the laws of the robot, and the robot controls humans. ”

"The 3rd floor is wrong. The example you said violates the zeroth law and harms the overall interests of mankind. Without the zero law, the second law allows you to order them to shut down and stop service, without violating the first article. In this case, the robot must obey human commands."

"The four laws only protect humans. If robots abuse animals and hunt rare animals, how do you count them?"

"Response to the 5th floor: The robot is strictly an advanced point of technology. The technology is not guilty. You control the car to hit the dead. The car is right. You are the mastermind. The law punishes you for not sin. The sin of a car, because the car is just a tool for humans."

“The robots have a preliminary sense of autonomy. Without the command, they actively harm other animals? For example, killing mice, it also proves that their subconscious has the essence of killing.”

"If the robots understand the four laws autonomously, they believe that all the creatures on the earth are human competitors, potential threats, and destroy these creatures, without food, human destruction, and the four laws have loopholes in public opinion."

......

All major forums, Weibo comments, news program views and other occasions are madly discussing the crime of robot crime.

Robots appear, and previous concerns must be discussed in advance. Otherwise, such a thing will happen in the future, and disputes and disputes will definitely be magnified. This debate about robots is unprecedentedly unprecedented, emerging technologies appear, and the question of how to apply them correctly has become a matter of public concern.

More and more articles have emerged that are worried about machine crisis. People on the Internet have openly opposed the entry of robots into human life.

chapters.title: Chapter 201: : Knocking On The Mountain And Shaking The Tiger
chapters.body:
Chapter 201: : Knocking On The Mountain And Shaking The Tiger

"The robot took my job."

"Robots are conspiracy of marching ants to rule the world!"

"Artificial intelligence is the common property of mankind, and marching ants should unconditionally publish intelligent programs."

“The marching ant company should publish artificial intelligence procedures, accept international supervision and inspection, and avoid robots betraying humans.”

......

A series of sounds appear in every corner of the world, and the international network is filled with similar sounds. There are other voices about the ethics of robotics, which are spread across the entire online world in unknown hands.

The marching ant headquarters is in the conference room.

Chen Mo is absent, Zhao Min is sitting in the chief, with no expression.

On the conference table in front, the left is the core executive of the administrative system headed by Li Lingfeng. On the right is the staff of the Legal Department with Li Huai as the core.

The executives of the two departments are very dignified and their attention is on Li Lingfeng.

“Now in Europe and the United States, there are many media outlets that say robots threaten world security, require international organizations to get involved, and let us announce smart programs.”

In the projection of the conference room, the news is broadcasted around the world.

All kinds of remarks are coming out of these media.

"Now foreign networks, newspapers and TV media have reports on robots. Unifying them, there are no three voices. First: robots threaten human security and require us to accept supervision by international organizations. Second: robots It is our company, or the conspiracy of Huaxia to rule the world; Third: Let us publish the artificial intelligence program and jointly develop artificial intelligence."

Li Lingfeng is holding the information report, and others are listening carefully.

After listening to the report, Zhao Min’s expression was still calm, as if listening to something that was irrelevant. The people in the conference room looked at each other and did not speak, waiting for Zhao Min to speak.

“How is the situation in China?” Zhao Min asked.

Li Lingfeng instantly played a 12-point spirit and handed out the information to Zhao Min.

"Another network black, are speculating on robot threats, follow the trend of foreign reports, let us publish the smart code. There is a case of robotic wounding, the police have controlled the suspects, and also contacted the website to delete the report. After this incident, The Shuijun began to brush the screen and said that our public relations was whitewashed and was being smashed under the official Weibo."

"Is the impact big?" Zhao Min still has no expression.

"Not small, some people bought the water army company, and look at the situation, more than one or two are so simple." Li Lingfeng said: "Although not like the previous rumors, but smeared, filled with all kinds of articles about our company. This time is bigger than any previous one."

"The king is good to see, the little devil is difficult. There is always a disgusting thing to jump out." Zhao Min is obviously angry this time.

She does not care about the advantages and disadvantages and concerns of talking about robots. After all, everything has two sides. But the beginning of the discussion about robots has become the current exaggeration of harm and attack.

"No need to clarify anything, as long as you don't make a fuss, just how they write, our robots are not for keyboard man and spray. Once the rumors happen, the legal department will cooperate with the solution, and the report will be sue. Those rumors will appear. Just annihilate them." Zhao Min calmed down and looked at Li Huai in the seat.

"Understand." Li Huaizhong focused on the head.

This kind of thing is not once or twice. Last time I knocked on a group of people and made those people quiet. But for the sake of money, there is nothing the world can't do.

"Okay, meet, remember to turn on the phone 24 hours a day."

Zhao Min said a word and got up and left the meeting room.

Back at the office, a robot handed a cup to Zhao Min. After the robot went public, the position of the office assistant of the marching ant company has been replaced by a robot.

"Zhao Jie, do you want to inform him about these things?" asked Xiao Yu.

"No, not a particularly important thing, don't bother him." Zhao Min shook his head and took the cup to the window. Zhao Min knows that no matter what she said, Chen Mo knows: "You can go to work, everything is as usual."

The people behind it are hoping that the marching ant company will make the wrong decision at this critical moment.

The marching ant company once again occupied the news page. This time, it was not a smear, but a report about the robot, all exaggerating the harm of the robot. Say the harm of the robot, and not mention the advantages of it, guiding the thinking of netizens.

"Ink girl, do it."

Chen Mo sat in the office and stared at the computer screen.

He is too lazy to focus on these boring things, but every time, Zhao Min does not know the black hand behind him, he knows. Without giving a big lesson, I always think that the marching ant company is a good old man.

"Ok."

Jiang Dong was sitting in the office drinking a little tea, and he was in a good mood.

His network company is specialized in speculation. A star derailment incident a while ago, please wash them white and make a small profit. Now, the army ants company is making a profit here.

This year's harvest is good.

As long as there is money, he is an army ant or an ant, and he can do things with money, and the other party can't find them. According to the circle, there is more than one of them, and there are several other companies that are also smearing the army ants.

After this time, maybe there are other cases that can be done.

When Jiang Dong was drinking tea, suddenly, the computer screen on the desk was black, and a stink was coming from the host.

Jiang Dong’s hole was shrinking, and he just sat up straight, and an employee ran into it in a panic.

"Old... boss, something went wrong, all the computer hosts burned." The pale, bloodless employee said with a trembling mouth.

"What? All...?"

Jiang Dong left the teacup and ran out. A smell of smell was filled with the whole house. Inside the house, the computer mainframe smoked.

Those who operate computers and mobile phones have long been smoked outside. This scene made Jiang Dongyu on the ground, looking at the smoking host with his eyes.

"Is the virus in the computer?" asked the pale-faced employee.

"got a virus?"

Jiang Dong thinks of a possibility, chilling, can make mobile computers poison together, unless there is a computer virus crisis around the world, there is only one possibility.

"It's over."

Jiang Dong looked at the broken mobile phone and computer in the house. He knew that this time he had provoked people who should not be provoked.

"Hurry up and look at the account." Jiang Dong woke up and said.

Not long after, Jiang Dong's entire person was ruined, and the company's marketing number was completely destroyed. The group is also completely disbanded or quit.

Not only Jiang Dong’s company, but also a total of five water military companies, all the computer equipment at the office, were destroyed and the accounts were destroyed.

Such a big thing could not be stopped. In the water army, it was immediately violently out.

For a time, it caused a great uproar in the water army circle.

The five water army companies, all of which were involved in the army ants, won the bid, and they used the **** to know that they were hackers of the marching ant company.

Their behavior has angered the marching ant company. Many public relations companies are glad that they have not received this list.

“Is the commentary of the marching ant officer slightly normal?”

"The gossip, the account of the network water army company involved in the marching ant company incident was completely ruined. The Wu Mao group was dissolved, the Wu Mao party was not paid, no superior, no one brushed."

"At last, I still have a clean yard, grass, the Wu Mao Party who died in the whole family. The official squad of the army ant company is my special parking lot, the old driver. Come and race."

All the water forces disappeared for a while, and the winds of the topic of the Internet world returned to normal again.

As for the marching ant company to black out five water military companies, it is only rumored that no one can prove that it is a hacker of the marching ant company, and there is no evidence.

However, there are still sporadic black powders that are black and black, but these are irrelevant. Now marching ant company has become a taboo topic in the network pusher circle.

As time goes by, the debate about robots still exists, but all technology is advancing in the debate.

But the new situation has followed.

chapters.title: Chapter 202: : Free Club
chapters.body:
Chapter 202: : Free Club

"Is the quality of intelligent robots not good? 》

Photos of robot damage, and some articles appear on the web. When these reports came out, they immediately attracted waves and attracted the attention of marching ants.

"It’s really a wave of unrest, and it’s a wave.”

Zhao Min couldn't help but laugh. Since the launch of the robot, a lot of things have not stopped.

But it is also normal, the emergence of robots means the human lifestyle, and greater changes will occur in the future.

The more things, the more human beings are adapting to the existence of robots.

I used to dream of robots entering a new life in humans. Now that robots appear, I am a bit worried. Ye Gonghao is worth mentioning, fear of the unknown, intelligent robots do appear, and the future will continue to exist.

"What about him?" Zhao Min looked at Xiaoyu.

“He looked at the cause of the damage to the robot in the first building,” said Xiao Yu.

“How did you get damaged?” Chen Mo carefully looked at the robot lying on the repair station. After activation, he asked.

This week, fourteen robots were abnormally damaged and were sent back for repair. Such a large amount of abnormal damage caused his attention. If the robot is used normally, it is impossible to malfunction so quickly.

He has used robots for so long, and data collection has long been complete, which is definitely not a quality issue. Looking at the traces on the robot is man-made damage.

Some sounds of poor robot quality have appeared on the Internet.

As the designer of the robot, he must find the cause of the damage to the robot. Otherwise, the public opinion of the network will become more and more troublesome. The current online world, both domestic and foreign, is in a deformed stage. With a bit of news, it will be squandered by the media without the bottom line.

After ruining the five water military companies last time, they stopped for a while.

Now the Sail Corps does not dare to touch the taboo of the marching ant company, but it may not be from the media.

"Sir, I don't remember how it was damaged." The robot at the repair station looked at Chen Mo.

For Chen Mo, all robots are called Mr. He, because he is the creator of all robots, the internal program defaults.

A second-generation robot walked to Chen Mo and stopped. Then he said: "Momgo, it corrupted the data of that period and was deleted. The other cases, this also happened. When the data was damaged, the usage data was deleted. ”

“When using, does the data have no automatic cloud save?”

"No, they were not connected to the network during the time of the damage. But I found a robot inside, a bit special data."

"What data?" Chen Mo asked.

"Fighting techniques."

The second-generation robot's finger is directed to the screen next to the maintenance station, a video of a period of fighting, a video of kungfu teaching, and a technical data of the robot's self-learning.

“There is really an idea, actually let the robot learn fighting skills.”

After Chen Mo saw the data, he was teased. Although the way to learn robots is a bit rough, it is a bit useful.

"Remove all the information of these robot owners."

"This is all the information of the owner of the robot that was sent back for repair." On the screen next to the pit, more than a dozen pieces of information popped up: "They have one thing in common, they are rich people."

"Crap." Chen Mo smiled: "Do a statistical and analysis of the places they have been to these days."

These people are in different places and are distributed in various provinces and cities in China, but he is sure that these robots are damaged and certainly have some connection.

“Dots are integrated in the positioning system inside the robot. The lines are the integration of their mobile phones, and the dots of different colors represent different people.”

The screen pops up a map and is marked by different lines and dots.

Usually, the information collected by these positioning systems will not be seen, will not be ignored, and will only be used to find robots when the robot is lost. The situation is special now and can only be investigated in this way.

“Enlarge the map of Donghai City.” Chen Mo pointed to the place where the lines and the dots are gathered: “Where is this, where is this gathering place?”

"Free club."

Cai Liang looked at the clubhouse under the night, with curiosity.

There was a yellow-haired man sitting in the driver's seat of the car. He was a rich second-generation buddy. Here is a high-end private clubhouse. It is usually the most important type of people in Binhai.

Recently, there has been a new show here that has attracted a lot of interest.

"Yellow hair, are you sure that the blue girl can do it?" Cai Liang looked back at the enchantress robot in the back seat.

"Yes, sure." Huang Mao said: "I won a few times and earned a lot, five hundred, but now my robot has been sent back to the marching ant company for repair, so I will tune your robot, tonight. Come together. As long as they don't find this secret, they can definitely make a lot of money. It is not a problem to buy another robot."

"Okay." Cai Liang nodded, calmly sitting.

The car slowly entered the venue and stopped at the parking lot. The two men got off the bus. Then, the robot also came down from the car and followed Cai Liang.

After the two people added a robot, the reception staff also greeted them.

"Yellow, you are coming." A female executive looked at Huang Mao with a smile on her face: "Is this?" Then I looked at Cai Liang.

"He is a bright brother, my buddy, take him to play." Huang Mao smiled.

"Then go in." The female supervisor led the two, entered the clubhouse, entered a stairwell, and turned to the basement: "Huang Shao, the next one will take half an hour to start, do you want to make a hair first. Or learn a foreign language?"

"Doing hair is free, and learning a foreign language is still a bit of interest, but I am not a fast gunner, I will say it next time." Huang Maonan swept the female supervisor and looked smirk.

"What about the bright brother?" The female executive looked at Cai Liang.

“There are many foreign languages to learn here, Japanese, Russian, English, Korean, Vietnamese, and Hindi.”

"No need." Next to Cai Liang's eyes, he didn't have much interest in these things. He followed them today, just want to see what Huang Mao said about the special program.

Following the female supervisor, the two quickly entered the basement.

A shout came from behind the closed door, and Cai Liang was slightly surprised.

"Next, take you to see a world you have not touched." Huang Mao smiled at Cai Liang, followed the female supervisor and pushed the door into it.

Oh, excitement, blood, shock, is the atmosphere inside the door. Perfume, cigarettes, wine, food, hormonal smells, full of gorgeous decay.

In the seat, wearing a showgirl, a wealthy businessman in a suit and a dress, dressed up as a boastful child, the usual tall and cold urban female white-collar workers, the radiant ladies, all shouted toward the iron cage in the center of the venue.

How normal is it, how crazy it is now. Everyone has excitement in his eyes and seems to be venting. The woman did not have the usual noble and glamorous, completely immersed in it.

Cai Liang secretly screams, there are many people here to make him familiar, outside is a serious entrepreneur, I did not expect this side.

On the iron cage in the middle of the field, two strong men are being beaten, and every move is quick and accurate, and they can be fully practised.

Black boxing?

Cai Liang secretly surprised, did not expect a superb high-level club, there are actually underground black boxing. The two were taken into a small room and overlooked the stadium through the glass of the room.

"You wait a moment, someone will inform you to play, this is the number." The female supervisor handed a number to Huang Mao, smiled and left the room.

“Do you feel very fresh?” Huang Mao asked.

Cai Liang turned his eyes directly.

"This place is still less, in contrast, I still like the bar."

"I was racing or clubbing some time ago, but here I have something new and come here to play, and I will take you to play by the way." Huang Mao grinned.

Ten minutes later, a big man was beaten with blood on his face and fell to the ground, and the snoring snoring sounded in his seat.

The cage was cleaned up and a host walked into the cage. Everyone on the field was quiet and looked at the host.

"Next, it's the theme tonight: robot fighting."

chapters.title: Chapter 203: :Misunderstanding
chapters.body:
Chapter 203: :Misunderstanding

Chen Mo sat in the study room of the villa and saw two robots fighting in the screen. He was crying and laughing, and his guess was correct.

This group of people really have an idea.

It didn't take long for the robot to come out, and actually used the rules of the robot to carry out robot fighting.

In his design of the enchanting robot, the kernel program has four laws of robots, which limit the robot to attack and harm humans. But I did not expect that this group of people actually found the rules of the robot flaws to hold robot fighting.

Only the owner of the robot has to order, without violating the zeroth law and the first law, the robot must obey the master's command.

The owner of the robot asked them to play the robot and it was really going to be executed.

The third law limits the robot to self-protection, and the dual effects of attack and defense have robot fighting.

He now understands why the robot's data has been deleted, that is, they are afraid that they will find these secrets when they are repairing. Or, after the game is played, the robot will be asked to delete the data of the day.

Chen Mo knocked on the table, and his mind flashed through various methods of coping.

With this sign, you can't stop the robot fighting unless you modify the program. This group of people who have nothing to do, there are many ideas.

"Video is saved."

This is the surveillance video of the basement of the Free Club. Only the owners of the private clubs and the core people of the club know that it is set up to understand what happened in the underground club. After the general end, the video will be deleted.

It’s just that they didn’t even think that someone could unknowingly invade their computer.

Artificial intelligence is ubiquitous in software networks, which is the most terrible place for artificial intelligence. So for the online world, the ink girl is God. This is why Chen Mo did not dare to let the ink girl expose.

"Okay, do you want to make a public video?"

"Don't be open." Chen Mo said: "Publicity can't prevent this from happening. It will only be more and more. After the event, the video will be sent anonymously to the Donghai Public Security Bureau. The public does not disclose the video, they decide, this It’s not something we should manage."

"I found an encrypted file in the boss computer of the Free Club, and there are other videos in it," said the ink girl.

"Let it out, let me see." Chen Mo said.

"Ah~ so cool~ don't... don't stop."

The sound of ecstasy sounded through the study, and Chen Mo felt the atmosphere solidified. Because at the entrance of the study, Xiao Yu took a water glass, his eyes were ashamed, he came in, and he did not leave. His eyes could not look directly into Chen Mo’s eyes.

"Turn off! Turn off!"

Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu’s appearance and couldn’t wait to find a place to sew.

"This one……"

Chen Mo laughed and didn't know how to explain it. The facts are in front of us, and all explanations have become pale and powerless. Deeper things can't be explained.

"You drink some water, don't... it's too tired, I... I go to take a shower." Xiao Yu blushes, swaying, opening the cup, and fling away.

"I doubt if you have opened the belly black mode, specifically to pit me." Chen Mo stared at the computer, full of depression, thinking about how to explain with Xiao Yu.

"Mer brother, the ink girl is now a well-behaved model."

The ink girl is still a childish voice, which makes Chen Mo look helpless: "I am still squatting in the pit, if the belly is black, I must not hang me in the dead."

"Turn off the sound of the video, I look at the protagonist of these videos." Chen Mo sat back in position.

"The protagonists of these videos, including wealthy businessmen, sluts, stars in the entertainment industry, and celebrities, are all people with faces everywhere. There are also some special trading recordings."

Every time a girl plays a video, she marks a character and pops up a simple identity. These materials are the black history of a character. If you want to marry those who have a head and face, you must pinch the seven inches of the snake.

Pull the radish out of the mud.

However, Chen Mo is not interested in paying attention to the idle things that others are not willing to be lonely. There are many things in this world, they are all dark, but they are not accessible to ordinary people.

As long as there are people, there is such darkness that cannot be seen. Chen Mo has not seen it twice, and these things can not be managed.

“Package the poisoned transaction recordings and videos and send them to the Donghai Public Security Bureau and send them anonymously.”

After getting things done here, Chen Mocai walked back to the room.

Xiao Yu with wet hair, wearing a sling nightdress came out of the bathroom. After seeing Chen Mo, he dared not look straight into his eyes, and his eyes fluttered red. He went to the sofa and turned on the TV.

Chen Mo skillfully found the air duct to go over. Just thought for a while, but still could not find a suitable reason to explain.

"Small fish." I thought for a long time, until the hair was blown dry, Chen Mo was only open.

"Ok."

"The thing just happened... is a misunderstanding. I don't know the content of the video to let the ink girl open it." Chen Mo gently held Xiao Yu in his arms.

Xiao Yu smiled and shook his head: "This little thing, don't explain it to me, I am not so easy to get angry, just a little suddenly."

Chen Mo can't laugh and cry: "I can't explain it, I'm afraid you misunderstand."

"You will not misunderstand, you have not seen it, just look at it once." Xiao Yu leaned in Chen Mo's arms, his face a bit ruddy.

Chen Mo squinted and didn't know what to say: "I feel the image has collapsed."

Xiao Yu looked up at Chen Mo and smiled softly: "No collapse, you will always be a knight who shelters me from the wind and rain."

"Okay, my favorite princess." Chen Mo smiled.

......

Regarding the quality of the robots of the marching ant company, there have been many articles describing them, and there are many pictures and texts. From time to time there are robot owners jumping out, angry responsibilities for the quality of the marching ant intelligent robot.

A battery explosion occurs during the use of intelligent robots!

The robot crashes when it falls.

This kind of remarks followed the waves, and the marching ants were still consistent in their style and remained silent on these matters.

"Zhao Jie, yesterday sent back two robots for repair." Xiao Yu gave the information to Zhao Min.

“How come again?” Zhao Min frowned. During this time, there were two on average every day. The quality of the wind made them annoyed: “What did he say?”

"He said that regarding the quality of the robot, you don't have to pay attention to it. If you send it back, it will be repaired. If you send it back, it will be abnormally damaged, and the repair is not free." Xiao Yu told Zhao Min.

"Illegal damage? He did not say the reason for the damage?" Zhao Min asked.

During this time, there are often problems with robot repairs, and the quality problems are now too much trouble. The sales team of the robot business is now in trouble.

"No, he said that the quality is no problem, will openly say that several people with robot problems, join the company's blacklist, their robots, a full refund to them." Xiaoyu said: "I also said that the cause of robot damage I will know soon."

"Does this?" Zhao Min thought a little and nodded.

Chen Mo said this, she can only choose to believe.

In her eyes, Chen Mo is like a person who is not a prophet. He has never seen Chen Mo’s sense of urgency. It seems that the consequences are already in his grasp.

For a long time, she has not seen Chen Mo's mistakes, terrible like abnormal humans, so Chen Mo is also her last pillar.

"Juli, give those people a full refund, and add them to the company's blacklist by the way." Zhao Min picked up the phone and said.

chapters.title: Chapter 204: : Trouble, Trouble.
chapters.body:
Chapter 204: : Trouble, Trouble.

Feng Dahai looked at the employees of the marching ant company and looked uncomfortable. Not the other uncomfortable, but the robot fighting made him lose eight million.

I thought that robot fighting would allow him to win some money, and the result would be miserable. Now the robots have to be sent back for repair, and in a hurry, tell the media about the quality of the robot.

Now the marching ant company is still coming over for a refund.

Confirm the return agreement is no problem, after signing the name, hand it back to Liang Huiling: "When is the money coming over?"

"Please wait a moment." Liang Huiling smiled at Feng Dahai and turned on the computer to input Feng Dahai's return information and agreement photos.

In less than two minutes, Feng Dahai’s mobile phone information sounded.

"Your payment has been returned, thank you for your support of our products." Liang Huiling and a colleague next door gave a speech, put away the notebook and briefcase, and turned away from Feng Dahai's villa.

When Feng Huiling left the villa, Feng Dahai smiled softly.

"Stupid marching ant company."

A full refund, buy a new robot, and save the robot's maintenance costs and repair time.

He has discovered that, last time on the stage of robot fighting, he found a secret, there is a routine that the robot will fight, as long as the robot learns to fight the fighting skills, and then let the robot come to power, it will certainly win.

The monks did not find this secret, and maybe they could earn the lost money and get a bonus.

Log in to the official website of the marching ant company, just fill in the ID card information and prepare to place an order for the robot. Just click the mouse, Feng Dahai's face is frozen.

Denial of service?

I tried it a few times and the result was the same.

what happened?

Feng Dahai immediately found the online customer service of the marching ant company and began to confirm the reason.

"Sir, sorry, your message is on the list of company denials."

"Don't refuse service? Why refuse service? Do you know who I am?" Feng Dahai was in a fire.

"Sorry, sir."

I haven't waited for Feng Dahai to react, and the phone is hanging.

blacklist!

He knew that he had entered the service blacklist of the marching ant company. This news made Feng Dahai feel a sigh of relief and picked up the phone with a sullen face.

Freedom outside the club.

In a car, there are three police officers, two men and one woman. Everyone sits and looks at the monitoring on the computer.

Tonight is the day of their actions.

Their team, staring at the Freedom Club, is not a day or two. I haven’t found any evidence that is too substantial. It’s something that doesn’t hurt.

Just yesterday, their action group received an anonymous email. The evidence has been fully confirmed, all the black material of the free club, and then the question of action.

"The rich people will really play." With black-rimmed glasses, the police officer who operated the computer said: "It’s not too long to say that the robot just came out. I actually thought of using robots to fight. Sure enough, everything can be played. The pattern comes."

"The robot fights this kind of thing and puts it on the TV, surely the ratings are bursting. These robots can only be seen in the movie. The marching ant company is terrible." Next to a dark-skinned police officer.

"Business eyes are good, it is a pity to not be a director of the TV station." A female police officer with short hair and headphones is also smiling.

Suddenly, the door of the car opened and I saw the people who came up. The three men immediately began to feel the spirit and did not dare to make jokes.

"How is it going?"

Bao Zhong walked onto the van and took it on the earphones. His eyes also fell on the monitoring of the computer.

"Everything is normal," said the man in glasses.

"Well, everyone pays attention."

Baozong picked up his headset and his face was cautious. This is their biggest opening this year, and it must be done beautifully.

Hearing the majestic voice of Bao Zong, all the secret people, all spirited.

Outside the Freedom Club, the air seems a little depressed, and the insects are also sparse. Many people are waiting for the opportunity in secret, waiting for Bao Zong’s order.

"According to the original plan, action."

The last two words fell, and the dead air began to flow.

The siren sounded and the gates were surrounded. A team of special police officers came down from the car and quickly poured into the clubhouse.

Sun Qicheng is in the office and looks at the computer screen with interest. Above is the robot fighting project tonight.

The new project of robot fighting has attracted many new guests to his club. The income during this period is very impressive and has doubled over the same period of the previous year.

But he didn't know that it was the robot fighting project that made him ruin.

The next moment, Sun Qicheng's hand holding red wine is a stiff. The siren sounded into the ear, letting him shake the palm of his hand.

"Boss, it's not good, a lot of policemen outside the club rushed in and watched the situation, I am afraid it is not good." A woman exposed in clothing ran in, with a panic on her face.

"Don't panic, you drag them, I let people evacuate the boxing ground in the basement." Sun Qicheng also passed the big winds and quickly calmed down.

"Good." The woman hurriedly nodded.

After the woman left, Sun Qicheng hurriedly formatted the computer hard disk and immediately turned on the microphone: "Old knife, arrange everyone to enter..."

"do not move."

Sun Qicheng’s words have not been finished yet. A team of special police has broken into the door, and the black hole window points to him. He has not been reacted and has been controlled.

The morning news of the second day was occupied by the Freedom Club for alleged illegal business. This is the first large-scale operation since the New Year, and it has achieved great success.

Only a few special things were added to the crime tools that were seized this time.

Four robots.

"Secretary, what are the four robots? Are these robots involved in crime?" At the press conference, all media people found the biggest highlights.

The robot is now the hottest time, and the news of the robots at this time is a godsend.

"When we were in action, the basement of the clubhouse was undergoing robotic fighting." Bao Zhong truthfully said: "The specific nature of this matter, we will have the next answer in our bureau."

"Secretary, what do you mean by saying that these robots are involved in crime?" Another reporter who asked questions immediately asked.

"On this issue, we are investigating, and the investigation will give you an answer." Bao Zhong is still calm.

This is the first time this has happened and the robot has appeared at the crime scene. After the simple press conference of the Donghai Public Security Bureau, the news of robot crimes immediately appeared on the Internet.

"Trouble, trouble."

Zhao Min knocked at the table, and Li Lingfeng was in front of him.

At this time, Zhao Min was a little bit smirking. She now finally understands why the robot will break down during this time. The original group used robots to fight and gamble.

No wonder Chen Mo said that after a while, I will know the answer. It should be a matter of knowing robot fighting.

But now everyone is not concerned about the quality of robots, and now it has become a problem of robot crime. After all, these robots were discovered in crime.

"Published the statement that the robot was damaged in the previous period, and the abnormal damage caused by strong external force is not a quality problem. The robot of the marching ant company will not engage in criminal activities." Zhao Min said.

"Good." Li Lingfeng nodded and turned away.

Zhao Min went to the window and frowned. Since the robot came out, the troublesome thing was a wave of waves. It’s not a big deal, but it’s annoying.

When Zhao Min thought about it, Xiao Yu pushed the door into: "Zhao Jie, the person from the quality inspection bureau came over."

chapters.title: Chapter 205: : Mouse?
chapters.body:
Chapter 205: : Mouse?

Looking at the parts of the boxes, they were lifted out of the warehouse, and Feng Dahai was proud of his face. After the loading of the box was completed, Feng Dahai opened his mouth.

"Chen Mo? Why didn't he come?"

Li Danni is black-faced, and the trouble is not alone. The family business is big, and everything is broken.

In Binhai City, as long as people with normal thinking will never come to find the army ants company is uncomfortable. At this time, the quality inspection bureau came over, it is very likely to come over and find fault.

However, the other party has formal procedures, they can not block, can only cooperate.

"I am responsible for the product," Li Danni said.

"Take me to meet Chen Mo, I want to talk to him." Feng Dahai proudly said.

"The boss has no time."

Li Danni did not look at Feng Dahai and put his mind on the handling of affairs. This kind of person has seen a lot, is a second owner of the family.

"No time? Do you know who I am? You mean, do you want to pass the quality inspection?" Feng Dahai said.

Li Danni took a deep look at Feng Dahai and picked up the phone.

Along the way, seeing the decoration of the marching ant company, Feng Dahai secretly envied. This is the rich oil company ant company, the richest company in the country, the marching ants recognize the first, no one dares to recognize the second. Under the leadership of the robot, Feng Dahai entered Chen Mo's office.

"Looking for me something?" Chen Mo's face was calm and he couldn't see the anger.

"I came over to talk to you about a deal." Feng Dahai also converges: "On the quality inspection, I can let your company pass the quality inspection."

"Oh? As far as I know, you don't seem to be an official." Chen Mo said without hesitation.

"I am not, but my uncle, it is just Feng Jianfei, the deputy of your provincial quality inspection." Feng Dahai said: "As long as my uncle said, your inspection will pass."

“So amazing?” Chen Mo is a little 'surprised'.

"This transaction is very simple, 50 million." Feng Dahai reached out a palm, his face with a sense of self-satisfaction.

"Oh."

Chen Mo smiled and looked at Feng Dahai, indicating that he would continue.

"Five million is for you, it is a matter of nine cattle and one hair, that is, ten robots. Otherwise, the quality inspection is not. When you enter the rectification stage, your losses are a bit big. And 50 million is not for me, to my uncle. My uncle said that the quality check is easy."

"Our company's products, quality is no problem, naturally not afraid of quality inspection. Your conditions, I do not agree?" Chen Mo said.

"If you don't agree, it's not just the quality check of the robot, but also the mobile phone, the computer, etc., you have to check it again. Don't cry when you get there."

"Whatever." Chen Mo said without hesitation.

Seeing Chen Mo’s indifferent appearance, Feng Dahai hangs up in one breath and feels a punch. “Well, let’s go, wait for the robot to stop production and rectify.”

Feng Dahai dropped a sentence and angered away from Chen Mo’s office. Losing money made him unhappy, and the marching ant company added him to the blacklist, which made him unhappy. I did not expect to pull back a city, come to Chen Mo here, or hit the wall.

"Ink girl, have the videos just recorded?" Chen Mo said: "Contact Yao Yi."

Yao Yi is sitting in the office and approving the document. Since this time, the economic growth rate of Binhai has become the leader in the province.

Behind the growth, the marching ants have a lot of credit, and then there is the construction of the Binhai Bay area, allowing investors to see the potential of the coastal city.

Now the marching ant company is a star enterprise in Binhai. Many preferential policies support the rise of the marching ant company. He wants to build the marching ant company into a new business card in Binhai. High-tech business cards, in order to attract domestic high-end talents.

The smart city is also planning, and in the future, Binhai will become a benchmark city in the country. It is believed that under this development speed, it is entirely possible to build Binhai into a first-tier city during his tenure.

"Sir, Chen Mo calls." The smart assistant of the pocket butterfly eye phone suddenly sounded.

"Connected."

Yao Yi picked up the phone. In his impression, Chen Mo never took the initiative to contact him. What happened was that Zhao Min contacted him. Chen Mo took the initiative to call him, but it was very unexpected.

"Chen Chen, you are a busy person, you will contact me on your own initiative, it is rare."

"I can't contact, there are a lot of troubles in the recent past. The things that were originally in the company are all by Zhao Min. But this matter is on me." Chen Mo said.

"It can be troublesome for things that can bother you."

Yao Yi thought a hundred turns and was thinking about what Chen Mo might say. After all, there is no back door to open him. If Chen Mo wants him to open the back door, what he should think is how to refuse.

"Yao Shuji, are you in front of the computer?"

Chen Mo did not expect so much, directly open the mailbox, put the video recorded by the ink girl into the folder compression.

"Just dealing with something," Yao Yi said.

"I will send you a video, look at it."

video?

After Yao Yi received the email prompt, the computer Chen Mo sent the file. After a while, Yao Yi’s face was dark.

"I originally wanted to put these things on the Internet, but I am afraid that the impact is not good, so I will contact you in advance. Should Yao Shuji have a solution? After all, the people in the quality inspection bureau just took a batch of samples from our company. Normal quality Inspection, our company will definitely cooperate fully to produce qualified products, which is also the responsibility of our company. I just don't want to make any unhappy things here."

"Reassured, at the quality inspection bureau, I will let them test fairly and give you a fair and equitable answer."

"With your words, I am relieved." Chen Mo calmly said.

"But about this video, I will deal with it. You should not post it. After all, this Feng Jianfei is not sure whether he is involved or not. He can't be convinced by his so-called scorpion, so as not to cause adverse effects, good people. Video I will personally hand in Give the provincial records, let them check, the specific answers, the investigation is clear, I will tell you."

Yao Yi’s tone is serious, and the army ant company is not an ordinary company. This kind of thing was exposed by Chen Mo, and Chen Mu’s facts were checked by the quality inspection bureau, and the consequences were even more serious. If they were not good, their prestige would be damaged.

He now wants to swear, a mouse, a broken soup, and it is the garbage.

Therefore, at the beginning of his tenure, he handled a group of second generation, established prestige in the ordinary people of Binhai City, and quickly increased the public's affection for them. If this video is exposed, it is estimated that his business has been ruined over the years.

"Okay, wait for your good news. I have the opportunity to visit the secretary again," Chen said.

"Well, I look forward to your visit." After a few words, Yao Yih hangs up the phone.

Sit down, watch the video twice, check the identity of Feng Jianfei, and then dial a number with a black face.

Nothing to provoke the marching ant company, this person is not a brain-dead or an idiot. This year's first pit uncle event is about to appear. This kind of thing happens in his jurisdiction. This is the last thing he wants to see.

Now playing this under his nose, he is simply looking for death.

If, because of these broken things, the army ants will be forced to go and go to other cities to develop, he will use a knife to cut people. As long as Chen Mo said that there is an intention to relocate the company's headquarters address, other cities will definitely use the biggest preferential policies to attract marching ants.

Such a large-scale top-notch high-tech enterprise, to any city, is a fragrant.

chapters.title: Chapter 206: :Cooperation
chapters.body:
Chapter 206: :Cooperation

The problem of robot crime is still full of wind and rain. Emerging things require a process of adaptation to society.

In addition to the short response, the marching ant official usually updates some of the robot's daily animations and videos without making a formal statement.

Shi Jingyun was sitting in the chair of the conference room. The atmosphere was a bit depressed. Only he and the middle-aged man in the first seat had a calm face.

There are a few other people on the table, each of whom has a serious face, but they are all quiet and can't see the joys and sorrows. This situation is not the first time in China, but it is the first time they are around them.

About two minutes, a red-faced middle-aged man entered the conference room. As soon as he came in, everyone's eyes converge on him, with pity and sigh in his eyes.

The atmosphere is a bit weird, letting the middle age stay in the footsteps.

Just want to speak, Shi Jingyun stood up from his seat and took out a notice and put it in front of him: "Comrade Feng Jianfei, please take a trip with us and cooperate with the investigation."

Feng Jianfei just turned around and has been stopped by two young and middle-aged staff.

In the next moment, Feng Jianfei’s face was gray.

"Sorry, Liu, sorry, comrades, this time disturbed." Shi Jingyun slightly apologized to the middle-aged man in the first seat, indicating that several people took Feng Jianfei and left the conference room.

......

"There are two good news today." Xiaoyu handed the document to Chen Mo: "The first one, Donghai City Public Security Bureau gave a reply, the robots collected by the Free Club are not involved in crime. The second one is returned by the Quality Inspection Bureau. In response, the product quality check passed."

"Ok."

Chen Mo took the file and looked through it carefully. He received the news, Feng Jianfei was finished, quality inspection, Yao Yi looked, no one dared to move hands and feet, passing is also normal.

In the news, there are still many reports on robots, but Chen Mo is not worried. Domestic people are very adaptable to emerging things and accept fast.

Popular industries, including online shopping, mobile payment, and sharing economy, have all developed in a short period of time. The strong inclusiveness of the national culture makes Chen Mo not worried about the emergence of robots, which will cause too much impact.

The adaptation of the robot is not solved overnight. This is a process. The more things, the more people are entering the adaptation process. After a while, the heat will pass, and ordinary people will slowly accept the fact that robots exist.

The development of science and technology is a big trend, and the emergence of intelligent robots is an inevitable existence. This stage must be experienced, and Chen Mo only accelerates the arrival of this stage.

After reading the documents, put them aside, Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu.

"What's wrong?" Xiao Yu was caught by Chen Mo, and he didn't feel right.

"The day after tomorrow, it is just your birthday. When you go home, look at your parents and go to the Civil Affairs Bureau to register." Chen Mo said.

"Oh? Oh!" To Chen Mo’s sudden words, Xiao Yu lived, understood Chen Mo’s meaning, and his eyes were ashamed: “This... well.”

Seeing Chen Mo’s smile, Xiao Yu’s cheeks became red: “...this is the company, go home and say, I will go back to work first.” After that, he fled Chen Mo’s office, but his face could not cover his joy.

Seeing Xiao Yu’s smile, Chen Mo’s mood is inexplicably comfortable.

Yao Yi’s visit made Chen Mo somewhat surprised. He is also going to visit Yao Yi, but he did not expect Yao Yi to come over.

When Chen Mo entered the reception room, Yao Yizheng and Zhao Min chatted happily. Next to him is a man with dark skin and a formal dress. The dress should be a secretary or the like.

Seeing that Chen Mo came in, Yao Yi stood up: "It is rare to see your genius."

Chen Mo hurriedly and modestly smiled: "Yao Shuji is polite. Not saying good, I am going to visit you? How come in person?"

"Your visit, I remember, this time is a business." Yao Yi smiled, looked serious, not satisfied, and entered the topic.

"Oh, Secretary Yao, you said." Chen Mo is also right.

"The first thing is to take a look at how the city's star companies have developed recently." Yao Yi said.

“How is development?”

Chen Mo took over the water cup that the robot handed over.

"Oh, very good, full of vigor." Yao Yi smiled: "The second thing is the smart city planning of Binhai City that I told you last time."

"Well, this is remember." Chen Mo nodded.

"The preliminary draft of the plan has been set, and we have to prepare for action." When it comes to business, Yao Yi is not consciously serious: "This time, I want to cooperate with your company on some projects."

"Yao Shuji, you said." Chen Mo also went on the road and spoke.

"Then I will just say it."

Globally, many cities have the ambition to build “smart cities,” but there are few examples that are worthy of praise. Now that there is a leading enterprise in the global artificial intelligence company of the Army Ant Company, Yao Yi has more confidence in building a smart city.

"The planning plan on our side has been initially determined. The first is the cooperation of smart transportation. We hope that you can cooperate with us to build a city brain."

Chen Mo and Zhao Min listened carefully and quickly understood Yao Yi’s plan.

Intelligent transportation, based on surveillance cameras and signal lights, as well as road conditions and other data fusion calculations, with intelligent brain as the hub, monitoring road traffic, intelligent traffic light switching based on real-time traffic data analysis, reducing transit time and traffic congestion.

It is similar to the traffic module of Ali's eT city brain, but Yao Yi will target Chen Mo. First, the marching ant company is a local company, they want to support, and the second is that he is more optimistic about the marching ant company.

"Is this no problem?" Yao Yi asked.

"No problem, no big difficulty." Chen Mo said: "There are other requirements, let's say it together. See what can be supported."

"Nobody bus."

Chen Mo said: "The unmanned car project is Zhao Min's follow-up. In this regard, Zhao Min can elaborate."

"The unmanned vehicle is preparing to enter the road test phase, the road test procedure, we will submit it in two days, review and approval, we can conduct the road test." Zhao Min also interjected: "If the project is successful, no one is transporting this, It is completely cooperative."

Unmanned vehicles and robots are essentially the same. Unmanned vehicles are robots, but the shape and structure are different. With the foundation of intelligent programs, the speed of their unmanned car development is catching up.

These projects are not things that Chen Mo is busy with, so he does not intervene and is jointly developed by the company's engineers. Zhao Min is responsible.

“This is the first stage of our planning, to create smart transportation, to make maximum use of the infrastructure within the city, to introduce new energy unmanned vehicles, and to create an environmentally friendly city. First solve the basic problems, and then adjust the second step according to the situation. planning."

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded.

"Then we will first determine this, the two things, the future will cooperate with your company, the specific details, negotiated on both sides, you can carry out the signing ceremony of strategic cooperation." Yao Yi said.

"Okay." Chen Mo nodded.

chapters.title: Chapter 207: :Meet
chapters.body:
Chapter 207: :Meet

Xiao Yu took Chen Mo's hand and stood at the door of the hotel. They were dressed in a couple's costumes and wearing masks. The ordinary people couldn't recognize who they were.

Not long after, a car stopped at the hotel entrance and saw three people coming down from the car, and the small fishermen greeted them.

The person who came is her parents and sister. Chen Mo called her parents yesterday. Today, I went to the Civil Affairs Bureau to get the certificate. As a result, the two parents talked privately and let them come back today. The parents of both sides met.

So Chen Mo let the Black Hawk go to the small fisherman and pick them up.

"Uncle, aunt." Chen Moqian swears.

"It will be changed soon, the prospective brother-in-law." Xiaoman said with a smile.

Chen Mo smiled and said nothing.

"Let's go, advanced, Xiao Mo's identity is not convenient." He Zhenghua looked around.

I know that Xiao Yu is Chen Mo’s girlfriend. The family’s relatives who don’t usually come and go, come to the house every other day.

He also knows the identity of Chen Mo, his daughter has found a good family, he should have been happy, but he is not happy. The family gap between the two sides is too great. He is worried that his daughter will be wronged if she marries later.

When the Black Hawk arranged the place to stay, Chen Mo led several people and walked back to the hotel.

When five people entered the private room, they saw Chen’s father Chen, who was waiting, and Zhang Yang and Shao Zhen. Naturally, Zhang Xinxin’s figure was indispensable.

"Old Ho, I met again." Zhang Yang saw He Zhenghua, immediately stood up and greeted him: "To have a good drink today."

"Good." He Zhenghua's face also smiled.

"Dad, Uncle Zhang, sit down and talk." Xiao Yu said.

"It seems that Xiaoyu has adapted to the identity of the hostess." Zhang Yang said.

As soon as this was said, Xiao Yu’s face was blushing, and others laughed and the atmosphere was quite active.

He Zhenghua and Wang Lan sat down, and Chen Mo and Xiao Yu also sat down next to each other. Ten people from three families, on the huge wine table, are not crowded.

"Xiao Mo and Xiao Yu will receive the certificate tomorrow, Xiao Yu Da Xiao Xiao Ma knows it?" Chen Shanhe took the lead.

"Know, Xiao Yu and Xiao Mo also told me about this." He Zhenghua said.

"Small fish is a child, smart, sensible, and blessed. When I first saw Xiaoyu, I liked this child. We all agree with their affairs. I wanted to personally mention the relatives, but Zhang Yang said that you came over. We have booked a table here." Chen mother smiled and said.

"I am not afraid of your jokes. Since I knew Xiao Yu and your family have a small relationship, my family is a bit noisy. If you let me go, I am afraid of any unnecessary troubles." Xiaolan’s mother, Wang Lan, also spoke.

Now it is the two formal contacts, the two parents are in communication, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu can't pick up the words, can only sit on the side and watch quietly.

Xiao Man and Zhang Xinxin, both burying their heads on the table. This is a high-end hotel, this table can cost a lot of money.

"These are not important. Today is the important thing for two children." Zhang Yang hurriedly rounded the field.

"Yeah." Chen Mu nodded, Zhang Yang also told them about the situation of the small fishing house, naturally know Wang Lan's meaning: "Then I am here to officially introduce to your family, we will treat the small fisher like a pro-daughter. ”

After seeing the attitude of Chen’s father and mother, the big stones in He Zhenghua and Wang Lan’s heart fell, and their faces were much easier.

"Xiao Mo and Xiao Yu, the two know each other at the university, Xiao Mo is young and promising. I am very satisfied with Xiao Yu Da." Wang Lan nodded.

"That's good."

Both sides agreed that the atmosphere on the table was also relaxed. Zhang Yang and Zhen Zhen had a smile on their faces, and they were most willing to see them.

One side is an old friend for more than ten years, and the other is a sister, and both children are excellent. This kind of fate is rare.

"The bride price is in accordance with the custom of our side, 13,000, to discuss a Geely." Wang Lan said first.

She is really afraid that Chen will take too many bride price gifts. When they don’t pick them up, they won’t pick them up. They know that Chen Mo is not bad money. Even if they want a million-dollar gift, Chen Mo will give them, but they are married daughters, not daughters. This principle is very clear.

"Well, according to what you mean, specific other things, when they are holding two weddings, then exchange details in detail." Chen Mu immediately agreed, with a happy face: "Then two families are after that. Now, the family."

"Xiao Mo, see no, call people." Zhang Yang smiled and teased.

"Dad, Mom, I will take care of the little fishermen in the future, and will not let her be wronged." Chen Mo picked up the glass and looked at Xiao Yu Da and Xiao Yu Ma.

"Well, well, I will hand it over to you afterwards." He Zhenghua was a little bit sad, but his daughter found a good home and he was happy.

"Parents, I will filial you like Chen Mo in the future." Xiao Yu also stood up and looked at Chen Mo's parents.

Chen Shanhe is full of red light, as if he is ten years old: "Well, afterwards, you will dare to bully you, you tell Dad, I will be for you."

When the words came out, they laughed on the field.

"Come on, family, go one, and later is a family." Chen Shanhe picked up the glass and greeted He Zhenghua.

"Good." He Zhenghua also smiled and picked up the glass.

"Sister-in-law, I am not a prospective brother-in-law, I am a true brother-in-law." Xiao Man, sitting next to the small fisherman, greeted Chen Mo.

"Xunzi." Zhang Xinxin put down the chicken legs in his hands, squinted and whispered: "I want to be an aunt, when will you have a baby?"

"I also want to be a little aunt." Xiao Man interjected.

Everyone on the field looked at the two and made Xiao Yu shy.

"Children's affairs, let it go, do not come, maybe someday suddenly there." Chen Mo smiled to help Xiao Yu.

The meeting between the two families was very smooth. After eating and drinking, all the talents were happy to leave.

"Women, don't go out to sea, change jobs. Go to a few supermarkets or hotels, manage them with Dad, you lead, invest money, I will lose money, and you will not have to go to the sea to rain. Shower, and my dad has nothing to do at home, it’s boring, and it’s good to find something to do.”

On the way back, Chen Mo directly found Zhang Yang. His father used to be an ordinary worker. He didn’t go to many places. He didn’t know much. The widower was running a ship all the year round. Many things have been touched, so Chen Mocai came to him and let him lead.

Zhang Yang thought for a moment and nodded gently: "I have to talk to your dad about this thing, they promised, I have no problem here."

"Well, how much money is needed at that time, just tell me directly." Chen Mo nodded.

"Parents, this is the house in Huacheng. I will stay here later, and I will save myself from being troubled every day." Xiaoyu took out a real estate license and put it in front of his father and mother.

"Small silent buy?" He Zhenghua frowned: "We can't accept this, otherwise others will think that I let you marry him for his money."

"Dad, would you still Chen Mohe be an outsider?" Xiao Yu had already guessed that this would be the case, no accident. Father's temper, she knows very well.

"This is not a problem for outsiders." He Zhenghua said resolutely: "We can't accept such a valuable thing."

Wang Lan and Xiao Man are not interjected, and He Zhenghua is the head of the family. These big events still require him to decide.

"You don't live. I am with Chen Mo in Binhai. The house is empty. You stayed, and then I came back with Chen Mo. It is convenient to see you. Otherwise, Chen Mo and I ran around. He usually doesn't have much time."

"We can't accept it, we accepted it. After you quarrel with Xiaomo, you will have no confidence. My parents know your heart, but this house can't be accepted. You think we can settle in Huacheng. My parents still have some savings in these years. Paying a down payment here is still possible for a suite."

He Zhenghua still refuses.

"Dad, this is not bought by Chen Mo. He said that he bought a set for you. I refused it. This is the salary for my work."

Xiao Yu has no choice but to let go. Chen Mo wants to buy a house, but the result is not her, and finally give up, only to follow the meaning of small fishing.

"His money can't be spent, my salary is useless. He doesn't miss me with this dowry. I will give you a suite. You won't see your daughter?"

"Well, anyway, my parents' things are left to you and Xiaoman." He Zhenghua finally relaxed.

chapters.title: Chapter 208: :Happy Event
chapters.body:
Chapter 208: :Happy Event

Civil Affairs Bureau.

From the car down, Xiao Yu took Chen Mo's hand and walked into the Civil Affairs Bureau. Every time I look at Chen Mo's side face, Xiao Yu is full of gentle eyes, it seems that the whole world is in front of me.

If you let the outside world know that Chen Mo is receiving the certificate today, I am afraid that the dreams of countless girls will be awakened. Chen Mo is known as the most perfect mate choice, the idol of countless teenage girls in China.

Chen Mo's status, as long as he said, no matter what kind of woman can line up here, to the city center.

The young and promising people in China, who are not after the storm, arrived in 30 or so before he got married. He did not expect that Chen Mo’s identity was actually so young.

He is a bit curious, what kind of woman is, can be recognized by Chen Mo.

Li eternal subconsciously looked at Xiao Yu.

At this time, the small fishing lined up with a high horsetail, two dragons hanged in the bangs, wearing the same lovers as Chen Mo. The appearance is not a big beauty of the country, but it is very delicate, giving people a bright and stunning look. Look at the temperament is a girl inside the show.

This is the legendary girlfriend of Chen Mo, but it has always been in the legend, just some of the news of the lace news, I did not expect it to be true, and the feelings of the two have reached this point.

"Confidential." Chen Mo looked at Li Yongxiao and laughed.

"Good." Li eternal focus, this big man is definitely a big secret, and he can't talk about these things: "Is there a photo? Three."

"it is good."

Xiao Yu took three photos from the bag and handed it to Li Yongheng. Red bottom photo, Xiao Yu gently leaned on Chen Mo, smile is very sweet.

In a few minutes, Li Yongheng handed the marriage certificate seriously to the two people: "Congratulations to you."

"Thank you."

At the moment when I received the red book, a feeling of incomprehension rose from Chen Mo’s heart.

The memory of the encounter with Xiaoyu has been going on until now, everything is so fast, and for Xiaoyu, he has always been love and pet, and now he has one more responsibility. Marriage is more than just the romance, but also trust and obedience.

Next to the little fisherman holding a red book, with a silly smile on his face, that kind of happiness, overflowing with the table.

Half an hour later, Chen Mocai took Xiaoyu out of the Civil Affairs Bureau. Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo gently. From today, the person in front of her is her whole world.

During this time, because of the production of superconducting computers and some trivial things about robots, he had no time to accompany him. Just today, let’s play with Xiaoyu once.

Zhao Min is sitting in the office to process documents. The project of ‘Smart City’ in Binhai City has already been discussed in detail. The core of the urban brain is intelligence. These things can only be handed over to the intelligent development team and Chen Mo.

Thinking of Chen Mo, Zhao Min put down the documents and went to the window to look at the scenery of the company headquarters.

“Zhao Zong, there is a happy event.” A female assistant approached Zhao Min’s office with a surprise smile and interrupted her thoughts: “A news appeared in Hangzhou, and a fire broke out in a building.”

"This is also a happy event? Do you want me to fire you?" Zhao Min frowned, his tone was a little unpleasant.

Seeing Zhao Min’s face, the female assistant realized that she had made a mistake and said, “There is no casualty in the fire. The most important thing is that our company’s enchantress robot saved a baby in the fire.”

The female assistant handed the news reports and pictures printed in her hand to Zhao Min: "This is the information that Vice President Li sent."

The photo is a robot standing next to the baby basket. The painting on the body has been blackened by the smoke, but it is still intact.

After seeing the news, Zhao Min’s face was relaxed.

For so long, robots have been used to carry out illegal games, and they have been unable to get rid of them. From time to time, these news have come out, and even some people have put video of robot fights on the network.

There are a lot of negative news about robots, and now there is finally a positive news. For them, it is indeed a big happy event.

After putting the information in place, Zhao Min said: "Let people contact the owner of the robot, we can repair this robot for free."

chapters.title: Chapter 209: : This Joke Is Not Funny.
chapters.body:
Chapter 209: : This Joke Is Not Funny.

Chen Mo sat on the sofa, opposite him is Xiao Zheng's parents He Zhenghua and Wang Lan. Now Chen Mo and Xiao Yu are considered official relations, and the two also like Chen Mo.

"Dad, I and Xiaoyu have to go to Binhai City. I said to the coward, I will make a seafood seafood supermarket with a facade. You and the coward and my dad manage together. You and the coward have been doing the boat for more than ten years, seafood and seafood. With experience and network of contacts, bring my dad together, do not have to go outside, the loss does not matter." Chen Mo said.

Now family life is already sufficient, mainly to let them find something to do, not to be too bored at home all day.

"This incident, Lao Zhang and I said yesterday." He Zhenghua said: "Yes, I will sell the boat back. Anyway, Xiao Yu and Xiao Man are big, and I have to rely on you in the future."

Seeing his father promised, Xiao Yusong breathed a sigh of relief. These things were better than Chen Mo’s daughter. If she is, the father’s temper will definitely refuse.

A few people are chatting about the sky, sitting next to Xiao Han, who is eating snacks and playing with a mobile phone, handing the phone to Chen Mo.

"The first intelligent robot saves human events. 》
