The news pages pushed by mobile phones are all about the robots saving people.

"What's wrong?" He Zhenghua asked.

"This." Xiao Man transferred to the TV news channel, and saw that there was a live broadcast of the fire scene, the fire has been extinguished, only the onlookers of the media and the masses. The title of the report is also an intelligent robot rescue event.

"It seems that I should return to the company." Chen Mo returned the phone to Xiao Man.

In the afternoon, Chen Mo came home with Xiao Yu, and confessed something to his father and mother. After eating a meal, he rushed back to Binhai.

"Editor, get the surveillance video outside the fire."

Seeing the video played on the computer, Huang Yi dialed the editor's phone.

With his best news smell, he just came to the scene, his first one was not to broadcast anything, but the video of the robot to save the baby.

"Is there a robot to save the lens?" There was an anxious voice on the phone.

"Yes, the robot ran out of the safety exit with the baby basket, and the basket seemed to be wrapped in clothes." Huang Yi said with amazement.

This is almost the best shot for robots to save their children, because the photos taken by others are taken after the robot rescued the child.

“Upload the video right away.” The voice at the end of the phone is even more exciting.

"it is good."

In Hangzhou, there was a case in which a robot rescued a baby from the fire. This is the first time in human history that intelligent robots have rescued humans.

As the video is exposed, the robot saves the event and is pushed to a new height again.

This includes the official media, online media and self-media, almost all platforms. The heat of robot rescue events is all in the most conspicuous position on all major platforms.

A fire accident shocked the whole world. Because of this incident, there has been something that has never happened in human history. For the first time, intelligent robots have actively rescued human beings. This is just enough to shock the world.

The voices of every corner of the world are exclaiming, and the era of artificial intelligence is officially coming.

After the emergence of the robot, various problems and trivial matters, in addition to the daily life of the robot, there are many negative news. The fire scene saves the baby, and the negative image of the robot in many people's hearts disappears.

In the eyes of many people, the image of the enchantress robot has also become vivid and vivid.

This is a heroic act of no choice, but this hero is a bit special, this is the first time in history.

Zhao Min followed Chen Mo and entered the first building of the headquarters.

This building, even for her president, is full of mystery.

"After the robot rescue incident, today's robot orders have risen by 300. Now the negative reports about robots have disappeared. This is a good thing. This incident is the beginning of the robot's integration into human life. I did not expect This thing, all the trivial things are dispelled."

"It's good." Chen Mo nodded.

And Xiaoyu returned to the company last night, just to go to work today.

The cause of the fire accident is under investigation, but the fire broke out downstairs. At that time, the owner of the house just went downstairs to buy things, leaving the sleeping baby, so the robot will save the baby.

They contacted the owner of the robot and now ship the hero robot back to repair.

"Merco, preliminary inspection, the main parts of the number YJ1673 are not damaged, other accessories are not damaged, but the appearance is not good, but does not affect the performance."

When the two entered the first building, a robot came over and led the two and walked toward the repair station.

At this time on the repair table, there is a robot lying on it, the outer casing has been blackened, looks a little wolf, and forms a stark contrast with the robot working next to it.

"Give it a new shell, the damaged area, and all the repairs, check the program data by the way."

"Okay, Mom."

The voice of the ink girl fell, and the robot of the maintenance station began to disassemble the robot. Not long after, the skeleton of the robot was all revealed.

Zhao Min is completely ignorant of these full automation.

"What do you want to do next?" Chen Mojing looked at the robot's dressup.

"Normal work, we do not need to intervene, the heat of the outside world has been formed, the impression of ordinary people on the robot has also changed, we do not have to pay for it, even the advertising fees are exempted." Zhao Min said: "Let the robot into human life This is a long process, and this is just the beginning."

"Really." Chen Mo nodded slightly.

Looking at the robot repair, a bit boring, Zhao Min looked around for a week, staring at the entrance to the next level: "In fact, I am very curious, what is the next technology you are studying?"

"I want to know?"

"Crap, of course, think, as a president, I don't even know what the company is studying. Is it a bit of a failure?"

"I am afraid that after you know it, I will hit my idea." Chen Mo laughed.

"Reassured, I am not interested in the younger brother." Zhao Min joked.

Chen Mo looked at the repair station in a daze. After a while, he stared at Zhao Min’s eyes. Watched by Chen Mo, Zhao Min’s mind is a bit chaotic. After all, she is also in such a close distance and confronts people.

"Can I believe you?"

"can."

Zhao Min blurted out, it seems that this sentence is taken for granted.

"Go."

Chen Mo led Zhao Min and walked toward the entrance. In addition to Xiaoyu, Zhao Min is her most trusted person and the core of the company. Some things, Zhao Min really should know.

"Take me to see? Will not let me know, kill me?" Zhao Min said so, but still with Chen Mo.

"I found that your imagination is very rich."

Chen Mo did not agree, just walked to the door, palm print and password verification, took Zhao Min into the elevator.

"Anyway, you have to know sooner or later, with your business eyes, to help me think about how this product should appear."

With Zhao Min, through the five gates, the two talents finally entered the next layer.

Hundreds of robots, on the stage in front of each machine, have a small synthetic instrument working. Seeing this scene, Zhao Min couldn't help but **** a cold air.

As soon as they entered, a robot handed a closed glass bottle to Chen Mo, which contained gray-white crystal powder.

"This is it."

"what is this?"

Zhao Min was curious to look at the powder. She wanted to know what special things were, so that Chen Mo was so secret, even she knew it now.

"If I take it out, this small bottle can sell for one billion dollars or even more."

Chen Mo’s words scared Zhao Min’s hand and almost fell off the bottle: “Boss, don’t scare me.”

"I didn't scare you, this is a room temperature superconducting material." Chen Mo said.

"What do you say is this?" Zhao Min’s voice has tripled and his eyes are incredible.

"Normal temperature superconducting materials."

"Little brother, this joke is not funny."

Zhao Min reveals a smile that is more ugly than crying. Looking at Chen's default face, the air is in a quiet state.

chapters.title: Chapter 210: : Change Technology
chapters.body:
Chapter 210: : Change Technology

The two men looked at each other for a long time, and Zhao Min was staggered and seemed to accept this fact.

"Talk to you, I am interested in the younger brother now." Zhao Min stared at Chen Mo.

Chen Mo shrugged: "You are useless and interested, and the grass is the master."

"I am a junior."

"Ah, I’m going to talk about business, I’m bringing you here, not letting you seduce me, don’t shift the subject.” Chen Mo was speechless, holding the glass bottle of gray-white crystal powder shaking in front of Zhao Min.

"I regret to come in with you now." Zhao Min smiled, she knew that she had already boarded the ship and could not go down.

"You have to come over yourself." Chen Mo smiled.

Zhao Min regained her serious appearance and was no longer joking. This is a small matter, she must take it seriously.

“Simply talk about the characteristics of the material.”

Chen Mo nodded and seriously: "The material can exhibit superconducting properties at room temperature. The maximum temperature of superconducting properties is 841 degrees Celsius. Below this temperature, superconductivity is exhibited. If applied, all materials are made with this material. A mobile phone battery that can drive the entire company's computer host."

“Is energy produced?” Zhao Min looked around in the lab for a week.

"Small batches, to meet my research and production needs." Chen Mo said.

"I now suspect that Tesla and Einstein will reincarnate into your head."

Zhao Min had no choice but to look at Chen Mo. The world's top laboratories are studying the superconducting materials at room temperature, but they did not expect it to come out in Chen Mo's hands.

Chen Mo did not refute because he had a technology library hidden in his head.

"Who does this material exist, and who knows?" Zhao Min’s expression is serious, and this matter is no small matter.

"At present, only you know it." Chen Mo said.

"I don't know Xiao Yu?" Zhao Min asked.

"Small fish can be as curious as you are. If she says she wants to know, I will bring her over. But she is not interested in these, unless I tell her the initiative, otherwise she will not ask me what I am studying. At first she didn't know that the company was the one I opened." Chen Mo laughed.

Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo's eyes and calmed down. After a long time, he opened his mouth again.

"Do you believe me?"

"Crap, don't believe you, take you here to travel?"

"Thank you."

Zhao Min reported with a smile, and Chen Mo’s eyes also had some changes. After a while, he smiled and said: “Now we are not short of money and no other things, so my first suggestion is: room temperature superconducting materials, Not suitable for appearing in the market, at least not suitable for appearing in the market right now."

Chen Mo nodded and motioned her to continue.

Originally because of the too much involvement of the superconducting materials at room temperature, he chose to secretly do not publish papers in a high-profile manner like a seismograph.

Conductor materials, magnetic levitation, industrial shifting devices, cyclotron particle accelerators, superconducting computers, most electronic components, and controllable nuclear fusion devices, and the introduction of room temperature superconducting materials, will affect the transformation of these fields.

At present, almost all vehicles will be eliminated, and the electromagnetic era will be officially launched. The publication of this material means the arrival of a new generation of industrial revolution.

The technology of superconducting materials, even the controllable nuclear fusion technology, is even more effective.

"This technology is too advanced. In terms of artificial intelligence, others are lagging behind, but they are always catching up. They think the gap can catch up. If this epoch-making material appears, we all have trouble.

Its role and profit are enough for the capitalists to dare to trample on all human laws and commit any crime. You should understand why Tesla's greatest genius has more than 1,000 patents and is poor in his later years. ”

Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo.

Normal temperature superconducting materials are too much involved. If the technology is exposed, it is likely that Tesla, like the invention of AC technology, was threatened by persecution.

Because AC technology has harmed the interests of Edison's DC power, Edison has tried to suppress Tesla based on conflicts of interests. He even claimed that Tesla is a "heretical" in the scientific world. The alternating current he invented directly affects human life.

Driven by the interests, a consortium of forces would threaten Tesla to abandon the patent and want to monopolize it. After many negotiations, Tesla finally gave up the patent of the AC, tore the patent, and permanently disclosed the patent of the AC.

In today's society, capital consortia are no less than before, and each is a veteran of experience.

They announced the use of superconducting materials at room temperature. Although it is impossible to suffer from the absurd public opinion like Tesla, the threat of persecution will never be less.

Foreign capitalists, agents, and even domestic capital, the forces, will use the idea of room temperature superconducting materials, and more likely to obtain the technology of room temperature superconducting materials.

Immediately, their troubles will continue to flow.

This kind of technology is too advanced, and the areas involved are too big. If it is released, it will only lead to trouble, not to gain benefits.

At the time when the marching ant company's smart technology first came out, their company had experienced this situation. And that's just a small dish. It's really a super-temperature material that appears at room temperature. It is a storm that greets them.

"This technology can never be in the hands of a person or a company. Even if you have the current achievements, it is impossible, or it is a lot of trouble. If you want superconducting materials to appear in the market, there is only one way. ”

"What method?" Chen Mo asked.

"Cooperate with the above, this is the optimal decision to maximize the benefits." Zhao Min came to the final conclusion.

Chen Mo pondered for a while and did not oppose Zhao Min’s point of view. This kind of material does involve too much, and the benefits contained in it are too large. Anyone who eats it will die.

At the national level, these materials are considered to be the most advanced. Even if they want to appear in the market, they will definitely intervene and avoid being broken into foreign countries and being cracked.

"I regret to come in now. If there is a little noise, as the president of the company, I have trouble, you have to be responsible for me." Zhao Min smiled.

I knew that this kind of transformation technology, she will never step into this door.

"Think of beauty." Chen Mo was teased by Zhao Min.

"There is no conscience." Zhao Min did not care, and continued to raise his face: "There are seismographs, robots, and other businesses. We don't need money now, and the money is too much to spend. Or, money is just a number for us. You can hide the technology, don't publish it for the time being, or choose to cooperate with it. Although the vested interests are less, we will have less trouble."

"First hide for a while, wait until later to think about these things. Even if it is cooperation, this technology is not to appear for a while, I don't want to be the second Tesla. Now just let you know that you have to prepare, the company has these technologies. So that when the time comes out, you are in a mess."

"Good." Zhao Min said.

"Help me find a piece of land on the beach." Chen Mo took Zhao Min and left.

"The land? You want to enter the real estate industry?" Zhao Min asked.

"I have no money to spend, and build a seaside mansion that is surrounded by mountains and waters." Chen Mo said: "Listening to you, I am afraid that I will be kidnapped one day, so I have to build my own territory."

"You won, the evil local tyrant." Zhao Min did not say good.

"thank you."

"I let Xiaoyu help you find it, you will definitely not be dissatisfied."

The two men stood side by side and left the basement.

chapters.title: Chapter 211: :Precipitation
chapters.body:
Chapter 211: :Precipitation

The robot rescue incident has caused widespread discussion around the world. The robots discussed by netizens in China are brave enough to win the award.

In other respects, it is the experience of robots participating in TV programs or exposing roads to robots.

There is now a robot that is a symbol of wealth. After all, nearly five million robots, ordinary people can't even think about it.

Many wealthy people have found a new way to show off their wealth and take a robot to swim. Every time you bring a robot to the street, it will attract people to watch. Various videos are also flooding the web.

Live robots play games, live robots sing, live robots answer questions, etc., all kinds of ways.

Even some variety TV stations are involved in this rank.

Skill-challenge variety shows and answer-to-play entertainment programs have found new ways to start programs.

Man-machine battle mode.

Unlike previous artificial mental retardation, this time the goal is intelligent robots.

The participation of intelligent robots, with a variety of variety shows, and through TV programs, more and more people, intuitively feel the performance of the robot. For these free advertisements, the marching ant company is very happy and offers robot sponsorship.

Unlike the country, the media in the Western countries are talking about the threat of robots to human society. Even if the robot saves people, it is still a black, because the robot is the Chinese army ant company.

The online world is very lively, and Chen Mo’s life is very calm. I usually accept occasional interviews or attend some forums.

In the eyes of the outside world, Chen Mo is synonymous with genius. Many times, Chen Mo is wearing casual clothes, a typical model of a science and engineering man, so the image is low-key and peaceful.

Since Zhao Min knows the existence of room temperature superconducting materials, the company has recruited a lot of security personnel, the security level of the Institute and Building No. 1, and also the highest level, 24-hour normalization. With the presence of the Mexican woman, Chen Mo is not worried about the incorporation of commercial spies and secret agents into the company.

The room temperature superconducting material is synthesized at the usual speed to make a superconducting computer. This is a very big news. If it is announced, the trouble will be great. Even if you are working with the above, you must choose a suitable time.

Chen Mo is now carefully selecting technology in the technology library. After a while, there was a book that fell into Chen Mo’s head with the light curtain.

The science and technology library [training] stage of technology, there are countless, there is time, in advance to sort out some of the basic techniques useful for his research.

A good foundation is also beneficial for future research, first precipitation, and preparation for the explosion.

There are so many technologies here that he can't achieve it one by one. Only select the technology that is useful for the current research. The book of the "Technology Apprenticeship" stage only completes the normal temperature superconducting materials, and the supercomputer has not yet been completed. Moreover, the Science Library has six other directions and six other books are suspended.

He has no energy at all to market other technologies, other technologies, when necessary. And in the book of the apprenticeship, in addition to biopharmaceuticals, many technologies are already available in science and technology.

Therefore, the technology in the apprenticeship stage only serves as an auxiliary function, and the completion of the technology and technology in the stage of [technical apprenticeship] is his most important task at present.

Chen Mo did not know how long it took to get out of the technology library after getting the technology he needed. Just opened his eyes, he saw sitting next to him, looking at his little fish with a worried look.

"When did you come over? Why don't you wake me up?"

Chen Mozhen has some tired temples. Every time he gets the technology from the technology library, he consumes a lot of energy. Although it is not as horrible as the last time, it is a bit tired.

"Five fifteen minutes ago, watching you sleep so familiar, it did not bother you, but when you sleep, your face is a little bad, is it too tired?"

Xiao Yu handed the boiling water at the bedside to Chen Mo. Chen Mo’s office has a room for special rest, but here, the entire company, only a small fishing can come in.

"Nothing, maybe just woke up." Chen Mo took the small fishing cup and drank it.

"Is there a thing that I want to spit in the last time?" said Xiao Yu.

"It's okay." Chen Mo felt the care of Xiao Yu, warmed his heart and smiled, pushing Xiao Yu to leave the room: "I can't take a rest for a few days, do you have to cook something more delicious, find me something?"

“This is the map of the land area of the coastal city of Binhai next time.”

Xiao Yu followed Chen Mo back to the office area and opened the map on the hard drive. Chen Mo asked Zhao Min to find the land, Zhao Min was busy with the company's affairs, and yesterday he left the coastal city to attend an important meeting, so this task naturally fell on Xiao Yu.

"The land that is more suitable for your requirements has three pieces. The largest area is the 70-mu area in Xiangjiang District, the smallest one is in Qinhai, 28 acres, and the 56-acre incense burner beach."

"Which piece do you like?" Chen Mo asked.

"I like the incense burner beach. The environment here is very good, there are few people, but it is not too far from the city center. It belongs to the area under development. I heard that you used to build a house, I think it is a bit big. You still choose according to your ideas." Xiao Yu said: "I use the drone to take aerial map information."

The small fishing spot opened the map and was able to see a panoramic view of the three plots. The view of the beach is unobstructed, all in HD images.

"Ink girl, you sort out the geographic data of these three places." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, Mom."

After a while, a mathematical model appeared on the projection of the office, which was a preliminary geographic model extracted from aerial data.

Seeing the mathematical model, Xiao Yu was slightly surprised. She knew the existence of the ink girl, but Chen Mo never told her about the role of the ink girl.

She knows that the artificial intelligence of the ink girl is very advanced. The last time Chen Mo had an accident, the ink girl took the initiative to call her to know, but it was the first time that she saw the ink girl can automatically model. And the speed of modeling is more than one and a half points faster than manual operation.

“Are you surprised?”

"Yes, I didn't expect the ink girl to be so advanced." Xiaoyu said truthfully.

I used to know that the ink of the ink girl is the highest intelligence in the company. It seems that I am probably higher than she thought. The advanced level of the ink girl is beyond her imagination.

She didn't know, Chen Mo still had a lot of things to look at herself, but she was not interested, even if she knew these secrets, she could not help. So never ask, Chen Mo wants to let her know, naturally will tell her.

"Merg brother, the result came out." The ink girl interrupted the dialogue between the two: "According to the calculation, the geographical environment of Xianglutan is better. The average temperature difference between winter and summer is small, and the coverage of vegetation is relatively high. There is no industrial pollution around. The population is moderately dense, the transportation is convenient, and the crime rate is very low."

Ink women listed the data figures, and the data of the three plots was presented in front of Chen Mo. The data is only for the reference of Chen Mo, and the final decision is still Chen Mo.

"It seems that my family is right fishing." Chen Mo smiled and said: "Just choose the land of the incense burner beach."

“The auction of the land began ten days later. I am going to bid. Do you want to commission a design office to design a house?”

"No, they are too slow." Chen Mo smiled: "I came in person."

"You will also design?" Xiao Yu asked.

"It will be a matter of learning, but the ink girl will design, I don't have to worry about going to school." Chen Mo pointed at the computer.

chapters.title: Chapter 212: : Lin Shu Arrived
chapters.body:
Chapter 212: : Lin Shu Arrived

Two months, not long or short.

After the robot storm, people began to adapt to the existence of the robot.

Saudi Arabia adapts most quickly in all countries that import robots. Because in Saudi Arabia, there are cases of intelligent robotic citizens, so after importing intelligent robots, they quickly adapt and become Saudi intelligent civil citizens.

In addition to the United States, the island abroad, many European countries have imported robots for research. For the outside world, this is an emerging market, and many countries want to be able to take a share.

For the marching ant company, the market for intelligent robots is almost blank. Therefore, in the absence of breakthroughs in artificial intelligence technology, it is almost impossible to compete with the marching ant company for the robot market. So far, the robot is just a marching ant company playing a single game.

Lin Shu looked up at the headquarters of the marching ant company and hesitated for a long time before he went to the gate of the park.

What Chen Mo said when he left Jiangnan City was vivid. After she went to college, she could work in a marching ant company. Now that the college entrance examination has been completed, she should also come to the marching ant company.

She is a little nervous, and the marching ant company will not want her. After all, she is just a high school student who just graduated. And it has been more than half a year since then, Chen Mo will not remember her little character is not necessarily.

"Ms. Who are you looking for?" Just arrived at the door, Lin Shu was stopped by security guards at the door.

"I want to apply for your company." Lin Shuzhi said.

Now she is like a blank piece of white paper. She has no contact with the experience of the society. In the face of this situation, she is a little nervous.

"Apply?" The security guard looked up and down Lin Shu, looking confused. Lin Shu's eyes are pure, carrying a schoolbag, obviously a 17-year-old girl, and wearing too simple, not like the applicant: "What is your name?"

"Lin Shu." Lin Shu said truthfully: "The forest of the woods, comfortable and comfortable."

The security personnel picked up the headset and let people start to check. After receiving the response, they looked at Lin Shu: "Sorry, the company has no notice of your interview. You can send your resume through the online email, or send your resume to the company mailbox, and receive the company's email. Interview information, come over."

The security of the normal headquarters campus is very strict. It is not the employees of the company. If you want to enter the gate of the headquarters campus, you must go through a strict check. Avoid mixing some unrelated people into the company, causing trouble for the company's work.

Lin Shu anxious, she did not have a resume, but the high school student just graduated, no work experience. This kind of resume has been cast, all of which are mud cows into the sea, and it is impossible to be hired.

So she chose to come in person, but I didn’t expect it to be so difficult to enter the marching ant company.

"I will use the Chinese character programming language, Mr. Chen Mo said, let me work in the army ant company after I went to college." Lin Shu had to move out of the final killer. If she goes back like this, she can't step into the marching ant company.

"Boss? Do you know the boss?" The security personnel are serious and involve Chen Mo, and they must all take it seriously.

"I have seen it once, he let the company work." Lin Shu said.

"Please wait a moment." The security personnel picked up the headset again and began to confirm. Within a minute, I looked at Lin Shu again: "You can go in and brush your ID card." The security officer pointed to the machine next to him.

The outsiders must be checked by identity, especially after more than two months ago, after Zhao Min gave instructions to upgrade security work, the security work of the park was more strict. Visitors who are not visiting the company must go through the artificial intelligence face recognition registration before they can enter the company.

"The tallest building is the headquarters office." Security personnel pointed to the Ant Colony headquarters.

"Thank you." Lin Shu, according to the security personnel, swiped his ID card into the park.

The park is very large and very clean, but because the park has not been used for a long time, the branches and leaves of the trees have not been opened, so the greening is somewhat weak, but the buildings are brand new and modern.

She met the marching ant company in the news. I didn't expect to see it today. I was a little excited. After calming down, Lin Shucai went to the Ant Nest Building.

Just approaching the gate, a robot went to Lin Shu's side: "Miss Lin Shu, please come with me."

"Oh...oh!" Lin Shu stayed at the robot and his head was trying to adapt. She has seen robots on the Internet, but I didn’t expect to see it here: "Do you know me?"

"The boss said that he will take you to see him directly." The intelligent robot led Lin Shu to the elevator.

"boss?"

Lin Shu’s face was amazed, and his look was a little excited, and he followed the robot. In the marching ant company, there is only one person who can be called the boss, the one who has appeared in his mind for countless times. I did not expect that for half a year, that person still remembers her.

Along the way, many people looked at Lin Shu and were curious about Lin Shu’s identity. Lin Shu is too simple, his face is not childish, and it doesn't look like a staff member, not even a business.

The moment the elevator went to the top floor, Lin Shu excitedly licked his face and his heart beat faster. After several gates, I finally entered Chen Mo’s office area.

Seeing Chen Mo, Lin Shu’s eyes are full of excitement, gratitude, worship, respect and even more complicated feelings. It was this man who changed her life trajectory and gave her light when she was in despair.

"Chen...Mr. Chen Mo." Lin Shu flashed in tears and bowed deeply toward Chen Mo.

"Come and sit down, don't be restrained." Chen Mo smiled and led Lin Shu to sit down on the sofa: "What do you want to drink? Coffee or tea?"

"I... I don't have to drink." Lin Shu was very nervously sitting across from Chen Mo: "I came to work in a marching ant company. According to the original agreement, I went to college and came to your company to work part-time."

Chen Mo smiled: "Is your brother's illness better?"

"Okay, the operation is very smooth and the recovery is very good. Now with my grandfather at home, I will be able to go to school in September." Lin Shu said.

"Does the money be enough?" Chen Mo handed Lin Shu a cup of tea.

Lin Shu was a little busy and took the tea that Chen Mo handed over. He was very excited.

"The money is enough, the younger brother's surgery costs plus medical expenses, spent a total of 200,000, and now fully recovered. The rest of the money, repaired the grandfather's house, and for the younger brother to go to school. I owe you money, I must Will return it to you, you can let me do anything." Lin Shu lowered his head, can not look directly at Chen Mo's eyes.

"The money is the money to buy your software. You don't owe me anything, but I make a lot of money." Chen Mo said: "Is it admitted to college?"

"The college entrance examination is over, I reported to Binhai University. If there is no accident, I should be able to go up. I hope to work in your company to repay you. I don't have to pay." Lin Shu looked up at Chen Mo, and lowered his head. Dressing angle, knuckles whitish.

"You don't have to repay me, let's go." Chen Mo stood up and said.

"Mr. Chen Mo, if you didn't rescue me from the police station, I may be in jail now, my brother has no money to cure the disease, and my grandfather will be sad. I just want to repay you, don't take me away. I have been here for the past six months. Every day, I learn Chinese programming languages and computer technology."

Lin Shuzhen looked at him behind Chen Mo, tears in his eyes, with panic in his eyes, for fear that Chen Mo would drive her away.

"Maybe you understand the meaning of me wrong, I did not chase you away." Chen Mo looked at Lin Shu helplessly, sighed: "I said to go, follow me, report to the department where you work, hurry up. ”

The last four words were unquestionable, and Lin Shu immediately stood up and held back tears.

"Dry your tears, or let those employees think that I am bullying you, then my reputation will be broken." Chen Mo said.

"Oh, good." Lin Shu hurriedly wiped his tears.

Chen Mo left the office and Lin Shu followed him. Looking at Chen Mo's back, Lin Shu's eyes are still mixed with worship, respect and a little bit of complex emotions.

chapters.title: Chapter 213: : Invitation
chapters.body:
Chapter 213: : Invitation

Wei Zhe was very surprised that Chen Mo came personally. Not only him, the entire Chinese programming department, seeing Chen Mo that moment, his face was surprised.

Chen Mo rarely appears in the staff's office area because he has his own research, usually in a private laboratory or mysterious building No. 1. The company's affairs are also managed by Zhao Min.

Even Zhao Min, there are very few opportunities for ordinary employees to get in touch. Chen Mo, the young boss, is even more mysterious in the minds of ordinary employees.

Chen Mo supports the development of the entire army ant company technology. This horrible boss is almost the idol of the entire company, the young girl's dream lover.

The company’s big boss suddenly visited their department and made them nervous. If there is a problem, their problems will be big, and they will lose their jobs.

When the company split several departments into independent subsidiaries, the company's personnel made a huge adjustment. But the Chinese programming department is one of the departments with the smallest internal changes.

Their subordinates are independent departments of the R&D system, and the technical functions of the technicians are determined with little change. However, the personnel who can enter the Chinese character programming department are excellent software development talents of the marching ant company, and master the Chinese character programming language. Many companies have to dig their minds and want to dig up these high-level talents in the Chinese programming department. However, it is impossible to dig people because of the constraints of labor contracts.

The Chinese character programming language is one of the most popular computer languages.

Especially in the circle of computer technology experts, it is a threshold for mastering the Chinese programming language.

Many masters have seen the superiority of Chinese programming languages, especially the hacker circle, and countless hackers are interested in Chinese programming languages. The ‘clown virus’ kidnapping the city and blackmailing a country’s events has almost become a legend in the hacker’s circle.

It was this incident that made it possible to master the editing of the Chinese word programming language virus code and become a new Peugeot. More and more hackers have entered the market by mastering the Chinese character programming language and making Chinese character programming language viruses for profit.

Every virus programmed by Chinese characters is a new type of virus for windows systems. Although there are many anti-virus software for Chinese character programming languages, it is not a cure.

The popularity of Chinese programming languages has made people's concerns about computer security more and more serious. The term 'termite system', which claims to be able to withstand almost all virus attacks, naturally becomes the top choice for business operators.

No one wants to let the company's secrets leak due to hacking problems, or the work content is hacked away, causing greater losses. Many people don't care if they buy the money from the termite system.

Therefore, the popularity of Chinese programming languages has indirectly increased the revenue of the ‘corporate office’ market. The corporate office market is also constantly delivering blood to the army ants. If the revenue of the seismograph is violent, then the income of the enterprise office is drizzle and lasting long.

With the popularity of the 'termite system', one of the work of the Chinese programming department is to develop the ecosystem of this system in depth.

The formation of the Chinese programming department has grown stronger in the hands of Wei Zhe, because this department has some special characteristics.

"Boss, why don't you notice when you come here?" Wei Zhe said.

Since being recruited by Chen Mo into the army ant company, Wei Zhe has been like a fish, like a thousand miles of horses in the Bole phase, galloping the battlefield.

"I am also suddenly having something."

Chen Mo glanced at the members of the Chinese Programming Department. There are three groups, each with ten people, forming a competitive situation, competing in cooperation, and cooperating in competition. It is the enemy and the friend. This kind of healthy competition is what the company wants.

"You gathered so well, open the meeting?" Chen Mo asked.

"Discuss technical issues." Wei Zhe said.

In charge of the Chinese programming department, Wei Zhe will let the clown organize the kind of technical communication, and let him bring it here.

In the technical exchange, all employees have equal status, face-to-face discussion of Chinese character programming learning experience, and even exchange technology. The Chinese character programming language is in the development stage, and many things need people to explore.

This open communication way of thinking can quickly find the problem defects, and the team members of the Chinese character programming department can make progress very quickly.

Of course, the reward and punishment system is also inevitable.

Each team member has a technical question and asks the other team members for answers. Ask the group with the most technical problems, bonus bonuses, groups with the most questions, and bonus bonuses. However, these or technical issues must be judged to be useful.

This kind of mechanism to encourage discussion has further enhanced the enthusiasm of team members. Naturally, the technical staff of the Chinese character programming department is getting higher and higher.

It is an unexpected surprise that Wei Zhe has not touched the management and adopted the wild method to achieve this effect. Zhao Min did not interfere with the management of Wei Zhe and let him do it.

"Yeah. It seems that everyone's learning is very strong." Chen Mo nodded with satisfaction: "Your Chinese programming department is the company who is most familiar with Chinese character programming. After so long understanding, I believe that each of you, Know the benefits of this computer language. I attach great importance to your department."

Chen Mo said that the employees were as excited as the chicken blood. In the company, I was able to get the department that Chen Mo praised, but I have never heard of it. This is the first time.

"Today brings you a new colleague." Chen Mo reached out and directed everyone's attention to Lin Shu: "She is Lin Shu, who is a talented person who is familiar with Chinese programming languages."

Everyone looked puzzled at Lin Shu, Lin Shupu's clothing, the tender face, not like the people at work, but the kind of campus. At this time, Lin Shu was a little nervous. This was the first time she entered the army ant company. She didn't even think about it before.

"Hello everyone, my name is Lin Shu, I just graduated from high school." Lin Shu said to everyone.

Lin Shuyi introduced that everyone’s face was surprised. High school graduation was recruited by Chen Mote, listening to a bit of tears, but the facts are in sight. However, many people still think about it. There may be a relationship between Chen Mo and Lin Shu. Otherwise, Chen Mote recruited a high school student to come in. This can't be said.

"She works for Wei Zhe," Chen Mo said.

"Okay." Wei Zhe nodded and looked at Lin Shu.

"Let's study here." Chen Mozhen, Lin Shu, saw her nod and looked at Wei Zhe: "You arrange your work, you will continue to meet."

After turning around and leaving, just just taking a step, I turned to look at Wei Zhe.

"Forgot to tell you that she is the maker of the 'Jiangnan Virus', the predecessor of the 'Clown Virus.' The company's termite anti-virus software is the predecessor software she created. Don't look down on her because she is young."

When Chen Mo’s words came out, the people on the field took a breath of air. At this moment, they understand why Chen Mo will recruit such a small girl. It turned out that it was not related, but it was really capable.

The clown virus is very loud in the circle. They are engaged in this line, and it is impossible to not know. Unexpectedly, the predecessor 'Jiangnan virus' incident was actually made by a little girl who was only 17 or 18 years old.

Many self-proclaimed geniuses feel that it is not a big blow.

"Lin Shu, you should be my assistant first, and then arrange other work after you are familiar with the company and department." Wei Zhe did not dare to neglect, because Lin Shu is not an ordinary person.

Chen Mo let her in, obviously want to reserve talent for the company. Moreover, there is a real talent, and he must be personally led to be assured.

“Thank you.” Lin Shu said with a smile: “I am very happy to meet everyone.”

"Well, welcome. But our talk continues. Now Lin Xiaomei has also joined in and communicated with everyone." Wei Zhe smiled and applauded.

Chen Mo returned to the office and took over the tea that the robot handed over.

Lin Shu is a genius, so he values it. No one teaches, self-study, and develops smart code without guidance. Although there is only a piece of smart code, it is enough to explain her ability.

As long as they accept the systematic study, the future is boundless, and their company may be able to have more generals.

Just wanted to put on the lab coat and enter the lab. Xiaoyu appeared. He handed him an invitation letter: "A week later, Binhai City will hold a cocktail party. The famous entrepreneurs and CEOs in the province will come over and have yours. Invitation card."

“Cham Chamber Reception?” Chen Mo took the invitation and glanced at it. After a moment of contemplation, he nodded: “Let’s go see it.”

chapters.title: Chapter 214: : Xu Jialin'S Proposal
chapters.body:
Chapter 214: : Xu Jialin'S Proposal

"You don't follow me?"

Chen Mo stood in front of the mirror and looked at the little fisherman who was carefully tidying his tie. Xiao Yu’s current appearance is a gentle little wife.

"I will not go with you. I am not suitable for this kind of entertainment. If you go by yourself, there will be a lot of socialites, or rich families around you." Xiao Yu smiled and said: "If I am in the past, now The evening home will be drowned by vinegar."

"Then you are not afraid that I will be taken away by those rich families?" Chen Mo said.

"I can't catch it." Xiao Yu kissed Chen Mo's face and smiled lightly: "I am waiting for you to come back tonight. The time is almost over, it's time to go."

Blue sea floor. Here is the top private club in Binhai.

The existence of such a club is to provide a secret social environment for the same social class. Members of the clubhouse also become a symbol of wealth and status. Every year, those who pay the club membership fee must be more than one million.

This cocktail party was held in the top clubhouse of Lanhailou.

The cocktail party gathered most of the entrepreneurs in the province, there are hundreds of people, each invited person, is an elite in one field or a person with a face.

The Chamber of Commerce is a multi-disciplinary social group that promotes the prosperity of industry and commerce. It is the process of orderly organization of merchants. The government and businessmen, businessmen, and the link between merchants and society.

To put it bluntly, the Chamber of Commerce is a group of businessmen. One of the purposes is to provide a platform for communication between merchant groups.

However, the existence of chambers of commerce is different from forums or summits. Its nature is industry associations, with internal rules and advantages.

Many companies want to join the Chamber of Commerce because of the many benefits. Industry groups, resource sharing, information channels, and contacts are all great benefits.

Chen Mo’s participation this time is the annual cocktail party of the South China Chamber of Commerce. Similar cocktails are held every year in different cities, and this time the marching ant company was invited to participate for the first time.

On the parking lot of the private clubhouse, various luxury cars are parked. The luxury car here can hold a large luxury car exhibition, just let go of a car, ordinary people can't afford it for a lifetime.

This kind of reception is attended by people with heads and faces, and luxury cars are a kind of identity. There are still a lot of luxury cars outside, and they are gathering in the direction of the clubhouse. Various characters come down from the car and enter the clubhouse.

Chen Mo looked at the scenery outside the window. He didn't have much leisure and elegance. He came to this place to eat, drink and have fun. He was not sure about the existence of these places. It is also the first time to come.

After getting off the bus, Chen Mo sorted out the dress and walked into the venue.

Xiao Yu did not come with him, Zhao Min was on a business trip, only to come over. Although I don't like this occasion very much, it is necessary to come over and accept the invitation.

"Mr. Chen Mo, please ask inside, the president has been waiting for a long time."

After seeing Chen Mo coming over, Zeng Zeye immediately greeted him and led Chen Mochao to the hall. Others can not know, but Chen Mo has to know, especially in the coastal city.

Not long after, under the leadership of Zeng Zeye, Chen Mo entered the banquet hall.

Magnificent and luxurious. Seeing the decoration of the hall, his mind instinctively emerged two words. It is the top private club in Binhai.

When Chen Moyi came in, he attracted the attention of the entire hall.

Many people are surprised and look like they are ready to move. Many people want to contact Chen Mo through various channels, and finally fail.

This time Chen Mo attended the reception, which was a huge surprise.

The marching ant company is not listed. According to the current profit scale, it is already the richest enterprise in China, and the profits are also terrible.

If the marching ant company is listed on iPo, the market value will immediately surpass all listed companies on the market. This is a toon and the sweetest one. If you can get in touch with Chen Mo and reach a cooperation, their company will skyrocket.

Under the guidance of Zeng Zeye, Chen Mo soon met Xu Jialin, president of the South China Chamber of Commerce.

A real estate tycoon in China is also a well-known figure in the industry. In China, it is almost one of the real estate giants.

"Chen Chen, long-awaited for a long time." Xu Jialin greeted him with a surprise: "It is an honor to be able to show your face."

"Hello, Xu total." Chen Mo smiled.

"Let's go over there and talk slowly."

Xu Jialin reached out and led Chen Mochao not far away. Now the attention of the entire hall is on Chen Mo. Everyone's look is different, envy, jealousy, hate, surprise, and even other emotions. I can't wait for Chen Mo's achievements to be their own, and I can't wait for the people around Chen Mo to be themselves.

Many people think about it, and when Xu Jialin and Chen Mo are finished talking, what methods should they use to get close to Chen Mo? The reception offers such a good platform that they can't miss.

Especially those ladies and rich families, Chen Mo in their eyes, is simply the man who dreams. If you can get Chen Mo, they can get the things that countless women dream of.

Just for these eyes, Chen Mo and others turned a blind eye.

After the two sat down on the sofa, Xu Jialin said: "Chen Chen, your name, I heard the ears are getting up, I really want to see you, I have no chance. I didn’t expect to see you today. Come, today we have to have a drink."

"Xu Zong, you have won the prize. We have different circles, I am a technical circle, you are real estate, and the intersection is not big." Chen Mo said slowly.

"The intersection is very big."

Xu Jialin picked up a glass of red wine and handed it to Chen Mo. The person who allowed him to hand the wine was slap in the palm of his hand.

"How?" Chen Mo took the glass and touched him.

Xu Jialin shook his head and smiled: "The future smart city is a development trend. The combination of technology and real estate, building a high-tech integrated intelligent building, environmental protection concept, intelligent concept, smart city. The combination of technology and real estate, this is the future world. Vision."

"Xu Zongzhen is really unique." Chen Mo is not allowed.

Xu Jialin is able to go to this position today, definitely not lucky. In addition to courage, there is a larger view of the situation and direction.

"Oh, this is some of my visions. Your company is a leader in the technology industry. Our company has made small achievements in real estate. I have a proposal. If we join forces, we can almost certainly have no rivals in China." Xu Jialin is full of pride.

He is confident in the concept of a smart building, but lacks a suitable partner.

The average company can't meet his requirements. Whether it is capital or technology, the marching ant company is undoubtedly the best choice. As long as Chen Mo agreed to cooperate, he has the confidence to continue to lead the real estate market.

“Is there any interest in Chen?” Xu Jialin asked.

"Xu’s thoughts are very good. I believe that Xu’s smart building project will be released, and there will be many collaborators.” Chen Mo did not directly give Xu Jialin the answer, but the wise man could hear what he meant.

"Chen is not good to consider?" Xu Jialin brows can not be seen, wrinkled, and then stretched, once again to Chen Mo.

"To be honest, our company has no plans to touch the real estate industry for the time being." Chen Mo opened the door.

This project is a big fat meat. Xu Jialin is a real estate veteran. He is an old-fashioned person. It is impossible to give him half of this fat in a few words. There are other conditions for cooperation between the two sides.

He is not interested in entering the real estate industry. Even if he wants to go in, he should be cautious when working with Xu Jialin.

chapters.title: Chapter 215: : Calculation?
chapters.body:
Chapter 215: : Calculation?

The atmosphere of the two people was weird, Xu Jialin's eyes flickered, thinking about countermeasures. Chen Mo’s direct rejection made him unexpected. In his mind, no matter how great Chen Mo is, he is still a young man.

Money is almost something that cannot be refused.

No matter how great this person is, or how powerful it is, it is no exception. In this era, people who regard money as dirt, can almost say no. Those so-called money, such as dirt, but no money.

No one would be too much money, but Chen Mo did not hesitate to refuse, which made him very surprised. Real estate this cake, it can be said that no one does not want.

Especially in China, this huge cake has made countless giants covet. Many people want to enter but they can't.

His proposal is undoubtedly to open the door to real estate to Chen Mo, but Chen Mo did not even look at it and refused him.

"Chen Chen, are you so anxious to refuse? There is no chance for cooperation between us?" Xu Jialin said: "This is a perfect opportunity. Many people want to enter this industry and cannot find an entrance."

"Xu Zong, give me such a big advantage, will not be unconditional?" Chen Mo smiled.

Xu Jialin’s eyes flashed and he did not expect Chen Mo to see this step. This young man is smarter than he thinks, and he is more calm and calm, not the one that does not see the interests.

"It seems that Chen always refuses because of this." Xu Jialin smiled and said: "To tell the truth, there are indeed a few conditions."

If he is unconditional, it is stupid. As a qualified businessman, there is no interest, he absolutely shot.

"The condition is that we exchange 5% of the shares with your company. We become one of your shareholders, so that we can achieve all-round cooperation without scruping." Xu Jialin said.

"Sorry, Mr. Xu, I have the opportunity to cooperate again next time." Chen Mo's meaning is already obvious.

From the beginning of the seismograph, the market value of the marching ant company has always been a mystery. Even the predators on Wall Street can't give a real valuation.

As long as Chen Mo is not stupid, he will not hand over the shares.

Even if it is a company that has joined the army ant company, the market value will soar, let alone hold the shares of the army ant company.

The market value of Xu's real estate is very high, but in the eyes of Chen Mo, even the entire Xu Group is not worth a fraction of the army ant company.

The marching ants began to appear, and if he bought the shares, he did not know how many times.

However, the shares of the marching ant company are still in the hands of Chen Mo. This is what he got, there is no need to send money to the capitalist in vain.

Xu Jialin sighed and his face was a bit regrettable. As for the deep emotions, no one can know: "The intelligent building has always been my dream. It seems that there is no chance for the time being."

"To help Xu’s general, we should not only be our marching ants, but many domestic companies can do it. I believe that many people will not refuse the conditions of General Xu." Chen Mo said.

"This time I will study again." Xu Jialin picked up the glass and touched Chen Mo: "This time I invited Chen to come over, there is another thing, introduce the individual to you."

"Who makes Xu always so solemn?" Chen Mo laughed.

After Chen Mogang finished, a girl appeared in a black evening gown, revealing a scented shoulder collar, and her eyes were helpless. She looked at Chen Mo from time to time and flashed a curiosity.

"This is my daughter, Xu Xinxin, who just returned from the UK after reading the doctor. Chen is always a young talent in the country, so I will introduce you this time. I am worried, this is the boss of the marching ant company, the domestic man of the world. Chen Mo. You young people meet for the first time, have a common topic, and have a good chat. Don't be like me, I know the business all day."

After Xu Jialin’s heart was long and Xu Xin’s heart, Chen Mo pleaded guilty and went to other small groups to start socializing.

"Hello, I have heard your name for a long time." Xu Xinxin reached out gracefully and shook Chen Mo.

"Hello." Chen Mo smiled politely.

"What kind of hobbies does Mr. Chen usually have?" Xu Xin asked.

Seeing Xu Xinxin and Chen Mopan talking about it, many rich girls and ladies who are concerned about Chen Mo are disappointed. Xu Xinxin is the daughter of Xu Jialin and Dr. Haigui. He is a beautiful goddess with outstanding looks and noble temperament.

No matter the family background or the temperament, it is not comparable to the average person. Xu Xinxin appeared, they can almost say that there is no chance.

This is a true giant child.

As the two talked, Chen Mo also reached this conclusion. Many people don't feel very good about the word rich second generation. Excessive luxury, life is gorgeous, and defeating the family are the common impressions of the society on the second generation.

But those people can only be regarded as upstarts who have more money than ordinary people.

The rich have more resources, and their children can naturally get better innate conditions. The real giants attach great importance to the education of their children. The children raised are naturally better.

During the conversation, Xu Xinxin was helpless.

This is the helplessness of the children of the giants. Sometimes, for the benefit of the family, many rich women and women have become tools for family marriage and marry those who do not like it.

This kind of thing can't be seen by ordinary people, but it always exists. Because of the exchanges of the rich, the circle is small, but it is very open. So the life of the rich is very complicated, not that she can change.

She is already lucky compared to others.

The person in front of her eyes is Chen Mo, the most dazzling star, the dream of countless girls. No matter what the conditions, it is much better than other men.

Her emotional intelligence is not low, she can feel the estrangement of Chen Mo. They all say that women chase men's gauze, but this man does not like you, the middle interval is definitely Sahara.

Chen Mo’s unsatisfactory reaction made her suffer a lot, and her position moved to Chen Mo’s side: “Mr. Chen, what wine do you like to drink?”

Chen Mo is not salty and not too light, and he maintains an appropriate distance from Xu Xinxin.

He also has to admit that Xu Xin is very good and better than many women. But Xiao Yu’s ordinary, sensible, gentle girl is what he likes.

Xu Jialin’s intention is obvious. Young people with such good conditions can become his son-in-law. The two financial resources, and the network of the Xu Group, will become the most influential consortium family in China.

"I didn't study wine. When I was with my friends, I just drank some beer." Chen Mo smiled.

"Mr. Chen is really real. Is there any honour for Mr. Chen to have a drink?" Xu Xinxin recruited the waiter and took out a glass of champagne and laughed.

"It is my pleasure to drink with Miss Xu, this beautiful girl." Chen Mo picked up the wine glass in front of him and touched Chen Mo.

Oh...

In one corner, a woman took a miniature camera and walked over to Xu Jialin: "The boss, they all took it."

"Very good, according to the plan, can not let the third person know." Xu Jialin said.

"Understand." The woman nodded and turned away.

Xu Jialin’s face showed a slight smile. Some things need to be helped. He admits that his daughter is good enough, plus his help, won Chen Mo, it should not be a problem.

As long as Chen Mo and his daughter are better, the Xu Group and the marching ant company teamed up. The technical advantages of the marching ant company and the resource network of their group, the Xu Group will become a world-class consortium.

chapters.title: Chapter 216: : Saving The United States
chapters.body:
Chapter 216: : Saving The United States

Chen Mo sat on the sofa with a wine glass, and from time to time someone came over to talk and handed him a business card. Self-introduction and conversations between the two sides are all about nonsense nonsense.

This kind of entertainment, Chen Mo is not the first time to participate. Some people say hello, they will raise their glasses and they can't talk deeply. It is still necessary to do it.

Unconsciously, the slow music stopped and changed into dance music. The scene was also lively, and everyone started looking for a partner and went to the dance floor to dance with the music.

This kind of communicative reception, in addition to the banquet, is a dance party.

The dance party makes people more close to the communication, and the dance is more liberal and free than the banquet. Without the language-only communication between the glasses, the dance can make more physical contact and bring the distance between the two sides closer.

Physical contact will make both parties more willing to exchange some messages.

"Mr. Chen, don't you invite your favorite dancer to dance?"

In this kind of occasion, it is generally the man who invites the lady to dance. Seeing that Chen Mo has not moved, Xu Xinxin has no choice but to take the initiative.

"I don't know how to dance, I can't jump, I invite others to jump, and I'm wrong." Chen Mo shrugged.

"It turned out to be like this." Xu Xin smiled, his eyes were full of strange looks: "I didn't expect anything that Mr. Chen would not."

Chen Mo said: "I am not omnipotent."

"Then I have the opportunity to invite you to dance a dance? It is all right." Xu Xin hearted to the other women and eagerly moved to invite.

Chen Mo did not refuse. Since he came to this occasion, he must respect the etiquette of this occasion. He did not take the initiative to invite, but Xu Xinxin’s words said that he would not be able to refuse.

Other women saw this scene, and their eyes were envious.

Chen Mo is the object of their dreams. Now they are first and foremost, and their opponents are still excellent and impeccable Xu Xin, so that they feel the opportunity is even more embarrassing.

Xu Weixin looked at Chen Mo between the feet, and the corners of his mouth floated slightly. Father asked her to come over, she is not very willing. After learning that the other party was Chen Mo, Xu Xin’s heart came over.

After the observation, she gradually became interested in Chen Mo.

Chen Mo is very calm, calm, and speaks with a sense of casualness and free and easy, not deliberately to install a gentleman. This feeling is different from the man she met before.

In the past, many men, in front of her, were very polite and very gentleman. Perhaps Chen Mo did not come from a wealthy family, so he does not have the grace of a wealthy child, and more is a casual, which is very attractive to her.

Xu Xinxin's hand was placed on Chen Mo's shoulder. The faces of the two were very close. She could clearly see every detail on Chen Mo's face. Calm, calm, and Chen Mo’s look at this moment is very serious.

It’s just a bit rigid and awkward, like a complete newbie. It seems that Chen Mozhen is a person who can't dance.

She did not know, Chen Mo was thinking about the pace and steps at this time.

Now all the movements are imitated by his powerful memory and the movements of the people next to him. There is no naturalness at all, very rigid.

Fortunately, it is just a simple footwork, otherwise Chen Mo is really impossible to complete.

Others saw this scene, and they also sighed in their hearts. Looking at Xu Jialin’s eyes, he was more admired, and he was willing to use his daughter to approach Chen Mo.

Now Chen Mo is a newcomer, many people want to get close, but Chen Mo rarely participates in entertainment, the average person has no chance to contact. It’s hard to have a chance tonight, and Xu Jialin is the first to let them hate. With Chen Mo, a potential star with unlimited potential, their future will definitely have hopes to shoulder the Xu Group.

In the distance, Xu Jialin, who is paying attention to the two people, has a satisfactory color in his eyes.

He thinks his daughter is good enough, and winning Chen Mo is not a problem. The next moment, Xu Jialin's mouth was slightly upturned and he drank the drink in his hand.

Chen Mo focused on adapting to the dance steps, and did not pay attention to other people's eyes and reactions. For him, it’s just an ordinary entertainment.

"Mr. Chen, in fact, on this occasion, you don't have to focus on dancing. It's the second best thing to dance. The main nature of ballroom dancing is to make friends." Xu Xinxin said: "I take the liberty to ask, what kind of girl does Mr. Chen like? ”

"Ha ha,……"

When Chen Mogang wanted to speak, he was interrupted by a voice.

"Xu Jialin, I want you to regret it forever."

A voice full of hate, breaking the harmonious atmosphere of the entire hall. Everyone was shocked by this voice and looked at the source of the sound. I saw a woman, holding a knife and rushing toward Xu Xin’s heart.

"Be careful."

Chen Mo’s face changed slightly, and he couldn’t think too much. He moved Xu Xin’s heart into his arms, lifted his feet sideways, and swept his face on the woman’s arm.

The woman snorted, her body lost balance, and she fell to the ground, and the scene was chaotic.

"go to hell."

The woman grabbed the knife and climbed up from the ground again. She rushed over to Xu Xin, at least not close, and was kicked by Chen Mo.

"Catch people, are you stupid?"

Xu Jialin’s roaring sound awakened everyone, and the security guards on the field rushed toward the woman and pressed her to the ground.

"Xu Jialin, you are not good..."

When the woman’s words were not finished, the security guards licked their mouths and could not move.

From start to finish, the whole process is less than half a minute. Many people have not even seen what happened.

After the woman was subdued, the talents looked at Chen Mo and looked surprised. Just now Chen Mo shot twice and protected Xu Xinxin. They did not expect that the man of the storm had such a good skill.

Even Xu Xin, who was protected by Chen Mo, was shocked at this time. She did not expect that this would happen suddenly. Looking at Chen Mo's gaze, there was a bit of gaze in his eyes.

The bodyguards of many rich people have already appeared in the hall, and looked at the surroundings seriously. Wang Hai has also appeared around Chen Mo.

"Small, okay?" Xu Jialin walked to Xu Xin's heart, his face was very ugly.

"Nothing, but Mr. Chen saved me." Xu Xinxin said.

"Thank you, Mr. Chen." Xu Jialin said with gratitude: "This time you have a loss, otherwise the little girl is in danger."

“It’s just a matter of raising your hand.” Chen Mo looked at the woman who was on the ground by the security guard: “Who is she?”

"This woman is my secretary. I asked her to leave today in the morning. Maybe because of this, I hate it and mix it in my name. I didn't expect to have a white-eyed wolf and let everyone laugh." Xu Jialin black face Immediately, I looked at the woman on the ground: "Take her first, don't break everyone's interest."

The woman was taken down and the music in the hall rang again, as if anything had happened.

It’s just that it’s impossible to do it. They clearly saw that Chen Mo’s foot was twice and he saved Xu’s heart. The skill was very fast and he had completely practiced it.

If Chen Mo does not shoot, everyone will never know that Chen Mo, who is calm and peaceful, is actually in a good position. This is truly hidden.

Everyone looked at Chen Mo's eyes, completely different, especially those rich girls, looking at Chen Mo's eyes, all with small stars, just handsome feet, they all remember.

"I really thank you just now. If it weren't for you, I am afraid that I will be in danger." Xu Xinxin went to Chen Mo again and solemnly thanked him.

"Nothing." Chen Mo gently shook his head.

Fortunately, I usually exercise, the strength of the potential development is not ruined, the woman has not practiced, so he was easily stopped. Walking back to the sofa and sitting down, Chen Mo began to think about the details. The thing just happened, he felt a little weird, and he couldn’t tell where it was.

Not long after, Chen Mo got up and left the venue. He did not want to stay here.

chapters.title: Chapter 217: : Special Substances
chapters.body:
Chapter 217: : Special Substances

Xiao Yu is sitting on the sofa watching the TV series eating a fruit platter. After living with Chen Mo, some of her habits have not changed.

In front of outsiders, she showed a smart and gentle image. Only at home, she showed ordinary little women to be the truest self.

"Little fishing sister, Mercedes is back." The voice of the ink girl reminded.

Chen Mo installed artificial intelligence in the villa, and now all the electronic products in the villa can be managed intelligently.

"it is good."

Upon hearing the reminder of the ink girl, Xiao Yu rushed to open the door. Just arrived at the door, I saw Chen Mo coming in.

"Come back." Xiao Yu smiled and said: "Do you have fun at the party?"

"The evenings are all the same." Chen Mo took off his coat and handed it to Xiao Yu, dragging his shoes into it.

Xiao Yu put a good coat, went to Chen Mo and began to give him a tie. Seriously, Chen Mo feels comfortable, and the depressed mood of the accident at the party just now is a lot better.

"There is a woman's perfume smell, which woman is so lucky?" Xiao Yu sniffed on Chen Mo's shoulder, his voice was sour.

"Xu Jialin's daughter, there was a little accident at the party." Chen Mo simply told Xiaoyu what happened at the reception.

"I didn't expect this kind of thing." Xiao Yu carefully looked at Chen Mo and found that there was no injury, he was relieved: "The Xu Xin heart you saved, very beautiful?"

"To tell the truth, a very good woman, what do you ask this? Will not be angry?" Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu.

"I am not so stingy. Before you go, I will be prepared. Your conditions are enough to attract any good woman, but I am not in my pocket." Xiaoyu smiled a little.

She knows Chen Mo, so she is relieved that Chen Mo does not need a woman who is too good. Because he is good enough, and the excellent conditions are not very attractive to him. He only needs a woman who is sensible and trusts him.

"The sixth sense of a woman tells me that in the future, Xu Xin will definitely find you." Xiao Yu said.

“Why is this so sure?” Chen Mo asked.

"You don't want to think about how I was cheated by you at the beginning." Xiaoyu said.

"That is my luck, but also our fate." Chen Mo pet touched the head of Xiao Yu, if not that encounter, he did not have the situation today.

"Don't say this, go to the bath quickly. I can't let the fragrance of other women put on my man for too long." Xiaoyu said after untiring Chen Mo's tie.

"Hey? Do you know how to declare sovereignty? As a hostess, you should wash it yourself." Chen Mo took the little fish in his arms.

Xiao Yu did not struggle, shyly buried his head in his chest, let him pick up and walk into the bathroom.

Back to the company the next day, Chen Mogang entered the office and sat down. On the computer desktop, an entertainment news popped up: "Merg brother, you made a headline again. The reception at the reception last night was exposed by the media."

"It’s really troublesome, so it’s a broken thing, but it’s still headline.” Chen Mo cried and laughed at the news that the ink girl popped the table.

"This is not a broken thing. It saves the beauty under the knife of the gangster. Two tricks are used to subdue the gangsters. This is a classic hero to save the beauty. And the hero is the boss of the marching ant company. The beauty is the jewel of Xu's hand, and the door is right." The woman said.

Chen Mo was speechless and he was actually ridiculed by artificial intelligence. Looking at the news carefully, there are quite a few things about his rescue of Xu Xin.

Overnight, so much news, and even the inside story of him and Xu Xinxin broke. He also saw it with his own eyes, only to know that he and Xu Xin had these things, and had to admire the imagination of those who were from the media.

After reading the news, Chen Mo was idle and had nothing to do.

Other company products, developed by research teams. The room temperature superconducting materials have been produced in small quantities, and the superconducting computer is also being developed and assembled 24 hours a day.

With the intelligent robot and the artificial intelligence of the ink girl, almost everything can be handed over to the robot. He was busy and dying to live, but leisurely. The calculation of artificial intelligence, modeling efficiency, as long as he said it, do not need him to do it, the ink girl will quickly complete it for him.

"Merg brother, the human potential development agent has been purified according to your intentions." Chen Mo thought about what to do next, the voice of the ink girl reminded him.

"Oh, just right."

Chen Mo stood up from his seat and put on the lab coat into the lab.

During this time, in addition to some basic technical information, there is also the study of human potential development technology. The supercomputer didn't finish that fast, so he also found something to do.

The development of low-level human potential is the first technology he got from the technology library, and the most special one. Because the development of low-level human potential belongs to the level of [trainee], it is classified according to the function, and it belongs to the stage of [technical apprentice].

Chen Mo has been in the science and technology library, [trainee] level, only this technology on the development of human potential.

In every technology, there are dozens or even hundreds of similar technology technology libraries. This technology has only one copy, which seems a bit shabby, so he attaches great importance to this technology.

After several dangerous and good physical qualities, he was allowed to escape.

There was no opportunity to study in depth before, and now that he is free at this time, he can study this technology in depth.

After entering the laboratory, Chen Mo placed a dozen tubes containing orange liquid in a transparent refrigerator. Those orange liquids are the purification fluids for low-level human potential development agents.

When Chen Mo carried out the development of human potential, three medicated baths were needed. At that time, he did not have purification techniques and could only absorb it in the most primitive way. There are purification techniques now, but these potions are useless to him because one person can only do a low-level development.

Chen Mo carefully took a test tube from the freezer and took a little solution with a dropper.

According to the introduction of potential development technology, after the mixing of several medicinal materials, the special components of those medicinal materials will have a chemical reaction, which will produce substances that develop the potential of the human body. This special substance will not change the human genetics.

“Is the analysis analyzed?” Chen Mo asked.

"There is analysis, most of the ingredients inside are the original ingredients on the medicinal materials, but there is an unknown substance. The activity of this substance is very large and special. For the time being, no document has been found to record this substance, like It is a new substance produced by the chemical reaction of medicinal materials, a bit like protein." A second-generation robot went to Chen Mo and said.

"It should be it, let's test it now." Chen Mo diluted the solution, mixed it into a saline inhalation syringe, and walked toward the mouse not far away.

These tests cannot be placed on humans and can only be tested by animals. Although he has confidence in these drugs, he has to figure out whether there are any harms and get more detailed data.

He was just a medicated bath, and now I think it’s a bit bold. The black thick potion was like black sewage. It is now purified, much better than before.

These pharmacies only need one, and they will take the role of three medicated baths.

Ten mice were divided into two groups. According to the control variables, after injecting different concentrations of potential to develop the drug, Chen Mo was able to take up the syringe.

"Mer brother, Xu Xinxin came to the company to find you, she wants to see you." Chen Mogang just put the syringe, the ink girl will open a reminder.

"It's really coming!"

chapters.title: Chapter 218: :Refuse
chapters.body:
Chapter 218: :Refuse

Xu Xinxin stood by the window of the reception room and overlooked the park of the marching ant company. This is her first time to come to the army ant company, as one of the most well-known companies in the country, she is very good. The emergence of seismographs is enough to become the greatest company.

A man who is one year younger than her, started from scratch, and in a short period of time, the company has grown to a position where countless companies are on the side.

I am afraid this legend, no one can break.

Chen Mo gave her a feeling of more mystery. She didn't know the man at all, and even her hobbies were not clear, but she was curious about Chen Mo.

Especially after last night, the whole brain was the moment when Chen Mo opened her. That kind of security is something she has never experienced before.

Originally, the father let her approach Chen Mo, and now she found that she gradually became interested in Chen Mo.

“How long will it take for your boss to come out?” Xu Xinxin looked at the robot in the reception room.

After half an hour to march to the army ant company, he was told that Chen Mo was in the laboratory. I am still waiting here, there is no movement.

“Mr. Xu Xinxin, Mr. is in the laboratory. When studying, no one can bother. If you are in a hurry, you can come back next time, or you will have to wait until Mr. is out of the lab to inform Mr.” said the reception robot. .

"Then wait a minute."

From the time she entered the marching ant company, she was received by the robot. The advanced intelligence of the marching ant company is beyond her imagination. It is no wonder that his father will have the idea of finding a marching ant company to jointly develop a smart building.

Xiaoyu walked into the reception room and looked at Xu Xinxin. This woman is the daughter of the real estate tycoon Xu Xinxin.

When Chen Mo told her about the party at the party last night, Xiao Yu guessed that Xu Xin would come to Chen Mo, but he did not expect it to be so fast.

"Miss Xu, the boss is out."

"Ok."

Xu Xinxin nodded and stood up from his seat and left with Xiao Yu.

Seeing the two people, many employees were surprised to see, until the two entered the elevator, those employees were talking about it.

"What is the situation? He assistant took Xu Xinxin to see the boss. Is this information a little big? Is the war between the predecessor and the incumbent?"

"The last wool, didn't you see the boss coming with the assistant today? He assistant is very good in today's temperament and mood. The network is just a rumor, don't mess around. But the boss saves people, it is quite powerful. I didn’t expect the boss to be so good."

"Is advised you not to talk about it now, and when you are discovered by the supervisor, you are ready to roll out and leave."

I don't know who said it, everyone immediately shut up. Now is the working time, was found in the discussion of the boss's private affairs, in accordance with the company's regulations, the serious is to be expelled.

"Miss He is the assistant of Mr. Chen Mo?"

Xu Xinxin looked at Xiaoyu. She had seen some of Chen Mo’s video materials. Many times, there will be a girl’s shadow around her, which is the small fishing in front of her eyes.

"I am the assistant to the president and the assistant to the boss." Xiao Yu laughed.

Xu Xinxin was surprised to see Xiaoyu. He was able to take up these two positions. It was definitely not because the army ants could not find a suitable person. It is probably because Xiaoyu was a bit special.

"What kind of school did Miss He graduate? What professional? Can be recognized by your president and boss." Xu Xinxin asked.

“Binhai University, economic management.” Xiao Yu said.

Xu Xinxin was even more surprised because Binhai University is just an ordinary university in China. A student at a general university, as an assistant to the president and Chen Mo, can help two important positions, and even the best people can not have such treatment.
