"Then your work is not a lot. Does your boss not hire a secretary or assistant?" Xu Xinxin asked.

"This question, you have to ask the boss, it is here."

Xiao Yu took Xu Xinxin out of the elevator. Wang Hai and a security guard in front of the office area saw a small fisherman and simply greeted him. Going to the glass door and pressing the fingerprint to open the door, I took Xu Xinxin into the office area of Chen Mo.

Chen Mo's office area is large, including several laboratories and rest areas. The decoration style is very simple, there is not too much gorgeous decoration, the lab door is locked, no one knows what is inside.

"Boss, Miss Xu is coming." Xiao Yu entered Chen Mo's office and blinked at Chen Mo.

Chen Mo smiled helplessly and went to the sofa: "Miss Xu sit down."

"We are also friends, you call me care." Xu Xinxin sat down opposite Chen Mo, smiling and said: "Seeing you, it is really difficult."

Xu Xinxin carefully examined the decorative style of the office. From the taste of a person, he can easily judge his character.

On the rear wall is a plaque plaque of 'Great Wisdom', next to a bookshelf, all of which are various books and science books. A pen holder on the table, two small smart speakers, and four computers. This simple style tells her that Chen Mo is a simple person.

"Just in the lab." Chen Mo said.

Chen Mo is also a bit surprised by the arrival of Xu Xinxin. I didn't expect to be right by Xiao Yu, Xu Xin will come to him, and it still came so fast.

"It seems that Mr. Chen’s success is for a reason."

"You came to me this time, waiting for me for so long, what is it?" Chen Mo asked.

"I am looking for you this time, thank you for saving me last night." Xu Xinxin looked at Chen Mo seriously: "Do you have time tonight? I invite you to have a meal, it is a small gratitude."

"I am a bit apologetic, thank you for accepting it. Last night, it was just a matter of raising your hand, and dinner was free." Chen Mo shook his head.

Chen Mo simply refused, and Xu Xin’s heart was slightly lost. She thinks she is good enough. She used to line up with men and invited her to dinner. Now she took the initiative to issue an invitation and was actually rejected. This is what she was rejected from the time she was young, and she was invited for the first time.

"This time, is it to say this thing? In fact, this matter does not care too much, it is not a big deal." Chen Mo said.

"I have come over this time, there are still some things. When I was studying, I learned to manage my finances, invested in pocket money, and made a little money. Now I am just coming back from the UK, I am going to open an investment consulting company, I need some office products, I am planning to be with you. Company procurement.” Xu Xinxin said: “By the way, I ordered an intelligent robot.”

"It's very good." Chen Mo nodded and said: "The procurement, I turned back to the people below, they will contact you and do it for you."

"Mr. Chen, really can't bear to accept a beautiful woman's invitation?" Xu Xin asked.

“I am really sorry.” Chen Mo said apologetically: “Recent research, Zhao Min’s business trip, the company’s business is a bit more.”

Last night was just an episode. Now I know that I am invited to go out, and there will be more troubles in the future. For Xu Xinxin, he doesn't have much feeling. There is already a small fishing. There is no need to be entangled in this kind of thing.

"I invite you to have a coffee today and express my apologies." Chen Mo went to the coffee machine and poured a cup of coffee to Xu Xinxin.

Xu Jialin looked at the newspaper at home, and it was a report about Chen Mo and his daughter Xu Xinxin. At this time, Xu Jialin, with no expression, didn't know what he was thinking.

Seeing Xu Xin’s heart coming back, Xu Jialin smiled: "How? See him?"

"Seeing, he refused my invitation." Xu Xinxin was a bit unwilling to say.

It’s hard to meet a man who has a good impression on her, and who is worthy of her condition. The result is that she is passionate.

"Slow down, this kind of thing, you know that you don't do it overnight." Xu Jialin said.

"talk later."

After that, Xu Xinxin went upstairs and returned to his room.

Seeing that Xu Xin’s heart was unhappy, Xu Jialin’s brow was tight. He recognized his daughter’s condition, beauty, wisdom, and ability, and was rejected. Does this Chen Mo want to marry a fairy?

Suddenly, the vibration of the phone interrupted his thoughts.

"The boss, Chen Mo's information is missing a bit. According to the investigation, he has already registered to get married." Just turned on, the phone sent a cautious voice.

"Well?" Xu Jialin glanced up: "Who is that woman?"

"It is the assistant to the president of the marching ant company, He Xiaoyu."

chapters.title: Chapter 219: : Zhao Min Returns
chapters.body:
Chapter 219: : Zhao Min Returns

Xu Xin’s heart is full of resentment. Since childhood, regardless of appearance, family history, ability or education, she believes that the conditions are almost perfect, but she refused without hesitation.

Her emotional intelligence is not low, she can hear the euphemistic rejection of Chen Mo's voice. He didn't even give her a chance.

Is it that your own charm has become so bad?

There have been countless men who have tried every means to get her good feelings. Now there is a man who dismisses her and makes her feel frustrated.

But now full of brains, the man is calm and calm, and the two feet when she rescued her.

The old hero saved the beauty, but the rescue was met by her. However, he obviously saved himself and asked him to eat a meal. Why was he refused?

If a single man, she will never refuse her invitation.

Does he have a girlfriend? When this idea came out, Xu Xinxin remembered the small fishing that took her into the Chen Mo office today.

Hang up the phone, Xu Jialin fell into meditation. The news that Chen Mo has already obtained the certificate is completely beyond his expectations.

Such a successful young man, what woman can't get it? According to the thinking of the young people nowadays, it is absolutely impossible to marry so early, at least for a few years, to play enough, to be qualitative, and to think about marriage, but the facts are in front of you.

He does not think that this information will go wrong, his energy and influence, it is still very easy to investigate a person's basic information.

Originally thought that my daughter still had a chance, I did not expect to be preempted by others. What Chen Mo thought was, Xu Jialin was really unclear.

The size of the marching ant company is not huge, but its influence and potential are also the largest companies in the world. Chen Mo is too young, not deeply involved in the world, does not know how to use this influence, so that the marching ant company is shrinking in the country and cannot go out.

If you know how to use this power, now the marching ant company has already become a global unicorn. More likely to be the first company in history to have a market capitalization of more than one trillion dollars.

Such a huge force is left in use, which is a waste of resources. In order to further his ambitions, he will target this young, undeveloped ant.

The huge financial and influence of the marching ant company, as well as the combination of his many years of accumulated resources, a business empire, is almost in sight.

However, Chen Mo did not have the desire to cooperate with them, nor did he sell the company's shares, which made him frustrated. The marching ant company is like a shovel, and the oil and salt do not enter. It is estimated that this is also the reason why many foreign companies are unwilling to cooperate with marching ants.

However, even if the army ant company is short of money to sell shares, it will not be able to turn over the name of the ‘people’ enterprise. The five major banks have almost unlimited funds available to Chen Mo, and no one else.

I thought that the two methods could not work. The only channel that can take advantage of the influence of the marching ant company is the roundabout tactic. My daughter became a woman of Chen Mo, and it is logical for the two companies to achieve strategic cooperation.

And her daughter's conditions are not bad, the domestic conditions and her quite young people, not much, Chen Mo is the best candidate.

Now Chen Mo married, the last method, also lost. This news disrupted all his plans.

I want to start from Chen Mo's family, and I don't have the guts to estimate that people in China have a little eyesight.

Ordinary people don't know that these high-ranking people know that after the establishment of the army ant company, Chen Mo experienced a mercenary assassination and another spy incident. How many happening in the dark, they are not clear, but definitely more than one or two, who is blocked? Can be imagined.

Artificial intelligence, seismographs, intelligent robots and other technologies, which is not the world's leading technology, will never let such super talents and technology ignore, foreigners can not be tempted.

It is not unfounded to rumor that Chen Mo has already reached a cooperation with the top.

Two years of tax exemption, Binhai City has repeatedly tilted its policies and was met by the head of the city. This kind of treatment is definitely not something that ordinary entrepreneurs can have.

This kind of genius comparable to the age, too young, can not be ignored. Chen Mo has used his ability to prove his unlimited potential and value. As long as his family is protected, his roots are at home, and any technology he develops will develop this country in the future.

Therefore, people who have some strength in China do not dare to think about Chen Mo. They can only watch Chen Mo’s development quietly. Usually they can only see some small fights, but they dare not go to the army ants and Chen Mo.

There is still a channel with hope. Now, even the channels that are close to it are gone. It is planned to die in the middle of the road. All the plans are in vain. This is the most troublesome.

Zhao Min handed the document to Chen Mo and looked at him with interest. In the past few days, she has paid attention to the news. There are a lot of lace news about Chen Mo, and they all occupied the headlines of entertainment. They are all daughters of Xu Jialin.

"After a few days back, is it being taken away?"

"The big bait can't be caught." Chen Mo was teased by Zhao Min, shook his head and turned over the documents that Zhao Min handed over: "Say business."

"This time I went to an economic forum, and by the way, I fixed the agency rights of the intelligent robot area. The agency rights in Europe were won by a company owned by the Rothschild Bank Group. The company controlled by the Rockefeller Foundation.

Two familiar old-fashioned consortiums, the Rothschild family, the former financial empire, and now only one banking group, the Rockefeller consortium was infiltrated by other US consortia, and the situation is now a bit miserable.

Both have declined and want to reshape their glory, so choose to work with us. Although their strength is not as good as before, but the details and influence are still there. It is also the two companies that have the best strength and the most influence among the companies that want to fight for agency rights, and they are also more sincere. ”

"Do you have plans?" Chen Mo asked.

"The US market is not allowed to enter, and the last time it entered the European market was stirred up. It happened that the two were unhappy and in a trough. We cooperated with them and waited for them to regroup. It is very simple to enter these markets in the future. Zhao Min said.

"Does the US market not let it go? How does the Rockefeller consortium cooperate with us?" Chen Mo asked.

“It’s very simple, importing goods into Canada and Mexico, and then detouring from the two countries into the US market, and there are some markets in these two countries. There is no country in this globalized sea that can become an inland lake. Zhao Min said: "The agreement document is in your hands. I will go back to work first."

Chen Mo carefully read the agreement, which is similar to the agency agreement that Walid signed at the time, but there are many other cooperation terms.

Both families have declined, and a strong partner is urgently needed. All of this opportunity will be chosen to cooperate with marching ants.

After reading the agreement, Chen Mo changed his clothes and entered the lab.

The efficacy of the human potential development drug has been completed, and experimental data is now being collected.

This drug is a drug that acts on the human body, and the mouse is not an ideal test body. The best subjects are primates such as orangutans and monkeys, because drugs play a role in mice, may be ineffective or have side effects in the human body, and primate conditions are more similar to humans.

This kind of medicine can be used without experimentation. Because of the technology of the technology library, he believes that it will not go wrong, because he tried it on himself and it is really useful.

Now experiment, just want to collect some data, get a better understanding of the specific data of the role of this drug, and when it is necessary, it will come in handy.

"The data analysis is complete." The ink girl opened.

chapters.title: Chapter 220: : Silencing Factor
chapters.body:
Chapter 220: : Silencing Factor

Chen Mo carefully looked at the report analyzed by the ink girl.

From the beginning to the present, a total of ten experiments were performed. All the mice were in good health and there were no deaths or abnormalities.

After the use of the drug, the mice improved significantly, the posture became better, and the flexibility and physical strength tests were much better than the control mice. This shows that the agent also plays a role in the white mouse, and the result is quite gratifying.

There is no excess use of the drug. Once the specific substance has been applied, the cell will be immune to the substance, which will result in no effect for the second time.

Therefore, after reaching a certain amount, the effect of the high concentration of the drug is the same.

In the experiment of mice, starting from the concentration of 0.06 g per ml, the effect of the final enhancement was the same in the subsequent mice.

The potential of the human body develops drugs that enhance cell vigor and increase muscle toughness, strength and sensitivity.

Explicitly explained, like the rare earth elements in steel, it is very small, but it can increase the strength of steel by one level. This special substance, when applied to the human body, can enhance the strength of the human body, muscle toughness, strength and agility.

This result is in his expectation, because his physical changes are a prime example.

Although the body of the mouse is different from the human body, it has a role, indicating no problem. However, this kind of medicine cannot be easily administered to humans, and it is even more unlikely to appear in the market.

No matter which country, any drug research test must be rigorously reviewed in order to be clinically tested in humans. Once the experiment is taken privately on the human body, the ability of the big man, the person will also be finished, the consequences are criminal detention or restrictions on freedom.

Drug research has always been the most sensitive, and it must be strict with regard to the patient's life and death. Therefore, the breast enhancement drugs and aphrodisiac drugs that Chen Mo has researched for its pharmaceutical companies have not appeared on the market until now. Examination and clinical trials are a long process.

This kind of medicine has little effect on Chen Mo, and he can't use it on a large scale, but it is not necessarily for others.

Chen Mo used it himself. He knows that this is a very terrible drug. If it is obtained by any country, the combat effectiveness of the soldiers will be greatly improved. Can not be easily exposed.

Next, think about the problems with the use of these drugs.

This drug is top secret in any country's research. Chen Mo is also not open to the public. The only channel is to cooperate with the above. Maybe you can try it, this medicine has not much effect on him personally, but it can have more space.

You can try to cooperate with the above, because his road, development, cooperation is inevitable. It is also good to use the potential agent as a way to ask for a starting point.

After a long time of thinking, Chen Mo was able to return to God and breathe a sigh of relief.

"Momgo, after work is over, Xiao Yu sister is waiting for you in your office." He just returned to God, and the second-generation robot next to him opened.

When he is thinking, unless the matter is particularly important, the ink girl will not bother him. Only when Chen Mo has finished thinking, will he speak.

"Oh, well, you continue to observe the condition of the mouse, collect the data, what happens, notify me immediately."

"Okay, Mercedes." The ink girl promised.

Chen Mo took off the lab coat and left the lab. On the way, Chen Mo is thinking about how to deal with potential medicines.

“Is the research going smoothly?” Xiao Yu saw Chen Mo coming out and immediately greeted him.

“The first phase was very smooth.”

Chen Mo took the hand of Xiao Yu and left the office.

After approaching the elevator, Xiaoyu saw Chen Ou, who was thinking about it. He did not bother, but took Chen Mo’s hand and looked at him quietly. When Chen Mo returned to God, he said: “What are you still thinking about?”

"Well, I want to study the use of the product." Chen Mo pet touched the head of Xiao Yu: "Now I don't want to, it is most important to accompany my wife."

Research is back to research, and normal work and rest needs to continue. The technology in the science and technology library, even if he has exhausted his life, can't study it, so when he gets off work, Chen Mo will not work too much, and it will take some time to accompany Xiaoyu.

Feel the care of Chen Mo, Xiao Yu face with a sweet smile.

When the two left the company and returned home, Xiao Yu’s relatives took Chen’s arm: “Husband, I want to go out tonight, can you accompany me?”

"Of course." Seeing that Xiao Yu was a little spoiled, Chen Mo did not hesitate to agree.

The appearance of a small fisherman is the most lethal to him. After all, this situation is rare, and only in front of him will reveal this side.

"Thank you husband." Xiao Yu kissed Chen Mo in the face. Because of Chen Mo’s identity, they are shopping a lot less often than before. She knew that if she wanted to go out, Chen Mo would definitely go out with her.

But she is not a child. Naturally, she knows Chen Mo’s identity. She can’t appear in a crowded place as usual, so she can’t be so self-willed. She wants to go out and go out, only occasionally, irregular time and place.

"I will go to cook first." Xiao Yu changed his shoes, put things in, and went into the kitchen.

Xiao Yu is a very simple girl, because she knows that Chen Moping often thinks about research and doesn't have much time to think about dating. So what I usually want, I will always take the initiative to talk to Chen Mo. They are all very common requirements, nothing more than accompanying her to go shopping, watching movies or walking around the beach.

So many times, Chen Mo will laugh at Xiao Yu fishing, but for this unpromising girl, what requirements will be satisfied, and occasionally give her a small gift, it is a surprise, he is not the kind of person who does not understand the taste.

After eating and drinking, Chen Mocai left the villa with a small fisher after cleaning up.

Their lives are the same as ordinary little couples. There is no strong dog-blood love story, but ordinary people are also very sweet and happy.

Eat, watch movies, go shopping, this is the standard for ordinary couples. Xiaoyu did not choose to go to the high-end place, because the two are not familiar with that place, no need to go.

As usual, when you are in love, just around them, the bodyguards such as Wang Hai and White Pearl are secretly protected.

Until I felt tired, Xiao Yu was satisfied and went home with Chen Mo.

When he arrived at the company the next day, Chen Mo called Zhao Min to his biological science laboratory.

“Is there new technology?” Zhao Min asked.

Since the last time I almost scared out the normal temperature superconducting materials for heart disease, Zhao Min has already understood Chen Mo’s enchanting. In the past few days, Chen Mo has been hiding in the laboratory and has new technology, which is not unexpected.

This is not human, she is used to it.

"Yes, do you believe in the super warrior of the science fiction movie or the martial arts movie Wulin Knight?" Chen Mo asked.

"Science and technology of science fiction movies are reliable, and martial arts movies are exempt." Zhao Min said: "Is this technology related to what you said?"

"Almost." Chen Mo took Zhao Min to the test bench and picked up a pot of medicine. "This medicine can theoretically develop the potential of the human body. There is a special substance in the medicine called a silent factor, just like a rare earth." Acting on the material acts on the human body, increasing the strength, speed and endurance of the human body."

Upon hearing Chen Mo’s introduction, Zhao Min swallowed a slobber. She feels that her worldview has been refreshed again.

“Is this stuff useful?” asked Zhao Min.

"Experimental data shows that it is really useful in mice. This time you are coming over, it is a staff officer, how to deal with the next problem." Chen Mo asked.

Zhao Min is the president of the company. It is still necessary to solicit the opinions of the president before he makes a decision. In order to avoid Zhao Min's decision-making and management in the company.

Zhao Min smiled, Chen Mo's technology, now she is frightened, and later into Chen Mo's lab, really needs a strong heart.

Although she was a little bit sloppy, she was convinced that the seismograph was listening to it, and the result came out accidentally. There is still a lot of technology that she does not understand in Building No. 1.

"If it's as effective as you said, this stuff can't be used by ordinary people in the short term. It can only be used for special purposes. If you cooperate with it, they may be a good partner. After normal temperature superconducting materials, It is certainly necessary to cooperate with the above. It is better to use this technology with less influence to lead the way and form a good foundation for cooperation between the two sides. The cooperation between the military and the people is a development trend, and it is also highly respected now."

"It's the same as my thoughts." Chen Mo smiled.

"What is the special substance you just mentioned, what is the name?" Zhao Min stared straight at the medicine in the hands of Chen Mo.

"Silent factor, the material factor discovered by Chen Mo, called the silence factor." Chen Mo laughed.

"You won." Zhao Min was speechless.

chapters.title: Chapter 221: : Wild Academician
chapters.body:
Chapter 221: : Wild Academician

Li Chengzhi was particularly surprised by Chen Mo’s active contact. Because Chen Mo rarely contacted him actively, there must be a special reason to contact him, just like the last seismograph.

It is estimated that Chen Mo has something to do with his help, but he has learned that the marching ant company has been calm recently and has no trouble.

At this time, Chen Mo informed him to come over to the interview, it was a bit strange.

However, since Chen Mo took the initiative to contact him, he also needs to come. The marching ant company is a very special company, and Chen Mo’s potential has already been noticed by higher-level people.

Unlike those entrepreneurs, Chen Mo is a true technical scientist. If he is willing to enter a state-led research institute, it is definitely a national treasure.

Domestic attention to talent has become higher and higher. They also invited Chen Mo twice, and Chen Mocai promised to hang his name in the engineering institute.

Now Li Chengzhi is wearing casual clothes and has not swayed into the marching ant company. Every time he comes to the army ant company, his clothes will be different. People who don't know will only think that he is the one who comes to talk about business.

"Hello, Mr. Li Chengzhi, Mr. is waiting for you, please come with me." Just entering the gate, an intelligent robot appeared in front of him and led him to the elevator.

The robots that I saw were greeted personally, and the staff at the front desk did not stop. The company's robots take the initiative to bring people in. Only by making an appointment in advance, will the people at the top meet this way.

"Sir, Mr. Li Chengzhi has come over." The robot entered Chen Mo's office and spoke.

"Brother Lee, please sit down."

Chen Mo led Li Chengzhi and sat down on the sofa.

This time, Li Chengzhi came over and he was well thought out. The company continues to develop and it is inevitable that it will be in contact with the above, unless he will never touch other technologies of the Science and Technology Library and only use civilian technology.

But this is impossible. The first area to be used by a powerful technology must be military. Do not touch now, will contact in the future.

It is better to contact now and explore a foundation to lay the foundation for more advanced technical cooperation in the future.

Now the state encourages the people to join the army, the way of military and civilian integration, so that private enterprises can contact the military industry. The domestic civilian participation army is still in its infancy, but it has the advantages of flexible mechanism, high efficiency and high cost, and has a broader development prospect in the future.

The greatest man is the country for the people. Although he is not a hero, but within the ability, you can still help.

"It’s rare that Chen Mo brothers took the initiative to find me." Li Chengzhi took the tea that the robot handed over and smiled. "You don't look for me. It is estimated that it will not be long before I look for you."

"Oh? Is there something?" Chen Mo asked.

"The last time I was in the capital, I told you about joining the Academy. I knew that I was coming to you. I gave you a notice yesterday. I agree to join the Academy of Engineering and become a folk academician."

Li Chengzhi placed the notice in front of Chen Mo and had a certificate.

"You have become the youngest academician in the history of the country and a wild academician."

"Wild academician."

Hearing this nickname, Chen Mo was crying and laughing, but he still received the certificate. Unlike the blue cover of the academician certificate of the Academy of Sciences, the Academy of Engineering is a red cover. This is the highest academic title in engineering science and technology established in China and is a lifetime honor.

There are many foreign academicians in the Academy of Engineering, and the famous Gates is one of the foreign academicians. As a Chinese, even if he is a folk researcher, there is no reason not to accept this honor. This is a privilege after all, and he does not have to accept the bondage.

For talents, there are many exceptions in China. He is not the first one, nor the last one.

"I will enjoy the allowance after today, and there is a house. On the side of Binhai City, security is very complete." Li Chengzhi took out a key and handed it to Chen Mo.

He knew that Chen Mo would not care about that allowance. However, the subsidized house, security, absolutely do not have to be careful, maybe Chen Mo will want to live for his family.

"Thank you." Chen Mo took the key of Li Chengzhi unceremoniously.

"You can also apply for research funding. Once the funding is down, the project you are applying for research is linked to the research institute, and the lack of people can also apply. The subject that is not related to the application project is still your own. There should be an awarding ceremony. However, the situation is special, and those ceremonies are not held." Chen Mo is not short of money, personal research costs, it is estimated that no one dares to say more than him. However, he must also remind me of some necessary things.

Chen O nodded and said that she understood.

"Now I have finished my business. You asked me to come over. What important things should I have?" Li Chengzhi asked.

"I want to cooperate with you once, the people join the army." Chen Mo opened the door.

“Oh?” Li Chengzhi immediately came to the interest and sat up straight: “We are very welcome.”

Li Chengzhi responded immediately. They always wanted to cooperate with Chen Mo, but they didn't open their mouths. After all, they spoke. If Chen Mo didn't want to, he would fall into a dilemma.

Now Chen Mo has offered it, this is a very rare opportunity.

"This time I told you to come over, it was for this matter." Chen Mo said: "I am usually bored and boring, so I want to work with you."

Are you bored?

Li Chengzhi’s mouth is convulsed, and he can’t wait to kill this guy. I am bored, boring, researching, working with them, and studying them carefully, I will not cooperate with them. This is not right.

I can study things with idleness and boring. This word is heard and heard by the exhausted researchers. It is estimated that Chen Mo will be killed.

"You are here and so on."

Chen Mo put the certificate and related materials into the biological science laboratory. After a long time, Chen Mocai came out of the lab with a safe.

"This is what I want to give you." Chen Mo opened the box and placed it in front of Li Chengzhi: "There are research data to be prepared for cooperation with you. Go back and let people see."

"Which information does it belong to?" Li Chengzhi asked.

"Life science, biomedicine, to put it bluntly, is the development of human potential." Chen Mo throws a blockbuster.

"Human body potential development?"

Li Chengzhi first stayed, followed by incredulously looking at Chen Mo, as if he were a ghost. When I was a soldier, I didn’t see anything in the world. Now I am scared by Chen Mo’s words.

This research is a top secret in the country. I didn't expect Chen Mo to study it alone. Looking at this situation, there is still a lot of progress.

It’s just that he doesn’t know. This is the ready-made technical information that Chen Mo got in the technology library. There is no technical bottleneck at all, so he will study so fast.

"Are you sure you didn't lie to me?" Li Chengzhi will be suspicious.

Chen Mo will not make such a joke, but he gave him the information on his potential development. He really didn't believe that Chen Mo could study it so quickly.

"Science is very mysterious. Sometimes you have been studying for decades, and there may not be some progress. Sometimes, only one inspiration, a little luck, is not completed. The human civilization has been for thousands of years, but this is short. Developed for more than a hundred years." Chen Mo guessed Li Chengzhi's thoughts and said with a smile.

This statement makes Li Chengzhi unable to refute.

"The information in the u disk is only part of the experimental data. The technology is here for me. You go back and let people verify it, then come over and talk about the cooperation issue. There are two pharmacies in it. I will verify it for you. Don't lose it. Otherwise, I can't help you." Chen Mo pointed to the pharmacy in the safe.

Li Chengzhi took Chen Mo’s box nervously. When he was a soldier, he was not so nervous when he was born or died. If Chen Mo is telling the truth, the value of the things inside can be imagined.

"Then I will take it back and let people verify it." Li Chengzhi seized the box in his death and he had already believed in 70%, just like the seismograph.

With such an important thing, he was no longer in a mood to chat with Chen Mo. After he left his speech, he immediately took the box and left the marching ant company. When he returned to the base, he took a military plane from the station and flew to the capital.

chapters.title: Chapter 222: : Huaxia Captain?
chapters.body:
Chapter 222: : Huaxia Captain?

Wu Bing stared at the white mouse in the cage and frowned. At this time, the white mouse has been dying, and the vital signs are weakening. After a while, the problem is completely lost.

It has failed again.

She has not remembered that this is the first few failures. Since the beginning of this study, there has not been much breakthrough. Even if she is a doctor of medicine and biology, she is still at the stage of exploration for this topic.

Not only her, she believes that the research of the whole world, the topic of bio-enhancement, is definitely a stage of exploration.

Biofortification is not so easy to succeed.

A deeper step may involve genetic or more other confidential research. When she was studying in the UK, she had been exposed to the theoretical topic of biofortification.

Wherever life science is, it is a very high subject. It is because of her double doctor, the most understanding of this aspect, and the research direction is also this direction, so it will not be long before returning to the engineering institute to participate in this research.

Some of the former predecessors have already figured out a little bit of eyebrows, but there is no way to control the powerful side effects of drugs.

Every time I take the mouse to do the experiment, at first, the mice are very active, and it seems that the vitality of life has become abundant. However, in two minutes, I fell in the cage and did not move.

The current drugs cannot be considered as potential development at all. It is more like burning life. If this problem is not solved, it is impossible to conduct further research.

She has not been discouraged so many times. For her, this is a new challenge. There has been a little progress in the case of direct death from the beginning.

"Wu Academician, Academician Ding lets you go to him now." An assistant walked over and said.

"Now?" Wu Bing asked.

"Yes," said the assistant.

"Know it." Wu Bing stopped the experimental record in his hand and left the lab.

Ding Jianwen is one of the leaders of this research. An old academician is also the most highly respected of the team. There were three leaders in the past, and they defeated them in the end. Now there is only Ding Jianwen, the leader.

Usually Ding Jianwen will not interrupt her during her experiment. This time it must be a major discovery, or a breakthrough, so that she will be so anxious to call her past.

Just coming in, Wu Bing saw people in the lab. In addition to Ding Jianwen, whose hair has already been grayed out, there is a middle-aged man she does not know.

"It didn't take long for Xiao Bing to come. This may not be known." Ding Jianwen said: "He is Li instructor."

"Li instructor." Wu Bing looked at Li Chengzhi and nodded gently.

This name, she knows the identity of Li Chengzhi. Their project, code-named, is called 'Hua Xia Captain', the purpose is to find a way to harmlessly strengthen the human body, and hook it with the super soldier. Although it is not as powerful as the super-soundier of science fiction movies, it is in which direction.

Li Chengzhi Wu Bing was slightly sympathetic, Wu Bing did not know him, but he knew Wu Bing, Wu Hequan's relatives, Dr. Haigui, and the youngest female academician. It can be said that all the people in the institute, he knows, this is one of his work.

"This time, there are some technologies that may involve your research. Before I came, I have already reported to the higher authorities. I said that let me come to you for verification. Because of the special circumstances, Mr. Ding introduced me to you and said that you are The most suitable candidate."

Li Chengzhi’s words made Wu Bing curious. What is it, so serious?

"Now the information is temporarily inconvenient to disclose, need to be verified, and after confirming that there is no problem, then open it to your entire team. In the future, these materials and research will definitely be your team." Li Chengzhi looked at the two.

The two nodded slightly.

After Li Chengzhi opened the safe, he took out a stack of paper materials and handed them to two people: "This is part of the research data and data."

Wu Bing took the information and sat on the sofa and looked carefully. After a while, his eyes were shocked.

These materials are about biological cell activity and cell strengthening. To put it bluntly, it is the research data of biofortification. As a professional engaged in research on this subject, she is very clear about what is being said. There is even a point similar to her research direction, but the information is not complete, it is probably only a small part.

There is also the experimental data behind this, which makes her heart shocked. Cellular activity data of mice, with comparative data. Someone is conducting a similar experimental study with her.

"Silent factor?" Wu Bing brows slightly, a bit suspicious.

According to the introduction of the data, the agent will have a special substance, which acts on the organism like the rare earth element acts on the material, thereby achieving the effect of strengthening the organism. This substance is called the 'silence factor' and is a new substance.

This naming makes her feel weird.

She subconsciously thought that this was a joke, but the experimental data and the above professional terms told her that it should not be a joke, and Li Chengzhi so solemnly let them come over, not to make such a joke.

There is no problem with the name of this new substance.

"This is a bit similar to our project, but it is not complete. It should be just a small amount of information. Where is this information coming from?" Wu Bing asked.

"You don't have to pay attention to this issue for the time being. Your task is to verify whether the technology is true." Li Chengzhi smiled and took out two medicines that Chen Mo gave him from the safe and put it on the table: "This is a sample of medicine, you To verify the effects and effects of these agents, it is also a bio-enhancement agent, which he said is the agent for the development of human potential."

Seeing the samples of the pharmacy, Wu Bing and Ding Jianwen started their spirits and carefully picked up the heavily protected agents. The color is different from the chemistry of their research, but Li Chengzhi pays so much attention, and they will not think that this is a fake.

"I need a detailed report. I don't know what to test. Anyway, I have to verify all the problems that need to be solved on your subject."

"it is good."

Wu Bing carefully read the information and his face became cautious.

Looking at the situation, some people are doing the same problem with them, and the data shows that the progress of the other party is much faster than their research. Looking at the data of these studies, as well as the photos of the mice, the test of the other person in the mouse did not fail, but succeeded.

Inside these two potions, there is the so-called 'silence factor'. She also wants to verify that there is such a substance.

After taking the medicine, Wu Bing took Li Chengzhi and walked back to his laboratory.

"Lee instructor stops, the report is given to you two days later."

Wu Bing stopped Li Chengzhi outside her lab. Her laboratory must pass her permission to allow outsiders to enter, which is the rule. Unrelated personnel, it is difficult to enter her lab, and it is very troublesome to go in and discover it privately.

"That's good, I look forward to your good news." Li Chengzhi nodded, did not enter Wu Bing's laboratory, turned and left.

"Ok."

Into the laboratory, Wu Bing put a potion into a professional refrigerated safe, leaving one, take out the dropper, take a small drop into the Petri dish and slide, and start verification.

chapters.title: Chapter 223: : Half Sold And Half Delivered
chapters.body:
Chapter 223: : Half Sold And Half Delivered

Zhao Min sat on the sofa, and Chen Mo was sitting opposite her.

"How is the cooperation?" Zhao Min said.

It took ten days to take the drug sample and the experimental data, and there was no news in the ten days. They are waiting for Li Chengzhi's reply. After all, this time they have to cooperate and they have to pay attention.

"There is no news for the time being." Chen Mo said.

He is not in a hurry. He believes that pharmacy can work. This is an excellent opportunity. It is impossible to not cooperate with him. Even if you don't cooperate, you will give a bit of audio.

"Do you want to contact Mr. Li and ask about the situation?"

"No, they want to cooperate, they will take the initiative to contact us." Chen Mo said slowly.

"You can see it." Zhao Min said helplessly: "I am a little nervous. After all, I am doing this for the first time. This sensitive technology does not know what kind of cooperation. ”

"This is indeed a problem. Although we are working with them, what really benefits them is that the benefits we have earned are definitely limited. This is just a road opener."

"What if you want to buy technology or buy technology?" Zhao Min asked what was in his heart during this time.

This is what they are most worried about.

If the technology is bought out, they will get less benefits. The kind of pharmacy, they took out, they have taken a certain risk, after all, the impact is not small. If the above is to be acquired, they will be more troublesome if they refuse.

"I also thought about this problem. It is tantamount to killing chickens and taking eggs. If they do this, it is equivalent to losing our partner. We are actively contacting them, indicating that we have the sincerity of cooperation. If they have Sincerity, while being able to achieve the goal, we have added a partner. The above people are not stupid, they should think of this."

Zhao Min nodded and agreed with Chen Mo's point of view. They are actively contacting the above cooperation, it is enough sincerity, if the above is forced to buy out, it is the table. If you want to cooperate again in the future, the difficulty will be great.

She knows that there are more terrifying ambient temperature superconducting materials in the company.

"Mer brother, Mr. Li entered the company."

Not long after Chen Mogang stopped, the ink girl opened her mouth. Hearing this news, let the two look at each other and shake their heads and say that Cao Cao Cao Cao will arrive.

Li Chengzhi’s face was filled with a faint smile. This time, he came over and accepted a major mission. After Wu Bing got the pharmacy, he did a series of experiments. The research report has come out and the results are amazing.

Five groups of mice were subjected to a control experiment according to the data from Chen Mo. After the drug was diluted, it was injected into the mice.

After five days, the experimental mice were still in good health and healthy and active than other mice. You know, the drugs they developed were injected into the mice, but in two minutes, the mouse died.

This unknown drug did not affect the mouse, at least in her tests, there was no accident.

However, further experimental results have come out, which is unbelievable.

The body of the mouse has been greatly improved, and the results of the planing have revealed that muscle toughness and bone density have been significantly improved.

This agent acts on the cell level. When she gets the medicine, she adds the medicine to the cell culture dish and cultivates some cells.

In the cell clustering experiment of clone formation, after the single cells were increased to six generations in vitro, the cell population formed by the progeny had a much higher colony formation rate than the ordinary cell culture. The activity of a single cell is greatly increased, and the rate of cell metabolism is higher than normal.

The combination of the data from the two experiments has shown that the agent is indeed effective for the enhancement of the organism. Although it is not proven to strengthen the human body for the time being, strengthening cells and mice has been a big breakthrough.

Unfortunately, the dose is too small to provide Wu Bing to continue other experimental verification. Two bottles of pharmacy, currently only a little in the research reefer, as a sample.

This time, there is a task to get more samples of the medicine and take it back to do the experiment.

In addition, Li Chengzhi has a task.

After receiving the report of this experimental data, a password has been issued for this matter to prevent the message from spreading. This time, his main task is to discuss the issue of cooperation with Chen Mo.

This kind of research, in any country, is the most advanced secret. The more people you know, the more likely you are to leak. Because he and Chen Mo are relatively familiar, the superior directly asked him to be responsible for the cooperation and contact with Chen Mo.

"Chen Mo brothers, we met again."

After Li Chengzhi was brought into the office by the robot, he was also welcome, sitting directly on the sofa next to Chen Mo. Here he is not the first time to come over, he is already familiar with a lot.

“How?” Chen Mo told the robot to pour a cup of tea to Li Chengzhi and asked.

"This?" Li Chengzhi looked at Zhao Min.

"Zhao Min is the person responsible for this cooperation project, do not have to evade. Otherwise, I don't have much time to deal with the cooperation." Chen Mo understood Li Chengzhi's mind and said.

Li Chengzhi nodded gently: "Those talk about cooperation, what kind of cooperation does Chen Mo brother want to cooperate with?"

"You talk about yours first." Chen Mo said.

"To be honest, we want to be able to buy this technology, and technology can't be passed on to third parties, even if you don't want to take it in your hands. Of course, the reward you want, the money, or the land, or something else, You can choose." Li Chengzhi said: "Do you agree with this kind of cooperation?"

Li Chengzhi looked at Chen Mo's eyes and hoped to see Chen Mo's inner thoughts.

“There is no second way of cooperation?” Chen Mo asked without hesitation.

"This is just the most ideal way for us. If you don't agree, you can change it in other ways. Or you can say a way of cooperation. I will report it to you. Before I came, my superior told me that it is based on your wishes. After all, technology. It is yours, as long as it does not harm the national interest, we will not have opinions." Li Chengzhi said.

This study is of extraordinary significance and is a hidden danger in the hands of a private enterprise. If it leaks out, it must be a loss.

However, Chen Mo took the initiative to contact them, indicating that Chen Mo understood the overall situation, and now the status of the marching ant company is special. In this matter, after careful consideration, it still follows the will of the marching ant company. It is not appropriate for the marching ant company to cooperate, and they will intervene.

Upon hearing Li Chengzhi's answer, Chen Mo nodded with satisfaction. The above is obviously the willingness to take care of him, indicating that the above is very important for his cooperation, this is already a great goodwill.

"Actually, I think, using this technology to establish the basis of cooperation between us, this cooperation is only the beginning, maybe we will have more opportunities to cooperate in the future." Chen Mo said.

"Oh? You said."

"You set up a company to send researchers and managers. We provide technology to you, produce a unit of pharmacy, we get 10,000 profits, and how to produce is your business." Chen Mo said.

In this way, he is almost half-sell and half-send. He is not short of money. This technology is not very useful for him. He just wants to lay a foundation.

chapters.title: Chapter 224: : Actually Grab My Line
chapters.body:
Chapter 224: : Actually Grab My Line

Li Chengzhi did not expect Chen Mo to say such cooperation conditions. This condition almost made it clear that he would give technology to them.

For them, this is definitely a big gift.

This technology, according to their research and development consumption, will cost at least billions or more of research and development funds, and more importantly, the time period of research and development and personnel input, this is the key point, money can not buy.

Chen Mo is now fluttering a word, almost giving the technology to them.

One dose of 10,000 yuan of profit, this profit, for this technology, is equivalent to the price of cabbage. Li Chengzhi suspected that he was wrong.

"You provide pharmaceutical production equipment, research and development personnel and raw materials, one unit of medicine, we charge a technical fee of 10,000, but first explain, this is after tax." Chen Mo once again confirmed: "I am the idea, if you can give us I am more than happy with some policy offers from other products of the company."

"Your conditions, I will go back and say above."

Li Chengzhi looked at Chen Mo deeply. Even if he was well-informed, he still couldn’t understand what the young man was thinking. Giving this technology to them can even make him wonder if there are any special attempts. But it's impossible to think about it, unless Chen Mo doesn't want to die, it's impossible to make any bad ideas.

"Chen Mo brothers, those medicines, can give more than a few doses, the researchers of the institute said that they need further medicine," Li Chengzhi said.

"Of course, but this time is not free. I have no mass production, the cost is very expensive, 100,000, how many do you want?" Chen Mo laughed.

Li Chengzhi nodded and said nothing. Chen Mo has given them such a big advantage, they can't even be willing to pay for this money: "Fifty, enough experiments for this time, not enough to contact you."

After getting the test report, Wu Bing told him that he hoped he could get some more medicine to go back and further clinical testing. She would like to know how mature this technology is.

Due to the amount and timing of the drug, she could not study it in depth. If there are more pharmacy, she will certainly be able to test how mature this technology is.

"There are no fifty." Chen Mo shook his head.

This thing, purification is the trouble in trouble, he can not store as much in his laboratory. In his opinion, the pharmacy is already available, there is no need to make too much to put it, because it is useless.

"Give up to twenty."

Li Chengzhi thought about nodding his head: "Also."

And Chen Mo briefly talked about something, Li Chengzhi used a safe to hold the pharmacy and left the marching ant company. He needs to go back immediately and convey the meaning of Chen Mo to the above.

"You do business, but you don't have any pants."

After Li Chengzhi left, Zhao Min opened his mouth. Just now Li Chengzhi was present and she could not say anything. Now that Li Chengzhi is leaving, she can speak freely.

"That thing, you can't make money." Chen Mo looked at the direction of Li Chengzhi's departure: "Do you think that kind of potion may be listed?"

Zhao Min shook his head.

This drug is of great importance and is of strategic importance. Even if the technology is very mature, it is impossible to go public and can only be digested within the military. Moreover, it is impossible to use it on a large scale in the military, and it can only be used in small batches for special troops and personnel.

After all, the drug leaked out, that is, the card was exposed. The practice of domestic Tibetan Mastiff will definitely not disclose the pharmacy.

"Can't go public, how many pharmacies do you think can be produced in a year? Ten thousand or 100,000? Even if I increase the price five times or even ten times, how much can I earn? If I don't go public, I don't have much money to earn." Said: "It's better to take a little bit of symbolism, just send a smooth person."

"Then you don't give them directly," said Zhao Min.

Chen Mo shook his head and smiled: "White delivery is boring, not in line with the nature of our merchants. Symbolically charging some technical fees, at least not that they think that the technology of the marching ant company will be given to them casually, and they can receive a favor. It’s also a two-pronged one. Is it possible to send the next cooperation? This is impossible.”

When he heard Chen Mo’s words, Zhao Min nodded.

She looked at the problem from the perspective of a businessman and pursued her interests. Instead, she fell into a dead end. From the very beginning, Chen Mo did not intend to gain too much benefit in this technology, leaving a good impression on it, and there are still many opportunities in the future.

Zhao Min left Chen Mo's office and began to deal with the company's affairs. Chen Mo lay back on the sofa and entered the technology library, and began to search for the basic technology that is useful to him.

After work, Chen Mo left the company with Xiao Yu. In the supermarket, Chen Mo pushed the shopping cart and walked slowly. Xiao Yu also followed Chen Mo, stopping from time to time to see the vegetables, very comfortable.

“How many jobs have you been working on recently?” Chen Mo asked.

“There are of course many jobs, but now the company is using smart office, which is very efficient. Many things, such as data calculations, or copywriting, are very fast. Zhao Jie asked me to handle some project budgets and data. Check, just can be busy, occasionally a little time to steal a cup of tea." Xiao Yu smiled.

"Well, don't be too tired." Chen Mo nodded.

Xiao Yu is at home, he does nothing, and he doesn't care. However, he will not force Xiao Yu to stay at home as a canary, and Xiao Yu is not willing to be a canary.

When a person is at home, it will only be completely abolished.

And Xiao Yu wants to work, he can't deprive him of the choice of small fish, as long as you don't get too tired. He doesn't need to be good and versatile in small fishing, he just needs to be ordinary.

"What do you want to eat tonight? I will do it for you." After buying the vegetables, Xiao Yu took Chen Mo's hand and walked toward the meat area.

"This is also used to ask, eat seafood, it is best to eat fish." Chen Mo said.

When I heard Chen Mo’s words, Xiao Yu’s eyes were watery, his face was red and his face was scornful: “Not serious.”

"How can you not be serious? Go buy a fish, eat grilled fish tonight, then buy some crabs and crayfish, and watch while watching TV." Chen Mo said: "Leave the smallest fish, when the night."

"You will make this happen." Xiao Yu said shyly.

"Oh, I actually grabbed my lines." Chen Mo said with a smile: "I really only have that interest in eating fish."

"Bad egg, let you eat enough."

Knowing that he was being teased, Xiao Yu looked red and white, and took his arm and walked toward the seafood area.

"What a bad guy, this is to enjoy life." Chen Mozhen smiled: "I can't eat fish? It's going to be spicy tonight."

"You still have a pattern. Don't say it here, go home and say it." Xiaoyu blushes like a ray.

"Afraid of what, others do not know what it means, eat fish." Chen Mo has not finished, the waist soft meat hurts, took a breath, and hurriedly shut up.

"Let's not let you eat."

Xiao Yujiao snorted and turned his face away, but the ruddy face still did not fade. Although it is already Chen Mo's person, when it comes to this problem, the face is thin, it will still be a bit shy.

Going to the seafood area and buying all the ingredients, Chen Mo was rushing back to the villa with a splendid piece full of two big bags.

chapters.title: Chapter 225: : Wu Bing'S Request
chapters.body:
Chapter 225: : Wu Bing'S Request

In the morning, Chen Mo opened his eyes and felt the temperature coming from his side. The body turned over and gently caught the waist of Xiao Yu.

It seems that Chen Mo’s arms are felt, Xiao Yu twists his body and drills into his arms. Lazy look, like a weak kitten.

Seeing the appearance of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo’s mouth curled up and his heart was warm. This woman is always pampered.

Not long after, Xiao Yu opened his eyes, and a little more charming in the lazy, seeing Chen Mo is watching her, hurriedly buried his head in Chen Mo's chest: "How long has it been?"

"Not long." Chen Mo touched Xiao Yu's head: "I still want to sleep?"

"No." Xiao Yumei shui, seems to think of last night's affection, his face floating red: "You go to take a bath, I will give you breakfast."

Just want to get up, Chen Mo is hugged. Looking at the shy little fisherman, Chen Mo looked smirk: "Wash together, then make breakfast together."

"Bad egg." Xiao Yu's face was red, let Chen Mo hold into the bathroom.

After breakfast, the two rushed to the company. Just arrived at the office, Zhao Min took a folder and followed.

“The Binhai City Special Police Detachment is preparing to move to the company’s Science and Technology Park.”

"Oh." Chen Mo was amazed, but relieved.

Yesterday, I just talked about cooperation. Today, the special police detachment is ready to move. It is no coincidence that they want to protect the marching ant company.

Nowadays, the army ants company, but there are different things, security issues, they will be very concerned. Want to invade the marching ant company, the special police detachment is on the side, anyone must carefully measure the consequences.

Both of them understood the intention of the special police detachment to relocate, so there was no in-depth conversation on this issue.

“Project on the planning of the smart city of Binhai City. Our company has participated in two projects, smart transportation and unmanned public transportation. The smart transportation project is under the responsibility of the Chinese programming department. The unmanned bus project is under the responsibility of the driverless team. The above is the terms of cooperation with the coastal city government, you take a closer look."

"Okay." Chen Mo nodded gently.

"Look slowly, contact me if you have questions. I will deal with other things first."

Zhao Min turned and left Chen Mo's office. Chen Mo also carefully opened the terms and confirmed that the terms were fine. Chen Mo was put the folder aside and went to the No. 1 building.

The marching ant company has once again fallen into a calm, and the news about the marching ant company has only occasionally appeared. Or the small problem of the robot, and where is the earthquake, the warning problem of the seismograph. However, these things, the marching ant company has long been flustered.

Huaxia Engineering Institute, Institute of Biological Sciences.

Eight people were surrounded by three iron cages, and three monkeys were fixed in the cage. Two of the monkeys are lying down and seem to be asleep. Each monkey is covered with various inductive instruments, and the pedestrians look at the instrument data from time to time.

This is the experimental monkey.

After Li Chengzhi brought the pharmacy back, the old man in the house also applied to apply for several experimental monkeys.

The physical condition of primates is most similar to that of humans. As long as progress is made on monkeys, this medicine is also effective for the human body.

The medicament has been injected into the two monkeys according to the predetermined scheme, and the third one is left in close condition, which is observed as a control monkey.

Now everyone is waiting for the effect of the drug, looking forward to the results of the experiment.

"There has been a change."

I don't know when, a person screams. Everyone followed his words and looked at the instrument. Sure enough, the data of the two macaques that are sleeping are slowly increasing.

This change made the people on the field ecstatic.

"This medicine is really useful."

“It seems that the project has achieved a historic breakthrough.”

"This project has been successful."

The scene is noisy, and you are talking about the success of the project.

"Don't make a noise."

Wu Bing frowned and drank the people who were discussing. Everyone stopped and continued to look at the monkey in the cage.

“The data has stopped changing,” said the researcher responsible for viewing the data.

"Do a physical examination of the experimental body." Wu Bing opened.

"it is good."

The researcher in charge of the medical examination immediately took the required instruments and began to perform a thorough examination of the three monkeys.

"The heart and lungs are normal."

"No. 2, No. 3 weight loss, height increased by 2 cm and 2.3 cm."

"No. 2, No. 3 increased bone density."

"Plascular platelets are normal, and platelets 2 and 3 are rising and are in the normal range."

"No. 1 body fat is unchanged, No. 2, No. 3 body fat percentage decreased, body muscle mass increased, muscle fat ratio increased, No. 2 increased by 3%, No. 3 increased by 3.3%, in line with the standard."

"The blood lipids are normal."

......

"The ECG is normal."

"The tumor is normal and there is no tumor."

The result of an item inspection made everyone ecstatic. All data is slightly improved, but it is within the normal range.

This is undoubtedly a question, this drug can indeed make a small change in the body of the primate.

Wu Bing was not stunned by this kind of data. Before he really decided whether it was useful to the human body, no one could be too happy. Because she knows what kind of side effects this drug will have on the human body.

“Set them up first, and follow the plan to closely observe their physical condition.”

The researchers listened to Wu Bing's arrangement, untied the fixed monkey, and transferred it to a special cage.

Ding Jianwen only took the lead, because Wu Bing is a double doctor, just in line with this research, so Wu Bing is one of the indispensable people in this project. Now Ding Jianwen is not there, she is responsible for leading the team.

After the three monkeys were arranged, Wu Bingcai and a group of people left the laboratory.

"Wu, if you are testing on a monkey, is the next step in human clinical trials?" one researcher asked.

"Don't worry, don't you know? Is the human test said to proceed?" Wu Bing said coldly.

The researcher's neck shrank and realized that he was too anxious and said the wrong thing. Any drug must undergo rigorous testing and review before it goes on the market.

Human clinical trials are the most important and most rigorous part, and they can be carried out without any excuse.

"Technology is not in our place. I will ask the situation first. You will continue to pay attention to the situation of the monkeys. If you find any situation, please inform me immediately."

After Wu Bing left the institute, he found Li Chengzhi who was waiting.

“Is the experimental result coming out?” Li Chengzhi asked.

"The initial has come out, this medicine is effective for primates, and other specific data, such as intelligence and strength tests, are being tested." Wu Bing threw a medical report to Li Chengzhi.

"Really, that's great." Li Chengzhi smiled heartily. He now believes that this medicine is also useful to the human body.

"Don't be too happy, although the primates and humans are very similar, but it does not mean that the effects achieved by the primates will happen to humans."

"As long as you think that the conditions are mature enough, you can apply, and the above will definitely not stop." Li Chengzhi said. In this research, the above is absolutely efficient.

"Tell this again, can you take me to see the invention of this pharmacy, the person who found the silence factor?" Wu Bing thought and said.

chapters.title: Chapter 226: : Occasional Luck
chapters.body:
Chapter 226: : Occasional Luck

Supercomputer applications include weather forecasting, aerospace, geophysics, cosmic astronomy, economics, and large-scale genome assembly, biomedicine, new materials, smart cities, cloud computing, and big data.

It also plays a major role in the fields of big science, big engineering, and information technology.

This is the country's strategic high technology and the country's heavy weapon. This field, an important symbol of a country's scientific and technological strength, is also the commanding height of each country's scramble.

The superconducting computer that is being assembled now is the real commanding height of the current technology.

Superconducting computers use superconducting chips that have not yet been released, and the boards are all made of superconductors. This is Chen Mo's most extravagant development.

The supercomputer materials obtained in the science and technology library are complete in technology. For Chen Mo, there is no technical bottleneck. However, on the design drawing, Chen Mo asked the ink girl to calculate optimization.

The design of the supercomputer obtained in the Science and Technology Library is not a superconducting computer. The design includes a sophisticated cooling system.

Because the superconducting computer is now used, the heat is not large, and the heat dissipation system is ineffective. Therefore, in the original design, Chen Mo let the ink girl remove the heat dissipation system.

Now the cabinet of the superconducting computer uses the optimized cabinet design.

The current superconducting computer consists of 10 computing cabinets and 2 network cabinets. Each computing cabinet is slightly larger than the double-door refrigerator, and there are 4 super nodes consisting of 32 computing plug-ins.

Each plug-in consists of four arithmetic node boards, one of which contains two high-performance processors made of superconducting materials. A cabinet has 1024 processors and a total of more than 12,000 processors, all of which are high-performance processors made by superconducting chips.

Twelve cabinets are five times smaller than the country's largest supercomputers. They are not designed too much, but they are used first. Afterwards, they will be incorporated into more cabinets and the volume will be larger and larger.

However, because it is a superconducting computer, the speed of calculation in theory is already very scary.

In theory, the computing speed of this superconducting computer will exceed the sum of the calculations of the top five supercomputers in the world, and the computing speed may be close to the billions of times of terror.

Because of the use of superconducting materials, its power consumption is almost negligible for Chen Mo.

Now in the basement of Building No. 1, there is intense assembly. All involved in the assembly are robots. In order to speed up the assembly, Chen Mo specially developed the robot for assembly, plus the control of artificial intelligence, working 24 hours a day, and now the work is coming to an end.

Chen Mo is in the first building, carefully watching the work of the robot. In the first building, most of the synthetic room temperature superconducting materials are used in this superconducting computer.

At this time, Chen Mo is carefully looking at the cabinet of the superconducting computer, which is very satisfactory. Soon, this superconducting computer, which took a lot of effort, will be completed.

After a week of shopping and confirming the development process of the superconducting computer, Chen Mo is ready to leave the No. 1 building.

He is here, can't help too much. After he entered the information to the ink girl, the ink girl would command the robot to complete the task according to his meaning, and the efficiency was not comparable to him.

"Merg brother, Mr. Li Chengzhi brought a woman to come to you, now in the reception room." When Chen Mozhen was preparing to leave the underground research institute, the ink girl only opened the reminder.

“Woman?” Chen Mo was slightly surprised: “How long has it been?”

"It didn't take long, only five minutes." The voice of the ink girl sounded.

"Oh, you tell Xiaoyu to take them to my office." Chen Mo said: "And, by the way, show me who the woman is."

Chen Mo is a bit curious. Why did Li Chengzhi suddenly bring a woman to come and see him, is it related to the potential to develop medicine?

"This woman's name is Wu Bing, Chinese nationality, height..."

The ink girl just opened her mouth and Chen Mo’s eyes were surprised.

Wu Bing?

The name he remembers, at the business exchange party in the capital, Wu Hequan introduced his niece to him, that is Wu Bing.

At the moment when Wu Bing entered the marching ant company, his heart was already very shocking.

She wanted to see the developer of the potential pharmacy. She did not expect Li Chengzhi to agree, and she also took her to the army ant company.

This is undoubtedly telling her that the developer is a person from the marching ant company.

This is where she is shocked. Such a major pharmacy was developed by the marching ant company. From artificial intelligence, to seismographs, robots, to potential potions, how many talents are there in this marching ant company?

Even if the national research institutes add up, there is no such speed of research and development.

"Mr. Li, Ms. Wu, please come with me." Xiaoyu entered the reception room and left with two people.

"Now are you going to see the developer?" Wu Bing looked at Li Chengzhi next to him.

"It should be." Li Chengzhi nodded.

"Please wait a moment, the boss just came out of the lab and is coming back." Xiao Yu led the two to sit down on the sofa in Chen Mo's office.

Not long after, Chen Mo entered the office.

Seeing Chen Mo appear, Wu Bing looked with surprise. This man is the one who introduced her to her blind date. At the time, the man was intimate with the socialites. At that time, she thought that she was a rich man, and she was not very impressed.

"It's you." Wu Bing looked at Chen Mo.

"It is me." Chen Mo said with a smile: "Long time no see, Ms. Wu."

"You are Chen Mo? Are you the boss of the marching ant company?"

Wu Bing suddenly realized a problem. After returning to China, she seldom paid attention to the news. She only listened to it occasionally, and did not pay attention to Chen Mo’s photos on the Internet. She devoted herself to books and research.

Although the marching ant company is famous, she did not see the appearance of the boss of the army ant company, and now she only thinks about this problem.

Li Chengzhi did not have an accident when he knew the two. What surprised Li Chengzhi was that Wu Bing did not know that Chen Mo was the boss of the marching ant company. The two have seen it in the capital. It stands to reason that there is no reason not to know, and the result is that they do not know.

"The person you said should be me." Chen Mo sat down on the sofa opposite the two: "What are you coming to find me this time?"

"Pharmaceutical things, Wu Bing is one of the main leaders of this project, she wants to see you as a developer." Li Chengzhi also entered the topic: "Chen Mo is the developer you want to see."

"He is a developer?"

Wu Bing was even more surprised. She only heard that Chen Mo was the person who invented the seismograph. It is reasonable to say that it should be a physicist. Does this person still understand medicine and biology?

"I am really a developer, such as a fake replacement." Chen Mo nodded.

"Chen Mo? Silence factor?" Wu Bing muttered: "I should have thought of it, named after the material factor I found."

Wu Bing looked at Chen Mo in amazement and seemed to want to see Chen Mo through. She found that the man who had been in love with her last time did not understand it at all. She thought she was rejected by the rich family. It should be a problem to regret it.

"Is there a problem?" Chen Mo was stared at Wu Bing, and his hair was a little hairy.

"No problem." Wu Bing abandoned the unrealistic thoughts: "Just curiosity how do you find the 'silence factor'? If you are not convenient, then forget it." Wu Bing knows that this problem is a bit rude, people feel Inquiring about technology, but she still couldn't help but ask.

Chen Mo shrugged and smiled: "Occasional luck."

"Okay." Wu Bing did not continue to ask: "We have tested the mice in mice and non-primate monkeys. At present, no side effects and other symptoms have been found. It is reasonable to say that a drug is studied. Development, it is impossible to get in place once and there is no situation. Should Mr. Chen have done a lot of clinical trials before?"

"The conditions are limited. Some experiments have been done on mice and rabbits until the 'silence factor' is discovered. Because of the great relationship, it is impossible to disclose the clinical trials on the human body, so I will find you to cooperate and further test and develop." Chen Mo smiled. .

Wu Bing did not suspect him: "We did a test on the monkey and found that there is no problem. If there is no situation in the next observation, I believe that this drug can be used in clinical human trials soon, and Mr. Chen can participate together. ""

Chen Mo is a drug developer and chooses to cooperate with them. These problems, she does not need to be obscured, can be said to be fair.

The medicinal agents were tested on primates. If there were no side effects or other defects, their next move was in human clinical trials. This is an inevitable process for any drug to appear.

chapters.title: Chapter 227: : Occasionally Play
chapters.body:
Chapter 227: : Occasionally Play

Chen Mo did not refuse the proposal of Wu Bing.

Although he is sure that there is no problem with this medicine in the human body, it is still necessary to participate in the experiment. Moreover, as a developer, if he refuses to participate, he will not be able to say it.

“Can Mr. Chen Mo take me to visit your lab?” Wu Bing said.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

There is no secret experiment in the biological laboratory, and there is nothing wrong with taking her to visit.

"I am a rough person. If you go to your lab and don't understand anything, you won't go. You exchange and communicate." Li Chengzhi smiled.

"If Li Ge has any need, he can tell the robot." Chen Mo got up and took Wu Bing and walked over to his biological laboratory.

"Please come in."

After Chen Mo opened the door of the biological laboratory, let the position open and signal Wu Bing to go in.

“You developed artificial intelligence, invented seismographs and robots. It stands to reason that you should be a physicist or a computer expert. Why do you think about life science?”

Wu Bing still asked the biggest question of his heart.

Physics, computers and biology, these three areas, strictly speaking, do not have much in common. The intersection of physics and computer is a bit more, but the connection with biology is not too big.

But these three things that seem to have little relationship are all covered by Chen Mo. The three abilities are all in one, and this is already a versatile.

A person who only needs to be in one field and achieve an achievement of Chen Mo is enough to speak globally. Whether it is artificial intelligence, the seismometer or the discovery of the 'silence factor' is something that shocks the world.

These three achievements are concentrated on Chen Mo. Chen Mo, now, cannot be described by horror. This is an unprecedented ghost.

"Hobbies and hobbies." Chen Mo smiled: "I have seen many medical books, pharmacological analysis, Compendium of Materia Medica, Medicinal Materials, Pharmacy, Deconstruction, etc. I have seen it, but I have never practiced it. I have no medical certificate, can not Helping people see a doctor, but research drugs can, and then study and play, accidentally found a 'silence factor'."

When I heard the words "I'm not careful," Wu Bing's brains darted.

What is ‘one is not careful’?

Since she started her Ph.D., she has been looking for drugs that may develop human abilities. As a result, Chen Mo’s ‘I’m not careful’, this is to suffocate her.

“Pharmaceutical research is only a sideline business. When you have time, you will have fun.” Chen Mo continued.

'occasionally'? ‘玩玩’?

Wu Bing could not wait to kill Chen Mo, saving him from continuing to let her self-confidence suffer an unprecedented blow.

I spent a few years, almost the best years, and devoted myself to the development of this drug. As a result, Chen Mo said that ‘occasional’ ‘playing’ was successful and made her mad.

She is now a doctor of medicine and biology, but she is more like an incompetent person than Chen Mo, who graduated from a bachelor's degree.

"Normally, I prefer computer and physics. Right, and machinery is also very good. In biomedicine, there is really not much time to study..." Chen Mo completely ignored Wu Bing's ugly appearance.

"You still don't say it."

Wu Bing interrupted Chen Mo's words and let him continue to say it. It is estimated that she was attacked without any thoughts.

Chen Mo smiled and did not continue to speak.

After Wu Bing put his mind in Chen Mo's biological laboratory, his eyes flashed in different colors.

Fermentation tanks, PCR instruments, microplate readers, high-precision electron microscopes, flow cytometry, DNA sequencers, and high-efficiency chromatography series are all the most advanced and sophisticated instruments. The equipment of this biological laboratory, in general, has exceeded her personal laboratory.

And in the biological laboratory, there are some machines and robots, obviously want to automate. The biological laboratory wants CNC automation. If you have such crazy ideas, you will know Chen Mo.

If someone sends this kind of lab to yourself, be sure to marry without saying anything. Realizing that he wanted to be jealous, Wu Bing hurriedly abandoned the extra ideas and carefully visited the laboratory.

"You have a 'Occasional play' lab, better than my professional lab." Wu Bing said.

"Have you seen it? Local tyrants like to buy the most expensive, the best to cover themselves." Chen Mo laughed.

"It seems to make sense, but who believes?" Wu Bing said: "You don't look like local tyrants. These devices are more professional than professional ones, and they are also meant to cover up."

Chen Mo shrugged and did not answer positively.

Wu Bing did not entangle on this issue: "You only have a biological laboratory here?"

"Do you think it is possible? I have physical laboratories, computer labs, chemical laboratories, CNC automation laboratories, electronic laboratories, mechanical laboratories." Chen Mo smiled.

His introduction, let Wu Bing took a breath: "Are you stupid?"

Wu Bing did not expect that Chen Mo was so horrible that there were so many laboratories in one person. These labs are definitely not used, except that they have money and willfulness, and there is a word that is stupid.

If every field has great success, then Chen Mo will be a ghost of the past.

"I am not stupid." Chen Mo smiled: "I may go to study other things tomorrow. I like to study, but I want to see interest. Today, studying this biomedicine, I may go to study material chemistry when I am in a whim. ”

"It's really capricious." Wu Bing said.

Their progress in research and development, unless irresistible, will definitely break the study and go to study other things.

"Mr. Chen Mo, your ability is so powerful, don't you think about entering the engineering yard? There is more need for you." Wu Bing said.
