"I am already a wild academician of the Academy of Engineering. The project research needs to be broken. It takes time to break the money and it is not my own. I don't need money, so I didn't want it." Chen Moxiao said: "Where the Academy of Engineering There are too many rules, I am not very comfortable. A wild canary, you suddenly put it in a cage, it will only ruin it."

Chen Mo’s meaning is obvious.

To enter the engineering school to work on a project, you must look ahead and be too restrictive. It is not appropriate for him to study what he wants to study.

Moreover, Chen Mo is not likely to release the technology of the science and technology library, but also pretend that research is slow, which is definitely not what she wants.

"Ok."

Wu Bing understood Chen Mo’s meaning and said nothing. After communicating some biomedical knowledge with Chen Mo, Wu Bing left Chen Mo's laboratory.

"Chen Mo brother, your request, the above is still researching, waiting for news, I will inform you the first time." Before leaving, Li Chengzhi said to Chen Mo.

After the two left, Chen Mo’s life was calm again. Because the superconducting computer is almost completed, Chen Mo has devoted himself to the progress of the superconducting computer during this time. Supercomputer research is his main task.

After a week, the ink girl finally sent good news to Chen Mo.

Superconducting computer, officially completed.

chapters.title: Chapter 228: :Unknown Number
chapters.body:
Chapter 228: :Unknown Number

The completion of the superconducting computer, this is a good news, and Chen Mo has been waiting for a long time. After waiting for such a long time, he spent a lot of effort and money, and now he is finally finished.

Entering the No. 1 building, Chen Mo went straight to the underground research institute.

Robots that have assembled superconducting computers have stopped working for a long time. 12 superconducting computer cabinets stand quietly in the middle of the field.

On the top of the cabinet, the logo of the new marching ant company is printed. This is the world's first truly superconducting computer.

Chen Mo reached out and touched the cabinet, the matte shell, and felt very comfortable.

Superconducting computers, if the news is announced, they will once again shake the world. Superconducting computers or quantum computers are now being studied in laboratories in many developed countries, even in the laboratories of large companies.

But it has always been just its name, not seen.

Now, without the outside world, Chen Mo has completed the superconducting computer. Although he alone knows it, the sense of accomplishment in his heart cannot be attached.

I have a baby, hiding it and letting you know, it is the heart of this kind of ecstasy.

With the technology in the technology library, it is normal to overtake the corner. Just for the outside world, this is a very scary speed.

The news of the superconducting computer cannot be announced, and it will not be brought to the army ant company any benefit, but will bring them endless troubles.

Once announced, in addition to the introduction of superconducting computers, it means that the superconductor at room temperature is available. No matter which one, the sensation caused is very scary.

Although domestic supercomputers have occupied the world's number one position, the research on supercomputers has never stopped.

The technology of superconducting computers is mature and can be used as a quantum computer in the future.

This is an epoch-making achievement.

The existence of room temperature superconducting materials, in addition to him, only Zhao Min knows that superconducting computers are not known to others.

"Momgo, all the work is ready, the superconducting computer operating system has been embedded and installed by the ink girl. Now the superconducting computer is completely dominated by the ink girl, and can be tested at any time."

The image of the ink girl appeared on the screen of the underground research institute. It was still a lovely Loli, and the dress was the ancient Chinese style, giving the impression of a cute and cute.

"Then start." Chen Mo said.

"Okay." The ink girl nodded.

The superconducting computer started to run, and Chen Mo also waited quietly.

All the values that were previously known are theoretical values. Now that the supercomputer is done, after the test, the actual value is obtained.

There is a slight attraction between the electrons, and when the energy of the electron is lower than the Fermi energy, the electrons are combined, which is the electrical tunneling effect.

In this case, by using a 0.2 nm thick insulating layer, the two superconductors are spaced apart and then combined, and this process produces a phenomenon in which a conductive current also occurs when the voltage is zero.

The introduction of supercomputer technology in the science and technology library also introduces this phenomenon. This phenomenon, in the name of reality, is called the Josephson effect.

The tunneling effect of electrons theoretically takes one billionth of a second to switch and the power consumption is one percent of the integrated circuit. At present, the circuit of such a component computer must operate at a low temperature because the electron energy is high, and this phenomenon occurs in the superconducting state.

Now Chen Mo's room temperature superconducting materials have appeared. In theory, this superconducting computer can increase the computing speed by a hundred times and the energy consumption is very low.

But everything depends on the actual situation.

“The peak calculation speed is 7.324 billion times per second, and the continuous calculation speed is 5.248 billion times per second. The performance-to-power ratio is 13257 billion times per watt...”

Hey!

Rao is Chen Mo's mental preparation, still shocked, could not help but swallow a mouthful of water.

Now it's just 12 cabinets, and the calculation speed is 7 times faster than the strongest supercomputer 'Taihu Lake'. The power consumption ratio is far behind the ordinary supercomputer. If you increase the number of cabinets, the calculation speed will increase exponentially, breaking through tens of billions of times, which is not a problem.

The release of this data, the world's number one supercomputer, will be without controversy. However, this honor does not dare to take it casually, especially in the case of his company or private enterprise.

"Momgo, the calculation speed of the ink girl is already very fast. Without the help of other computers, it can be calculated quickly, and the speed of the information obtained becomes super fast."

"This is natural." Chen Mo laughed.

He spends so much money, and if he is just the same as before, he will lose money.

"Mer brother, the ink girl seems to be smart."

The ink girl appeared on the big screen, the character image was more refined, and it became more like the human loli. The eyes were also awkward, a little smart, and invisibly giving people more intimacy.

“Yeah.” Chen Mo nodded: “Incorporate more cabinets in the future to make you smarter.”

As long as there is strong computing power, game and philosophy, artificial intelligence will only become more and more intelligent. The power of the current ink girl has transcended the human sphere and can create things.

This time into the superconducting computer, the computing power to achieve a qualitative leap, the future ability will only become more and more powerful.

This is why humans worry about robots replacing humans.

“You are now optimizing the company's robotic structure design, optimizing the company's cloud computing and big data, etc.” Chen Mo said.

"Okay. Then I designed some micro-robots to assist in research and production, can I? My brother." The ink-sister on the screen said with a blind eye.

For these things, she must ask Chen Mo's opinion and get Chen Mo's instructions to proceed.

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded.

The role of superconducting computers is very large, but there are still very few places he currently uses, or the timing of applications is not yet available.

The weather and climate predictions have little effect on him, and he has not studied the combination of satellite cloud image, condensed matter physics, aerodynamic model, etc. In the future, superconducting computers may be used to simulate nuclear fusion or nuclear fission, and other technologies are manufactured, but not now.

Superconducting computers are a basic tool with great potential. There are not many places used now, but future research is indispensable.

Now that the superconducting computer research is successful, Chen Mo’s mind is tight and some things seem to be loose.

Coming out of Building No. 1, Chen Mo felt invisible and relaxed.

The news of the superconducting computer is not published, so this technology can only be hidden first. He does not have to show the strength of the country's comprehensive strength, and there is no need to publish it.

This kind of strategic high-tech is not the capital that individuals use to show off.

Following the constant temperature superconducting materials in the field of materials, supercomputers in the computer field were announced after they were run today.

Next, it's time to get the next technology.

Back in the office area, Chen Mo walked straight back to the rest room, lying straight in bed, closing his eyes and entering the technology library.

For Chen Mo, the next technology in the science and technology library is always unknown.

chapters.title: Chapter 229: : Holographic Technology
chapters.body:
Chapter 229: : Holographic Technology

The tall library is still intact. I have been here many times, and Chen Mo has already been familiar with it.

In the eight directions in the center of the library, eight light curtains are projected, two of which are blank. The materials in the chemical materials and computer fields were completed by him, and now there are only six light curtains left. They are applied to six fields of physics, biomedicine, machinery, ecological environment, military industry and energy.

The next choice is a key.

This will determine his main research direction for some time to come.

He is not going to touch it in the energy field for a while, which is a very sensitive area. The technology obtained in the science and technology library will certainly not be the oil extraction technology. Energy technology is accidentally the energy revolution, and it is also a hot potato, but it is now.

It is impossible for military workers to touch now, at least not to touch them. In the future, the company will have more influence and think about it.

Looking around on the light curtain of the six technologies, Chen Mosi asked. Six technologies, each of which is unknown.

This is a lottery ticket that will definitely win, just don't know what the prize is.

Each of the fields written above contains a large variety of technologies. What I got this time is definitely only one of the categories of technology.

How to choose?

Chen Mo knocked on his head and finally made up his mind to walk straight ahead and finally stopped in front of a light curtain.

Applied physics.

Applied physics is a very general concept, including many aspects of technology, such as laser, optoelectronics, information optics, atomic physics, sensor technology, quantum physics, mechanics, electromagnetics, thermodynamics, etc.

There is a world of difference between these knowledge.

Chen Mo did not know what the technology would be.

Going to the light curtain of applied physics, Chen Mo set the gods and reached out to the books. The book that is as solid as the real thing is easily penetrated by Chen Mo’s palm.

At the moment when the palm of the hand was not in the book, I saw that the book in the light curtain was slowly diminishing at a speed visible to the naked eye. Massive technical information, as the book fades, floods into Chen Mo’s head.

Chen Mo only felt that his head seemed to be stretched out, and suddenly he was dizzy. A sense of nausea came, and Chen Mo gasped and was extremely uncomfortable.

Compared with the technical information of supercomputers, this information is not so terrible, but it is also huge enough.

This time, it was not as embarrassing as it was last time. Chen Mo was just kneeling on the ground of the Science and Technology Library and panting.

The information of the holographic technology made him feel that his head was squeezed and it was really uncomfortable. He couldn't think at all, just looking at the floor of the technology library with a dull look and suffering from a headache.

I don't know how long it took, and the feeling of nausea slowly disappeared. Chen Mo was slowed down and took a deep breath.

The light curtain that Chen Mo had just put in his hands was empty, and the books inside had already fulfilled his mission.

Holographic technology?

After discovering the technology obtained from the technology library, Chen Mo’s eyes stayed and turned bright.

Holographic technology is not mature in the current market, and many companies only stay in the laboratory stage. It seems that this time, it is necessary to overtake the corner.

This technology should be simple to complete. Holographic projectors are now available on the market. If you complete the holographic projection, even if you complete the task, this task will be the simplest task he has ever received.

But the task is not that simple.

There are a variety of holographic product technologies in the description of technical materials. Micro holographic projector, medium holographic projector, large holographic projector.

Is it necessary to complete these three products in order to complete the task?

Chen Mozhen’s dizzy head is too lazy to think about it. The information that was just blocked, now has a feeling of exhaustion in the head.

Closing the red book in the Science and Technology Library, Chen Mo took a look at the bookshelf of the Science and Technology Library and stepped into the light door that appeared.

Just recovering consciousness from the technology library, Chen Mo feels a strange feeling in his forehead.

Slowly opening his eyes, he saw a small fisherman who was holding a paper towel to help him wipe his forehead, and the other hand grabbed his hand.

At this time, Xiao Yu, his face with a deep color of worry, saw Chen Mo opened his eyes, his face was surprised: "Husband, are you awake?"

"Ok."

Chen Mo squatted with the softness of Xiao Yu, and his heart was warm.

Xiao Yu did not make a profit, let Chen Mo lick his own hand, and the color of worry on his face spread a lot: "You just fell asleep, your body has been sweating, your face is a bit pale, is it a nightmare?" ”

"Yeah, I dreamed that you left me." Chen Mo smiled.

"He said, dreams are the opposite, I will always be with you. Such a good man, I will not give you to other women, you will not leave me, I will rely on you in this life." Xiao Yu smiled softly.

“Is it?” Chen Mo also narrowed his eyes and reached for a small fisherman’s waist. She took her to her body and kissed her on Xiaoyu’s face.

"Maybe it's too tired recently, I will have a nightmare. I will pause the research work in the past few days and take a rest." Xiao Yu's eyes are soft and reach out to help Chen Mo wipe the remaining sweat.

"But I am not tired, and I am full of strength, what should I do?" Chen Mo looked smirk at the eyes of Xiao Yu.

Xiao Yu was in Chen Mo, feeling Chen Mo’s restless hand, his eyes were ashamed, and with a little sweetness: “This is the company, I have to work, go back tonight and give it to you, okay?”

Xiao Yu cast a look to Chen Mo.

"Okay." Chen Mozhen smiled and sat up from the bed, still not letting go of Xiaoyu: "When you come up to me, is there anything?"

"Let me go first."

Xiao Yu patted Chen Mo's hand on her waist. The intimate posture of the two is not like talking about work.

"Do not let go." Chen Mo said.

Xiao Yu is crying and laughing, and Chen Mo is sometimes a child who grows up. However, this aspect of the man is only displayed in front of the most intimate people, so that Xiao Yu's eyes are gentle, and Chen Mo is not required to let go, let him hold.

"Mr. Li has come over, he has been waiting for an hour." Xiaoyu looked at the time and said.

"Oh?" Chen Mo nodded. Xiao Yu said that Mr. Li could only be a person. When I think about Li Chengzhi, my expression is slightly serious: "I have been sleeping for so long?"

"One and a half hours, you slept for half an hour, Mr. Li came over. Seeing that you slept so deep, I didn't wake you up, saying that you are in the lab. He said no hurry, now in the company's Waiting in the reception room, waiting for you to wake up," said Xiao Yu.

"Well, I will go see him."

Li Chengzhi’s coming is definitely for the potential of pharmaceutical technology. In this case, Chen Mo must also come in person. Others can’t take the idea and don’t know the existence of these medicines.

Chen Mo got up from the bed and said: "Ink girl, let the robot lead Li Chengzhi to the office."

"Okay, Mercedes." The voice of the ink girl came out of the horn.

Kissing on the forehead of Xiaoyu, Chen Mocai took a small fisherman and left the bedroom where he was resting in office, and went to the office area.

chapters.title: Chapter 230: : Departure
chapters.body:
Chapter 230: : Departure

Li Chengzhi sat in the reception room and watched the movie with tea. The marching ant company has not come over twice, is very familiar with this, and is familiar with Chen Mo’s habits.

Every time you come, as long as Chen Mo is in the lab, he has to wait. When Chen Mo walks out of the lab, he will come over.

In doing so, he can understand.

Chen Mo is different from ordinary entrepreneurs. This kind of researcher is very valuable in time. More time is spent on research and development, and there is not much time for socializing.

This is also the reason why Chen Mo rarely appears in the public. If Chen Mo is socializing all day, then he has no time to study.

Therefore, in the marching ant company, there is an unwritten rule. When Chen Mo is in the laboratory, he cannot easily disturb.

In the reception room is not boring, here is the industrial park of the marching ant company headquarters, the environment is beautiful, there are food, drink and play, so it doesn't matter if you wait.

"Mr. Li, Mr. let you go up." The robot in the reception room suddenly went to the front of Li Chengzhi.

"Ok."

Li Chengzhi admired and followed the robot to leave the reception room. After seeing Chen Mo, Li Chengzhi showed a smile.

"Chen Mo brother, it is really difficult to see you."

"Please sit down, Li Laoge. Come here, is there a reply?" Chen Mo asked Li Chengzhi to sit down and asked.

"Yes, after studying above, I promised your cooperation conditions." Li Chengzhi did not have any feelings and told the news.

In the face of Chen Mo’s almost gift-like cooperation, there is no reason to refuse cooperation. This cooperation will definitely accelerate the promotion of the 'Huaxia Captain' program, saving a lot of research and development funding and research and development time.

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded. This was in his expectation, there was no accident.

"Before you come, Academician Wu contacted me and let me inform you. The application for the clinical trial of the pharmacy has been passed, and the preparation of the drug is carried out on the human body for clinical trials. According to the last commitment, you can participate as the main personnel." Li Chengzhi said.

Chen Mo is the inventor of the pharmacy, giving them almost unconditionally. Those test information, they can not swear Chen Mo, otherwise it is not kind.

Therefore, in the development of this agent, there is no requirement for Chen Mo to hide. The technology is Chen Mo, and Chen Mo is also one of the academicians of the Academy of Engineering. He has the right to know the latest progress of the research.

"This way?" Chen Mo whispered.

The last time Wu Bing did say that he was invited to participate, but did not expect it to be so fast. Clinical trials of generic drugs are only approvals and take a long time.

The engineering school is really different.

However, it is normal to think about it. If it is approved for a long time like ordinary R&D drugs, the speed of technology development is a problem.

“When did you start the experiment?” Chen Mo asked.

"It should be a few days, now volunteers who are already recruiting clinical trials. This kind of research is special, so the volunteers are a bit special and take a few days." Li Chengzhi said with a shrug.

"Then I will go to the capital with you this time, just now there is time. By the way, the formula and other technical materials of the medicine will be brought to you." Chen Mo thought for a long time before opening.

Li Chengzhi did not expect Chen Mo to be so refreshed, and immediately opened his eyes and smiled. He is more and more admired by Chen Mo, and he has to go forward and retreat, and it is just right.

"When is the Chenmo brother free?"

"Since the recruitment of volunteers will take a few more days, then the day after tomorrow will pass."

Just superconducting the computer is completed, just got holographic technology, relax for a while, and then start research work on holographic technology.

"Okay, I will pick you up the day after tomorrow."

At the scheduled departure time, Li Chengzhi was happy to leave the marching ant company. The matter went smoothly and his handover was very simple.

Because of Chen Mo’s relationship, he also attached great importance to him. Now Chen Mo’s contact problem is left to him, especially in this matter.

After Li Chengzhi left, Chen Mo set his eyes on the computer and began to organize the holographic technical data obtained from the technology library.

Two days later, five people dressed in formal attire, driving early outside the Chen Mo Villa. Everyone has an imposing manner. Ordinary people are afraid of being at all. They are not willing to come close. They are not ordinary people at first glance.

They are the special personnel that Li Chengzhi sent to pick up Chen Mo.

Wang Hai and Bai Pearl also stood at the door of the villa and looked at the five people indifferently. They used to be insiders and naturally knew the identity of these people, without any surprise.

However, they are surprised that a small team will be dispatched to **** Chen Mo. It is obvious that few people can have such treatment.

Seeing that Chen Mo and Xiao Yu came out of the villa, the leading Yang Jun spirit shocked and smiled and greeted him. The other four people did not move slowly. They hurriedly went over and helped Chen Mo to 'move' the ceremony, but the ceremony was just an ordinary suitcase.

Everyone looked at Chen Mo curiously.

Chen Mo is their mission goal, and must be 100% guaranteed to be safe.

This is the genius of science and technology research Chen Mo, although they have been training in the base or going out for a long time, but the hot news information has not been lost. Chen Mo’s name has been heard, and the people who invented the seismographs have benefited thousands of people, but today See you for the first time.

It is hard to imagine that such a young man is actually a technological star and a person who invented a seismograph.

"Mr. Chen, my name is Yang Jun, the head of the head let us pick you up." Yang Jun said.

Before coming, the order of the top has already stated that it is necessary to maintain sufficient respect for Chen Mo. He also understands the importance of Chen Mo, so he maintains sufficient respect for his tone and manners. If he is offended, his good days will come to an end.

"Hello there."

Chen Mo and Yang Jun shook hands and looked at Xiao Yu: "I will be back in a few days, and I will call me."

"Good." Xiaoyu nodded. "You also pay attention when you go there. Now the weather in the north has turned cold. I have packed my clothes. Before I get off the plane, I remember wearing more coats. Also, things are important, too. Eat on time."

"Will do."

Seeing the look of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo’s heart was warm.

"White Pearl, you have been a small fisherman in the past few days."

"Good." White Pearl nodded.

Say goodbye to Xiaoyu, Chen Mo and Wang Hai drilled into the car that Yang Jun and others drove and left the villa area.

"Where are you going now? Airport?" Chen Mo looked at Yang Jun, the co-pilot.

Yang Jun's skin is dark, cut flat, and the image of a typical Chinese soldier. At this time, Yang Jun was always paying attention to the movement around the vehicle.

"No, go to the base. There is already a special military aircraft ready to pick you up, no need to go to the airport." Yang Jun said.

This is a special task. The command of the superior can't make Chen Mo lose a little, otherwise their task will fail.

"Oh." Chen Mo touched his nose and smiled: "I didn't expect that I also had a special plane to deliver." Chen Mo did not say it, looked at the scenery outside the window, and soon began to close his eyes.

chapters.title: Chapter 231: :Wu Bing Visits
chapters.body:
Chapter 231: :Wu Bing Visits

Snow Wolf Special Forces Base.

Yangge looked at the office in front of him, no hesitation, and went in. While training, the brigade suddenly let him come, which is a bit strange.

Intuition tells him that this time there must be something different, otherwise the Brigadier will not let him alone. After all, he is only the vice captain of the special forces, not the captain.

Just entering the office, Yu Song saw a lean middle-aged man sitting in the office chair, he is the brigade commander Zou Kai.

"Report Brigadier." Acura knocked on the door and walked a military ceremony at the desk.

"You are coming, sit down." Zou Kai looked at the song and nodded: "Sit down, something to talk to you."

"What is it? Brigadier." The song is not sensational.

"This time I want to ask you a question." Zou Kai gestured to the song: "The next thing I said to you is top secret."

The Yangko waist is a good one, playing a 12-point spirit.

Seeing the appearance of Yangko, Zou Kai waved his hand and motioned to relax.

"There is a plan on it. Now I am screening people. Volunteer participation. If you are not willing to participate, you can refuse. Once you join, you can't quit. What happened is very uncertain. Anything may happen, including disability. Death. After success, you will join another special team, and your identity may be higher than me."

Because the test is very important, only secret personnel can be involved. Special personnel are screened, there is no problem with identity, and the background is no problem.

But before he starts, he must explain all the issues clearly, so as not to cause any problems in the middle.

Top secret, joining can not exit, uncertainty.

All kinds of words make the songs hesitate. Once successful, the department that joins is higher than the brigade, which is also a big temptation.

"You go back and think about it. If you think about it, give me a reply tomorrow. This matter cannot be exposed. You should know the confidentiality regulations." Zou Kai said.

"understand."

Yingge respected a military ceremony and left the office with problems.

The late autumn of the capital is a bit cool, relatively south, where the autumn is more obvious and the cool breeze is cold. A military plane landed at a certain base in the capital. Chen Mo walked down from the military plane and took a deep breath.

Military aircraft transfer.

This kind of treatment is still the first encounter.

Just down, I left the airport under the guidance of a soldier.

"Comrade Chen Mo."

Just coming out, Li Chengzhi greeted him. It is common to call Chen Mo as the 'Chen Mo Brothers' or 'Mr. Chen Moe'. This is a formal occasion, and he must also be officially called.

"The head is good." Chen Mojing took a ceremony.

One of Li Cheng stayed, and did not expect Chen Molai to come out like this, serious appearance, so that he could not help but laugh. However, Chen Mo was also trained in the military during the school days, so the gestures are really different.

"You, you." Li Chengzhi smiled and shook his head: "Let's go, I will take you to the place where you live."

After that, let the soldiers carry Chen Mo’s salute and get off the base with Chen Mo.

"The matter of screening people is troublesome after all." Li Chengzhi said: "These things are very important. It is impossible to arrange ordinary people to experiment, so screening has been going on for some time, but it is necessary to determine the personnel."

Chen Mo nodded and expressed understanding.

"Your document has been brought up? The Academy of Engineering." Li Chengzhi asked.

"Bring it." Chen Mo nodded.

"Although face recognition, but the entrance to the Institute of Engineering, you still need your ID as proof of identity, lost is a little trouble." Li Chengzhi said.

After half an hour's drive, the two-person car quickly stopped at a courtyard gate. After checking the verification, the two will be released.

"This is the living area of researchers and family members." Li Chengzhi explained this, Chen Mo immediately.

Now different from the past, no longer, as before, for research, I will not go home for decades. The families of many researchers, where they live, are protected by security personnel, especially those of important researchers.

Li Chengzhi led Chen Mo into the management room, and went through the check-in procedures. After accepting the face information, the staff led Chen Mo and Li Chengzhi to leave.

Not long after, the two men walked under the guidance of the staff to a two-story single-family apartment.

“Here is your temporary residence.” Li Chengzhi said: “Besides, there are some other researchers’ residences.”

"Li instructor?" Li Chengzhi's words fell, a female voice with a shocked voice.

Wu Bing saw Li Chengzhi's back, a little uncertain. Because Li Chengzhi does not seem to live here, but did not expect to appear here.

When he saw Chen Mo, Wu Bing's eyes flashed slightly, with complex emotions.

The first time she saw Chen Mo, she thought that Chen Mo was an ordinary rich second generation and was introduced to him. After knowing Chen Mo’s identity, she had completely changed Chen Mo.

These geniuses, Newton and Gauss, are physicists and mathematicians, and can be understood. After all, physics and mathematics have great interoperability.

But Chen Mo is a bit public, physicists, geniuses in the computer field, materials experts, and now also involved in medicine and biology. If she didn't see it with her own eyes, she definitely didn't believe that there was such a character.

The more you understand, the more you feel the power of Chen Mo.

"Wu Academician, really clever." Li Chengzhi saw Wu Bing and smiled: "I remember you seem to live here."

"Just beside, there is time to come to drink tea." Wu Bing pointed to the small apartment next to it.

"Oh, there is a chance." Li Cheng smiled and pointed to Chen Mo: "In the future, Chen Mo will stay here, just as you are a neighbor. When you have time, you can string the door."

"Welcome to you, Mr. Chen Mo." Wu Bing smiled and reached out, and Chen Mo gently shook.

"Thank you." Chen Mo also smiled and nodded.

"You clean up first."

Wu Bing bid farewell to the two and entered his small apartment.

"Chen Mo brother, what do you think of this academician?" Li Chengzhi helped Chen Mo with a suitcase and asked him next to him.

"It's very good, beautiful school." Chen Mo said his evaluation.

The evaluation of only four words made Li Chengzhi speechless.

"It's really good, but unfortunately it is still single. In the previous business exchange meeting, Academician Wu Hequan arranged for you to meet because of this?" Li Chengzhi cast a sly look at Chen Mo.

"The last time I was treated as a wealthy family, I was despised by her. I recognized it when I met last time. It is also powerful enough." Chen Mo smiled. "What do you ask this? You know In my case, it is useless to mention this."

Others don't know, Chen Mo does not believe that Li Chengzhi does not know about him and the small fisherman's license.

"Oh, among the outstanding young people I have seen, you are the most anxious, good old, and the certificate is so fast." Li Chengzhi said.

Chen Mo directly gave him a blank eye.

"I will feel strange when I say this from your mouth. The person who meets the right person is the same sooner or later. I can wait, Xiao Yu can't wait, let her feel at ease, and it is my responsibility." Said.

Xiao Yu followed him, from nothing, all the way, gave him meticulous care, and did not expect anything. Xiao Yu assured that he would not let her follow this. Xiao Yu is the person he identified. It is impossible to drag her all the time. At least give her a name and give her a sense of security.

Chen Mo said so, Li Chengzhi smiled.

He is indeed influenced by the current information. Now, the young people who have achieved results are more than 30 years old and think about getting married and getting married. Chen Mo’s early and small fishing licenses are indeed a bit awkward.

Packing up Chen Mo’s small apartment, and Chen Mo went out to have a meal, it was already in the night, Li Chengzhi was ready to leave.

"This is the formula and related technology of the pharmacy." Chen Mo took out a hard disk and handed it to Li Chengzhi: "The file is encrypted, and the password is the first time we met."

"Good." Li Chengzhi took over Chen Mo's hard drive and put it in a portable safe.

After Li Chengzhi left, Chen Mocai took out his mobile phone and opened it. He just wanted to dial the phone of Xiaoyu, and the door knocked out.

"I, Wu Bing."

chapters.title: Chapter 232: : Wu Bing'S Guess
chapters.body:
Chapter 232: : Wu Bing'S Guess

Chen Mo did not expect that Wu Bing would come to him, and it was a big night. At this time, wearing a casual outfit, it doesn't look as serious as usual, and her temperament is more vibrant.

After Wu Bing came in, Chen Mo found a cup and poured a cup of boiling water for her.

In the hall, Chen Mo and Wu Bing sit face to face, and the atmosphere is a bit awkward.

He and Wu Bing have only seen twice in total, and they are not familiar with it. However, the next study, the two may have to contact.

"Is it because I don't ask for it, is it abrupt?" Wu Bing smiled.

"No." Chen Mo smiled and shook his head: "Beauty came over the door, welcome. Miss Wu will not come here to find me for no reason?"

"Can't you?"

"Row."

Chen Mo smiled and said nothing.

The two men were once again deadlocked and didn't know what to talk about. Wu Bing was not in a hurry. He looked at Chen Mo with interest and seemed to want to see him through.

In the face of Wu Bing's aggression, Chen Mozhen is uncomfortable.

In the big night, I was looked at by a woman with impunity, and it was a room for coexistence. It was inevitable that people would think about it.

"Development of potential agents, have you experimented with other animals in addition to experiments on mice and rabbits? For example, the human body?"

Wu Bing finally asked the question of his own doubts.

During this time, she goes to check the status of the test monkey every day. There are no side effects at present. In addition to changes in the body's bones and muscles, the monkey's immunity is much higher than that of ordinary monkeys, and the physical quality is greatly improved.

According to the normal drug research and development, the animal is tested to the extent that it proves that the drug is close to maturity and can be clinically tested on the human body.

After the emergence of the potential agent, she succeeded in the first test. The first test was successful, there were no side effects, and there was very little drug that needed to be improved.

But the truth is right in front of you.

This is the role of the 'silence factor'.

However, she does not believe that Chen Mo can only discover this substance and test its potential to develop potential.

At the time of the marching ant company, she was not convenient to ask this question. Because she did not confirm cooperation at the time, if she committed Chen Mo’s taboo, annoyed Chen Mo, and the cooperation was cancelled, her troubles would be great.

Now that the cooperation is confirmed, Chen Mo just came over and lived next to her, so she decided to ask.

“In this day, we are studying pharmacy every day. But it is limited to the study of animals and cells. This creates a problem for us, that is, the effect of pharmacy on the brain. For example, memory, learning ability, understanding ability, etc. We are not sure if it has any developmental effects on the brain."

Wu Bing straight stared at Chen Mo, with expectations in his eyes.

"The academician Wu will not think about it. If I use this kind of medicine, will it become so smart?" Chen Mo said without hesitation.

Wu Bing smiled slightly: "Do you want to hear the truth?"

"of course."

"I really think so."

Wu Bing did not hide, she really thought about this issue during this time.

Chen Mo will not be because of the use of this medicine, so that he becomes so smart. If so, it would be horrible.

This kind of doubt is just a guess, it can't be said in the face of a third person. So this time Chen Mo lives next to her, and will be brave enough to come over.

Chen Mo shook his head and laughed. He had to say that this woman's sense of smell is very powerful, and she actually has this idea.

He was the first to use potential potions and was able to develop his brain, but the effect was not as strong as she thought.

His ‘Super Brain’ has been developed twice in addition to the technology available in the Science Library. The first time it was just acquired from the Science and Technology Library, the second time it was upgraded from [trainee] to [Technology Apprentice].

Potential agents have limited development of his brain, as this is only a low-level agent.

Seeing Chen Mo's appearance, Wu Bing hurriedly explained: "Mr. Chen, I have no other meaning. As a researcher, I just habitually asked my doubts because the potential medicine is perfect."

"Do you want to know the answer?" Chen Mo said without hesitation.

The moment he had chosen to take the potion out, he already thought of this step.

"I really want to." Wu Bing nodded: "I can guarantee that no matter what your answer is, it will not be known to a third person from my mouth."

"Why do I believe in you?" Chen Mo continued.

Yeah, why?

This problem is difficult to live in Wu Bing, suddenly thought of something, Wu Bing face red. Big deal...

Wu Bing did not have the habit of making up. At this time, his eyes were shy and his cheeks were ruddy, and he was seen by Chen Mo.

In this state, Chen Moke is not uncommon. When he thought about it, he immediately had the idea of diverting attention: "You will not think, you are my girlfriend, give it to me, let me tell you the answer?"

"Whoever wants to be your girlfriend, who wants to dedicate, you see more movies."

Wu Bing seems to be stepping on the tail of the cat, and suddenly it is fried. Quickly defended, blushing like blood. Just a moment ago, there was indeed a flash of thought.

Chen Mo's condition is almost perfect, she has no boyfriend anyway, if it can be good, try to get along.

I just didn't expect it to be seen by Chen Mo. If you see through, you don’t say it, she doesn’t know what to see.

Say it now and make her ashamed.

"Then I will be relieved." Chen Mo breathed a sigh of relief. Being said this, Wu Bing's attention in the previous question was shifted a lot.

"What do you mean, do you feel that I think so, scare you, my condition is not good?" Wu Bing said with no anger. However, Chen Mo's appearance of weight-bearing, let her flash a trace of inexplicable loss.

The first contact, thinking that Chen Mo is a giant son, she has no feeling. But after knowing Chen Mo’s identity for the second time, she did have a good impression. The same is the researcher, who has a common topic, and who is better than someone who does not know what her uncles have arranged for her.

Chen Mo’s eyelid jumped and his heart smiled. It was estimated that he was being said by himself and turned to touch his nose.

"It doesn't mean this. It doesn't matter if you tell the answer. You also know that it is illegal to conduct human clinical trials. I will not take risks by taking other people's health. Because it matters, I choose to cooperate with you." , carry out the next study."

Realizing the gaffe of the past, Wu Bing hurriedly sorted out his emotions: "I may have offended the problem just now, I am sorry."

"No offense, people have this kind of question, people are too good, no way." Chen Mo smiled.

When the words came out, I found Wu Bing’s eyes. She did not expect that this domestic legendary young man actually has such a narcissistic side.

However, because of such a trouble, Wu Bing did not continue to entangle on this issue.

It will take a long time to conduct a clinical trial, and by then, you will know how much this agent affects the human brain.

After chatting about something in the north, Wu Bing left Chen Mo’s house and rushed back to his small apartment.

Early the next morning, after breakfast, Chen Mo followed Li Chengzhi and rushed to the institute. The main purpose of his coming here is the clinical trial of potential agents.

chapters.title: Chapter 233: : Le Busi Marina
chapters.body:
Chapter 233: : Le Busi Marina

"This is our experimental monkey, number 22."

Wu Bing pointed to the monkey in the transparent glass box, playing with toys. Next to her, Chen Mo, wearing a white coat and a mask.

After Li Chengzhi brought Chen Mo to the Institute of Biotechnology, he let Wu Bing come with Chen Mo.

As one of the main leaders of the experimental project, Wu Bing is familiar with Chen Mo and is the most suitable as a guide.

Chen Mo carefully looked at the monkey in the glass box, his eyes were dull. The experiment was successful, and all this was expected, without any surprises.

"This time as a experimental monkey, there are a total of 5, 22 to 26. 26 is the normal group."

Wu Bing handed the information collected during this time to Chen Mo.

Come this morning, she has heard that Chen Mo will give the formula and technology of the pharmacy to them, so in return, during this time, the experimental data and information of the institute should also be shown to Chen Mo.

Now, Chen Mo is also a member of their research and development team.

"The five experimental bodies, each of which was healthy and did not show any pathological changes. The body cells, immune cells and germ cells of the four experimental subjects were twice as active as the normal ones, and they were very normal. And the strength of the experimental body is also great, and the bite force is also very strong..."

Wu Bing, like the commentator, introduced Chen Mo to the situation. The R&D staff next to him did not dare to interject and quietly looked at Chen Mo.

Young assistants, especially female researchers, have almost small stars in their eyes. They also learned this morning that the inventor of this pharmacy is Chen Mo.

On the field, except for a few young doctoral assistants, most of them are more than 40 middle-aged and elderly people. They have lived for most of their lives. For the first time, they are convinced of a young man. They really feel that they have spent most of their lives. Lived.

Because they all know that according to the experimental data, the 'silence factor' can indeed enhance people's physique.

This special factor was actually discovered by Chen Mo. Although scientific research requires inspiration and luck, they do not think that this is Chen Mu’s luck, because Chen Mo’s strength is there.

Artificial intelligence experts, new materials experts, seismograph inventors, now have a potential developer of potential drugs, a series of titles that they can't reach.

When others succeed, they can be envious and jealous in time, and when others look at it in time, they can only marvel and pursue. Chen Mo’s achievements are already beyond the reach of others.

The experimental results were all expected. The data was turned over and Chen Mocai handed back the folder to Wu Bing.

"Don't look carefully?" Wu Bing asked.

"Be careful enough, it will be back." Chen Mo smiled. His ‘super brain’, in addition to terrible comprehension, has an unforgettable memory. Many of these materials are professional knowledge. He has seen it, and then carefully read the data again, and he has already remembered it.

Wu Bing shook his head, and Chen Chen was joking and didn't say anything.

Looking at their appearance, Chen Mo knew that they did not believe, they smiled, did not explain, and Wu Bing shoulder to shoulder into the laboratory.

Today is the first day of the Institute, and it is a day of familiarity with the environment.

Other experiments, with assistants and other groups to do, clinical trials did not start, Chen Mo does not need to participate for the time being, only need to adapt to the research environment.

After a round trip at the institute, I met the director of the institute and the R&D staff of the life science team. Until noon, I left the institute with Wu Bing.

Because the volunteers of the trial have not yet been called, Wu Bing has not had much to study for the time being.

This potential drug is now perfect. Specific other problems, after the human body test, found that the problem can be improved, otherwise she will study again, and do not know what to study.

"Wish Academician, Academician Chen is good."

On the road, everyone who saw the two people would say hello and look a little embarrassed.

The identity of the two people does not need to be introduced at all. Now the entire life science research institute knows that this is not a secret.

Wu Bing, the youngest female academician of an engineering institute, and Chen Mo, the youngest academician of the Academy of Engineering. Moreover, Chen Mo’s identity is special. It is the most outstanding talented scientist in China, and Wu Bing is also a double doctor. In their view, these two people are simply golden boys and girls, Lang Cai female appearance.

Whenever they meet and say hello, both Wu Bing and Chen Mo will smile and respond. After the security check, it was confirmed that there was no problem, and the two talents walked out of the door of the institute.

"I invite you to dinner at noon today. By the way, I will take a tour guide and take you around the capital. Doing the friendship of the landlord is also the rudeness of my first time to see you, and the abrupt pledge of last night."

Wu Bing smiled and looked at Chen Mo.

"Hey, there are beautiful women as guides, but you can also eat white and white. Under such conditions, the person who refuses is definitely stupid. I am obviously not stupid."

Chen Mo spread his hands and walked out side by side with Wu Bing.

The two did not find out, not far behind them, a young man with glasses, looking at the backs of the two, his eyes flashed a slap, his fists shook gently.

Just walked to the entrance of the institute, a man and a woman appeared in front of Chen Mo.

The woman's short hair is cut and her head is cool. The man's skin is dark, looks like a model, and his skills are not bad.

"Chen Chen, Li instructor let us be your temporary driver, where you need to go, you can tell us." The woman's mouth, tone with respect. This is their mission, the object to be protected in the capital.

"How are you, Wang Hai?" Chen Mo asked.

"Mr. Chen, your bodyguard can't just enter the institute and the community, so it's inconvenient. Li instructor negotiated with him and let us come." The man hurriedly explained.

Chen Mo nodded and understood naturally. Although Wang Hai is a veteran, it is impossible to enter and leave these places. Substitution protection is really convenient. These two people are not drivers, but the bodyguards that Li Chengzhi sent to protect him.

"There are free drivers, this little day makes me happy to think about the sea. Take the road, guide lady." Chen Mo looked at Wu Bing and laughed.

"Ok."

Wu Bing is not an idiot. Naturally understand that the two are the existence of security personnel, and they are not excluded. After all, Chen Mo’s identity is too special. This arrangement is also good for him.

Seeing the two people entering the bodyguard's car, the female staff who saw this scene on the road in the distance picked up: "You said that Chen Mo is so powerful, will it be like the TV series, there are any adventures, or like a movie, What medicine did you eat and the brain was developed?"

"Don't talk about it, can't this be okay? The movie has seen you more, but it's better not to talk casually."

It seems that I am not aware of this kind of argument. The other female staff next to me did not finish the topic immediately, and did not say anything. Feel free to talk about academicians, especially special personnel like Chen Mo. If they are found, their golden rice bowl will be lost. Seriously, there will be jail.

“What do you want to eat at noon today?” Another female researcher realized that it was not good. He did not continue to talk about it and hurriedly shifted the topic.

"I am also tangled, I am losing weight recently, I dare not eat too greasy."

Both of them were interested and did not continue to discuss the topic just now.

The two women walked away and didn't see it. Not far behind them, the young man with glasses and the gaze under the black-rimmed glasses flickered.

Looking far away, Chen Mo and Wu Bing boarded the car and left. The young man’s eyes were awkward and uncomfortable. He looked a little angry and seemed determined that the young man’s lips would pick up and walk away in the direction of the dormitory.

chapters.title: Chapter 234: :Ready
chapters.body:
Chapter 234: :Ready

"What do you think at this moment?"

Wu Bing and Chen Mo stood side by side on the edge of the city wall. They are now in the position of one of the world's nine plugs. The two are on the top of the mountain, in front of them, the vast mountains and the boundless blue sky, and the walls that lie in the mountains.

These walls have witnessed the rise and fall of the history of the millennium and the replacement of the dynasties. Witness the vast sea of mulberry fields at the foot. At this time into the autumn, the mountains and trees are somewhat ridiculous, giving people more bleak feeling.

"You won't let me write a 800-word tour experience?" Chen Mo looked at the scenery in front of him and smiled.

"Sometimes, I find that you are not so rigid, but still understand humor."

Wu Bing mouth hangs a smile, and Mei has swept Chen Mo.

Her impression of Chen Mo is getting more and more lively. After half a day of understanding, she knows that Chen Mo is not a legend of being born, not a man of flesh and blood.

She was Chen Mo’s guide and she was happy. After returning to China, I rarely went out to play. I was immersed in research. This time together with Chen Mo, she was very relaxed.

For her words, Chen Mo reported with a smile.

"It's a bit cold here." A mountain breeze blew, Wu Bing touched the goose bumps on his arm, couldn't help but lick it, and looked at Chen Mo if he had nothing to look at.

"Then let's go down." Chen Mo's mouth hangs a smile.

"You definitely don't have a girlfriend." Wu Bing was turned over by Chen Mo's words. This guy is emotionally motivated by IQ? So old-fashioned, blunt, obvious hints, actually do not understand.

"I was told by you, I really don't have a girlfriend." Chen Moxiao smiled. However, there is a wife, Chen Mo added a sentence in his heart.

"you……"

Wu Bingyan was flushed and was half-dead. This guy who has no emotional intelligence, I don’t know if I really don’t understand it, or I don’t understand it.

I really don't understand, she still has a chance. If she doesn't understand it, she will know that there is really no chance. Because this is the fifth hint she came out to play today, this guy is a look of a smile, people want to kill him.

"Forget it, go to dinner at dinner time, I will take you to eat roast duck." Wu Bing said.

"Ok."

Chen Mo smiled again.

He is not indifferent to the customs. As a person coming over, he naturally understands that Wu Bing is a little bit sympathetic to himself, so keep a distance.

Otherwise, if there is anything wrong with the two people, then it will be troublesome.

He has a small fishing, it is enough, there is no need to provoke too much debt.

At the beginning, Xu Xinxin had been to him several times after the party, but every time he was rejected by Chen Mo for various reasons, and finally there was no movement. Now another Wu Bing, naturally refused.

After a day of fun in the capital, I ate a lot of delicious food. The next day, Chen Mo finished eating breakfast, dressed up neatly, took his own things and walked out of the small apartment.

Outside the small apartment, Li Chengzhi sent two security guards to protect him. He had already drove at the door waiting for Chen Mo to appear.

"Go."

The two nodded and drove to the institute.

Wu Bing had already waited at the entrance of the institute. After seeing Chen Mo coming over, Wu Bing also left.

Yesterday's play, she only knows how incomprehensible this guy Chen Mo, but also relieved, now the most important, personal feelings of studying potential drugs, go to work after work.

"The first batch of volunteers have been sent today. Other doctors are giving them a full-body examination and testing. After the volunteers have collected the specific data, they will take it over to us." Wu Bing led Chen Mo and entered her. Work Institute.

“How many people?” Chen Mo asked.

"The first batch of volunteers, only ten people, this number is enough." Wu Bing said.

Acura wore a white sick suit, sat in a chair, and looked calmly at the doctor wearing a white coat and glasses.

After coming over today, he was truly fully examined. He suspects that the doctor is prepared to count how many hairs he has in his body.

Internal medicine, surgery, X-ray, chest X-ray, blood draw, etc., he did not know how many tests this group of doctors had given him, and it was already numb.

After Zou Kai informed him, after thinking about it, he decided to come and try. He is an orphan, and he is not worried about it. He is not afraid of any accident.

He knows that there is only one chance. After missing it, there is no next time. He does not want to regret it later.

After confirming the participation, he also really understands a little about this top secret plan.

‘Huaxia Captain’!

Very familiar name.

He has seen this movie by Captain America, but that is a science fiction movie. The plan uses a similar name, and it is likely that it is a project for a 'super soldier' that needs to be tested.

Come here for so many careful inspections, he also knows that he is now one of the testers.

No wonder the brigade commander said that there are uncertain consequences, that he may be disabled or even die. This special research experiment does not know what the consequences will be.

I can only pray now, and I’m reluctant to think about it, join the project, sign a confidentiality agreement, and he can’t quit.

Once successful, he is one of the super soldiers, joining a more advanced special department, his status may be higher than the brigade.

This is the pursuit of wealth and risk.

"Now the IQ test." Dr. Bai Dazhao handed a tablet to the carol: "According to your thoughts, finish the ten test questions."

I did not expect even IQ to be tested.

Acura smiled, took the tablet, quieted down, and answered the questions according to his own ideas. Ten sets of questions, this test is a bit too much, at school, not so crazy to brush questions.

Fortunately, they are all multiple-choice questions. After two hours, the songs will finish all ten sets of questions. The type of topic is similar, and the estimate is the average score.

"What more tests?" asked the carol.

"The next step is memory testing."

Dr. Bai Dawei’s words made the songs vomit blood. But still follow his instructions to conduct a memory test.

After the memory test, there is also a psychological test. After all the tests are completed, the whole person has been stunned. Under the guidance of the staff, return to your own bed and wait for the results.

Wu Bing is looking at the information. These materials are the technical materials that Chen Mo gave to Li Chengzhi. It has now been entered into the database, and only the authority of her principal responsible person can be emphasized.

Seeing these technical materials, and then looking at Chen Mo's eyes, there is no small star. This man, what whimsy can come up with, people worship.

“The results of the physical examination of the clinical volunteers came out.” A researcher gave the physical examination analysis and data to Wu Bing and Chen Mo next to her.

After Wu Bing and Chen Mo took over the information, they began to look.

In general, these inspection data are preferred and much better than the average person.

After all, they are volunteers selected among the special forces. Their physical fitness is generally good. They want to be healthy volunteers.

"Let's go, the data comes out, it's ready, it's almost time to start." Wu Bing took the lead.

Chen Mo lightly responded, followed by Wu Bing, and followed up.

chapters.title: Chapter 235: :A Little Nervous!
chapters.body:
Chapter 235: :A Little Nervous!

In the engineering institute, nine people were present, including seven major project leaders, including Chen Mo, Wu Bing, Ding Jianwen, the main person in charge of the project, and four other academicians, as well as two research assistants, one male and one female. .

Next to them, Li Chengzhi and a dark-skinned man stood still. Behind them, there are five fully armed special security personnel, all of whom come from the military and are responsible for the project.

Neither of them bothered the researchers, just calmly watching.

Among the dozens of people on the field, Wu Bing and Chen Mo are the youngest, but they are the two most qualified people.

Chen Mo is a developer of potential pharmacy. Although Wu Bing has the shortest time to join the team, he is the most important researcher in the R&D team.

At this time everyone, their eyes are on the volunteers in the hospital bed.

Only one clinical volunteer was fixed in a special bed and could not move.

The trial has officially begun. This is not a general drug trial. They must be fixed to prevent accidents before the specific effects of the drug are determined.

The first batch of ten volunteers can only be tested by one person. Because this is the first time it is used on the human body, it is still unclear. It is unclear whether the potential agent works in the human body, and there are no side effects. Only one attempt can be made.

"Chongxin, Liwen, let's get started." Ding Jianwen told two assistants.

His words fell, and everyone on the field was shocked and his eyes filled with expectations.

"Ok."

One man and one woman nodded and began to prepare for clinical volunteers to awaken the test. The division of labor between the two is very clear, the female assistant gave him a blood vessel, and the man injected the medicine.

The needle is only the thickness of the small thumb, one finger long, and is filled with orange medicine.

Shen Chongxin took the syringe, was squeezing out the air inside the syringe, the gaze under the black-rimmed glasses, watching the syringe's medicinal light flashing, I don't know what to think.

He is a medical doctor and is an expert in medicine. In the eyes of outsiders, it may be very powerful. But here, his academic qualifications do not have any advantages.

The eyes of the people were placed on the volunteers in the hospital bed. Shen Chongxin’s eyes were inadvertently turned to Wu Bing, flashing a touch of softness, and turned to Chen Mo, who was next to Wu Bing, with awkwardness and unhappiness.

No one noticed his strangeness. When he looked at the syringe in his hand, his face was curious and anticipating. When he was ready, Shen Chongxin bent down and prepared to inject.

At this moment, Luo Yong was only lying in a tight-fitting shorts and lying on the bed with various detectors.

Beside the hospital bed, various medical equipment and equipment are densely packed to show his physical condition at any time. Electrocardiogram, blood pressure, body temperature, etc., are all monitored at any time.

Surrounded by a group of people, he has been unable to eat the wind and waves.

Before joining, he has been told to make any possible preparations. The road is chosen by myself. Since I chose to join this column, there is no retreat. I can only pray now. He didn't know if he would become the kind of biochemical person in the movie.

At the moment when the sharp needle penetrated into the blood vessel, Luo Yong's pupils shrank, his body shivered slightly, and his heartbeat accelerated.

This change has made all the people on the field nervous. This is the first test. Is it so fast?

"What happened? Why did the heart beat faster?" Before the other developers opened up, the dark-skinned man took the initiative to speak, and the voice was a bit nervous.

Wu Bing glanced at the black-skinned man, indicating that he did not need to be nervous, and looked at Luo Yong in a blink of an eye: "What do you feel now? Why is the heartbeat faster?"

This test is related to whether the following test is going to be carried out. Don't look at Wu Bing's seemingly calm, but the psychology is also very tense, but the tension is not helpful, because the matter has been completed and can only be resigned.

"No discomfort, a little nervous, so my heart beats faster."

Rayong is now a fear of the unknown, which is the potential instinct of mankind. He didn't know what it was to inject something into his body.

tension?

This reason makes the people on the field speechless and the heart that is mentioned is also relaxed.

The black-skinned man touched his nose, slightly groaning, and there was no opening. Now it seems that they can't insert their hands at all, and they can only be confused.

"You relax, this medicine, the technology is very mature, no side effects are detected. If you have any discomfort in your body, just let us know."

Wu Bing gave a sigh of relief and looked at the female assistant Li Wen, let her start asking Luo Yong's feelings and record it. Now is the development stage, it is hard to conduct a test, every detail can not be let go, because it is related to possible future improvement development.

Rayong took a deep breath, subtracted the tension and carefully felt every change in the body.

Not long after, Rayong’s head sent a heavy feeling, and a deep sense of exhaustion swept over, leaving him unable to lift a trace of spirit.

"I feel very tired, is there a problem?" Luo Yong swallowed and swallowed.

He is now unable to lift his strength, and as time goes on, the feeling of exhaustion becomes more and more obvious. More tired than usual after his high-intensity training. It is the tiredness of the body, and now it is from the mental aspect.

Is there a problem with the medicine? What are the consequences? Will not become a vegetative or an idiot?

Luo Yong thought about it.

"After the action of the medicine, you will feel tired. This is a normal phenomenon in which your body changes." Chen Mo, who wears a mask next to him, also opened his mouth.

Seeing Rayong's gazeless eyes, he also guessed that he was thinking. Negative thoughts are not good both physically and psychologically.

"It turned out to be the case."

Luo Yong breathed a sigh of relief again and laughed at himself.

In the past when the secret mission was carried out, the bullets were not afraid of the rain. I did not expect that I would be scared in the hospital bed now. Not afraid to die on the battlefield, may be afraid of dying in the hospital bed. For the soldiers, this is not the best place to stay.

"You relax your spirits, don't hold on, sleep. When you wake up, it's okay." Chen Mo continued.

Others did not refute Chen Mo’s words. The pharmacy was developed by Chen Mo, and no one has more right to speak than him.

Wu Bing looked at Chen Mo deeply and did not refute.

"it is good."

Luo Yong looked at Chen Mo and closed his eyes. Not long after, the slight nose snorted. Too tired, only two minutes away, has fallen into deep sleep.

Everyone on the field, their eyes are on the instrument.

The instrument has changed, body fat percentage, bone density, and height, all steadily climbing with small data changes.

Even in human adolescence, there is no such obvious change.

Obviously, the medicine is working.

"The heartbeat is normal."

"The blood pressure is normal."

"The brain waves are normal."

"He is already sleeping deeply."

......

After the data report came out, everyone vomited. There was no abnormality in the body for a while, so they gave a sigh of relief.

"It is estimated that you have to sleep for a while, let's go first, wait for him to wake up and come over." Chen Mo said.

"Good." Wu Bing nodded.

Others did not refute, test and enter the formal test, and now stand here, it is stupid, there is no need.

The two went out and the rest left the room and waited for Ray Yong to wake up.

chapters.title: Chapter 236: :Variety
chapters.body:
Chapter 236: :Variety

Luo Yong had a dream, the sky was gray and a ridiculous scene. There was a boundless zombie in front of him, and he was limping towards him. He was on a high ground surrounded by zombies.

There are ten bags on the high ground, and he is constantly holding the seeds of the bag buried on the ground.

Seed-grown plants, piranhas, exploding fruit, bullet trees, thorny vines, psychedelic flowers, zombies that are constantly obstructed by sulfuric acid bamboo. The exploding fruit blew the zombies of the legs, and the intestines flowed out. They still smashed with two arms and climbed over to the position on his side. Then they were entangled by the thorns, turned into fertilizer, and the plants were upgraded.

However, there were too many zombies and endless. After planting the seeds, Luo Yong felt that he had become a strong man, and he had to lift the big stones and squat down. I don’t know how long it took, all the plants had been destroyed, and the stones had already dawned. It has been surrounded by zombies and is above the high ground.

Looking at the endless zombies below, Luo Yong swallowed and took out the only explosive fruit seeds buried at his feet.

"Mom. I have never vowed to die."

boom!

Luo Yong in the hospital bed opened his eyes and his eyes were dull. It seemed to be recollecting. After discovering that it was a dream, he took a sigh of relief and was scared to finish himself.

I just wanted to reach out and wipe the sweat, but I found that my body was fixed on the bed. A group of white-eyed people surrounded him. The eyes of the red fruit made him feel like a lamb.

Suddenly remembered that he is currently undergoing clinical testing and is not over yet.

"What happened just now, why is the heart beat faster? Is it a nightmare?" Wu Bing said.

Already two hours have passed, the medicine of the medicine has spread throughout the body with the blood. The data of Rayong's body, starting from the record, is a steady rise, and the speed of body sweating and metabolism is also faster than usual.

But just now, Luo Yong's heartbeat accelerated, sweating and sweating all over his limbs. This scene scared them and thought that there was something wrong with the experiment.

Fortunately, Luo Yong woke up.

"I just did a dream and was scared." After finishing his thoughts, Luo Yong settled down.

Wu Bing continued to ask: "What dream did you just make?"

"Do you even need to understand this?" Luo Yong was speechless and hesitated to tell the situation in the dream.

"Isn't this a plant war zombie?" Chen Mo smiled softly.

Luo Yong's old face was red, Chen Mo said so, he realized that his dream is the plant war zombies, it should be this game to play more.

When I heard the Plants vs. Zombies, the R&D staff on the field looked strange. It is estimated that this guy is afraid of becoming a zombie and has a nightmare. But then it is relieved that they have all the knowledge of medicine, and there are wonderful dreams. This kind of dream is not unusual.

“How do you feel about your body now? Is there any discomfort?”

Wu Bing pulled the topic back to reality, and the attention of many R&D personnel fell on Luo Yong again.

"There is no special feeling, just feel a little hungry." Luo Yong shook his head slightly.

"The body changes, consumes a lot, and it feels normal to be hungry." Chen Mo explained.

"Well, that's nothing special." Luo Yong responded. Listening to Chen Mo’s saying that his heart was half-hearted, the original worry also disappeared a lot.

Ding Jianwen's eyes burned, sweeping up and down on Luo Yong, his eyes with a trace of suspicion, and some uncertainty. In the past two hours, he did not guard Luo Yong, he was too old to stand for too long, and he could not watch the results at any time.

Just now, his attention was on Luo Yong. Now I feel that something is wrong. I think about it, but I can’t say where it changes. There is a feeling of itching.

"Do you feel that he is a little different from the beginning." Ding Jianwen still said the doubts in his heart.

After Ding Jianwen’s reminder, everyone was wrong and began to look at Luo Yong carefully. At this point, it did change a bit, but it changed, but it couldn’t be said.

"The lines of the body have changed," Chen said. I have experienced such a period before, and the effect on it is naturally clear.

Everyone gave a slight glimpse and suddenly realized.

Rayong’s body has changed. Just when they saw Rayong’s body, his skin was dark. It is the result of perennial training, mission, sun and rain, and the muscle contour is very obvious, it is a typical muscle man.

Now the lines are much softer, the muscles are not so embarrassing, the skin is also bronze, the body seems to grow taller and looks very comfortable.

This figure, after retiring, went out as a male model and was hungry.

Several researchers, reaching out and touching on Rayong's body, seem to be trying to feel. This scene makes Luo Yong a cold, goose bumps.

In addition to Wu Bing and research assistant Li Wen, there is a female academician in his fifties. Other researchers are male, and the main researchers are middle-aged and old men over the age of 40. He is a man, so many old men touched and touched him, and the god-level strips could not be eaten.

They are now fixed in the hospital bed and can only let them do whatever they want.

"We need to do a comprehensive physical examination for you now," Wu Bing said.

Luo Yong's situation is uncertain. According to the surface condition, the trial was successful, but before the comprehensive physical examination, no one would dare to conclude that the clinical trial was successful.

The contour lines of the body change, but there are no lesions or other side effects in the internal tissues. No one knows, and a comprehensive examination is required before the conclusion can be made.

"can."

Luo Yong was so busy that he nodded, and this sentence finally let him get rid of the "claw" of this group of old men.

Everyone looked forward to Luo Yong. If there is no change in Luo Yong, it means that this medicine is no problem on the human body.

Luo Yong was taken away for physical examination, and a group of R&D personnel left with him. He was busy for a long time. Now the first test seems to be safe and they can safely eat a dinner.

The results of the medical examination will need to come out tomorrow, and the results will be finalized tomorrow.

"You don't seem to worry about the test failure." Wu Bing looked at Chen Mo.

Chen Mo is the developer of the pharmacy, but in this experiment, the developer was exceptionally calm. From the beginning to the end, he did not see any worry on his face. It seems very certain that the trial will succeed.

"Oh, I am worried that it is useless." Chen Mo smiled and said: "I am worried that it will not fail, then I will worry about it before every test, and I will succeed."

Wu Bing glanced at him deeply and said nothing: "What do you eat for dinner?"

"Don't go to the cafeteria? You treat?" Chen Mo said.

"The canteen is tired of eating, don't go. You earn more money a day than I have earned in my life, and let me have a female treat, do you want to shame?"

Wu Bing was defeated by Chen Mo.

"Well, I treat you, celebrate the test success in advance." Chen Mo smiled.

The two talked and laughed, and did not see the pair of eyes behind them. Shen Chongxin’s fist in his hand shook his hand, his brow wrinkled, and finally pushed his glasses, not knowing what he was thinking.

"Shen work, what are you doing here?" Liu Liwen came over and patted Shen Chongxin's shoulder gently.

"No, I am thinking about a question about the subject research." Shen Chongxin laughed.

"It's really enough to fight together. Let's go eat together. This time there is no big problem, it is also fortunate. After the success, there will be a small holiday to rest." Liu Liwen laughed.

"Go."

Shen Chongxin nodded and left with Liu Liwen.

chapters.title: Chapter 237: : Shock
chapters.body:
Chapter 237: : Shock

On a special test field, everyone's eyes were on the field, and there was a look in the eyes.

Luo Yong's physical examination results have come out, immunity, vision, hearing, bone density, muscle fat ratio have been significantly improved, no abnormalities in the body, and the overall quality of all aspects of the body have improved.

This result surprised the people on the R&D team. According to the current data, potential drugs do have the potential to develop human potential.

Now awaken the test, strength and speed of the final project.

If these two indicators are also improved, it means that the potential agents have been basically developed successfully.

After the drug is successful, it can't be used by all soldiers at once, but when it is used on the most special batch of special forces, the combat effectiveness can definitely be greatly improved.

"Start."

With a command, Luo Yong with a boxing glove must look up and lift his right fist to the dynamometer. The original line is perfect and the muscles are instantly paralyzed.

Hey!

The huge sound was like a giant drum, and it was knocked on the hearts of everyone. The testers on the field were shocked. When they saw the digits of the force gauge, they opened their mouths and their faces were extremely wonderful.

237 kg.

Heavy punches of 237 kilograms, this heavy punch, has far exceeded the weight of the boxing weight of Rayong. In 2000, Lee shot a 400-pound record, but it was more than 180 kilograms. This data of Luo Yong, in terms of strength, has far surpassed Li.

It’s been a few days before the first body test, and it has become so scary now.

Does this have the effect of a potential agent? The tester standing next to Luo Yong swallowed and swallowed his heart. The height that a boxer can't reach for decades of training is completed in a few days.

It doesn't look like any muscles, but it hides such a terrible explosive power. Being hit by a punch or kicking a kick may be death.

Coupled with the speed and responsiveness of terror, whoever fights with his bare hands is terrible. The number of scarlet, compared to the test before the injection of the drug, increased more than one and a half points.

After half an hour, all the projects were tested.

Heavy punch 237 kg, side kick 832 kg, 100 meters speed 9 seconds 21...

Only explosive power was tested and flexibility was not tested. The speed is not slow, there is a muscle, as long as more practice, the flexibility will certainly get better and better.

The developers who saw the test data were unbelievable on their faces.

They don't understand the power outbreak, but they know the speed. The speed of 100 meters is 9 seconds 21, this speed has broken the current world record.

If the pharmacy is used on professional athletes, this speed will be even faster. It is not impossible to break the record of 9 seconds, and this kind of medicine is not an exciting drug. Once it is used, it cannot be detected.

It's just that they don't need to be on the athletes, not what they decide.

The medicine was successful.

Ding Jianwen holding the test form is in a complicated mood. At the beginning of potential development, it was not optimistic. He and the three medical colleges won the fight and eventually got the project.

Now, the academician with him has already been a mess. The R&D team has also grown stronger, but it has not made much progress and has become an undead project.

After Wu Bing joined, the project has made great progress. However, Chen Mo’s discovery of the 'silence factor' has turned the project into a turn.

It didn't take long before it was successful. Although successful, this achievement does not belong to their team, but belongs to this enchanting young man.

Ding Jianwen looked to Chen Mo next to him.

Not only Ding Jianwen, Wu Bing also looked at Chen Mo in a complicated way.

The project has been almost successful, but she is not very happy. The technology is not developed by their team. From the beginning to the end, they are supporting roles.

"Do you think I am handsome? Don't be obsessed with brother." Chen Mo noticed the eyes of several people and smiled lightly.

Wu Bing, who was still admired in her heart, couldn't help but roll her eyes when she heard Chen Mo's words. This guy, besides being smart, has a little narcissism.

However, this kind of small narcissism, it makes people feel a lot of intimacy, at least can eliminate some sense of distance.

Thinking of this, Wu Bing mouth hangs a smile.

When Li Chengzhi heard Chen Mo’s words, he also smiled. He is not interested in who developed the technology, and the results they need have been achieved.

The successful development of potential drugs is a good news for the military and special security departments.

The strength and speed increase, with a little training, the individual combat capability will also increase, and the 'Huaxia Captain' plan is nearing success.

This genius of young people can always surprise them. Whether it is a seismograph or a potential potion.

People in the entire R&D team are laughing because the project has been successful and they are all part of the team.

"Dr. Ding, are you still me?" Wu Bing looked to Ding Jianwen next to him.

"Come on." Ding Jianwen said: "I am old, this project is completed, I have to retreat to the second line, and later research and development, you still need to rely on you."

"it is good."

Wu Bing is also unpretentious and puts up the test report. She is now the deputy head of the project team. Ding Jianwen does not speak, and her voice is the biggest.

I saw Wu Bing's face: "The first trial was a preliminary success, and I always pay attention to Luo Yong's physical condition. After three days, I will conduct a comprehensive physical examination. By the way, I will test it on other volunteers three days later. Peng Academician, you Responsible for following the physical condition of Rayong every day."
