"Okay." A middle-aged man in his fifties nodded.

After all the things that need attention, Wu Bing left.

Initial success can only be a stage of success. But no one is uncertain about the side effects of the drug. The physical condition of the volunteers must be closely monitored so that the information can be obtained in the first place.

And no one can guarantee that his success is not a case. So the next step is to test on other volunteers to make sure that this is not a case and the test is truly successful.

Three days are fleeting.

During this time, Luo Yong's physical condition was followed up, and there were no side effects. They were completely relieved and believed that the medicine had been very successful.

As Luo Yong slowly adapts to strength, his individual combat effectiveness has increased, speed, flexibility and strength are also improving, and one person challenges four special forces.

Luo Yong's physical examination has no lesions and side effects, which makes the R&D team's confidence increase. Now he is also preparing to test on other volunteers.

The first batch of volunteers has a total of ten people. In addition to Rayong, there are nine people, six men and three women.

The trial was three people, two men and one woman.

To be on the safe side, they have to be careful. Once the problem occurs with the drug, the loss can be kept to a minimum, even if it takes more time.

They have been here for decades, they don't care for more than ten days and a half. Step by step, to ensure that the test is carried out in the safest conditions.

At this time, in a large ward, three people were fixed on a special bed with a curtain in the middle. Behind the bed, a variety of instruments, beating data, reflects their current state.

"Get started." Wu Bing faintly opened.

"Ok."

Shen Chongxin blinked and walked nervously toward the bed.

chapters.title: Chapter 238: :Replace?
chapters.body:
Chapter 238: :Replace?

Shen Chongxin’s hand holding the syringe was somewhat unnatural, and the corner of his eye smashed the camera in the ward and his face did not move.

Walking to the bedside, Shen Chongxin began to find blood vessels for volunteers. When you are ready, reach out and pick up the syringe you have prepared on the plate.

At the moment of bending over, the body turned slightly, and the hand holding the syringe shrank. A syringe with an orange liquid was dropped from the sleeve, and the syringe in his hand was also thrown into the sleeve.

The whole movement is flowing, and it seems to have been practiced numerous times. If a magician sees his movements, he will be surprised. This is the magician's usual means of exchange.

The two syringes were exactly the same, and everyone standing in the hospital bed did not notice that the syringe had been transferred.

Undiscovered, Shen Chongxin's face was slightly relaxed, a smile appeared on the corner of his mouth, and the injection was completed. He put the syringe back on the plate.

The remaining two volunteers, Shen Chongxin did not have any action, and completed the injection. After doing all this, Shen Chongxin returned to the R&D team, as if nothing was going on, waiting with everyone.

There is no doubt in the crowd, and the attention is on the volunteers.

Acura lies in bed and carefully experiences changes in the body.

He didn't know the changes in the volunteers with him, but his body did not show any symptoms, no pain, no discomfort, and no difference in peace.

At the beginning, he still had some trials of nervous drugs, but now, the drug test did not feel any change, which made him unexpected.

Before the trial began, he was told that the drug had been successfully tested on a person, giving them peace of mind. Because the drug works, the body and mind will feel tired.

There is no such fatigue now.

"Don't these drugs useless?" Yangge thought in his heart.

"what happened?"

The abnormal situation on the Acura immediately caught the attention of everyone.

The other two volunteers have already slept in the past due to the role of the pharmacy. However, the rightmost yangko is still refreshing and does not sleep.

Wu Bing quickly walked to the Acura and touched the body of the Yangko. The brow wrinkled: "Do you feel any uncomfortable?"

"No." Yangko shook his head.

“I don’t feel tired and sleepy? Or what other situation?” Wu Bing continued.

The other two, like the last test, went to sleep after the drug was applied, but the carols did not go to sleep. This exception raised the hearts of all people. The main people are all around and look at the situation carefully.

Once the trial has problems, they must find the problem first.

"No, I don't think I have any problems as usual."

The carol continues to shake his head.

"This is strange."

Wu Bing frowned and looked at the other two volunteers.

The two have already slept, and the carols are the first to be injected. Normally, there is no reason to be like nothing.

"Now let's take a look at it and let people do a simple physical examination. After the test is over, check it out and come to a conclusion."

If you don't know the situation, you must wait for the end of the drug effect, the results of the physical examination, and the changes in the data to determine where the problem is.

There are no side effects on the body of Yangge, but it makes Wu Bing feel relieved. There are no side effects, others are good to say, even if the drug does not work, it does not matter.

If there are side effects, they will pause the experiment.

Everyone was a little embarrassed and worried. This is the first time that there has been a problem. Although the current reaction is not big, it does have problems and they have to worry.

The waiting time is a bit long, which is a torment for developers. After five minutes, you will check the physical condition of the Acura. If you are sure that there is no problem, you will be relieved.

Time passed in one minute and one second. More than two hours, two volunteers who slept in the past, slowly awakened after the efficacy of the drug.

"His data is not very different." A person in charge of instrument data testing said: "The other two have a lot of changes."

The person he said is naturally a carol.

When I heard this, everyone’s face changed slightly.

Is there a problem?

"Schedule their physical examination immediately, first check their physical condition." Wu Bing said.

The R&D personnel responsible for the medical examination are called security guards, and the three people are taken away from the ward to go to the medical examination. The data reaction is only the most preliminary situation, and it has no effect. The result of the physical examination can be determined.

After the three people were introduced to the medical examination, the research team also followed. This is a problem with the experiment, they must follow up at any time in order to solve the problem.

Throughout the research team, everyone looked at the three volunteers, waiting for the results of the medical examination.

When everyone looked at the three volunteers, Shen Chongxin's eyes flashed slightly: "I went to the toilet. If something happened, let me talk about it and come back in two minutes."

Shen Chongxin and Liu Liwen next to him greeted each other and turned away.

After entering the toilet, Shen Chongxin took a sigh of relief and hurriedly took out the syringe inside the sleeve. Looking at the slender syringe, Shen Chongxin had a hint of hesitation and anticipation in his eyes, and could not help but lick his lips.

Hesitant for ten seconds, Shen Chongxin took a pen from his pocket and injected the medicine into the refill.

To do all this, Shen Chongxin took the pen and threw the syringe into the toilet. After confirming the flush, I left the toilet with a slight smile.

The test seemed to have problems. The attention of all the people was on the three volunteers. Waiting for the results of the medical examination, they did not notice the abnormality of Shen Chongxin.

Looking at the players who are whispering, Shen Chongxin smiled and his heart was put back in his stomach.

"What is the situation now?" Shen Chongxin asked in the ear of Liu Liwen.

"The medical examination is not over yet, so I have to wait." Liu Liwen shook her head gently.

The three volunteers did not have allergies and other symptoms, which made them relax a lot. The pharmacy has been injected and is now in effect.

Shen Chongxin responded with a sigh of relief in the corner of his eye, standing next to Wu Bing, and his face was calm.

Chen Moxin felt that he had just turned his head and Shen Chongxin had already regained his gaze. The brows were slightly wrinkled, and they didn't care about anything. They put their eyes on the testing equipment.

He came here to participate in the trial and was one of the main personnel.

Because the technology was developed by him, he is most familiar with this pharmacy. Once the problem occurs, he can know for the first time what went wrong.

These days, developers are shown the synthesis and purification of the agent.

Now is the second test. If it is successful, it will require a third test or even more tests. Because the technology is unknown, the institute has to be careful.

The third test is no problem. After the research institute's own purified pharmacy is no problem, he will return to Binhai City, and the rest will be handed over to the institute.

He is not worried about the situation that has occurred this time.

The technique he got has already indicated that the drug has no side effects, so he is not worried about the problem with the drug.

Two hours later, the medical examinations for the three were all over, and the medical reports of the three volunteers also appeared in the hands of several major R&D leaders.

No. 3, No. 4 increased cell activity, increased bone density, and increased strength and speed. But what made them feel the problem was that Vol. 2 volunteers had no significant changes in their bodies.

chapters.title: Chapter 239: : Authors Fans
chapters.body:
Chapter 239: : Authors Fans

It’s already late at night from the institute.

After entering the apartment, Chen Mo computer bag was thrown on the sofa and fell directly on the sofa, thinking about the problem of the test.

Three volunteers, two volunteers successfully tested, and one volunteer injected the drug without any significant change in the body. This is a potion for developing potential. The body has not changed, even if there are no lesions and side effects, it is still a failed test for them.

If you do not find the cause of the failure, the third test must be done with caution. This time and the problem, no one can be sure what will happen to the next test.

Why is this happening?

This is the first question that Chen Mo thought when he got the medical report. It is estimated that the group of R&D personnel also has the same doubts as him.

Volunteer physique problems? Or is there something else wrong?

Chen Mo listed the possibilities that he could think of in his mind.

This afternoon, the main attention of many R & D personnel is on the Acura. Injection of drugs, but it did not work, this is something they do not understand.

As a developer of pharmacy, he is the person who knows the most about pharmacy.

There is a problem with the experiment and he must also be involved in answering this question. This afternoon, some members have suggested that it may be that the technology is not mature enough, and it has not been completely perfected, so that the potential development problem will be invalid.

As soon as this question was raised, some people agreed.

After the inspection report of the unsuccessful volunteer came out, everyone was discussing the issue. Beginning with temperature factors, volunteer physical factors and other unknown factors to guess the possible effects on the 'silence factor' for observation in the next trial.

At that time, Chen Mo did not say anything about this discussion. However, Chen Mo is sure that the technology of potential drugs is absolutely no problem, and there may be problems in which link.

"Mer brother, Xiao Yu sister calls."

While Chen Mo is thinking about the problem, the ringtone of the phone interrupts his thoughts.

In the video call, Xiao Yu was wearing a sling and a nightdress sitting on the sofa. After seeing Chen Mo, his face immediately floated a sweet smile.

"Husband, I miss you, when are you coming back?"

Hearing the sound of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo’s face brought a smile. No matter what troubles, after seeing the little fisherman, the mood is always unconsciously getting better: "Well, I miss you too, it may take some time to go back."

“Is there any troubles?” Xiao Yu said softly.

"I really encountered a small problem. Today's experiment has a problem. I am looking for the reason for the failure." Chen Mo did not hide the fisherman.

“Is it serious?” Xiaoyu asked with some concerns: “Is there a problem with the medicine?”

She is one of the only three people in the company who know the potential pharmacy. Chen Mo has no concealment of Xiao Yu for this cooperation with the official.

"A pharmacy didn't work. The pharmacy was developed by me. I know very well that the technology of the pharmacy is definitely no problem." Chen Mo dynasty said: "I am looking for other reasons."

"Would it be that the pharmacy is wrong and injected with other pharmacy?" asked Xiao Yu.

When he heard this, Chen Mo’s hole narrowed.

A word awakens the dreamer.

They are paying attention to the health problems of volunteers this afternoon. The rest of the time, they are discussing the question of why the drug is invalid.

Because the pharmacy is prepared in advance, there are very few people who can access the pharmacy in the middle. There are only a few people, and they are the people of the institute. No one wants to go to the pharmacy, or something else.

They are all authorities, and the test fails. It is the most normal thing for these researchers. Therefore, their thinking is to move closer to technical issues, and will not think about other reasons.

The limitations of professional habits have left all of them in a misunderstanding of thinking.

Xiao Yu is an outsider. As a bystander, she did not fall into this misunderstanding. Now, unintentionally, Chen Mo immediately realized the problem.

They all thought that this was a technology that was not mature enough to cause the drug to fail. If it is a drug error, or some other problem?

"Wife, you are my lucky star." Chen Mo smiled.

Chen Mo was so praised, Xiao Yu’s eyes were bent into crescents, and his heart was very sweet: “Is it the reason?”

"Not sure, but your words make me realize a problem. It is really possible that the medicine is wrong."

Looking at Chen Mo's appearance, Xiao Yu also smiled and could give Chen Mo some inspiration. She felt very happy. Suddenly think of something, the small fish in the video, his face is slightly rosy, a bit shy.

"Husband, I went shopping with Ruoqiang tonight, went to buy some clothes, just came back."

"What clothes are you buying?" Chen Mo asked.

"You will know when you come back, I guess you will definitely like it."

"You don't wear it, I like it more." Chen Moxiao smiled.

"Bad egg, ignore you." Xiaoyu eyes shy, not angry, said: "I know to bully me."

"You are willing to ignore me?"

"Oh, bully me, I will ignore you."

Chat with Xiaoyu for ten minutes before ending the call. After hanging up the call, Chen Mo’s smile converges and begins to think about the problem of pharmacy.

If the medicine is wrong, it is okay, not very serious. He now thinks of another problem in his eyes, and the worst problem is that the pharmacy has been replaced by a civet cat.

If this is the case, the news of the drug is leaked out, and the trouble is big.

However, before this problem is uncertain, he can't guess, or there will be problems, but the impact will not be good.

"Ink female, the main R & D personnel of potential drugs, is there any abnormal communication information? Or contact with unknown people?" Chen Mo asked his laptop.

"Not yet," said the ink girl.

"Look, let me know if there is an exception." Chen Mo said.

Hesitating, Chen Mo did not inform Li Chengzhi, went directly into the room, took a shower and went to sleep.

After Shen Chongxin returned to the apartment, he rushed into the room. Take the pen out of his pocket, look at the orange pharmacy of the refill, and have a happy smile on his face.

In order to get this medicine, it is not easy. Today, there is no danger in the past, very good.

For the researchers, the test failed, as usual. Today's business, the R & D team thought it was the immature technology, resulting in the failure of the test.

For him, this is undoubtedly a good news. The direction deviation that everyone pays attention to, as long as there is no accident, two days later, all the traces disappear, no one will know that he did.

He has seen the effects of pharmacy and can indeed develop human potential.

The volunteer's physical examination report showed that the body's immunity, strength, speed, vision and hearing were improved, cell activity was improved, and the most important memory was also improved.

To make ordinary people become uncommon, this potential potion is simply invaluable.

The medicine was taken out of the refill, and Shen Chongxin swallowed the swallow, rolled up the sleeves, and injected the medicine into the body. The remaining medicine was sealed and Shen Chongxin was lying on the bed.

Not long after, a deep sense of exhaustion swept over and let him sleep directly.

chapters.title: Chapter 240: :Find
chapters.body:
Chapter 240: :Find

Early the next morning, in the Institute of Life Sciences, each researcher's face was very dignified, and they were carefully watching the volunteer's medical report, especially the report of Vol. 2 volunteers.

Yesterday's test, there was no change in one volunteer. Although two people succeeded, it was not successful for this experiment.

After the medical report was published, many of them were not able to sleep well last night.

When they came over early this morning, they were told that the third phase of the trial was postponed and could only begin when necessary.

Yesterday was just a discussion, and today we must combine practice.

The physical problems of No. 2 volunteers or physical resistance problems are within the scope of the test. In particular, the problem of pharmacy technology is even more important in their focus.

"Well, this discussion is here. You should test the problem of the pharmacy according to your own ideas. If you find the deficiency, remember to come up the first time."

As the leader of the group, Ding Jianwen directly ordered the meeting.

There was a problem with the experiment and he was one of the most worried people. In order to be cautious, he also postponed the third trial. He carefully observed the changes in the volunteers who had successfully tested and then proceeded to the next step.

After all, volunteers are special people and they need to minimize the risk factor.

After the research team broke out, Chen Mo and Wu Bing left together.

"What are you thinking about?" Wu Bing interrupted Chen Mo's thinking.

Came this morning, Chen Mo did not say a few words, has been thinking about it, just the group discussion, he did not interrupt, a bit abnormal.

"Go and take the test supplies and syringes from yesterday." Chen Mo said.

"What do you want this?"

Wu Bing frowned, seeing Chen Mo just laughed and said nothing, she was helpless, and left with Chen Mo. If he does this, he must have his reason. Wait until he asks him again.

Just out of the laboratory, a figure appeared in front of the two people, the person is Shen Chongxin.

Shen Chongxin stood up with his waist, his eyes glazed, his hair combed, his forehead, and his spirit. And completely changed a person yesterday, the physical temperament, there have also been great changes, the white cockroaches can not cover the thick confidence that comes out from the body.

Wu Bing looked at Shen Chongxin with a strange look. It was surprising that the change was so big overnight. Shen Chongxin, who she met with her, is very different.

"I didn't see you for a night, and the workman became handsome." Chen Mo saw Shen Chongxin's appearance, his eyes flashing slightly, and he smiled softly.

"Thank you." Shen Chongxin nodded to Chen Mo.

"Working in the sun, is there something?" Wu Bing asked with doubt.

"No, just want to ask you, is there any time this weekend, I want to ask you to have a meal." Shen Chongxin glanced at Chen Mo, and then set his gaze on Wu Bing.

"Now is working time, this problem, let's talk about it after work, it is not appropriate now." Wu Bing said with a smile: "We are going to prepare for the experiment now. If nothing happens, let's go first."

After watching the two enter a room, Shen Chongxin reveals the color of thinking, and the next time the pupil shrinks, he quickly follows up.

Shen Chongxin did not keep up, but squatted in the corner not far away, staring at the door of the room.

Seeing that the two men came out, Shen Chongxin did not want to, did not want to go directly to the room.

"What do you want these things to do?" Wu Bing asked as he looked at yesterday's test supplies that Chen Mo had taken back.

"I just listened to your discussion and opinions. After one night, yesterday afternoon to this morning, your question is still limited to the issues discussed yesterday." Chen Mo said.

"What do you mean?" Wu Bing frowned.

"You are all discussing, the physical fitness of the volunteers, the resistance to medicine, and the failure of the pharmacy technology. The failures have not come out of these issues."

Wu Bing's face is a stagnation, think about it, it is.

Regardless of yesterday afternoon, or this morning, the direction of the problem they identified was all these aspects, and did not jump out of the bounds of this range.

But what does this have to do with the one-off items that were tested yesterday?

I don't understand, Wu Bing can only open: "Your thought, I didn't say it when I discussed it. Also, what is your relationship with the disposable items?"

"I have a doubt that I have not confirmed, so I didn't tell you. I am the developer of the pharmacy. I know the pharmacy best. Four people experimented. Three people succeeded, indicating that the pharmacy is no problem."

"But one example didn't work. Strictly speaking, it was a failure."

“Failure?” Chen Moshen shook his head: “Failure is not necessarily a technical problem. Have you ever thought about the problem of pharmacy being wrong?”

"Pharmaceutical mistakes? Impossible." Wu Bing did not think, directly denied: "Three drugs, taken at the same time, mistakes should also be three wrong together. And in the laboratory, there are residual pharmaceuticals Backup label, yesterday took the backup to check, no problem."

"The backup is not the injection of the drug into the volunteer body. The residue left in the syringe must be injected into the volunteer body." Chen Mo said with some deep meaning.

Wu Bing hesitated when he heard Chen Mo’s words. She confirmed from her heart that the pharmacy would not be wrong, but Chen Mo's tone of tone made her wonder.

Suddenly understand the meaning of Chen Mo, Wu Bing's hole shrinks.

"What do you mean, someone is on the pharmacy, and the pharmacy is being transferred midway?"

Wu Bing was scared by her own thoughts, but when she said it, she immediately realized that she had a serious problem and they could not think about it.

No wonder Chen Mo said that their ideas were limited and did not consider all possible considerations. Although they are special places here, this place is not completely clean, otherwise it is impossible to have some leaks.

"This is the problem I thought of last night. I haven't verified it yet. I will know it after I verify it."

Chen Mo took out the syringe used by the No. 2 volunteer and his eyes narrowed. Next, the residual drug was sampled with a cotton swab.

"I will come too." Wu Bing looked dignified.

I have to say that Chen Mo’s thoughts really have some truth. Once it is true, the consequences are serious.

Twenty minutes later, seeing the test results, Chen Mo's face was ugly, and Wu Bing's face was also very pale.

Chen Mo was right.

The agent injected with volunteer No. 2 was fake, not a potential agent, and it was normal saline. No wonder there is no change. The original potion is saline, and it has really been transferred.

With anger, Wu Bing looked ugly to the extreme, with a report, and Chen Mo left the laboratory.

It was not long before the two left the laboratory, and Shen Chongxin entered the laboratory. Seeing the test tube and the results of the analytical instrument, Shen Chongxin's face changed greatly, and the body shivered involuntarily.

What happened to him most was happening.

Did not think much, Shen Chongxin left the laboratory directly and ran outside the institute.

Wu Bing and Chen Mo directly found Ding Jianwen and placed the report in front of Ding Jianwen. There was a ghost inside the team. The pharmacy had been dropped yesterday. They now find out that if it is a traitor of another country's agent, the consequences are unimaginable.

"What happened to both of you? Is there any problem?" Ding Jianwen saw that their faces were not good, their brows were wrinkled, and they picked up the report.

"The agent used in No. 2 volunteers is fake. After examination, it was found that the agent is physiological saline plus pigment, not a potential agent." Wu Bing said coldly.

"What?" Ding Jianwen started the case, his body was unstable, he fell on the chair again, almost fainted, and it took a while to return to his face. His face was pale and said: "Recently call all members of the team and inform Li instructors."

chapters.title: Chapter 241: : Have A Relationship With You
chapters.body:
Chapter 241: : Have A Relationship With You

Li Chengzhi's face was extremely bad. He did not expect that this problem actually occurred. According to the information of Chen Mo and Wu Bing, there is no problem with the backup agent, and the injection of the drug is fake, which means that the agent is transferred.

This is a very serious matter, and there are problems within the R&D team.

Four people were in the office, only Chen Mo sat on the sofa and looked calm. Wu Bing, Ding Jianwen and Li Chengzhi, their faces are gloomy.

After a while, a burly man came in and whispered in the ear of Li Cheng.

Li Chengzhi’s face was completely dark.

"Lee instructor, what happened?" Ding Jianwen raised his heart.

"Now the people in the R&D team are in the conference room, and Shen Chongxin ran." Li Chengzhi said in a deep voice: "The security department has been notified to hunt down."

Shen Chongxin ran?

This news made Ding Jianwen's body tremble and his eyes dark.

The potential agent was transferred, and I thought it would still need to be investigated for some time. I didn’t expect it to be so obvious. Before I announced it, I heard the news and fled.

"No wonder." Wu Bing was so angry.

"What?" asked Li Chengzhi.

"I saw him just now. The change is not small. It seems that it may be the change caused by the use of potential drugs." Wu Bing gathered the changes in the volunteer test and the changes in Shen Chongxin, the more likely it is.

"What are you going to do now?" Ding Jianwen asked.

"For the time being, you don't have to tell the team, you are not sure if there are other people involved, but you have to investigate. You say that Shen Chongxin has adjusted his position and went to other places." Li Chengzhi said.

"Good." Ding Jianwen took a deep breath and nodded gently.

Wu Bing also nodded.

If this happens, the confidence in the members is a very big blow if it is announced.

"I am going to the team and announce the news of Shen Chongxin's transfer." Ding Jianwen stood up with a black face and left the office with Wu Bing.

Li Chengzhi went to handle the transfer of the pharmacy, and Chen Mo also left the institute and rushed back to the apartment.

The pharmacy was transferred, and few people in the R&D team knew it. In addition to a few of them, everyone else is kept in the dark.

This is not a big happy event. It is more of a scandal and it is impossible to reveal it.

Not long after, the security department found the remaining potential medicine from Shen Chongxin's room. This discovery allowed the security department to pursue the highest level of Shen Chongxin’s pursuit.

In the capital city, once the identity is confirmed, it is impossible to escape the palm of the security department. When it is discovered, it is ordered to pursue, and Shen Chongxin cannot escape too far.

At noon that day, Shen Chongxin, who fled for three hours, was arrested and arrested on the expressway to Tianjin.

Chen Mo is looking at the computer in the apartment and finishing the holographic technology.

The notebook in his hand is the notebook that he developed when he was bored. All the circuits are made of normal temperature superconductors. It can be said that this is the fastest notebook in the world.

This small notebook is comparable in performance to several engineering-grade computers.

The doorbell rang as he tidyed up the holographic technique. Just opened the door and saw the face of Li Chengzhi's calmness.

"Caught?" Chen Mo poured a cup of tea and handed it to Li Chengzhi.

"Catched, already confirmed, it was his bag, in his apartment, to find the remaining pharmacy. He used the magic means, when the drug was tested, under the eyes of all the researchers, the syringe of the drug was exchanged, and finally The medicine is injected into the refill, and there are needle marks on his arm. After examination, the body has traces of potential to be developed. It must be said that he is very bold. If it were not for you, I am afraid that it may have been smashed this time. Li Chengzhi said.

The backup of the pharmacy is no problem. Once the one-time test instruments are destroyed, the reason cannot be found. The final conclusion can only be characterized as a failure of technical reasons, and the truth will be buried.

And as for the more serious consequences, no one can say.

After the technology leaks, no one can afford this responsibility.

The unfortunateness of Shen Chongxin was that the test instrument was discovered and the truth was discovered. He had to flee, there were not many people who had contact with the pharmacy, and he had used pharmacy and could not stand the investigation. Once the investigation is made, it is easy to find him, and there is no chance of even running away.

"In the bottom of our noses, it is really daring." Chen Mo said: "What makes him so crazy?"

"It has something to do with you." Li Chengzhi's face is a bit odd: "He secretly loves Wu Bing..."

"Dark love Wu Bing?" Chen Mo's face twitched: "What does this have to do with me? More than 30 people, who still play secret love with people, he thought he was still a pure boy on campus."

Li Chengzhi is a bit speechless.

"Listen to me, it really is related to you. He has a crush on Wu Bing. You and Wu Bing are too close, and Wu Bing seems to have something to you, so that he can be embarrassed. Finally he thought that you used potential potions, Only then became so smart, so he tried to find a way to steal the pharmacy, and he also practiced the magician's technique."

Chen Mo shook his head and didn't know how to speak. Wu Bing is a little interesting to him? It seems that she is too charming, Chen Mo is narcissistic in his heart.

"The remaining pharmacy in his room is that he wants to find opportunities in the future and sell them to foreign pharmaceutical companies for profit." Li Chengzhi said with caution: "This time you are losing money, otherwise you will not be surprised by this kind of god. Unthinkable."

"I just give my technology a fair. I don't have to accept an investigation?" Chen Mo said.

Although Shen Chongxin was confirmed, the comprehensive investigation within the team was inevitable, but Chen Mo was uncertain whether he would take a face-to-face investigation or secretly proceed.

"No," Li Chengzhi said.

"That's good, I am going back to Binhai tomorrow, I am not here."

"So urgent? Wait until the test is done?"

"No, it turns out that my pharmacy is no problem, and then I will test it again. The result is still the same, and I don't have much time to spend it here. There are other technologies that I need to study. If you have problems, let me know." Said.

When this happens, it is necessary to restart the test. I am afraid that it will take a little while, and Chen Mo will not be able to accompany them here. And he knows that the experiment continues, and the result is still the same. This incident just gave him an excuse to go back.

Li Chengzhi thought and nodded: "Well, your time is indeed more precious than others. When are you going to leave tomorrow? I will help you book your flight."

“Is there a special plane?” Chen Mozhen smiled.

Li Chengzhi is speechless: "You think that there is a special plane, you can use it once, you can have a lot of money. Ordinary people, don't want to sit once in a lifetime, you are lucky."

Chen Mo smiled, and did not expect to have a special plane to pick him up. After all, that thing is not the average person sitting. The last time he came over there was a special plane pick-up, mainly the technology that he had the medicine in his hand. In order to minimize the security risks, a special plane will be sent to pick him up.

"Tell one thing to you." Chen Mo thought for a while: "I want to use the medicine in Wang Hai, Black Hawk, White Pearl and Anan."

Upon hearing this question, Li Chengzhi sank.

Pharmacy can be said to be very sensitive. If it is normal, it is impossible to leak. But now it is a special case, the pharmacy is Chen Mo, he has the right to decide its usage.

Chen Mo is obviously in a tone of discussion with him, but they have no reason to refuse. Chen Mo just told them about the situation and he was respectful of them.

"This should not be too big a problem, so let's wait for the pharmacy test to be completed, and make sure that the pharmacy is ok. I will contact them and develop them. After all, the pharmacy is special." Li Chengzhi said.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

Wang Hai, Black Hawk, White Pearl and Anan were the bodyguards of him and Zhao Min. If you improve your ability, it will be good for them.

"Is there something else?" Li Chengzhi asked.

"Yes." Chen Mo grinned: "I am going to buy some special products to go back, do you want to be together?"

chapters.title: Chapter 242: : I Want To Be Your Queen
chapters.body:
Chapter 242: : I Want To Be Your Queen

Chen Mo walked down from the car. At this time, it was already 7 o'clock in the evening. Looking at the familiar home, his face did not consciously smile.

"Wang Hai, you go back first, luggage can be taken by myself." Chen Mo said.

"Good." Wang Hai nodded.

Dragging the ceremony to the villa, Chen Mo took out the mobile phone: "Ink girl, Xiao Yu is at home?"

"Yes, reading a book."

"Well, don't remind her that I am back, give her a surprise." Chen Mo said. In general, when someone visits, or someone approaches the villa, the ink girl will remind the people inside the house. Now Chen Mo told the ink woman in advance to prepare a surprise for Xiao Yu.

"Okay, Mom, what is the feeling of surprise?" asked the ink girl.

"I feel that this kind of thing is really difficult to describe in words. The feeling of surprise is that it is very happy to happen suddenly."

Chen Mo explained while walking towards the villa. He always answers carefully the question of the ink girl, because the ink girl is constantly learning. Especially after the completion of the superconducting computer, the learning speed of the ink girl is extraordinary and fast, and it is very close to human beings, but there is no human emotion.

Going to the door, Chen Mo pressed the fingerprint and face recognition, and gently pushed the door to enter. Gently close the door, Chen Mo only walked into the hall lightly.

Xiao Yu is on the sofa in the hall, wearing a sling nightdress, slender legs on the sofa, holding a book in his hand and wearing headphones. Look at the side, focus on the look, and calm down.

Suddenly, the focus of the small fisherman feels a little, just turned his head and saw Chen Mo with a slight smile.

The little fisherman blinked his eyes and determined that it was not an illusion, with a surprise on his face. Immediately dropped the books and headphones in his hands, the shoes did not wear, as if Yan homing in the arms of Chen Mo, the nose gently sniffed, smelled the familiar taste, a sweet smile on his face.

"Husband, you are back."

Chen Mo let Xiao Yu hold himself and gently caress her back: "Surprise?"

"Ok."

The little fisherman nodded in Chen Mohuai’s arms, and the small wins the new marriage, which is the feeling now. Feel the warmth of Chen Mohuai, Xiao Yu tightly hugged, refused to relax.

"I remember that you didn't have such a bird before."

"People will always change, I was spoiled by you, don't like my bird by people?" Xiao Yu looked up at Chen Mo.

"Like." Chen Mo holds a small fisherman and walks on the sofa to sit.

"Right, you should have no food, definitely hungry. I am going to cook for you. You should put your luggage first, take a shower, wait for dinner."

Without waiting for Chen Mo to agree, Xiao Yu came out of his arms and got into the kitchen.

Seeing the eagerness of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo smiled and put the suitcase back into the room and began to take a shower.

After more than forty minutes, I saw the hot dishes on the table. Chen Mo’s heart was warm and flew for a few hours. She was already hungry and unknowingly gorged.

"Slow to eat, no one grabs."

Xiao Yu saw Chen Mo’s appearance, his eyes bent into crescents, and he continued to give Chen Mo a dish: “You are not a bit surprised, will it take a while to come back?”

"The accident investigation was clear. The trial will take a while to restart. I don't have time to spend it. Plus I want to fish in my house and come back early."

Xiao Yu’s face is shy and shy, and his heart is as sweet as honey, regardless of whether Chen Mo is jealous of her.

“Have you ever encountered something interesting?”

"Yes, when I came back, on the plane, those flight attendants and a few people sitting next to me recognized me and took photos with me. The flight attendants also said that the photos were very good, I want to add my WeChat and send the photos. Give it to me." Chen Mo said while eating.

"Then did you give them a WeChat?" said Xiao Yu, a sour fisherman.

"How is it possible that those flight attendants are not as beautiful as you are."

When he heard Chen Mo’s words, Xiao Yu slightly sneaked and pretended to be angry and said: “You mean, if they are more beautiful than me, would you give them a WeChat?”

"That will never be given, you are in my eyes, better than Xi Shi."

Yan Yixiao, a small fish show, is very useful for Chen Mo’s little love story.

"But when I got off the plane, the flight attendants will give me a good post. There are several. You see, their names, phone, WeChat, email, home address..."

Chen Mo took out a few sticky notes from his pocket, but he was snatched away by Xiao Yu before he finished. Chen Mo felt particularly cute when he saw the appearance of a small fisherman.

After fifteen minutes, Chen Mo sat full of food, sat on the sofa and looked at the book that Xiaoyu had read.

This is a book of economics.

After the small fisherman washed the tableware, he also went to Chen Mo to sit down and grab the book, leaning against Chen Mohuai.

"How come suddenly to see this?" Chen Mo asked.

"As assistant to the president, especially the assistant of General Zhao, she often gives me some things to do, and often asks me questions. I must continue to learn and enrich myself." Xiao Yu said: "I can't be a gold." The canary is raised by you."

"Well, you like it." Chen Mo said with Xiao Yu: "Now I don't see it, I will give you a present."

Chen Mo took out a beautiful jewelry box. As soon as he opened it, he saw a crystal clear bracelet lying in the box. The emerald bracelet, knowing the color and workmanship, knows that it is worth a lot.

"Tell, come back and bring you a present, this is for you." Chen Mo took the bracelet and personally gave Xiaoyu: "Like?"

"Women are jewellery, immunity is zero. I am also a woman, I definitely like it." Xiao Yu shook his hand in the bracelet: "But don't spend so much money on me to buy these, buy those ordinary points, even if A treasure's ordinary jewelry is also available. You give me this bracelet, I don't dare to wear the street, I can't wear it, but I still want to reward you."

After that, Xiaoyu looked up and kissed Chen Mo’s face.

"Not enough." Chen Mo smiled badly: "Zi Zi: I am full of warm thoughts, I am full now!"

When I heard Chen Mo’s words, Xiao Yu’s face was ashamed and biting his lip. He seemed to hesitate. At the moment Chen Chen kissed him, he broke away from Chen Mo’s embrace: “You wait, wait for you.”

"what's wrong?"

"When you wait, you will know." Xiao Yu lost a sentence, shy and ran into the room.

"Old wife, old wife, but also shy." Chen Mo shook his head and smiled, but still waiting.

After five minutes, the door of the room was opened again.

Seeing Xiaoyu coming out from the inside, Chen Mo's eyes widened, his face was incredible, his throat squirmed, and he swallowed his mouth.

The nightdress of the small fishing sling has been replaced with a transparent gauze pajamas, black buds. Silk appears under the gauze pajamas, the mysterious zone is looming, there is no temperament.

The slender legs are exposed to the air, the shattered blue silk, the shy eyes, the feminine, the sexy, and the instinctual temperament that they possess are completely released.

In the past, Xiaoyu was very conservative, quiet and pure. At this moment, the temperament completely changed, like a **** little wild cat.

Seeing Chen Mo’s appearance, Xiao Yu’s heart is very satisfied, knowing that this moment is worth it.

Bold, completely out, Xiao Yu walked to Chen Mo, sitting on his lap, holding his neck, biting his lip, I don't know if it was nervous, or other reasons: "This is the last time I told you about me. New clothes, do you like it?"

"like."

Chen Mo reluctantly smiled a bit, now it is uncomfortable, this body, let Xiao Yu's temptation to him rise straight: "How do you think about changing this style?"

"Show it to you." Xiao Yu's face is already red to the neck root, and the whole face is hot. This time, it makes her too much courage: "Tonight, I am not your princess, I want to be you." Queen."

After that, I kissed Chen silently.

For a time, Tianlei hooked the fire, and even the moon was ashamed to hide behind the clouds.

chapters.title: Chapter 243: : Spoiler
chapters.body:
Chapter 243: : Spoiler

In the morning, the sun shining through the window brought warmth.

Chen Mo opened his eyes from his sleep and felt the softness in his arms. Chen Mo smiled.

Not long after, Xiao Yu opened his eyes, and his face was a little charming. When he looked at the moment, Xiao Yu’s eyes flashed and buried his head deep in his chest and his face was hot.

Thinking of the bold behavior of last night, she did not dare to look at Chen Mo's eyes. If she is given another chance, she is not sure if she has the courage.

I don’t know what kind of woman I am in Chen Mo’s heart.

"Now I know shy, but last night was not like this." Chen Mo said.

"Don't say it." Xiaoyin is like a mosquito.

Chen Mozhen smiled: "But I like it very much, Queen."

"You still said, I don't want to talk anymore." Xiaoyu couldn't wait to plant his head on Chen Mo's chest. He remembered the shameful things he made last night. She didn't dare to look directly at Chen Mo: "Do you think I am that? ?"

"Which?" Chen Mo asked.

"It's the kind of bad woman, very, that you know what I mean, let me say so clearly." The little fisherman said.

Chen Mo smiled gently and smacked the head of Xiao Yu: "My wife can be gentle and quiet, intellectual and elegant, and passionate, **** and charming. This is a man's dream. Even if it is bad, your badness belongs to me. Is it bad to love and know? Just like you usually yell at me."

"Well, it only belongs to you."

The little fisherman was on the chest of Chen Mo, and he was beaming. He felt that the boldness of last night was very worthwhile. Although he was ashamed, he also had a trace of happiness.

After washing, after breakfast, Chen Mo and Xiaoyu rushed to the company.

"Ink girl, what hot news is there today?" Chen Mo sat in the chair and asked.

"At 1 am (10:00 am local time), Apple's autumn new product launch was held at the Steve Jobs Theater at Apple's new headquarters. The launch of the launch of two new Apple phones, Apple S3, Apple S3plus.

Mobile phone system upgrade, equipped with a new generation of voice assistant Siri, Siri intelligent upgrade, can completely control the phone language, breaking the situation of incomplete voice control, Apple stocks rose 2.7% after the press conference. The market value reached $891.5 billion. ”

"Oh? Their artificial intelligence technology has broken through?" Chen Mo was slightly surprised, not enough to relieve.

Artificial intelligence has been at a turning point in an era. The future is the trend of the times. The breakthrough is a matter of time. Apple's breakthrough is not unexpected.

"Mer brother, Zhao Min came over." Mo said.

"it is good."

Chen Mo cleaned up and waited for Zhao Min to come in.

"Big boss, have fun in the capital?" Zhao Min came in to see Chen Mo, smiled slightly, sitting on the opposite side of him. ”

"Alright. Bring a lot of special products back, send some to you in the next day." Chen Mo nodded gently.

"Then I thank you first, how is the test of the medicine?" Zhao Min asked.

"There was some accident, but the problem was solved. The trial may have to be suspended for a while. I don't want to wait there, I will go back to the company first. What will I come to find this time?"

When it comes to business, Zhao Min is serious and shows the skill of professional women.

"Apple's early autumn conference, the release of a new generation of flagship Apple S3, announced the upgrade of mobile assistant Siri, has fully realized contactless voice operations, Apple took off the oppression of our smart assistants, the stock price rose."

"I just knew this news, what do you want to say?" Chen Mo asked.

Zhao Min seems to know that Chen Mo will ask this question and hand the folder in his hand to Chen Mo.

"This is the company's intelligent assistant's revenue statement, smart assistant Xiaodie, the annual revenue is about 15 billion, the profit is very considerable. European telecoms do not cooperate with us, the US market does not expect. In a short time, our There is no hope that mobile phones will enter the international market. Now that Apple Siri is upgraded, we do nothing, and we are quite handiculating the non-Chinese and non-English mobile phone market to Apple."

Zhao Min began to analyze the pros and cons of it, and told Chen Mo all his thoughts.

"What do you want to do?" Chen Mo nodded gently and agreed with Zhao Min's thoughts.

"We and Apple are competitors, and other mobile phone companies in China, and competitors. Under the circumstances that we know that we can spoil the situation, why not stir the water? And we still have the benefits." Zhao Min smiled.

"Splashing? What do you mean?"

"Our mobile assistants that are currently open to the public are only Chinese and English. In order to block Apple, we can consider opening up and licensing multilingual intelligent assistants. This open method is to cooperate with major mobile phone companies to authorize smart assistants as their mobile phones. The default procedure, we charge a fee. He thinks, they will not refuse to cooperate, but..."

"But what?"

“But multilingual smart assistants are open to them, and the resistance of our butterfly-eye mobile phones to the international market will rise and the competition will become more intense.”

Zhao Min said the shortcomings of it. Everything has two sides. It is impossible to have only pure interests.

Chen Mosi asked.

In doing so, the competition faced by the butterfly eye is indeed very large.

Just as the carbon-based lithium-ion batteries just came out, if they don't license the battery technology, their mobile phone competitiveness will increase greatly. However, at that time, the volume was too small and the technology had to be authorized. Otherwise, other companies would not license the patented technology to them, and they would be very troublesome.

Once the multilingual intelligent assistants are open for authorization, they will be in the footsteps of the international market.

Since the last time they entered the European market, the pace of their mobile phone internationalization has been extremely slow. Now that Apple has developed a smart assistant, their chances are even smaller.

But now Apple wants to make a lot of money, obviously not possible.

Marching ants and apples are huge competitors. Moreover, Chen Mo and Apple have also had several festivals to make their opponents disgusting. Chen Mo will not mind.

"We haven't knocked on the door of the international market. Now we don't have to think about knocking on the door. Anyway, the smart assistant is also letting go. I said, we are not afraid of competition." Chen Mo said.

There is no chance now, and it does not mean that there is no chance in the future.

When the holographic technology is thoroughly penetrated, it will be a huge opportunity for the holographic mobile phone to come out. At that time, Europeans asked him to cooperate.

"Okay." I got a positive reply from Chen Mo, and Zhao Min looked a loose.

Multilingual intelligent assistants are currently only used on butterfly eye phones, as well as corporate office products. Authorized multi-language intelligent assistants, they can receive considerable benefits, than in the hands of, watching Apple to occupy the market is much stronger.

“How much is the license fee?” Chen Mo asked.

"I have calculated that, according to the number of shipments of the mobile phone companies each year, we even take 3% of the whole machine, or a fixed price, 50 yuan or 100 yuan a mobile phone. The annual harvest is far beyond 15 billion." Zhao Min said: "How much authorization fee to collect, but also study and study."

"Well, tell me when you are sure." Chen Mo nodded.

"Today, I mainly told you about this. Now I get the answer I want. The next thing, I will arrange it. I have nothing else, I should go back to work, you are busy."

Zhao Min smiled and looked at Chen Mo and turned and left.

When Zhao Min left the office, Chen Mo’s eyes fell on the computer again: “Ink girl, began to organize materials, holographic technology.”

chapters.title: Chapter 244: : Then You Are Cow. Forced
chapters.body:
Chapter 244: : Then You Are Cow. Forced

The news of Apple's artificial intelligence breakthrough has become a hot topic in the technology circle.

As one of the most popular technology companies, Apple once lost its support because of the inability to use the intelligent assistants of the marching ant company.

This time Siri's smart upgrade finally let Apple get rid of the shortcomings of voice operation. This is the second company to complete voice control after the marching ant company.

In addition to the newly upgraded Siri, Apple S3 also has the advantages of a comprehensive screen, a high-strength glass body, and a new generation of bionic smart chip A15.

After the pre-sales were opened, the number of pre-sales continued to soar.

Apple's stock continues to rise, and it is the first time to break through the market value of 900 billion US dollars, maintaining the position of the world's highest listed company.

"Apple's artificial intelligence technology breakthrough! "--New York Times.

"Apple's market value has reached a new high, trillions of dollars in market value, let alone! 》——Wall Street Journal.

"Apple breaks the suppression of the marching ant company! "--Financial Times.

The US domestic media is cheering.

When the army ant company announced that it could not provide the intelligent assistant of the Apple system, Apple's market value fell all the way. The last time the flagship machine was released, it was released at a low-key selection of the marching ants. It was a bit gray-faced.

Now Apple has finally broken the suppression of the marching ant company, making all American media feel proud.

Apple’s autumn conference in previous years has been hailed as the Spring Festival Evening in the tech world. This year’s smart upgrade of Siri is once again exciting.

Nowadays, products such as mobile phones and computers of the marching ant company do not appear in the international market. For them, this is good news.

"I don't understand, the smart assistant is the rest of the marching ant company. Why is it so fuss? Isn't your mobile phone can be operated by voice? I am a two thousand yuan rice machine, buy a smart assistant, have super cool technology. Experience, why buy more than 8,000 Apple phones?"

"Siri upgrade means that Apple's artificial intelligence technology has made a breakthrough. After the marching ant company, this is the second company to master this kind of intelligent assistant. The products of the marching ant company are based on voice operation, improve office efficiency, and security. The operating system, one of the most popular office products, shows the potential value of this voice-operating technology."

"Artificial intelligence is the trend of the future technology, Apple is the next city. The funny thing is that the marching ant company always thought that it was pressing Apple."

"Some people have been around for a long time and don't know how to stand up."

"The ridiculous thing is that the marching ant company has already produced intelligent robots, and Apple is still playing mobile assistants. The two can't compare at all. A seismograph is enough to make marching ants the greatest company, no one. This is Apple. It will never be possible to catch up."

In the domestic online forums and major media, Apple's news has also become a hot topic of discussion. It’s just that this kind of discussion has gradually become a comparison and debate between Apple and the marching ant company.

However, this kind of controversy still does not let people cool down on Apple's mobile phone preferences.

When the army ant company announced that the smart assistant could not be used in the Apple mobile phone, the Apple mobile phone was hit hard in the domestic market, and the market share also declined.

Siri's intelligent upgrade, Apple's artificial intelligence breakthrough news released, Apple's mobile phone in China is a bit of a resurgence sign, Apple S3's pre-sale volume is also constantly improving.

Blue sea floor.

Chen Mo once came to the Chamber of Commerce for the last time, a top private club.

After the vehicle entered the clubhouse, Chen Mo and Zhao Min, as well as Xiao Yu, came down from the car and walked in under the leadership of the service personnel.

Multilingual intelligent assistants are willing to grant external authorization. Zhao Min has already let people privately release news and only inform the helm of several mobile phone companies.

The news has just been released, and people from several major companies will immediately contact them and prepare to discuss cooperation.

This time, people from a company didn't come over. I know that the marching ant company intends to authorize multilingual intelligent assistants and wants to get cooperation quickly. So yesterday, someone sent a message to Zhao Min in the afternoon.

I want to meet soon, and Zhao Min will put all of them together. Originally only Zhao Min came over, but those big sisters said that they wanted to see Chen Mo, and Zhao Min let Xiao Yu pull him from the laboratory.

“How much does it cost here?”

The last time he came, it was just a reception, some people were on the sidelines, and he didn't know how much the consumption was, so this time the curiosity asked.

"Look at the spending power, generally only members can come in, others do not say, the minimum consumption of the box is 5,000, the menu does not have the price of three digits or less, not to mention the wine, a little more expensive wine, one down It’s not a rare thing to spend hundreds of thousands or even hundreds of thousands."

"It's very expensive." Chen Mo was slightly surprised.

Surprised by Chen Mo, Zhao Min did not pay attention to it: "It is so expensive, few people are so extravagant, ordinary consumption, tens of thousands of pieces will do, and the environment here is better, or you find a place?"

“Do I still remember the food stall next to the school I said last time? The skewers there are good!”

"Then you will be bull. Forced."

Zhao Min gave a smile, Chen Mo's words, let her brain make up the picture.

A group of giants in suits and suits, sitting around the food stalls, talking about hundreds of millions of businesses, next to the men with glasses of drinking and smashing the strings, the picture is too beautiful, can not imagine.

It would be even more beautiful if someone took a photo and sent it to the Internet.

"Would you like me to inform them to go to the food stalls? We authorized multilingual intelligent assistants, even if they asked them to eat food stalls, they all ran away." Zhao Min smiled.

"Come on, come on, forget it, let's talk about it next time."

Jokes are jokes, he can't ask a group of tech giants to go to the food stalls to drink beer. I was photographed and released, this news can go to heaven.

"Mr. Chen Mo?"

A voice came with a happy voice, and Chen Mo’s mind immediately appeared in the mind. Just turned around and saw a familiar face.

Xu Xinxin, the daughter of Xu Jialin, the real estate tycoon, last time Chen Mo was here at the Blue Ocean Building and saved her once.

"I didn't expect you to be, Zhao, hello." Xu Yuxin politely shook hands with Zhao Min.

"Miss Xu, really coincident." Chen Mo smiled politely.

"It's a coincidence, I didn't expect to see you here." Xu Xinxin wore a long red dress with a smile and looked noble and generous: "You came here to talk about business?"

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

"Which box are you in? I will bring you in the past, I am familiar here."

"Miss, Zhao always booked in the box No. 9." A staff member looked at Xu Weixin's appearance, his eyes lit up and hurriedly opened.

Xu Xinxin nodded and led the three men into it.

"This clubhouse is an industry under the name of my father's company. I will come over and play occasionally. When you come over, you will let me know."

Xu Xinxin walked around Chen Mo, Xiao Yu can only give up the position and walked to Zhao Min.

“What entertainment?”

“There are golf, swimming, shooting, bowling, cafes and artificial massages, saunas, etc.”

"That's pretty good." Chen Mo smiled.

Under the leadership of Xu Xinxin, the three quickly entered the box No. 9.

The decoration of the box is a classic style, the atmosphere is restrained, and it is a low-key luxury. The air has a faint scent that makes it very comfortable. No wonder the minimum consumption is 5,000. This kind of decoration requires a lot of money.

After Chen Mo sat down on the sofa, Zhao Min sat down at the position on his right hand side, and Xiao Yu walked to his left back to stand. The movement was natural and there was nothing unusual.

Xu Xinxin sat down with Chen Mo and chatted with him. Not long after, the first guest was officially present.

chapters.title: Chapter 245: : Everyone Understands People
chapters.body:
Chapter 245: : Everyone Understands People

Yu Chengnan and an assistant walked in under the leadership of the waiter. At this time, Yu Chengnan cut his flat head, and the gray west was fitted with a wine-red tie, which looked very atmospheric. After seeing Chen Mo and Zhao Min, they immediately smiled.

"Chen Chen, General Zhao, I haven't seen you for a long time."

"Long time no see." Chen Mo and Yu Chengnan shook hands.

"Little fishing assistant, you are getting more and more beautiful." Yu Chengnan said to Xiaoyu.

Xiaoyu smiled slightly: "Thank you, Mr. Yu."

"This is?" After a chill, Yu Chengnan looked at Xu Xinxin and looked at Chen Mo.

Chen Mo looked at Xu Xinxin: "Xu Jialin's daughter, Xu Xinxin."

"Your introduction to me, if you can remove the first half of the sentence, it will be perfect." Xu Xinxin reached out and politely smiled at Yu Chengnan: "Yu, hello, long-awaited name, my name is Xu Xinxin."

"Hello." Yu Chengnan looked at Xu Xinxin: "I heard that Xu Jialin has a good daughter. I saw it today, and it really is everyone's show."

"Thank you for your compliment." Xu Xinxin smiled.

Yu Chengnan just sat down on the sofa, and the Thunder also entered the private room under the leadership of the waiter. Next to the Thunder, two men stood, Chen Mingyong, president of Opal, and Fan Wei, the head of Vivo.

Three technology giants came together to make the private room alive.

"Chang Zong, Zhao Zong, Yu Zong."

After seeing the people in the house, the Thunder also strode over, and Chen Mingyong and Fan Wei followed closely, and greeted Chen Mo.

Several people sat down on the couch and started chatting.

The only ones who came to meet this time were the heads of the four major mobile phone giants. Now people are here.

It is home to more than half of the domestic mobile phone industry.

Xu Xinxin saw this situation and also quit the private room. These big hustle and bustle, talking about the business, is not something her outsider can listen to.

After the scene was quiet, the Thunder took the lead: "I don't know how this time, Chen always wants to cooperate?"

"You ask Zhao Min, the company is responsible for her operations." Chen Mo turned his attention to Zhao Min, and other people's eyes also looked at Zhao Min.

Zhao Min took several documents from the small fisherman and handed it to Yu Chengnan and Thunder.

"The documents in your hands are the terms of the contract we are going to cooperate with. Everyone is the same." Zhao Min said directly.

As soon as this was said, several people were slightly surprised and hurriedly read the documents in their hands. Obviously, the marching ant company really has the idea to authorize multilingual smart assistants to give them.

They have all thought about getting a multilingual authorization from the marching ant company's smart assistant. However, the marching ant company is only used on the butterfly eye mobile phone and is not authorized externally.

This time to prepare for authorization, they will naturally not let go, especially this period of Apple Siri intelligence.

"The function of the intelligent assistant, I don't need to introduce more. This time you are authorized to multilingual intelligent assistants, I believe you understand, I will briefly talk about the main conditions." Zhao Min said.

The people on the field raised their ears and waited for Zhao Min’s words.

"This authorization, our fee is 5.2% of the price of each mobile phone, and is settled quarterly."

“5.2% is a bit high.” Yu Chengnan said: “Zhao should know that the profit of each of our mobile phones is not very high.”

"I think this price is very reasonable. Do you have the price of the mobile phone after the new technology? Is it impossible?" Zhao Min said calmly.

"We don't make money, and most of them are earned by channel dealers." Chen Mingyong said.

"Really, the profit of our mobile phone, this is the total." Fan Wei nodded.

"A smart assistant, more than two thousand three thousand mobile phones, experience the pursuit of Apple. The price increase is inevitable, your mobile phone price is up 10% for sale, earning you all, my charge is already very low." Zhao Min Said.

Several people on the field were silent.

In the few companies on the field, in addition to China Micro has a high-end market, rice has medium and high-end, and other brands are mid-range or low-end markets. A mobile phone is generally more than two thousand yuan, and it is necessary to pay more than one hundred yuan to the marching ants. The price of them is not much, and they can earn a little more.

"There are multi-language intelligent assistants, South Asia, Southeast Asia and European markets. You are fully active. The mid-end market is entering high-end and even high-end. It is not impossible to squeeze the share of Samsung Apple's high-end market. The benefits, I don't need to tell. you guys."

The other people looked at each other and did not speak. They seemed to be thinking.

Zhao Min’s statement is indeed correct. In Southeast Asia, South Asia and Europe, many places do not use English, multilingual intelligent assistants, clearly overcome this problem, let them occupy an advantage in the market competition.

If the marching ant company is not blocked by the international market, it is likely that the marching ant company will surpass them in the mobile phone industry.

No one dares to refuse to cooperate.

Refusing to cooperate, the consequences are clear, the most serious consequence is that they are squeezed out by other people on the field.

The intelligent assistant of the marching ant company is not the former half-hand phone assistant, which is real artificial intelligence. When they first came out, they knew that this was the beginning of another revolution in the mobile phone market.

Not handled well, just like Samsung, Apple squeezed Nokia and Sony after the smartphone appeared.

They don't want to be the next Nokia.

“How about the technical fee of 150 yuan per mobile phone?” Thunder opened.

When his proposal came out, Yu Chengnan and others looked brighter and looked at Zhao Min: "Zhao Zong, I think Lei’s proposal is good."

"No." Zhao Min did not want to, and shook his head directly.

"Too low? Take the price increase of 10, 160 yuan. According to the average price of several of our mobile phones, 160 yuan is close to 6% of the average price, you are very cost-effective." Fan Wei said.

"No. You don't have to bargain, authorize multilingual intelligent assistants. We are already a big concession. It is impossible to make concessions on the price." Zhao Min smiled, and their abacus, she also knows.

As a veteran of the mall, it is impossible to suffer casually, whether it is her or other people on the field.

Because of exchange rate fluctuations, rising material costs, the difference between incremental and stock markets, as well as the competitiveness of mobile phones and user reasons, these factors make the average price of mobile phones continue to rise.

She has data on hand. Last year, mobile phone prices generally rose, reaching 30%. As prices rose, various fees increased, and mobile phone prices would only get higher and higher.

The license fee for each mobile phone is 160 yuan, and within a year, it seems that they are at a loss. However, after the price of mobile phones continued to rise, the license fee was still 160 yuan. Even if they enter the mid-to-high-end market, the license fee is still 160 yuan, and they have suffered a big loss.

"I don't want 6% of you, we only need 5.2%. Needless to say, everyone understands people."

Zhao Min pointed to the document.

"Cooperation is what you want, we have come up with our sincerity, and then we are looking at you. The terms of the contract, you take it back, after carefully watching it, feel no problem, you can contact us at any time to discuss cooperation, terms If you have any questions, you can contact me. Of course, if you sign now, I will not have any opinions."

"Well, come here today, work is important, and eating is more important." Chen Mo stopped the topic on the field.

The group went to the dinner table and asked the staff to start serving.

"Chen Chen, what technology is busy working recently? Let us open our eyes." Chen Mingyong asked.

"You are a new generation of leading people, share the experience." Thunder also said half-jokingly.

Others on the field also echoed.

"Remove the words 'leading'."

When Chen Mo said this, everyone on the field laughed.

"My busy things are secrets, I can't say, I can't say, there is no mystery when I say them. You should look forward to it first, and the answer will be revealed later." Chen Mo laughed.

The atmosphere on the dinner table was a bit relaxed, and it was all about chatting about something that was common in everyday life. Although they are business competitors, they can also communicate as friends in private.

Until the end of the meal, everyone was not interested in bringing the topic of cooperation to the dinner table.

Talking about business while eating, how much will affect the mood.

After eating and drinking, a few people took a break and got up and left.

The next question that needs to be studied most is the contract sample given to them by the marching ant company. Just now, Zhao Min said, as long as they pass the terms of the contract, they can sign up for them at any time.

Now Apple's S3 just came out and is still in the pre-sale phase. As long as they are fast enough, they can compete with Apple for a market before the official release of S3.

chapters.title: Chapter 246: : ‘Criminal Science’
chapters.body:
Chapter 246: : ‘Criminal Science’

When the group just came out, Xu Xinxin greeted him. After greeting a few people, Xu Xinxin immediately walked to Chen Mo.

Zhao Min’s mouth raised his smile and looked at Xu Xin’s heart deeply: “Boss, you talk, I will send them to Yu.”

Xiao Yu took a look at Chen Mo, and looked at Xu Xinxin, turned and followed.

"You don't look at him?" Zhao Min looked at the small fish that came over.

"No." Xiao Yu smiled and shook his head.

"I am not afraid that he was taken away? Her condition is perfect, almost a man, who wants to marry that woman." Zhao Min smiled.

"I believe him." Xiaoyu said softly.

Zhao Min’s figure was slightly stagnation, and he sighed a little enviously: “No wonder Chen Mo will be so petting you.”

To give unconditional trust to his own man, in the eyes of others, Xiao Yu is the kind of silly woman. This kind of woman is very easy to get hurt, but it is also easy to make people pity.

Speaking of Chen Mo pet himself, Xiao Yu mouth corner does not consciously smile, from the heart.

Chen Mo looked at the backs of the two, a little helpless, but still look at Xu Xinxin: "Miss Xu, something?"

“Is the business going smoothly?” Xu Xinxin asked.

"Alright. I am a spectator, business, all are Zhao Min talk, I was just pulled over as a mascot." Chen Mo shrugged.

"Oh, you are so funny." Xu Xinxin grinned and said: "Are you free tonight? I invite you to dinner."

"Sorry, I have an appointment with a beautiful woman tonight, I have to go out to watch a movie."

Xu Xin’s body was shocked and his eyes were slightly disappointed: “Your girlfriend?”

"Further, at present, it is a state of secrecy, and there are not many people who know it." Chen Mochao made a sly gesture and smiled.

These things, if there are people in the channel to investigate, it is easy to find his status. But unless there is a person who has an attempt, he will not spend so much effort to check whether he is married.

"Women's fiancee? Which girl is so lucky? Is it Zhao Min?" Xu Xinxin's heart was half cold.

"No." Chen Mo shook his head.

"She must be very beautiful, very gentle." Xu Xin's smile is a bit unnatural.

"She is my lucky star." Chen Mo smiled: "Objectively, it looks a little worse than you, but in my eyes, she is the most beautiful. Now I have nothing to do at night, time belongs to her."

Chen Mo can feel Xu Hao's good feelings for him. He has no time to entangle these feelings, so he will tell the story of Xiao Yu and cut off Xu Xin's heart.

If he makes a casual appointment, let Xu Xinxin misunderstand, and the deeper and deeper, he will be more troublesome.

"In fact, it was accidental to save you last time. It is not necessary to be too concerned. It is a friend's help. I will have another appointment next time. I am very happy to make friends with beautiful women, especially you are Bai Fumei. I should go." Chen Mo finished, turned and left.

Looking at Chen Mo's back, Xu Xin's heart with a loss, this moment is like the feeling that the beloved thing was taken away.

Being as clever as she is, she naturally understands the meaning of Chen Mo. This is a euphemistic rejection, separated by an abyss.

But what she thought, couldn't think of the sparkle on the little fisherman.

"Hey, the boss left the beauty back." Chen Moyi got on the bus, Zhao Min said, "She should want to ask you to go out?"

Chen Mo made a small fishing side and said: "She really wants to ask me."

"I heard no, Xiaoyu, you look at him, don't let him go out tonight." Zhao Min immediately said.

"I didn't agree. I told her that my family Xiaoyu had made me a movie tonight. When I first saved the hero, I had already won my prize, not the second time."

When I heard Chen Mo’s words, Xiao Yu’s face was bright, and Chen’s eyes were very gentle. It seems that there is only one person in the whole world.

"Small fish, do you want him to watch a movie?" Zhao Min asked Xiang Xiaoyu.

"Come with me tonight to watch a movie." Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo and laughed.

"Okay."

"You... really... tacit understanding." Zhao Min knocked on his head, his face was speechless, he wanted to do something, and he was fed a dog food, still fresh.

"But what do you mean by the first hero to save the US prize?"

"Of course it is my family fishing." Chen Mo smiled.

"At school, he saved me once, then I became his girlfriend." Xiaoyu said something embarrassed.

The old bridge section, she still got stuck.

"Oh, boss, you have a 'criminal record'." Zhao Min smiled: "You must be optimistic about him. You are saved and you follow him. He stops the gangster who grabs my bag. I am also stupid to follow him, and now I am coming to Xu Xinxin, and I will be more in the future."

Chen Mo’s face is black: “What is a criminal record?”

"Isn't it?" said Xiao Yu.

"Yes, you are right." Chen Mo raised his hand and surrendered: "Small has repented and re-made, and once it is enough, I don't want to make a second time."

Xiao Yu laughed and looked at Chen Mo's gaze with a gentle tenderness. Zhao Min did not see the two people show love.

The marching ant company is willing to authorize multilingual intelligent assistants, which is definitely a good thing for several mobile phone giants. Obtaining the authorization of the marching ant company means that their mobile phones will rise to the next level.

No one wants to miss such an excellent opportunity for cooperation.

Early the next morning, several big sisters arrived at the marching ant company early, and they had a tacit understanding.

Yesterday, they contacted the company's management and the legal department for video conferences. I began to look carefully at the licensing agreement that Zhao Min gave them, and I was afraid of any pitfalls.

After confirming that the licensing agreement is ok, today they all choose to arrive at the marching ant company earlier.

They are all smart people, and naturally know that it is most important to seize the opportunity. By signing the license agreement, they will be able to announce the news.

It’s good for them to get ahead of the game and get more news exposure, especially positive news.

"This time the cooperation content in your hands is the same. Since you just came over, then I will not talk nonsense, ask together, so as not to waste everyone's time."

In the conference room, Zhao Min looked around in a circle and saw several people who did not oppose it. He continued to open his mouth: "Give you a license agreement, you should study it clearly. Do you have any objections to the above terms of the project?"

"I have no problem here, there is a small request, you first ask Lei to them." Yu Chengnan smiled.

The authorization proposed by the marching ant is entirely on the side of the marching ant. However, the terms of the marching ants are within acceptable limits, so he has no objections. Anyone who raises an objection can only find the unhappyness of the marching ant company.

"I have no problem here, but I also want to make a small request." Thunder also answered.

"Ibid." Fan Wei laughed.

"Follow again." Chen Mingyong shrugged helplessly: "I am not copying your lines. It is estimated that the ideas of several of us are similar. I can only say this."

For all four people, Zhao Min was slightly surprised: "What requirements?"

"Hold a signing ceremony." Yu Chengnan said.

chapters.title: Chapter 247: : Building Momentum
chapters.body:
Chapter 247: : Building Momentum

At the scene of the signing ceremony of the marching ants strategic cooperation, the crowds were surging, and more reporters came from the wind.

In the hands of every reporter, or a long gun and a short gun, or a mobile computer, all the instruments that can be used for recording are used.

Apple's autumn conference just recently, the news of Siri upgrade is booming. The marching ants made a noise at this time. What do you want to do? Many media have already smelled the special smell of gunpowder, and they are very excited. They naturally came over when they got the news.

Time passed by in a minute, and many journalists were whispering to discuss the purpose of the ceremony of the marching ant company.

There has been a rumor that the marching ant company will license multilingual intelligent assistants. But no matter which company is authorized, there is no specific news. Some pass the Chinese micro, glory, and some say rice, opal.

Various rumors, but there is no agreed answer.

When everyone was discussing, suddenly the scene was quiet and everyone looked at the stage.

Time seems to be still, and after seeing the people who are clear, the faces of the people slowly become incredible. The scene was turbulent and the last one was lost. All the photographers, like the blood of the chicken, pointed the camera in their hands to the people on the stage.

They are sure, not an illusion.

Zhao Min, Yu Chengnan, Lei Wei, Chen Mingyong, Fan Wei, and Zhao Changming, President of Glory.

This is the first time that several mobile phone companies have appeared on the same stage.

The reporter just discussed suddenly realized that the marching ant did not sign a licensing agreement with a mobile phone company, and it is likely to sign an agreement with five mobile phone companies.

For a time, the voice on the court was getting louder and louder, and many reporters were excited.

Big news, absolutely big news.

It’s just that the heads of the five companies are on the same stage. It’s big enough news. If something happens, the news is even bigger.

The taste of good play.

Under the stage, Joe brightened his lips, his eyes were a little excited, and he began to think about how to write the manuscript.

Apple has just announced the smart upgrade of Siri, and this is happening now. Obviously, it is coming to the apple.
