The mobile phone products of the marching ant company have not set foot on the international market for a long time, but several others have already entered the overseas business. Does the marching ant company want to borrow the hands of several other companies to block Apple?

Hua Wei, glory, rice, Vivo and Opal, the country's five largest mobile phone brands, occupy more than half of the domestic mobile phones.

Is this a one-time full license? The marching ant company always seems to like not to play cards.

But this is the biggest news.

"The six sects besieged Apple? 》

wrong.

The family of the marching ant company is enough to rival Apple, and there is no need to besiege.

"The mobile phone industry may reproduce the Huashan sword? 》

Qiao Liang thought about the title. When Zhao Min gave a speech, he was also writing a manuscript.

Zhao Min with a smile on his face, standing on the small podium, reading the prepared manuscript.

The five companies want a signing ceremony, the purpose is very clear, is to build momentum. Using the influence of the marching ant company to create momentum, plus their five companies, this must be a big news.

After the success of the momentum, it will be good for the mobile phones that will be issued by the five companies, and it will also have some benefits for the army ants.

Therefore, they proposed to conduct an open signing ceremony. Zhao Min did not refuse, but directly let people release the news and invited reporters to come over.

The cooperation between the two sides, a signing ceremony, should have existed and is beneficial to both sides.

Zhao Min’s speech is very simple. I will miss the glory of the past, describe the current situation, and look to the future. Five minutes after the speech, the process also officially entered the signing ceremony.

After signing the word, exchanging the authorization contract, there was no accident.

At the moment when the representatives of the six companies put their palms together, the shutter sounds of countless cameras are connected into one piece, and the flash is brighter than the lights.

The signing ceremony is over and all this has just begun.

The head of the mobile phone industry, half of the country, appears on the same stage. This has been something that has never happened before, but this time it appeared, at the signing ceremony of the marching ant company.

Five companies were also awarded smart assistants.

This news made the whole network feel awkward. Many netizens have already been excited, and it seems that they saw an annual good show being staged.

"To do things, I am waiting for the movie to eat melons! Like my claws."

"The marching ants have taken a step in the game, and the multilingual intelligent assistants have been granted to several companies. It is tantamount to making them even more powerful. Once they are scaled up, it is likely to squeeze out the mobile phone market of the marching ant company."

"Zhao Min once said that they are not afraid of competition, there is no competition in the market, it is a pool of stagnant water. The natural selection of the world, the survival of the fittest, this sentence is the truth. A market, if it is a pool of stagnant water, it is easy to be eliminated. Only competition, constantly With innovation entering this market, this market will be energetic."

In addition to the ideas of netizens, more and more expert media are also involved, discussing the advantages and disadvantages of marching ants.

At this festival, the signing ceremony was held with the five major companies. The practice of the marching ant company is tantamount to pouring a scoop of water into the already-rolled oil and blasting it in an instant.

However, this is only the beginning.

Not long after the signing ceremony, Hua Wei announced that the launch of the new generation flagship machine will be held ten days later.

Now that the news is in the hottest time, Hua Wei announced the news and poured a handful of oil on the fire. Then, rice also released news, and will hold a new machine conference half a month later.

This is followed by Vivo and Opal.

After several companies announced the launch of the new machine, they pushed the hot spot to the climax.

......

At Apple's president's office, Cook looked at the news and his face was ugly.

Finally, Siri’s intelligent breakthrough, they can raise their eyebrows. I wanted to take advantage of this time to create a momentum for S3, perhaps to allow S3 to get a bigger order, and the result was a slap in the face of the marching ant company.

The marching ant company authorized the smart assistant to five mobile phone companies, obviously not wanting them to be better.

In the international market, the mobile ant company's mobile phone business is very small, almost negligible, and it did not pose a threat to Apple. However, he did not expect that the marching ant company actually authorized the intelligent assistants to be such an important technology, and they were caught off guard.

However, they have no way to march ant companies.

In recent years, China's mobile phone quality and design are slowly catching up with them.

The emergence of Huawei's smart chip and marching ant system has got rid of the shortcomings of chip technology and operating system, so that the two can catch up with them.

After the emergence of smart assistants, they are already at a disadvantage in terms of competition. The sales of mobile phones last year and the first half of this year are the best evidence.

Apple’s market share is shrinking. Because the Android machine can use the smart assistant, the experience of the phone is better.

I thought Siri smart upgrade, can pull back a city.

As a result, the marching ants authorized the multi-language intelligent assistants to the five major companies, which is really terrible. Next, the mobile phone business in the international market, Huaxia's company, especially Huawei, will be their biggest competitor.

“Notify the production department, increase production, pre-sale orders, and start shipping the day after tomorrow,” Cook said. Now I can only use a few companies when the new machine does not appear, and earn more money to avoid the impact of other companies' new machines.

"Okay." The assistant responded with a document and left the office.

After the assistant left, Cook knocked on the table and thought about the next countermeasure. And for the sake of this matter, not only him alone.

chapters.title: Chapter 248: : Feng Shui Turns.
chapters.body:
Chapter 248: : Feng Shui Turns.

In the conference room of Samsung headquarters, there is a dead silence.

The top management staff who were seated in various departments of Samsung Electronics looked at Gao Zhendong on the main seat and waited for him to speak.

Gao Zhendong looked sad and can be said to be a bit ugly.

After the emergence of the intelligent assistant Xiaodie of the marching ants, their intelligent assistant Bixby is a bit sloppy.

But they are not very worried.

Because the mobile phone business of the marching ant company did not jump out of the Chinese market and enter the international market. And their business is mainly in the international market, but also supports the application of intelligent assistants.

It’s trouble now.

It can be said that it is worse.

Apple's Siri smart upgrade, which can fully control the phone, makes them feel a huge threat.

But the storm of Apple has not passed, and the more troublesome marching ants company has come to join in the fun, and authorized multi-language intelligent assistants for five companies.

If Apple is a strong man with a big knife rushing to them, then the action of the marching ant company, a group of strong men with a spear rushed towards them.

This is a deadly threat.

The market share of Huaxia is getting less and less, and the international market is also facing fierce competition from China Mobile. In the past year, because the marching ant company did not go out of the international market, and Apple could not use the smart assistant, Samsung's share of the international market has increased.

But the moment Apple announced the upgrade of Siri, the form has been reversed.

Now we have to face the threat of China Mobile.

The emergence of the multi-lingual intelligent assistant of the marching ant company is already a foregone conclusion. If no measures are taken, it will take two years for Samsung’s mobile phone business to become the next Nokia.

Thinking of this, Gao Zhendong is in a very bad mood.

Sighing, Gao Zhendong looked at the middle-aged man with long curly hair next to him. He is responsible for the development of Samsung mobile software and services business, Li Renzhong, the birth of Samsung Bixby, is from his hand.

"Li Renzong, Bixby's intelligence, how long will it take to upgrade?" Gao Zhendong asked.

"Gao, you asked like Siri or marching ant Xiaodie?" Li Renzhong looked dignified. After Siri's smart upgrade, his department was under tremendous pressure from top to bottom.

“Yes.” Gao Zhendong nodded: “This is a revolution. Only smart technology breakthroughs can save our mobile phone market.”

"I'm afraid it's not easy." Li Renzhong shook his head: "Artificial intelligence, if you find an intelligent algorithm, it is like finding a valve that releases water. It is easy to break through after opening a gate. It is difficult to find a suitable intelligent algorithm. It is difficult to get out of water. A little bit of accumulation, time may be long."

Originally, I was psychologically prepared. After getting the answer from Li Renzhong, Gao Zhendong’s face was even more ugly.

When the technology breaks through, they are already cold.

"Talk about your thoughts. If you can't find a strategy, I am afraid we will be in trouble next."

The high officials on the field face each other. Now it is Apple, Huawei, and the collective siege of several other major mobile phone giants in China. It can be said that the situation is raging and there is no way to deal with it. It is no longer a problem.

However, there is no breakthrough in Bixby's technology, and there is no good way.

"This... I will talk about it." The head of the marketing department stood up: "The only way to do this is to find a smart assistant for the army ant company."

The people on the field were silent.

Intelligent operation is a revolution. Other than that, there seems to be no other way, otherwise it will be eliminated.

Natural selection, survival of the fittest.

"If Bixby can't break through in two months, this is the only way." Another executive agrees with this idea: "But the premise is that the marching ant company will license us."

"I can clarify the answer. In two months, smart technology is very likely to break through, but we will do our best," Li Renzhong said.

Gao Zhendong sat in the position and meditated. The brows were clustered in a group, and they did not spread. After a long time, they opened their mouths: "Contact the marching ant company and try to get the authorization of the intelligent assistant."

“Samsung people contact us?”

In the office, Chen Mo put down the tea cup, some small and strange, but then smile, not surprised.

"Yes, Huang Degui, president of Samsung Greater China, contacted me and said, they want to talk to us." Zhao Min said: "Don't think, it is the authorization problem of multilingual intelligent assistants."

"So sure?"

"Crap, apart from this problem, I can't think of other problems, let them take the initiative to ask for it. Now Samsung is more anxious than Apple."

“Why?” Chen Mo asked.

"It's very simple. In our country, Samsung's share is getting less and less. The American market has encountered Apple's intelligent breakthrough. In the European market, we have licensed smart assistants to China Micro, India and Southeast Asia, and there are rice, Opal and Vivo. When the brand is besieging, in the future, Samsung faces the dilemma of being embattled."

Zhao Min is in a good mood and has a smile on his face.

The last time Samsung interrupted the oLeD screen supply, they were disgusted once. This time, she won’t call Zhao Min.

"There are only three roads in front of Samsung. Or the breakthrough of their own intelligent assistant Bixby, successfully entered the first echelon of artificial intelligence. Or bow to us, get the authorization of Xiaodie, or destroy, Samsung mobile phone business, will also step The back road between Sony and Nokia."

"Then I can stand in front of them very much, and then look at them with a condescending look, and forked and said: either surrender or destroy." Chen Mo said with a bad taste.

Zhao Min’s brain made up the picture and smiled: “Yes, but your appearance will definitely be very low.”

Not long after, Zhao Min looked a whole face and looked at Chen Mo.

"What attitude do you have for Samsung?"

"I? I didn't have a good impression on the last mobile phone screen. Now it's a feng shui turn, Samsung's business, hand it over to you, you are the president, the company's affairs, it's up to you. Anyway, I support it. You," Chen Mo said.

Get Chen Mo's answer, Zhao Min also left his office. Knowing Chen Mo’s attitude, the next thing, he can also handle it with confidence.

When Zhao Min left, Chen Mo also stood up from his seat and approached the laboratory.

Inside the lab, there is a huge screen with a densely packed instrument design.

Holographic technology has been fully entered into the database, followed by time of practice. This instrument is a medium-sized holographic projector designed by Chen Mo according to holographic technology.

Even with the help of the ink girl, the design speed is fast, still only semi-finished products, only exist on the drawings of the computer.

The science library's completion of the holographic technology is to design three holographic projectors, which are micro holographic projectors, medium holographic projectors and large holographic projectors.

The requirements for miniature holographic projectors are six inches or less, and the machine density of components is very high. Large holographic projectors require high color blur and field of view, so the design must be well defined, so he chose to start with the relatively simple medium-sized projector.

Failure will arouse one's triumph, but too many failures may also hit people. So Chen Mo decided to start with the simplest, at least not too many failures.

"Ink girl, continue to work now." Chen Mo put on the experimental robe and said before going to the big screen.

"Ok."

After Chen Mo focused on the screen, it was not long before he was immersed in it.

chapters.title: Chapter 249: : The Method Is Wrong
chapters.body:
Chapter 249: : The Method Is Wrong

Charm Blue is authorized by the marching ant company intelligent assistant!

ZTE is authorized by Smart Assistant!

Yijia and the marching ant company reached a cooperation!

Huawei released a new series of flagship machines [walkers], equipped with smart chip Kirin 1000, multi-language intelligent assistant, the tenth generation Android system, the latest generation of Leica camera, full screen. Walker, a new journey.

Rice company released a new generation flagship machine black rice 2...

In more than half a month, various news about the authorization of mobile phones and smart assistants were overwhelming and filled with major media.

The marching ant company authorized the multilingual intelligent assistants as if they had smashed the horse's nest. The mobile phone companies that saw the opportunity were all like a **** chicken.

The battle for the mobile phone industry has also officially begun.

The intelligent assistant's external authorization means that the horn of re-licensing, the real era of intelligence, is approaching, no one is willing to lag behind, and backwardness will be eliminated.

At Apple's headquarters, Cook is looking at the sales report of the mobile phone, and his eyebrows are locked.

It has been more than half a month since the marching ant company authorized the intelligent assistant. After the S3 went public, sales began to be high. After all, Apple’s gimmicks were still there. However, on the day of the release of China Micro's [walker], the growth of their mobile phone orders began to slow down noticeably. After the release of mobile phones, rice was another drop.

This marching ant company mainly targets the intelligent assistant of Huaxia Mobile Company, which will certainly promote the rise of China Mobile Phone Company. Next, we must think about the future development countermeasures.

I have to admit that this step of the marching ant company succeeded in disgusting them. Actually, they are willing to authorize such core technologies and bring them a lot of trouble.

The marching ant company authorized intelligent assistants externally, and the impact on Apple was not as big as it was supposed to be, but it was not small.

With low-cost mobile phones and the same functions, many people are reluctant to buy high prices. Nowadays, consumers' concepts have gradually matured.

Of course, the biggest one is Samsung.

"President, the person who marches the ant company, still does not see us."

The voice from the mobile phone made Gao Zhendong's face sink: "Why not?"

"The marching ant said that Zhao Min had a business trip today, canceled all meetings and met, and waited for her to come back to see."

Hearing this sentence, the gloomy face was immediately overcast.

I said a lot of months ago that something is going to be busy. Later, they were busy signing contracts with other companies, and they had nothing to say. Now just the turn of them, just on a business trip?

If this is not intentional, he will not be killed if he is killed.

"President, what do you do now?" There was a cautious voice coming from the phone.

"You try to contact them first, other things, go back and talk."

Gao Zhendong hangs up his phone with a black face and sorts out his emotions.

Now he is in a bad mood, but when he is in a high position, he naturally cannot lose his temper.

During this time, there was a lot of news in the tech world, especially on mobile phones. The marching ant company authorized intelligent assistants externally, which has a great impact on the mobile phone market.

Samsung has kept a low profile during this time. Fortunately, this year's flagship machine has already been released, otherwise he will have to encounter the same predicament as last year.

At least before the release of the new generation of flagship machines, they still have a lot of buffer time. But it must be fast, and now the replacement of mobile phones is too fast.

If the marching ant company insists on not meeting them, it is really troublesome. Because the data returned by the marketing department in the past two months is not optimistic.

During the thought, an assistant walked in with a file knocking on the door: "President, the meeting staff has arrived."

"Ok."

Gao Zhendong took a deep breath and got up from his seat and left with his assistant.

The location of the conference room has already been filled with executives from various departments, and they are whispering something to each other. Everyone's face between the eyebrows has a faint grace.

During the past two weeks, the frequency of meetings was high, because the current situation is not optimistic. Samsung Mobile executives, this time is tight, thinking about the next countermeasures.

After Gao Zhendong walked in, the meeting room was quiet.

"Get started." Gao Zhendong sat down in the main position.

When his words fell, the head of a marketing department stood up, opened the PPT on the projection, and sorted out the thoughts before opening.

“I am telling you about the sales situation last month. According to the feedback, the mobile phone shipments last month were 23.74 million units, down 5.3% from the same period last year.”

In just one sentence, let everyone on the field jump straight. A data has already explained a lot of problems.

“The data shows that in early October, mobile phone shipments were normal. After the 10th, Apple released S3, and the shipment of mobile phones began to decline. Since 20th, companies such as China Micro and Rice have released new mobile phones, and the sales volume of our mobile phones has dropped sharply. This is the main reason for the decline in shipments."

The director of the market is very cautious, and it is not optimistic to start from the situation they are currently in control.

"The reason for the sharp decline is the European market. The Southeast Asian and South Asian markets are also affected at the same time. The American market is also affected by the Apple S3.

The first is the European market. Before that, we and Hua Wei could apply the intelligent assistants of the marching ant company. Those who can use smart assistants are English and Chinese users. We can also install them, which has no impact on us, and the market share has increased by 0.7%, mainly because Apple users turn around.

After the release of Huawei's new products, multi-language intelligent assistants appeared in the European market, and with the impact of Apple, the entire European market was affected.

Southeast Asia and South Asia are similar situations. Companies such as rice, opal and Vivo have used the advantages of multilingual intelligent assistants to synchronize online mobile phones and have an impact on our original market. And as time goes on, this shock will become more and more obvious. ”

Once multilingual smart assistants are fully popularized in these months, they have not come up with a solution, and their situation is very troublesome.

"Li Renzhong, how are you over there?" Gao Zhendong once again looked at Li Renzhong.

"No breakthrough." Li Renzhong shook his head and sighed.

Gao Zhendong’s face is a bit bad. He scanned the conference room in a circle: “Obviously, our situation is a bit troublesome. If you just look at your eyes, it’s very likely that you will be out. You think about it, there is a good way.”

The people on the field looked at each other and then began to talk quietly.

After a long time, a man in a suit and a ruthless look stood up and said: "Besides getting the smart assistant, I am afraid there is no other way. Unless the company's technology breaks through in the short term, we can find the authorization of the army ant company."

"Oh." Gao Zhendong smiled: "Our people, even their shadows can not see, let alone authorized."

"The method is wrong." Cold proud man shook his head: "Our department, I have dealt with many Chinese people. Chinese people are stupid, very face-to-face, and those bosses are very good, like to drink, say you are on the wine table. Friends. They also think they are smart and find the right way to easily take them."

"You talk."

Gao Zhendong immediately came to interest, and others also showed interest.

"Huaxia people, you hit him, he will only call, swear you a few words. Waiting for you to take the initiative to say sorry to them, they will forgive you, they have a word called to reach out and not smile.

And they like to accept gifts, but also like others to flatter, they are happy to find a direction. They must be because we were unhappy with the last oLeD event, plus the influence of patriotic feelings, we will not see us. "The cold proud man said."

They are not a positive conflict with the marching ant company, only the last oLeD event, so he is definitely a marching ant because of this temper.

"In this case, just give them some benefits, lower your posture and gently recognize the mistakes, let them feel that they have a face, feel that they have won, they can resolve the grievances, cooperation, and naturally can be placed on the table. talk."

The field was quiet, everyone's attention was on the cold proud man, listening to him.

“How do you want to lower your posture?” Gao Zhendong asked with a frown.

"President, you personally, show us the importance we attach to them. Then you are in front of them, speak a little politely, lower your attitude and apologize for the last oLeD event, let them feel that they have won, have a face. They like it. If you feel that you win, you will be able to talk about other cooperations. After all, the company is for the benefit, they can't afford to pay for it."

Gao Zhendong narrowed his eyes and glanced around the field.

No one speaks, obviously there is no good way. They have no way to get this dilemma, they must get the authorization of the marching ant company, but they have no good way, others have, they naturally do not dare to object, even if it is useless, they can not blame them.

After thinking about it, Gao Zhendong said to Leng Ao-Nan: "Tomorrow, you and I have gone to China."

chapters.title: Chapter 250: : The Last Sentence Is Brilliant
chapters.body:
Chapter 250: : The Last Sentence Is Brilliant

The marching ant company headquarters canteen.

Chen Mo and Zhao Min, as well as Xiao Yu, are sitting on a small table, and the rest of the company is on the table.

There is no special box in the dining hall. Any company executives come here, but also ordinary seats. Instant Chen Mo and Zhao Min are no exception.

If you want to be special, you will spend money to go out and eat.

In doing so, the purpose is to tell the company that there is no specialization in the company, even if the management is the same. In this kind of place, there is a management-specific box, which invisibly makes employees feel a sense of difference between people.

Here, in the form of self-service fast food, the chef cooks the dishes, distributes them, and sells them in a dish and a dish. I want to eat what I want to take, but I can't waste it. If I find it wasted, I will deduct my salary.

The tables in the canteen are large and small. They are all gathered in groups of three or five. They are talking and laughing, and the atmosphere is very harmonious. However, they occasionally turn their attention to the table of Chen Mo.

After all, such a young and handsome big boss is a rare animal.

Chen Mo has long been accustomed to this kind of national treasure-like gaze, still calmly eating, and chatting with Zhao Min.

"This afternoon, Gao Zhendong, president of Samsung Mobile, will come over." Zhao Min said.

“Oh?” Chen Mo was slightly surprised: “I remember, the day before yesterday, people of Samsung, you said that you are on a business trip, how can you change your mouth now?” Chen Mo asked.

"Oh, people come over personally, if we do this again, it will be a bit stingy. Although I am not at all atmospheric, but in any case, the surface kung fu still has to be in place. As for what they come to talk about, we can’t agree, it is another It’s going on,” said Zhao Min.

"They get you, it's bad luck." Chen Mo said with a chuckle.

He is not worried about what Zhao Min will make. Zhao Min can manage the company in a well-organized manner, and he will naturally handle the matter. He will not have to worry about it.

And if you don't cooperate with Samsung, you can see Zhao Min's own mood.

According to his understanding of Zhao Min, the last time he ate a dark loss, this time it will certainly not be as simple as the Samsung company.

Regardless of cooperation or non-cooperation, he does not care, and the last time the screen supply was interrupted, the use of monopoly to raise the price of memory, so that he did not feel good about Samsung, so in his heart, he somewhat rejected Samsung.

The partner of the marching ant company is not only Samsung.

After the multi-language intelligent assistants authorized externally, in the past half a month, they have signed and authorized more than a dozen mobile phone companies in China, and they are not afraid of no one to cooperate.

The mobile phone market is so big, even if Samsung is eliminated in the future, other companies make up, they still have revenue. So now, regardless of whether or not they cooperate with Samsung, their influence is not great.

The company's business is handled by Zhao Min.

Just some big things, Zhao Min will discuss with him in advance, according to Chen Mo's attitude to develop countermeasures.

"Boss, pay attention to the words. What provoke me? They are not able to go with the company, the company is yours well? How to count, it is to get you." Zhao Min did not say good.

"Okay, you are right." Chen Mo smiled. According to Zhao Min’s logic, it is indeed beyond reproach.

"In order to limit us, we suddenly interrupted our oLeD screen, let us lose a lot of money, now want to get the benefits from our hands, the door is not, let them go back and play their own sticks." I remembered the original screen was interrupted Zhao Min feels very upset.

"The last sentence is brilliant." Chen Mo smiled softly.

"Don't talk, the dishes are getting cold." Xiao Yu interrupted the conversation between the two.

"Okay, eat."

After lunch, Chen Mo went back to his office area, took a break, and continued to work on the design of the holographic projector.

With the help of the ink girl, the design of the holographic projector is very fast. Chen Mo only needs to express his own ideas and design ideas, and the ink girl will complete his ideas with the fastest speed, without having to do it.

With the technical technical support obtained in the science and technology library, there is no technical bottleneck, and with the help of the super artificial intelligence of the ink girl, I believe that the holographic projector can be designed successfully in the near future.

At Binhai Airport, the plane whizzed.

Not long after, the airport's VIP passage went out of eight people. Seven men and one woman, the lead is a middle-aged man.

The eyes behind the middle-aged men's black-rimmed glasses are a bit small, and they look like they are just waking up, with their backs, black suits, and light blue ties. They look very gentle.

This man is Gao Zhendong, president of Samsung's mobile business.

He has a briefcase on his left, and the woman with a good face is his assistant. On the right is a man with a cold face, the man who spoke at the meeting last time, Gao Zhendong asked him to follow.

At this time, the man inadvertently swept the people around him, his eyes looked different, but the kind of pride and disdain that he showed in the unconscious could not be covered.

Three people are surrounded by five bodyguards.

This pedestrian's costume is too outstanding. When it comes out, it attracts the attention of people at the airport. People along the way have cast their eyes on a few people.

I don’t know when there is such a bull in the coastal city.

After seeing eight people, many people secretly thought about it.

Soon, a few people walked out of the airport door in the eyes of everyone's attention, boarded a business car that had been waiting for a long time, and went on.

"Huaxia people are really loud, awkward, and it is very annoying to listen to." As soon as I got on the bus, I was cold.

Gao Zhendong glanced at him and regained his gaze: "I still think about how to negotiate with the army ant company, this time things can be sloppy."

"Low-profile. On the Huaxia people, as long as you lower your posture and let them feel that they have won, they will be 'great'. The day before yesterday, they said that they are on a business trip. Now, the president, you said that you personally passed, they will welcome you immediately. Oh, they belong to the kind of people who have forgotten the scars."

Cold proud man sneered twice, it seems that everything is in his grasp.

"Zhizhang, wait until the marching ant company, don't talk nonsense." Gao Zhendong could not help but speak.

He knows that Jin Zhizhang is a bit proud, this is the character, and he can't change. Not enough for this person, it is a bit of a skill, otherwise this character is not likely to climb the top management of the Samsung mobile business group.

He does have his own proud capital.

However, this time the opponent is a marching ant company. Any proud person has no proud capital in front of the marching ant company.

Now he can only swear by Jin Zhizhang. When he goes to the army ant company, don’t talk nonsense, or offend people, and cause unnecessary trouble, then it is really troublesome.

"Do not worry, this is not domestic, I know what to say and what should not be said." Jin Zhizhang said faintly.

"Well, you know."

Gao Zhendong’s face was loose, sitting in the position and closing his eyes.

When Jin Zhizhang and the female assistant saw it, they did not dare to speak any more. They leaned on the chair and quietly looked at the scenery outside the window.

The vehicle is also unaware of the headquarters of the marching ant company.

chapters.title: Chapter 251: :Misunderstanding?
chapters.body:
Chapter 251: :Misunderstanding?

Gao Zhendong looked at the modern technology park outside the window, and his heart was full of emotion.

Now his mood is very complicated.

Samsung is an old group with influence in various fields, especially in the electronics field. It is one of the international giants.

However, he has to come here personally and bow to the marching ant company.

Although it is very uncomfortable, it must be done. Smart assistants didn't break through, meaning their phones were a generation behind others.

In the mall, especially in the big pot of technology, the backwardness of technology means elimination. There have been too many previous lessons in the past, and he naturally cannot make Samsung's mobile business ruin in his own hands.

The last time I saw Cook’s news about the marching ant company talking about cooperation, although the location was different, but standing in this position, he now realized the mood of Cook.

Very unhappy, but must come.

There is still a chance to come, and there is no chance at all.

The future is the world of artificial intelligence, which is the general trend of the world. At present, more well-known companies in the world are developing artificial intelligence.

Whoever masters artificial intelligence means the future.

Seismographs only add to the world's prestige and influence to the marching ant company. The army ant company relies on artificial intelligence to truly rise to become one of the unicorns.

This year's marching ant company has become the most influential company in the world and a wholly-owned enterprise. The entire marching ant company is in the hands of Chen Mo. If you say achievements, at present, no one can compare with Chen Mo.

If this achievement is theirs, it would be fine.

After the vehicle passed the safety inspection, the pedestrian also successfully entered the marching ant company.

A few people just entered the company, a robot came over: "Mr. Gao, hello, my name is Xiao Yao, responsible for receiving you, please come with me."

The robot speaks Korean and the pronunciation is very standard, they can understand.

The robot came out to receive, even a person who greeted them, even if it wasn’t for Zhao Min’s personal greet, at least one other staff member would be greeted, even if the staff came with a robot.

Now, for the first time, let them face an icy robot, and it always feels awkward.

Gao Zhendong frowned, but did not say anything, followed behind the robot.

The robot of the marching ant company is recognized as the most advanced robot. Many rich people will buy a robot.

Buying this kind of thing is similar to a luxury car, and when guests come to the house and see the robot's surprise, they will feel more than their face.

The intelligence of this kind of robot has truly reached the world's top level.

This is also the reason why the marching ant company released the intelligent robot, causing such a big sensation.

As one of the senior staff, he also knows that within the Samsung company, there is a research and development department to purchase the robots of the army ants company to come back to study, but I have not heard of any gains.

"Mr. Gao, the president is now in a meeting, you need to wait here." After entering the reception room, the robot will open.

This made Gao Zhendong and Jin Zhizhang and others look dark. They came over and took it and told them now that they are still in a meeting.

What does it mean?

They are all coming over. Many times, when they meet someone they don't want to see, or if they don't want to visit, they will talk at a meeting.

I never dreamed that one day, this routine was used on them.

Is this going to give them a horse?

Not enough now in the marching ant company, they are looking for cooperation, naturally do not dare to attack. Otherwise, it’s hard to meet up, it must be yellow.

“How long will it take?” Gao Zhendong asked with a deep breath.

"I don't know." The robot demon shook his head.

"Then your boss, Mr. Chen Mo? Can you contact them and let us meet him?" Gao Zhendong asked with a smile.

"The demon can't contact Mr., the gentleman is not seen."

After the robot left the reception room, Gao Zhendong and Jin Zhizhang’s face immediately darkened.

They have never been once, and they have been ignored as they are today. If it is normal, they have already turned to find someone, but now, if they leave, the cooperation will be gone.

"Sure enough, I am proud of the Chinese people." Jin Zhizhang said uncomfortable.

"Be careful." The female assistant next to him whispered.

After all, this is a marching ant company. They don't know who the marching ant company will install in the dark.

Jin Zhizhang was sullen and had no more words.

About an hour and a half, the reception room still has no staff. No one had entertained them except the middle robot gave them a few teas.

In the middle they asked once, the ordinary staff did not know what Zhao Min was doing, the answer of the robot was the conference room, and when the meeting was over, I didn’t know.

Just as Gao Zhendong and others waited until they were impatient, the door of the reception room suddenly opened.

Zhao Min and Xiao Yu, under the leadership of the demon, entered the reception room.

"Gao, I have waited a long time for the company's affairs. I didn't have time to talk about it today, but I heard that when you come over, you will come out of time. But just meeting, let you wait." Zhao Minyi opened his mouth when he saw Gao Zhendong.

Not waiting for the translation of the female assistant around Gao Zhendong, the robot has already acted as a translator and directly told Gao Zhendong.

A little fisherman on the side, staring at Zhao Min. She is a bit curious, how Zhao Min did it, and the lie is so natural.

Is this the veteran of the mall? Xiao Yu silently thought.

In fact, Gao Zhendong and others just entered the company, Zhao Min already knows. The words of the demon are also what Zhao Min told him. Just now, Zhao Min has been sitting in the office to handle documents, but she is the clearest.

However, she is not likely to dismantle Zhao Min and watch it quietly.

When I heard Zhao Min’s words, Gao Zhendong and Jin Zhizhang next to him squirmed and sighed, sighing and venting.

In a few simple words, all the problems are explained.

Zhao Min means that she had no time to see them. I heard that they were the only ones who gave them face to face, just let them wait, but she was still working normally, they could not blame her.

Sure enough, it is a veteran!

No wonder that young people have become the second-hand of the marching ant company. Let them wait for so long, now come a word, they can't refute them, certainly not simple people.

It’s so skillful to talk.

"Nothing, busy work is normal, I am often busy. Zhao can squeeze out time to meet me, but also my luck." Gao Zhendong said with a smile on his face.

"That's good." Hearing the translation of the robot, Zhao Min also smiled: "This time Gao asked me to come because of what?" Sitting down on the sofa, Zhao Min spoke directly.

"Oh, come today, it is a misunderstanding between our two companies." Gao Zhendong smiled.

“Oh?” Zhao Min was slightly surprised: “What misunderstandings between us?”

"The last oLeD screen, because of the problems in our company's production, caused delays in delivery, brought some trouble and unnecessary losses to your company. I always wanted to tell you personally, the result is busy. For a while, I forgot. Some time ago, I suddenly remembered that time, which may bring misunderstandings to our two companies, so I came over and explained it to you in person." Gao Zhendong said.

According to Jin Zhizhang, first lower your posture.

"The high president is really interested. I also understand the problems caused by the 'force majeure' factor." Zhao Min smiled and looked at Gao Zhendong.

She is not a fool, naturally she will not believe these ghosts.

Samsung is not the first time to use this method. In the past, many companies, including China Micro, have taught and squandered.

"Understanding Long Live." Gao Zhendong was overjoyed. Jin Zhizhang said that it is really useful. Just lower his posture. Although my heart was overjoyed, my face was not moving.

Next to Jin Zhizhang’s mouth floated a mocking arc, but he did not dare to be too blatant.

In his view, Chinese people are like this.

"Today we booked a dinner at the Binhai Hotel. Can you ask Zhao to come over to participate? After all, it is our problem. It is our compensation."

"Oh, eating and drinking is free." Upon hearing the translation of the robot demon, Zhao Min looked at Gao Zhendong deeply: "Now the misunderstanding has been lifted. Is there anything else in Gao?"

"Zhao is really smart, and he is as good as God." Gao Zhennan said with a hand: "This time, in addition to lifting the last misunderstanding between us, there is indeed another thing."

"Talk." Zhao Min's mouth floated in a radian.

"It is the authorization problem of the intelligent assistant."

"You want the authorization of the intelligent assistant? This is good to say." Zhao Min said: "Intelligent assistants are authorized to you, it is not impossible."

chapters.title: Chapter 252: : Give You A 10% Discount
chapters.body:
Chapter 252: : Give You A 10% Discount

Gao Zhendong and Jin Zhizhang were overjoyed. They never dreamed of it. It was so easy.

I thought that it would take a lot of effort, Zhao Min will promise, I did not expect to just open, Zhao Min promised. It seems that it has been worth waiting for just over an hour.

Suddenly I felt that I had misunderstood Zhao Min. Now it seems that this woman seems a lot more lovely.

"Zhao Zong is really refreshing." Gao Zhendong eyebrows opened his eyes and smiled. The depression just now has already been swept away and the mood is refreshing.

“Oh.” Zhao Min smiled slightly: “I am a businessman, the main task is to make money.” After that, turn to look at Xiaoyu: “Go print out the license agreement.”

"Good." Xiao Yu lightly daggers, turned and left, not long after, took a newly printed agreement into the reception room.

"This is the authorization agreement of the intelligent assistant." Zhao Min handed the authorization agreement to Gao Zhendong: "You can take it back and see it. If you feel it is fine, you can sign it at any time."

Gao Zhendong took over the agreement. Now it seems that the other party is more anxious than them. For them, this is a good thing, indicating that they have the opportunity to take the initiative in future cooperation.

The agreement was in English, and the female assistant next to Gao Zhendong took over the agreement and began to look carefully.

Not long after, the female assistant's face changed slightly, and the agreement was handed to Gao Zhendong, and he said a few words in his ear.

Gao Zhendong, who was originally in a good mood, smiled immediately on his face.

"What's wrong?" Zhao Min asked strangely.

The small angle of the fisherman's mouth next to it also smiled. She found that Zhao Min was not going to act, it was a waste.

"Zhao Zong, is this agreement wrong?" Gao Zhendong said with a deep breath, let himself be calm.

"What's wrong?" Jin Zhizhang also looked at the female assistant.

The female assistant placed the authorization agreement in front of Jin Zhizhang and pointed to one of the above terms.

After seeing the content of the terms, Jin Zhizhang had some smug faces that were still stiff, and his face was pumped and immediately turned cloudy.

Originally, I was in a good mood, and after seeing the requirements of the agreement, their mood was like heaven falling into hell, and there was a feeling of being played.

"You printed the wrong agreement?" Zhao Min looked at Xiaoyu.

"No, it is the authorization agreement of the intelligent assistant you said." Xiao Yu said with a narrow eye, his face was a bit ruddy, she could not have the skills of Zhao Min who had nothing to do with it.

"That should be true." Zhao Min looked at Gao Zhendong: "Is there any problem with the agreement? Any questions can be raised."

"Is the authorization fee to be 21.4% of the price of the whole machine? Is it too high?" Gao Zhendong asked with a bite.

Such a high licensing fee is obviously a sign that you do not want to cooperate.

This is not a good news.

"High? As far as I know, at present, a $400 smartphone needs to pay a wiFi patent fee of about $50. WiFi costs $50, and our smart assistant, who charges $85, seems to have nothing wrong with it.

After calculating $85, there are more than 500 Huaxia coins. It is quite a one-time purchase of a smart assistant for two years. If you use your mobile phone, it will be a good deal. Is this price high? "Zhao Min said a little ‘茫然’.

"Zhao Zong, can't you count it?" Gao Zhendong was sulking in his heart.

Originally, Zhao Min said that he would be authorized to give them. He was still happy. As a result, he was just caught up in the air and couldn’t get up, not coming down, and it was extremely uncomfortable.

"Not so, then what do you tell me?" Zhao Min asked ‘curiously.’

"Zhao Zong, we are not a small number of individual purchases, but all mobile phones, we must use this technology. A large number of purchases, always have the ex-factory price, not the container price?"

Gao Zhendong was almost mad at Zhao Min. He did not believe that Zhao Min managed the army ant company into the current scale. Even these things did not understand, obviously it was deliberately looking for things.

“Is this calculated?” Zhao Min said in amazement: “Then I will give you a 10% discount and receive 19.2% of the price of the whole machine.”

"I……"

Gao Zhendong has an impulse to swear at the moment, but he is forced to go back.

"This price is already very low. If the price is not acceptable, then we can't talk about it." Zhao Min said.

Low? Is this price low?

The price of the whole machine is 19.2%, even if it is calculated according to 3500 per mobile phone, the patent fee for a mobile phone to be paid to the army ant company is nearly 700 yuan.

The total profit of their mobile phones is not so much. Even if they raise prices, they will not get as much profit. If the license agreement is signed, all the profits of their mobile phone business will fall into the pocket of the marching ants, which means they work for the marching ants.

"Zhao Zong, this price is too high, we can not accept, we give up to 3% of the price of the whole machine." Gao Zhennan said: "3% has been a lot, according to the price of our mobile phone, on average, how to exceed 100 yuan a Taiwan, according to our annual mobile phone shipments, you increase your income by at least 23 billion at least every year."

“It sounds tempting.”

"Really, our company's mobile phone, last year's shipments, is the first." Gao Zhendong said with a little pride.

"How much is your shipment has nothing to do with us." Zhao Min shook his head and pointed to the agreement in the hands of the female assistant: "The licensing agreement has been given to you, 3% is impossible, and the price will not be lower."

"Zhao Zong, is there any other way? Or you authorize us to open the code of our intelligent assistant, we can consider, give you 10% of the price of the whole machine." Gao Zhendong looked forward to Zhao Min: " Our annual mobile phone shipments exceed 200 million units, and it is also a mid- to high-end market. There is a lot of money here."

"Oh." Zhao Min sneered at the smile: "So much money, want our smart code? Is it too dreaming?"

The technology of their smart assistants is not patented, the technology is not public, many people want to get their smart code, there have been spy incidents before, but no one has ever succeeded.

Like a seismograph, Chen Mo wanted to apply for a patent for the seismograph, but she was stopped. The advantage of patents is that they have legal monopoly rights within a certain period of time, but it means that the core technology is open, and ultimately others are cheaper.

The core technology of the marching ant company is not disclosed. Perhaps the above people know some of their artificial intelligence technology, because Chen Mo has traded with the above, she also knows.

Gao Zhendong wants to use this money to put out the code of their intelligent assistant, it is a dream.

The person who can see the complete intelligent code in the company is also Chen Mo. Other developers, only the power to retrieve a module code, and not the most core code.

"Zhao Zong, I heard that your license fees for other companies are not so high." Jin Zhizhang frowned.

He knows that Zhao Min is probably a lot more difficult than he imagined.

"Who is this?"

After the robot translated the words of Jin Zhizhang, Zhao Min turned his eyes to Gao Zhendong.

"He is Jin Zhizhang, the deputy director of our marketing department." Gao Zhendong said.

"Do you know that my authorization to other companies is lower than this price? Who do you listen to?" asked Zhao Min.

The licensing agreement is externally confidential. It is impossible for people of several companies to say these things to others casually, otherwise she does not mind termination of authorization.

"Guess! Any company can't afford such a high license fee," Jin Zhizhang said.

"And then? What do you want to say?"

"Do you do this, is it abusing the dominance of the monopoly market? Deliberately suppressing us, is this not good?" Jin Zhizhang frowned and his tone was somewhat unpleasant.

After hearing the translation of the robot, Zhao Min smiled and stared at Jin Zhizhang: "Monopoly? Suppress? I think more. Then? Do you want to sue us?"

"..."

"Zhao Zong, this authorization agreement, we take it back and take a closer look and decide to contact you again. But this license fee is really too high. If it can be lower, it will be very good." Gao Zhendong hurriedly spoke. Interrupted Jin Zhizhang who just wanted to speak.

Jin Zhizhang’s character is a bit proud, and Zhao Min obviously wants to anger him. Here is the headquarters of the marching ants. If it is a contradiction, it is definitely embarrassing. Once there is a problem, it will definitely worsen their Samsung mobile business.

"Little demon, send a few guests." Zhao Min said to the little demon next to him.

"Okay, president." The robot stood up and looked at Gao Zhendong and said in Korean: "Several gentlemen, ladies, please come with me."

chapters.title: Chapter 253: : Ass Decides Thinking
chapters.body:
Chapter 253: : Ass Decides Thinking

From the marching ant company, Gao Zhendong had a face full of thunder and cloud, and he had not received such a suffocation.

In the past, when I talked with others, I always had people flattering him or smiling. Looking for Zhao Min this time, he thought he had put down a low enough posture and he was still beaten.

From the point of view of the agreement, he knew that the marching ant company did not want to cooperate with them.

Thinking of this, Gao Zhendong began to worry.

Mobile smart is a trend, no one can stop, if they don't catch this train, even if they are not completely eliminated, it is not impossible to be squeezed into the second line.

The money in the mobile Internet industry is very good, but the competition is beyond the imagination.

Nokia, Sony, Yahoo, and Motorola have all been leaders in this industry. The ultimate fate is being acquired or eliminated because they have not kept up with the times.

There is no eternal enterprise, especially in the mobile Internet industry. The technology is updated too quickly. Once it lags behind, it will be completely finished.

Although the mobile phone is not without a smart assistant, it is not an artificial intelligence, and it is technically behind generation.

Nowadays, multilingual intelligent assistants can use Korean. Rice companies are already popular in their country. This time, they will definitely not miss this opportunity. I am afraid that at the time, their business in the base camp may be robbed. Other foreign countries. Not to mention the business.

Thinking of this, Gao Zhendong is more and more worried, and the intelligent assistant must get it.

But they could not agree to the conditions of the marching ant company, the licensing fee is too high. Nearly 20%, this license fee cannot be borne by any company.

Their mobile phone has no profit of 20%.

It is not impossible to raise prices, but the price increase of 20% is too expensive. Consumers do not buy it, which has an impact on their business, and the money they earn is not theirs.

This price must be lower, but it should be discussed with the top, because he does not know, the bottom line acceptable to the board and other executives, he did not dare to decide.

Jin Zhizhang, who is next to him, is not very good. He vowed to talk to Gao Zhendong that the Chinese people are very good at coping, but now they have become such a situation, and he has no face.

"President, can we not tell the military ants to monopolize the market?" Jin Zhizhang could feel that Gao Zhendong was in a bad mood and was careful.

"Call? I told you the whole family, here is China, how do you tell me?"

Gao Zhendong was angered by Jin Zhizhang.

They are often monopolized by Samsung, using their monopoly position to suppress their opponents. Both Huawei and Apple were the targets of their suppression.

As the core of Samsung's core, he naturally knows the monopoly.

The anti-monopoly law of each country is mainly used to target foreign enterprises and is a means of safeguarding national interests. The monopoly of enterprises in other countries will harm the interests of the country, and that country will use anti-monopoly law to suppress it. However, the monopoly of the enterprises in their own countries harms the interests of other countries. The state is blinding one eye and may help one when appropriate.

Huaxia will only punish their monopoly, and it is impossible to punish the monopoly of the marching ant company.

"Don't you say that Chinese people are very good at dealing with it? Is it OK to lower your posture?"

Gao Zhendong was facing Jin Zhizhang, and his face was covered with a skunk. He lowered his posture and came here. As a result, he did not get any benefit, and he was still angry.

Jin Zhizhang did not dare to repay his mouth, bowed his head and endured, and regretted why he was so bad at this time.

After a long time, Gao Zhendong vented his suffocation in his chest and calmed down. Next time, if the marching ant company refuses to cooperate, I am afraid that it can only be developed by the technical department itself.

"Is it strange why I have to do this?" In the company office, Zhao Min looked at Xiaoyu’s confused face.

"Yeah." Xiao Yu Meng nodded.

Today's business gave her a lot of doubts, and now she is still wrapped in her mind. Zhao Min’s acting today, as well as the sudden change of face, gave her an intuitive feeling, which was previously unseen.

"If you don't want to work with them, why should you meet them?" Xiao Yu asked the confusion of his heart.

Zhao Min shook his head slightly and said: "You are wrong. Gao Zhendong is the president of Samsung Group's mobile business and belongs to the senior core of Samsung. He personally came over. If we don't see it, it will make outsiders feel that we are very proud. This image is not good. If you don’t want to talk about cooperation, you don’t want to, you don’t want to work hard, you still have to do it well, or you can easily be regarded as an attack point.”

Little fish nodded, quiet listening.

"Remember that they said the last time the phone screen was done?"

"Ok."

“Do you think that they are really interrupting our mobile phone screen supply because of problems in the factory?”

"Should not be." Xiao Yu shook his head.

"why?"

"At the time when our mobile phones were the hottest, they interrupted our screen supply and announced the news of the mobile phone conference. It felt like a premeditated." Xiao Yu thought about it.

"At that time, when we were burning the most, we were splashed with cold water. They knew that we were upset because of that, so when we came over, we explained the incident and made us feel that this was a misunderstanding. In the past It’s gone.

But how much loss did it cost us? How could it be so simple? Not mentioned before, because there is no way. Now let me seize the opportunity of revenge, naturally I have to take advantage of this, and the last loss will come back from them. ”

The intention of Samsung is obvious. It is the authorization of the intelligent assistant, and all Gao Zhendong will lower their posture.

All along, the impression that domestic people give to foreigners is good to talk. As long as it is a misunderstanding, causing some losses, the other party apologizes to lower the attitude, a little compensation, will not make too much trouble, it will slowly pass.

Samsung also wants to use this trick to deal with her, impossible.

"That is to cooperate with them?" asked Xiao Yu.

"Now is the era of globalization, they have a lot of patented technology in their hands, and cooperation is inevitable. When our country and the United States, the island country is in a stalemate, many cooperation is still normal.

The ordinary people below can be influenced by personal emotions and resist if they don't like it. However, the above people have different positions and great interests. One sentence may affect the relationship between the two, even the conflict of war. In many cases, it cannot be affected by personal emotions. The money earned must be earned.

The **** decides to think, and the words are not rough. The higher the position of the buttocks, the more you have to think about the decision. ”

Zhao Min followed the teaching.

For so long to get along, she has already had Xiao Yu’s own sister’s girlfriend-like existence. And she is a woman of Chen Mo, and some things must be understood.

"Then why is the authorization fee so high? Will not scare them away?" Xiao Yu continued to ask.

"The difference between school and society is: one is learning, the other is to use it. Ask for it, get it, ask for it, have you learned it?"

"Understood." Xiao Yu thought for a moment and nodded: "If they are not here?"

"They don't come, they can only show that Gao Zhendong is not a qualified superior. If he is rejected once, he will not come over. That position is estimated to be replaced. He is going back now, and should discuss the bottom line price with Samsung's high-level. The bottom will come over and bargain with us. It won't take long, he will come again."

Zhao Min looked at Xiaoyu and couldn't help but ask: "There are a lot of problems today, so eager to learn, is it with him, is there pressure?"

"No." Xiao Yu smiled and shook his head.

"There are a lot of women who want to chase the boss. Like Xu Weixin, the arrogant woman of the sky, you didn't feel the pressure?"

"No." Xiao Yu shook his head: "Why do you have pressure?"

“Why is there no pressure?” Zhao Min smiled and asked back.

"Because I believe in him and understand him. I don't need two strong people at home. I am a little woman who has no interest in doing things. I can do what I like to do."

Every time I mention Chen Mo, Xiao Yu’s face will always unconsciously float up the happy and gentle color, which can’t be covered. This appearance, see Zhao Min are a little envious. If she has such a good man as Chen Mo, she has no confidence and unconditional trust.

chapters.title: Chapter 254: : The Arrival Of Li Chengzhi
chapters.body:
Chapter 254: : The Arrival Of Li Chengzhi

Li Chengzhi was in the reception room of the marching ant company. The marching ant company is not the first time he has come over, and he will not be restrained at all.

The test of potential potions has now been tested.

In fact, after Chen Mo left the capital for five days, things have been investigated and the research has been restarted.

Shen Chongxin is indeed because of the secret love of Wu Bing and Chen Chen, thinking that Chen Mo is very powerful because he uses potential medicine, so he will try to change his potential medicine and use it on his own body, and he will almost succeed.

After this incident, the security of the institute was upgraded to one level, and the authority to obtain potential drugs and the personnel who contacted the drugs were re-investigated.

More than three major researchers must be present to get the pharmacy, and the person in contact with the pharmacy should be operated under strict supervision.

Starting the trial again, plus observations from this time, it has been confirmed that the drug has not had side effects, and the cell activity is enhanced, and the wound healing rate is faster than the average person.

After adapting the first batch of test personnel, they selected some candidates from their original special team to conduct confrontation training.

As a result, those special personnel, in terms of fighting, were completely abused by soldiers who had developed through potential.

Regardless of speed, strength, responsiveness, vision, hearing, etc., the personnel who have been developed by the drug are much stronger than the original.

This conclusion came out and entered the field of high-level personnel.

The plan for the ‘super soldier’ has been formulated above, and only the elites of the selected special forces can join the ‘super soldier’ team.

Potential agents are not genetic drugs and are safe and reliable, so it is very likely that they will be used in special safety personnel in the future.

He came to Chen Mo this time and came for this matter.

The effect of the pharmacy is enough to make it a strategic level weapon.

Chen Mo’s identity is very subtle now. Many of the previous major contributions were made by R&D personnel within the national system. However, Chen Mo is not a compiler in a strict sense. This is a situation that has never been encountered before.

But Chen Mo’s behavior showed that they could not find any picky places.

The earthquake early warning network is almost freely organized by the marching ant company. Now the technology of potential pharmacy is also a gift.

Chen Mo’s behavior has given the best impressions of the above.

Because of youth, the future is not limited. Therefore, there is no doubt that the future marching ant company will be taken care of in terms of policy.

When Li Chengzhi was drinking tea, a robot opened the door and walked in: "Mr. Li, Mr. has already come out, you can go to his office now."

"Ok."

Li Chengzhi stood up and left. After being authenticated, he followed the robot and quickly entered Chen Mo's office.

Seeing Chen Mo is in the office, Li Chengzhi immediately smiled and his feet speeded up: "Chen Mo brothers, long time no see."

"It doesn't take long? Sit down." Chen Mo said with a smile.

The number of times the two met each other, so that they would avoid the courtesy of those guests, sit down directly on the sofa.

Li Chengzhi once again came to the army ant company, but Chen Mo did not have an accident.

Last time in the capital, because of the accident, he returned without completing the clinical trial. Li Chengzhi’s coming is definitely for this matter.

“Bringing a good news.” Li Chengzhi said: “The last time the problem was solved, the third phase of the trial also continued. The current potential drug is a preliminary success.”

"That's good." Chen Mo smiled softly, and the result was in Chen Mo's expectation.

Seeing Chen Mobo’s unspeakable face, Li Chengzhi smiled. Since he met Chen Mo, it seems that Chen Mo has never seen a lot of emotional fluctuations. Always a calm appearance, completely inconsistent with his age personality.

Even if the potential agent succeeded in such a big thing, Chen Mo just smiled.

In his impression, many researchers heard that the technology they developed was either ecstatic or ecstatic, but Chen Mo’s appearance seemed to be a trivial matter.

Only he did not know, Chen Mo did not care about this.

He has heard that Shu Lao has told many stories about other corners of the universe. He has such a shocking thing as the science and technology library. The more he knows, the more he is fascinated by fame and fortune.

"This time, there are two more things." Li Chengzhi took a kit from the briefcase and handed it to Chen Mo: "According to the previous agreement, we need to pay 10,000 yuan for each unit of potential medicine."

“Is this a report?” Chen Mo pointed to the information kit.

"No, you know the quantity of production, it is a secret, the report records we have there, you need, I can take you to the past to see, but can not bring it out." Li Chengzhi said.

"What is this?"

Chen Mo asked, and took Li Chengzhi's information kit and began to check.

"This is the agreement you gave us to authorize the technology, the exclusive authorization, and the confidentiality agreement. We have already stamped the agreement, as long as you sign and seal, it will take effect, it can be regarded as normal procedures."

“Hey? I think it’s quite thoughtful.”

Chen Mo roughly looked through the agreement. If there was no problem, he took the pen and signed his name and returned one of the agreements to Li Chengzhi.

“It will be settled once a year on December 31. We will call you on your account. Each unit is 10,000 yuan, which is after tax, and the money is not taxed.”

"Yes." Chen Mo laughed.

He didn't know how much money he had in his account. He didn't seriously count it. He usually used money because his clothes and daily necessities were bought by him.

When he spends money, he is when he goes shopping with Xiaoyu or when he buys gifts for Xiaoyu. But they all pay by mobile phone or swipe their cards. He doesn't know how much money is in the card.

No wonder the old horse said that he doesn't care how much money he has. He didn't understand it before, but at this level, he discovered that money is really just a cold figure.

"There is another thing." After the agreement was settled, Li Chengzhi said: "It was what you said last time, and they used Wang Hai to use potential potions."

"Oh? What?" Chen Mo thought.

"Committed." Li Chengzhi nodded: "The above meaning is, when you need to use the pharmacy, I hope you can tell us who to use, if necessary, we personally give them an injection, after all, it matters, I hope you can understand ""

"No problem." Chen Mo nodded.

There are very few places where he uses pharmacy. It is estimated that he will be used by Xiao Yu and his close people in the future. Because the drug, according to the record, can develop the body's potential, improve its immunity and vitality, and has no side effects on the body.

"Then you will determine the list of people to be developed in advance. After confirming the list, you will contact me again. But for them to develop, make sure they sign a confidentiality agreement." Li Chengzhi said.

After talking with Chen Mo, Li Chengzhi got up and left.

When Li Chengzhi left, Chen Mo also thought about it. After thinking for a long time, he opened his mouth: "Ink girl, inform Wang Hai, White Pearl, Black Hawk and Anan to come to my office."

chapters.title: Chapter 255: : Will You Not?
chapters.body:
Chapter 255: : Will You Not?

Wang Hai, White Pearl, Black Hawk and Anan entered the office and saw Chen Mo sitting in the office chair.

The four of them are now the general manager of the security system of the Army Ant Company headquarters, and they usually take turns to guard the company's security system.

At the same time, they are Chen Mo's bodyguards, responsible for Chen Mo's personal safety issues, and sometimes protect Zhao Min and Xiao Yu.

In their impression, the four rarely came together to see Chen Mo. So they were surprised at Chen Mo’s sudden call.

"Boss, are you looking for us?" Wang Hai said.

"Come here and sit down and say." Chen Mo stopped the mouse and looked at the four people. When they sat down, Chen Mocai said again: "Have you been here for a while?"

The four people wondered why Chen Mo asked, but he nodded.

"I know that this time you are coming over, do you want to do it?" Chen Mo sold a pass.

The four men looked at each other and immediately shook their heads.

"This time you are coming over, I want to give you an opportunity." Chen Mo said.

"opportunity?"

The four were slightly surprised and unclear, so wait for Chen Mo's below.

"The next thing I want to say is confidential. If you want to hear it, you will sign this confidentiality agreement." Chen Mo took out four folders and handed it to Wang Hai: "If you don't want to hear it, get up now and leave." Just fine."

confidential?

The faces of the four people were confused again.

They used to be special personnel, and they are naturally familiar with such things as confidentiality agreements.

Wang Hai thought about it, didn't look at the content of the agreement, and picked up the pen and signed his name directly. He was the first to follow Chen Mo, and he believed that Chen Mo would not lie to him.

The other three people also picked up the name on the pen. Relative to other security personnel, they are closest to Chen Mo, and they are relatively familiar with Chen Mo. They also know that Chen Mo will not hang them, and they have nothing to let Chen Mokeng.

Now Chen Mo, there is everything, there is no need to hang them. And they are very curious about the opportunities Chen Mo said.

Collapse the agreement, Chen Mocai took out a finger-sized sealing agent.

Seeing the pharmacy, the eyes of the four people are more confused.

"This is the opportunity that I am giving you. This pharmacy is my latest product developed by the potential agent. It can act on human cells, strengthen cells, and achieve the effect of developing human potential. Have you seen the captain of the United States? The potion is similar, but its function is not as powerful, but it can increase your speed and responsiveness."

The four men took a breath of air and the eyes flashed incredible.

The function of the pharmacy sounds too sinister, they have only been seen in science fiction movies. If it is true, then this medicine is terrible.

But Chen Mo seems to have no reason to lie to them? It doesn't help to lie to them.

"There is no doubt about the authenticity of the medicine." Chen Mo said: "I have cooperated with the official. The last time I went to the capital, I went to test the clinical effect of this medicine."

Wang Hai nodded.

The last time he followed Chen Mo to the capital. After going to the capital, there was no such thing as him. He just waited quietly for Chen Mo, and he did not know where Chen Mo went and did it.

Now Chen Mo said that he believed in this matter.

"The clinical trial results have come out. The data shows that the drug has no side effects, and the expected potential development effect is also achieved." Chen Mo continued: "So I am calling you over this time."

When a few people get up, Chen Mo will never say this to them for no reason. The next thing to say is definitely the key.

They think of a possibility, that is, Chen Mo’s ‘opportunity’.

"Wang Hai followed me for the longest time. You are also looking for Wang Hai. It belongs to my bodyguard and is my most trusted person. Therefore, I am also good at improving your ability."

Chen Mo put the potion on the table and glanced at the faces of the four.

"Just just now, Li instructor gave me a reply, I am qualified to use pharmacy. This time, I want to ask you, would like to use this pharmacy to develop their potential."

After the words are finished, the office is in a state of silence.

Wang Hai, White Pearl, Black Hawk and Anan face each other.

This is not a trivial matter. It is tested by your own body. If it is not successful, it will be very troublesome. Who is willing to take your own body to mess around?

"This kind of medicine does not change the gene, not the genetic medicine. You can also go back and think about it, and then give me a reply." Chen Mo said.

"I am coming." Wang Hai opened.

"I am also involved." The Black Hawk also agreed to come down.

"I am also involved." White Pearl and Anan also agreed in unison.

They all know that this is indeed an opportunity.

Just now, Li’s instructor did come. As security personnel, they know about the arrival of important guests.

Since the above allows Chen Mo to use, the problem of the pharmacy is definitely not big. They are all people who have stayed in the army. Naturally, the technology promised to be put into use, the technology is almost mature.

Chen Mo only told them to come over, it is their trust.

Although there are certain risks, the risks and opportunities coexist. If you miss this opportunity, they will definitely have no chance in the future.

As a former special soldier, there is still a risky gene in their bones.

Chen Mo’s promise to the four was not unexpected, and the robot handed the four printed documents to four people.

"A signed voluntary agreement, you are officially confirmed to participate, you can repent before you sign, if you want to re-sign, after signing, there is no way to quit."

I didn't hesitate this time. After receiving the agreement, I picked up the pen and signed my name directly.

"You go back and wait, I will inform you when I am ready. It is not that I will give you injection development. At that time, you may have to go to the official." Chen Mo said the agreement.

"it is good."

The four agreed and turned and left.

"Wang Hai, you seem to trust the boss very much." After leaving Chen Mo's office, the white pearl opened.

"Crap, don't you believe it?" Wang Hai said with no anger.

"I believe it is to believe, but that thing, a bit of a mystery." Anan interjected. If they don't believe in Chen Mo, they will not hesitate to sign the agreement, but it is still a bit of a mystery to think about pharmacy.

This kind of medicine, which is only found in science fiction movies, is now in reality and is really hard to imagine.

"Not mysterious." Wang Hai shook his head. He suddenly remembered the fighting ability that Chen Mo showed when he was attacked by mercenaries.

Single-reaction ability, speed and strength, Chen Mo is not under him, just lacking the experience of real battle. Not enough. Even so, Chen Mo can still fight against a mercenary who has been rolling on the battlefield for many years, and does not fall.

At that time, he still had doubts, Chen Mo's powerful speed and reaction came, after all, Chen Mo is just a researcher. Strictly speaking, it is a student who has just graduated, and even if he likes fitness, he may not have such a good skill.

Now Chen Mo took out this potential potion, and the doubts hidden in his heart were also solved, and everything became well explained.

So Chen Mo said that after the role of the pharmacy, he immediately believed.

"How is it not? You know why?" Anan asked strangely.

"This matter, I will explain it to you later." Wang Hai said. This is Chen Mo’s secret. Without the permission of Chen Mo, he could not tell others.

For the sale of Wang Hai, the three were speechless and did not ask much. They all know that there are some things that should not be said without saying that, as a special soldier, confidentiality awareness is a compulsory course.

When the four left, Chen Mo also dialed the phone and informed Li Chengzhi to prepare for the pick-up.

chapters.title: Chapter 256: : Can I Dig A Corner?
chapters.body:
Chapter 256: : Can I Dig A Corner?

The No. 1 laboratory building, like the constant temperature research institute, belongs to the most mysterious place of the marching ant company. Only Chen Mo, Xiao Yu and Zhao Min were able to enter the gate of No. 1 building.

Even the company's vice presidents, Julie and Li Lingfeng, can't enter the first building.

Various intelligent robots are the 'employees' in Building 1. Many of these intelligent robots are basic robots with a single function. Some of them are design drawings designed by Chen Mo from the technology library. Some are functional robots designed by Moto, which are mainly responsible for a specific work.

The robots are controlled by the ink girl and are being produced in an orderly manner.

The enchantress robots are assembled here, and the room temperature superconductors are also produced here.

24 hours of uninterrupted work, coupled with the productivity of intelligent machines, many instruments, as long as the design, will soon appear.

Therefore, Building No. 1 is also the place where the entire army ant company headquarters burns the most money.

This building, like a swallowing beast, carries a steady stream of valuable materials into the building and is constantly being consumed.

Zhao Min entered here several times and was all scared by the scene here. Staying in the first building will feel like you are crossing the sci-fi world.

Only in the sci-fi world will this factory of fully intelligent machine production research emerge.

In the underground research institute of Building 1, Chen Mo looked at the superconducting computer in operation.

The particularity of the superconducting computer itself is destined to be outside exposure. Even if there is no constant temperature superconductor, it is a matter of heaven and earth to develop a superconducting computer by himself.

This underground research institute has become the brain of the headquarters.

The superconducting computer is controlled by the ink girl. Because of the low energy consumption of the normal temperature superconductor and the low heat production, the superconducting computer can run all day. All the computing power of the computer is all served by Chen Mo. Coupled with the existence of artificial intelligence ink girls, the research process of many technologies has been greatly accelerated.

"Ink girl, you are now optimizing the details of the design." Chen Mo turned to look at the design opening on the screen.

The holographic technology is completed by designing three holographic projectors.

Chen Mo decided to start with a medium-sized holographic projector. After this period of Chen Mo's design, coupled with the help of the ink woman, this medium-sized holographic projector was also ready, and then it was at the stage of technical verification.

As long as the medium holographic projector is successful, the micro holographic projector can be designed.

"Okay, Mom."

When the words of the ink girl fell, the design on the screen began to change slightly. The change is not big, this is the optimization of the details, as well as some optimization of the parts parameters.
