Not long after, the optimization on the screen was completed. After the ink-optimized projector, the lines look soft and a lot, it looks more comfortable than just.

“According to this design, the samples of the holographic projector are made.” Chen Mo said. The materials needed are already bought at the design stage, and it won't take long for the holographic projector samples to be produced.

"Okay," said the ink girl. After a while, she said again: "Merg brother, Mr. Li Chengzhi, with four people, has already arrived at the company and is now waiting in the reception room."

"The action is very fast. I told Li Chengzhi to wait for me in my office. By the way, I also informed Wang Hai that they were ready." After Chen Momei, Chen Mo turned and left the No. 1 building.

Last time and Li Chengzhi wanted to develop potential for Wang Hai and others. Today, Li Chengzhi came to bring Wang Hai and others to develop their potential.

When I got back to the office, I saw Li Chengzhi sitting on the sofa waiting.

"Long wait." Chen Mo returned to the company and smiled.

"It is very good to be able to see you as a busy person. It will be worthwhile to wait for a long time. Others want to wait for this opportunity." Li Chengzhi also spoke.

"Lie Li, you learn to flatter, this is not a good phenomenon."

Li Chengzhi laughed, didn't take it easy, and knew that this was just Chen Mo's joke: "What research is busy recently?"

"This confidentiality." Chen Mo smiled: "When the product comes out, you will know."

......

While talking between the two, Wang Hai also entered Chen Mo’s office.

"They are the people I chose to develop potential."

"Yeah." Li Chengzhi did not have any accidents. He knew very well about the people around Chen Mo. I have guessed that these four people have not seen him.

"You have also known Li’s instructor. The next potential development, you will follow the Li instructor in the past. After you finish, come back.” Chen Mo looked at the four people.

"Understand." The four men answered in unison.

"Their development is handed over to you." Chen Mo immediately turned to look at Li Chengzhi.

"No problem, but development and physical examination, it takes a few days. So these days, there may be a security vacuum around you, I brought four people over, I hope to temporarily replace their work, as your security staff, I don't know you. What is the idea?" Li Chengzhi said.

Chen Mo’s identity is special. They don’t want to have a vacuum in the security of Chen Mo’s side in the past few days, so that some people can take advantage of it, otherwise they will also have responsibility.

"That's best. Is it a few people in the reception room? Tell them to come over." Chen Mo looked at the robots around him.

"Okay, sir." The robot nodded: "The 5th demon has been notified to pick them up."

Not long after, four people entered the office of Chen Mo under the leadership of a robot. Three men and one woman, the waist is straight, the pace is steady, and the atmosphere of the soldiers can be revealed inadvertently.

Although the four people do not squint, they are not enough to cover their curiosity. It can be said that the headquarters of the marching ant company is the most advanced place they have ever seen, even if they are not in the life science research institute, they are full of artificial intelligence.

Chen defaulted to these four people, they are among the first ten people to develop potential, four of them.

The man with dark skin on his face is Rayong, the first person to test the pharmacy, and a small man named Zhang Chaoyi, the only woman who cut short hair, is heroic, called Yang Lanlan, and Yangge is Shen Chongxin. The party at the time of taking the medicine.

Chen Mo was a little surprised by letting four potential developers develop their own bodyguards.

"Lie Li, can I dig the corner?" Chen Mo asked.

"They are not retired people, so you have no chance for a while, it is estimated that you have to wait a few years, you can dig, but after a few years, you may not be able to dig, because they may go further." Li Chengzhi smiled, then looked at the four Person: "Your mission, I have already said, I don't have to say it again?"

"No." The four agreed in unison.

"Wang Hai, you go to tell them about the work that needs to be done, usually need to pay attention to what." Chen Mo looked at Wang Hai.

"Good." Wang Hai nodded and stood up. The other three also stood up and left with four people.

Wang Hai and others, after confessing things to a few people, followed Li Chengzhi’s departure. Luo Yong, Yangge and other four people, also left Chen Mo's office, ready to wait at any time.

When everyone left, Chen Mo sat back in the office chair and thought about opening: "Ink girl, after work, I will give me three potential drugs in the lab."

chapters.title: Chapter 257: : Huge Temptation
chapters.body:
Chapter 257: : Huge Temptation

The design of the medium holographic projector has been basically completed. After the sample is produced, it is only necessary to look at the situation for fine adjustment. The medium holographic projector is nearing completion, and he also needs to prepare for the design of the micro holographic projector.

This technology is very critical.

Micro-holographic projectors have very high precision requirements.

Although miniature holographic projections and medium holographic projectors are essentially the same. However, the size of the two is different, the design is impossible, and this is much more troublesome than the medium.

But the trouble is also to design, this is the hurdle that can't jump, and it is the only way to go to the higher-level permission of the technology library.

Entering the state of research, Chen Mo’s brain began to fly fast.

That night.

After dinner, Xiaoyu was sitting on the sofa in the hall, leaning against Chen Mo’s arms, watching TV quietly, and taking the fruit that Chen Mo put on his mouth from time to time. The small days were not pleasant.

When I don't go out in the evening, when Chen Mo doesn't go to the study room, the two are tired together, just like when they are in love.

It is rare for Chen Mo to relax, so he enjoys this state.

"How do drivers change people today? White pearls?" asked Xiao Yu.

"They went to the capital and developed their potential. It will take a few days to come back, Yangge, Yang Lanlan, they are temporary bodyguards." Chen Mo said: "They are all professional soldiers, Li Chengzhi arranged to come over, wait for Wang Hai to come back, they Just left."

Xiaoyu nodded lightly and did not ask much.

"You don't say that I almost forgot." Chen Mo suddenly remembered the three potions that he had taken back from the lab today: "Ink girl, take my briefcase."

"Okay." The ink girl opened, and the robot sitting quietly in the hall suddenly moved. After a while, she took a briefcase and placed it in front of Chen Mo.

"What?" asked Xiao Yu.

"Today I took this back." Chen Mo took three sealed potions from the briefcase and shook it in front of Xiao Yu.

"What are you doing with your potential medicine?" Xiao Yu looked strangely at Chen Mo’s hand.

She has seen the potency agent in Chen Mo's lab, and more than once. She also knows about the potential pharmacy project, which is familiar to pharmacy and can be recognized at a glance.

"It must have been used." Chen Mo said.

"Who used? You use?"

Xiao Yu took the medicine in the hands of Chen Mo and looked carefully.

This pharmacy, if released, will face a mad robbery. If it falls in the hands of the pharmaceutical giants, this pharmacy will bring them endless wealth.

"Tell you a secret, I have used it before." Chen Mo attached to the ear of the fisherman, whispered: "Remember that I took your hand for the first time?"

"You are still very embarrassed to say that at that time you used so much force, my hands were hurt by you." I remembered that at that time, the angle of the small fisherman's mouth did not consciously float a sweet smile.

That was the first time she was hand in hand. As a result, Chen Mo was too hard and her hands were bruised and impressed.

"What did you use at that time?" Xiao Yu asked seriously.

"Yes, I just used this pharmacy that afternoon, and the hand that held you was a little nervous. The strength of the development did not adapt, and it happened." Chen Mo said: "At that time, I was already secretly studying this pharmacy. It is."

Chen Mo said a little lie, but it was innocuous. After all, he could not tell the story of the technology library.

"No wonder that you got so handsome that day, it turned out to be this. But what do you study and take your own experiments?" Xiao Yu said seriously: "This can't be done in the future."

"Well, listen to your wife."

Chen Mo heard the concern in Xiao Yu's words, and his heart was warm.

"Tonight, I will use this medicine for you. Just the next two days, you can have time to adjust to the state."

"What are I doing? I don't fight," said Xiao Yu.

"Who said that the development potential comes out, must be a fight?" Chen Mo can not laugh: "This potential potion, like a key to your body, can improve the body's own immunity and cell activity. So I thought about it for you. With this medicine, it can shape the body shape. After use, the body will become better and the skin will be better."

"Really? Then I use it." Xiao Yu's eyes brightened and he did not hesitate to agree.

She is convinced of Chen Mo's words.

According to Chen Mo, the day when she first held her hand, Chen Mo did not change much, and she also believed that Chen Mo would not lie to her.

It is a huge temptation to make the body and skin better, but all women can't stand this temptation, and Xiao Yu is no exception.

The development of potential, the most important is the improvement of self-immunity and physical quality, can avoid many small illnesses, this is the purpose of Chen Mo. He knows that when Xiaoyu comes to relatives, his body will be a little weak, and occasionally he will have a small cold. The problem is not big, but he is annoying.

Therefore, Chen Mocai thought about helping Xiao Yu improve his physical fitness.

"I am going to prepare for you."

Chen Mo got up and walked toward the bathroom. Five minutes later, Chen Mocai entered the bathroom with a small fishing boat, and a large tank of hot water was ready.

"Is this medicine not injected?" asked Xiao Yu.

"The way of injection, the medicine is too strong, it will make you feel tired and uncomfortable. So I will give you another method, medicated bath. Add the medicine to the hot water and let the medicine enter your body along the pores of your skin. The potency is not so fierce. You don't have to have psychological pressure, just add some medicine to bathe." Chen Mo said.

This method is mild in medicine, and the 'silence factor' in the insufficient potential medicine is not well absorbed, resulting in waste. Therefore, Chen Mo will take three medicines at a time, all of which are used for small fishing, and it does not matter if it is wasted.

Pour the medicine into the bathtub and stir it.

Different from the pure medicine used by Chen Mo, the purified medicine is added to the large bathtub. Even if the dosage is increased, the color of the water is only yellow, and there is no black that he uses, and the medicine is pungent.

After thoroughly mixing, Chen Mocai said: "It's already good, go on."

"Ok."

Xiao Yu is also unpretentious, taking off directly in front of Chen Mo. Clothes, the perfect body appeared in front of him, let Chen Mozhen unscrupulously appreciate.

Into the bathtub, the small fisherman sucked a cold air, and for a time, her forehead was already sweaty. The water is too hot, and the white skin is already rosy.

"It's a bit hot." Xiao Yu's face is red.

"Nothing, the pores are stretched, and the factors are active, which is good for absorbing the medicine. It will be fine if you adapt." Chen Mo picked up a towel and helped the little fisherman wipe the sweat from his forehead: "After a while, after the effect, you You may feel a little tired, you will have a good rest and give me other things."

"Good." Xiaoyu nodded, leaning against the bathtub and closing his eyes.

About ten minutes later, Xiaoyu felt a sense of tiredness and fell asleep in the bathtub.

Chen Mo has been guarding until the water is exhausted, and he picks up the small fish that sleeps in the bathtub and walks back to the room.

chapters.title: Chapter 258: : Happy Cooperation
chapters.body:
Chapter 258: : Happy Cooperation

Xiaoyu seems to be in the darkness. Time seems to be a moment, and it seems to have been a long time. Suddenly, a feeling of weightlessness makes her both physically and mentally shocked, and the whole body shakes.

Woke up from the bed, Xiao Yu looked at the sunshine coming in from the window, very comfortable.

She remembers that last night, Chen Mo gave her a potion of potion and slept, but she didn't expect to sleep until dawn.

Chen Mo is no longer around, Xiao Yu got up from the bed and went into the bathroom.

Suddenly I saw myself in the full-length mirror. The small fisherman’s eyes were certain, and the sleepy eyes woke up most of the time.

She felt that herself in the mirror seemed a little different. The appearance does not change much, but it seems to be really different.

The skin is delicate, the vest line at the lower abdomen is faintly visible, but there is no bodybuilding muscles, and the waist is a little thinner. The bumps are so strong that the body lines are very soft and look very comfortable. The long legs have become natural, and there is no awkwardness. It seems to grow taller and the proportion of the body is also very good.

Xiao Yu looked at himself in the mirror with a happy face.

Chen Mo did not lie to her, the pharmacy really changed her body. Which woman does not love beauty, she is naturally not unscrupulous.

After the washing was finished, Xiao Yu was replaced by a casual suit and came out of the room. Today, she does not need to work overtime, so she can rest well.

Just want to go to the kitchen for breakfast, Chen Mo came out of the kitchen with a pot of porridge.

"Get up?" Chen Mo looked up and down a little fish.

Light rain originally had a height of 165. Now it is a little taller. After a few days, after the drug effect, the body is shaped, and there is almost the height of the goddess.

"Longer, more beautiful." Chen Mo smiled.

"Ok."

When I heard Chen Mo’s compliment, Xiao Yu’s heart was as sweet as eating honey. For the sake of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo is the ‘Yue Ren’.

"Why don't you ask me to get up?" said Xiao Yu.

"Let you sleep for a while, I will make breakfast today." Chen Mo looked at the porridge Nunu mouth: "cooked some porridge, try your husband's craft."

Hey!

After paying attention to the casserole in the hands of Chen Mo, Xiao Yu’s stomach screamed with disappointment and his face was red.

"The potential medicine is very expensive for the body. If you know that you are up, you will be hungry. This is for you." Chen Mo smiled softly, put the porridge in the bowl and gave the fish a bowl.

"Thanks husband."

Xiao Yu took over the porridge that Chen Mo handed over, his eyes bent into a crescent, and looked at Chen Mo’s eyes, full of gentleness.

"Thank you, these were all you did before. I will do it for you once, and there is nothing." Chen Mo smiled and said: "This is my first time to cook seafood porridge, you can try it."

"Yeah." Little fish nodded, scooping up the porridge and slowly sending it to his mouth. At this moment she felt that she was wrapped in happiness. Eat a little, Xiao Yu eyes brighten: "Husband, are you really the first time to cook porridge?"

"Yeah, I just like to draw a gourd. After reading some food recipes, I remember, follow the steps, follow the steps, and I will pay attention to the seasoning. It will not be too bad."

Said, Chen Mo also gave himself a bowl.

“It’s delicious, I like this taste very much,” said Xiao Yu.

"If you like to eat, you can eat more." Chen Mo smiled, suddenly thought of something, and continued to open: "When I got up, what is the body uncomfortable, or a strange place?"

"Besides being hungry, there is nothing uncomfortable. However, my strength seems to be getting bigger. When I squeezed the toothpaste, I felt that I didn't use it. As a result, I squeezed it out a lot. Also, when I changed clothes, I accidentally put a dress. It’s torn.” Xiao Yu spit out his tongue.

Chen Mo did not feel surprised. Whether he was himself or the group of people who did clinical trials in the capital, the power of sudden growth did not adapt at first.

"When you have finished eating, you have to exercise, adapt to changes in your body, and then take you out to buy clothes."

"I feel like you are being spoiled by you."

"Abandoned waste, I raise it."

"I am a small fisherman, not a small goldfish, I don't want you to raise it." Xiao Yu drums gangs, a little small and proud.

After eating, Chen Mo accompanied Xiao Yu to help her adapt to the changes brought by the medicine. Chen Mo also taught the small-fishing two-handed self-defense technique. It was some of the exercises and self-defense tips that were recorded after the potential development technology was first recorded.

A pleasant weekend.

Back at the company, Chen Mo went into the lab and began to design a miniature holographic projector.

Gao Zhendong sat in the conference room of the marching ant company and his face was not very good.

Next to him is the executives of the Samsung mobile business and the decision-making team of the marketing department. Opposite is the decision-making layer of the marching ant company headed by Zhao Min.

This time it was negotiated. The last time I went back, I didn’t get it. After this discussion by the top management of the group, he came back again.

The situation is now grim. After last week's statistics, mobile phone sales data has once again hit a new low.

North America, the impact of Apple's S3. Southeast Asia, India and Europe were hit by Huaxia mobile phones, especially in the high-end market. They were attacked by Huawei and Xiaomi, and the data decline was very serious.

The marching ant company brought the mobile phone into real intelligence. It was thought that the marching ant company and the apple were the right ones. Samsung took advantage of the fishermen’s profits. As a result, the spearhead turned around, and now they are uncomfortable.

Although the Apple S3 was so troubled by the marching ant company that it was less than expected, the data was still very impressive. Coupled with the breakthrough of artificial intelligence technology, in the long run, Apple's will only get better and better.

They are not so lucky, Samsung has not broken through the technology, but also squeezed by the marching ant company.

"Zhao Zong, 17.2% of the whole machine price is too high, we can accept, is 7.4%, this is the highest limit. Higher, we have no profit." Gao Zhendong said.

"No profit? After installing the smart assistant, your price will rise by more than one or two, and your users will buy it. 17.2% of the price does not seem to be high." Zhao Min said calmly.

At present, the $400 mobile phone has a baseband patent of more than 50 US dollars, and the wi-Fi technology patent is also 50 US dollars. Together, it has already obtained the main profit of the mobile phone, plus other patents, screens, batteries, spare parts, channel fees, advertisements. Fees and other fees.

The profit that producers can get is only a little bit. This is why companies such as rice and Huawei have not made much money in the mobile phone field.

For a long time in the past, there was no technology in China and a monopoly of foreign technology.

The production of things, including televisions, automobiles, mobile computers and other electrical appliances, must pay a large amount of foreign patent fees, not to produce but take away the profits of the product, domestic companies can only take a little profit.

This situation still exists.

What the marching ant company is going to do now is what the foreign capital companies did in the past. They have core technology and it is impossible to license these technologies at low prices.

"8.1%, this is the bottom line."

"16.9%, otherwise you will come over next time, so talk about it, talk about tomorrow, there is no progress." Zhao Min said.

"General Zhao, we have shown sincerity. The price of 8.1% is already very high."

Gao Zhendong was helpless, and he experienced the feeling of powerlessness that was squeezed. But they didn't know that when they squeezed the phone but couldn't lose their temper, losing their temper here means that the cooperation is over and his future will be affected.

"High? No feeling." Zhao Min calmly said: "This way, we finally retreat a little, 16.6%, can't talk, then next time."

Gao Zhendong took a deep breath: "10%, this is the bottom line. Even if we sell at a premium, those profits are here. If this is not the case, cooperation will not continue."

"That's goodbye." Zhao Min smiled softly and got up and ready to leave.

Seeing Zhao Min’s movement, Gao Zhendong’s face was black. The first time he felt the trick of this woman, it was simply unreasonable. To put it bluntly, it was greedy.

"Wait, Mr. Zhao." Gao Zhendong called Zhao Min.

The ‘negotiation’ will continue. If it is dragged down by Zhao Min, it will be difficult to make up for the loss of the next time.

"How? Promise?" Zhao Min re-sit back to the position.

"16% is really too high. If you put it in any company, you can't accept it. Even if you go, I can't promise." Gao Zhendong said: "The highest 11%, if you are taller, you can't promise." ”

"15.8%, or come next time." Zhao Min said.

"General Zhao, sincerely we have given it, you are like this, not good." Gao Zhendong sighed with anger, he did not want to talk, but must talk.

"Since this is not good, then let's talk next time? I will go on a business trip tomorrow." Zhao Min said.

"11.5%." Gao Zhendong said with a bite.

The negotiations continued, Gao Zhendong looked awkward and could only smash his teeth and swallow his stomach. Without mastering the core technology, it can only be threatened by people. This is a helpless reality.

After an hour, the negotiations stopped.

13.1%, this licensing fee, has reached the bottom line, a little higher than they expected. Zhao Min, a woman, is simply a horror. I know that they will definitely accept it and eat them.

“Happy cooperation.”

“Happy cooperation.”

After signing the licensing agreement, Gao Zhendong struggled to extract these words from his mouth.

chapters.title: Chapter 259: :Freshly Baked
chapters.body:
Chapter 259: :Freshly Baked

From the marching ant company, Gao Zhendong’s face has been bad. After the last time I went back to the marching ant company, they were ready to be slaughtered.

They expected that even if the lion company had a big opening, it could only have a price of 12%, but he underestimated Zhao Min.

Although it is only 1.1% of the gap, but this price is calculated, the annual payment of billions of technical fees to the army ant company.

He doesn't know the licensing fees of other companies, but he can be sure that it is definitely higher than several companies in China.

The only thing that can be done now is to get it back from the user. The price of mobile phones has increased by 13%, and mobile phones are only a few hundred dollars. For current mobile phones and consumption levels, this price has risen and is still within the acceptable range of consumers.

"Let people release the news, we have already reached a cooperation with the marching ant company, the new flagship machine S11, released two weeks later." Gao Zhendong said after the car, to the assistant next to him.

"Okay." The female assistant next to her nodded.

The news of the cooperation between the marching ant company and Samsung company is sweeping like the wind. When foreign countries are reporting, the domestic network has already culminated.

Many netizens on the Internet are indignant at the two cooperations. For a long time, many people in South Korea feel sick. Now the marching ant company and Samsung have reached a cooperation, and the network debate has revived.

Some people said that they were disappointed with the marching ant company, while others defended the army ant company.

This is a global era, the domestic mobile phone giants, the most normal cooperation between them, however, many companies use Samsung's screen, as well as memory technology.

The debate started again, but for these remarks, the marching ant company ignored it and worked as usual.

Because of this questioning voice, they have long been used to it. Over time, this kind of remarks will disappear into the network.

As long as you think about it with your mind, you know that the cooperation between the two companies is the most normal thing. Moreover, the marching ants are authorized to Samsung. To make money, it is also the marching ants who earn their money.

At this time, Zhao Min was holding a phone in the office, and the pen in his right hand was gently tapping on the table.

After the smart assistant was authorized to Samsung, the fierce competition in the mobile phone market continues. However, the parties are not them, so the movement of the army ants company is not big, and how they compete, it is the kingly way to make money silently.

"Mr. Alexander, you want to see our boss. I can't do it. I will tell him back. If you can, let him see you once when you come over."

"Okay, Ms. Zhao, I am looking forward to seeing you."

Hanging up the phone, Zhao Min thought about it and looked at the smart speaker on the desktop: "Ink girl, is the boss now having time?"

Now marching ants, both up and down are artificial intelligence.

The entire Ant Colony Headquarters is like a large intelligent building, and the intelligence of the building is connected to Chen Mo's personal intelligent assistant.

Chen Mo, the artificial intelligence assistant called Mo, followed Chen Mo for so long, and he was still familiar with these things.

Ink is also the most advanced artificial intelligence of the marching ant company, but no one knows her true intelligence, because in addition to Chen Mo, others can not use this artificial intelligence.

"President, wait a moment, I ask." The ink girl opened her mouth. It didn't take long for the speaker to hear Chen Mo's voice: "Are you looking for me?"

"There is something, I want to talk to you."

"Come to the 1st floor, the 3rd floor of the 3rd laboratory, and show you something by the way."

“The holographic projector is coming out?” Zhao Min asked curiously.

She knows that the technology hidden in Building No. 1 is a horrible secret. Now Chen Mo has spurred new technology. Now she doubts whether Chen Mo is an alien.

"I will know when I come."

"I still sell off."

Zhao Min stunned and got up and left the office.

On the 1st floor, the number of times Zhao Min came here, the number of two hands came over. Here is the automatic production, plus intelligent robots, all kinds of strange robots, no one's breath, just full of technology.

Every time I come here, I have a feeling of seeing the future. Even she is worried that in science fiction movies, robots betray, and things that want to replace humans will not happen.

With Chen Mo's ‘Sacred Decree’, Zhao Min entered the first building and started all the way. Not long after, Zhao Min went to the laboratory No. 3 that Chen Mo said.

"Come on, you are right, the holographic projector is out." Chen Mo pointed at the product on the experimental table.

In front of him, there is a circular instrument, which is only one laptop in size. It has a silvery metallic color and a new luster. The instrument is covered with various small laser lights and the precision of the instruments. Accessories, full of technology.

After the day and night of the ink girl's day and night, with the help of the 3D printer, the design samples were created.

This small instrument costs more than two million.

Chen Mo is designing a holographic projector, and Zhao Min is the president of the company. She still knows this information. However, she was surprised that Chen Mo was made so soon.

"Can this be used?" Zhao Min asked.

"Freshly baked, I am preparing for testing, I am not sure." Chen Mo smiled: "Ink girl, ready to open holographic projection."

After pressing a button, Chen Mo waits.

The light from the medium holographic projector illuminates and meets above the disc.

Not long after, on the light curtain of the disc, there was a little girl wearing a white skirt, which looked like an ancient little princess, very cute.

This little girl is the image of the ink girl.

The image of the projection is also a bit transparent, but it is really three-dimensional, three hundred and sixty degrees without dead ends, without knowing, will think that a ghost is suspended in the air.

Seeing this scene, Chen Mo smiled, Zhao Min also revealed the color of surprise, and also turned around on the experimental table, carefully looking at the ink girl from all angles.

This technique, she has only seen in science fiction movies, is seen here today.

"Merg brother." Ink girl said: "The internal operation of the instrument is stable, mainly there are some problems of color difference and color blur. To solve these problems, the image projected later will have higher realism, or add a projector. Linking projections from different directions can also add realism."

"Record the data, I will start to calculate the parameters of the optimized color blur," Chen said.

This kind of holographic technology is essentially a three-dimensional image in the air, similar to the mirage, but a little more advanced.

Unlike the two-dimensional projection on the plane, this is a true 360-degree holographic projection with no dead ends. It can be used in various fields such as stereoscopic film, television, art exhibition, cultural relic protection, military map detection, microscopy, and water detection.

There is a future in this technology. Whoever masters and uses this technology first gets tickets for the train to the future.

“How do you feel?” Chen Mo looked at Zhao Min.

"It's amazing, when will technology mature?"

"It shouldn't be too long." Chen Mo smiled. "Yes, what are you looking for?"

Zhao Mincai remembered that she came to Chen Mo’s. When I saw this, I almost forgot about the business.

“The European Rothschild family wants to cooperate with us on the mobile phone business, and their heir Alexander wants to see you.”

chapters.title: Chapter 260: : Ink And Women'S Dismantling
chapters.body:
Chapter 260: : Ink And Women'S Dismantling

The Rothschild family, a once-popular family, was well-known by the "Currency Wars" and was legendized by various online novels.

At the peak, the family's financial resources can really affect a country's finances, but today's reality is that the family has become weak and has little influence on the world.

In the late nineteenth century, the family made several fatal mistakes, and suffered two wars and the demise of the confiscation of assets by the former Soviet Union. Nowadays, after the historical changes, it has not caught up with the changes of the times. Now there is only one of the top 20 Rothschild banks in the world.

It can be said that this former lion is old.

The book "Currency War" deified the Roche family, and with the expansion of various online works, many people think that this family is still the mysterious hand of world finance, but it has already declined, and its influence on the world is minimal.

But the skinny dead camel is bigger than the horse.

Even if the Roche family is small, it still controls one of the top 20 investment banks in the world. The accumulated resources of the family for many years are still huge, which is not comparable to the average giant.

The most typical case is the case of Geely's acquisition of Volvo. Behind the acquisition of the snake swallow, there is the help of the Roche family. Otherwise, the little snake of Geely cannot swallow the elephant of Volvo.

The presence of Roche in China is the Rothschild Financial Group.

Over the years, this veteran family has still not given up its efforts to restore the glory of the past.

The first cooperation between the army ant company and Roche is the sales of intelligent robots. The agency of intelligent robots in Europe is a company controlled by the Roche family.

For a long time, their mobile phone business did not enter Europe. A big reason is the joint blockade of major European telecommunications companies.

It may be worried that their mobile phones enter the market and touch the vested interests of too many people, which is the oligarch behind them who do not want to see.

Now the Roche family wants to work with them on the mobile phone business, which is obviously a bit ambitious.

“Do they really want to cooperate on the mobile phone business?” Chen Mo asked.

"Yes."

Zhao Min definitely nodded.

"At the age of 37, Alexander took over Rothschild Bank from his father. It is ridiculous for him to take over the bank so young.

But now the world is different. As the genius manager of the Roche family, the hope of the Roche family's resurgence is also on him, so it is definitely a risk to act. The last time I acted as an intelligent robot, and this time I wanted to work with us on the mobile phone business, it was his idea. ”

"High risk, high income, the environment of this era, age does not represent great wisdom. If you can cooperate, it is best, although the mobile phone business is not our main business, but there is money, no one is too much, especially foreigners. Money."

"He may come over in the next few days. When will I let him come over and meet you?" Zhao Min asked.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

"I will go first, do not disturb your research." Zhao Min looked at the holographic projector on the experimental table and turned away.

When Zhao Min left, Chen Mo turned and looked at the computer screen: "Ink girl, now to optimize the problem of color blur, and call out the formula."

"Okay, Mercedes." Ink said: "The best way to optimize the quality of holographic images is to use two projectors to project projections from different directions, which can improve image quality."

"It's really a method, but the projection of a single projector, the image quality must be as good as possible." Chen Mo carefully scanned the formula, and the calculations and results were flashing in his mind.

Commercial holograms, such as virtual idol concerts, Hatsune Miku, Luo Tianyi, etc., are all pseudo-holograms, and must have a specific angle to be effective.

Chen Mo is now the holographic technology of air projection, three hundred and sixty degrees without dead ends, is the real hologram. But now the color is blurred, that is, the quality of the image, it is more perfect to optimize.

"Momgo, what kind of product do you use for this medium-sized holographic projector?" asked the ink girl.

"Holographic TV, holographic computer, should be no problem. And the laboratory needs to be modified, know Iron Man? Stark's laboratory holographic work environment, can control the holographic image at will, it is quite good."

"Mer. Brother, do you want to transform a kind of laboratory?" asked the ink girl.

"I really thought about it." Chen Mo nodded.

Imagine yourself being as savvy as a science fiction movie, and Chen Mo is still a little excited. The picture of a science fiction movie appears on itself.

"Mer brother, the ink girl has to tell you the fact that you have seen more movies."

In the words of the ink girl, Chen Mo’s brain emerged with three black lines. He was dismantled by artificial intelligence, and he also said that he had seen more movies.

"What do you mean? That kind of technology can't be realized?" Chen Mo asked.

"It's not impossible, it's useless, or it's not practical. Do you want Stark to throw the control holograms away? From a biological point of view, that's a superfluous operation, it's a waste of time.

A study, hundreds of formulas and modules, sometimes some need, some do not, you will also pick one by one by hand, and then throw them away one by one? Tired?

Unless specific models and stereoscopic images require true holographic techniques, most research, formulas, and literals do not use that holographic technique, and pseudo-holography is sufficient. As you said, it seems to be ‘loading’, right, it just looks like it’s “installed” and it’s not practical.

Technically, which technology is too expensive. You can do it with ten dollars, but use 100,000 pieces to do it. You use your finger to point a little, and you can say what you can do with your mouth, but you have to walk around and throw it away..."

"stop."

Chen Mo hurriedly stopped, the whole person was not good.

The ink girl even learned the word "loading" and used it on him. If Zhao Min still heard it here, it is estimated that he could smile on the ground.

Can not see, the ink girl also has the potential of Tang Yan.

"I just said it." Chen Mo was depressed and looked at the computer screen and said: "Then you said that the laboratory display wants to transform the taller one, what should I do?"

"Use a glass screen." The ink girl said: "With a holographic plate, you can use a glass screen as a medium, or other pure water transparent screen, so that there is a holographic effect, the energy consumption is smaller than that, and it looks more practical. When you need to use real holography, you can use modeling, holographic projection, or it is waste." said the ink girl.

"It's very smart." Chen Mo is speechless, and the ink girl has already returned to think so much.

"Thank you for your compliment." The light on the holographic tray lit up, and the image of the ink girl ran out and smiled at Chen Mo.

"It's really smart to boast what you should. Don't say this first, first optimize the image quality of the instrument first, then go back and discuss the problem."

Chen Mo put his eyes on the formula of the computer screen and began to enter the research state.

chapters.title: Chapter 261: : How Do You Want To Cooperate?
chapters.body:
Chapter 261: : How Do You Want To Cooperate?

Outside the marching ant company, three cars are slowly approaching.

Alexander sat in a black Audi in the middle of the car, looking calmly at the marching ant company headquarters outside the window.

In various photos and news, he saw the building many times, so it was the first time to watch it at close range.

The marching ant company emerged without warning and quickly became a world-class unicorn. The time is too short and many people have not even responded. The information of Chen Mo and Zhao Min has appeared on the desks of the world.

Countless people want to get shares in the marching ant company, but they can't. Regardless of the proximity of any form, the acquisition of the shares of the marching ant company was all rejected.

Because it is a sole proprietorship, the marching ant company did not disclose the financial status. The real income of the marching ant company is still a mystery in the industry.

According to the preliminary statistics of major investment institutions, the cash held by the marching ants company surpasses any technology company and is the most wealthy company in the world.

Many big sisters know that all the current shares of the marching ant company are almost in the hands of Chen Mo. The low-key young man has already become a climate. It can be said that Chen Mo is already the richest person in the world.

When he was young, he took control of the top 20 investment banks in the world and looked very good. However, he is very powerful, compared with Chen Mo and Zhao Min, there is still a gap.

He is an inheritance of the family's industry, and Chen Mo and Zhao Min, who started from scratch, will build the army ant company.

When Alexander returned to God, the car had entered the marching ant company.

Zhao Min has been waiting at the door of the company. Next to her is Xiao Yu and a robot. There are also some company welcoming staff behind.

Alexander is also an important partner of their cooperation. The first time they came to cooperate, and the cooperation in the field of mobile phones, Zhao Min will naturally not be slow.

It is almost the highest-standard reception that Zhao Min personally greets.

During this time, many people have been ignorant of the cooperation with the marching ant company.

The marching ant company is an alternative to the scientific and technological community. It is somewhat similar to Hua Wei, but it is different. Hua Wei will distribute the shares to the researchers. The shares of the marching ants are only in the hands of one person, and no one is allowed to intervene.

Many of these amnesties are also very helpless.

They have no way to take the army ant company, whether it is a technical blockade or a resource blockade, it is useless. Technology itself, resource blockade, and the beginning is possible, it is now impossible.

Many technology companies have developed, relying on a round of financing, and then using the resources of financing companies to grow and develop. The marching ant company is using absolute technical advantages, and it is hard to break this law. It suddenly develops and grows during the period when everyone does not pay attention.

This rise has no omen, absolute technological superiority, and the spread of information in the Internet era, the outside world can not stop.

The practice of marching ants threatens the vested interests of many large groups.

Other areas are fine, like seismographs and intelligent robots, because they are the industry standard because there is no competition. But in areas such as mobile phones and computers, people who work together must be cautious because they may attract more powerful enemies.

This time, Alexander personally came to seek cooperation in the mobile phone market, and Zhao Min will pay such attention. They also take certain risks when they do this.

"Miss Zhao, hello." When Alexander saw Zhao Min, he greeted him and said in a lame Chinese.

"Hello, Mr. Alexander, I didn't expect you to still speak Chinese."

"Only a little bit, Huaxia is very attractive to me. I will find a teacher to teach me to learn Chinese in the future." Alexander said in English.

"Oh." Zhao Min reported with a smile, holding his hand and looking at him.

Alexander is only in his 30s and looks smaller than his actual age. His suit has short hair and a flat smile on his face. The temperament naturally exudes elegance and elegance, and does not alienate him.

From him, Zhao Min saw a true aristocratic temperament. This kind of temperament is only available to those who study aristocratic etiquette all the year round.

In his thirties, he took over an investment bank with a history of more than two hundred years. Zhao Min had to admire the power of Roche's previous generation of power.

Alexander is also looking at Zhao Min, an Eastern woman who is ten years younger than him. He is the second person of the marching ant company and one of the top decision makers of the marching ant company.

Even if he is self-invested in managing genius, he did not have Zhao Min’s wrists ten years ago.

Many big sisters know that the marching ant company has always been Zhao Min in management. It can be said that the big marching ant company is built by Zhao Min.

Although it is the basis of the technology products behind it, if there is no ability, even if there is a product, it is impossible to build such a huge unicorn.

Acting intelligent robots, let them make a small profit, and let them see the potential of the marching ant company.

Previously they were Rothschild Bank, just an investment consultant. Family-style banks have limited influence, times are changing, and they must change.

This change can be started from other fields.

Therefore, after his father saw his ability, he would hand the bank to him, hoping that he could change the family situation.

This time, I am looking for a deeper cooperation with the marching ant company. Once the marching ant company succeeds, they may not be able to catch a ride, and the rise of the Roche family is not impossible.

After a little look, Zhao Min took the lead and took him to the company: "We talk inside."

"Ok."

Alexander and Zhao Min shouldered shoulder to shoulder into the marching ant company. Alexander did not have any accidents when he saw the robots walking around the army.

The last time they got the exclusive agency of intelligent robots in Europe, the robots, they also bought a few of them, so it is not surprising that this scene.

"Miss Zhao, what about your boss? Does he want to see me?" Alexander asked.

"He was in the lab. When he did the experimental research, I didn't dare to bother. But you can rest assured that he will definitely come out before you leave." Zhao Min said.

The entire company, dare to disturb Chen Mo to do research, it is estimated that only small fishing. However, Xiao Yu is fine and will not go to Chen Mo’s laboratory.

"It seems that Mr. Chen Mo's success is not accidental, then let's talk about it first." Alexander nodded with a smile, as long as Chen Mo promised to meet him, it was good.

"It is true." Zhao Min agreed.

“Speaking of it, we both have similarities.”

"Oh? How do you say this?" Zhao Min asked.

They are technology companies, and Rothschild Bank is an investment group. One is an industry and the other is an investment consultant. It seems that the nature is not the same.

"We are all ‘a family’.” Alexander laughed.

Understand what he meant, Zhao Min would smile: "It is true."

The marching ant company is a sole proprietorship, and Rothschild Bank is a family business of Roche, and it is indeed a family.

Sticking to family management is one of the reasons for the decline of Rothschild.

At the beginning, they gave up the opportunity to go public, and Citibank and Morgan Group seized the opportunity to raise funds and use huge cash resources to make Roche far behind.

Entering the conference room, two people have also taken seats.

Everyone sat down, and Alexander said: "Miss Zhao, this cooperation, we came with sincerity, how do you want to cooperate?"

chapters.title: Chapter 262: :Cooperation
chapters.body:
Chapter 262: :Cooperation

Unexpectedly, Alexander was so open-minded, and Zhao Min did not care. He took the documents from the little fisherman and handed it to him.

"This is the original agreement with the Altice Group. It has already been negotiated. They have temporarily changed and caused the cooperation to be interrupted. This time you want to cooperate, you may wish to look at this agreement. If accepted, we can cooperate according to the contents of the agreement. You need to add other terms, you can also say it."

When I got the documents, Alexander looked carefully.

The agreement stipulates that Party A can provide Party B with a custom machine for 80% of the market price, while Party B must open all its stores and cooperate with Party A on the store resource channel.

Party A can participate in Party B's numbering and solve the problem of Party B's difficulty in registering and channel dealers' remuneration. Party A is responsible for preventing the separation of the machine card, and the problem of the consumer taking the subsidy of the operator's phone bill.

These are the terms of the agreement. This clause can be said to be equal and mutually beneficial to both parties, and even more beneficial to Party B.

At the beginning, Zhao Min was trying to grab the European market and made a small step when he talked with the Altice Group.

As a result, the Altice Group was insatiable and wanted their shares, and the final cooperation ended.

Seeing this agreement, the normal operators will not refuse, obviously it is a win-win situation.

The Altice Group’s termination of cooperation with the marching ant company made a lot of noise, and he also got news. The cooperation between the Altice Group and the marching ants was interrupted because the consortium behind the Altice Group wanted to acquire shares in the marching ants and was rejected and turned down.

Since then, no operators in the European market have dared to cooperate with the marching ant company, and even no agents. The marching ant company wants to open a branch in Europe and is also obstructed.

Behind this, there are some people who are preventing marching ants from entering the European market.

He is also considered to be sufficient to make this choice. When Roche wants to rise, he must take a little risk. Otherwise, it is almost impossible to rise and restore the glory of the past.

After carefully reviewing the cooperation agreement, Alexander handed the agreement to a think tank study.

"Mr. Alexander, what terms are not satisfactory, can you say it?" Zhao Min said.

"It's very good. To be honest, these terms, I have already moved. The Altice Group has not cooperated with you. It is a big loss for them." Alexander said without hesitation.

Zhao Min smiled a little and couldn't help.

"First of all, we must first ask a question, so as not to get back from time to time. We have just been holding a telecom operator in a small European country. The scale is not as big as Altice, and it is not comparable to Wofengda. So the initial order may not be too big." Alexander Said.

This time, in order to cooperate with marching ants, they only control a telecom operator, the purpose is to make the cooperation between the two parties deeper.

In order to cooperate with the marching ant company, he has indeed made a bloodshed.

"I don't care about your size. I believe in your strength. We can give you the general agent of the European market, just like an intelligent robot." Zhao Min said.

What they need now is a fulcrum in Europe. As long as there is a fulcrum, they have the confidence to shake the market.

The sporadic purchasing staff came to China to buy a butterfly eye phone to go back, but the scale was too small. In order to occupy a larger market, there must be an operating point in Europe to be able to grow bigger.

Although Roche's style is small, the resources accumulated over the years are very large. If there is an opportunity, it will definitely rise. They are not short-term cooperation, but long-term cooperation, and the scale can be developed.

Alexander looked to the side of the think tank.

These people are the think tanks he brought, some of which his father had found him, and some of whom he hired.

He came over this way, these think tanks are not helpful to his decision-making, so this time with the important cooperation of the marching ant company, he brought the most capable people in the think tank.

Seeing the head of the brains nodded slightly, Alexander only turned his attention to Zhao Min: "I said that I came with sincerity. Since there is a ready-made agreement, we will directly use this agreement as a template, and delete some unnecessary terms. By the way, talk about the general agent."

Zhao Min smiled easily: "Yes."

The two began to confirm the terms, and one hour later, based on the original agreement, a new agreement was born.

Some of the terms that apply only to the Altice Group environment have been reduced, adding some of their own terms. The two sides also confirmed that the European distributor of mobile phones will be handed over to Roche at a price that is 20% lower than the market price. The company that cooperated is the company that last acted as an intelligent robot.

The two sides signed the name, stamped the company seal, and the cooperation was officially reached. This cooperation is smoother than imagined.

Alexander’s bet ants, and some of the terms negotiated by the marching ants and the Altice Group are also very good, which in turn has reduced the time for negotiations.

"Happy cooperation, when will Mr. Chen Mo come out?" Alexander and Zhao Min asked with a handshake.

His words just fell, a robot in the conference room said: "President, Mr. has just come out not long, now waiting for you in the office, the gentleman said that after talking about cooperation, you can go to him."

When he heard the translation explaining to him the robot, Alexander looked at Zhao Min.

"It’s really punctual, he came out, let’s go with you now,” said Zhao Min.

"Ok."

Alexander smiled politely, took an assistant, and left Zhao Min to leave the meeting room.

This time, in addition to talking about cooperation, one of the most important things is to see Chen Mo.

The legendary young man, he always wanted to see one side. Come here today, certainly not to miss such a good opportunity.

Chen Mo is sitting in the office, looking at the computer screen, thinking about the design of the micro holographic projector. The color ambiguity problem of the medium holographic projector has been revised, and the ink girl is now making a second sample according to the modification.

When the sample comes out, you can see the results.

He is currently designing a micro-holographic projector, and the technology library requires the design of three holographic projectors for the examination to pass.

Holographic technology problems, he has a scientific library as a reference, and will not encounter too many problems, the problem is to design and improve the projector.

The design problem can only depend on himself.

But fortunately, the computing power of the ink girl, plus his own, the speed is OK. Now the medium holographic projection has been completed, leaving only the design of large holographic projections and miniature holographic projectors.

Large holographic projectors with large projection range and high image quality requirements.

The micro-holographic projector requires no more than five inches. The requirements for spare parts are very precise. If there is a slight deviation, it will fail and the problem will not be small.

But now he is thinking about designing a miniature holographic projector.

"Merg brother, the president with Mr. Alexander, has reached the door." When he was thinking about the design problem, the ink girl interrupted.

"Save these designs, and prepare some tea by the way." Chen Mozhen ink girl turned off the design of the miniature holographic projector, picked up a coat and waited for them to arrive.

chapters.title: Chapter 263: : Less Struggle For A Lifetime
chapters.body:
Chapter 263: : Less Struggle For A Lifetime

Zhao Min said that the heirs of the Roche family met with each other. Chen Mo specially asked the ink girl to collect the information of the Roche family and read it again.

The former Roche family was indeed a sturdy family, but after several wars and changes, it has been subtle, without the glory of the past.

However, even if the style is small, the details are beyond the reach of the general giants. The huge network of people is the capital that the family has survived for hundreds of years without disappearing.

The largest acquisition in China's history, Unicom's acquisition of Netcom for $24 billion; Geely's acquisition of Volvo; Nestlé's $11.9 billion acquisition of Pfizer's children's nutrition business, and Rothschild Bank as trading advisor for these mergers and acquisitions.

In addition, there are many other forms of mergers and acquisitions, all with the shadow of the Roche family.

The Roche family missed the US market in the past and declined. In recent years, the Roche family has actively participated in China's domestic investment, seeking to catch up with the rise of the Chinese market.

This family has a low-key style of work, and every time he experiences a disaster, he can survive as hard as Xiaoqiang. In the financial world, I don’t know the Roche family, just like learning physics doesn’t know Newton.

The Roche family has always relied on consulting business to make money. More than half of the profits are from consulting business around the world.

Now Alexander is in the upper position and actively cooperates with them. It is estimated that he wants to change his mind.

Chen Mo has seen photos of Alexander. In his thirties, he took over a top 20 investment bank in the world. If he does not have the ability, it is impossible.

Dare to cooperate with the marching ant company in the containment of many giants. I have to say that this Alexander is very daring.

During Chen Mosi’s thoughts, Zhao Min and Alexander and others have already arrived at the door of the office.

Alexander saw Chen Mo, and there was an incredible flash in his eyes.

He has seen Chen Mo many times in videos and pictures, but I am younger and more handsome than I see.

It is such a magical young man who propped up the marching ant company in the shortest possible time.

If you say that the scientist who is the most cattle in the 21st century, there will definitely be someone who chooses Chen Mo. Robots, artificial intelligence, computer languages, materials, seismographs, etc., this young man is almost omnipotent.

This is the real top god.

And he also very much appreciates Chen Mo's style of acting, young and not arrogant, which is very similar to him.

"Long-term name, Chen." Alexander is speaking Chinese, not very familiar, it is estimated that he has practiced for a while.

At this moment Alexander took Chen Mo's hand with a smile on his face, like an old man who had not seen for many years.

"You are polite, Mr. Alexander, sitting inside." Chen Mo reached out and took Alexander to the office.

"Mr. Alexander, I will go first if I have something, then we will contact again." After entering the office, Zhao Min said: "Boss, you talk, I am going to deal with the company's affairs, Xiaoyu, you stay to help."

Zhao Min gave a speech and turned and left.

She has a lot of things to deal with, here with Alexander, it is enough to have Chen Mo alone, she does not have to waste time here.

"Chen, Miss Zhao is very smart and capable. You can find her as a president. It is really a vision." Zhao Min left, and Alexander took the lead in finding a topic.

"She really does." Chen Mo smiled.

"If anyone can marry Miss Zhao, I will definitely be able to fight for a lifetime, you are right, Chen." Alexander said half-jokingly.

Chen Mo's cheeks twitched, and the eyes were watching the side, and he saw Xiao Yu's eyes like laughing and laughing. If Alexander knew that the person sitting next to him was his wife, he would dare not say this.

"You don't have to struggle, but unfortunately I have a fiancee." Chen Mo smiled.

When he heard Chen Mo say that he had a fiancee, Alexander was surprised: "Mr. Chen’s fiancee is definitely beautiful, very good?"

"Really." Chen Mo nodded. "She is the most beautiful in my heart."

Hearing Chen Mo's answer, the angle of the small fisherman's mouth floated a little, and his heart was blooming. Even if Chen Mo was deliberately told to her, she still liked to listen.

"When I get married, remember to ask me, don't ask me, I have to run over myself." Alexander smiled.

"I will definitely ask for it."

"Chen, is this robot your new robot?"

Alexander turned his attention to the robot that was being translated by Chen Moandang. This robot is different from the robots they sell on the market.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded gently.

“Is there a new feature added?” Alexander asked.

"No, data and design optimization, it's just my own custom work, it is my robot assistant." Chen Mo said.

The new intelligent robot is smarter, and the internal chip is already a superconducting chip, and the calculation speed is faster. Because of the existence of special room temperature superconducting materials, such robots are unlikely to appear on the market in a short time.

After hearing the assistant's translation, Alexander said, "When is this robot listed?"

"There is no way to mass production," Chen Mo said.

"This style is much better than the first one." Alexander looked at the robot's eyes. Naturally, he didn't know that there was a superconducting chip inside. After regaining his gaze, he said again: "This time, there is one thing."

"You said," Chen Mo said.

"The first thing is investment. Chen, are you interested in investing in the telecommunications industry?" Alexander said: "We are currently holding a telecommunications company. If you want to enter this industry, we can invest together to make this company bigger. ”

“Investing in telecommunications companies?” Chen Mo thought: “If you invest, you can ask Zhao Min. If she thinks it is feasible, the company should invest.”

He does not focus on the telecommunications industry and does not understand the industry.

The marching ant holding has been established for a period of time and is all managed by Zhao Min. The company's investment is also handled by Zhao Min. These things are not interested in understanding management, and they are given authority to Zhao Min to do it. He is only responsible for the signature of the project.

If he feels that some investment is really not feasible, he can also veto.

"Then I will talk back to Miss Zhao again." Alexander smiled. Chen Mo did not refuse face to face, there is still a chance: "Chen, when to go to Europe to play, I must remember to contact me, when I will give you a tour guide." ”

Finding a good person and building a deep personal relationship is an important way for Roche to do business. This time, there is another purpose, that is, to hand over Chen Mo, a friend.

"There will be opportunities." Chen Mo said.

He has no plans to go abroad for the time being.

On several occasions, the killers have found the country, and if they go abroad, no one can guarantee that something will happen. Foreign countries are no more domestic than the world controlled by capital. If the other party wants to find him trouble, it is really troublesome.

The two chat in the office like ordinary friends, are some ordinary things, just to close the relationship, during which Alexander also taught Chen Mo a little investment tips.

After the chat, go out to eat directly.

As the owner, Chen Mo can't slow down each other. Make friends, let alone friends of Roche's old family. When there is a need, the family's connections are very wide. He does not like to participate in the dinner, this time has passed.

The dinner was not finished until the evening, and Chen Mocai and Xiao Yu went back to the villa.

chapters.title: Chapter 264: : Shopping Malls Like Battlefields
chapters.body:
Chapter 264: : Shopping Malls Like Battlefields

When Alexander returned to the room, he sat on the sofa and thought about the next contact with Zhao Min.

In order to cooperate with the marching ant company, they have controlled a telecom operator in a small country in Europe. This time, the first is cooperation, and the second is to seek for marching ants to finance the company and expand the company.

Today, Chen Mo said this, Chen Mo did not agree, and did not refuse, but let himself talk to Zhao Min.

As long as Zhao Min promised, with the funds of the army ants company, their group's network resources will be strong and strong, and they will certainly grow and develop in the future. They will also work more deeply with the army ants.

This time, I came to the army ant headquarters to further strengthen his cooperation with the army ant company.

While thinking, his cell phone suddenly sounded and he looked at the number. The next moment, Alexander's face became unsightly.

"Okay, I will go back as soon as possible."

Hanging up the phone, Alexander frowned, relying on the sofa, his face could not see the anger, after a long time, dialed a phone.

......

Upon returning home, Xiaoyu stood in front of Chen Mo and helped him untie his tie. Her movements are natural and gentle, as if I am used to it.

This is what Xiaoyu often does.

These little things are the flavoring agents of life. Just like Chen Mo also often blows her hair, doing something for each other can also give life a little more fun.

After the shower, the two also sat together on the sofa in the hall.

Xiao Yu is in Chen Mohuai, holding a fruit platter and watching TV. Chen Mo, who is also holding a tablet, is thinking about the design of miniature holographic projectors.

"Husband, incense burner beach villa, the house has been built, ready to start renovation. The style of decoration, if you want to change, I can talk to the construction party." Xiao Yu suddenly opened.

The design of the villa is designed by Chen Mo to help the female woman to design according to his favorite style. After doing the work of designing the drawings and calculating the load-bearing capacity of the house, hand over the drawings to the construction party.

After that, all of them were following the small fishing, and Chen Mo never asked.

The construction party is the China Construction Group of the construction company's army ant company headquarters. I didn't expect the action to be so fast. Now it has begun to be renovated.

"I should ask if you have a style you like. The interior design is designed by the ink girl according to my thoughts. It must be the style I like. If you have an idea and want to change it, you can talk to the construction party, as long as you like it." Chen Mo said.

"Don't change it, what you like is what I like." Xiao Yu took a piece of apple meat and put it in Chen Mo's mouth.

"Then don't have to change." Chen Mo said.

The style of the villa is the style full of futuristic and technological sense, and the theme of the ocean. Xiao Yu likes the sea, so I will definitely like the villa there.

"Why did you want to build a big villa like that?" asked Xiao Yu.

"There is no money for spending more money."

This answer makes Xiao Yu unable to spit.

"And, this villa is used for marriage later."

Hearing the wedding, Xiao Yu stayed, looked up and quietly looked at Chen Mo, seems to be dreaming about something, suddenly laughed silly.

"Your unexpected appearance is to fantasize about wearing a wedding dress?" Chen Mo saw Xiao Yu's silly smile and couldn't help but laugh.

"Nothing." Xiao Yu's face was red, and there was a dim sum.

"You will blush when you lie and be shy, and you will not be able to lie when you lie."

"Bad egg, ignore you." Xiao Yu's careful thoughts were dismantled, snoring and pretending to be angry.

"I will personally design a wedding dress for you in the future." Chen Mo said.

"really?"

Xiao Yu’s voice was filled with surprises, and his eyes were all with small stars. Just now, he was thrown into the clouds.

She does not ask Chen Mo whether it will be designed, but in her mind, Chen Mo is omnipotent, and there are also ink women who are helping.

"I didn't even yell at my bad guys, just ignore me."

"Have I said that? I didn't say it." Xiao Yu blinked and looked forward: "Quickly say, what you just said is true."

"Of course it is true, I promised to let you be the most beautiful bride, this is not to say."

“Reward you for one of my favorite strawberries.”

......

When he first came to the company the next day, Zhao Min brought a message to Chen Mo. Alexander last night, booked a ticket directly back to Europe.

This news is beyond Chen Mo's expectations.

Yesterday they only had a meal at the hotel, and they were prepared to talk to them about the telecom operators today. I didn't expect to go back so soon.

"What happened?" Chen Mo asked Zhao Min.

"He contacted me last night and talked to me about the shareholding of telecom operators, but I refused." Zhao Min said.

"I can't be rejected by you, don't tell me, don't you?"

"Of course it is impossible. I also woke up this morning and received the news." Zhao Min took care of his thoughts, took out his mobile phone and opened the news page and handed it to Chen Mo.

"Last night, a core executive at Rothschild Bank committed suicide. At least the reason for the news was suicide. How specific is not clear.

In the hands of this executive, there is an investment plan of Roche, and all the contents of the plan are leaked, including plans to cooperate with our company. For investment institutions, investment plans are their roots, just like the technology of our company, which is a trade secret.

Roche's main business is now investment and consulting business. This kind of thing happens, and the confidence of investors and customers is a blow. It can be said to be a crisis of trust. Investors are now very dissatisfied with them, especially the few companies in the plan.

It was not long before Alexander took office, so young, and there must be people who refused to accept it at home. I am afraid they will have trouble in the near future. ”

"It seems that things are more complicated than we think." Chen Mo said.

"It's really complicated. Shopping malls are like battlefields. It's the most basic thing. The information is the root of the battlefield. Knowing ourselves and knowing each other can be the generals of Changsheng. When Roche's investment plan is leaked, the map of the troops is lost. Continue. It is very likely that the opponent will dig and slam."

Zhao Min paused and continued.

"And the industry rumors that there are consortia to deal with Roche, their large investment, after the planned leak, there have been some conditions, this is a precursor."

“It’s wonderful.” Chen Mo said: “They plan to have our company, will we have trouble?”

"will not."

Zhao Min shook his head gently and placed a plan in front of Chen Mo.

"This morning, I got the plan of Roche's leak through the channel. That's it. About our company, this is the business of working with us on the mobile phone business, as well as plans for telecom operators.

I refused to control the telecom operator. If the mobile phone is attacked, we are only failing to enter the European market again. It is impossible to talk about the loss and it has no effect on our internal decision-making. We have nothing to do, just eat melons and watch the show. ”

After talking with Zhao Min, Chen Mo returned to the laboratory.

Roche’s business is not something they should manage, and it can’t be controlled. The complicated interests, and casual participation, will only bring trouble.

chapters.title: Chapter 265: : Alexander'S Phone
chapters.body:
Chapter 265: : Alexander'S Phone

Rothschild Bank executives committed suicide, and the investment plan leaked things, continuing to ferment through the Internet and various media.

The mall is an information game, the opponent knows your information, and you don't know the bottom of the opponent, the final result will be miserable. As an investment institution, the investment plan is leaked, which is very serious. Almost naked, bare naked, exposed to the opponent.

In the investment plan of the company, the market value is affected, there are varying degrees of changes, there are serious declines, and there are also rapid rises. After all, they are all companies that are valued by Roche. The prospects are certainly not bad. Ordinary investors will naturally join them.

The marching ant company is a sole proprietorship and has no listing, so it has no real impact. There are several companies that have publicly announced that they will discontinue cooperation with Rothschild Bank and turn their business to another investment bank.

Rothschild Bank is also greatly affected by the credibility of the industry because of this incident.

But for outsiders, this scene is enough to watch.

This family, which has been inherited for more than two hundred years, has always remained mysterious. This incident exposed them to ordinary people and it is impossible to keep a low profile.

Another is the investment plan leak, but also ‘suicide’, just like the spy war TV series. Many people don't believe in such a wonderful story, there will be no deeper inside.

Because there are marching ants in the plan, this news also occupies the headlines of the domestic media.

The marching ant company has always been a hot topic, and this plan leaked, and it also exposed Roche's cooperation with the marching ant company.

Regarding the various rumors of the Internet, the public relations department only issued a statement that was not painful, and other things did not respond.

The main character of this incident is the Roche family.

As a supporting role, the marching ant company has not been affected too much and continues to operate as always. The bigger network paradox, they have personally experienced it, and now this is simply drizzling.

Chen Mo is designing a miniature holographic projector in the office. The medium holographic projector is being remodeled and the sample has not yet come out, so he first designed the micro holographic projector.

"Mer brother, Mr. Li came back with Wang Hai." The ink girl suddenly spoke.

"Oh?"

Chen Mo stopped the action in his hand.

Wang Hai, they were taken away by Li Chengzhi. It has been half a month and finally came back today.

"Take them directly."

Not long after, the enchantress robot took Li Chengzhi and others into Chen Mo’s office. With him, there are eight people, Wang Hai and Yangge Luoyong.

All the staff arrived.

"Boss." Wang Hai saw Chen Mo and gave him a ceremony.

"You're welcome." Chen Mo looked at four people: "How do you feel?"

"It feels very good now." Wang Hai said confidently.

The other three also followed.

They were scared by this potential development. At first, they were a little bit embarrassed, but after they actually used the potion, they knew the horror of this potion.

Now they feel that they are stronger than the peak state before retirement.

"That's good." Chen Mo nodded and looked at Li Chengzhi: "You go down first, and I have a little talk with Li instructor."

A few people nodded, knowing the next words, they were not convenient to listen, they turned and left.

When they left, Li Chengzhi sat on the sofa and his face became dignified: "The test of the drug was very successful. After the test of this time, the results showed that in addition to the development potential, the drug can increase the immunity and vitality of the human body. Is..."

Seeing the appearance of Li Chengzhi, Chen Mo is also serious. This is what he took out. Looking at Li Chengzhi’s appearance, it seems that there is something wrong with it.

"It can extend life," Li Chengzhi said.

"Is there still such a thing?"

Chen Mo was slightly surprised. It was a real accident. The technology he got from the technology library did not record the characteristics that can increase the life.

“A few days ago, the potion was used on an old head who was close to the oil.”

Li Chengzhi was very cautious and his voice was deliberately depressed.

"The old headmaster, who stayed in bed when he was young, was bedridden last year. A few days ago, he was judged by a doctor, he left after a week. Finally, he and his son agreed to become a volunteer. .

After using the medicine, I can get out of bed and it is still fine. The doctor checks and judges that he can live for a while, and how long it will take before he can know. However, Wu Bing said that according to his physical condition, there is no accident, no more than two years. ”

"Not bad." Chen Mo nodded.

It can increase life for more than a year, and it has not increased the horror of hundreds of years, but this is an extra surprise. This pharmacy will not work for the second time, so it will only increase once in a lifetime, and it cannot grow indefinitely.

Otherwise, this medicine is really against the sky.

Chen Mok knows that in the science and technology library, there are technologies and drugs that can increase the life span of human beings. It’s just that he hasn’t gotten such a high right now.

"Yes? Countless medical technology, let the current people, the average life expectancy is extended a little, you have this anti-day effect when you come out with this medicine. You just said it is good? Now people who know this news are The password is closed."

"So, tell me?"

Li Chengzhi is speechless.

"You are the inventor of the pharmacy. You have the right to know the water. If you need research afterwards, you will need your help, and then tell you, it is not very good."

"In advance, I don't have much time to help. The last time I went to the capital to explain the technology to you, it is very interesting. I have a lot of research topics now. I don't know how to do it. You are so many experts, let me help. Can't say it," Chen Mo said.

He must give Li Chengzhi a vaccination in advance, or else he will come to find himself, then he will not have to study.

"Don't worry, I said maybe, not necessarily, at most, just answer a few questions."

Li Chengzhi knows that there will be such a result and he does not care.

"The other thing is that since your situation and identity are very special, Wang Hai has also been a special soldier. We gave Wang Hai a special treatment to protect you."

Li Chengzhi has a ‘gun’ gesture, and the answer is self-evident.

"That's a good relationship." Chen Mo grinned. "If you want to let the four of them sing Lanlan, they will stay. During this time, I will like them."

These people are all elites in the elite. The more you come, the better. Chen Mo will not be too much.

"They can't do it." Li Chengzhi shook his head. "They are in special circumstances. The first batch of super soldiers are still in the exploratory stage. They have to go back, train and quest to explore the potential of this new service. When they get to that stage, if they are willing to come out, I will introduce it here, they are not willing to come out, and the future of the troops is bright."

"Okay." Chen Mo said helplessly.

Chen Mo and Yangge met a few people. After bidding farewell, Li Chengzhi took them away.

Wang Hai was also called into the office by Chen Mo.

"Your business, Li instructor told me. Starting today, your salary is increased by 50%. Work is still the original work, by the way, in the company's security team, find a few seedlings to train." Chen Mo said.

The things he encountered were not once or twice. The first time he almost got an accident. So he always pays attention to the security issue.

"Understand." Wang Hai several people focus on the head.

They all know that Chen Mo is trusting them and will let them contact the secret medicine so secretly.

If they don't follow Chen Mo, they just go home. When they are ordinary people, they may marry and have children, and run for the family. They can have the current situation, which is given by Chen Mo.

The best way to repay Chen Mo is to protect his personal safety.

After chatting with Wang Hai, Chen Mo continued to start his own work. But not long after, the ink girl prompted him to have a call.

Alexander's phone.

chapters.title: Chapter 266: : The Answer To The Riddle
chapters.body:
Chapter 266: : The Answer To The Riddle

Now that Roche is in trouble, Alexander also called him at this time, which is a bit interesting. Want to ask him to help through the storm? Or is there anything else?

Chen Mo thought about it, or chose to connect.

"Chen, hello." Chen Moyi connected, Alexander in the video smiled and greeted Chen Mo.

"Hello, Mr. Alexander."

Chen Mo called the robot to translate it when needed.

"Don't bother you?"

"No."

"That's good, I didn't say goodbye last time, I am sorry. I have encountered a little trouble here. You should have heard it, and I will solve it soon. I will visit you again."

"Welcome at any time." Chen Mo smiled.
