"I sent you a small gift. Have you received it?" Alexander continued after listening to the translation.

"Small gift? No." Chen Mo shook his head. He did not receive anything from Alexander.

"That should have not arrived yet. I just contacted Zhao. She said that she received it and should send it to you soon." Alexander said: "That is my family's 'local product', I hope you like it."

The last three words are spoken in Chinese, and the pronunciation is not accurate, but Chen Mo can understand.

"Local products?"

Chen Mo wondered what the ‘local product’ of the Alexander family was.

"Yes." Alexander said: "I will visit you again soon, and we can continue to communicate, Chen, and I will bother you again."

"I look forward to your arrival." Chen Mo smiled.

Hanging up Alexander's phone, Chen Mo was thinking about what Alexander said about souvenirs.

Just did not want to understand, Zhao Min went into Chen Mo's office. Behind her, Wang Hai holds a delicate box.

Wang Hai put the box and turned and left.

"This is a gift from the Alexanders." Zhao Min said.

"This is what he said about souvenirs?" Chen Mo looked at the exquisite box with the Roche logo on it.

"Local products?"

"Just hang up with him, you come over, he said that he sent a little more of his family's 'local products'." Chen Mo learned Alexander's accent.

Zhao Min giggled: "He is right, it is indeed his native product."

"What?" Chen Mo curiously asked.

"Installation. Forced, Lafite Castle."

"Lafite is the souvenir of his family? Yes, I forgot that the winery is his home. This native product is really bullish." Chen Mo smiled and said: "Give me a bottle of 82 years of Lafite."

Looking at his appearance, Zhao Min is speechless and directly chooses to ignore it. This goods actually learns to gamble God...

"This wine is also more than 100,000 bottles, one bottle and one bottle. These two boxes are also collected by Alexander. It is definitely a treasure in the treasures. Many local tyrants are proud of the 82 years of Lafite. You take it well. Then, after coming to the house at home, take it out and force it."

"How much does it cost to sell this?" Chen Mo asked with his chin.

"The people who can collect this kind of wine are generally people who don't need money. These Lafite are the best of them. This box, one million, absolutely someone wants it. If you want to sell it, I will help you. "Zhao Min said.

Sure enough, poverty will limit the imagination. It is hard to ask for a bottle. This is a box, which is really not comparable to the average person.

But who is the boss of Lafite?

"All sent over, still keep, I heard that red wine can be beautiful, take it back and give it to Xiaoyu, she should like it."

Zhao Min rolled his eyes, and his feelings were kept only to please the little fish, and he was fed a dog food invisibly.

"Do you want to bring a few bottles back?" Chen Mo asked.

"I still have a box there, he sent two boxes, you and I are one person."

"This bribe is two. Isn't it what he needs us to help? Take the soft hand and eat the mouth of the people, this Alexander, the abacus is quite big."

"It is impossible to let us help them out of the predicament. He also understands that we are only cooperative, not a partner of life and death. He also understands this."

Zhao Min shook his head.

"Alexander is now a real pressure mountain. The investment plan is yellow. Some people in the family want to go up. Outside the family, there are consortia who want to attack them. Internal and external troubles. This is a good deal for us, because next, we may be his important cooperation. partner."

"There is another important thing, that is, the disclosure of Roche executives has become more and more interesting. There are traces that some people are ready to deal with Roche."

"Who?" Chen Mo also came to interest.

"Altice and orange, the two major groups are involved, preparing to suppress the telecom company that Roche has just acquired. It is estimated that Roche is going to make the company bigger and grab their cake."

"Is it pressed before I started?"

"Roche is a sleeping wolf. It is too late to wait until they get bigger and suppress. These years, the Roche has accumulated too many contacts. Now when the coaching change, the investment plan leaks, the family within the power, can be said to be the weakest. When you operate properly, this century-old family can fall apart.

In addition, there are introductions in the leaked investment plan, and Roche wants to pull our company to participate in telecom operations. And the plan is detailed, although we refuse, but others don't know, we definitely think we will participate.

We are sitting in China's huge cash, trapped in China, and a nest of powerful aggressive army ants. Once we have huge cash inflows, plus Roche's network of resources, you say they are afraid of being robbed of cakes? ”

Zhao Min analyzed the powerful relationship among them to Chen Mo.

"Apple mobile phone in France only orange version, we are Apple's biggest rival, Altice Group not to mention, the last cooperation failed, friends become enemies. Do not suppress, let Roche become bigger, is to hit their faces.

In addition to these two, there are also Pioneer Group, BlackRock Group and Samsung. I will not say Samsung, you should know. Pioneer Group and BlackRock are the largest private equity funds in the United States. They all have one thing in common, both holding apples.

Pioneer Group is Apple's largest shareholder, and BlackRock's founding partner, Susan, is Apple's largest individual shareholder and Apple's board of directors. There are signs that the two are preparing to attack Roche in financial investment, and there are other small savvy pigs who see the wind. ”

Zhao Min does not say this, Chen Mo really does not know the relationship is so complicated.

"So, Roche's dilemma, is there a reason for us?" Chen Mo asked.

Listening to the situation that Zhao Min is analyzing now, he also understands why so many companies are not willing to cooperate with them.

Because of the nature of their company, and the Chinese enterprise, plus some political factors, many capitals are vigilant to exclude them. So the company that works with them will become the target of capital.

"There is a part of our competition with Apple, and we have made a foreshadowing. Our company has entered the international market. This is a stimulating factor. Roche and our cooperation are our springboards for entering the international arena. Now we plan to disclose them. They are inevitably targeted by our opponents. This is why many people are not willing to cooperate with us in the mobile business. Our opponents are too strong.

But not all of us, the Roche family also has some commercial rivals. And most importantly, Roche's family training: As long as you are united, you will be invincible; the day you break up will be the beginning of your loss of prosperity. ”

"What do you mean?" Chen Mo seems to hear the taste of this.

"It's what you think, I don't think that Roche's important investment plan will be taken by a high-level executive casually and leaked out at such a critical time. Shopping malls such as battlefields, this battlefield is killing blood. Many things are mysteries, and it is always a mystery. Only the authorities know the answer to the riddle."

chapters.title: Chapter 267: : Daring
chapters.body:
Chapter 267: : Daring

London, England, inside an old castle estate.

Alexander sat in the study and looked at the information on hand, his face was not very good.

The ‘suicide’ person, called Aide, is a senior bank member who was involved in the development of investment plans. It stands to reason that there is only a part of the plan in his hands, and the fact is that the complete investment plan broke out from his hands.

There is a problem here.

And there is no direct evidence that Ed has any tendency to commit suicide.

A family is complete, healthy, and people who follow him are less likely to be short of money and have no psychological problems.

But he is committing suicide.

As for the information disclosure, after committing suicide, or after his killing, the murderer leaked the information. Even he does not know the answer. Find the best master of the case, the final conclusion is suicide.

It took a long time for him to take over the banking group, and now it is such a big mistake. This is a very serious matter.

Every family has a difficult experience, although the ancestral training makes them unable to fight, but like their family, this kind of thing is inevitable.

Bank financial business is the most important business of their family.

The profits of the winery business, the jewellery business and the art business will be returned to the banking group for investment. So in charge of banking business, it controls more than half of Roche.

Anyone wants more power in their hands?

There are many people staring at his position, the winery business, the heir to the business of Lafite, his cousin Saskia; the heir to the diamond business, his cousin James; and the art business The other cousins and some uncles.

His cousins are not as weak as they are.

The cousin Saskia is the first female head of their family's winery business. The family biography does not pass on the male's family training. Although it exists in name only, when it chooses the heir, there will be more or less tendency. Saskia can be the first female head, and the ability can be imagined.

His brother James, his wife is the daughter of the American Hilton family, and the two marriages. When he first became the head of the banking group, the connections and support behind him can be imagined.

If this matter is not handled well, the family will be suspected of his ability, and his situation will be even more difficult.

While he was thinking about how to go next, a gray-haired, tuxedo, white-groomed butler took a document into the study and gently put the information in front of Alexander.

"Young Master, this is the latest information you need. I checked Ed's situation carefully. During this time, he did not contact any suspicious individual, there was no abnormal behavior, and there was no abnormality in the call history. There is no indication that he Will commit suicide."

"Yeah." Alexander nodded and took the information. There was no accident in the words of the old butler. It was expected that this would be the result.

Now he faces another dilemma.

After the last acquisition of shares in telecommunications companies, there is currently not much mobile capital available.

Although the marching ant company promised to cooperate in the mobile phone business, it refused to participate in the telecom operation.

If the investment plan is not leaked, they can conduct investment business normally, but now they are being targeted, many investments have been aborted, or they have to be postponed.

"What is the movement on the other side of the family?" Alexander asked.

"There is not much movement, but the outside world is quite big. There is a rumor outside. If you do not handle this incident well, the family may be replaced by a management bank.

Some old people in the family are very dissatisfied with this incident. They have your father pressed, and for the time being they dare not go too far. However, you need to deal with this matter. It is best to make some achievements during this time and let them be convinced, otherwise it may be a little troublesome. Many people in the family objected to the cooperation with marching ants. Said the old butler.

"What did your father say?"

"The lord did not say anything about the cooperation between you and the marching ants. There was no clear consent and no objection. The investment plan leaked things and did not speak." The old housekeeper said.

"Yeah." Alexander said silently.

Seeing Alexander's appearance, the old housekeeper could not make up his mind.

For their family, in their thirties, in charge of the family's main investment bank, Alexander is still young. However, Alexander's father used his influence to suppress some of the dissatisfaction within the family, which allowed Alexander to go up.

Hesitating, the old butler still chose to open.

The age difference between the two is too great. He is an old antique of the last era. Many opinions can only be provided by Alexander.

“There are a lot of troubles in the family now, some of which are brought in by cooperation with marching ants. For example, the Altice Group and Orange on the bright side, as well as Apple, Pioneer Group, etc.”

Alexander listened quietly and motioned him to continue.

"If you can publicly terminate the cooperation with the marching ants, perhaps the pressure outside the family will not be so great." The old butler said cautiously.

In the known situation, there are several who suppress them, and some have seen the capital of the rudder. He is not in trouble, he is really troublesome.

And because the opponents recruited by the marching ants, none of them are vegetarian.

"There is no need to say this, and the cooperation with the marching ants will not be interrupted, only deeper." Alexander spoke, his voice was unquestionable.

The situation has been made, and he regrets it now, and he never regrets his decision.

When the family lost the US market and declined, these years, China's rise, they value this young market, so the business and investment in China is also growing.

The ancestors of their family bought the Lafite winery 150 years ago.

But in the past 150 years, Lafite has not earned a penny for their family.

This situation has been greatly changed because of China. The Chinese wine consumption market has turned their family's wine industry into an unprecedented profitable industry.

In these years, the status of the wine business has also increased in the family.

He is also optimistic about the Chinese market and enterprises, and in the Chinese market, there is a very special company. The marching ant, the nest of young ants, allowed him to see a unicorn with unlimited potential. So under pressure, he decided to cooperate with marching ants.

No one eats crabs, he is the first person to eat crabs.

After seeing Chen Mo last time, he was more determined to cooperate with the army ants. The young man who is younger than him, with every kind of manner, carries a sense of calmness and self-confidence, even if he is not sighing.

Although he is not too old, he still has a lot of readings. He feels that he will never look at the wrong person.

The gambling success, he is the legend of the family Zhongxing, in the family history; failure, he is not a family-style sinner.

Staying timid, starving and timid, this is the mall.

In the current situation, the probability of finding Ed's death is getting smaller and smaller. Even if there are black hands behind the scenes, then the long-term re-emergence, their losses, can not be recovered.

It's better to spend time on what to do.

"Arrange, I will go to China again tomorrow," Alexander said.

"Young master, will this time come over again, will it bring more trouble?" asked the old housekeeper.

“Is there any trouble, more trouble than the leak of the current investment plan?”

chapters.title: Chapter 268: :Very Smooth
chapters.body:
Chapter 268: :Very Smooth

Alexander once again came to China, and did not deliberately conceal the itinerary, but a high-profile choice for the reporter to expose.

Now that Rothschild Bank is on the verge of turmoil, the investment plan leaks almost the headlines of the financial and financial media. Numerous attentions have made this mysterious family exposed once in the public eye.

As the head of Roche's main investment bank, Alexander's actions are naturally subject to the attention of all parties.

Among the plans for exposure, there are cooperation plans for cooperation with marching ants. Many people speculate that this time, Alexander is likely to seek cooperation in marching ants to help them out of the woods.

Although Roche’s current influence in the financial world is minimal, the impact of the marching ant company is not small. The marching ants have caused the stock prices of several major technology giants in the United States to fluctuate drastically. This is just enough to see the influence of marching ants.

In the event that the two companies are truly united, the capital community may be subject to a storm of change.

Alexander's car has arrived outside the headquarters, and you can see the headquarters of the marching ant company with a futuristic design.

At this time, his eyes were calm. Despite the difficulties, he knows that keeping calm can solve problems faster.

This time, the army ant company is taking risks.

After the investment plan was exposed, other companies did not say that the opponents of the marching ant company looked at them at Roche.

There are also many people who oppose him on the family side, so his decision does not receive much support.

If he loses, he will lose the status of the heirs of the banking group; if he wins, he may once again push Roche to the position of a world-class consortium, and he will become a legend.

His decision is to carry out a huge game. What he is thinking now is how to become a winner in this game.

Zhao Min had already waited for him at the door of the company. When he saw Alexander, he simply said hello and took him to the company reception room.

"What is the important thing for Mr. Alexander to come over this time?" Zhao Min said.

"The last time I was in a hurry, I didn't make it clear, Rois's cooperation, I want to talk to General Zhao again," Alexander said.

He said that Rois is the telecom operator that they are holding.

After listening to his words, Zhao Min shook his head: "Our company does not intend to hold Rois, you don't have to waste time."

Zhao Min’s words are unquestionable, and Alexander also heard her firmness and sighed softly.

It is not that they can't support the operation of telecommunications, but they want to grow fast and must have financial support. Marching ants are the least money-rich companies, but they are not interested in this.

"Tell that about the next cooperation," Alexander said.

"You said."

"Mobile phone business cooperation, I want to speed up, this time, come to you to place orders in advance, the first batch of one million butterfly eyes, butterfly, one million butterfly eye generation."

"Yes." Zhao Min did not hesitate to agree.

The marching ants have not released new phones for some time, but for the users, the butterfly eye series is still very popular.

Unparalleled design, the safest and smoothest marching ant system, waterproof design, long battery life, voice intelligence, etc.

A number of advantages in one, creating a pioneer model, in addition to no comprehensive screen, the other is impeccable. The mobile phones that are released now are not innovative, they are all new bottles of old wine, so the butterfly eye is still the first choice for many people to change machines.

"Then we can talk about the proxy rights of your other products in Europe, such as office equipment, computer systems," Alexander said.

"I am very happy." Zhao Min smiled.

Someone opened the international market for them, she is naturally very happy, and it is still a wide family of Roche.

The two were discussing about the agency rights of the marching ants, and the discussion ended two hours later.

Alexander's meaning is obvious, that is, he wants to cooperate deeply with the marching ants. In this way, he almost wants to create the image of the agent of the marching ants in Europe, and Zhao Ming has read it together with detailed plans.

Zhao Min’s thoughts on Alexander will naturally not be rejected.

"Miss Zhao, Chen?" Alexander and Zhao Min talked about the cooperation before they spoke.

"He is in the laboratory now, and today there is a very important experiment, it can't come." Zhao Min said.

"That's a pity. Help me and Chen Wensheng. I have a hurry at home. I can't stay too long. I will come over and ask him to drink again next time."

"Okay, I will convey it." Zhao Min said.

"Happy cooperation, Miss Zhao."

“Happy cooperation.”

After leaving the marching ant company, Alexander gave a sigh of relief. Acting for the army ant products is very smooth, he knows the blanks of marching ants in this field, others are afraid to fill this gap, he came.

Anyway, breaking the jar and breaking it, gambling is enough.

Now the family is eating the ancestors, never thought about contacting other fields, so he decided to be a pathfinder.

......

first building.

On the experimental table in front of Chen Mo, there is a laptop-sized instrument. This instrument is an improved medium holographic projector.

Next to him, Zhao Min and Xiao Yu were two people. After Alexander left the company, Chen Mo called them over.

"Ink girl, activate the projector." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, Mom."

When the words of the ink girl fell, the projector lit up and the projection of the ink girl appeared above. The appearance of the ink girl is only a little girl, dressed in Chinese clothes, looks very smart, a typical costume little girl.

After his improvement, the quality of the projector's imaging has now improved. The projection is very real, and it is no different from real people. It looks like a fairy floating in midair.

The fields of holographic technology, including medicine, exhibitions, stage programs, scene interactions, etc. This kind of technology, including the future, whoever masters this technology, will take the lead in the future of advanced technology.

This technology is now being studied in various countries around the world.

In 2014, Israel developed a medical 3D holographic projection. Through this technology, doctors can use holographic projection to simulate the operation of the operating table, creating a possible platform for remote surgery.

In addition, holographic technology is more used in various stage programs. For example, through holographic technology, a 'resurrection' of a deceased star is performed on the stage.

However, due to the high cost, it cannot be fully popularized.

For ordinary people, this technology can only be understood through movies and the Internet, and it is impossible to access this technology in daily life.

This situation will be changed by him in the near future.

"This is the improved holographic projector, and the imaging quality is close to reality." Chen Mo said.

Zhao Min did not object, although it did not reach the point of being fake, but it seems to be very solid, much better than the last time I saw it.

Xiao Yu was curious, his fingers touched the projection, but he reached out and felt like the palm of his hand was on the open flashlight.

"Little sister, do you want to touch me?" The ink girl looked at Xiaoyu.

It is not the position where the projection can see the small fishing, but the projection is controlled by the ink female. Through the camera in the laboratory, the position of the small fishing is known. In order to be more like normal communication, the ink woman will control the image to look at the small fishing.

When I heard the ink girl, Xiao Yu spit out his tongue: "I want to see if I can meet it."

"I am light now, there is no physical sense, I can't catch it, I can't touch it." The ink girl said: "If Xiao Yu's sister wants to experience, try holographic interaction."

When the ink girl finished, her projection disappeared, and a light curtain of a 'holographic desktop' appeared on it, with several icons for software applications floating.

"The projector is equipped with light-sensing interactive technology, as well as artificial intelligence, which can realize touch interaction, voice control, etc. You can click on the holographic desktop." Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu.

Little fish nodded, clicked on the ant browser icon, just hit the floating icon projection. The scene of the holographic desktop changes immediately, and a picture popping out of the ant browser appears.

"In addition to holographic projection, it also has the function of naked eye 3D, you can see the effect of 3D without 3D glasses."

Chen Mo opened the holographic desktop and prepared the 3D movie.

“A projector with eight 3D holographic projection chips, which can control the brightness, color and angle of each beam. It can be used as a holographic display or as a display for TV computers. Of course, it can also be used as a projector. The screen of the cinema.

The holographic projector works in a single operation, and the maximum screen size is 50 inches*35 inches. The two holographic projectors are linked to each other, and the picture can reach 3m*2.5m. Ten linked projections, the effect can be compared to the screen of the cinema. ”

“How high is the cost?”

Zhao Min looked at the almost real movie screen on the display.

"The main cost is the three-dimensional holographic projection chip, and the micro-laser projection system composed of micro-lasers. I have both sets of technologies. If mass production, the cost is not expensive, and each holographic projector is more than 7,000."

Chen Mo gave a brief introduction to Zhao Min. He was responsible for research and development. As for making money, Zhao Min was responsible.

“Is the technology mature?” asked Zhao Min.

"almost."

"Then I am starting to build a production line."

Zhao Min’s heart was at this moment, and she seemed to see scenes that only appeared in science fiction movies, appearing in the lives of ordinary people.

"This is the design and assembly technology of the non-core components of the projector, the core chip and the micro laser projection system. When you need it, tell me, how to operate it and give it to you." Chen Mo took out a hard disk. Handed over to Zhao Min: "How is the cooperation with Roche?"

Zhao Min smiled and said: "It's very smooth. Next, you can watch the show."

chapters.title: Chapter 269: :Gambling
chapters.body:
Chapter 269: :Gambling

The news of the cooperation between Alexander and the marching ants was not concealed. The first time Alexander returned to Europe, the news was made public.

A stone stirs up a thousand waves.

When the news of the full cooperation with the marching ants came out, the media was in turmoil. In addition, Alexander also announced that it will establish a regional agency network throughout Europe.

Alexander's behavior was almost to make Roche an agent of the marching ant company in Europe. Because of Roche's action, the plan to let the capital block the marching ant company completely blows.

On the Internet, Roche’s coverage has been overwhelming, including the world’s major media. Many platforms have asked economic experts to judge Roche's situation, both good and bad, but more people choose negative evaluation to enlarge.

"Roche will become the squad of army ants! 》

"Alexander will lead Roche into the abyss. 》

"Joint marching ants? It is an opportunity for the rise of Roche, or a shortcut to destruction. 》

"Short eyes?" Roche lost the watermelon and picked the sesame seeds! 》

......

The mainstream voice is all about this cooperation. As for whether anyone is guiding the public opinion in secret, it is not known.

Shortly after the sound of singer decline, the mobile ant company's butterfly eye series mobile phone appeared in the advertisements of various platforms.

Many people have seen butterfly-eye phones on the Internet, but there are no butterfly eyes for sale in Europe. They can only be purchased on some purchasing platforms or other channels. Therefore, the butterfly eye mobile phone in Europe is much more expensive than the official price.

Many people like the design style and shape. They have also heard of the powerful performance of the butterfly eye phone, such as the most secure smart phone operating system, the most advanced intelligent assistant.

Although Hua Wei and Samsung's mobile phones are also equipped with the intelligent assistants of the marching ant company, the operating system and design style are still different from the butterfly eye.

The flagship machine released by marching ants a year ago is still performing better than the flagship machines of those mobile phone companies. This is the gap.

Capital fights have little impact on ordinary people.

The butterfly eye mobile phone has just been listed in Europe and has been snapped up by consumers. Because the first batch is limited, and half of them are customized machines of Rois Telecom acquired by Roche, they can't grab mobile phones. If they like butterfly-eye phones, they can only buy custom machines.

The telco users are steadily improving, which is a very good sign.

At the same time, the termite system and a series of corporate office equipment of the marching ant company also appeared in the office procurement orders of many small and medium-sized enterprises by the characteristics of the most secure office system.

In the past, many companies wanted to buy equipment, but they didn't have it in China. They were small businesses. The small batch of imports was very troublesome and the price was very expensive. Now Roche has brought these things into the European market.

The termite system of the marching ant company once appeared when the ‘clown virus’ threatened the world’s cybersecurity. It was so eye-catching that many people speculated that the clown virus was deliberately released by the marching ant company.

Although there are many rumors, they have not been confirmed.

The only certainty is that the safety factor of termite system is indeed higher than Mac and windows, and after the development of marching ant company, various office ecology has become mature, and artificial intelligence assistants have improved office efficiency, which has become the first choice for many companies. .

After the various equipment of the marching ant company entered the European market, it immediately formed a wind and began to sweep.

But the misfortunes depend on each other

After Alexander’s high-profile announcement of cooperation with marching ants, there were also some cases in Roche.

At this time, in the conference room of the Roche Family Estate, everyone wears formal family costumes and looks cautious. This is their family meeting. The participants are all the most important members of the family. They usually only appear when they have a major family decision.

Alexander is one of the heirs and is also at the conference table. Next to him is his father, David Rothschild.

At the conference table, there are his uncles and his family's heirs in various industries, his brothers and sisters.

Many people's faces are not very good, and they look at Alexander from time to time.

Acting for the company's products, including intelligent robots, mobile phones, computers, etc., Roche did make some money.

But their losses are much more than the profits they earn.

After Alexander announced that he would help marching ants enter the European market, their investment in various industries was attacked by unidentified consortiums and suffered heavy losses.

In addition to the exposed investment plans, some of the most successful investment projects have also been aborted because of the unclear consortium's involvement.

As those media have said, this is obviously a lost watermelon picking sesame.

The products of the marching ant company, they only have the agency right, they can only get a small profit, and the big head is still in the hands of the marching ant company.

If there is a share of the marching ant company, they can use the power of the family to help the marching ants enter the international market, but they do not.

Investing, they can take possession of the company's shares, and they are not afraid that the other company will interrupt their cooperation. Now different, marching ants can change agents at any time. At that time, they have lost their wife and lost their soldiers.

Compared to the consortium giants, Roche can only be regarded as an ant. Nowadays, many investments have already been made. In the short term, they may earn a little more. In a short period of time, without a decent investment, they will not be able to expand their connections. Roche’s situation will become more and more difficult. This is not a good thing.

"The investment plan leaks, we can not pursue, but the banking group must interrupt the cooperation with the marching ants." The opening is Alexander's uncle Eric, the former head of the Lafite Rothschild Group.

“Why?” Alexander asked without hesitation.

"You said." Eric looked at his daughter Saskia and James opposite.

"Working with the marching ant company, let us be targeted by the big consortiums, our family's current situation can't resist the impact of those big consortia. Our plan to acquire a French winery has been successful, but the BlackRock Group participated. After that, our acquisition failed,” Saskia said.

"And De Beers is preparing to acquire a newly discovered diamond mine in South Africa. It has been under negotiation and because of the participation of Pioneer Group, they have interrupted negotiations with us." Sitting opposite him, James, the heir to the jewelry business, also spoke.

After Saskia and James spoke of the situation, the heads of other industries on the field also said what they were facing.

Although it was not caused by cooperation with the marching ant company, the leakage of investment plans and the wave of media reports have already had a significant impact on their business.

"If you can get the shares of the marching ant company, we can do everything for you. After all, it is for the family, but now it is just an agent. Some things, we don't need to say, you should understand." said an old man sitting on the road. .

"Yes, if you can get the shares of the marching ant company, even if we sell our company's business, we will help you. But for a little agency fee, we offended a lot of people, family business losses, plus investment plans It was leaked out by you, and now the family is struggling. If this continues, the situation of our family will only be more troublesome." Another old man also echoed.

"What do we use to exchange with the army ants? The shares of the bank? The shares of the winery? Change to us, will we exchange? This request will only make the other party resentful, don't forget how the army ants were and the Altice Group Fallen.

The group is in my hands and I have an obligation to make it develop better. I have my plan. If I stop the cooperation because of a little external force, what do people think of us Roche, and others will dare to cooperate with me? ”

Alexander spoke retorted, and David on the side kept silent, just listening quietly.

"This is your decision is not mature, many people see the potential of marching ants, but why no one cooperates with them? If you cooperate, you still get us? There are deeper things you have not seen, you still It’s too young,” Eric said.

Seeing that Eric spoke again, everyone else set his sights on Alexander. Because Lafite earns more money, the status of the family is also increasing, so the most talkative on the field is Eric.

Alexander's face is very bad. Eric said that he is young, meaning that he is not capable enough to manage the banking group.

"They don't cooperate because they are too greedy, they want to compromise the army ants, and hand over the shares. In their eyes, the apples that others have planted should be given to them, or they will destroy the apple trees.

No one wants to cooperate with the marching ants in depth. We cooperate with them. This means that we are more sincere. Why can't we think this is an opportunity? ”

"The opportunity of the agent? A proxy right, you can get it at any time. The marching ants can also be replaced at any time. What else do you have?"

Eric said unceremoniously.

"Our winery's annual profits are left to you to manage. Now you use the money to mess up and let us suffer losses. Is this the opportunity you said?

If you do not interrupt the cooperation with the marching ant company, or you give up the position of the banking group, otherwise, our group's annual profit will be developed by ourselves. ”

"I agree with Eric, either you give up the position of the banking group or interrupt the cooperation with the marching ants. If you continue, it will only cause the family to suffer greater losses. We will also consider whether it is going to make the company's profits, I will be handed over to you." Another old man is attached.

"I mean I don't interrupt the cooperation, I have to separate." Alexander turned black.

"Okay, stop."

David, who has not spoken, is quiet, and everyone on the field is quiet. They have been giving David pressure all the time, just want him to express his position. This incident has already hurt their interests, and they cannot be indifferent.

"Give him two years, if within two years, he did not control the situation, I can help him to make the position of the heirs of the bank group, how?" David swept on the face of everyone on the field. .

"In our current situation, after two years, I am afraid that everything is late, up to one year." Eric said: "A year later, he only needs to increase the bank group's profits by 20%, even if he succeeds."

“20% is too high a year?” David frowned, and he had a 10% profit a year. It is already very high, and 20% is already very scary.

"Not high, don't forget, the winery and the jewelry industry have lost a lot because of this. Doesn't he say that he has his own plans? This shows that 20% is not difficult."

"One and a half years, I will increase the bank's profits by 25%. If I can't do it, I will automatically quit and you will be selected by someone else," Alexander said.

"can."

Some of the old people on the field seemed to have achieved their goals, and their mouths were full of smiles. They forced the palace for this gamble.

chapters.title: Chapter 270: : Seeing The Future
chapters.body:
Chapter 270: : Seeing The Future

After the meeting of the Roche family meeting, Alexander followed his father to leave the family conference hall and walked back to the study.

On the way, Alexander did not look very good. This time the other departments gave them tremendous pressure, even at the expense of using the separation, so that he had to compromise.

Roche can be passed down for two hundred and fifty years. The great reason is that the ancestral training allowed them to unite and banned fighting.

Although there are some things that are inevitable, they will not be too much. If necessary, there will be people who will sacrifice their own interests.

He is the man now.

But other departments do have enough reasons to force the palace, because of their reasons, resulting in the loss of the family's overall business.

"Father, I am very sorry about this." When he entered the study, Alexander spoke.

"What have you done wrong?" David asked without hesitation.

"I..." Alexander frowned and shook his head: "I didn't do anything wrong."

"Since I have not done anything wrong, I don't have to say "sorry" to me." David said calmly, with the majesty of the superiors in his voice, which is the majesty that has been immersed in the high age.

"I should not promise them," Alexander said.

He knows that if they lose the banking group, they will lose the position of the Roche family power center. For them, this is very bad.

"Then you have the confidence to increase bank profits by 25% in a year and a half?"

"To be honest, not too sure."

A bank, a year's profit growth of 10% is very powerful, but 25% is too high, stock market and market conditions are not good, negative investment growth is possible.

He promised a 25% increase in profits, which has reached a height of terror.

"If you don't have confidence in yourself, you can't retreat now, and now you can get back a lot of benefits. If you get rid of it, you will have nothing." David said: "The decision makers have no confidence in their decisions." Why let others help you create miracles?"

"I want to give it a try." Alexander firmly said: "My decision is not wrong, the future market is in China, I have the intuition, and the cooperation with marching ants will push our bank to a new height."

"Since you think your decision is correct, let go. Even if the road is wrong, anyone who says that there is a right shortcut on the wrong road. I dare to hand over the bank to your hand, that is, believe that you have that ability. Let the bank develop better.” David heard his son’s firm tone and breathed a sigh of relief.

What he fears is that the son gives up and loses his own opinion. If the decision maker has no opinion, then he will be difficult to become a master.

"Understood." Alexander focused on the head.

"What are you going to do next?" David looked at Alexander.

The son grew up and didn't let him down. It was his excellence that made him decide to hand over the burden to him. The bank is in his hands and can only be stable. To grow, he still has to rely on this son.

“Continue to expand cooperation with marching ants, cancel part of investment plans, pool funds, and invest in areas that work with marching ants.”

“So adventurous?” David heard the answer and his face was amazed: “Talk about the idea of your marching ant company, I want to see what makes you desperate.”

Alexander thought about it and said, "I saw the future at the marching ant company."

......

In a ward of the Southern Hospital, Zhou Man looked at the chest that had stood proudly, very happy, and his face floated confidently.

As a woman, she once had a big trouble on her chest. Her appearance is not ugly, because this flaw has made her feel inferior. Because of this, her boyfriend also lost her ‘sexual interest.

After breaking up, she is going to go to the hospital for change. Finally, I came to the Southern Hospital for consultation. There is just a clinical new drug here. There are many people who have tried it, and the effect is very good. It is also a regular big hospital, so I will participate in the idea of trying it out.

Not long after, she felt the chest swelling and pain, and I was a bit worried. Later, the doctor told him that this was the effect of the drug, and that the chest developed twice, which was normal, and she let go of her heart.

During this time, when she takes a bath every day, she can see the changes in the body, and the proud chest. It makes her feel more confident than ever.

She is not a knife and glue, it is pure natural, although there is drug-assisted, but much stronger than injection silicone.

"The results of the inspection came out. Your *** is healthy and your body is not abnormal. Congratulations."

After the doctor gave the conclusion of the examination, Zhou Man immediately revealed the color of surprise.

Upon hearing the completion of the clinical trial, Shi Lin and the members of the research team were ecstatic, and finally succeeded, and it was also the completion of the boss's account.

Jianghe Company and Lanhong Pharmaceutical were acquired by marching ants because of their flat performance, and they became the pathfinders of marching ants in the field of medicine. After the two companies became wholly-owned subsidiaries of the marching ants, they were inevitably reorganized and reorganized into the current Jianghe Pharmaceutical.

He is the leader of the original drug research and development team of Lanhong Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., and is now the head of a group of Jianghe Pharmaceutical New Drug Research Team.

When I first met the big boss Chen Mo, I didn’t expect the genius boss to actually research the drugs. I handed several prescriptions to the drug research and development team and asked them to perfect the prescription drugs.

He is good at traditional Chinese medicine, just as the breast enhancement agent is pure Chinese medicine, so he is inevitably the person in charge of breast enhancement.

After research, he found that the recipes given by the boss were not perfected by them, and the formula was perfect.

As soon as the medicines came out, they began to apply for clinical trials. After a long period of approval, they began to recruit volunteers for clinical trials.

Because they are external medicines, they can be assured of boldness when they test, and the progress is very fast.

Through the phase I clinical trials, combined with the technical information given to them by the boss, they obtained information on the highest and lowest doses of the drug and determined the appropriate dose for future patient use.

The ii phase test was also very smooth in the small-scale use of the volunteers. It can be said to be perfect. Participating in the volunteers, the chest circumference has increased to varying degrees after using the medicine.

This result makes them very pleasantly surprised and more confident about the effects of drugs.

Phase iii testing is the confirmatory phase of drug action and a key stage in providing evidence for drug registration applications.

Now, the last case of the volunteers is completed and the body is healthy.

After such a long period of randomized blinded controlled trials, they have collected enough sample size and their new drug trials have been successful.

After the drug is registered, this drug for the benefit of women will soon be available. Thinking of the sensational effect of this breast enhancement drug in the market, Shi Lin could not hold his own happy mood.

Jianghe Pharmaceutical has always been the worst company in the company.

After restructuring, their companies are profitable, but their quarterly profits are always at the bottom of all the subsidiaries of the company. That profit is almost a slap in the face of a company with a large army of ants.

Now that the new drug is successful, they will start to attack.

And he knows that the other group of drugs is progressing very smoothly. Now he admire the omnipotent boss and admire the five bodies.

After getting the final result of the clinical trial, Shi Lin excitedly said to the assistants around him: "I will immediately inform Hou Manager that the clinical trial of the new drug has been successful."

chapters.title: Chapter 271: : Four Messages
chapters.body:
Chapter 271: : Four Messages

"Four messages."

Zhao Min took a document and handed it to Chen Mo, and sat down on the sofa.

Chen Mo does not participate in company management, but many problems need to be known to him. Generally, Zhao Min will let Xiao Yu and Chen Mo say, but important things, Zhao Min will come over.

"So much? Good news or bad news?" Chen Mo put down the books in his hand, handed the glass to Zhao Min, and took the documents.

“It’s all good news.” Zhao Min said: “The first news, the production line of holographic projectors, is ready for construction. Parts and components are also placed on orders from suppliers. Other procedures, including patent applications and production licenses, are being carried out simultaneously. Once the production line is completed, it can be produced in small batches. This process may take several months."

Zhao Min is doing things, and paying attention to efficiency, Chen Mo is very satisfied.

"What about the second message?" Chen Mo asked.

Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo with a strange look, and then said: "Jianghe Pharmaceuticals came to the news, the breast enhancement medicine you studied, the end of the clinical trial, the trial was very successful, and the drug registration is currently underway."

"Uh!"

Chen Mo mouth twitched.

Seeing Chen Mo’s reaction, Zhao Min said with a taste: “The clinical trial of the aphrodisiac is also underway. It is progressing smoothly and will soon produce results. The two drugs you studied, one succeeded, one The paragraph is basically successful."

Chen Moxiao smiled and used a smile to cover up the embarrassment.

These two drugs were randomly selected by the science and technology library at the time, and he will certainly enter the medical field in the future. After the medical field is laid out, he will give the formula to them for the purpose of making money for the pharmaceutical company.

Regardless of disregard, the drugs are now out.

"Little brother."

Come again, Chen Mo can't smile.

This Zhao Min, who occasionally took the wrong medicine, came to sing him, but the relationship between the two was so good, he could not take her.

"Troublely remove the ‘small’ word, or I will deduct your salary.”

"Don't care about these details, I'm just curious, are you doing nothing to study breast enhancement drugs and aphrodisiacs? Are you..."

Zhao Min glanced at Chen Mo, this question, as Chen Mo took out the two formulas, she wanted to ask, and now I asked.

"No." Chen Mo hurriedly interrupted, fearing that Zhao Min could spit out ivory: "I am normal."

Chen Mo can't tell Zhao Min, this is what the science library has come up with.

"Don't worry, I heard that geniuses have quirks. I just want to ask, are you the kind of genius madman in the movie, have a special hobby? I didn't say that you are not normal." Zhao Min giggled.

"You have quirks, I am always calling me." Chen Mo said with no politeness.

"Unfortunately, I couldn't get my hands and put aside a question. Some time ago, I suddenly found out that the figure of Xiaoyu has become super good and the skin is also delicate. I am embarrassed. Are you using any special means to make small? Fishing becomes like that? Give me a try. You see that I am sitting in the office every day to help you make money, and the figure is going quickly."

Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo with his sly eyes.

"It is indeed a special means."

Chen Mo directly ignored Zhao Min’s eyes. In this girl’s mind, she must have thought of a certain direction. After all, this woman, every few days a month is not normal, he is used to it.

"Using potential potions, it can shape the body. Potential potions are natural weight-loss drugs that convert fat and control the body's muscle to fat ratio to a certain extent. If you use it, your body will be better and your immunity will be better." ”

“Really? Can fat people get thinner overnight?”

"You are very fat?" Chen Mo looked at Zhao Min.

"Do you want to check it out? I am very happy."

Chen Mo’s head came out with a few black lines. Whenever he sang him, Zhao Min’s topic became unscrupulous, making him very helpless.

"Fat people can use a single dose of medicine. The amount of medicine that each person adapts to is different. The extra medicine does not work, and it will not harm the body. If you want to use it, you will use it for another day, but the medicine is confidential. Can't tell others." Chen Mo said.

"Of course, use it. Listening to your words is much better than taking a vaccine."

“Return to the topic, what is the third message?”

Seeing Chen's default appearance, Zhao Min also put away the jokes. She naturally knows that occasionally jokes, active atmosphere can be serious, serious, must be serious.

"The remaining two news, some links, are about Roche. First is the third, Alexander and our cooperation, no longer afraid of it, he is expanding in Europe, is on the phone, mobile phone orders yesterday Add 10 million."

"So bold?" Chen Mo asked.

"Yes, rumors that their family forced him to interrupt cooperation with us, and he refused. Finally, they made a gamble with their family, the family did not ask him trouble, he also did according to his own ideas, let go Hands and feet. As for the content of their bet, the outside world is only guessing." Zhao Min said.

"What guess?" Chen Mo asked.

"He used the position of the successor of the bank group to make a bet."

Chen Mo nodded slightly, the news did not know the true and false, and the true and false relationship with them is not big: "What about the fourth message?"

"The fourth news is that Alexander has withdrawn some of the investments that have already been implemented, concentrated funds, placed them in the field of cooperation with us, expanded the scale of the telecommunications company and agency, and developed the agency regional chain ecology."

"Is this a few meanings? Desperate?" Chen Mo was a little surprised.

If you invest, you won't put the eggs in one basket. Alexander's behavior is very dangerous, because once their company announces the suspension of cooperation with Roche, Alexander will never be able to recover.

"Possibly, this kind of behavior is almost to give us the back on the battlefield. It is a gamble. Bo. We are partners, he is safe, we are enemies, he will die without a whole body, he bet us Is a partner." Zhao Min said.

"It's really bold." Chen Mo couldn't help but say.

They had contact with Alexander, and so many times, he did not expect the other party to be so bold, and gave them the back on several occasions.

At the beginning, Walid had also contacted them, as strong as Walid, and apart from the cooperation of robots, they dared not cooperate with them in other fields.

Because of certain economic factors, there are naturally political factors, which are too complicated and the water is deep, which makes many people discouraged. Hua Wei has been rejected into the US market for so many years, and these complex relationships exist.

This time, Alexander is really bold and dare to eat crabs first.

"What are you going to do?"

"He is the only one of our partners who dares to bet our partners, indicating that he is optimistic about the future of our company.

He is now blocking us from bullets. As far as our current situation is concerned, if we lose his partner, we will enter the international market next time, and we don’t know what year and month.

We will give up on him now, and will there be companies in the future who dare to cooperate with us so boldly? This point, I believe that Alexander sees it very clearly, so he dares to gamble, gamble on a rich and prosperous, loses nothing, and wins both fame and fortune. ”

Chen Mojing listened to Zhao Min’s analysis and could not help but nod.

If such partners give up, then in the future, it will be harder to find a better partner than this.

If Alexander rises, the first time people who eat crabs get the benefits, other capitals will stand by? Capital is ruthless, and now those capitals are very serious. If they see the interests, all the blockades will become jokes.

"Help him, this is the best way for us. For such a good partner, we have no reason to give up?"

Zhao Min paused and turned his head.

"First talk about the problem of breast enhancement drugs. Now that the drugs are being registered and will be listed for sale in the future, do you have any ideas?"

"This is your idea, I don't know much about doing business." Chen Mo did not understand why Zhao Min was so good, and turned the topic to this.

"My idea is that since Alexander insisted on it, he was given an opportunity. The breast enhancement medicine should go out of the country and expand rapidly. He seems to be the best choice." Zhao Min said.

chapters.title: Chapter 272: : Alexander'S Surprise
chapters.body:
Chapter 272: : Alexander'S Surprise

Alexander is worrying about working with the army ants. Now that the agreement with the family has begun, he faces two difficulties.

The first is the pressure within the family.

Many people want to plan the location of the investment bank, and certainly will not give full help to him. Maybe there are other means to obstruct the secret, and the funds of their respective companies cannot be handed over to him.

The second is resistance from the outside.

They cooperated with the marching ant company and attracted a lot of resistance. In addition, the investment plan leaked and their company's opponents were staring at him.

At this time, he will be more troublesome if he is slightly careless.

Even if he did not fall down in the siege of many companies, and normal development, he could not increase the company's profits by 25% within a year and a half. In the end, he still had to go out.

So he had to take the sword to the slant and put the bet on the marching ants.

This miraculous company has endless potential. If he can take advantage of the potential of the army ant company, it is not impossible to increase profits by 25%.

It is really uncomfortable to feel the fate on others.

When he chose to work with the marching ants, he expected that there would be obstacles, but he was confident that he could cope. I just didn't expect the bank's entire investment plan to leak, which is the main reason for the bad situation.

Now the bet is pressed against the marching ants, but the marching ants will not cooperate with them, which is the problem he is thinking about now.

Because Zhao Min once refused to cooperate with them on the telecommunications company. If the cooperation project is not attractive enough, the marching ants will definitely reject them.

"Sir, Zhao Min calls."

As Alexander is thinking about what to do next, the voice of the mobile assistant will ring. Hearing Zhao Min’s call, he smiled and immediately connected.

"Mr. Alexander, hello, didn't bother you rest?"

"Ms. Zhao, hello, didn't bother, I just finished breakfast, now I am going to the company, still thinking, how should I work with you next time." Alexander said slowly.

"The opportunity for cooperation, there is one now, our company is ready to launch a new product, are you interested?"

"Yes, of course." Alexander was overjoyed and said without hesitation.

He is now thinking about where to cooperate with the marching ants, how to persuade the marching ants to cooperate with them, and I did not expect Zhao Min to contact him actively. This is a happy event.

"Like this, today I am going to China, and we will meet tomorrow."

"Yes, I am looking forward to your arrival. I should have dinner and meet up."

"Ms. Zhao, wait, can you talk about the product in advance? I will prepare the relevant information in advance," Alexander asked.

"drug."

When he heard Zhao Min’s words, Alexander’s eyes were bright.

Medicines and medical care are a very profitable industry. In this industry, profits are generally as high as 300%.

Important drugs, including all kinds of major disease drugs, anesthetics, antibiotics and aspirin, etc., and then the star products of Viagra, are basically monopolized by the world pharmaceutical giants.

Roche has always planned to invest in the pharmaceutical field, but he did not even see a pharmaceutical company with great potential. Old-fashioned pharmaceutical companies, they want to insert a foot is too difficult.

And their current physique, there is no way to enter.

Alexander only heard about the achievements of the army ant company in the field of science and technology, and never heard of their contact with the pharmaceutical industry.

If the marching ant company has special drugs in this area, it is not impossible for the bank's investment profit to reach 25% within a year and a half.

"Miss Zhao, can you ask which kind of medicine?" Alexander asked.

"You will know when you come, you will not let you down." Zhao Min said a little mysteriously.

"I really look forward to it, then we will see you tomorrow."

"see you tomorrow."

Hanging up Zhao Min’s phone, Alexander can’t wait to go to the company.

"Boss, what do you have to order?" When I first arrived at the office, a female assistant wearing a professional suit entered the office and asked softly.

"Pushing the meeting over the past few days, you can help me book the ticket to China today, the sooner the better."

He has a hunch and bet on the bet. This time, going to China, there will be a big gain. Maybe it will be a big turn.

"Ok."

The female assistant did not ask much, didn't think about it, and knew where to go.

Judging from the frequent movements of Alexander recently, her boss is desperately following the marching ant company.

When the assistant just wanted to leave, he was stopped by Alexander.

"Alice, wait, you can check it out for me. There is no pharmaceutical company under the company of Ant Company. How can I give it to me before I board the plane? The more detailed the better, it is best not to let people know that I want it. Don't tell anyone else."

"Understood." Alice Zheng focused.

Seeing that Alexander was so cautious, she also knew it was important.

The last time their investment plan was leaked, it has already brought so much trouble to the bank. If this incident is leaked out, no one knows what will happen.

After going down, Alice was the first to find information about the pharmaceutical company of the Army Ant Company.

As a global consulting and investment-oriented bank, the market news they need must be very detailed, so they have specialized information and data companies on a global scale.

These information companies are always looking at the eyes of the global market in order to respond to changes in the global market.

An hour later, Alice came back again and gently placed the documents in her hand on the table in front of Alexander: "This is the information of the pharmaceutical company of the Army Ant Company."

“Do they really have a pharmaceutical company?” Alexander said with surprise.

All along, the main products of marching ants are high-tech products. In his view, the marching ant is a technology company, and there is no information about the pharmaceutical company in the main materials of the marching ants.

If it wasn't for Zhao Min to contact him this time, he would not pay attention to this problem at all, and would not think about it. Now I found out that there is a pharmaceutical company, which really surprised him.

“A year ago, they acquired Lanhong Pharmaceutical and Jianghe Company and reorganized the two companies into the current Jianghe Pharmaceutical. Jianghe Pharmaceutical is the first wholly-owned subsidiary after the establishment of the Army Ant Investment Group.

There was news of the marching ants buying pharmaceutical companies on the Internet. However, because of the blatant competition of several mobile phone companies at the time, and the fact that the army ants bought the company at that time, it was commonplace, so this news did not cause much concern.

The two pharmaceutical companies were inconspicuous, and the medicines they produced were very common, and they did not have too prominent features. I have found information about the two pharmaceutical companies before they were acquired. There are not too much news and the results are average. They are very common pharmaceutical companies. ”

Alexander heard useful information from Alice's simple report.

As early as a year ago, marching ants wanted to enter the pharmaceutical industry, and it was the first subsidiary of the marching ant group. This news is undoubtedly a great piece of good news for Alexander.

“Is the ticket booked?” Alexander couldn’t wait to wait, and now people are in China.

"Booked, the plane is at 1:30 this afternoon."

chapters.title: Chapter 273: : Who Is Good For Money?
chapters.body:
Chapter 273: : Who Is Good For Money?

Alexander looked at the headquarters of the marching ant company outside the car window and felt his heart. This is his inside, the third time to come to China, and three times for the marching ant company, which has never happened in the past.

Compared with the previous two times, he is a bit nervous and has a sense of expectation.

The marching ant company specifically informed him of the cooperation, and it is a cooperation in medicine, and it is definitely intended to allow drugs to enter the international market.

If it is just a generic drug, the marching ant company will never call him so much.

Zhao Min also made it very clear on the phone and would never let him down. The medicine that does not let him down is sure that the profit is enough, otherwise Zhao Min will not dare to say such a certain words.

Entering the marching ants, under the leadership of the robot, Alexander also successfully entered the reception room of the marching ant company.

"Ms. Zhao, I am sorry, I got off the plane in the early morning, and I was in a jet lag. I just woke up at the hotel and rushed over." Alexander said with a slight apology.

"Mr. Alexander is polite, sit here." Zhao Min and Alexander shook hands and took him to the sofa to sit down.

“In the recent past, Mr. Alexander has been very good at our company. What do you think of the development of our company?”

Upon hearing this question, Alexander eyebrows picked one. He knows that his words will definitely be the focus, and maybe a temptation for them.

"Ms. Zhao, would you like to hear the truth?"

"Of course." Zhao Min said.

Alexander took care of his own thoughts before opening his mouth.

"You Chinese people like dragons. I like this. Your company is now like a dragon locked in the sea, awesome, but can't fly out of this sea. Your situation is like the epitome of China's current situation.

You are very strong and make many people full of awe. They are afraid that the dragon will break free from shackles and rule them. So in some respects, I don't dare to cooperate with you, even for you, and I want to benefit from you.

This is mainly because the ideology of the two sides is different from them, just as the system of your country is different from that of the West.

The marching ants are sole proprietorships. The capitalists pay attention to capital and interests. They want to assimilate you and you are not willing to be assimilated. So they are isolated, no one is willing to help you break free from shackles, and even discriminate against you, and the reason for all this is that they are afraid of you, although they refuse to admit that they are afraid. ”

Alexander said his thoughts, although the metaphor is a bit awkward, but it is somewhat similar.

The reason why the marching ants were isolated, one of them is the Huaxia enterprise, the most important is the sole proprietorship enterprise, but also touched the interests of some capitalists.

Because of political factors and interest factors, marching ants will always be trapped in China. Apart from certain products, such as seismographs, there are not many other products in foreign markets.

"Mr. Alexander's metaphor is really interesting." Zhao Min smiled softly: "But our company is not a dragon, it is a small ant."

“The marching ants are in the jungle and are also the creatures at the top of the food chain,” Alexander said.

"I recently saw your movements, seems to be helping our army ants to break free from shackles?" Zhao Min said.

"I can't say it, the shackles have rusted, and you will leave the ant nest sooner or later. I am optimistic about your future, so investing in advance, this is a kind of venture capital. You have a saying in China, called: the charcoal in the snow is better than the icing on the cake." Alexander said. .

"It seems that Mr. Alexander is prepared."

To Zhao Min’s words, Alexander just smiled and said: “Ms. Zhao, are you satisfied with my answer?”

"Your eloquence is very good." Zhao Min did not go deep into this, a topic turned: "We have entered the topic, I said yesterday, this time you came over, I want to cooperate with you in the field of medicine, there are not interested?"

"We always want to enter the medical field, but it is not allowed. Ms. Zhao, you have not told, what medicine?" Alexander did not give a positive response, this is out of a merchant's habit, did not see the product, no one Will invest in chaos.

"Let's talk about it." Zhao Min looked at Tan Yong sitting next to him.

At this time, Tan Yong was full of red light. He was the manager of Lanhong Pharmaceutical. Jianghe Company and Lanhong Pharmaceutical were acquired and reorganized. He also became the deputy general manager of Jianghe Pharmaceutical.

The team responsible for breast enhancement medicine is Shi Lin, a subsidiary of the original Lanhong Pharmaceutical. He is responsible for this business.

When he heard Zhao Min ask him, Tan Yong immediately took the spirit and handed out a piece of information and a prescription to Alexander.

“This is a new product developed by our company, a ‘Feng. Chest Drug’, this is a sample of the drug, as well as pictures and some clinical trial data.”

When I saw the picture, Alexander was a little embarrassed. He didn't expect it to be such a photo. He didn't react at all, but when he saw the content, his expression began to be cautious and forgotten.

Who is the best money for this world? Three kinds of people! Children, old people and women.

For a beautiful face and body, it is terrible for women to spend money.

A set of ordinary skin care products, hundreds of thousands, a little more expensive cosmetics, ordinary people can not imagine. For the sake of size, it is even more horrible, just like being abusing yourself.

Nowadays, all kinds of health care products for weight loss and breast enhancement are emerging one after another. The effect is not seen, but the price is terrible. The profit of this is even thousands of thousands. The cost of a prosthetic surgery in a plastic surgery hospital is at least tens of thousands of yuan. It is conceivable how big the market is and how high the profits are.

If the effect of this drug, as stated in the information, can be effective within half a month, then it will definitely become a product that makes women crazy.

This is to solve the problem fundamentally, without moving the knife, nor is it fake. This is the most important thing.

No wonder Zhao Min will say that this product will not let him down, it really is a very special product. From the perspective of his market, this is just a 'breast-up' drug, enough to make an ordinary pharmaceutical company a huge pharmaceutical and health care giant.

"The third phase of the drug trial has been successful not long ago. We have obtained enough sample cases. Now that the drug has been submitted for registration, the approval can be passed to the trial production phase." Tan Yong said.

After Tan Yong finished, look at Zhao Min, who is on the side, and hand over the topic to her.

"Mr. Alexander, this upcoming drug is the product that you are looking for. I will inform you of the cooperation in the first time of its clinical trial, is it sincere?" Zhao Min said.

"Oh, we have always been friends, partners." Alexander is in a very good mood.

Although he is not good at medical matters, he does not understand the skills of computer retouching, but looking at these materials is not like a fake. The marching ant company has already given some information to them, indicating that the marching ant company is not afraid of him to verify, which is a confident confidence.

"We have submitted international patent applications for the formulation of pharmaceuticals. Mr. Alexander wants to go back and verify the authenticity of these drugs and talk about cooperation." Zhao Min said.

"Now, don't use it. Now go back and come over again. It's too tossing to fly around. I believe that Ms. Zhao will not lie to me. After all, we are a good partner." Then Alexander turned a corner: "I think, next We talked about the more appropriate way of cooperation. How do you want to cooperate with Ms. Zhao?"

chapters.title: Chapter 274: :Condition
chapters.body:
Chapter 274: :Condition

Alexander knows that his hunch is correct. This time, it is a great opportunity. This opportunity is enough for him to rise.

Suddenly come out with such a magical drug, he does not question, it must be fake.

Even if there are some doubts about the drug, it is not good to go back at this time. After verifying the drug, come back and talk. He knows that the opportunity is hard to come by. If he goes back to verify it now, it will only lower his goodwill in the eyes of the marching ant company.

However, he spent a lot of effort to make him the first choice for the cooperation of the marching ant company. He also did not believe that the army ant company would lie to him. This is a businessman's intuition.

“The project of this cooperation is very simple. We will open a joint venture company and Jianghe Pharmaceutical will permanently authorize this pharmacy to the company.” Zhao Min said.

Hearing this sentence, Alexander was full of enthusiasm. If there was no one at the moment, he wanted to laugh out loud. Keeping the cloud open to see the moon, he is talking about his current situation.

If you get the company's equity, then the difficulties faced by their banking group will be solved. From the perspective of his investment, the drug's ability to absorb gold is not weaker than the mobile phone industry of the marching ant company.

"This is natural." The joy on Alexander's face could not be suppressed: "How is the share distributed?"

"You invest $1 billion and get 10% of the shares. The shares can be transferred to third parties, but if we need it, we have the right of first refusal under the same conditions."

"We invested $2.4 billion and got 20% of the shares, how?" Alexander said.

If the drug is true, in the case of a monopoly market, the market value of the company is more than 10 billion US dollars. After all, this drug is simply the gospel of women.

If you can get a little more shares, he won't be soft. After all, it's all money.

"No." Zhao Min shook his head.

"10% is too little." Alexander said: "More, we don't care if we invest a little more, $2 billion, let's take 15%?"

"10% is quite a lot, no more talk about it." Zhao Min said.

Jianghe Pharmaceutical, which she knows, is studying other drugs and will definitely cooperate in the future. Although 15% does not affect their absolute controlling interest, it is not in their interest to give too much.

Listening to Zhao Min’s firm tone, Alexander has no choice but to smile. If he wants a little more, it seems impossible: “Well, are there other conditions?”

"The new company, except for China, is responsible for the expansion of the market. You are recommended by the president of the overseas region. After we have agreed, he can take office. If his work makes us dissatisfied, we can ask you to change. When you do not have Appropriate candidates or special circumstances, we will take over the position of the president. There is also the finance department, we arrange personnel management." Zhao Min said.

The most important thing to control a company is to control the company's finances and personnel. As long as the two departments are controlled, the company is under control.

For overseas markets, Zhao Min does not have a suitable candidate to manage.

The overseas environment is not the same as the domestic environment.

Tan Yong and Hou Youliang are the two heads of Jianghe Pharmaceutical, but the two companies they originally managed are relatively small in size. Now they are growing and have the ability, but they lack some heat.

Moreover, they have no contacts and resources overseas, do not understand the market situation, and are not suitable for the position of president of the joint venture company. It is enough for the two to manage the domestic market.

Alexander is more aware of overseas markets, with human resources, etc., and it is certainly faster to give overseas markets the speed of expansion. Taking full advantage of the value of Alexander, this is also Zhao Min's plan, of course, also need to give some benefits, no one will be willing to work free of charge.

However, she is sure to send someone to manage the financial problems of the new company. The financial power of a company is the lifeblood of this company, and she must be firmly in her hands.

The subsidiary company and finance department of the marching ant group are all personnel arranged by the head office. For the finance, Zhao Min has always been very strict.

The financial system, with the help of the R&D department, is upgraded to a smart financial system. Anyone who wants to be financially motivated must think carefully about the consequences.

Chen Mo's artificial intelligence ink girl, it is possible to monitor the finances, the company's only financial department accident, Chen Mo informed her past, she did not believe this is a coincidence.

Since then, the management and recruitment of financial systems has become more stringent.

"This is no problem." Alexander nodded.

Zhao Min's conditions are not excessive. After all, the marching ant company is the major shareholder and has absolute right to speak. Even if he does not give them any power, he has nothing to say.

Now Zhao Min’s conditions are undoubtedly to give some of the power of overseas markets to them. This is good for them. At least, there is no need to worry that Zhao Min will make decisions that harm their interests. Moreover, if the company grows, they can also gain fame and fortune.

However, this kind of power is premised. Once they make the marching ants dissatisfied with the decision, they may be taken back at any time.

As long as the development is good, the manager does not harm the company's interests, the marching ants will certainly let them manage the company, they also control the company's right to speak.

The overseas market gives them how much they can earn, depending on his ability. The bigger the company develops, the better the revenue, and the greater their income. After all, he also has shares in it.

In the past, their company was only an agent, and now the marching ant Ken and his joint venture to establish a company, this is a huge turn.

This relationship will certainly get better and better as the cooperation between the two sides goes deeper.

And 10% of this stock is already very high. He believes that if Zhao Min is taking the medicine to go out for financing, the A round will definitely have $1 billion or even more than $1 billion.

Because of the products of the company, the brand value is much higher than the average company.

The next time, Zhao Min began to discuss some details of the cooperation with Alexander. Due to the high intention of Alexandria cooperation, the negotiations between the two sides were very smooth.

After an hour, the two people's deliberations officially ended.

"The initial framework of the company has been determined. Other specific terms, you can make it first. We will see you if you are not satisfied. I hope that before the approval of the drug, the joint venture company can be established to avoid affecting the drug. Listing problem, is this okay?"

"Yes." Alexander said vowed.

From the marching ant company, Alexander was in a good mood and smiled all the way.

This time, the harvest is huge, he is gambling, as long as the pharmaceutical company is established, all his current problems will be solved. Those who doubt his ability in the family can also shut up.

"Alice, after you go back, arrange people immediately and draw up the terms of cooperation for me. Also, the notice goes on and a high-level meeting is held." Alexander said to the female assistant sitting next to him.

"Okay, boss." Alice focused on her head.

Looking at the marching ant headquarters that was drifting away from the window, Alexander patted the suitcase at the hand.

Inside, there are samples of medicines and some clinical data that Zhao Min gave him. He only needs to go back and find a senior pharmacist to identify the information, and he can confirm the true and false.

The key to whether or not their cooperation will proceed smoothly is whether the drug is true.

But even if it was not identified, he also believed in 80%.

chapters.title: Chapter 275: : The Surprise Of Xiao Yu
chapters.body:
