Chapter 275: : The Surprise Of Xiao Yu

first building.

On the transparent LCD screen of the laboratory, the lovely appearance of the ink girl appeared, and the naked eye was completely stereoscopic.

The application of holographic projection technology was first applied in Chen Mo's lab.

Only the air holographic projection consumes a large amount of electric energy and is used in the laboratory. The cost performance is not high, so on the display, Chen Mo uses a transparent liquid crystal display instead. Three-dimensional holographic projections are only used in some 3D modeling experiments.

“Momgo, the sample of the first miniature holographic projector has been completed.”

When the ink girl finished, a robot took a cell phone-sized instrument and walked to Chen Mo. This is the result of his time, the design of miniature holographic projectors.

With the design of a medium holographic projector, Chen Mo is also familiar with holographic projectors. Some of the techniques on medium holographic projectors have also been applied to miniature holographic projectors, so the design of miniature holographic projectors is faster than he expected.

The fabrication process of the miniature holographic projector requires a little higher than the medium holographic projector. However, these are not difficult problems for Chen Mo.

Chen Mo carefully looked through the micro holographic projector and nodded with satisfaction.

Above the projector, there are five circular micro-laser holographic projection systems distributed in five positions of the instrument, like the enlarged five-barrel, forming the main projection part of the holographic projection.

There are also five nail-sized miniature holographic projection chips as the main processor for controlling the microlaser system.

This small instrument carries the most advanced holographic technology in the world. If the news is released, it will definitely cause an uproar.

After careful observation, Chen Mo put the micro-holographic projector on the test bench and connected the power supply.

"Activate to see."

"Ok."

When the ink girl finished, the projector started, and a small man with a big palm shot out at the speed of light of the projector and suspended on the projector.

The little man above is the ink girl, a pocket-sized ink girl.

The pixels are very clear and the resolution is very high. If you don't look carefully, you will think that this is an elf suspended in midair.

"Check the projector's operating status." Chen Mo said.

"The projector is operating normally."

Hearing the answer from the ink girl, Chen Mo smiled.

Micro-holographic projectors have been successful, and the last one is a large holographic projector.

As long as the large holographic projector is successful, he can enter the technology library to select the next technology. The mysterious science and technology library, with too many mysteries hidden, can't help but want to uncover it.

“Now start designing holographic phones,” Chen Mo said.

From the beginning, he has determined that one of the uses of the miniature holographic projector is the holographic mobile phone. This kind of thing that only exists in the world of science fiction, appearing in reality, will certainly cause a sensation.

Technology is to make life develop in a better direction.

"Ok."

As early as the design of the micro-holographic projector, he thought about making a mobile phone with a micro-holographic projector, so he designed the holographic projector into a rectangular phone-sized rectangle, and the micro-holographic projector is one of the mobile phone display screens.

Upon entering the research state, Chen Mo forgets the time.

I don't know how long it took for the holographic mobile phone design to lag behind. Look at the time, it is already six and a half in the afternoon. Chen Mo’s eyebrows smiled and packed his backpack and left the lab.

Just returned to the villa, Xiaoyu greeted him from the inside and took his backpack and put it.

"Why don't you ask me to come back together?"

"Ink said that you are experimenting, I did not bother you, do not know when you came out, so I will come back to cook, wait for you to come back." Xiao Yu smiled.

Chen Mowei felt a little distressed when he heard Xiaoyu.

The work of marching ants and Roche, he does not have to deal with, this time in the laboratory, all body and mind are designing micro-holographic projectors.

Going home every day after dinner, I will also go into the study room design. For a while, I didn’t have a good time to accompany the small fishing. Instead, I was taking care of his living, but never complained about it and asked him not to ask him. what.

"This time I am designing a miniature holographic projection, there is not much time to accompany you." Chen Mo said apologetically.

"I know that your research is busy. I am not a sticky kitten. I don't have to stay with me every day." Xiao Yu said with a smile: "First eat, or it will be cold."

The two sat at the dinner table, and Xiao Yushun handed the bowl of soup to Chen Mo.

The scent of the food made Chen Mo’s heart warm for a while.

When he was in school with Xiaoyu, he forgot to eat, and Xiaoyu would bring him to the shop he rented. Now he sometimes studies, will forget the time, Xiaoyu will go home first, make food and wait for him to come back, and now it is the same taste.

Thinking of everything in the past, Chen Mo’s face could not help but reveal a faint smile.

From the outsider's point of view, Xiao Yu can be with him, is a lucky luck, but in his opinion, he can meet the small fishing, is the greatest fortune.

"Thank you wife." Chen Mo took the bowl and said.

"Don't be numb."

Xiao Yu smiled and was very useful. This guy is numb, not once or twice, sometimes like a big child, not enough for her.

"Right, please have a babysitter later, you don't have to work so hard."

"No, I have a hard time. Other household chores have robots. I cook every day. This is what I can do in the end. If you don't let me do this, I will be abolished. If you If you are tired of cooking, you should ask the chef to be a babysitter." Xiaoyu said with an angry look.

"How is it possible? I don't get tired every day. The rice made by my family is better than the chefs outside." Chen Mo said.

"Hey, I am not a chef, you should eat more."

Xiao Yu heard Chen Mo praised, his face smiled sweetly, his eyes were bent into crescents, and he continued to pick up the dishes in the Chen Mo bowl.

Chen Mo has asked Xiao Yu to ask for a babysitter more than once, but he has been vetoed by Xiao Yu. He does not insist on it. As long as Xiao Yu is happy, it is the best.

"Tell you a good news, today's micro-holographic projector has been tested successfully." Chen Mo said: "So this weekend, I will relax myself and go out to play with you."

“Really?” Xiao Yumei looked at Chen Mo with surprise.

Saying that no one is with you is definitely a fake. Which woman does not want his man to spend more time with him?

Chen Mo is studying technology. Every day, she is exhausted. She can't help, and she can only feel bad. The company management, she can not help too much, the only thing that can be done is to take care of his life, naturally it is impossible to occupy his time arbitrarily, just to accompany her to go shopping and watching movies.

Now Chen Mo has time to accompany himself, it is also a surprise.

“When did I fool you?” Chen Mo saw Xiao Yu’s surprise as a child, and there was a headache.

He hasn't been accompanying Xiaoyu for a long time. Now it's just such a simple news. Let Xiaoyu surprise like this. It seems that there will be time in the future to accompany the small fishermen.

"That night I want to go out shopping, watch movies, buy and buy, buy you poor." Xiao Yu said with a smile.

"sure."

After eating and packing things, Xiaoyu quickly changed clothes, holding Chen Mo’s arm and happily left the villa.

chapters.title: Chapter 276: : Shopping
chapters.body:
Chapter 276: : Shopping

The night in Binhai is very comfortable, the traffic on the road is endless, the neon and advertising lights on the road are flashing, and the crowds coming and going from the street are all prospering the prosperity of the city.

On the weekends, the crowds in the commercial plaza are more or less, with more or less relaxed smiles.

Xiao Yu holds Chen Mo’s arm with a sweet smile on his face and looks around in the mall. I haven’t been out shopping with Chen Mo for a long time. At this time, the small fishing is just as exciting as the bird that broke the cage.

At this time, Xiao Yu wears jeans and turtleneck sweaters, a pair of casual shoes, blue silk scattered, simple and elegant, like a girl next door, coupled with a perfect body and fresh temperament, people can not help but see more.

The return rate of the two-person combination is very high, and many people will inadvertently cast an envious look toward Chen Mo.

A temperament beauty, such a bird is holding a man's arm, and a happy smile, a look of love, and others. If you can have such a temperamental girlfriend, take it out and walk, you have a face.

Chen Mo naturally does not know the thoughts of others. Because of his sensitive identity, he wears a mask to make people look inconspicuous. It’s not that he doesn’t want to take off his mask. As the big boss behind the marching ant company, his appearance has already been exposed by the media.

Several major news, including seismographs, intelligent robots, and various conferences in the past, he has long been one of the most famous people in the country, and is also the dream of the most famous young people in the media.

Even now, there are occasional news about him. As long as people who regularly follow the news, they have seen Chen Mo’s photos more or less.

When you come out to go shopping, if you are recognized, you have to be seen as a panda.

If someone took a photo and put it on the Internet, it would be a bit bad. After all, his private life didn't want to be reported by the entertainment news.

In order to avoid unnecessary troubles, you can quietly accompany the small fishermen to go shopping, Chen Mo will wear a mask or a pair of glasses every time he comes out with a small fish.

"You will be my money bag tonight, I want to buy you poor." Xiao Yu smiled.

"Impression is great." Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu's eyes and was a bit of a favor: "If you can buy me poorly at night, you will have a good time, and you can buy anything."

"Now chasing girls are popular bragging? Now the girl is too good to cheat." A woman passed by two people, just heard Chen Mo's words, could not help but stunned, and scorned Chen Mo.

Hearing the spit, Xiao Yu giggled and looked at Chen Mo: "Is it a good lie?"

Chen Mo was a little helpless and a bit embarrassed. He did not expect to be despised: "It is really good to lie, otherwise it will not be so easy to be cheated home by me."

"Beautiful death."

Xiao Yu gently licked Chen Mo’s arm, and his sweet smile lingered.

"Go over there, buy clothes for you." Chen Mo pointed to a higher-end shop next to him.

"it is good."

Xiao Yuqiao nodded his head and took Chen Mo’s hand to the clothing store in front of him. The appearance of the two is no different from the ordinary couple.

"Mr., madam, welcome." Just entering the store, the female clerk greeted her, with a professional smile on her face.

Chen Mo nodded and took a stroll with Xiao Yu in the store. Not long after, Xiao Yu’s gaze fell on the beige silk dress in the window.

Simple and elegant, the lines are soft, and the style is very well matched with the small fishing, which makes Chen Mo's eyes shine.

“Can you take it and try it?” Chen Mo said to the female clerk next to him.

"Yes, sir." The female clerk nodded and couldn't help but look at the man wearing the mask: "This style of clothes is designed by our designers, and each one has only one."

"It's still, more than 10,000, so expensive."

"Nothing."

Chen Mo smiled and tapped Xiao Yu’s head.

His bank card deputy card is in the small fisherman's hand, and the consumption is not limited. However, this girl has never been willing to buy too expensive clothes and cosmetics, and will only be willing to spend money when he buys things for him.

"I didn't have any interest." Xiao Yu touched his head and spit out his tongue, like a little woman who was spoiled.

Let the female clerk take off the skirt, Chen Mo will hand it to Xiao Yu, let her try the clothes in the past. Not long after, Xiao Yu came out of the fitting room.

When the small fish came out, the atmosphere in the store appeared a momentary stillness, and the people who were looking at the clothes in the store could not help but cast a small fishing.

After using the potential medicine for a small fisherman, the body is taller and the lines of the body are more perfect.

Long hair is draped over the back, like a creamy skin, looming under the blue silk, elegant and not exposed, a large bow hanging from the waist of the skirt, simple but not monotonous. Originally, the body has a soft temperament, and the skirt outlines the lines and makes it more dusty.

"Sir, your girlfriend is so beautiful." The clerk at the side couldn't help but say, some envious said. She is thinking about how good a man in a mask can find such a beautiful girlfriend.

Chen Mo is undecided, smiles slightly, Xiao Yu is not the top beauty, but the temperament is absolutely unique.

"How?" Xiao Yu went to Chen Mo.

"There are beautiful people, the skirts are beautiful, the size is just right, it is suitable for you." Chen Mo looked up and down at Xiao Yu, smiled and nodded.

Hearing Chen Mo’s praise, Xiao Yu’s eyes were bent into crescents, and his heart was as sweet as honey.

"The skirt was bought," said the female clerk next to Chen Mochao.

"Okay." The female clerk showed a surprise on her face and nodded her head. The price of the dress was not low. She took the commission for a week's salary.

After buying the skirt, Chen Mo asked Xiao Yu to try some other clothes, and finally left the clothing store with a smile on the female shop assistant.

......

Alexander was sitting in the office and his face was a little relaxed.

When he returned to the company from China, he first verified the efficacy of the drug, and then began to raise investment funds.

After all, $1 billion, for them, is not a small amount, and now the company is in trouble, he must prepare in advance.

This investment, he did not want to be known by too many people, so he had to secretly proceed. The last time he planned to leak, he had caused trouble for him. He didn't want to fall in the same pit for the second time.

The good news is that the news came from the laboratory and the medicine was effective. The company has already registered and he is also arranging managers for the company's overseas regions.

Zhao Min said that the overseas branch of the company, except the finance department, is arranged by other departments and the management rights are also given to them. In order to shorten the time, he must be ready to work.

Roche and the marching ant company's cooperation in the pharmaceutical industry, not many people know. He is not prepared to tell too many people. With the last lesson, the cooperation in the pharmaceutical industry is known only to the people he trusts the most.

The family only knows that he has a cooperation with the marching ants, but the specific content is not clear.

The current Roche Bank, the outside is still being looked at, but they are not calm enough, and the recent withdrawal of several investments has caused some waves.

In the eyes of outsiders, Roche Bank has struggled inside and outside, and now it is shrinking. Undoubtedly, this is because of the strong opponent oppression caused by the cooperation with the marching ant company.

In the past, it was just a rumor in the industry. Now this rumor has become real, and some people are really watching the marching ant company.

"Good" Alexander's face showed a relaxed smile, they withdrew a few investments, and now finally get enough money, things are better than he thought: to inform the marching ant company tomorrow morning, tell them that we are ready. ”

Zhao Min's face was blushing, and Chen Mo was angry: "You are old. Driver, I am still a yellow flower niece."

"Well, this time I look back at the information, the listing, you can arrange it." Chen Mo stopped the laughter and took the tea from Xiaoyu.

After finishing the emotions, Zhao Min spoke again.

"New drug name: Haizhi Yu, English name: YoungLady, the advertisement was finished, according to the plan, scheduled to be placed in prime time tonight."

chapters.title: Chapter 278: : Teapot Cover
chapters.body:
Chapter 278: : Teapot Cover

Biology laboratory.

Zhao Min looked at himself in the mirror with a surprise on his face.

This kind of medicine is more useful than those skin care products, and it works directly. Unfortunately, this pharmacy is destined to be used by ordinary people, otherwise it will make countless women crazy.

Zhao Min sorted out the clothes a little, took care of the hair, and left with the robot. Just entering Chen Mo’s office, I saw Xiao Yu and Chen Mo sitting in the office.

After two days of rest, adapt to changes in the body, and then work."

"Jianghe Pharmaceutical's new drug will start to be put on the market tonight, and it will be handled by Jianghe Pharmaceutical and Haixing Company. You can pay attention to their situation. If you can decide, you can handle it with all your authority. If you have something, you can contact me directly."

......

"This is Jianghe Pharmaceutical's new drug advertisement, a Feng. chest medicine, suitable for you." Zhao Min said after the advertisement, the banter said.

“Not very image?”

"The old lady is now showing you, obviously bigger than the teapot."

......

chapters.title: Chapter 279: : The Name Of 'Yujie'
chapters.body:
Chapter 279: : The Name Of 'Yujie'

The sea was ignited and became famous overnight.

The starfish company has a local tyrant, and has placed advertisements in the four TV stations with the highest ratings in China. Coupled with the advertising of various online platforms, many people have been screened by the 'Sea of the Royal Palace'.

The most compelling forwarding is naturally the official Weibo of the marching ant company.

The marching ant company can be said to be one of the most influential companies in China. Guan Wei never easily forwards advertisements from other companies, but this time he not only forwards it to his own Weibo, but also serves as a propaganda channel, but also with a bit of 'unfair' comments.

The commentary of the marching ant official Wei, suddenly a network buzzword, the official micro-review area, once again fell into the concentration of hands in the hands of the various sections of the hand.

In addition, ‘Yujie’ has once again become a hot word on the Internet.

After Viagra, Viagra is no longer a big brother, and ‘Yujie’ is no longer a pure big sister, but a synonym for the sea.

The emergence of the sea, almost unintentional advertising, inevitably caused some media people to find out the desire.

Soon, with the attention of the media, the bottom of the ‘Sea of the Royal’ was also dug up.

The release of ‘Hai Zhi Yu’ is listed by Haixing Company. This company has registered less than one month and has a registered capital of 10 billion. It is a joint venture between domestic Jianghe Pharmaceutical and European veteran family Roche.

The news was reported and immediately attracted people's curiosity.

Roche's investment bank was only leaked out of the investment plan some time ago, and this time, because of cooperation with marching ants, a lot of news.

In the past two months, there was not much news, and I did not expect to have a joint venture company now.

And what is the sacredness of Jianghe Pharmaceutical, which is a joint venture with Roche? Before that, they never heard of it, there is such a pharmaceutical company in China.

Although Roche is a small company, it is also an old family. A company that can cooperate with Roche cannot be an ordinary company with no name.

Jianghe Pharmaceutical is inevitably left to the bottom of the company and is a subsidiary of the Army Ant Holdings Group.

The person who heard the news was surprised. How do you have a marching ant company? It is also a subsidiary of the marching ant company.

No wonder the marching ant official will forward the advertisement of Jianghe Pharmaceutical. It turned out to be a family.

Confirmation of the news, the major media began to report on this matter. The marching ant suddenly rose to become the top unicorn in the country, and its news has always been the focus of attention of various media.

During the period of marching ants, there was no news of new products, and it was really low-key, almost fading out of the media’s attention. I didn't expect this to come out, it was actually a medicine.

Involved in the marching ant company, Haixing Company is a joint venture with Roche. The heat of this news almost grabbed the heat of the new drug.

The marching ant company has been very cautious in external cooperation. Except for some patented technologies, the other forms of cooperation are very few.

The information they learned was that the marching ant company had been reorganized once, and the company's business was separated independently. The marching ant holding group was also established.

Since the establishment of the marching ant group, all of its companies have been wholly-owned by the marching ant group, and they have cooperated with others to control the situation. Now come out of Haixing Company, that is, the marching ants will cooperate with other companies for the first time.

Many experts who are concerned about marching ants are speculating whether this will be a turning point in the attitude of marching ants to foreign cooperation.

The major media have reported on this matter in a big space.

"Shock! The marching ants and Roche formed the first joint venture. 》——Squirrel headline.

"God of the Sea!" 》——Penguin News.

"A new drug, dug out the secrets of marching ants and Roche. 》——Phoenix News.

......

Various reports, together with advertising bombing, and the fact that the army ant company stood behind the sea, was widely circulated, and the name of 'Yujie' was slowly brushed up.

This kind of drug, which can be said to be able to replace all the bras in the women's cabinet within a month, with the spread of various advertisements, paragraphs and expression packs, let more and more people know.

Just a publicity effect, let a lot of women crazy.

Previously, the drugs of Feng. Chest were a little bit effective, but they were not obvious or even effective, and they needed to be used for a long time.

This time, an effective drug came out, which naturally became a sought after drug. With the addition of the army ant company and Roche's name, the quality problem is sure to be guaranteed, and consumers are naturally assured.

The new drug has already been listed, and it is a prescription drug. You can go to the hospital's Chinese medicine department to let the doctor prescribe the medicine and use it according to the doctor's advice.

Some women who are preparing for surgery and plastic surgery get news and give up surgery and go to the hospital to buy medicines.

Can not move the knife, no one is willing to accept the sin, to avoid being told by others that they are fake. This can help ‘it’ grow up on its own and don’t have to worry about the prosthesis in the future.

Pharmacy only needs three thousand for a course of treatment, even if the price is not low, but relative surgery, it is already too cheap.

Ordinary women, only need two copies of skin care products, you can buy. Official promotion, the fastest course of treatment, no more than three courses at the latest can be effective.

The Chinese medicine department of the cooperative hospital with Haixing Company is overcrowded. Some women come over and hope to buy a potion.

After the new drug came out, the sales in half a month have reached 3 billion.

At the beginning, some people will be suspicious, and after the real effect, one pass ten, ten pass, plus the online media, it will spread thoroughly.

The effect came out, ‘Yujie’ became one of the most popular drugs for women, and some hospitals were in short supply.

After the event was not over, ‘Yujie’ was successfully accepted by the market, and Haixing Company added the production of the sea to the sea, and announced the listing of the second drug, a “Viagra” without side effects – Haizhiwei.

This news has made many people feel ashamed.

‘Yujie’ has already made Haixing Company a friend of women, and now there is ‘Viagra’ without side effects. The same series of products, Haixing Company wants to conquer men and women?

You know, these two aspects are the places where men and women are most willing to spend money.

This is not like the style of a marching ant company? Should the marching ant company come out as an anticancer drug full of future technological sense?

Not enough, this is just a question that people are puzzled in, and the ‘Viagra’ without side effects is still welcomed by the market. After all, although the small blue pills are powerful, they also have side effects. They are taken in large quantities, and there are tinnitus, dizziness, indigestion, and even temporary blindness.

Nowadays, Starfish has a ‘Viagra’ with no side effects. The price is similar to that of Xiaolanwan, which naturally becomes the first choice for the majority of users.

Two new drugs of Haixing Company appeared in the market in a short time, and they took the limelight. As the marching ants of the parent company, it was calm at this time.

Zhao Min is working in the office and doing daily work.

The case of Haixing Company is responsible for Tan Yong, and Jianghe Pharmaceutical has Hou Youliang management. Their group is controlled, and the company operates independently. Unless it decides the fate of the company's future, she will not intervene in other matters.

With so many subsidiaries under the marching ant holding group, she can't manage everything, and she doesn't have the energy to manage it. She only needs to manage the most important and most important marching ant company. Other subsidiaries will be given the power to do the following people, which is more conducive to talent training.

As the helm, what she has to do is to master the general direction of the company.

This time, Haixing’s publicity plan is very good, and it can achieve the expected results in a short time, and it is indispensable for Roche’s help. Roche values the opportunity for this cooperation, and naturally hopes to enable Haixing to grow in the shortest possible time.

Now that the new drug has entered the overseas market, with the help of Roche, it has also achieved good results. The name of 'Yujie' has spread all over the world.

The Starfish Company has also become a rising star in the pharmaceutical industry.

When Zhao Min was working, Xiao Yu knocked on the door and came in: "Zhao Jie, the people of Pfizer have come over and they want to talk to you."

Zhao Min put down the documents in his hand and smiled lightly: "Pfizer? Go, see them."

chapters.title: Chapter 280: :Refuse
chapters.body:
Chapter 280: :Refuse

In the reception room, a bald middle-aged man and a blond foreign woman sat on the sofa. They stood next to them and stood two assistants.

If someone is here, I can definitely recognize it. The bald middle-aged man is Wu Xiaobin, president of Pfizer's Greater China region.

At this time Wu Xiaobin is talking with the blonde woman.

This woman, who is the representative of the US headquarters, is mainly responsible for the contact with the marching ant company. Wu Xiaobin, as the president of Greater China, came to join her in order to facilitate communication and coordination with the army ants.

Recently, Starfish has made a lot of money because of the two drugs. Statistics show that the sales volume of their company's Viagra is also affected by the starfish company's "Haizhiwei", which has fallen a lot.

No wonder so many companies are afraid of marching ant companies, anyway, there are industries that the army ants are in contact with, and ultimately they are unlucky.

In the past, the mobile phone industry, Apple Samsung fell a lot. When the computer operating system and office products came out, it coincided with the computer virus raging, and the office products of Microsoft, Apple and Umbrella Company fell down again.

I did not expect the marching ant company to enter the pharmaceutical industry. This news is beyond their expectations.

Since the advent of the marching ants, they have been labeled as unicorns in the scientific and technological world. Now they touch the pharmaceutical industry and let them not know what to say.

The door of the reception room opened, and Zhao Min and Xiao Yu were seen. There was also a robot coming in. Wu Xiaobin’s face was loose.

"Hello, Mr. Zhao, I am Wu Xiaobin of Pfizer." Wu Xiaobin stood up and smiled and reached out to Zhao Min.

"Hello, Mr. Wu, long-awaited name." Zhao Min politely shook hands with Wu Xiaobin.

"Oh, Zhao always laughed, it is my long-awaited name." Wu Xiaobin and Shan Xiaoxiao: "I am introducing, this is the representative of the American Pfizer Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. Elena."

"Hello." Zhao Min smiled and greeted.

"Hello, Ms. Zhao." Elena looked at Zhao Min carefully and politely shook hands.

"The two are coming today, what are you doing?"

Zhao Min walked to the sofa opposite the two and sat down naturally.

When I heard the assistant's translation, Elena's eyes were a little surprised. In her impression, the Chinese people like to bend around, which is the name of the Chinese people who didn't expect Zhao Min to be so direct.

"Come here today, it is a matter of discussing with Mr. Zhao." Elena is not tempted, straight into the theme: "We Pfizer, want to buy a starfish company, or buy a stake in Haixing."

"Sorry, Haixing has no preparation for the transfer of shares." Zhao Min did not have any accidents, just smiled.

The face of the capitalist is to see the peaches cooked, just like picking them up. From the beginning of the marching ant company to the present, this situation has never stopped.

If they loosen their mouths, they will be controlled by the capitalists and even eat away.

Elena's face was not good at all. She didn't expect it to be rejected so quickly, and Zhao Min didn't think about it.

“Zhao Zong, we have invested in the company and helped Haixing to grow. With the resources of our Pfizer company, the products of Haixing Company can be sold to the markets of all countries at the fastest speed.” Elena said confidently.

Pfizer is the largest pharmaceutical company, and she is confident enough about the pharmaceutical industry.

"I believe Pfizer has this ability." Zhao Min said.

"In this case, we are investing in Haixing, isn't it better? You can make more money and get a bigger market." Elena's face was loose.

“Oh.” Zhao Min smiled softly: “It’s really tempting, but we have no plans to transfer shares for the time being, and we can expand ourselves in the market.”

"Ms. Zhao, isn't it good? It takes time to expand the market. It takes a short time to get the most benefit. Isn't that good?" Elena looked at Zhao Min, she wanted to see Zhao Min's reaction. As long as Zhao Min has any heartbeat, she can chase after victory.

Unfortunately, she was disappointed. Zhao Min did not have any mood swings from beginning to end, and she still had a dull appearance.

Elena’s vision is good, but the premise is the company’s shares. Roche spent so much effort to get such a joint venture opportunity. Pfizer waited for their peaches to be cooked and wanted to make a trip.

This is simply a risk-free sale, and the abacus is better than anyone else.

Seeing that Zhao Min did not speak, Elena brows a little and continues to say: "Zhao Zong, you have a saying in Huaxia, called the big tree to enjoy the cool. Haixing company has our big tree in the medical field of Pfizer, can use the most When the speed is developing, why not?"

Elena is very confident, Pfizer's conditions can be said to be perfect, as long as it is a smart company, it will not refuse.

"But, under the big tree, the little tree will never grow up, and when the wind blows, it will fall." Zhao Min smiled softly.

"Ok?"

When Elena heard the assistant's translation, her mood sank. Sure enough, as in the rumor, the people who marched the ant company did not enter the oil and salt.

"Mr. Zhao means that I don't want to make this transfer of shares?"

"After the company was first established, many things were not stable. We have no idea of transferring shares for the time being." Zhao Min said calmly.

"Ms. Zhao doesn't listen to our prices, refuses?"

"Miss Elena, do you think our company is short of money?" Zhao Min asked.

This problem directly afflicts Elena. The marching ant company can be said to be one of the most cash-rich companies, making it impossible for the marching ant company to have money.

But they are still very interested in Starfish.

When Pfizer's Viagra went public, it was an unprecedented success. It was the commercial success of Viagra, which allowed them to annex companies such as Lambert and become the largest pharmaceutical company in the United States. Pfizer thus rose.

After years of mergers and acquisitions, Pfizer has established itself as a pharmaceutical giant.

"Ms. Zhao, you can cooperate with Roche. They are the laymen of the pharmaceutical industry. Why can't we cooperate with our Pfizer? If we cooperate with us, it seems that the income is bigger?" Wu Xiaobin said.

In the previous exchange, he did not mean to speak. Now the scene is a bit stiff, and he is also a warm-up. Being able to sit on the position of Pfizer's president in Greater China, he naturally cannot be a normal person, and his ability is definitely there.

"Our marching ant company never refuses to cooperate." Zhao Min said: "But when we want to open up cooperation, it seems that only the Roche family."

"Is there more choices now?" Wu Xiaobin said with a smile.

Zhao Min is undecided: "But that time has passed."

When I heard this, Wu Xiaobin did not say anything. After I heard the translation, I was not very good-looking. There is no doubt that they came here to seek cooperation and were rejected.

"Ms. Zhao, we are very sincere, I hope you can consider it." Elena said.

"Yes, next time there is a chance, Pfizer must be our first partner."

When I heard Zhao Min’s words, the people on the field already knew that it was impossible for the marching ant company to sell the shares of Starfish.

After Elena and Wu Xiaobin had a few words, they did not continue to stay. Two people were sent away, Zhao Mincai and Xiao Yu returned to the office.

“Do you know why I refuse to cooperate with them?” Zhao Min passed through the floor-to-ceiling windows and watched Wu Xiaobin and Elena’s car leave the marching ant company.

"This is not very clear." Xiao Yu shook his head.

“The top ten shareholders of Pfizer, including the BlackRock Group and the Pioneer Group. There are also several consortiums such as Morgan and Jingdong Capital, which are the consortiums that block our company’s external expansion. They are our enemies,” said Zhao Min.

“The consortium behind them wants to suppress us? Why?”

"Do you know why the Western world is a capital-controlled market? If you look closely at their information, you will find that the consortiums are also the major shareholders of technology giants such as Microsoft, Apple, and Umbrella.

The consortiums, along with other Wall Street predators, consortia and banking groups, can influence the entire US capital market. They blocked us and wanted to put pressure on us to open up equity to them and achieve the purpose of controlling our company.

It’s just that we are in China. The official will not let those capitals come to the market in our country. Their hands will not come in and they can only be blocked overseas. ”

The focus of the small fishing is heavy, she still does not know, there is such a large knowledge.

Zhao Min looked at the vehicle leaving the army ant headquarters through the floor-to-ceiling windows: "Although the mall has no eternal enemies, only eternal interests. But I have not been generous, use our company's interests to please them, to resolve them. Our hostility, and they just want to pick peaches."

chapters.title: Chapter 281: : Old Routine
chapters.body:
Chapter 281: : Old Routine

Back at the hotel, Elena's face is not very good looking.

Unfavorable.

I thought that the marching ant company changed its strategy and would show the desire for foreign cooperation. I didn’t expect it to drip.

If they are in other countries, they can use strong and use other means to force the marching ants to compromise. This kind of thing they have tried and tested, but here is China. The official protection of China's national market is beyond the imagination. Any consortium will not dare to come in China, otherwise it will not be able to eat.

After thinking about it, Elena dialed a number.

The marching ant company refused to cooperate, and she has no better way.

"Elena, so quickly called back, the marching ant company promised to cooperate?" The phone was connected, and a low female voice was heard.

"Laoli, the marching ant company refused our idea of cooperation." Elena was not willing to say.

She did not even say the price, she was ruthlessly rejected by Zhao Min. Countless pharmaceutical companies want to catch up with their big ships, and some people don't buy their accounts.

"Refused?"

On the other side of the ocean, in the office of Pfizer's headquarters, Laurie frowned and her fingers were constantly pounding the table.

She is the executive vice president of Pfizer and is responsible for the company's strategy, investment and business operations department. This time she is in contact with the marching ants, and Elena is the one who sent her to the front.

It has now been rejected.

The stinking temper of the marching ant company is notorious in the financial world.

“What should I do now?” Elena asked. “Zhao Min’s attitude is very determined. I even refused to say the conditions of cooperation, and she refused.”

"It seems that the marching ant company really does not want to cooperate with us." Laurie said.

“Why are they so repelled to cooperate with us?”

Elena is a bit unwilling. The Chinese people she used to contact each time are all smiling and polite. As long as you give a little benefit, you are so excited that you can't find a margin, and you can't wait to give her up.

She thinks she knows Chinese people better, so Laurie will send her over. This time, I was politely rejected, and Zhao Min didn't even look at her more.

"The company's shareholders and marching ants are a bit wrong. It is normal for the marching ants to refuse to cooperate with us," Laurie said quietly.

The financial circle is also so big, the grievances inside, as the company's executive vice president of investment and business operations, she still has some understanding of these things.

Why did Hua Wei fail to enter the US market with all his heart? A big part is to touch the interests of some people.

Now there is a marching ant company, and the most important thing is that the marching ant company is a sole proprietorship, and the equity is controlled by Chen Mo.

With such a large piece of fat, it is impossible to be indifferent to seeing Wall Street, who is crazy about the benefits, just like the split of Microsoft and Mobil Oil.

If you are in the United States or elsewhere, those Wall Street tycoons can use a variety of means to achieve their goals, but unfortunately there is China, there is the official protection of China, no one can move them.

It is no secret that the US consortium is eyeing the Chinese market.

Some predators even do not hesitate to affect the top of the US government, impose economic sanctions or other forms of pressure on China. The purpose is to let Huaxia open up the financial market, let American bankers and consortia enter the market, control China's economic market, and achieve their control. The purpose of China.

This kind of means, the US consortium and bankers in Europe, the island countries and other places have tried and tested, after controlling the market, they cut wool when they disobeyed.

However, the gains in the Chinese market are minimal, because the Huaxia market is supervised by the official authorities, not the private consortium's calculations. Therefore, the army ants are so big, stay in China, have official protection, and they have no means to deal with them.

"What do you do now?" Elena asked.

“What to do?” Laurie fell into meditation. This is a big problem. There is Huaxia, where they don’t dare to mess around, and they can’t make much impact on the marching ant company: “You stay there, wait for me. ""

Hanging up the phone, Laurie's eyes flashed, I don't know what I was thinking, after a while, I picked up the phone and dialed a phone call.

"Ian, Elena has already sent back the news." The call was connected and Laurie spoke directly.

"Oh? Does the marching ant company promise to transfer the shares?" The phone was looking forward to it. This voice was the voice of Pfizer CEO Ian.

"They refused, very simply, Elena did not say the conditions, they refused." Laurie told Ian the situation directly told Ian.

"Refused? Then you don't have to talk about it, let Elena come back and make a second plan."

"Ian, are those drugs analyzed?"

"Laboratory news, drug composition analysis has been successful, and now we are combining the ingredients of our drugs, copying new drugs, I believe that in the near future, I can imitate similar drugs." Ian's voice is a bit happy.

Viagra's patent has expired and is now being copied by major pharmaceutical companies, especially Huaxia's pharmaceutical companies, whose sales of Viagra are also declining year after year.

Although their Pfizer has not been supported by Viagra, the income of Viagra is still very impressive, and it is also one of the company's very important drugs.

Now Haixing Company has come out with a seaweed without side effects, and there is also a Feng.

He saw the shadow of Pfizer's rise in the past, and it is best to cooperate with Sea Star or to buy shares. Can not buy shares, they can also copy, combined with their own research and development, launch new drugs.

"That's great." Laurie smiled and said: "I am arranging a second plan now."

......

Authoritative report: The sea will increase the chances of breast cancer. 》

"The sea of the sea will increase the incidence of breast cancer. 》

"Authoritative news: Haizhiwei used many times, may increase the probability of kidney stones. 》

It seems that overnight, foreign social networks, as well as major media, are full of reports about the sea, and all of them are smeared, so many people smell different tastes.

The sea has been ignited during this time. Many of the reports about the Starfish Company were positive, because ‘Yujie’ has been out for more than a month, and the effect is indeed obvious.

Although there are some noises, they can be ignored. Now there are so many negative reports about Starfish, and there is a bit of an article here.

The news was sent back to China, and it still stirred up thousands of waves. Many domestic sprayers began to take the rhythm, threatening to ask Haixing Company to recall medicines and compensate for losses.

Zhao Min sat in the office drinking tea and browsing the latest news.

Regarding the remarks of the love of the sea, she noticed the first time she came out.

These news, which are under the guise of authoritative organizations, are undoubtedly smeared. The news does not even dare to say which institution was identified. It is also vague about various statements.

The origin of the news is overseas.

These messages lie to the average consumer, but the three become a tiger, just find a breast cancer patient to use, and then find out the breast cancer, this old routine, it will make ordinary people feel that 'Yujie' is not safe.

It is mediocrity not to be degraded.

Compared with the pressure of public opinion that the marching ant company has faced, the criticism of this sniper is simply drizzling.

It’s just a starter, but it’s intriguing.

While Zhao Min was watching the news, Xiaoyu pushed the door and came in: "Zhao Jie, the Ministry of Infrastructure came to the news that the first production line of the holographic projector has been completed and ready for production."

chapters.title: Chapter 282: : Metamorphosis
chapters.body:
Chapter 282: : Metamorphosis

In the first building, a robot handed it to Chen Mo with a cell phone-sized instrument. Seeing the instrument, Chen Mo smiled on his face.

During this time, Moto and superconducting computers have been working.

Ink according to Chen Mo's ideas to improve the design of holographic mobile phones, a superconducting computer, coupled with the robots of the laboratory, working for dozens of hours without interruption, the efficiency is terrible.

After a long period of improvement, and Chen Mo's participation, the design of the holographic mobile phone has already been released.

Now, the first holographic phone is officially announced.

Looking at the holographic mobile phone with exquisite art, Chen Mo reveals a satisfactory color.

Pressing the power button, a three-dimensional hologram is mapped from one side of the phone. The image is a typical ant logo of the marching ant company. It is like a slap-up ant suspended in midair.

This is the function of their holographic mobile phone, which can present objects in a three-dimensional holographic appearance.

It is believed that the release of this holographic mobile phone will cause a huge sensation on a global scale. This is an epoch-making product.

This holographic phone has two displays, one on the other side of the three-dimensional holographic projection and the other on the other side. Regardless of how advanced technology is, solid-state displays still have an irreplaceable role.

Under the LCD screen, it is an ultra-micro laser display module, which also has a holographic display function. The resolution of the screen has reached 1920*1080, which is quite suitable for the daily user's use.

The laser display module of the holographic mobile phone is specially studied by Chen Mo. The three-primary color laser tube is used to generate a highly spatialized single-pixel laser beam through the optical system in the module to realize the focusless holographic projection.

This non-focusing technique is documented in the holographic technology available in the Science and Technology Library. It can make the holographic projection more clear and more desirable, whether it is 3D projection or plane projection.

The brightness and color of each pixel of the holographic projection are modulated by the image light wave signal. Each pixel produces 24-bit true color, and the resulting image is extremely bright.

"Mer brother, the president and Xiao Yu sister came over." The ink **** the screen blinked.

"It’s really time to come."

Chen Mo smiled and turned off the mobile phone's three-dimensional hologram into the pocket, which may give them a surprise.

Not long after, Zhao Min and Xiao Yu entered Chen Mo's lab.

"Small fisher sister is good, president is good."

The two just appeared, and the images of the ink girls appeared in front of them with the holographic projection.

Seeing the lovely Lolita of the ink girl, they were not surprised. They are the most trusted people of Chen Mo, and they have long known the existence of the ink girl. With the application of holographic technology in Chen Mo's laboratory, the ink girl has already been able to holographically through holographic projection, just as real people appear in front of them.

"Hello, ink girl."

Both of them smiled and nodded toward the ink girl, looking at Chen Mo.

"Boss, there is good news."

"Exactly, I also have a good news." Chen Mo smiled: "You can talk about it first."

“The first production line of the holographic projector has been completed and ready for production.” Zhao Min said: “The next step is to prepare for the holographic projection display.”

"That's good." Chen Mo nodded slightly.

From the time he told Zhao Min to start, it is only two months now. Relatively speaking, this speed is OK, but also, what Zhao Min requires is generally efficient.

"How can I not feel what I said from your reaction is good news." Zhao Min said helplessly.

It seems that nothing has caused the mood swing of a man who is a few years younger than her, which makes her not know how to say it.

“It’s really a bit surprised. I started to think that you are talking about Jianghe Pharmaceutical’s new drug.” Chen Mo smiled softly: “I didn’t expect this, but the construction speed is OK.”

"Well, you won." Zhao Min rolled his eyes and was helpless about Chen Mo: "The new drug does have news, but it is bad news. Now some media are saying that our drugs are carcinogenic and make a lot of noise."

"I know this news." Chen Mo said.

He pays attention to the news every day, and some of the hot news about their company, the ink girl will tell him, interested will look. After all, the new drug is from his hand. He has always been concerned about this news.

And he also learned through the ink girl that the source of the news appeared on Pfizer's people, but he was too lazy to manage these things. These things, there is no need to let him shot.

"What are you going to do?"

"This is not for me, it is handled by Haixing."

Zhao Min shook his head directly.

"If anything needs to be handled by me, there is no need for the company to operate independently. Now that is the case of Starfish, there are Jianghe Pharmaceutical and Roche. If such obvious rumors are not handled well, it will bother me. At the top of the company, there is no need to exist. Management companies are people who don’t have the ability to deal with problems, no need.”

"Also." Chen Mo nodded gently, Zhao Min and his thoughts.

"You just said that you also have good news, what is the news?" Xiao Yu could not help but ask.

"Show you something."

Chen Mo took the holographic phone in his pocket and put it in front of the two.

The holographic mobile phone is full of scientific and technological design style, which makes the two people shine, but it is unclear what technology is this thing.

"Our company's first holographic phone."

After Chen Mo finished, he started the three-dimensional holographic projection of the holographic mobile phone.

A slap-up marching ant sign, suspended in the air, surprised Xiao Yu and Zhao Min.

Holographic projectors, they all have contact, medium holographic projector projection, can be two meters high, but such a small holographic projection, they are the first time to see, and Chen Mo said, this is a holographic mobile phone.

Only holographic mobile phones in science fiction movies appear in front of them.

"Are your research successful?" Zhao Min's face could not stop the surprise.

“Freshly baked, just right.”

After Chen Mo finished, he handed over a large amount of information to Zhao Min: "The information here is the patent that needs to be applied for this time. This micro-holographic projection technology uses the focusless technology, the most core projection system technology. I don't plan to apply for a patent. But these techniques that can be cracked, you take the patent, so as not to encounter patent hooligans."

"It's really abnormal." Zhao Min took the documents and couldn't help but sigh Chen Mo's non-humanity. She knows that Chen Mo has a technology library in his head.

"Small fishing, this mobile phone is for you, you are holding it." Chen Mo handed the holographic mobile phone to Xiaoyu.

"Do you give me this?"

Xiaoyu has some surprises. This is the first holographic mobile phone of their company. It is of great significance. I did not expect Chen Mo to give it to her.

"When I first sent you your first gift, that mobile phone was equipped with my first work, the marching ant system. This time the holographic mobile phone came out, naturally it was the first one to give you."

"Yeah." Xiao Yu's face was filled with joy and took over the holographic phone that Chen Mo handed her.

"If you are not used to 3D holography, there will be a normal LCD holographic screen on the back. The mobile phone system is similar to the marching ant system. It is a holographic mobile phone system after the revision of the marching ant system. If you don't understand the operation, ask me, you can operate voice..."

"Hey, you are enough!"

Zhao Min next to it can't stand it, interrupting Chen Mo.

"You give me a lot of documents, give a small fish a mobile phone, but also abuse me, is it a bit too much." Zhao Min's tone is a bit sour, even his eyes are a bit resentful, this is a blatant dog.

To Zhao Min’s teasing, Xiao Yu shyly smiled and his eyes could not cover his joy.

"Don't worry, I made five of the first batches. The first ones of the first batch of small fishermen, and four of them, were prepared for you."

Chen Mo asked the robot to take the remaining four mobile phones and handed them to Zhao Min.

"This is almost the same." Zhao Min took the holographic mobile phone unceremoniously, and Chen Mo's relationship, she does not need to be polite.

"This time, I want to talk about the holographic projector listing, I did not expect the holographic mobile phone to come out, how long does it take for mass production?"

"One month." Chen Mo said: "You make people clean the warehouse in Building No. 2, and I let the robot transform the holographic mobile phone production line there, enough for one month."

"Well, if you have high technology, you can do whatever you want." Zhao Min nodded silently. "I will clean up the building on the 2nd floor. I will tell you in advance that the holographic projector is on the market. I am going to be in a week."

chapters.body:
Chapter 283: :Message

After Zhao Min and Xiao Yu left, Chen Mo began to think about the design of large holographic projectors.

The medium holographic projector has been mass-produced, and the pico projector is also applied to the holographic mobile phone. Next, only the large holographic projector remains.

With the design experience of the previous two holographic projectors, the final large holographic projector is much simpler. Mainly to solve the problem of color blur under the large field of view, other technologies, completely using the technology of medium holographic projectors and micro holographic projectors.

Once popularized, these three holographic products will lead the world into the holographic era.

Like holographic robots, holography is the product of the most sci-fi sensation. The sensation of this technology is definitely not lower than that of intelligent robots.

The large holographic projector is the final level of holographic technology. As long as the large holographic projector is designed and the holographic technology of the technology library is completed, he can get the next technology.

For ordinary people, Chen Mo’s achievements are beyond reach. But he knows that in front of the technology library, his current technology is only a level of [scientific apprenticeship], and there is still a long way to go from real high technology.

Deep in the science and technology library, it contains too many high-tech beyond the current level of knowledge and knowledge of the earth. What he has now is only a drop in the ocean. He is pursuing the highest authority of the technology library.

The first thing that Zhao Min did when he left the No. 1 building was to let people clean up the warehouse in Building No. 2.

The holographic projector has just been mass-produced, and now it is a holographic mobile phone. For them, this is a great event.

Zhao Min has no doubt that Chen Mo can transform the production line of holographic mobile phones within one month.

Many high-tech instruments and equipment inside are newly invented. Many instruments, Zhao Min are not named. She can guarantee that the No. 1 building can be said to be the most advanced laboratory in the world, no one.

If the technology in Building No. 1 is announced, the global technological development will accelerate at least 30 years or more. Like superconducting materials at room temperature, and superconducting computers, if they are released, they will set off an unprecedented storm in the scientific and technological community.

After people cleaned up the warehouse in Building No. 2, Zhao Min handed over the patented technical materials that Chen Mo gave her to the technical department and began to apply for a patent.

Chen Mo said that these are hackable technologies. If they do not apply and are cracked out and apply for a patent, they will be applied by others to use these techniques to sue them.

To arrange things, the next step is to prepare for the holographic projector, which is also the main problem.

Since this time, the company has not had much of a problem. Other minor products have been released, and people with technical systems and market systems have handled it. She does not have to do it. Her main energy is to deal with the company's personnel issues, or to attend some events and forums.

Now Chen Mo's product has come out, and it has come together. She knows that she has arrived when she is busy.

"Small fish, you inform, the new product launch conference of holographic projectors will be held at 8:30 pm next Wednesday. The location is the ant theater at the headquarters, let the propaganda department begin to prepare for the new product launch."

Back at the office, Zhao Min let Xiaoyu start to inform.

All this has long been ready and has been waiting for the time to mature.

Not long after, the official microblog of the marching ant company updated a message: the new product launch conference will be held at the Ant Colony Headquarters at 8:30 pm next Wednesday, so stay tuned.

The product has not been announced, and even before that, there is no relevant news. As always, with a mysterious veil, it has not been made public.

Every time a marching ant has a grand release, it will not disclose the product. It will only appear when it is released. This is the consistent routine of the marching ant company, and it also increases the expectations of many people.

The news of the marching ant official micro, as a stone fell on the calm lake, stirred up layers of ripples, and finally like the wings of the butterfly, provoked a huge storm.

Since the launch of the intelligent robot by the marching ant company, there has been no major product and too grand launch.

Every press conference is some office products, computer notebooks are small and small, this familiar routine appears again, needless to say, this is definitely an important product launch.

Countless people are waiting for the new generation of flagship mobile phones of the Army Ant Company, but unfortunately one can't wait. This new product launch conference announced so grandly that there must be a play.

It was not long before the news of the conference came out. Under the official squad of the company, there have been various comments.

"This is definitely a mobile phone, the third generation of butterfly-eye mobile phones. I am looking forward to it. The two flagship machines of the marching ant company are designed to be close to the outside. I am looking forward to the third generation design."

The first generation has to tie a plane cup, and can only be tied outside. The robot also refused me. All kinds of gossip, internal news, true and false, no one knows, are some people's guess. At the same time, the major media also received an invitation letter from the marching ant company.

chapters.title: Chapter 284: : Chen Mo Appeared
chapters.body:
Chapter 284: : Chen Mo Appeared

In front of Building No. 7 of the Ant Colony Headquarters, the lights were bright.

Building No. 7 is the core building for the marching ant company to build corporate culture and an important activity center.

Sometimes the family members of the staff come over to play, they will come here to have a look and experience the culture of the company, which will help employees improve their centripetal force.

In addition, the company's important annual meeting, work summary, report, and some important departmental activities, the company's new product launch, will be held in the seventh building or in the square in front of the building.

Just entering the gate, you can see a huge statue - an ant holding a book.

Bypassing the statue, behind the vast hall, there are a number of showcases, and there is a product at each exhibition.

From the first generation of butterfly-eye mobile phones equipped with the marching ant system to robots, it covers important products of the marching ant company and the subsidiaries of the marching ant company.

Within the exhibition hall, the flow of people is like a weaving.

The press conference has not yet begun, and some guests who arrived early are visiting the exhibition area. Many reporters holding cameras, every time they walk through a showcase, they will take a photo with the camera, and some are doing live webcasts.

Many people will be amazed when they see the exhibition hall of the marching ant company. Mobile phone operating systems, carbon crystal materials, Chinese character programming languages, computer systems, artificial intelligence assistants, robots, etc., are all products with high-tech sense.

Only two years after the rise, we have created so many products. We have to say that the research and development strength of the marching ant company is beyond anyone's imagination.

However, there is a column of showcases that are empty and have to be thought of about the products to be released tonight.

Next to the exhibition hall is an experience area.

In addition to human-computer interaction, intelligent robots, there are other product experiences. Some of these products are derivatives of the R&D team of the marching ant company. They are of little value and can only be used as entertainment.

At eight o'clock, with the announcement of the No. 7 building, the people in the exhibition hall followed the instructions of the staff, and the conference venue, the Ant Theatre, was organized in an orderly manner.

The Ant Theatre is located on the top floor of Building 7, with a semi-circular four-story stepped hollow design. The center is wide and the theater dome is covered with clear glass, which raises the sky to see the sky. In front of the fan-shaped step seat is the stage of the theater.

"It’s really uninhabited."

Some people who know the goods enter the ant theater and look amazed.

This huge theater can accommodate more than a thousand people, the most important auditorium chairs, all leather sofas.

These leather chairs go out to buy, one must have tens of thousands of pieces, and the marching ant company is really not a general suffocation.

Marveled and marveled, everyone still did not forget to find their place.

This time, I came to the conference, in addition to various media, fans of the company's products, and some company guests who cooperated with marching ants.

It took a lot of effort, and she persuaded Chen Mo to come to power. Next, it was natural time for Chen Mo. Holographic technology has spread to the lives of ordinary people. This is a landmark conference. Such an important conference, Chen Mo, the protagonist, naturally cannot be absent.

"It is really difficult to be a quiet beautiful man." Chen Mo smiled helplessly.

Zhao Min insisted that he go up, and he did not refuse. Zhao Min wants to make him the company's external image. Such an important conference will definitely be hosted by Chen Mo.

And this time the holographic projector is still his masterpiece, no matter which aspect he has no reason to refuse.

"Come on."

Xiao Yu helped Chen Mo to organize his clothes, like a well-behaved little woman.

"it is good."

After finishing the arrangement, Chen Mo took the headset and took a confident step and walked towards the stage.

The lights gathered on the stage and the theater was quiet. Even the live webcast, which also lowered the sound, aimed the live camera at the stage.

They all know that the next play is about to begin.

"The next step is the quiz. Guess what is the product released by the marching ant company? I will choose two people in the guessing water friend and send him the butterfly eye of the marching ant company." Xia Xue holds the live lens Against the stage, say the voice down.

"The macho of the sea."

"True machine girlfriend."

The sound of Xia Xue fell, the barrage of the mobile phone live broadcast, began to brush up crazy, comments in the comment area, also refreshed. Seeing the comments, Xia Xue is a bit speechless, why every time the barrage, the problems of the products of the army ants company are so embarrassing.
