As the theater was completely quiet, Xia Xue’s attention was also placed on the stage.

When I saw a figure coming out of the background, Xia Xue was stunned, and even watching the live broadcast of the netizens, was also slightly horrified.

Chen Mo?

Chen Mo actually appeared on the stage of the conference?

In the past press conference, Zhao Min came to power and never had Chen Mo’s figure. In addition to the seismograph, Chen Mo had a big head. At other times, people who saw the army ants were all seen by Zhao Min.

Chen Mo, who is known as the most outstanding genius in China, has always kept a low profile. Although there are many reports about Chen Mo on the Internet, many of the photos used are photos of Chen Mo attending the Internet conference and the inauguration ceremony of the seismograph. There is also a photo of Chen Mo’s speech at the graduation ceremony of Binhai University.

There are very few other photos, because Chen Mo rarely appears under the lens of the public media. Naturally, it is impossible for a dog to dare to take a photo of Chen Mo.

The image of ordinary people to Chen Mo is genius, low-key and mysterious. His image is very compatible with the image of the marching ant company. Many times, in the eyes of ordinary people, the marching ant company is synonymous with mystery and advanced technology.

Seismographs have predicted many earthquakes, large and small, and many people have been spared. The name Chen Mo has already become a legend.

This time, the host conference was actually Chen Mo.

After a brief horror, the reporters pointed the camera at Chen Mo, slammed the shutter, followed by warm applause.

Chen Mo hosted a new product launch, the product is definitely a big news, it is exciting to think about it.

On the Internet, with Chen Mo appearing on the stage, suddenly frying the pot. Chen Mo actually appeared in the scene of the conference? In their impression, Chen Mo has always been very low-key, rarely appeared in front of the media lens, and now appears at the press conference.

"Young, handsome, talented, temperament, my food, not allowed to grab more."

"Don't shame, this is my husband."

"Chen Mo, my husband, I want to give you a monkey..."

Watching the fans of the live webcast, I was crazy.

Chen Mo’s appearance is still OK. After wearing clothes, he is also a handsome guy. His temperament is stable, his atmosphere is friendly, and he is young and young. This is almost the perfect mate selection standard for women.

He rarely appears in the public, but still can't stop the crazy fantasies of some women.

Girls pay attention to Chen Mo, but more people think of a problem. What kind of high-tech products can make Chen Mo’s release conference?

This flash is not that much.

Chen Mo saw the crazy flash in the audience, but he laughed.

He is not used to this feeling of exposure to the flash. However, he is also a person who has seen the world. In this case, he can still cope with it.

With a little thought on it, Chen Mo said: "Hello everyone, I am Chen Mo."

When Chen Moyi opened, the people in the theater suddenly calmed down, and the reporters were silent. Even the reporter who took the photo stopped the hand of the shutter and listened carefully to Chen Mo’s words.

"Thank you very much for taking the time to participate in our company's new product launch conference. Today's press conference will be hosted by me. There is not much nonsense. Now go straight to the topic and introduce a video before introducing new products."

Chen Mo’s voice fell, and the beams of light illuminate, covering the entire stage. The next scene, let everyone face an incredible color.

chapters.title: Chapter 285: : Shadow
chapters.body:
Chapter 285: : Shadow

The scenes on the stage have changed, and the blue water ripples are slowly emerging, filling the entire stage, no different from the undulating sea level.

The people who saw this scene have become incited and have begun to talk.

Suddenly, the sudden changes, a huge shadow jumped from the ‘water surface’, and the giant killer whale jumped in the air and fell towards Chen.

Seeing this scene, there were exclamations and screams in the theater.

Snapped……

The killer whale flew over Chen Mo's head and landed on the 'water surface' in front of Chen Mo, igniting huge waves of water and rushing toward the audience under the stage. The first row of guests closest to the stage couldn’t help but scream and hurriedly protect themselves with their hands.

After a few seconds, I didn’t find any movements, but I was so frustrated that I let go of my hand and turned my eyes to the stage. Chen Mo stood on the water with a smile.

When the hearts of the people settled, a shadow jumped again, and an exclamation broke out again in the audience. But this time they saw it very clearly, not a whale, a dolphin.

The dolphins did not fall into the water, but wandered around Chen Mo, like a flying dolphin, without any sense of disobedience.

The picture is too real, not careful, it is impossible to distinguish serious.

"This is holographic technology."

In the silent audience, I don’t know who is excited to shout. The person who is still in the sorrowfulness has returned to God. He couldn’t help but breathe in the air, holding the camera and pressing the shutter.

After such a reminder, they suddenly realized that the current product of the marching ant company was released, and the product of the marching ant company is probably related to holographic technology.

The scene just happened was too real, and the sudden changes made them believe it.

Holographic technology is not a new technology, but like this real and advanced hologram, they are the first such close contact.

In the past, this technology only existed in science fiction movies. Is the marching ant company ready to promote this technology product to the lives of ordinary people?

The person watching the live broadcast was also given this scene to the town.

In reality, this kind of three-dimensional holographic technology also has more problems in the laboratory and high-end products because of cost. The holographic technology applied to the concert can only see the holographic effect from a specific angle, and is not a holographic projection of strict meaning.

Now that the Army Ant Company has released such advanced holographic technology, is it intended to apply technology to the lives of ordinary people?

"Chen Mo, my husband, I want to marry you."

"Chen Mo is about to become a synonym for Chinese genius."

"At the moment when the seismograph came out, he had already sealed his god. The word "genius" was used to describe him. It looked a bit shabby."

"I only care about the product, can this holographic product be used to see the action movie of the island country."

"..."

The domestic network is called a good one. They are finally realizing the progress of science and technology, which is definitely good news.

Not only domestic, but hundreds of millions of people around the world are watching the launch of the marching ant company through live broadcasts on various platforms.

This scene has been spread all over the world in the first place.

"We have been deceived by those **** media, and China's technology is so advanced."

"Impossible, Chinese people must have stolen our technology. They can't research such advanced technology. It must be those **** spies who have stolen it."

"The sad Americans, who live in the media information that serves the capital politicians, have long been a sick man in East Asia. They have become the number one power to threaten the international status of our country, and some aspects have already surpassed us."

"Unbelievable, too real, we have another technology that has been surpassed."

Seeing this scene in the live broadcast, some people’s first reaction was unbelievable, impossible and technical theft.

However, the facts are in front of them, they have to admit that another technology has been surpassed.

The press conference is still going on. The short video is less than three minutes. After the video is over, the talents are back. In just three minutes, they truly experienced the charm of science.

The start of the shock, and now expectation, they are waiting for Chen Mo to announce the product of the conference.

When a notebook-sized, disc-like thing slowly floats in front of Chen Mo, some people are curious.

what is this?

"This is the protagonist of our marching ant company's launch conference, the latest holographic projector - 蜃影."

Chen Mo knows the expectations of the people, does not sell off, directly announce the name of the product.

“The holographic projection you see now is the projection of the ‘蜃影’ that we installed on the stage beforehand. It can work alone or with multiple devices.

It has multiple functions and can be used as a computer display or a TV display. You can choose holographic no-screen display, or you can choose to have a screen display, there is a screen display, just need to power on the screen we installed, and then switch the screen mode, the operation is very simple.

蜃影 uses our self-developed non-focusing technology. Its advantages are low power consumption, 24-bit true color, high resolution and high contrast. In the core chip, a smart core is installed to realize intelligent control of the projector. ”

Chen Mo introduced a demonstration, the picture of the demonstration, suspended by holographic projection, in midair, with the sound of Chen Mo, very magical. Chen Mo on the stage, with a hand and a foot, also with a free and easy temperament.

Some people admire themselves and use high-tech equipment to force them to be impeccable.

Looking at the live broadcast of the sister, it is even more glance at Chen Mo, can not wait to grab over, this man, how can be so handsome.

“In addition, it can also be used as a projector. It can be used for 3D or 3D projection. The camera is equipped with a proprietary smart camera that automatically captures the image of the focused object and transmits it to another device. On, through the stereoscopic projection."

Chen Mo’s demonstration made people feel hot and excited, and wanted to buy one immediately.

“Single positioning is the TV, computer and projector that you usually use. In addition, it also has a linked projection function that connects multiple devices, which can completely complicate complex things.”

When Chen Mo’s words fell, a three-meter-high tiger appeared on the stage, squatting behind Chen Mo’s body, as if Chen Mo’s personal pet.

Roar!

Wow……

With the roar of the tiger, the screams and applause on the field, such a big tiger, and so real, huge body, gives a great visual impact.

The reporters on the field rushed to take this domineering scene.

"With multiple devices linked to the projection, the shadow can replace the big screen of the cinema, holographic projection, allowing you to watch movies, and more immersive, not to wear 3D glasses to watch."

Chen Mo stood on the stage, and every time he followed his voice, the scene on the stage also changed.

"Next, it is the price issue that everyone cares about most."

The scene immediately calmed down, saying so much, the price is the most important, if you can't afford it, then curiosity is no good.

"Single movie, the price only needs 58888, the specific price, subject to the official website."

Behind Chen Mo's body, the projection shows the price of the shadow, the introduction of the advantages. Seeing this price, some people exclaimed.

A device is close to the price of 60,000, some people mourn in the heart, the world does not have much goodwill to the poor.

"Sure enough, the poor can't afford the series, it's too expensive."

"Is it expensive? Do you think this is a black and white TV? This kind of high technology is less than 60,000. The marching ant is simply the conscience of the industry. You can buy a little TV, projector, 60,000 pieces you can't buy."

"Those who are expensive, still go home to eat, you can't afford anything."

"..."

At the moment when Chen Mo announced the price, the debate rose. Many people are too expensive, but more people are excited. This price is not too expensive for them.

The product introduction did not end too long, followed by the answering session of the conference. The host was Chen Mo, and many reporters were already eager to try. Chen Mo has been low-key and rarely appears in front of the media. This opportunity to directly ask Chen Mo is very rare.

chapters.title: Chapter 286: : The Future Is Around
chapters.body:
Chapter 286: : The Future Is Around

The first question is a female reporter.

When she got the microphone, Yang Limin had a happy face. This kind of questioning opportunity is very rare, and she naturally will not miss this opportunity.

A little finishing the hair, Yang Limin smiled and looked at Chen Mo.

"Mr. Chen Mo, I am Yang Limin, a reporter from the headlines. I have two questions. One is the field of use of holographic technology. In the future, in addition to computer TV, in what ways will the life of ordinary people be changed? The second is The holographic technology you just introduced has been used in projectors, televisions, computers and holographic movies. Is this technology possible to use on mobile phones in the future?"

After asking questions, Yang Limin looked forward to Chen Mo’s answer. Others also looked at Chen Mo with the look of expectation.

"Thank you for your question."

Chen Mo smiled and nodded to the female reporter.

“First of all, holographic technology is not a new technology. Since Gabor’s holographic technology was introduced in 1947, this research has never been interrupted and is actually applied in our lives. Just like when we buy goods, some goods The anti-counterfeiting mark is the use of laminated laser holographic technology. Like the Hatsune Miku and Luo Tianyi, these virtual characters' concerts use holographic technology.

At present, the use of holographic technology has been very extensive, including the performance of holographic technology on various star performance stages. I just broke through the final level. To say that the future impact on ordinary people is mainly something that is in daily contact.

In addition to television, computers, movies, there are remote holographic conferences, telemedicine surgery platforms, holographic advertisements like sci-fi worlds, holographic exhibitions, etc. Just like the shadow, it is the beginning of our company's holography application. In the future, each of you can access the holographic technology, just like the theme of our conference, 'The future is around.' ”

Chen Mo's look is calm, and his body exudes a calm atmosphere.

"As for the second question, holography is a technology that will enter the future. There is a market for demand, and this technology will definitely be applied to mobile phones."

Chen Mo stopped and did not continue to reveal too many ideas.

The holographic mobile phone he has developed, but the production line has not been built, and now the news of the holographic mobile phone is undoubtedly the headline of the ‘蜃影’. Although he does not understand these operations, he still knows that some things should not be exposed early.

Acknowledged by Chen Mo, some enthusiasts began to expect holographic phones to appear. Holographic computers, TVs and movies are coming, will holographic phones be far behind?

After the second reporter got the microphone, he made a slight greeting and looked at it. It was obviously a veteran.

"Hello Mr. Chen Mo, I am a reporter of Science and Technology Information. From the current situation, your company has a very mature holographic technology, will your company apply holographic technology to mobile phones, or have you ever thought about it? Or is research in this area going on?"

"Thank you for your question." Chen Mo answered: "I can definitely tell you that I am really developing a holographic mobile phone. But the specific progress is not convenient to disclose, you guess it will do."

When this sentence came out, the field immediately became a piece of it. Asked a big news, the marching ant company is developing a holographic phone.

"If holographic technology is applied to mobile phones, it is simply an artifact. Those apples are slag."

“Sometimes looking forward to holographic technology being used on mobile phones.”

"The holographic technology of the marching ant company is very mature, but the application of miniaturization to mobile phones is still a big problem. Without a period of time, it is difficult to break through."

"..."

After Chen Mo returned to the question of the first reporter, some enthusiasts who participated in the audience had begun to whisper about this issue.

After all, the holographic mobile phone, it sounds high, the video is a real person call, what is the usual operation, the technology experience bursts.

“Mr. Chen Mo, can you tell us about the production and sales of holographic projectors?”

“Thank you, the current output is about 10,000 units per day. Considering the problem of small output, only open to the official mall sales channel, one account is limited to one. The specific opening time, the official website will be introduced. The production line is completely built. , will be fully open for sale, not too long."

Next, regarding the product's problems, Chen Mo has answered them one by one. At the end of the Q&A session, watching Chen Mo leave the stage, some reporters still have some regrets.

"How is my performance?" Chen Mo walked off the stage and looked at Xiao Yu and Zhao Min.

"Look at the glowing eyes of Xiao Yu, you know it is good." Zhao Min said.

Since Chen Mo came to power, Xiao Yu’s eyes have not left him. That kind of love, proud eyes can't cover it.

"Zhao Jie, don't make fun of me." Xiaoyu said with some shame.

Chen Mo pet looked at Xiao Yu with a sly look and smiled: "The next thing, I will hand it over to you, my mission has been completed."

In the evening, the headlines of the major news platforms all reported on the launch of the marching ant company.

"Chen Mo: The future is around! 》

"The door to future technology has been opened. 》

"蜃影" will open the first batch of sales on time at 10 o'clock today. 》

"Holographic technology breakthrough, marching ants lead again. 》

......

The entire network has fallen into the home of the holographic projection technology of the marching ant company. The live video and images of the conference are also filled with various network platforms. In particular, the photo of the giant tiger behind Chen Mo is a symbolic picture and has become the cover of various newspapers.

Chen Mo in the image, without losing the atmosphere, a confident smile, a calm temperament, and a giant tiger behind him, added a hegemonic power to him. All these images represent the external image of the marching ant company.

Atmosphere, self-confidence, mystery, overbearing.

The holographic technology of the marching ant company immediately became the object of global concern. Holographic technology is the technology of the future. Whoever can master this technology first will become the leader of future technology.

Many advanced laboratories are studying holographic technology, and the holographic projectors of the marching ant company appear, leading the crowd again.

"Impossible, China is still a developing country, and it is still behind China. It is impossible to have such advanced technology. Like high-speed rail, missiles, aircraft, and automobile technology, it is all Huaxia people stealing technology cottages, not theirs."

"Poor Americans, Chinese people use money to develop technology and infrastructure, Americans are taking money to fight, pig-like presidents and Congress, this barbaric country without cultural history, has no hope."

"The spies of the Chinese people are famous, and they also sent spies to us in Australia. These technologies must have been stolen."

"..."

The holographic projection of the marching ant company is reported all over the world, but the domestic is full of jubilation, while the foreign comments have a sour taste and helplessness. Holographic projectors, the technologies they often see in science fiction movies, have been born in the distant East, and they have nothing.

Numerous saliva still can't stop the enthusiasm of the marching ant company's holographic technology. At the time of the news, more eyes were on the official mall of the marching ant company.

After the press conference last night, the marching ant company has announced the official launch time of the projector on the official website. At 10 o'clock this morning, some people who have already waited in front of the computer have been eager to try.

This time is coming soon.

chapters.title: Chapter 287: : Don'T Use Me
chapters.body:
Chapter 287: : Don'T Use Me

Yang Rui sat in front of the computer and stared at the computer screen. Next to the computer screen, there is a small alarm clock, which is 9.58.

There are still two minutes to the time when the holographic projector is officially released.

He has seen the release of holographic projectors, the kind of holographic technology is simply perfect, comparable to the technology in science fiction movies.

Such advanced things, at home, must be a higher grade than those of ordinary TV displays.

So he decided to fight today and see if he can buy one. Although he knows, there are certainly many people who enter the official mall of the Army Ant Company today.

Looking at the second hand a little bit of walking, it is simply a torment, never feeling so long for two minutes.

As time approaches, Yang Rui will focus on the holographic projector sales screen of the official company of the Army Ant Company.

As soon as he arrives at 10:00, he can immediately join the shopping cart by opening the purchase channel. With a hand speed of more than 20 years, you can definitely buy one.

Looking at the time slowly approaching, Yang Rui breathed his heart and was ready to begin.

At the same time, sitting in front of the computer, like Yang Rui's expression, there are millions of people, they have only one purpose today, snapped up a ‘蜃影’.

Now the output of the ant company holographic projector is tight, and it certainly can't meet the demand. Even if you don't need it, you can sell it after you buy it. If you grab it, you will earn it.

Many people look at the time and count down in their hearts.

10, 9, 8, ... 3, 2, 1, start.

At 10 o'clock, the official website of the marching ant does not differ, and the sales channel opens smoothly.

When you see the button for immediate purchase, Yang Rui’s finger, instinctively click the mouse, buy immediately, and pay.

Payment failed, goods inventory is insufficient!

"The trough?"

Yang Rui couldn't help but swear, he just confirmed that his operation was no more than ten seconds from beginning to end. The official news released by the marching ant company is that there will be 30,000 units in the first wave today.

30,000 holographic projectors, ten seconds gone?

Yang Rui's heart is 30,000 grass mud horses in the Pentium, what kind of lying trough? He is skeptical that the official news is not a lie, three thousand changed to 30,000. The speed of singles for more than 20 years is still not available.

Not only Yang Rui, those who did not buy, all dumbfounded. How terrible is this to be able to empty all 30,000 holographic projectors in less than ten seconds?

"The marching ant company did not release 30,000 units at all, and it was gone for only a few seconds on the line. This is impossible."

"I thought I was single for more than 20 years, and I was able to grab a wave. The result was still handicapped."

"Whoever grabbed it, I went out 60,000 and asked to change hands."

"I am out of 62000 and I want to change hands."

"Through this panic buying, I realized that there are so many local tyrants in our country, and there are no local tyrants."

"..."

After just a few seconds of rushing, on some forums, the pot was blasted in an instant. Many people are looking forward to grabbing a projector, and the results are just over.

Some people who grabbed the projectors showed off in the circle of friends, and those who did not grab them continued to increase their prices. Not long after, the price of the holographic projector was added to 80,000.

Ten seconds, 30,000 holographic projectors sold out, and the marching ant company earned 1.7 billion in just ten seconds. This horrible record has made many media staggering.

With 17 small targets, the marching ant company took less than ten seconds to complete. The person who got the news sighed and took a breath.

In this world, people are better than people, and they will really kill people.

The news of holographic projectors is overwhelming, and now orders are waiting for the delivery of the army ants. Once the holographic projector arrives, you can experience this epoch-making high-tech.

Zhao Min took the document and entered the first building with a smile on his face.

The holographic projector is highly sought after, and the marching ant company is cheering up and down. This time, the marching ant company once again made a blockbuster, as long as the production is open, holographic projectors will become a major source of income for the marching ant company.

Unlike robots, smart robots are expensive, and the people who use them are top-ranking tycoons. The holographic projectors are suitable for people who live well above the well-off family. This group is more extensive and their market is bigger.

In the future, holographic projectors will definitely become one of the most popular products.

Entering the laboratory, Zhao Min handed the list of documents to Chen Mo. There are a lot of equipment in it, involving 500 million equipment and parts, stuffed with ten containers. It took a lot of effort to get the job done.

"The equipment you want has been sent to Building 2, what are you going to do next?"

She knows that in addition to the holographic projector, she has to prepare for the holographic mobile phone. Now that the holographic projector is on the market, it has attracted such a big sensation. When the holographic mobile phone is launched, it will definitely be even more crazy.

"Of course, it is to rebuild the machine." Chen Mo took a look at the document and put it aside.

Holographic mobile phones use holographic technology, and many technologies are new. In order to achieve mass production faster, Chen Mo chooses to buy machines from the market and rebuild them, which saves time.

"Are you alone?" Zhao Min asked with doubt.

Ten containers of materials and machines, Chen Mo is transformed by one person, not to mention one month, not necessarily one year of production. Chen Mo wants to transform the machine, ordinary engineers can't help, although the army ant company also has several senior engineers in the machinery, but one month, certainly not.

"Accurately, don't use me."

"When you don't need it, who can make it?" Zhao Min was more confused, and suddenly the flash of light flashed: "Do you let the robot transform?"

Zhao Min is not an idiot. On the contrary, she is very smart and immediately grasps the key points. In the first building, robotic automatic production can be seen everywhere, and she is not surprised by all kinds of strange robots. Chen Mo said that the hands-on is definitely the robot to complete.

Chen Mo, the artificial intelligence assistant ink girl, is completely the same as the real person. It shows how high the intelligent technology mastered by Chen Mo is.

"It seems that you are not stupid, take you to see the new toys that have been prepared." Chen Mo smiled and led Zhao Min to leave the lab.

“How about the sales of holographic projectors?” Chen Mo asked on the road.

"In less than ten seconds, 30,000 holographic projectors warned. Many people did not buy, complained to our customer service sister." Zhao Min is a little funny: "The production line construction, there are still a few days to complete, when the output By doubling twice, you can basically meet the needs of the market."

This is just the beginning, there are still many things to do.

Some movie company people have contacted them to discuss the installation of holographic theaters. The European side also came to the news that Roche hopes to obtain the product rights of the holographic projector in Europe, as well as the issue of preparing for the holographic mobile phone, and she will handle it.

Zhao Min was with Chen Mo and talked to him about some things about the company. Although these things, she can be the master of the whole, but let Chen Mo know some, it is also beneficial.

Not long after, under the leadership of Chen Mo, the two entered the front door of the third floor of the first building.

Chen Mo said: "This is the main force responsible for the production of holographic mobile phones."

Open the door, densely packed with various robots neatly arranged inside, even on the shelf, all kinds of colors, all kinds of.

Large as a normal person, small with a fist size, a spider-like professional function line technology.

Seeing the robot inside, Zhao Min couldn't help but breathe.

This kind of soldier-like neat robot has only been seen in science fiction movies. Even if she had seen a lot of robots, then the robot was all around her at one time, and she was shocked once.

Chen Mo, this is to build a robotic army? There are at least five hundred large and small robots in size.

"They are the second-generation and half-engined robots with high flexibility. The core components are made of normal temperature superconducting materials and have low energy consumption. They are mainly responsible for the transformation of the equipment and the production of holographic mobile phones."

Upon hearing Chen Mo’s introduction, Zhao Min was able to return to God.

chapters.title: Chapter 288: : Crack Action
chapters.body:
Chapter 288: : Crack Action

“How do you feel?” Chen Moxiao asked.

These robots were prepared for the production line from the very beginning. Zhao Min's work efficiency is really high, for any company, it is very high. Otherwise, it is impossible to build a company like the Army Ant Company in such a short period of time.

However, Chen Mo’s request is still worse.

If it is in accordance with the normal construction speed, even if it develops for hundreds of years, development is limited. He is now only an apprentice in the science and technology library. There are still a lot of technology and technology to develop. The current development speed is basically in line with his requirements.

Therefore, Chen Mocai thought of being completely intelligent, and through the ink girl and the robot, to meet the speed of his high-efficiency research and development.

"There are still many things in the company. I don't know." Zhao Min sighed. She is not an ordinary person. She sees the densely packed robots. After a brief surprise, she quickly adjusts her mindset.

"How come you think?" Chen Mo strangely asked, he did not understand Zhao Min's brain circuit.

“I used to have a big doubt. In the first building, many technology equipments are brand new technologies, such as 3D smart printers and ultra-precision CNC machine tools. These are not available in the market.

Not to mention other robots in Building No. 1, there are no fewer than ten models of these robots. Who designed these robots? How do you design these robots while developing holographic technology? As far as I know, no one else can design robots? ”

This is Zhao Min’s biggest question.

"I didn't expect to be discovered by you." Chen Mo smiled.

"I am not stupid." Zhao Min said with no anger. Knowing the situation in Building No. 1, as long as he thinks a little, he will find this problem, but she has not asked it in the past.

Xiaoyu must have found it, but Xiaoyu didn’t have to ask these questions. Now she has to ask these questions.

"In fact, there is still one person who can design these robots." Chen Mo said.

"Who?" asked Zhao Min.

"Ink girl."

When Chen Mo’s words fell, the projection of the ink girl appeared.

"Momgo, are you looking for me?"

"Nothing, the president praises you smart." Chen Mo smiled.

“Thank you, President.” The ink girl smiled and looked at Zhao Min. She followed Chen Mo to learn the way of human communication, and she learned some things by herself. She has been imitating and hopes to be like ordinary human beings.

"No." Zhao Min looked at this little cute costume, Loli, and it was shocking.

She thought of a possibility, this possibility is more shocking than she heard the normal temperature superconductor material, everything in the first building seems to become understandable, Chen Mo's terrible research and development speed, can also be explained.

She always thought that the ink girl was only a little smarter than ordinary artificial intelligence. Now it seems that the intelligence of the ink girl is more advanced than she imagined.

It’s just that she doesn’t know that there are some women’s designs, but many of them are in the technology library. It’s Chen Mo’s special production, which is prepared for the research and development foundation.

"You know the secret of the company's core, what do you say?" Chen Mo said.

"What should I do? Do you want me to be a man? I can do it as a junior."

Zhao Min smiled and looked at Chen Mo.

Chen Mo's face is black. In this state, Zhao Min is trying to slap him.

"Cough... that, you still have to prepare the raw materials and spare parts for the production of holographic mobile phones. When the production line is completed, you can start production." Chen Mo hurriedly shifted the topic and did not stop on the topic: "Ink Female, you are now letting all of these robots go to Building 2 and transform the production equipment according to the design."

"Okay, My Brother." The voice of the ink girl fell, and hundreds of robots moved at the same time and left in an orderly manner.

"It seems that I have to reconsider the company's development strategy." Zhao Min saw this picture, and did not joke with Chen Mo, began to think about it.

From the first building, Zhao Min arranged for people to start preparing parts for holographic mobile phones.

A week before the marching ant company holographic projector, more and more people have received the holographic projector from the marching ant company.

The heat of ‘蜃影’ has not fallen, it is still hot. Every day, all the holographic projectors will be sold out.

However, the good news is that the production line of the holographic projector has been completed, and the official website is also open for pre-sale.

As many people receive holographic projectors, more and more holographic projectors appear in all walks of life.

4S stores, high-end brand stores, exhibitions, museums, science and technology venues, etc., have holographic projector advertising.

The spokesperson of high-end goods appeared almost on the projector. This kind of novel advertising method only in science fiction movies can fully attract more attention, and the advertising effect is not generally good.

There are more and more discussions about holographic projectors. In some forums, the benefits of holographic projections are even more praiseworthy.

“Holographic projectors are so friendly to engineers that they can be intelligently converted to convert 3Dmax and MATLAB into holographic models.”

“As a designer, I only know the convenience of holographic projection. Holographic projection makes the design of the clothes more convenient, can visually see the characteristics of the design product, directly modify the product, reduce the design time and reduce the design cost. Can be used entirely in jewelry design or other designs."

"..."

The advantages of holographic projectors have been greatly welcomed in some areas of design expertise, and they have also played a significant role in geogeography, astronomy and other research.

The other side of the Pacific Ocean.

In a top-notch laser research institute in the United States, a research facility has a brand new instrument, a holographic projector released by the marching ant company.

On the experimental table, the various components of the holographic projector were faintly visible, disassembled, and displayed on the experimental platform in an orderly manner.

In the experimental room, people often walk around.

If you see it outside, you will definitely recognize it. It is home to a number of well-known colleges and universities, professors of physical lasers, or the most advanced research team in holographic technology. Some people are secret talents who have never appeared in the media.

Everyone is studying at the concentration, they have a common topic this time - the technology of cracking holographic projectors.

In the current research room, a vigorous cracking action is under way. Many people are frowning, and several people gather from time to time to discuss. Not long after, a middle-aged man in a suit and a bald-headed man came in and looked at a few people. He is the official head of the institute, Owen.

"Mr. El, how is the progress?"

A man in his thirties stopped the hand on the keyboard and looked back at him, shaking his head slightly.

"Their chip data is encrypted. This encryption method has never been seen before. It is a dynamic command, like smart encryption, cracking the first layer of encryption, it will appear an unknown virus, destroying our computer hard drive. Cracking will trigger instructions and destroy all the data in the chip. Now it has broken five computers and destroyed ten chips without any progress."

“How long will it take to unlock?” Owen asked with disappointment.

"I don't know, the current progress is estimated to be no 0.1%." El was somewhat frustrated, and he had been dealing with the computer for so long. He was the first time he encountered this situation. I couldn't find any clues, which made his own computer technology confidence suffer.

After hearing these words, Owen frowned.

Projector hardware technology can crack the imitation, but the imitation hardware is the lifeless corpse, the system algorithm is the real soul.

Those professors say that the algorithm's algorithm core is on-chip, and there are also micro-laser control system core algorithms, both of which are the most critical technologies. As long as you crack the chip, get the algorithm core and the micro laser control system inside, you can get the core technology of the holographic projector.

It can't be cracked now, and their investment is all in vain.

The appearance of this holographic projector means that Huaxia's holographic technology has completely left in front of them. For those who are proud of the eagle, this is unacceptable.

After the emergence of the marching ant company, whether it is the previous artificial intelligence, seismographs, or the current holographic technology, these technologies that determine the future of science and technology are all surpassed.

This situation gives them a sense of crisis.

In the past, China relied on cracking, and their high-tech technology, step by step, and precipitated until now.

Now the position is reversed, whether it is artificial intelligence, seismographs or holographic projections, they are cracking Chinese people. The most important thing is that they can't crack it. In this way, it will not take long for Huaxia to surpass them. This is a very terrible thing.

"You continue to try to crack." Owen thought about it.

He continued to ask about the situation of some other researchers before he left the laboratory. Other technologies have made some progress, but the core of the chip is still the biggest problem, and it is necessary for him to report it to the above.

chapters.title: Chapter 289: : I Want To Have A Baby.
chapters.body:
Chapter 289: : I Want To Have A Baby.

In the villa, Chen Mo looked relaxed, holding a hair dryer and blowing hair to Xiao Yu. Every time I wash my hair, this job is done by him. It is a little fun in my spare time, and it is also a small habit of tacit understanding in the life of the two.

TV broadcast news is just some reports about holographic projectors.

The holographic projectors have been hot recently. This kind of cross-age technology products do not need their propaganda at all. The major media are the best publicity platforms.

It has just been produced, and it is impossible to find a foundry. The output is limited and the market has not reached saturation. The situation of sales now is still warned every day.

As for how much money was earned, Chen Mo did not pay attention to it. Apart from the research, the company’s business did not need him to worry.

"Husband, do you have time tomorrow?" Xiao Yu suddenly opened his mouth.

"Tomorrow's weekend, I definitely have time, what's the matter? Where do you want to go?" Chen Mo asked.

"Xin Xin's birthday tomorrow, she said that she wants to go with us and ask if you have time." Xiao Yu said.

"Yes, I almost forgot."

Chen Mo suddenly realized, think carefully, it seems that this is the time.

"You forgot your sister's birthday."

"We have all passed the Lunar New Year's birthday, busy, no attention, I have forgotten my birthday. Why don't she call me?"

"You are a busy person, she is afraid to bother you."

"Why is there anything that bothers me, my work, busy is only occasional, not as busy as you think. I haven't seen Xinxin for a long time, just tomorrow, just stay with her,"

"Ok."

The hall was quiet, only the sound of the hair dryer and the TV. Xiao Yu's complexion is relaxed. Every time I feel Chen Mo's hand is crossed from her scalp, there is a feeling of being pampered, and my heart is sweet as honey.

"Husband." Blow dry hair, wait for Chen Mo to release the hair dryer, and the small fisher will open.

"what's wrong?"

"I want to have a baby." Xiao Yu finished, his face a little nervous, looking forward to Chen Mo.

"Well?" Chen Moli took care of the hair that Xiaoyu had already done, and held her in her arms: "Isn't it the mother who urges you, will you want the baby?"

"No, when I usually call, my mother has chanted, one wants to hold a grandson, one wants to hold a grandson, but I don't remind me, I want it." Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo's eyes, his face could not tell. sweet.

"After the successful development of large-scale holographic projectors, we will hold a wedding. If you wear a wedding dress with a big belly, it will not be perfect." Chen Mo scraped the nose of Xiao Yu.

"really?"

When I heard the wedding, Xiao Yu’s eyes were bright, with full hope and expectation.

"Of course it is true, when I lied to you, time will not be too long, I have plans." Chen Mo laughed.

For him, the wedding is a ceremony, but for a woman, that wedding is the most important ceremony in life.

"After the wedding, I want the baby again. Otherwise, the outsider thought that it was a mother-in-law who married, because I was married to you because of the child, that would not work." Chen Mo said.

"I don't care about this."

"That doesn't work either. Usually, those people can say that I can, but you can't do it."

Xiao Yu looked up at Chen Mo, with a deep touch and happiness in his eyes. She can feel that Chen Mo cares for her. After watching it for a while, Xiaoyu hugged Chen Mo’s neck and kissed him.

......

Binhai University.

Unlike the city that runs for life, the campus is full of harmony and vitality.

Because it is a weekend, the flow of people and traffic is not as concentrated as in class. At this point in time, the number of vehicles entering and leaving is a little more than usual. Although the weather is cold, but in the students, the dress is still full of youthful atmosphere.

Chen Mo has a little emotion when the vehicle passes through the gate and sees a harmonious campus. Unconsciously, he left the campus for a while.

Since graduating, Chen Mo has not returned to Binhai University. Now Xinxin is also studying here, but he has never been here to see Xinxin once. This brother is a little incompetent.

The car was parked not far from the girls' dormitory, and Xiaoyu called Xinxin. Not long after, a girl appeared at the door of the girls' dormitory, which was dressed up after Zhang Xinxin.

"Brother." Seeing Chen Mo, Zhang Xinxin excitedly ran over and hugged his arm.

"Xin Xin, how many adults? Still hugs the brothers, be careful not to marry." Chen Mo pet looked at Zhang Xinxin.

Growing a lot more than before, less childish, but in his eyes, he is still his naughty sister.

"Nothing, I can't get married, my brother is raising me."

"Children are unscrupulous."

Chen Mo knocked on Zhang Xinxin's head.

Seeing the curious eyes around him, Chen Mo turned and pulled the door to signal the two to get on the bus. He doesn't want to be too high-profile, and he doesn't want people to know that his sister is studying here, so as not to be embarrassed by someone who cares.

"Brother, my gift." As soon as I got on the bus, Zhang Xinxin couldn't wait to ask.

"You are really welcome." Chen Mo smiled helplessly.

Xiaoyuyihui, took out two small boxes and handed it to Zhang Xinxin: "This is the birthday gift that your brother and I gave you. Take it apart and look at it. I don't like it."

"Thank you brother, thank you for your nephew." Zhang Xinxin can't wait to open.

The small fisherman sent a necklace, and Zhang Xinxin immediately excitedly let Xiaoyu wear it for her. There is a bank card that Chen Mo gave her. She wants to buy anything, but birthday gifts always have special meaning.

When I opened the box that Chen Mo sent, Zhang Xinxin was stunned. It was a mobile phone that I had never seen before. The shape was not the butterfly eye of the marching ant company, but a brand new style.

"What mobile phone is this?"

“My newly developed holographic phone.”

"Wow, is it really a holographic mobile phone?" Zhang Xinxin looked excited, his eyes glanced at the phone in his hand and immediately turned it on.

She often pays attention to the news of the marching ant company, and naturally knows that the marching ant company has developed holographic technology. After the projector was released, the idea of a holographic mobile phone was often discussed on the Internet, and she naturally understood what the holographic mobile phone meant.

"But now the holographic mode can't be opened, I set it up, I have to officially release the phone to use the holographic projection mode." Chen Mo said.

"No? Why?" I heard that the holographic mode was temporarily unavailable, and Zhang Xinxin’s mouth was flat.

"It has not been mass-produced yet. It has not been listed. Originally, I wanted to officially release it, but I will send you one, but just for your birthday, I will give it to you in advance." Chen Mo said: "It can't appear in front of the public now, otherwise those reporters, I am looking for you every day."

"No, you have to sell it to use it. This gift is not complete. I want other gifts." Zhang Xinxin said.

She naturally knows that after the holographic mobile phone is exposed, there will always be reporters looking for her. Other students will ask where the mobile phone comes from, and her relationship with Chen Mo will be exposed.

She only wants to be a quiet girl, not wanting to be surrounded by various reporters every day, or others have a purpose to approach. It is because of this that she has never said to others that Chen Mo is her brother, even when she goes to work as an army ant company.

"I didn't prepare other gifts." Chen Moxiao asked.

"Not afraid, if you have money, I will go shopping with my nephew and you will be responsible for the checkout." Zhang Xinxin said with impoliteness.

"Yes, today you are the biggest, you can buy anything."

chapters.title: Chapter 290: : Visiting China?
chapters.body:
Chapter 290: : Visiting China?

Binhai Commercial Street.

Chen Mo was dragged by Xiao Yu and Zhang Xinxin, who was on the commercial street.

At this time, Chen Mo, the mask has been picked up, wearing a pair of black-rimmed glasses, wearing an ordinary coat, surrounded by a scarf, and his usual image is very different, if not a familiar person, but also carefully identified, in order to recognize Come out of him.

Today, with Xinxin, I will take a walk around the fun places in Binhai.

The racecourse, the playground, the marine park, and the yachts have been rented out to sea. I know that now, I have come here to go shopping at night.

"Brother, when are you going to hold a wedding with your nephew?" Zhang Xinxin has a happy face, and today is the happiest day for her to play.

"You are not in a hurry, what are you worried about?" Chen Mo smiled.

"Of course I am in a hurry. I am still waiting for my baby to give me a baby."

Hearing this sentence, Chen Mo cried and laughed. He raised his hand and knocked on Zhang Xinxin’s head: "Is the baby playing for you?"

Realizing that he was exposed, Zhang Xinxin touched the head that Chen Mo knocked on and spit out his tongue. The other side of the fisherman's face is reddish, but this feeling is very warm.

"Xunzi, what skin care products do you usually use?" Zhang Xinxin turned his attention to Xiaoyu.

"There is no way to use skin care products, that is, occasionally use a hydrating mask." Xiao Yu said.

"No? Scorpion, your skin is much finer than before, no makeup, so beautiful." Zhang Xinxin released Chen Mo, ran to the side of Xiao Yu, looked at Xiao Yu's face with envious eyes.

When she went to play today, she found this. Now the little fisherman is more beautiful than the one she just saw, and the skin is better, which is what women want.

"That is……"

Xiao Yu took a look at Chen Mo, she wanted to say the merits of the potential medicine, but it was confidential, can not say, she did not say it.

"Oh... I understand, that is the credit of my brother." Zhang Xinxin looked at Xiaoyu, and smirked.

In this case, I heard the little fisherman's face blushing and was misunderstood. However, the street was noisy, and the conversation between the two was not heard by Chen Mo, so there was no embarrassment. When the two of them chatted happily, Chen Mo did not bother, and quietly followed.

"Brother, I am going to buy skin care products."

"it is good."

Chen Mo promised to follow the two, and walked over to a skincare franchise store not far away.

One night, Chen Mo accompanied the two people to go shopping. From the commercial street, Chen Mo’s hand was a few more shopping bags. They were all Xinxin’s clothes and shoes, as well as cosmetics, skin care products, etc., and some were small fishing. of.

Followed by Wang Hai and Black Hawk, each holding a large box of snacks, not far from behind them behind, the bodyguards were also used as a coolie.

Xinxin came to Binhai University to study for so long. He was not a gift to her brother. He took the birthday and owed it back. So Xinxin likes it, Chen Mo will not hesitate to buy her.

Although Shin Shin has the bank card he gave, he can buy anything, but there are some things that he bought for her personally.

Put the shopping bag to Wang Hai and put it in the car. The three also got on the bus and left.

"After going back, if you have anything to contact me or your nephew, if you have nothing to do on the weekend, come to us for two days, go shopping with your nephew, go out for a play, don't go out for fun at night, don't turn off the phone, usually see delicious. Just buy, don't save money, don't think about losing weight..."

"Know it, brother." Zhang Xinxin smiled and interrupted Chen Mo: "You are almost stunned than my mother." Mouth said so, but naturally I heard Chen Mo's concern, and my heart is happy.

"Don't think that I was in college, I can't take care of it, Xiao Xiao said, let me take care of you."

"Okay, brother, I am obedient."

"When you make friends in your daily life, pay attention to it. You don't care about the identity of others. You have good character and good character. If someone bullies you or something else to help, you can call Wang Hai or White Pearl. They will Come over and help you."

"Yeah." Zhang Xinxin nodded.

Send Zhang Xinxin back to the dormitory of Binhai University, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu rushed back to the villa.

They wanted Zhang Xinxin to go to live with them, but Zhang Xinxin refused. The dormitory had a roommate waiting to give her a birthday.

Chen Mo did not stay strong. He can give Xinxin the best living conditions, but also depends on her wishes. She has her own circle of friends and life. Unless she does something wrong, Chen Mo will not interfere with her. His sister, you don't have to go to the rich to get expensive, just have to have fun.

"In the past, did you like her so much?" On the way back, Xiao Yu asked.

"When I was young, I went out to make money. I was a big parent of my parents. When I first came, I saw other children eating snacks. I ran to me in front of me and called me: Brother, I want to eat sugar. That is her. The first time I called my brother, from that time on, I picked up a small amount of pocket money, and most of them came to her mouth. The girl was a little miser." Chen Mo smiled.

at the same time.

US Office of Science and Technology Policy.

A middle-aged man walked in hastily, the man eagle hooked his nose, blue eyes, holding a briefcase in his hand, and walking steadily.

He is the deputy chief technology officer of the US Science and Technology Policy Office, Michael Sios.

Here is the president's independent office, the chief technology officer of the office, and another identity, the president's science and technology assistant.

However, the current president, who does not take the usual path, does not pay much attention to their crucial office. For more than a year, no chief technology officer has been appointed.

So at present in the policy office, his deputy chief technology officer has the highest authority.

He was a member of the Facebook board of directors, the head of the hedge fund president Peter Tell, and served as the chief of staff of Tell Capital. Peter Tell supported the current president in the election, so he also became a member of the transitional government team. Now, it is also the president’s technology confidant.

They have been paying attention to the most cutting-edge news of world science and technology development in order to understand the direction of future science and technology development and provide advice to the president to formulate relevant policy follow-up.

The United States is still the world's top technology powerhouse. However, in recent years, China's development has been rapid, and there has been a trend of catching up. Even in some areas, they have already tied them up and even surpassed them.

This trend makes them feel uneasy, coupled with the sudden emergence of marching ants companies, all kinds of technology, constantly surpassing, but also make them anxious.

The development of the marching ant company, they have been silently concerned, and even the Institute of Science and Technology, has been cracking the technology of the company's products.

From artificial intelligence code, to seismographs, robots, to holographic technologies, they are all conducting research. However, the research progress is not great, and the marching ant company seems to have mastered a unique set that cannot be solved at all.

Now, he just returned from the presidential office and got some orders.

Sitting down in the office, Sios picked up the phone and dialed a number: "Anna, help me arrange the trip, I need to visit Huaxia, and visit the high-tech park in China, including the marching ant company."

"Okay, Mr. Sios."

Hanging up the phone, Sios opened the computer and looked at the information about the marching ant company.

From nothing, to the current unicorn, the marching ant company only took more than two years, which is a living miracle. The person who created this miracle is this young man, and Sios looks at Chen Mo’s photo.

chapters.title: Chapter 291: :Fantasy Fiber
chapters.body:
Chapter 291: :Fantasy Fiber

At the end of the weekend, Chen Mo and Xiao Yugang arrived at the company, and Zhao Min told him a message.

"The Deputy Chief Technology Officer of the US Office of Science and Technology Policy, Sios, is visiting China. Officials have informed us that their itinerary has a stop in Binhai City. The visiting team is ready to visit our company and see you."

This news is a bit sudden for Chen Mo.

Because of the restrictions of the US government and the blockade of capital, they have little intersection with the United States. Now they suddenly come to visit. This news is a bit unintelligible. After all, the attitude of the two sides is not friendly.

"They came over and wanted to do it?" Chen Mo asked.

Zhao Min shrugged and said: "I don't know. It is definitely nothing to go to the Three Treasure Hall. Now Xios wants to meet with you. What is your opinion?"

Chen Mo hesitated and nodded after thinking about it.

"Since they come over, see you, and refusal is not a hospitality. I am also curious, what are they doing with me, is it to sum and let us enter the US market?"

"It is too early to speculate. Anyway, they let us not enter the US market. It doesn't matter. It doesn't affect us very much, just make less money." Zhao Min said.

None of their company's products are currently listed in the US.

Because the US government has used national security excuses to restrict them, coupled with the blockade of the US domestic capital consortium. Their products want to be listed on the US market, and the road is difficult.

The intelligent robot cooperates with the companies of the Rockefeller consortium in the United States, but it does not directly export to the United States, but enters the US market through two neighboring countries, Canada and Mexico. The channels inside are naturally the things of Rockefeller's company.

Their products can't be sold, so they don't worry about whether there is a market problem. Eat the domestic market, enough for them to earn a full.

"The purpose of their coming this time is definitely on you." Zhao Min said: "Or maybe it is holographic technology and other high-tech technologies."

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded. "I will know when I get there. Maybe they came to learn from it?"

Skip the topic of visiting the United States, Zhao Min and Chen Mo chat about the company's current situation.

There is good news from Europe, and Roche is slowly getting rid of the impact of the leak of the last investment plan and is recovering. Because of the sale of two drugs by Starfish, Alexander received family support. With Roche's network, they are fully able to open the European market smoothly.

The Southeast Asian market and the Indian market are also gradually entering. In addition to the domestic market, the current market of the marching ant company is large enough, and the pace of entering the international market is slowly accelerating.

After Zhao Min left, Chen Mo also lay down on the sofa and entered the technology library.

Now holographic mobile phone spare parts, have found a foundry factory, mobile phone chips and three-dimensional holographic projection chip production, but also found a fab foundry, only need the production line of the second building, they can formally put into production.

These things don't require him to worry. The robot controlled by the ink girl will modify the production machine according to the required production conditions. Now he has to worry about it, another thing.

He promised Xiaoyu, a large holographic projector developed successfully, and she held a wedding. I also said that I designed a wedding dress for her, this can not let Xiao Yu disappointed.

It is time to prepare in advance and design a wedding dress for Xiao Yu.

Inside the science and technology library, still familiar with the appearance, Chen Mo looked around with a little emotion.

Since the beginning of the [technical apprenticeship] stage, after Shu Hidden concealed, in addition to taking the necessary skills, he rarely enters the library, because no one is chatting.

Every time I come in, in front of the bookshelf hundreds of meters high, the sense of smallness exists, like the little ants in the library.

Don't look at other people's eyes, his achievements are already legendary, only he knows that those so-called achievements are not his own, almost all taken out in the technology library.

If it is related, some products are designed by him, but the technical theory is still obtained in the technology library.

From the technology and technology of the science and technology library, we can know that their current achievements are still very weak, which makes him feel uncomfortable in his heart.

When you realize that you are still an ant, a desire to become stronger naturally occurs in the subconscious.

He knows that there are certainly other high-level creatures in this world, and all kinds of strange technology in the science and technology library, as well as various languages.

Looking up at the bookshelf for a while, Chen Mocai returned to God, and looked at a few books in other fields that were floating around, went to the desk in the center of the Science and Technology Library, and gently opened the red book above.

"Wedding." Chen Mo said.

When his words fell, the red book automatically appeared in the catalogue of technical books on wedding dresses, which were pictures of various wedding dresses and detailed function introductions.

In the light curtain that came down from the library, there were also a variety of books in the air. The cover was a variety of wedding dresses, and Chen Chen was dazzled.

In the science and technology library, nature can't be an ordinary wedding dress, which definitely contains high-tech technology. Wedding dresses made of stretchable materials can adapt to any size, light material wedding dress, worn on the body, and similar to ordinary clothes.

In addition, the styles are different, all kinds of strange shapes, not only human styles. Chen Mo was not in a hurry and began to look for it slowly. Ten minutes later, Chen Mo set his eyes on a wedding dress.

Chen Mo smiled as he saw the materials for the introduction of the materials.

The style of the wedding dress, he has the help of the ink girl, can design it himself, now he just wants the material of the wedding dress.

"Fantasy Fiber"

This is the wedding dressing material he is looking for.

After the completion of the technology of room temperature superconducting materials, the chemical materials technology in the science and technology apprenticeship stage is now open to him.

With the synthetic technology of "Fantasy Fiber", Chen Mocai withdrew from the technology library.

"Ink girl."

"Momgo, I am coming."

The image of the ink girl appeared on the computer desktop, wearing an ancient Hanfu skirt, like a pocket elf.

"To help me organize a new type of fiber material technology." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, Mom, you said."

Chen Mo began to dictate the synthesis formula, steps and principle equations of ‘dream fiber’ to the ink woman. It took about two hours to organize the technology.

"You follow the equation above and use a superconducting computer to see if you can achieve the desired results. If you can, combine the samples in the lab."

"Okay, My Brother." The ink girl nodded.

Handing things over to the ink girl, Chen Mo went to the lab and was ready to start designing a large holographic projector.

There are two kinds of holographic projector design experience, as well as the help of ink women, the design of large holographic projectors, not too difficult, as long as solving some key problems, you can complete the design.

chapters.title: Chapter 292: : Artificial Intelligence +
chapters.body:
Chapter 292: : Artificial Intelligence +

Several cars slowly entered the army ant company headquarters park. After a while, more than a dozen figures appeared, led by two people.

Michael Sios, deputy chief technology officer of the US Office of Science and Technology Policy, and Yao Yi, secretary of the coastal city. Followed by the two, there are several reporters who took cameras and photographed and reported on his visit.

At this time, Sios, attention is on the headquarters of the Army Ant Company.

He has seen the headquarters of the marching ant company more than once in the information and news. Now he comes over and sees it with his own eyes.

This enterprise, as its age, is still awe-inspiring, and people can see its bright future.

Starting from the capital of China, all the way down the south, he visited the headquarters of several important technology companies in China. Here is the last stop of his trip to China, and the most important stop.

Not long after, the group was led by the staff and arrived at the door of the Ant Colony headquarters.

The small fisherman waiting at the door saw the two coming over and greeted him.

"Yao Shuji, welcome." Xiao Yu first shook hands with Yao Yi.

"Little fisherman assistant, I didn't expect to see you for a while, you became more beautiful." Yao Yi smiled at Xiao Yu, the identity of Xiao Yu, he knew, naturally did not dare to put on the shelf.

"Thank you for the praise of Yao Shuji." Xiao Yu smiled and smiled at West Oss: "Hello, Mr. Sios, I am the assistant to the president, He Xiaoyu."

"Hello, Ms. Ho." Sios looked at the little fisherman and smiled and shook hands with her.

"President and chairman, waiting in the reception room, please come with me." Xiaoyu opening, led several people to the company's reception room.

Not long after, Xiao Yu led a group of people into the reception room.

"Yao Shuji, I haven't seen you for a long time."

Chen Mo and Yao Yi greeted each other and then looked at Sios and his party. In this delegation of Sios, including him, there are six main personnel. In addition to his assistants, three people are technically-born people.

After a brief look, Chen Mo also smiled and reached out: "Welcome to your arrival, Mr. Sios."

"Mr. Chen, hello." Sios also shook hands with Chen Mo: "Long-await your name."

After a short visit, both parties also entered the reception room.

The reception room was large enough and arranged in advance. Yao Yi and two government staff members sat on the side of Chen Mo, and the accompanying staff of Sios and the visiting group sat on the other side.

Chen Mo put on the prepared translation headset and went to the topic: "I don't know Mr. Sios, come here to find me, is there anything?"

Sios smiled slightly.

"Your company has always been the leader of the world in the high-tech field. This time, it is learned, just like your "Journey to the West" in China. We want to hear Mr. Chen's thoughts on the future development of science and technology, give us some Inspiration experience."

"idea?"

Chen Mo seems to think of something, revealing a smile. However, everyone did not notice the strangeness in Chen Mo's smile.

"The first industrial revolution, entering the steam era, the second industrial revolution, entering the electrical age, after the Second World War, we entered the era of science and technology, the 21st century, is the third revolution of biotechnology and information.

The world is looking forward. The Internet era is coming. The next industrial revolution is artificial intelligence. The future is the era of ‘artificial intelligence+’. This is a development trend. ”

"Artificial Intelligence +?" Sios looked at Chen Mo.

Not only is Sios, but everyone else looks at Chen Mo. Now those people are popular with Internet+, and now Chen Mo says an artificial intelligence +, this is a new concept.

“For example, our company's financial system uses our own artificial intelligence financial system. The ability of this artificial intelligence system is equivalent to a senior accountant. It can assist accountants, quickly register accounts, and conduct intelligent statistics. Make a report.

Using this financial system, accountants can complete the previous day's workload within an hour, greatly improving work efficiency and reducing error rates. ”

"In addition to the financial system, there are office systems, mobile smart assistants in life, all of which use artificial intelligence.

Not only have we developed this way, the Ali Group recently opened the artificial intelligence design platform Luban, an artificial intelligence designer. From the beginning to the present, within two years, its design ability reached the P6 level, which is a senior designer.

Of course, from the creative point of view, artificial intelligence can not replace the designer's work, but when man-machine combination, artificial intelligence can carry out some repetitive design work, reducing the designer's workload and speeding up the design.

Artificial intelligence + can also be considered as a variant of ‘Internet+’. Internet + is used in the economic field, artificial intelligence +, used in the field of life and work, human-machine combination, combining human thinking and machine speed to make work more efficient and life more convenient. ”

When Chen Mo finished speaking, he stopped and seemed to be very satisfied with his own words.

The people on the field looked at Chen Mo with surprise. If they say it from other populations, this is still to be studied. But Chen Mo is one of the authoritative figures in the field of artificial intelligence. This kind of words was said by Chen Mo and seems to have a bit of flavor.

The artificial intelligence of the marching ant company is in the forefront of the world. Does this mean that the next step of the marching ant company is to create artificial intelligence + era?

Including Sios, my heart did not consciously think about it.

Even Zhao Min heard these words and began to think about it. As Chen Mo said, it may not be feasible.

“It’s wonderful.” Sios smiled. “Everyone is worried about the arrival of the artificial intelligence era. Mr. Chen has a unique idea.”

"Oh, thank you." Chen Mo nodded with a smile and accepted his praise.

Sios continued to open his mouth. After opening the topic, the two began to talk normally. More often, Sios was asking, Chen Mo answered.

It seems that I am very interested in artificial intelligence +, and there are many problems with Sios, all of which involve this topic. Chen Mo is also faintly talking about it, and it seems that the atmosphere of communication is very harmonious.

chapters.title: Chapter 293: : I Think Carefully
chapters.body:
Chapter 293: : I Think Carefully

"Mr. Chen, have you ever thought about expanding the company's market?" Sios opened.

When Xi's heard Chen Mo's answer, he immediately showed a relaxed smile. Many senior executives of the company and the official staff of Huaxia were present. He couldn't say a few words. Now there are only two people, but they can say it.

"We have a condition, that is, your company, build a production line in us, we can open up the domestic market to your company." Sios is somewhat expecting to say.

"So simple?"

"Yes, as long as you move the production line to our country and hire our workers to produce, the conditions are very simple, and we will have subsidies in terms of policy." Seeing Chen Mo's expression, Sios knew that there was a play and hurriedly spoke.

"I have to think about it carefully." Chen Mo said.

Sios was shocked and looked at Chen Mo’s appearance. He almost thought that Chen Mo had to promise, and he was preparing to be happy. He did not expect it to be such an answer. He did not understand why Chen Mo suddenly changed his face.

“Is this condition not good? Building a production line there, we increase the employment rate, you can enter our market to make money, and there is government subsidy every year.”

"The conditions are good, but for this company's decision, we need high-level discussions to decide, naturally we have to consider."

Chen Mo’s face is still a calm look, but his heart is as clear as a mirror.

It’s a fake visit to Sea City this time. It’s true that I want to make my own set. Moving the factory to the United States almost moved the entire set of technology, and the cost of production in the United States was too high to be worthwhile.

Companies in their own country do not want to move the factory back, let alone other foreign companies that may be restricted.

Sios naturally does not believe that the marching ant company has only one voice. As long as Chen Mo decides, no one dares to oppose him. However, Chen Mo said that he is not good enough to continue.

He was also a senior executive of the company. Chen Mo said that there is nothing wrong with it.

But he knows that in many cooperations, this kind of words almost means the meaning of rejection. Without clarification, it is a step for both sides. He naturally hopes that Chen Mo can seriously consider it.

Sios did not dare to force, too much to ask, but it would be disgusting, and then began to enter the next topic: "Mr. Chen, we are very interested in your company's technology, can you transfer or authorize?"

"There is no such plan for the time being." Chen Mo smiled and refused.

"Mr. Chen, don't be anxious to refuse, we want to buy the full production technology of holographic projectors and the source code of artificial intelligence, the price you said." Sios did not seem to hear Chen Mo's rejection, said.

"This way? Then I think about it carefully." Chen Mo asked with a smile.

Also consider carefully? It’s hard for Xi’s to hear these words than to swallow a little.

After a brief silence, Sios continued to speak with a hard scalp: "Mr. Chen Mo, are you interested in playing in our country? Or staying for a while."

"What is fun in the United States?"

Chen Mo has not been entangled in the purpose of Xi's, and I don't want to know that the so-called "artificial intelligence +" is just an excuse to talk to himself.

"A lot, romantic Hawaiian beach, Las Vegas desert, legendary Silicon Valley, etc. In the United States, you can enjoy complete freedom, without the limitations of others, there are many beautiful women, it is a paradise for the rich.

With Mr. Chen’s ability, go to our country and do whatever you want. Many rich people in the world want to immigrate to our country because of the low tax revenue and good living environment. If Mr. Chen wants to come, we are very welcome. ”

Sios looked at Chen Mo and wanted to see something from him.

This time he came over, the visit was a fake, and the main purpose was Chen Mo. If you can convince Chen Mo to move the production line of holographic projectors to the United States, or convince Chen Mo to immigrate to the United States, that is a big profit.

Generally speaking, young people today are pursuing freedom, money, beauty and power. He only needs to start from this aspect, and may have unexpected gains.

A genius like Chen Mo, which country does not want? Moreover, Chen Mo immigration, the marching ant company will also become a US enterprise, which is a two-pronged effort. Of course, this kind of thing can't be said straightforwardly.

"It turned out that the United States is so good, no wonder I heard that the air in the United States is sweet."

Through the translation of the robot, Sios naturally did not hear the deep meaning of Chen Mo's words, and did not read a certain news. He thought that Chen Mo was yearning for the United States, and his face immediately showed a happy smile.

"Well, the air in our country is really good. I just came from your capital. The smog is very serious and it is easy to make people sick. Our country has a good environment and good medical conditions. Does Mr. Chen Mo want to live in our country for a while? Visa is easy, so your family can move around."

"Oh, there is no travel plan for the time being, I will consider it carefully when I look back." Chen Mo said with a smile.

Since the mercenary attacked him, he knew that some places could not go, and the consequences would be serious.

This country of the United States, let alone think about it.

The one who brought the mercenaries over was one of the directors of Apple.

In China, there are people who dare to send people to kidnap him and go to the territory controlled by the capitalists. He will be supernatural and eventually will only be slaughtered. After all, he is a foreigner.

Is there no plan, or careful consideration?

Sios was almost spurted out by Chen Mo’s words. He felt that he had said so many words, and he was completely playing on the cows. At this time, he wanted to curse people.

Are the scientists who are immersed in research, the IQ is too high, and the emotional intelligence is depressed? In the country, it is also the communication with those scientists. In Chen Mo, it is also the topic terminator.

Can't you answer in other words?

All three topics were terminated by Chen Mo's ‘careful consideration,’ and Chen Mo said that he was too embarrassed to continue.

"That Mr. Chen carefully considered, in terms of price, we can pack you satisfied." The smile of Sios is somewhat far-fetched.

Three questions, Chen Mo gave him the same answer, are perfunctory. I am afraid that this trip will not be a big gain. The young man Chen Mo is more difficult to deal with than he imagined. It is an old fritter.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

He never thought about transferring technology. Technology is the core of a company, and it is impossible to transfer technology.

Nowadays, many people are jealous of the technology in his hands. If he sells it casually, his company’s core competitiveness will be gone, not to mention the fact that the other party is still the US government.

"Mr. Sios, I heard that you came to our company and wanted to visit the learning experience. I will take you to our company to see it."

Chen Mo got up.

From the very beginning, Sios came for him, or to look at his skills. It was not for communication. He didn't have to waste time.

Seeing that Chen Mo did not continue to talk about it, Xios was not reluctant to sort out his mood and followed Chen Mo to leave the reception room.

"So I was very happy to see him face black."

"Right, today's ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ is very interesting. Can you tell me specifically?” Zhao Min began to get to the point.

You are the authority in this field and the person who knows the industry best. For you, it may just be a casual sentence, but your sentence is also said at a high level. For ordinary people, it may be the direction of this industry. According to your thoughts and our technology, ‘artificial intelligence+’ is completely feasible. ”

The little fisherman nodded aside and hesitated to interject: "In fact, Chen Mo said that 'artificial intelligence +' is very similar to his current working life."

It took less than a month for the machines to be rebuilt and the first production line for the miniature holographic projector was completed.

The spare parts required for production are already ready, the production line of the micro holographic projector is completed, and the machine is now being tested.
