Upon hearing this result, Zhao Min smiled.

Micro-holographic projectors are the core components of holographic mobile phones and are among the most important. Now that the micro-holographic projector is ok, the holographic phone can start mass production.

“What is the estimated production volume of a micro-holographic projector in one day?” Zhao Min asked.

“The production line works twenty hours a day. At three o'clock in the morning, it is shut down for four hours to maintain, one production line, and the production of raw materials is sufficient. The output of the whole day is about 20,000.” Chen Mo opened the mouth and the robot answered.

"It knows better than me." Chen Mo laughed.

Upon hearing this output, Zhao Min was amazed that there are five production lines in Building No. 2, which means that 100,000 miniature holographic projectors can be produced in one day.

Sure enough, this is the advantage of the robot, working for twenty hours, no need to eat and sleep, no need to pay. Reduce the cost, and don't worry about management problems, just repair the damaged robot.

If these intelligent production robots are promoted, humanity will once again usher in production changes.

It seems that those who are worried about robots taking away human jobs are there and have become possible.

However, she knows that these intelligent production robots are unlikely to appear in labor-intensive industries in a short period of time.

If a large number of intelligent robots are used to take over the positions of ordinary workers, the unemployment rate will rise, too many people will not work, and social conflicts will intensify. It will be very troublesome at that time.

Chen Mo also did not intend to promote these things to the ordinary people's work and life.

"Next, holographic phones can be officially produced, and you need to prepare for the listing." Chen Mo said.

Zhao Min nodded.

Chen Mo's research and development speed is too fast, faster than production.

Now that the holographic projectors are still hot, the market is not saturated yet, and now a holographic phone is coming out. If Chen Mo did not transform her own production line, she couldn't keep up with Chen Mo's rhythm. In her eyes, Chen Mo is a complete freak.

Leaving the second building, Zhao Min brought together the senior staff responsible for the mobile phone business and began to prepare for the listing of mobile phones.

As the head of the mobile phone R&D department of the marching ant company, their team is very embarrassed in the position of the marching ant company. He still remembers the shocking feeling of knowing the function of the new mobile phone. He realized that the gap between them and Chen Mo was not only one point, but a whole era.

This is the fortune of the same era as genius, and the sorrow of the same era as genius.

Against the backdrop of this genius, other so-called geniuses live in his shadow. They are behind the boss in an era, and it is precisely because of this that he turned away.

"This is a new mobile phone designed by the boss. Now it should be officially met with you." Seeing the eyes of everyone expecting, Zhao Min did not sell off the goods, and took Chen Mo to her mobile phone.

The eyes on the field were placed on the mobile phone in front of Zhao Min. They all want to know quickly what kind of functions Chen Mo designed this time.

Chen Mo is in the marching ant company and is the same as the existence of faith. Even if he does not usually manage the company, he is still the most prestigious person in the company.

Gentle, approachable, often appear in the company's dining hall, eat with them, some employees want to take a photo, never refused.

The key is his ability, the company's most advanced technology, is from the hands of Chen Mo. The marching ant company has its current status and is a symbol of global high-tech enterprises, almost all of which is Chen Mo’s credit.

Now employees of the marching ant company go out and say that they are working in a marching ant company, which is a kind of glory.

Mobile phone pictures, they have seen many times, there are many guesses about the function of mobile phones, but no one has ever confirmed them, so I am very much looking forward to it.

Holographic phone.

In addition to the executives who already know the news, there are still some calm, other managers who don't know the news, the shock on their faces. If it is not in the conference room, I am afraid they have already lost their minds.

Technology across the ages is in front of them.

When everyone returned to God, Zhao Mincai said: "I have informed you last month to let you prepare for the matter. Within ten days, everything will be ready. Ten days later, on the 26th, at 2 pm, a global conference will be held."

Outside is talking about the function of the new mobile phone of the marching ant company, and the marching ant company is not calm, and is preparing for the press conference intensively.

The holographic projector has just been on the market for a month, the market is still not saturated, there are still a lot of things to be busy, and now there is a new mobile phone, there are more things to do.

Chen Mo is in the marching ant company, and also ushered in an acquaintance - Li Chengzhi.

Digging talent is very common, not the first time.

Chen Mo has mastered the most advanced artificial intelligence technology, seismograph technology, potential pharmaceutical technology, holographic technology, etc. It is simply a living strategic talent. If it is dug away, the loss is immeasurable.

Don't look at them. On the surface, they seem to be less so worried about Chen Mo. They just don't want to give Chen Mo too much restriction, so as not to touch his bottom line and make him resent. As far as he knows, apart from the incident of espionage by the island nation, he secretly captured two special personnel of the United States, but it was not announced.

"I am not a fool."

"Improve some vigilance. The last time you attacked you was the mercenary of the US Blackwater Company. The people behind us, we can't find it for the time being, but for Americans, you should be more careful." Li Chengzhi said.

Chen Mo naturally knows that the mastermind behind the incident has already committed suicide. These Li Chengzhi will not know.

"I have come here, one more thing, that is, the potential medicine has been confirmed to be successful. This event, the great headmaster also knows, and I have the honor to meet the big head once." My work is not often at home. After two days of her birthday, I am going to send her one. Make up for her," Li Chengzhi said.

He knows that the holographic technology of the marching ant company has been successful, but he did not expect that it has developed to such a point that it is already beyond the reach of everyone.

Is this the technology that should be in this era?

"How much does your mobile phone sell?"

"I didn't pay attention, the price is Zhao Minding." Chen Mo said.

"I took the phone, and when you return the price, I will send the money to your card." Li Chengzhi put the holographic phone in his briefcase.

"No, just be my brother's gift to her."

Li Chengzhi immediately shook his head: "Your mind has led me, but the principle of the problem, can not be received, and this is a gift I sent to my daughter, not you sent. As for confidentiality, I will tell her, before the press conference, no Take it out and show people."

Chen Mo smiled and shook his head, and did not say anything. Since Li Chengzhi insisted, he was not strong.

After sending away Li Chengzhi, Chen Mo began to understand the PPT content of the conference. Soon after, it was the day of the conference. This time, Zhao Min let him go to host the conference. Zhao Min means that at this historic moment, he is the person who is most qualified to stand on the stage.

chapters.title: Chapter 297: : Announced
chapters.body:
Chapter 297: : Announced

At the Binhai Theatre, there are many people coming to see the marching ant conference.

This is the biggest conference held by the marching ant company in history. In the audience, the crowds were crowded and packed, comparable to the concert scene of the big stars. The domestically-recognized news media have received invitations, including many well-known foreign media.

Now the marching ant company is a well-deserved leader in the world of science and technology. All media want to get first-hand news and look forward to the development of the technology development of the army ants.

In addition to the reporters who took the camera with their mobile phones in their seats, there were many media in the open space to set up cameras to prepare for live broadcast. Well-known media people, technology bloggers, etc., as well as fans of marching ants companies (running ants), each with expectations.

In particular, I heard that the third-generation mobile phone of the Army Ant Company was released today, so that many mobile phone enthusiasts rushed over.

At the scene of the Grand Theatre, even the personnel of the Binhai Municipal Public Security Bureau were sent to maintain the order.

Not only is the coastal city, but at the same time, Paris, France, Mumbai, India, and Bangkok, Thailand, are also in sync. At the press conference, it was also packed.

There are four conferences held simultaneously in the world. It is conceivable that the amount of manpower and resources invested by the marching ant company is particularly strict in terms of safety.

The entire scientific community is paying attention to this conference. The mass production of holographic projectors has already caused a sensation in the world. The conference held by the marching ant company is much more grand than the holographic projector.

“Are all other areas ready?” Backstage, Zhao Min asked as he looked at the holographic screen.

This is the time to show the strength of the marching ant company to the world, and it is also a signal that they have entered the overseas market on a large scale, and must be sure of nothing.

"Paris is ready."

"India is here."

"Bangkok is no problem."

Soon, the responsible persons of the three regions appeared in front of the holographic projection screen and reported the situation to Zhao Min.

"All are ready, let's get started now."

With the silence of Zhao Min, the stage lighting was darkened. At the same time, at the press conferences in Paris, Mumbai and Bangkok, the lights were also darkened.

Everyone was quiet and waited for the press conference.

A beautifully dressed female host appeared on the stage under the eyes of everyone. This scene appeared in Paris, Mumbai and Bangkok.

If anyone sees it, it will be surprising to find that the layout of the four stages is the same, even the hosts are exactly the same.

The audience in Paris, Mumbai and Bangkok surged and watched the host who appeared on the stage.

They have discovered an amazing fact that the host on the field is a holographic projection, and the marching ant company actually uses holographic projection technology to host the conference.

"Very distinguished guests, everyone, I am Huang Minmin, the host of the press conference tonight. I am very grateful to everyone for taking the time to participate in our company's new product launch."

Huang Minmin spoke, sweet voice, quieting the commotional audience. Seeing such a grand scene, saying that it is not nervous, it must be fake. Even when she was in college, she presided over a large-scale university event, but for the first time like the company’s grand conference.

Her image is very good, her voice is good, her voice is good, and she has experience in hosting at the university. Therefore, as one of the public relations staff, she was chosen as the host tonight.

After Huang Minmin entered the state, he also forgot the tension and began to introduce the steps in the rehearsal. After introducing the important guests, she paused and cut into the topic.

"Tell everyone a secret. The global conference held today is a true global conference. I am hosting the four conferences in Marina, Paris, Mumbai and Bangkok."

Upon hearing this sentence, there was a commotion on the field. Many people bowed their heads and did not understand what Huang Minmin meant.

"Let everyone see the live broadcast of the other four conferences."

When Huang Minmin’s words fell, the big screen behind him jumped out of the live broadcast of the other three venues. Sure enough, the host on the field is Huang Minmin.

"That is a holographic projection."

Some people quickly understood that the holographic projection was used to place the live image to the other three venues, and the four venues were synchronized. It is also proved from the side that the technology of the marching ant company holographic projector has been fully matured.

“The marching ants are really powerful, highly skilled, and unique.”

"At the same time, the same four conferences were held. This is the legendary avatar. It will definitely be popular in filming, or in concerts or shows of stars."

When I saw this scene, I had some ideas flashing, but soon I locked my eyes on the stage.

"Everyone guessed it? At this conference, we used holographic projection technology to let the four venues be released at the same time. The products of the conference today are a very unique product. I believe that everyone who is sitting will definitely not be disappointed. Huang Minmin glanced at the big screen and smiled: "I believe you can't wait, so if you don't want to talk about it, here is Mr. Chen Mo, the chairman of our company, to reveal the answer."

Chen Mo in the background, a calm face out of the stage.

For a time, everyone’s eyes fell on Chen Mo. This low-key and somewhat mysterious man is the man who leads the world in technology.

At the same time, Chen Mo's holographic images appeared in the three conferences in Paris, Mumbai and Bangkok.

At the four press conferences, the crowd began to be noisy, and the protagonist of the discussion was Chen Mo. But Chen Mo did not hear what they were saying.

"Hello everyone, I am Chen Mo."

Chen Moyi opened his mouth and the scene immediately calmed down.

"Before the press conference, many people are guessing the appearance of the new mobile phone. There are also many related articles on the Internet. I know that everyone is looking forward to what the new mobile phone looks like." Chen Mo began to enter the topic, this scene, also through holography Projection, appeared in the other three conference halls. If you say it, it has already been translated into English: "Next, let's enjoy a video first. The answer is in this video."

Chen Mo’s arm was raised, the stage changed instantly, and the holographic picture slowly emerged.

The location of a Chen Mo station is the center line, two different scenes.

Two figures, one man and one woman, one in the bustling city, one in the distance. The same stage, like an invisible barrier, traps two people in a parallel world.

Food, shopping, gatherings; mountains, sea, grassland;

One side is the joyful laughter of the city, and the other is the beauty of nature.

When women go shopping, they take a leisurely footstep, and men take a lonely journey under their backpacks. The woman stood at the window and stared at the window with red wine; the man climbed the summit and overlooked the ground beneath his feet.

Suddenly, the two stopped at the same time. The woman put down the glass and ran out of the house. The man dropped the bag and rushed down the mountain. The woman ran out of the house and rushed through the crowds; the man embarked on the way home and climbed the mountain grassland; the background of the picture changed constantly, and the speed of the two became faster and faster.

When the picture changes to the extreme, the two seem to break the barriers of the parallel world, hug together, and the picture freezes at the moment when the two meet and laugh. In the next moment, the two bodies slowly floated, and a huge mobile phone rises from the stage, and the two are suspended above the mobile phone.

The four conferences were in a short silence, and then they were in a state of utter disappointment.

chapters.title: Chapter 298: : 蜃 Ants
chapters.body:
Chapter 298: : 蜃 Ants

Holographic phone!

Some people's guesses were finally confirmed on the holographic projection of the stage.

This is a brand new field.

The scene has already been turbulent, and some mobile phone enthusiasts have an urge to wait for it, and they can't wait to buy one at once.

Full of technological sense of appearance, with the most advanced technology. This is a mobile phone with both external beauty and more connotation.

The picture of the holographic mobile phone was quickly spread throughout the world through the live broadcast of the four venues. The number of live broadcasts in some live broadcasts has also soared.

When the holographic projector appeared, it was not so sensational, and the holographic mobile phone was released. This is a historic moment.

Holographic projectors are not just what they need, and now mobile phones are a must-have for everyone. This is the crystallization of high technology, with a cool holographic mobile phone, how to see is full of force.

"No matter how much money, I have to buy one. This kind of high-tech, I thought it would only appear in science fiction movies. I didn't expect that I could come up one day."

"Whoever sold kidneys to buy apples, would you regret it?"

"It has to be said that the technology of the marching ant company is already ahead of an era. At present, all mobile phones are **** compared to this, and my wallet is already hungry and thirsty."

"I just said that her girlfriend wants to change her mobile phone. What should I do? Online, urgent!"

Just the appearance of a holographic mobile phone, and the price has not yet been announced, it has already spread all over the world.

The number of viewers of Facebook live broadcasts reached tens of millions in just a few minutes, and the number of viewers of various live broadcast platforms also soared.

Even the white-collar workers who worked in the office secretly saw the video and quickly spread it. They forgot to go to work, watched the boss, and secretly watched the live broadcast of the conference.

On the subway, on the bus, in various places on the road, you can see someone head down and watch the live broadcast of the marching ant conference.

“The following is the latest news. At the launch of the marching ant company, the holographic mobile phone was released. After the holographic projector, this is the second holographic product of the marching ant company, and the most commonly used mobile phone in our life. The future has come, holographic Technology is no longer only in the laboratory, it will gradually enter the lives of ordinary people. Please see the live broadcast of the reporters on the spot below..."

The media at the press conference, the reports that were quickly updated, and many news channels also temporarily changed the news content, and directly cut into the live broadcast of the marching ant company.

Reports from various platforms, push, endless sources, almost free advertising.

At the beginning of the conference, in the shortest time, the marching ant holographic mobile phone was sent to the hot search list and topic list, and countless people witnessed the birth of this moment.

The sensation of holographic mobile phones is far more than when holographic projectors were released.

Once, ordinary people knew holography, just through science fiction movies. Some time ago, the holographic projector released by the marching ant company made people start to touch the hologram. The emergence of holographic mobile phones now means that it will soon spread to every corner of life.

The future is very close to us. It is the theme of the last holographic projector conference; the future has come, this is the theme of this time.

At the press conference, Chen Mo did not know the huge sensation brought by this release. Looking at the noisy scene, the reporters and fans who are excited, there is a sense of pride in small satisfaction.

His own work can bring shock to people. This is the joy of achievement, just like the dish made by a chef, which is praised.

After a pause, Chen Mocai said: "To tell the truth, when the woman in the video ran over, I thought she was running over and holding me. I almost opened my arm. I thought more, they were in front of me. It’s hard to show me a face. The designer who came up with this video can’t add chicken legs tonight.”

Chen Mo spoke, and the noisy press conference slowly calmed down. He was ridiculed by Chen Mo, and there was a kind laugh in the field.

With a brief and enthusiastic applause, Chen Mo took out a holographic phone from his pocket. As the mobile phone is turned on, the logo of the marching ant company is revealed on the micro holographic projector behind it and placed on the front of the mobile phone.

At the press conference, before the live broadcast screen, countless people stared at the holographic mobile phone in the hands of Chen Mo, and wished to immediately grab it and experience it.

"This is the protagonist of today's conference - ants. It is a kind of sea monster in Chinese mythology. This sea monster can spit and appear in the mirage mirage. This mobile phone, like the holographic projector, is like this. Named, because the mirage is the closest to the holographic nature, plus our company's 'ant', so named, nice and connotation."

Chen Mo said, the picture of the stage also appeared a ripple, similar to the water dragon in some pictures. At the top of the sea, I sighed and condensed into different mirages, and finally turned into a mobile phone with a light spot falling in the hands of Chen Mo.

This cool special effect, see the audience under the field bloody. At the press conference, it was comparable to watching a blockbuster movie.

蜃 ants, countless people remember this name, this is not the third generation of the butterfly eye mobile phone, but a brand new cross-generation high-tech mobile phone.

"Next is the function that everyone is most concerned about. It has dual-screen function, hologram, holographic call, marching ant 4.0 intelligent system, new intelligent assistant, long battery life and other functions.

The first is a dual screen, a holographic projection screen, and a liquid crystal display. The holographic projection screen adopts the 24-bit full-color miniature holographic projector developed by our company. The largest holographic projection screen is 10 inches, comparable to the flat screen, to meet your big screen experience. It can project stereo holographic images as well as 3D planar images. ”

Chen Mo continued to pause and continued to speak. The huge holographic mobile phone projected on the stage also showed his function with his words.

"The holographic chip mounted on the mobile phone has a holographic image processing function and can capture holographic video. Between two holographic mobile phones, holographic video calls can be made, and photography and projection can be integrated."

Chen Mo’s point-and-click video of the street dance that has already been recorded has been released through a holographic projection. The pocket-sized real person is beating on the palm of his hand. This kind of experience of mastering everything is definitely very exciting.

The applause on the field was thundering, and everyone looked at the cell phone on the stage with a gaze.

"The next step is the mobile phone system, equipped with the marching ant 4.0 holographic intelligent system, system security upgrade, inheriting the security of the marching ant system, no one can peek at your mobile phone unless there is a power-on password.

The holographic mobile phone needs a large amount of power support. The mobile phone adopts the carbon crystal-based battery newly developed by our company, which can make the mobile phone continue for 72 hours without interruption.

The intelligent upgrade of the smart assistant of the mobile phone is more flexible than before. Encyclopedia, poetry, poetry, chat, story, search, music, voice manipulation, proficient in 117 mainstream languages around the world, translation experts. With a mobile phone in hand, you can travel all over the world. ”

Chen Mo introduced the functions of the mobile phone one by one, making everyone shocked. Is this still a mobile phone? This is simply a combination of high technology.

The technology of all holographic mobile phones is the latest technology of marching ants, and one of them is enough to hold up an industry giant.

How much does this collection of current state-of-the-art mobile phones cost?

This is a question of all people's minds. This kind of technological crystallization can no longer be measured by money, and it is a full force in the hands.

After Chen Mo introduced the functions of the holographic mobile phone one by one, he stopped and looked down at the gaze that he couldn't wait to see. He smiled and said: "I guess you really want to know now, what is the price of this mobile phone?"

chapters.title: Chapter 299: : Hot
chapters.body:
Chapter 299: : Hot

At the press conference, there were audiences in front of the live screen, all holding their breath, and the scenes of thousands of people were surprisingly quiet. Everyone was waiting for Chen Mo to say the next thing, for fear of missing.

Next, eat instant noodles or eat fast food, just look at Chen Mo's sentence.

Holographic mobile phones, but everyone who sees them is very excited. The latest technological crystallization of marching ants, super powerful features, cool sense of technology, no matter which aspect, it is worth a try.

Looking at the look of the field, and the longing eyes, Chen Mo did not continue to sell off: "The uniform price of the ants is..."

Chen Mo’s words are not finished, a number appears above the phone projection. Look at the numbers and everyone will breathe.

28,888 yuan.

This number shocked the people I saw. So far, the average mobile phone used by people does not have this number.

In addition to special mobile phones and custom machines, the current top-equipped mobile phone is only the beginning of 10,000 yuan. Now the mobile phone of the army ant company is directly at 28888 yuan.

Many people have a cool heart, and this number is destined to temporarily miss this mobile phone.

"I finally understand why the idiots had to sell kidneys! At this moment, I also have this impulse."

"Garbage marching ants, is this money to think crazy?"

"Sure enough, the poor can't afford the series, and the things that march the ant company, there is no cheap one."

"Those who are marching ants company, please go to research and develop holographic mobile phones, research and development, not to mention twenty-eight thousand, 200,000 I also buy. Such high-tech products, do you want to sell two thousand eight like rice?"

"This kind of technology that transcends the times, this price is simply the price of cabbage. This is a holographic mobile phone, not a Chinese cabbage. No one wants to buy it with a knife. Go to the old man machine. Don't look for a sense of existence here. ”

"Even if I have two months of instant noodles, I have to buy one."

"The time has come to test Huaqiang North."

"..."

After seeing the price, everyone's reaction was different, and they quickly set off a debate on the Internet. However, most people do not think that this price is too expensive, in contrast, it is indeed a conscience price.

The whole body is high-tech, no matter which way it is, it is not expensive. And most people, as long as they save a bit, bite their teeth, they can still buy it.

"The mobile phone will open the booking window in the marching ant mall at 6 o'clock this afternoon. The domestic offline store will also be on sale at 9 o'clock tomorrow."

After the price was announced, Chen Mo also said that the mobile phone purchase channel and the public.

“The time to market in other regions is subject to the information published on the official website. Finally, there is a good news to tell you that holographic mobile phones can be purchased on-site at the four major conferences around the world.”

When the words came out, the exclamation and applause of the excitement immediately sounded on the field, and a wave of small climax was set off.

They thought that they had to wait for the reservation, and they didn't know when they could get the mobile phone. They didn't expect to be able to buy it at the press conference. They would be the first people to experience the holographic mobile phone.

"I am going to the press conference."

Close to the press conference, and see the live broadcast, immediately drive to the Grand Theatre. Like him, there are many other people who want to change their mobile phones, and they rushed to the press conference. Now that the conference has not been released, as long as it arrives in time, you can immediately buy a holographic mobile phone.

And the distance is far away, I can only hope that the screen is sighing, my heart is constantly mourning, I can't wait to move to the press conference immediately.

"My girlfriend asked me to travel to Binhai yesterday. Why didn't I go?"

"Envy at the press conference."

"I have to buy one, I believe that there will soon be a holographic projection of the island movie."

"..."

At the end of the conference, Chen Mo also left the stage.

At this time, the staff in the background, everyone with a smile, looking at Chen Mo, the color of worship in the eyes can not cover.

This conference, a huge sensational effect, let the marching ants company go to a higher level, they are the staff of the marching ant company, and they are proud of it.

"Drink some water first." Xiaoyu handed Chen Hu to the insulated cup in his hand.

"I said how Xiao Yu has been holding a water glass, it was for you." Zhao Min saw the movement of Xiao Yu, and said: "You are so lucky, you can catch such a small fish."

"Small fish has always been my lucky goddess." Chen Mo smiled.

Zhao Min glanced at the sweet little fish next to him, feeling a little sour: "Speak right, lest I have to eat dog food again, your press conference will be on fire."

“Is this not expected?”

Holographic mobile phones, the only one in the world, the door to future technology has been opened, it is difficult to think of it.

"It is expected, but in some cases, it is still unexpected."

"How to say?"

"You will see the people who line up outside."

Zhao Min left with Chen Mo and went to the window to look outside, so Chen Mo couldn't help but be surprised.

Two long queues lined up, as if two long dragons, extended to the square at the entrance of the Grand Theatre, letting the cold sea breeze blow, but still insisted. There are also many reporters who are holding cameras and shooting against long dragons.

"They line up to buy a mobile phone?" Chen Mo thought of a possibility.

"Any right, you said that the holographic mobile phone can be sold at the press conference. The live broadcast is seen nearby, and everyone who wants to buy a mobile phone has come over." Zhao Min said.

In the past, when only the Apple mobile phone appeared, there would be such a long team, and I did not expect to appear on them.

"How come it goes outside?"

"There are too many people inside, for the sake of safety and order, to limit the speed of entry and exit of people, or to flock in, it is a bit of a hassle, so the queue has been so far away. Just now I was told that the bridge to the Grand Theatre is already in traffic jam."

Hearing this sentence, Chen Mo did not know what to say or what to say, but the holographic mobile phone is so popular, he is still happy.

"Let people add a few sales points, the sea breeze can be uncomfortable outside." Looking at the people shivering in the cold, waiting for the purchase of mobile phones, Chen Mo did not know what to say.

"It is already arranged, and more people are being deployed to arrange for the audience to come in and out in an orderly manner." Zhao Min said.

Some people are happy that someone is jealous.

Altice Group Headquarters.

Kang Bomin sat in the office and stared at the computer screen. The above program, it is a video of the marching ant company conference.

Just arrived at the office this morning and saw the mobile phone conference of the marching ant company.

This scene made him feel a little uncomfortable.

At the beginning, he also wanted to cooperate with the marching ants because he was optimistic about the potential of the marching ants, and both parties negotiated well, but they were overthrown by the board of directors and wanted to acquire shares in the marching ant company. This idea was naturally rejected and the relationship between the two sides was also broken.

As the Ceo of the Altice Group, after the first conflict with the marching ant company, he has been paying attention to the news of the marching ant company.

From cell phones, to seismographs, to robots, to holographic technology. The marching ant company brought them too much shock. He also realized that it was a foolish decision to refuse the cooperation with the marching ant company, but it was irreparable.

It was normal to refuse cooperation, but they also joined forces with other telecommunications companies to limit the marching ant company. Now they have offended the army ant company to sin.

Now Europe still has Roche's full support for them. This veteran family, although small, but still has a large network of support, now they can't hold back the marching ant company's march into Europe.

The introduction of holographic mobile phones means that they have prevented the idea of marching ants from stepping into the European telecommunications circle.

This mobile phone surpasses any previous mobile phone and epoch-making technology products. The introduction of this mobile phone by the marching ant company means that it has become the innocent king of the mobile phone industry.

In this way, holographic mobile phones enter Europe and cooperate with the telecom operators of Roche Holdings, they will lose a lot of high-end users.

And other telecommunications companies can't completely offend the marching ant company like they do.

When Kang Bomin frowned, the phone suddenly rang, took a look at the phone number, and hurriedly connected. Not long after, Kang Bomin's face showed a relaxed color, but the brow wrinkled again, and the next thing may be more difficult than he thought.

chapters.title: Chapter 300: : People Are Afraid Of Being Famous
chapters.body:
Chapter 300: : People Are Afraid Of Being Famous

"The holographic mobile phone is released, and the mobile phone is welcoming a technological change. 》

"The pride of China! 》

"incredible! Marching ant company. 》

A scene that was once used by the army ants to dominate the screen, appeared again. With the end of the holographic mobile phone conference, the name of the holographic mobile phone quickly occupied the hot search of almost all well-known platforms.

Mobile phones have become an indispensable part of people's lives. The emergence of holographic mobile phones means that holographic mobile phone technology innovation has once again appeared.

The price of 28888 yuan holographic mobile phone, many people can afford, the holographic experience of the mobile phone, so that countless people heart.

The next day, I didn't open the door. The line of the ant company's offline store was already lined with long queues. Hundreds of people waited in line at the door, and there were many foreigners' faces.

Now the marching ant company is starting, only in the country, missed the time of four press conferences, and the foreign starter will take some time.

Many foreigners have already caught up, and they will come to China in the first time, hoping to buy a holographic mobile phone. This scene only appeared on the Apple mobile phone, and now it happens on the marching ant company.

Countless people have seen this scene, proud of the marching ant company, epoch-making technology has become a reality, they have been able to experience the high-tech that belongs to the future.

The domestic market is full of joy, and foreign netizens are following the climax.

"The marching ant company should disclose holographic technology, which belongs to all mankind and can drive the development of science and technology for all mankind."

"Compared to other holographic phones, the old-fashioned black-and-white TVs are now ahead of LCD TVs in the United States."

"Tell you an unfortunate news that holographic phones are not listed in the US."

"Galileo's jealous day is Hawking's birthday, Einstein's birthday is Hawking's jealousy, time and space reincarnation, a new generation of giants in the East?"

Numerous people are discussing the topic of holographic mobile phones. This news is even more terrifying than the magnitude 9 earthquake. However, more than that, more exciting news, came one after another.

The latest evaluation report of the international value authority evaluation agency BrandFinance was released. The marching ant company surpassed Amazon and topped the list of the world's most valuable technology companies.

Morgan issued an evaluation report, and the Army Ant Group valued $1.5 trillion, making it the first company in history to exceed $1 trillion.

Times Giant: Chen Mo! Chen Mo, the founder of the marching ant group, became the cover of Time Magazine and was elected the most influential person in the world. He was named the technology giant of the new era.

"Fortune" announced the latest issue of world wealth rankings. Chen Mo, founder and chairman of the marching ant group, has surpassed trillions of personal wealth and has become the richest person in the world.

......

The overwhelming news, like a bomb, instantly exploded in the already turbulent sea, so everyone was shocked.

No one has ever won such a terrible honor, and in such a short time.

The mass production of holographic mobile phones has shocked the whole world. Countless news is about the mobile phone of the army ant company, as well as Chen Mo.

Chen Mo is only in his twenties. He is too young and has real potential.

Now Chen Mo’s achievements have made everyone unable to match, and no one knows how much Chen Mo’s future is possible.

The whole world, because of the emergence of holographic mobile phones, has become lively.

Chen Mo is on the sofa, watching the morning news being played, and his face is helpless. Now there is news about him and the marching ant company everywhere, he doesn't know how famous he is now.

People are afraid of famous pigs.

What he thinks now is not the question of these titles. These titles are not very useful to him. Instead, they bring a lot of trouble to his life. The coverage of his coverage is enough, and his future is big enough. It is a problem to go out for a walk like an ordinary person.

It is estimated that this is the trouble of celebrities.

"Okay, it's time to have breakfast."

The small fisherman put a pot of porridge on the table and gave Chen Mosheng a bowl and called him over. Look at Chen Mo's helpless appearance, and also see that the morning news is playing Chen Mo's news, naturally know what Chen Mo is thinking.

"Is this trouble?" asked Xiao Yu.

"I don't know if it's time to be happy or to worry." Chen Mo said helplessly.

"Don't think about it, how to pass it or how to pass it. These fame and fortune, you don't need it, you used to have it, but this time it was completely released." Xiao Yu sat down next to Chen Mo, smiling and comforting.

Her own man has become so good, she should be proud, but she is not happy, such a huge fame and fortune, suddenly pressed on Chen Mo, she is afraid that Chen Mo is lost in these fame and fortune.

"If you have pressure, take a few days off. Anyway, no one will fire your squid. It doesn't have to be so hard."

Chen Mo stroked Xiao Yu's hair: "I'm fine, just a little trouble. I'm not ready to rest, I will research the large holographic technology early, and then hold a wedding with you, and then take a good vacation for a while."

"Well, you don't have to work too hard. I am already yours. I can't run away. When the wedding is held, it will do." Although Xiaoyu wants to marry Chen Mo, he is also afraid of Chen Mo: "Eating breakfast Ok, seafood porridge, I got a morning, try it."

"My family's craftsmanship has always been very good." Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu, and he relaxed a lot. The little troubles just disappeared.

"Less poverty." Xiaoyu eyes looked at Chen Mo gently.

After breakfast, the two went to the marching ant company. Just arrived at the door of the company and saw the situation outside, Chen Mo smiled.

A large group of reporters are at the door of the company, and many people are talking with the company's security guards. Obviously they want to enter the marching ant company.

"Boss, do you want to detour?" asked Wang Hai on the driver's seat.

"No, let the Black Hawks open the way, go in." Chen Mo said.

Two cars, one by one, guarded Chen Mo’s car and marched toward the gate of the army ant company.

Only Chen Mo’s car just approached the company’s door, and some reporters immediately excited to come up.

For Wang Hai, the reporter is no stranger. He is Chen Mo’s personal bodyguard and driver. Now three cars appear, Chen Mo is definitely in the car.

Just as the reporters wanted to get close to Chen Mo’s car, the security guard at the gate rushed to block the crowd and let Chen Mo’s team enter.

"It's crazy." Chen Mo saw the reporter blocked by the security guard, but he couldn't help but smile.

Entering the company, Zhao Min also found it. At this time, Zhao Min’s mood was very good. The marching ant company was in her hands and topped the list of global enterprises. This sense of accomplishment is very great.

Holographic mobile phones and holographic projectors, as well as robots and other products, are constantly bringing huge amounts of cash to marching ants.

Now the order is double-receiving, and the development of marching ants is also at its fastest.

"You just saw the situation just now? A bunch of reporters outside want to interview you. I came here early in the morning and waited until now, the company's door was blocked." Zhao Min said: "Would you like to meet?"

Zhao Min knows that Chen Mo wants to be low-key, but now holographic technology is mature in Chen Mo's hands, and he wants to be low-key.

"It's crazy." Chen Mo didn't know what to say: "Schedule to see you, they waited for so long, and they didn't see each other and looked unappealing."

chapters.title: Chapter 301: : Everyone Is A Talent
chapters.body:
Chapter 301: : Everyone Is A Talent

When Chen Mo came out, all the reporters began to stir up. The camera was facing Chen Mo and kept pressing the shutter, for fear of missing any moment.

Now Chen Mo is already an international figure, and he has been rated as the 'Time Giant'. It is conceivable how much this is.

No one thinks that there is anything wrong with the term "Time Giant", from artificial intelligence, carbon crystal new materials, Chinese programming languages, as well as seismographs, intelligent robots, and now holographic technology is also mature in Chen Mo's hands.

Any of the above achievements, if placed on a person, can create authority in a field. Now Chen Mo set all the achievements in one, is a true all-powered ghost scientist, is called the era giant can not be overemphasized.

"Mr. Chen Mo, Time magazine called you the ‘time giant’. What do you think?”

"Mr. Chen Mo, rumors that you nominate the candidate for the next Nobel Prize in Physics, is this true?"

"Mr. Chen Mo..."

Not waiting for Chen Mo to stand still, many reporters began to ask questions. However, there are security guards at the army ants company, so no one dares to make too aggressive moves.

Chen Mo pressed his palm and immediately quieted down on the field.

"First of all, I am very grateful to all media friends for their concern. I have so many questions at once, I don't know which one is good, come one by one." Chen Mo pointed to a black-rimmed glasses in a corner and a white shirt. Female reporter: "This beautiful lady will come first."

"Oh? Oh..."

The female reporter who was called was obviously stunned and hurriedly stood up with some excitement on her face.

She is just an intern. Today, the newspaper asked her to come over to guard the gates of the marching ant company. I hope that I can get some news. I didn’t have much hope to interview Chen Mo. Chen Mo promised to meet many reporters. It’s very rare. I didn’t expect her. Actually got the first question.

"Mr. Chen Mo, hello, I am a news reporter Li Ying. The day before, BrandFinance, the international value authority evaluation agency, released the latest list of the world's most valuable technology companies. Your company topped the list, and Morgan also valued your company 1.5. What do you think about this in trillions of dollars? How will your company develop in the future? Will it choose to go public?"

"Thank you, from the moment I created the marching ant company, I thought about making it the best technology company. It has no achievements, I will not be surprised. For me, the marching ant company is priceless. In the future, we will continue to explore new areas like marching ants. As for the listing issue, we are not short of money."

When Chen Mo said this sentence, the reporter's eyelids jumped and dared to say that there was no shortage of money. I am afraid that the army ant company is the first.

"Mr. Chen Mo, you have already been called the 'Time Giant', have you ever thought that, like the 'Time Giant' Tesla free public exchange patent, public seismograph technology, holographic technology and artificial intelligence technology will be used to benefit all mankind." A blonde western female reporter stood up and asked in fluent English.

After hearing the translation of the robot, the reporters on the field were in a daze.

This is really dare to ask, I have never seen such a shameful problem, which is clearly to do things. However, many reporters still look forward to Chen Mo's answer, this is a hot news.

"Thank you for your question, Tesla is a great researcher. His research has made great progress in the human civilization. He is indeed a giant of the age. Tesla has always been my most admired scientist, but I deeply regret the experience of his year.

I am a bit like him and different. The difference is that we live in two different centuries. He is a 'time giant' and I am more like an ‘time businessman’. However, I believe that our goal is the same, that is, let technology benefit mankind. Even if I don't disclose my technology, can't I benefit mankind? The answer is obviously no. ”

The reporters on the field heard Chen Mo’s answer and secretly applauded.

The problem just mentioned is obviously uneasy. Anyone who knows, knows that Tesla was forced by some capital consortiums. Finally, he was reluctant to hand over the AC patents to those capitalists, and then he tore the patents, chose to open them freely, and was destitute in his later years. Now the reporter actually thinks Moral kidnapping.

A so-called title, just want people to open such a high-level technology, it is simply an idiotic dream, fools can not do so.

When I heard Chen Mo’s answer, the blond female reporter was not disappointed. She just asked this question. She did not have much hope. If it was a murder, it would still be very valuable, but unfortunately it was not pitted. But did not say anything, quietly sitting back in the seat.

"This gentleman below."

After Chen Mo answered, he continued to ask questions from reporters on the field. However, he chose some domestic reporters this time and did not give questions to foreign reporters.

"Mr. Chen Mo, hello, I am the headline reporter Lu Zhimin. Recently, there have been news reports. Some young people, in order to buy holographic mobile phones, steal things and grab things, even some girls, in order to buy holographic mobile phones, do not hesitate to sell their own The body makes money, what do you think about it?"

"Sad, poor, ridiculous. My product is to benefit the society, not to bring pollution to the society. I would rather not make money from such people. I hope that no matter who, no matter when, insist on their own The bottom line of principle, cherish your dignity and body. Money can be earned, mobile phones can also be bought slowly, but some things, if they are lost, they will never find it back..."

Chen Mo continued to answer the questions of the reporters on the field. An hour later, the temporary press conference was over.

Back in his office, Chen Mo was lying on the sofa and resting.

This hour's press conference is even more troublesome than his research day. The various problems that the reporters have thrown over are a little careless, they will fall into the digging routine, and the simple question and answer is intrigue.

"how do you feel?"

Zhao Min entered Chen Mo's office and saw Chen Mo lying on the sofa. It was a bit funny. He had never seen Chen Mo.

"I don't feel so good." Chen Mo sat up on the sofa and smiled and shook his head: "Now I understand the troubles of celebrities."

"Used to it."

"Habits can't be used to it. It's impossible to get used to it in this life. All the reporters are talented people. They ask questions and have skills. I don't like them."

Zhao Min smiled and was amused by Chen Mo.

She also paid attention to Chen Mo’s situation at the press conference. Some questions were indeed smashed.

However, Zhao Min can feel that Chen Mo has grown a lot. The former Chen Mo, the character is very calm, with a trace of indisputable taste, that is, what is not anxious, the typical big boy character.

But after so many things, Chen Mo is now a little man.

The former calm has become calm, calm and calm, with wisdom and enthusiasm, and occasional little humor, the ability to adapt is also very good, has slowly become the prototype of the temperament of the superior, I believe again Soon, you can become a qualified superior.

"You should adapt to it. After all, you are the owner of the company. In the future, there will be no shortage of other situations. I can't help you solve it every time. It depends on you, even if you are low-key, you can't avoid some things." It’s okay to have a high-profile point."

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded. He would still consider Zhao Min's words.

After talking with Zhao Min about some holographic mobile phones, after Zhao Min left, Chen Mo was resting on the sofa, then changed clothes and entered the laboratory.

chapters.title: Chapter 302: : Lin Shu'S Thoughts
chapters.body:
Chapter 302: : Lin Shu'S Thoughts

Lin Shu walked down the school road with her head down, thinking about the company in her mind. She is currently an employee of the Army Ant Company and a student at Binhai University.

She is an exception to the marching ant company. The boss asked her to study while working. This is something that other employees of the marching ant company do not have. But her colleagues knew her situation and took care of her at the company, making her feel that the company is her home.

Therefore, when she did not attend class, she went to the company headquarters to participate in the development work, and worked overtime at night. If there was a class the next day, she would return to Binhai University after work.

The younger brother's body has returned to health, and now she is still in school. Grandpa does not use scum to maintain her life. She hired a neighbor's aunt to help him look forward to repaying his living expenses and other expenses to his grandfather every month.

She did not bring her grandfather and younger brother to Binhai City because she had to work and study every day, and she had no time to take care of them.

The present life is much better than before, and she cherishes it. Every day, I am desperately learning Chinese programming, cryptography, hacking techniques and various intelligent algorithms to make it even better.

Recently, the company is a bit busy.

The president has already convened all the backbone R&D staff to meet, and she will know the next major tasks, preparing for the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ program, as well as holographic mobile application software development. She is familiar with artificial intelligence algorithms, so she is involved in the development of the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ program.

The president said that this is his strategic plan, which is good for the company and can affect future life. If you can develop successfully, you can definitely help him and help the company.

Soon, Lin Shu went back to the school dormitory.

The company has arranged a dormitory for her. In addition to the weekend, she will rush back to the school because she still has to attend classes.

Just entering the dormitory, Lin Shu was stunned, and the three roommates looked at her with a straightforward look. The atmosphere in the dormitory was a bit strange.

"Lin Shu."

"Lin Shu, you are finally back."

Three roommates rushed to surround Lin Shu, and excitedly pushed her to sit on the stool.

"What's wrong?" Lin Shu looked confused.

"Lin Shu, are you an employee of the marching ant company?" A girl with a ponytail wearing a pyjama-printed pajamas.

Lin Shu is a member of the army ants company, and everyone in the class knows.

Because someone in the class recognized, Lin Shu was the protagonist of the Jiangnan virus incident. It is no secret that she is going to work in a marching ant company every day.

The whole class is envious of Lin Shu's work and can enter the marching ant company. It is the dream of countless coastal students. Because Chen Mo, the boss of the marching ant company, is their brother and is also a legendary figure at Binhai University. And the salary of the marching ant company is so high that it makes people drool.

"What's wrong?" Lin Shu looked strangely at the three.

"Do you have a holographic phone?" Another tall, long-haired girl who was pulling on her chest was looking forward to asking.

"Do you?" Lin Shu took a holographic phone from his backpack and handed it to them.

"Wow, it’s really a holographic phone."

The three girls jumped up in excitement and carefully took over the holographic phone in Lin Shu’s hand and watched it carefully. This kind of cool feeling with technology, people can not help but like, several classmates in the class, buy holographic mobile phones are showing off in the class.

"Lin Shu, how did you buy it?" asked the girl with a black framed glasses next to him.

"Not bought, our company rewards excellent employees, I also got it yesterday." Lin Shu said.

As a research and development staff of the marching ant company, she now deals with holography every day. For holographic mobile phones, although I like it, there is no such thing as ordinary people.

"It's amazing." The three girls looked at Lin Shu a little enviously. They knew that Lin Shu was not showing off, but the excellent staff who can be a marching ant company must be very powerful.

“I heard that employees of the Army Ant Company can buy mobile phones internally?” asked the girl in glasses.

"Yes, the internal application can be applied for a 10% discount. It can't be more than three. It can only be bought for relatives and friends. This is the welfare of the employees. It cannot be sold at a high price. If it is discovered, it must be deducted or even dismissed. We The company does not allow employees to be scalpers," Lin Shu said.

"Lin Shu, are we friends? Can you buy one for us, just three people." The tall girl said.

"Can't you buy offline stores?" Lin Shu asked.

"You can't buy it, you don't know, it's been a week. The offline stores are still long. Every morning, when you don't open the door, there are already hundreds of people waiting in line. Then more and more, we have time to wait in line for another day. Ordering on the official website, I don't know when it will arrive, it will take too long." The fool girl said.

Now holographic mobile phones are robbed all over the world. The offline store of marching ants is all waiting in line to buy holographic mobile phones, comparable to the event site of the annual festival.

Even some foreigners, in order to buy holographic mobile phones earlier, also took a trip to Binhai City.

In the past, Apple’s snap-up phenomenon was not so crazy. A lot of scalpers are still at the door of the physical store, waiting for people to buy their holographic mobile phones at a high price, and earn thousands when they change hands. It can be said that they are earned when they buy.

Compared with the holographic mobile phone of the army ant company, high-end models such as Apple, Samsung, and Huawei are just like black and white TV sets from ancient times. The style of the atmosphere, the cool appearance and the unparalleled function, the holographic mobile phone is loved by many high-end people, spend more money, just to buy a mobile phone earlier.

In addition, 50% of the news is now open to discuss holographic mobile phones. Mobile phones have become a must-have for life, and the impact of this epoch-making mobile phone has never been seen before.

So now that the holographic phone is released, it will be snapped up.

"Do you buy it for yourself?"

"My boyfriend wants to buy it," said the tall girl.

"I use it myself," said the girl in her pajamas.

"My brother asked me to buy him in Binhai City. He gave me two months of pocket money." The glasses girl said.

Lin Shu thought for a moment and nodded. "I will buy it for you. You will transfer the money to me now. I will apply for the purchase. I will transfer it to me at the 10% discount. It is useless to keep the quota."

"Lin Shu, you are so good, love you."

Three people hugged Lin Shu, and kissed her on her face a few times, so Lin Shu blushes. But seeing them happy, Lin Shu is also very comfortable.

"Can we play with your holographic phone?" After transferring the money to Lin Shu, the three talents opened.

"can."

Lin Shu did not refuse, took out the computer from the bag, submitted the purchase application in the company's internal forum, attached his own work number, confirmed the information and then lay in bed, began to think about the ‘artificial intelligence +’ plan.

The president has already said that ‘artificial intelligence+’ as the company’s strategic plan may change people’s lifestyles in the future, which is definitely very important.

To have a meeting tomorrow, everyone has to express their ideas and then make a detailed summary discussion, so she hopes to come up with a special idea.

She works hard every day, just to help him one day, now is an opportunity. Thinking of the figure in the dream, Lin Shu smiled, it is the secret of the deepest heart, the secret of a young girl.

"Looking at the street dance video, I heard that the hip-hop group, uploaded a holographic video of street dance, holographic phones can be seen, super cool."

"The recent female anchors like to holographic live broadcast, but also like to show the ditch, especially with holographic mobile phones, more realistic. I also heard that there are some female anchors, talking with holographic projectors, it is simply."

"I don't care about this. I only care about when mobile holographic games appear, like the king's pesticides. If it's a holographic game, it's even more fun."

"And my frog son."

The three girls, you have a sentence of my discussion, fell into Lin Shuer, and suddenly the flash of light flashed, let Lin Shu's eyes glow with excitement.

I don’t want to think about it. Lin Shu took the computer directly and started to realize his own ideas.

This may be a good idea.

"What happened to Lin Shu?"

"Work, don't bother, Lin Shu is a great god."

"I heard that the most common employees of the army ants company, the annual salary is more than 100,000, the technical backbone is more than one million annual salary, like Lin Shu, the annual salary is definitely more than one million. Or students, the annual salary is more than one million, so lucky. ""

"This is not fortunate. This is hard work. If you are envious, you should also study hard to learn technology."

"Can't learn..."

The voices of the three girls were also a lot smaller. They were kept in front of the holographic mobile phone and carefully watched the street dance program on the holographic mobile phone projection.

chapters.title: Chapter 303: :Meeting
chapters.body:
Chapter 303: :Meeting

"Mr. Kang Bomin, regarding the issue of cooperation, I have no time to talk about it. It takes a while for terror. I have an important meeting and I will contact you next time."

In the office, Zhao Min turned off the holographic projection and put the phone in a good position.

During this time, there were many people who contacted her to seek cooperation, and they were some of the former opponents. For other products, those capitals can be blocked, because they are not essential items and can be searched for alternatives. But the mobile phones are different. Now that the epoch-making products of holographic mobile phones appear, any consortium has been unable to stop the marching ants from marching into the international arena.

So the company that once wanted to block them, now turned to seek cooperation with them. Zhao Min naturally can't agree so quickly, otherwise he is too anxious. They all think that the army ant company is being bullied and has no temper.

"Zhao Jie, everyone in the meeting has already arrived." Xiao Yu took a document and entered Zhao Min's office.

"Let's go."

Zhao Min took a small fishing and walked over to the conference room.

The holographic mobile phone has been successfully listed, and now the market is hot, and there is no sales problem. Next, the holographic mobile phone is handled by the department responsible for the mobile phone business. What she has to do is two other important things, the holographic application and the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ program.

Holographic projectors can be used as computer screens, TV screens and projectors, but there are still few holographic applications, and the holographic ecology is more important after the holographic phones come out.

Holographic ecology, the true function of holographic projectors and holographic phones cannot be fully exploited.

If there is no holographic ecology, holographic projection is just a device with a higher end than the LCD screen. The holographic function of the holographic mobile phone can't just stay in such a small place as the holographic video call. Otherwise, it is overkill, and other ecological applications are the key. The weight also determines the height of the holographic projector and holographic phone.

Let their users experience the charm of holography, and then attract more people to use holographic projectors and holographic mobile phones.

After Zhao Min and Xiao Yu entered the conference room, the discussion in the conference room was also quiet.

In the conference room, Lao Luo, Wang Sijia, Lin Shu, Wei Zhe, Lin Zhiyuan, etc., the software technology backbone personnel of the marching ant company were all present, as well as Li Lingfeng, Zhu Li, Li Danni, Zhang Yi and other senior management personnel.

In addition to Lao Luo and Zhang Yi, other people are mostly young people. Lin Zhiyuan only graduated for two years. Because of the good talents of Chinese characters programming, he transferred from the capital to the coastal headquarters and joined the main Chinese character programming R&D team. Lin Shu is one. A college student.

Therefore, in the marching ant company, the younger generation of the world, only fresh blood, can keep up with the company's unimaginable development and changes.

"Already ready? Let's get started!" Zhao Min said: "Today is two issues, one is the 'Artificial Intelligence +' program, and the other is the holographic ecological application. It is just a beginning to express your thoughts and speak freely. This is just the beginning. Any idea can be said, don't be afraid of mistakes, the best idea is to be free."

“I will come first, let me talk about the idea of the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ program.”

Wang Sijia stood up and stood on the small podium behind the conference room and began to elaborate on his own ideas.

“The boss said, 'Artificial Intelligence+' is an evolutionary version of 'Internet+', which is different from 'Internet+', which gives us a way. 'Internet +' is, in layman's terms, 'Internet + other traditions Enterprise', this is a new economic form, which is the integration of Internet technology and other traditional industries.

‘Artificial Intelligence+’ as an evolutionary version of ‘Internet+’ is not a function of the concept of a big economy, but a concept of combining human and machine, and more of a level of people’s life and work. This requires that ‘artificial intelligence+’ must start with personal habits, which can be ‘artificial intelligence + other work and life activities’

We have a ready-made ‘artificial intelligence+’ example. For example, the current smart speaker can control various smart appliances such as electric lights, computers, air conditioners, and air purifiers. This is the simplest 'artificial intelligence+' model. It is only the products on the market today, and the intelligence is too weak. This concept has not been discovered. So in us, this concept will happen more often.

The first is personal artificial intelligence. I think the first point of ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ is that everyone has an artificial intelligence, preferably an account that can be logged in. In this respect, we have a good model. Mobile smart assistant ‘Little Butterfly’. Since the authorization of our intelligent assistant technology, mobile smart assistants are almost a must-have technology for every mobile phone. This is our largest potential user base, but the true potential of smart assistants is not just that of mobile assistants.

We can transform it into an embedded smart assistant, each person has a smart account, and once logged into this account, log in to the personal smart assistant to control the device.

As the 'Artificial Intelligence+' program, it is mainly used for people's life and work. The functions are mainly around work and life, such as controlling life appliances, working office software, mobile phones, computers, and even when necessary, like our corporate headquarters. The intelligent control system is embedded in the elevator and the gate, and the future unmanned vehicles reach a smart account, which can control life activities on more levels.

There is also a second point. The emergence of 'artificial intelligence +' will definitely cause people to worry about the smart crisis. Therefore, in the design of personal intelligent assistants, we must consider this aspect, that is, in the program, add mechanical execution instructions. , prior to intelligent execution..."

Wang Sijia carefully explained each of his views, and everyone on the field listened quietly.

After talking about his own point of view, Wang Sijia came down from the small podium, and the people on the field began to whisper. This is the idea of 'artificial intelligence +'. It must be said that Wang Sijia's idea, if realized, does have the rudiment of the concept of 'artificial intelligence +'.

"The idea of Director Wang is similar to me. The positioning of 'AI+' is personal life and work, but in this respect, I suggest adding one more function, that is, social function." Julie said: "Social is indispensable in life." A ring that can be joined."

"I don't agree with this."

Julie stopped and Lao Luo opposed it.

"My understanding is that 'Artificial Intelligence +' is an intelligent system that assists in life and work, not social software. 'Artificial intelligence +' is a brain, social is a limb, and both can form a complete 'artificial intelligence +' system, but the limbs Can not grow in the brain, or it is deformed.

Social interaction is indeed a very important part, but the subjective consciousness action of social people, adding social functions inside the software, seems to be tasteless and loses its pure meaning. It can be 'artificial intelligence + social', but socialization cannot be in the internal structure of 'artificial intelligence +'. Lao Luo said.

The first disagreement appeared on the field, and Zhao Min also quietly watched the arguments of the two.

This is a brainstorming process. It is normal to have differences. The strategic plan is no small matter, so it is necessary to carefully discuss its feasible ways before it can be used in practice.

After a while, Zhao Mincai said: "Well, 'Artificial Intelligence +' is a brand new road. It is normal to have different opinions. You will keep it for a while, and then listen to other people's ideas and then conduct in-depth discussions. Next, who? What other ideas? 'Artificial intelligence +' and holographic ecology."

Zhao Min glanced around the field.

"That, president, let me come." Lin Zhiyuan raised his hand and stood up from the position: "I will talk about the idea of holographic ecology."

chapters.title: Chapter 304: : Hologram Game
chapters.body:
Chapter 304: : Hologram Game

Lin Zhiyuan is also a bit nervous. The conference table is the top of the marching ant company. It is only a gift for software development. As one of the technical backbones of the Chinese character programming department, it was allowed to participate in the conference. This is the first time to attend this level of meetings.

His proficient direction is software, so he is mainly responsible for the ecological development of mobile phones and computer systems. This time he naturally joined the plan for holographic ecological development.

Going to the small podium behind the conference room, Lin Zhiyuan decided to set the god, and said: "With regard to the holographic ecological application problem, my personal idea is to start with the type of software that currently has the most users - the game."

After entering the state, Lin Zhiyuan did not start to be so nervous.

"The survey shows that more than 80% of smartphones in China have games installed. Game software is also one of the most frequently used and time-consuming software. Eight out of ten people use mobile phones to play games. Our user base is mainly between the ages of 18 and 40, so in the holographic eco-application, we can start from the game application and can meet the needs of users to the utmost.

The popularity of holographic projectors and holographic mobile phones has given us a new development environment - holographic games. At present, there are three main types of holographic games.

The first is the chess tower defense game, the second is the stand-alone game, similar to the classic competitive fighting game of 'King of the Kings', the third is the online game, which is similar to the game mode of the king glory, the League of Legends and the turret. It is most suitable for holographic game development.

These three types of games have one thing in common, and the map venue is a limited platform. At this point, holographic projection can perfectly shape the game map. In the past few days, I have simply created a map of the holographic summoner canyon like the ‘king’. ”

After Lin Zhiyuan finished, the huge gorge map appeared on the holographic projection platform in the middle of the conference table. Mountains, rivers, canyons, grasses, woods, wild monsters, and clouds in the horizon are all three-dimensional maps of holographic projections, giving people an impulse to experience them immediately.

The high-rise on the field, the eyes are bright, this is a good direction, if the game is launched, it will push their holographic equipment to another new height.

"Holographic games can bring people a more realistic game experience. Holographic games range between traditional online games and virtual reality games. The real game scenes are released, no matter the visual effects or other senses. Look at the LCD screen without layering.

It can be a single person, or it can let a group of people gather together to open the black, overlooking the map to play games, there is an ancient war, the public will be in the sand table to discuss the taste of the enemy.

Holographic games, the perfect combination of computer games and board games, in addition to playing games, can also allow face-to-face interaction between friends, the game experience will be stronger than the cold computer. So holographic games, I think there will be very good prospects..."

Lin Zhiyuan’s idea made the high-level of Changshan nod frequently. If you use holography to make games, it is really much better than the traditional game experience.

And nowadays young people like games, so this idea is very marketable.

It’s just the game business. For them, it’s still a blank field. If you don’t enter this field, you have to count Zhao Min’s calculation.

Lin Zhiyuan finished his thoughts and returned to his seat. He doesn't know what other people think, but as a young man, he is also a game enthusiast, and there is a lot of inspiration in this regard.

This is a free-flowing meeting, so he said these ideas that he thought were good.

"Not bad."

Sitting down in the position, Wei Zhe gave a thumb to Lin Zhiyuan. The Chinese character programming department has always been an important software R&D department of the marching ant company.

Since the ‘clown virus’ incident, the Chinese character programming language has become famous as a high-speed programming language for top hackers and computer technology. It is also recognized as the most advanced language among all computer languages.

Those who can enter the marching ant Chinese character programming department are proficient in the Chinese language programming language and the top experts in the technology world. Lin Zhiyuan's talent is the best, the potential is huge, and the usual ghosts have many ideas, so Wei Zhe brought him over and participated in the meeting. He did not expect Lin Zhiyuan to give him a huge surprise.

Seeing Wei Zhe’s approval, Lin Zhiyuan’s mood is also very good.

“Who has other ideas about the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ program and the holographic eco-application?” Zhao Min said.

Today's meeting is to get more ideas. Wang Sijia and Lin Zhiyuan have good ideas, but others may not have other better ideas. After all, they are professionals.

After Zhao Min finished, other senior executives began to elaborate their own ideas.

Everyone starts to enter the state, record their own ideas of interest, and when they enter the discussion, they can be prepared.

An hour later, almost everyone who has a little idea has said his own ideas. Many of them are expanded and supplemented by the ideas of Wang Sijia and Lin Zhiyuan.

“Who else has other ideas?” Zhao Min asked, after everyone stopped.

"That... president, I have one!"

A sound of some awkward sounds, everyone looked at the sound, and saw Lin Shu sitting next to Wei Zhe.

Lin Shu started from entering the conference room, and there was not much to sit in the position. He always looked at other people's explanations. In the face of this scene, she is still a bit timid, but now the meeting is coming to an end, if I don't say it, she probably won't have a chance, so she will have the courage to speak.

Seeing Lin Shu, there are a few high-level executives who are a bit surprised.

Lin Shu is too young, age is about 20 years old, a girl, face and tender young, like an ungraduated student.

Is the Chinese character programming department so young? Just now is Lin Zhiyuan, now I am coming to a younger Lin Shu.

Seeing Lin Shu, people who don’t know, began to ask Lin Shu’s identity.

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min are no strangers to Lin Shu. They know that Lin Shu is one of the few people who Chen Mo personally invited to enter the company.

The root of the ‘clown virus’ that shocked the world at the beginning was Lin Shu’s unintentionally programmed anti-virus software. Now the anti-virus software has been transformed into a professional anti-virus software for the army ant company.

"Are you called Lin Shu?" Zhao Min asked.

"President, you...you know me." Lin Shu did not expect the president to know her and began to get nervous.

"You are the only one of our company's programming skills backbone, and the boss personally invited me, how can I not know." Zhao Min Wen and smiled: "Don't be nervous, if you have any ideas, you can boldly say."

When Zhao Min’s words came out, the people on the field were a little surprised. In the company, there were not many people who were appreciated by the boss. I didn’t expect this girl, who seems to be only 20 years old, to be invited by the boss himself.

"Good... good." Lin Shu hurriedly stood up from the position, ran to the small podium, and sorted out his nervous emotions before he said: "In fact, I have two...two ideas, one about 'artificial intelligence +' Planned, one is holographic ecological application. The idea is similar to that of Director Wang and Lin Zhiyuan, but it is a little different."

chapters.title: Chapter 305: : Lin Shu'S Thoughts
chapters.body:
Chapter 305: : Lin Shu'S Thoughts

After Lin Shu opened up, everyone began to listen carefully to her, they all want to see, the young girl who was personally invited by the boss to enter the company, what is the best place.

"I will first say the idea of 'artificial intelligence +'. The general function is similar to that of Director Wang. We can use the personal smart assistant approach, each person has a smart account, promotes intelligent assistants, and our 'smart assistant' Acting as a brain, connecting various devices to work.

But we can get users in a more flexible way, such as designing an image for smart assistants. Each person's personality hobbies are different, intelligent assistants can have personalized choices, so the image can be flexible, providing a variety of different dressing combinations, such as clothes, hair, skin color, personality, etc., so that users can combine their favorite assistant image.

The intelligent assistant positioning of ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ can be regarded as a partner in life, and has a specific image, allowing users to regard them as partners, which makes users more like this intelligent assistant.

We now have holographic mobile phones, and the image of 'artificial intelligence +' can be projected during use. This way, the user does not have to talk to a mobile phone, and feels awkward. Even if it is not a holographic mobile phone, the image of the smart assistant can also appear on the screen of the mobile phone when used.

In this way, when the user thinks of a personal intelligent assistant, a concrete image will appear in his mind. With the ability and image, the personal intelligent assistant is closer to life and easier to remember. It is not just a program. ”

The people on the field nodded. They all used the company's smart assistants, but they only talked to the mobile computer. It is very awkward. If there is a specific image and a favorite image, more people will like to use smart assistants.

At this point, Zhao Min nodded slightly and agreed.
