When Lin Shu said, she thought of the ink girl, Chen Mo's artificial intelligence assistant. The artificial intelligence of the ink girl can be said to be the highest artificial intelligence achievement of the marching ant company, and the smart image and character are no different from human beings.

Those who know the existence of the ink girl, only her and Xiaoyu, the outside world only guessed that Chen Mo has more advanced artificial intelligence, but the outside world can not confirm this guess, but I don't know how high Chen Mo's artificial intelligence is.

"As for the function of personal intelligent assistant, it is the same as that of Director Wang. It controls life appliances, office software, computers, mobile phones, and when necessary, it can be embedded in large living machines such as unmanned vehicles and elevators.

You can also add functions like 'Xiaodie', encyclopedia dictionary, common sense, singing, dancing, language, mathematics, increase its expression movements, whether you are studying or living, you can use the image of the intelligent assistant in the details. More people like it. ”

Lin Shu explained his thoughts. The people in the conference room did not consciously combine the ideas of Wang Sijia and Lin Shu.

This kind of personal intelligence assistant, isn’t it what they have been looking forward to?

"The above is about the idea of 'artificial intelligence +' plan, then talk about the idea of holographic ecological application. In fact, my thoughts, some people have said, is Lin Zhiyuan's game application. Most people around, like to play games with mobile phones. This idea is also the embarrassment of my roommates.

Holographic games can be developed like the King and the turret, as well as chess and fighting games. These games are still hot, classic, and most importantly suitable for the development of holographic games. ”

Lin Shu did not say the drawbacks of the game, may bring negative winds to the company. For example, many people are playing the game of penguins, but they are screaming at the boss of the penguin company, saying that they are poisoning students. This is not something she should consider. These things will be considered by the top, and it will be decided by the top.

"In addition to the above gameplay, we have another holographic game. Green, pollution-free, and close to life, is to raise pets, plant trees.

Many people want to keep pets, but they cannot keep pets because of various restrictions such as living environment, working hours and income.

We can develop a holographic pet, similar to the ‘travel frog’, which is a virtual pet that can be carried around and projected, better than ever. And there are no restrictions on the types of pets, pandas, dolphins, hawks, tigers, dinosaurs, etc.

Pet food, dress up and other sources can be purchased or acquired in another way, that is, exercise. During the exercise, randomly get food, dress up and other props.

Dressing up the various plants needed in the pet house, we also get energy through exercise or low-carbon travel. Similar to the practice of ‘ant forest, we connect plants in the real world and green the desert.

In this way, hobbies, sports health and environmental protection themes can be perfectly integrated. However, if you want to make the personal smart assistant in the AI+ program more interesting, you can combine this pet theme with ‘artificial intelligence+’, and the personal smart assistant needs ‘food’, so the smart assistant is more human and more interesting. A product, only people like it, will have a bigger market. ”

The people in the field are nodding, they are considering the problem from the general direction, ignoring these details. It is the last word to like it. Lin Shu said that letting the 'smart assistant' become more likeable will have great benefits for the plan.

After speaking all the ideas, Lin Shucai walked down the small podium and returned to his seat.

“Who else has other ideas?”

Zhao Min asked this question, the people in the conference room all face each other. So far, the questions and ideas that have been said are almost the same. Next, you must determine the direction before you can find more specific problems.

“If there are no other ideas, then let me talk about my decision. The 'Artificial Intelligence+' plan is centered on the ideas of Wang Sika and Lin Shu, and you and others participate in the 'Artificial Intelligence+' program. Discussion of the ideas of the R&D members.

The function of the 'Artificial Intelligence+' Smart Assistant and other aspects of the design are perfected, and the feasible design is handed over to me. Julie, you are responsible for preparing the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ program.

Holographic ecological application, with Lin Zhiyuan and Lin Shu's game theme as the core development, holographic ecological development laboratory, can set up a special game development team, first develop holographic application to the game, launch several holographic game applications, open holographic ecology The door.

As for the next step of the plan, when we look at the market response and then make specific arrangements, ideas that are developed in other directions can also be reported. If feasible, I will approve it.

Ok, today's meeting is like this. All the people who participated in the meeting put together the ideas that you think are good and put them into a report. It can be their idea, what you think can be improved. ”

Zhao Min announced the meeting, everyone was looking forward to the meeting room.

The ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ program, as well as the holographic application, is two new areas, and as long as it is completed, people’s lifestyles will change dramatically. Not to mention other people, they all have a look forward to the emergence of 'artificial intelligence +', and the era of holographic application popularity.

chapters.title: Chapter 306: : She Is Really Lucky
chapters.body:
Chapter 306: : She Is Really Lucky

"Mergo, dream fiber synthesis is successful."

"Ok?"

Chen Mo was slightly surprised, and immediately put down the work at hand and went to the new material development laboratory.

Fantasy fiber is a very special fiber material. Chen Mo took it out of the technology library and made a wedding dress for Xiao Yu. At the beginning, he promised Xiaoyu, let her be the happiest bride, and personally design a wedding dress for him. After the large holographic projector was completed, the two held a wedding.

Now that the large holographic projector enters the final stage of the attack, it will be completed soon. The dream fiber is successfully synthesized at this time. This is a very good news.

The New Materials Laboratory, an underground research institute on the 1st floor, just entered the lab and was able to see the various robots working in the lab.

The synthesis of fantasy fiber is also here, but all along, the ink girl is controlling the intelligent machine in the synthesis, he only occasionally asks about the progress.

There are simulation calculations of superconducting computers, the help of holographic technology, and detailed technical information. So quickly synthesized, Chen Mo is not too surprised.

After entering the laboratory, Chen Mo was taken to a test bench by the robot. He also saw the appearance of the dream fiber.

The sample of the dream fiber is not processed, it is a little milky white irregular small particles, and nothing surprising. But when you look closely, you can see small particles emitting white color under the white light.

“Can it be produced?” Chen Mo picked up a little dreamy fiber material and carefully observed it in his hand.

"If you are in mass production, you need to make special production equipment, but you can only make a wedding dress for Xiao Yu's sister. The amount of the laboratory is 15 kilograms a day, enough for you to use, but the cost is relatively high." Said the woman.

"The cost is not a problem. It can be produced. This is not necessary for mass production. It is a laboratory synthesis, enough to make a wedding dress."

Chen Mo put the dream fiber powder on the stage of the microscope. Under the microscopic field of view, it is possible to see the color of the dream fiber particles flowing like a dream.

"Merg brother, Zhao Min wants to see you, ask if you have time." When Chen Mo carefully observed the dream fiber, the ink girl said.

"Let her come to the lab." Chen Mo did not stop, but still carefully observed the fantasy fiber material.

Zhao Min is a bit strange, why Chen Mo will go to the new materials laboratory.

This lab, she has not been here, because when she was looking for Chen Mo, Chen Mo was mostly in the holographic laboratory, and she would not come to the new material laboratory for no reason.

Here is the restricted area, the most important room temperature superconducting material, produced here at the New Materials Laboratory.

Is Chen Mo ready to develop new materials?

Zhao Min had to think this way, because he knew that Chen Mo was fine and he would not come to the new materials laboratory.

Being led by the robot into the new materials laboratory, Zhao Min saw Chen Mo, who was focusing on the microscope. After a while, Chen Mo also turned and looked at Zhao Min.

"In a hurry?"

“It’s not an emergency, it’s about the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ program and the holographic eco-application.”

Zhao Min’s ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ plan and the holographic ecology, as well as the content of today’s meeting, and Chen Mo simply said it.

After listening to Zhao Min's words, Chen Mo nodded slightly.

‘Artificial Intelligence+’ and holographic ecological applications, the company’s people are quite thoughtful.

In particular, ‘Artificial Intelligence+’, he also joked about this, and he took it out of the Americans. He did not expect Zhao Min to be serious, but also made such a plan.

What surprised him was that, listening to Zhao Min’s description, Lin Shu has grown a lot. At the beginning, he went to Lin Shu, but also because of her poor experience, hand in hand, plus the talent of her Chinese programming language, but also the love of the mind, before she recruited into the marching ant company, did not expect to grow up quite fast.

"The idea is very good, let go and do it." Chen Mo said: "Now the holographic technology is mature, there are more possibilities, so that they do not limit their own ideas."

When I heard Chen Mo’s words, Zhao Min couldn’t help but smile: “We all want to limit our own thoughts, but we can’t do it. The company is not as powerful as everyone, according to the personal intelligence assistant’s requirements of the 'Artificial Intelligence+' program. Its intelligence is higher and more flexible than that of Xiaodie.

The company's artificial intelligence R & D team can only barely follow Xiaodie's intelligent development and development, and the development of more advanced artificial intelligence, I am afraid that it will not be completed in a few years or even longer. Obviously, you are most suitable for the development of 'Artificial Intelligence+' Planned personal smart assistant for people. ”

Zhao Min did not want to trouble Chen Mo, but had to trouble.

For the outside world, the artificial intelligence team of the marching ant company has already belonged to the world's top level, but Zhao Min knows that the level of the entire artificial intelligence team adds up to a few light years away from Chen Mo.

"This is a problem."

Chen Mocai realized that for him, these things can be done easily, but for other R&D personnel, it is a scorpio.

He can let the ink girl write an artificial intelligence with a smart algorithm, but he won't do it.

Otherwise, letting this develop, the company's research and development, too dependent on itself, stifling other people's research and development capabilities, certainly will not go too far.

The company is a group. Although he has the ability to solve these problems, it is impossible for him to do every problem. Otherwise, he will die sooner or later.

"That way, you choose a few trusted people to come over. I teach them a deeper intelligent algorithm. This personal assistant is developed by them. This is your project. As an opportunity for them to play, I am admitted. It’s boring.” Chen Mo thought about it.

Chen Mo’s personal ability is also limited, and the ink girl can’t be exposed casually. Therefore, it is necessary to cultivate some confidants and help to deal with some things. After all, he can’t intervene in many things.

Let some people grow up and become the backbone of the technology, and in the future can become the mainstay of the company.

Zhao Min's eyes are bright, she knows that Chen Mo knows too much technology, and she does not know what a deeper intelligent algorithm is, but Chen Mo almost reveals too much information.

"Do you choose someone?" Zhao Min asked.

"People's choice? I don't know too much about other people. Wang Sijia's ability is good. The potential of Lin Shu and Wei Zhe is quite big. You should let the three of them come over first. I feel that there are suitable candidates. I can also recommend it to me. Examine, if appropriate, I will teach him a deeper intelligent algorithm." Chen Mosi said.

He knows more about the three people, Wei Zhe and Lin Shu are personally invited to enter the company. Lin Shu has great potential and is also a good girl. Wei Zhe has his own principle bottom line. Wang Sijia is Zhao Ming's cousin. He is also the person in charge of artificial intelligence and system research and development in the company. It is trustworthy and outstanding.

"it is good."

Zhao Min nodded and promised.

After talking about the development of 'artificial intelligence +', Zhao Min also turned his attention to the experimental platform, which happened to fall on the sample of the dream fiber.

“Is developing new materials again?”

"Yes, this is called fantasy fiber." Chen Mo said. Even with the constant temperature superconducting material, Zhao Min knows that the material of dream fiber will not glare Zhao Min.

"What are you doing?"

"I want to know?"

"miss you."

"Remember to keep me secret." Chen Mo said: "It is used to design a wedding dress for Xiao Yu."

“Design a wedding dress? Do you want to hold a wedding?” Zhao Min was a little surprised. Looking at the colorful materials on the table, the tone was a bit sour: “In order to design a wedding dress for Xiao Yu, you also developed a new material?”

"Yeah, I promised to give her a beautiful wedding, and my design level is limited, I can only use technology to make up." Chen Mo nod, naturally will not say that this is in the technology library.

"She is really lucky."

Zhao Min sighed and looked at the sample of the dream fiber on the test bench in a complicated way. She didn't know what her mood was at the moment.

If someone is willing to make a wedding dress for her to develop a new material, I am afraid she will fall. Unfortunately, in addition to the man in front of him, it is estimated that no one can afford this romance.

"If you want to design a wedding dress for me, when I get married, I will go to Xiaoyu as a bridesmaid."

When I heard this sentence, Chen Mo’s mouth twitched and looked at Zhao Min with a smile.

chapters.title: Chapter 307: :Teach
chapters.body:
Chapter 307: :Teach

In Chen Mo's office, Wei Zhe, Wang Sijia and Lin Shu sat on the sofa and waited quietly. They received a notice from Zhao Min and were taken to Chen Mo’s office by the robot at the first time.

There are not many opportunities to see Chen Mo alone. They are curious. Chen Mo called them three people to come and want to do something.

Wei Zhe was still calm, and Wang Sijia’s eyes were in the office of Chen Mo’s office. This huge office is not for anyone to come in. Lin Shu is the most anticipated, since the last time he came to the army ant company to report, after seeing Chen Mo, he did not have close contact with Chen Mo.

Just when Chen Molai came to work, like the other female employees of the company, I looked far away.

Today, I had the opportunity to get close to Chen Mo. She was a little surprised, so her eyes were always at the door. As for why the president would let her come, she no longer cares. Anyway, no matter what Chen Mo asked her to do, she would not refuse.

"Lin Shu, what have you been staring at the door? Wait for the boss to come over?" Wang Sijia asked Lin Shu ear.

Both of them are in the company, both in the artificial intelligence development team, and there are only a few female engineers, so the relationship between the two is also better. Although it is less than the level of ignorance, it is a good friend who can make fun of it.

"No...no...no."

Lin Shu hurriedly denied, his eyes began to dodge.

The smile on Wang Sijia’s face is even worse: “So nervous, I’m talking about it? Wouldn’t it be secretly crushing the boss? Like your age, it’s just when the youth hormones broke out, it’s really a good idea. ”

"No... I didn't." As if the secret in my heart was dismantled, Lin Shu's face turned red.

"Your answer is written on the face."

Wang Sijia smiled.

"In fact, secretly affecting the boss, it is not a matter of unspeakable. The company may have a girl who is secretly in love with the boss. A man like a boss is not normal. I also have a crush on the boss. I remember the sister. When I said the boss, I said that I would marry him. If it was not the boss who had a girlfriend, I would have pushed him down."

"Oh... cough and cough..."

Wei Zhe, who was drinking water, was stunned when he heard Wang Sijia’s words, patted his chest and tried to cough. He was scared by Wang Sijia's jealousy.

Seeing Wei Zhe's reaction, Lin Shu blushed like blood, and did not know how to pick up Wang Sijia's words.

"Wei Zhe, don't you listen to me and talk to Xiaoshu?"

Wei Zhe's face is pumping, this is also used to eavesdrop? Wang Sijia just didn't press the sound, sitting here and not moving, can listen to all the words.

"That Scarlett, you said that this time the boss came to us, what do you want to do?" Wei Zhe hurriedly shifted the topic.

“The 'Artificial Intelligence+’ program was just started. We are all artificial intelligence teams. It’s for this matter to come to us.” Although Wang Sijia’s personality is very embarrassing, his mind is very delicate.

Lin Shu sees the two turn the subject, Lin Shu breathed a sigh of relief, his eyes once again fell on the door of the office.

When I saw the office door open, Lin Shu smiled and hurriedly stood up from the sofa. Wang Sijia and Wei Zhe saw it and stood up from the sofa to see Chen Mo who was coming in.

"Don't be restrained, sit down."

Chen Mo sat down opposite the three, Wei Zhe and Wang Sijia were more familiar with Chen Mo, and there was no sentimentality. They sat down directly, and Lin Shu was a little nervous and sat down.

"Do you know what I called you for?"

"do not know."

The three men shook their heads.

"First ask you one thing, there will be better development opportunities in the future, will you leave the company?" Chen Mo asked.

The three men looked at each other and seemed to understand the meaning of Chen Mo. They were all smart people. Naturally, this should be a simple test. Chen Mo may have something to do.

"Snow sounds she likes to be stable, so I won't go around." Wei Zhe thinks of Tang Xueyin, his face reveals a light smile: "Where, where else is better than the development opportunities in the company?"

"I don't have any great ambitions, my cousin doesn't leave, I can't go," Wang Sijia said.

"I won't leave." Lin Shu firmly shook his head.

Chen Mo is not surprised by this answer. This is just a routine problem. After all, it is impossible to teach a further intelligent algorithm to a person who may leave the company.

“What is the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ program now? What problems are encountered?” Chen Mo continued.

"Director Wang said." Wei Zhe looked at Wang Sijia.

“The president has already agreed to our plan. We are now working on the development of 'Artificial Intelligence+' personal intelligence assistant, but we are developing on the basis of Xiaodie. The new personal intelligent assistant has higher requirements for intelligence and needs to reach the demon. The intelligence of Ji robot is different, but the function is different.” Wang Sijia said.

"Developed?"

"No, you need to reach the intelligence of the enchantress robot, a little difficult, we are working on technology." Wang Sijia said.

The current technology of the artificial intelligence team can develop mobile smart assistants, but the robot code is not open to them.

Chen Mo nodded and stood up from his seat: "Follow me."

The three did not hesitate to leave the office with Chen Mo. Not long after, Chen Mo took three people and walked into a laboratory.

"This is the artificial intelligence laboratory I used to use. Now I have other laboratories. If this lab is not used, I will hand them over to you."

I heard the lab give them three people, and the three faces showed a happy look. Chen Mo used the lab, which is the top equipment, and many people want to come in and can't enter. I didn't expect Chen Mo to hand over the lab to them.

"Ink girl, open the tutorial on intelligent programming of Chinese characters." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, Mom."

The voice of the ink girl fell, and on a huge screen, a file popped up.

The three men heard the voice of the ink girl, and her eyes were bright. It is not a secret that the boss has an artificial intelligence, but the average person does not know what the name of the artificial intelligence is, and the level of intelligence is high. I did not expect that now they can know that this artificial intelligence is called ‘墨女’ and the boss is called ‘Mer brother’.

Chen Mo naturally does not know that the three people are curious about the '墨女', but know that they will not say anything. As a person who created the artificial intelligence of the marching ant company, he did not have his own personal artificial intelligence, but it was strange. Knowing the name is useless, and the outside world cannot detect the intelligence level of the ink girl.

"In this, there is a tutorial on intelligent programming algorithms for Chinese characters, using artificial intelligence programming algorithms to develop artificial intelligence, and nonlinear logic will be better. The intelligent core program of the enchanting robot is developed by this algorithm. This is also my promotion of Chinese characters. The reason for programming, without my permission, can not tell other people this algorithm." Chen Mo said.

Although these intelligent algorithms are low-level intelligent algorithms for him, for the outside world, this algorithm far surpasses other current intelligent algorithms. If it leaks, it means that the outside world will get the technology of the marching ant company.

The three people focus on the key points. They all know that Chen Mo gave the lab to them and opened up algorithms to them. They must trust them. These technologies belong to the company's core technology and cannot be leaked out.

"Your Chinese programming language is very good. It is not too difficult to master this algorithm. This lab will belong to you in the future and work hard."

Chen Mo asked the ink girl to open the relevant authority of the laboratory to the three people, as well as the technical level of authority, to do everything, only to hand over the lab to three people.

chapters.title: Chapter 308: : Hologram Game
chapters.body:
Chapter 308: : Hologram Game

The marching ant company, the holographic ecological development laboratory, assembled more than a dozen technicians at this time, Zhao Min is also among them, everyone's eyes are on the holographic platform in the middle.

On the holographic platform, a sly tiger appears on the holographic projection. The little tiger is a 3D anime image that looks very delicate. At this time, it is playing in a small pet yard, very cute.

The female staff on the field looked at the embarrassing little tiger with both eyes.

"How is the result?" Zhao Min looked at Lin Zhiyuan next to him.

When he heard Zhao Min ask, Lin Zhiyuan immediately got up. Now he is one of the leaders in holographic eco-application development, responsible for holographic game development, and now is testing a holographic game - pet adventure.

They are now mainly developing simple mobile games, 3A games and moba game development, which require a complete world background, story line, character image design and skill form design. This requires a lot of time and manpower to build up, but also after many tests, the time span is too large, so they have not considered it for a while, can only develop simple games to alleviate the embarrassment of the current holographic ecological market.

Holographic mobile phones are still hot today. As a mobile phone with inter-generation technology, the marching ant company has completely replaced Apple's mobile phone dominance and become the innocent king.

As time went by, not all the praises on the market, some people began to be dissatisfied. Not because of the quality of holographic phones, but because of the application of holographic phones.

At present, holographic mobile phones use holographic functions, which are generally in holographic video calls, holographic video calls, must have two holographic mobile phones. Holographic mobile phones are not a human hand, and nowadays, the time for people to call is getting shorter and shorter, so the function of holographic video call, in addition to talking with relatives, is a bit sloppy at other times.

In addition to holographic video calls, it is to watch some holographic videos, as well as holographic anchors.

Gradually, people found that although the holographic mobile phone is very powerful, except for the holographic mobile phone itself, the software is holographic function software, other applications are all traditional mobile phone applications, the projected mobile phone desktop, those application icons can only It is a flat projection, which can be loaded, but it is less practical than using a mobile phone screen.

Whoever has nothing to project out of his mobile phone desktop, is not trying to expose his privacy. Projecting the mobile phone desktop to play, it is simply too easy for someone to sneak a screen.

The real advantages of holographic functions have not been realized, and the sound of spitting on the network is increasing.

Zhao Min's meaning is to build a simple holographic ecology and open the holographic ecological application. They simply don't have time and organize humans to develop large-scale games. After the holographic ecology is stable, the next step can be planned.

"The game self-test report has come out, the data is stable, and the program is running normally." Lin Zhiyuan said.

Zhao Min nodded slightly and opened the pet store.

There are more than 200 kinds of pets in the pet store. Mainly the most common birds and beasts and pets in life, as well as some mythical fairy beasts, such as dragons, phoenixes, unicorns, etc., are virtual holographic pets.

The design of these pets, together with all the artists of the marching ant company, and the wisdom of the production team, plus the help of artificial intelligence designers, was completed.

“How many games have you developed now?” asked Zhao Min.

"There are more than a dozen, including chess, chess, chess and other games, the most widely used chess games, as well as tower defense and a street fighting game."

"Put the game on the shelves." Zhao Min said: "All at once."

......

Chen Hui sat in the company's lounge, and now he has nothing to do. He is bored and holding a mobile phone to brush Weibo. This holographic mobile phone is hard to buy, so he likes it very much.

However, I have been a little bit anxious recently. He doesn't like to watch small videos, and his family and friends don't have holographic mobile phones. So there are not many places where he uses holographic mobile phones.

This mobile phone, in addition to loading, runs faster, it is a bit tasteless, and the price of nearly 30,000, a little expensive, he bite his teeth, and finally bought it.

Suddenly, the hand brushing Weibo stopped, and a message appeared on the screen of the mobile phone. That is the news of the official ant company official micro.

Mobile holographic games are on the shelves!

Just a few words spurred Chen Hui. Just a few words, with a few pictures attached below, are the names and pictures of the game. I don’t want to, and Chen Hui immediately opened the application store of the holographic mobile phone.

As a white-collar worker, his life is very monotonous, so he occasionally plays games. Now marching ant company launched a holographic game, which made him immediately interested.

Holographic games, this is something that has never happened before.

When I saw the holographic application and added several recommended games, Chen Hui looked at the instructions carefully and opened the ‘pet’ app.

After the download is completed, Chen Hui can't wait to open the APP registration account and start to choose pets.

Ten common pets such as cats, dogs, birds, fish, and hamsters can be selected for free, while other pets in the store need to be purchased.

Chen Hui saw that there were still dragons and phoenixes.

After thinking about it, Chen Hui directly chose a cute little tiger and spent ten dollars. For him, it is not a lot of money at all. After the purchase is completed, Chen Hui opens the holographic mode.

This is a holographic game, and he also wants to see what kind of strange things there are in this holographic game.

Hey!

A shiver of milk and a burst of milk, a cute little tiger wearing a pattern, squatting on the holographic projection of the mobile phone, the body is only the size of the fist, the expression is smart, and the embarrassment is embarrassing.

"Wow, cute little tiger."

The exclamations of the road rang, and the colleagues next to them saw this scene and they all came up.

"Chen Hui, where is the projection of your little tiger? It's so cute." A female colleague glanced at the cute little tiger, and immediately reached for it, trying to hug the little tiger, but that was only projection.

"This is the latest holographic game released by the marching ant company - a pet adventure, a holographic pet like a 'travel frog'." Chen Hui looked at the little tiger with his eyes, this is his first time to raise a tiger. A sense of experience, very strong, and so cute, is simply a girl killer.

“Is it really a holographic game?” Several people who bought a holographic phone immediately took out their mobile phone and opened the app store.

"I am going to buy a holographic phone."

Several female colleagues stared at the little tiger with their eyes closed, and they couldn’t cover their faces.

I always wanted to keep pets, but unfortunately I didn't have time to take care of them, and the small animal hygiene was not convenient, so one did not raise it. I didn't expect the marching ant company to launch such a virtual pet, and the cute feeling burst.

This kind of scene, this is a small scene happening among many holographic mobile phone users. This scene is happening in every corner of the country.

The news of the holographic game released by the marching ant company was immediately transmitted to the entire network through the news media. People who saw the news and had holographic mobile phones entered the holographic app store.

There are people on the Internet who are constantly recommending the marching ant company to develop holographic games, but the marching ants have not responded positively. I didn't expect the holographic game to come out now.

For a time, the holographic game was on fire.

chapters.title: Chapter 309: :Open?
chapters.body:
Chapter 309: :Open?

On the streets, buses, subways, shopping malls and other public places, you can often see someone holding a holographic phone, and a holographic pet is suspended above.

After the emergence of holographic games, all those who have holographic mobile phones, holographic pets are almost all necessary for human hands. This kind of game does not take too much time, and the holographic pet is very nice and doesn't take care of it.

Although holographic pets can't compare with real pets, the advantage is that they don't have to take care of themselves, they don't have to spend too much money to buy pet supplies, and the burden is not limited. What kind of pets are raised, even if they are normal, they can't be used. Pet-protected animals can also satisfy their favorite in holographic games.

The marching ant company has launched a total of fifteen holographic games, which are some single-game mini-games. The download volume of each game has reached the top of the application list. The pet adventure is the only game that develops into the top of the list. The download volume is far behind the second place, which shows its popularity.

This kind of game like a breeder is very different from a travel frog. The former is a single placement type mobile game, but the pet adventure is not so monotonous.

Pets need their masters to accumulate a certain number of sports steps before they can go on an adventure trip.

The vegetables in the pet's home can be used as food to increase the speed of the owner's movement steps. The owner has a lot of movement steps, and there are many foods and coins to be harvested. Friends can steal vegetables from each other.

This is a classic way of playing, and although it is old-fashioned, it is once again novelty when it comes to the huge bright spot of holographic pets.

And during the outing, there is a chance to randomly pick up a pet dress or food, and maybe a variety of pet eggs, pet adventures, and bring back some food and dress up.

Special gameplay, healthy game themes, and holographic games, which are almost real pet shapes, make people fascinated by this holographic game.

Zhao Min sat in Chen Mo's office. In front of the two, it was a holographic white fox, very cute.

This is Zhao Min's holographic pet. After the launch of the holographic game, she also experienced it.

The emergence of holographic games has brought the holographic mobile phone, which has reached its peak, to a new height.

Nowadays, holographic mobile phones are still in a state of short supply. The main limitation of output is micro-holographic projectors. The production line is under full construction, and sooner it will be able to increase production capacity again.

The holographic games are hot, and the problems of holographic ecological applications faced by their holographic mobile phones are solved, but this is only a phased beginning.

"After this period of deliberation and argumentation, I am going to open up the holographic software development platform." Zhao Min said.

"Well, talk about the reasons." Chen Mo nodded and gestured to Zhao Min to continue.

"The holographic game just came out to attract the attention of users. We temporarily ease the pressure of holographic applications, but the number is too small. Sooner or later, we will face the problem of single user experience. Our company is more powerful, with limited personnel and capabilities. Want to establish diversity Holographic eco-applications are sure to involve more developers."

Zhao Min explained his thoughts to Chen Mo. After all, opening the holographic development platform is not a trivial matter. Even if Chen Mo gave the company to her, this kind of thing still needs to be discussed with Chen Mo in advance.

"Like windows and ioS, the system ecology can't be completely established by Microsoft and Apple, and there are countless programmers involved. We open holographic software development tools, let others participate in the development of holographic software, use the platform's app store, collect channels Fees, as well as the cost of developing software, this is one of them.

Second, holographic software can only be run on termite holographic systems and marching ant intelligent holographic systems, and currently only our holographic projectors are mass-produced holographic mobile phones. It has a promotion effect on our company's computer operating system and mobile phone system, as well as holographic projectors and holographic mobile phones.

Third, holographic software, software core is developed with Chinese character programming language, in order to develop holographic software, we must master the Chinese character programming language, which is also a promotion of Chinese character programming language.

Game development is a highlight of holographic applications, but developing games is not the main purpose of our company. We eat meat and let other software developers drink soup. They give us a complete holographic ecology. We can make money. This is a benefit to others.

After all, software development, our company is more powerful, and it is impossible to monopolize, otherwise it will certainly bear the coercion of other giants. In contrast to this, it is better to take it out on its own initiative and get more benefits than the original ones, and it can also be well received by the outside world.

The technical status of our company is completely ahead of the outside world. The holographic software development tools are open to them, so we don't have to worry about technical issues, and let them rely on us. ”

Chen Mo nodded slightly. In the consideration of the company's long-term interests, Zhao Min was much more professional than him. According to Zhao Min's idea, doing this is indeed the best for the company.

"Then do what you want," Chen Mo said.

"Good." Zhao Min nodded gently and did not hesitate to promise Chen Mo. She did not have any accidents.

In the long run, open holographic software development tools may lose some of the benefits of holographic software, but the benefits are much more than the lost ones. Of these, you must know how to choose.

"Zhao Jie, the meeting has almost begun." The two just finished talking, Xiaoyu also came in.

"You should go to the meeting first. You should have a plan for this matter. You don't have to deal with the technology of the first building, other technologies, you can take full responsibility." Chen Mo said.

"Yeah." Zhao Min smiled and trusted Chen Mo, the psychology was still very useful.

In the conference room, the tops of the marching ant company are sitting on the top of the holographic ecological laboratory. The sensation caused by holographic games has given them a strong-hearted agent. Now, in the holographic ecological development laboratory, from top to bottom, they are full of passion.

Seeing that Zhao Min and Xiao Yu came in, everyone rushed to stand up from the position.

"Sit down." Zhao Min sat down in the main position: "This meeting, first of all, praises the achievements of the holographic ecological laboratory in holographic applications."

When I heard Zhao Min’s praise, everyone smiled. There are not many things that can be praised by Zhao Min, and there are praises, and rewards will certainly not be less. This is the practice of marching ants.

"Next talk about the current market situation."

Zhao Min is serious. Others see this look, and they are sitting in danger and their faces are serious.

Lin Zhiyuan raised his hand: "Now the holographic game market has a good response, but when the holographic game is developed, there are some problems. After the holographic mobile phone opens the holographic projection, it is impossible to control some competitive games. We plan to launch a special game controller. solve this problem."

"This is up to you, small product development, R & D system can be fully handled within the system, just need to report specific projects to me." Zhao Min said.

“The holographic eco-laboratory is understaffed. Half of the engineers who are proficient in Chinese character programming in the Chinese character programming department are in the 'Artificial Intelligence+' program. Our holographic ecological laboratory is involved in research and development and perfecting the computer holography system. If you are developing a large-scale game, you need A large number of people, if separated from the laboratory, will cause the holographic ecological laboratory to be understaffed," said a director of the R&D system on the field.

"Speaking of this, I have something to say. I just discussed it with the boss. After careful consideration, I also considered the next step. So I decided to open the holographic software development platform, including the holographic simulator, ant compilation. A series of program development tools, such as a device. The development plan for large-scale online games is temporarily put on hold."

Upon hearing Zhao Min’s decision, everyone’s breath on the field was stagnant. I don’t understand Zhao Min, I don’t understand why she made this decision.

The field fell into silence, and everyone looked at each other with a huge question mark on their faces.

They dare not ask Zhao Min why, because Zhao Min is a superior, questioning the decision of the superior, unless you have a special atmosphere, otherwise there will be no good results, not to mention Zhao Min in the company, has always said one.

However, they are also anxious. Now the holographic game is in full swing. The revenue of holographic games is nearly 10 million every day. For any company, it is not a small number. Zhao Min does this, no doubt wants to let go of this fat.

"You are all wondering why you want to open a holographic software development platform?"

The people on the field nodded indifferently. Now that there is holographic software development technology, only one of them, open to the outside world, is undoubtedly sharing a piece of fat meat.

“Because what we need is a diversified holographic application ecosystem,” said Zhao Min.

chapters.title: Chapter 310: :Sensation
chapters.body:
Chapter 310: :Sensation

Tian Mei Studio.

Zheng Dong sat in the lounge. Sitting opposite him was a colleague from him. On the holographic mobile phone between the two, a holographic chessboard was suspended. It was a chess game released by the marching ant company.

Around them, there are still a few colleagues who are on the lookout and make suggestions from time to time.

I used to have the hobby of playing chess in the past, but now the relationship between life and work, the board can not be carried with me, this only hobby is slowly put down, playing chess games on the computer, can not find the former classmates around The joy of playing chess together.

The game of holographic chess appeared, and he regained this interest. Holographic chess is not only tall, but also convenient, and there is a real chessboard experience, which is not available for playing games on the computer.

So now the gap between work and rest, will pull up colleagues with the same preferences, around to kill two sets, by the way chat together.

"You said that this holographic technology is used to develop the moba games of the king and the heroes. I am afraid that we can make our game more enthusiastic?"

"You want it, it's impossible to think of it. The development of key holographic software, we don't even have a clue. At present, I am afraid that there is only a marching ant company."

"If the marching ant company uses holographic technology to develop a game similar to the king, then our situation will be troublesome. The marching ant company is a real army ant, and every time they go to a field, it will bring a huge threat. It is estimated that this is also the technology. The company doesn't like the reasons for marching ants."

This statement has caused many people to agree. Now the marching ant company is releasing a simple game like a stand-alone game or a pet adventure. If you develop a large game, their game becomes an outdated product, and it will be troublesome at that time.

When a few people were chatting and playing chess, a man of about 30 years old came in.

"Everyone stopped, there was a news, there was a meeting, there was an urgent work adjustment, and all the programmers who mastered the Chinese programming language came to me to sign up."

When the words came out, the lounge was amazed.

Now is the rest time after lunch. Many of them are programmers. The work pressure is great. The only rest time is to relax. I didn't expect to have emergency work adjustment today. This is the first time I met.

"Supervisor, why should we convene a Chinese programming language?" Zheng Dong and others stopped to look at the man who came over.

Since the ‘clown virus’ kidabed a city, the special ability of the Chinese programming language has broken into the eyes of major companies.

All major companies around the world are recruiting technicians who master Chinese character programming skills to develop software for Chinese character programming languages, especially anti-virus software.

After the clown virus crisis, people found that with conventional anti-virus software, it is impossible to kill and kill viruses written in Chinese-language programming languages, and can only be killed by killing software written in Chinese-language programming languages.

Chinese character programming languages are an alternative to computer languages.

As a member of the huge team of Tianmei Studio, in order to improve their business capabilities, many of them have learned Chinese programming languages, but no one is as proficient as those of specialized technical teams.

But now the company is looking for them to meet with these less well-informed people. What do you want to do?

"The marching ant company just released an announcement to open a holographic software development tool. On the emergency meeting, we will gather all programmers who will be Chinese programming languages and develop holographic games."

When the news came out, it was awkward.

The marching ant company opens the holographic software development platform!

The news came too suddenly, not even a little. The official announcement of the marching ant company came out, and the news point exploded in an instant, and the Internet circle stirred up waves.

Holographic projectors and holographic mobile phones are in the hottest stage, especially after the holographic games come out. The holographic mode makes traditional computer games more interesting.

Because of all kinds of novel experiences, the application of holographic games has been high in the news and forums of the Internet.

However, only the marching ant company has the ability to master the development of holographic software, so some companies can only helplessly watch the army ants company alone in this market, powerless.

Now, the marching ant company suddenly opens up the development tools for holographic software programs, which means that all program developers can develop their own holographic software with the holographic software development platform open by ants.

One of the happiest is the game company.

Penguin, Netease, Blizzard, Ubisoft, Villefort and other famous game production companies, after receiving the news of the army ant company's open holographic software development platform, they held an emergency meeting in the first time to form a research and development team to prepare for the holographic online game. First position.

Holographic technology is a revolutionary technology for other fields and a revolutionary technology for the game industry.

After the holographic projector came out, some game companies already had the idea of developing holographic games, but there was no related technology and could not be practiced. After the marching ant company released the holographic game, they could only look at it with envy, powerless.

Because they have not developed related technologies for holographic software, there are only theoretical stages in various developments. Now the marching ant company releases the holographic software development tools, which is a big happy event.

For the Internet world, this is the beginning of a huge change.

“Informed people revealed that Tian Mei and the fist company jointly developed the holographic combat mode of the two games of hero and king...”

"Netease and Blizzard announced cooperation to jointly develop the holographic mode of World of Warcraft and StarCraft..."

"Perfect world official news, Perfect World and Villefort have reached a cooperation to jointly develop the turret 2 holographic game mode..."

After the marching ant company announced the development of the holographic software development platform, various news appeared on the network, and holographic games became the hottest topic.

In addition to the game company, Ali's Black Cat Mall also joined the ranks, announced the Internet holographic mall plan, other e-commerce platforms, through various channels, released similar signals.

In addition to all kinds of news on the bright side, in private, a rush to fight, is also carried out in major technology companies. Almost all Internet technology companies are recruiting programmers who are proficient in Chinese programming languages at high salaries.

Programmers who understand Chinese programming languages have become the target of headhunting without exception. Even some college students who are proficient in Chinese programming languages have been targeted by major companies. The last time this happened, it was still in the 'Clown virus crisis'. .

These skills have become popular again in Chinese programming languages. Some universities have also begun to discuss the opening of the Chinese character programming language experiment class.

The marching ant company is just a small action that breaks the calm of the entire Internet world and stirs up the storm. Seeing all kinds of news on the Internet, some people have expressed their feelings that the holographic era has arrived.

chapters.title: Chapter 311: :Carry Out
chapters.body:
Chapter 311: :Carry Out

All kinds of news flooded the Internet world, because the marching ant company opened the holographic software development platform, set off a stormy wave.

The marching ant company, which is the protagonist, is also in a busy state.

The opening of the holographic software development platform has made holographic applications popular, and holographic projectors and holographic mobile phones of the marching ant company have continued to soar.

In addition, the installation of termite computer systems under the company's ant company has also grown rapidly, and there is a fascination with Microsoft's windows. Coupled with the innate advantages of Chinese character programming language in holographic software, the soft power of the marching ant company is rising wildly.

Now the marching ant company, under the arrangement of Zhao Min, has done its utmost to expand production to meet the market demand for holographic projectors and holographic mobile phones, and the benefits belonging to the marching ant company are swiftly swallowed.

The sales problems of holographic projectors and holographic mobile phones have been solved by Zhao Min, and Chen Mo’s research has not been interrupted. Now the outside world is busy, and the building is not calm.

In the open space of the holographic laboratory hall of Building No. 1, a huge 'disc' with a diameter of three meters and a height of more than one meter is quietly placed.

If you see it outside, you will definitely feel familiar. This 'disc' is similar to a holographic projector.

The door of the holographic laboratory was opened, and Chen Mo came in under the leadership of the robot and stopped in front of the 'disc'.

With the holographic projector and medium holographic technology, large holographic technology quickly broke through. This 'disc' is the result of his efforts during this time - a large holographic projector.

A closer look reveals that the disc is slightly arched, which is designed to increase the projected area. Micro-lasers, such as pinholes, on the disc, each controlled by the system, are fine-tuned in direction. This design is also more conducive to the resolution of the projector.

"Ink girl, look at the projector." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, Mom."

The robot nodded, and then the 'big disc' illuminates, the colorful light bursts, and it shines directly into the ceiling of the holographic laboratory. A huge ‘Loli’ appears in midair, which is the appearance of the ink girl.

"The data is running normally." The ink girl opened, and then the projection of the ink girl fell to Chen Mo.

This large holographic projector is run by multiple simulations using a superconducting computer. Once an error occurs, the ink girl can find it for the first time, modify it, and then re-simulate the operation.

After such a long period of repeated design, the final plan is determined. The current sample comes out and the effect is not bad.

The projection distance of the large holographic projector theory is 30 meters, and the part with the highest resolution rate is also more than 20 meters. The projection of the two projectors will make the projection more vivid and clear.

When I heard that it was working properly, Chen Mo’s face showed a relaxed smile.

This means that the last technology of holography is done. He promised Xiaoyu, after the successful development of large-scale holographic technology, it was the time to prepare for the wedding.

And there is another important thing, holographic technology is completed, the technology library will open the next technology to him.

"Mergo, the technology of large holographic projectors has matured, is it necessary to mass production?" asked the ink girl.

“Production? No need for temporary use.” Chen Mo shook his head slightly: “The medium-sized holographic projector has been able to meet the current market. Large holographic projectors are released, and the demand is not large. There is no need for mass production for the time being. It is necessary to talk about it later. Holographic projectors, first 100 units, I am useful."

"Okay, My Brother." The ink girl's projection nodded and was completely humanized.

"You put the technology of the large holographic projector into a technical library." Chen Mo took the robot, left the holographic laboratory, and said as he walked.

"It has been sorted out, Mi Ge, what is the next research technique?"

"The technology of the next study, I take a break and think about it, wait until I wake up to tell you." Chen Mo said.

He wants to study a lot of things, and the ink girl is also perfecting the basic equipment of the laboratory. The technology that needs to be researched is never lacking, but Chen Mo’s main energy is also placed in the main technology research and development of the science and technology library.

This is the only way he has to open the science and technology library. The development of other technologies will distract him. He will open up deeper things in the technology library, and it will take longer.

So the next research topic, he must enter the science and technology library, get the next technology, can be determined.

Leaving the first building, Chen Mo returned to the office lounge.

He is also a bit eager to get the next technology. After all, it seems to him that the time spent on holography is too long. For others, his speed of technology development is terrible, but he is not satisfied.

Those technologies are readily available, and there is no difficulty in tackling the problem. If the technology of the [technical apprenticeship] stage, each technology takes so long, do not know to go to the monkey year, to access the core technology of the technology library.

Lying on the bed, Chen Mo closed his eyes and entered the technology library.

The familiar environment is still an endless shelf. After a little emotion, Chen Mo looked at the book projections that were suspended around the library.

Eight directions, eight fields, eight technologies.

Among them, chemical materials, computer technology, room temperature superconducting materials and supercomputers have been completed.

After Chen Mo came in, the science and technology library seemed to be inductive, and the field of applied physics, under the watchful eye of Chen Mo, slowly turned gray and was declared complete.

[Technology Apprentice] The eight technologies in the stage are only five technologies of biomedicine, ecological environment, machinery, military weapons and energy.

Seeing these five technologies, Chen Mo hesitated.

His choice this time is related to how he should go next. These five areas, five completely different technologies.

The field of military industry is very sensitive. The water inside is too deep. If you don’t prepare for it, he will bring in endless troubles.

The time is not ripe, he is not going to involve it for the time being.

The two fields of biomedicine and ecological environment are not considered for the time being. From the physical holographic technology to the medical and ecological aspects, the jump is too great.

The best choice is both mechanical and energy.

He is now able to make robots. With his current industrial strength, the field of machinery should not have much problems.

But in terms of energy, he also has a little meaning.

Because the second generation of enchantress robots now use carbon-based batteries, although there are room temperature superconductors instead of circuits, energy consumption is reduced, but still can not last too long.

The independent carbon crystal battery can not support the high-speed calculation for too long, so the plan to create a body for the ink girl has been said many times. Now it is still a plan, and the ink girl can only temporarily follow him in the form of a second-generation robot. .

If there is new energy to replace carbon-based batteries, the achievement of third-generation robots may be a good choice.

After thinking for a long time, Chen Mocai made up his mind to slowly move into the projection beam of the energy field and put his hand into the book. w

chapters.title: Chapter 312: :Coma
chapters.body:
Chapter 312: :Coma

Xiao Yu took a lunch box and entered Chen Mo’s office with a smile.

She is used to this kind of meal. At noon, when she was off work, she usually gave Chen Mo a meal. This is also her rare thing to help Chen Mo.

Xiaoyu looked around and didn't find Chen Mo's figure. He looked at the robot in the office and said: "Ink girl, is Chen Mo not coming back?"

"Mergo is resting in the lounge." The robot pointed at Chen Mo's rest room.

"Okay, thank you."

Xiaoyu nodded slightly and walked into the lounge.

Looking at Chen Mo, who was sleeping well, Xiao Yu slowly walked to the bed and gently pulled the quilt to help him cover it. At this time, Xiao Yu’s face was distressed. He sat down at the bed and watched quietly.

She knows that Chen Mo is developing a large holographic projector during this time, and Chen Mo has promised her to hold a wedding after the successful development.

Thinking of the wedding, Xiao Yu’s face did not consciously reveal a sweet smile.

Suddenly, Xiao Yu’s smile converges. She found that Chen Mo, who was lying quietly in bed, began to tremble and began to sweat on his forehead.

Have a nightmare?

Xiao Yu reached out and wiped the sweat from Chen Mo’s forehead.

After a while, Xiaoyu felt more and more wrong and his face was anxious. She found that Chen Mo’s body trembled more and more, his face was pale, and his sweat on his forehead continued to emerge.

"Chen Mo, Chen Mo, you wake up." Xiao Yu shouted softly, his voice a little anxious.

"Husband!"

"Husband! Don't scare me."

It feels that Chen Mo is getting worse and worse, and Xiao Yu is also anxious.

It seems that I heard the call of Xiaoyu, and Chen Mo’s closed eyes suddenly opened.

hiss! Chen Mozhen took a breath of air.

Acute pain, unprecedented pain. At this point he felt like a skull was torn apart and all the information was stuffed in.

The pain caused Chen Mo to hold his head and began to breathe in a big mouth. The blue veins in the palms and necks burst, and his eyes were red.

Not long after, Chen Mo couldn't help it anymore, his throat whispered. Instantly accepting a huge amount of information, let Chen Mo feel his head like a balloon that is about to explode. This pain, touching the bone marrow, comes from the deepest pain in the spirit.

"Chen Mo." Seeing Chen Mo’s painful appearance, Xiao Yu’s tears burst out and Chen Mo was tightly held in his arms.

"Ambulance? Ambulance!" Xiao Yu whispered twice, and instantly woke up: "Ink girl, call an ambulance, ask people to come over, and let people come over."

Xiao Yu anxiously shouted, and gently patted Chen Mo's back, trying to help him reduce the pain, his mouth kept comforting.

Chen Mo felt that his face touched a soft, familiar body fragrance made him nervous, and the pain seemed to ease a little. I don't know how long it took, maybe only a few seconds, maybe longer, the pain slowly disappeared, and the vertigo felt like a flood. Before losing consciousness, Chen Mo still heard Xiao Yu's anxious shouts.

"Husband, you wake up."

Seeing that Chen Mo did not move, Xiao Yu completely messed up his hands and feet, and his voice was like a heartbreak.

"boss."

"boss."

When the small fisher was at a loss, several shouts appeared, and Wang Hai, Anan and White Pearl rushed in.

Just when they received an alarm from Chen Mo’s office, they immediately ran over and saw Chen Mo’s coma in the arms of Xiao Yu, and the three faces changed.

"Fast, send him to the hospital and send him to the hospital." Xiao Yu saw Wang Hai and white pearls as if they were holding a straw.

"Don't mess." Wang Hai quickly calmed down and hurriedly went over: "Pearl, check with the boss, Anan, let the Black Hawk get ready for the car."

Wang Hai said as he ran to the locker in the lounge and moved the emergency medical kit in the lounge. White Pearl did not dare to neglect, hurried to the bedside and began to check Chen Mo.

Xiao Yu gently put down Chen Mo and let the white pearls let go. Just holding the palm of Chen Mo’s hand and looking at Chen’s pale face, tears could not help but flow out.

"A little fever, there is nothing wrong with the other, you may have to go to the hospital and check with the instrument to check clearly." After a while, the white pearl said.

......

Binhai People's Hospital.

Zhao Min came out of the elevator and stepped up to the intensive care unit. His face was anxious.

She is working with some of the company's clients to talk about the cooperation, and received news that Chen Mo was ill, she immediately canceled the trip.

Now that Chen Mo is sick, there are not many people. She has ordered and blocked the news. After all, Chen Mo’s identity is special. If he knows that he has an accident, his influence on the marching ant company may not be good.

After processing these things, she rushed to the hospital.

Chen Mocai is the real pillar of the marching ant company. If Chen Mo falls, the situation of the marching ant company is a bit troublesome. Losing the main heart of Chen Mo, those who are waiting for the opportunity to move the wolf and tiger leopard will not give up the fat of the marching ants.

Still in the distance, Zhao Min saw Wang Hai and others guarding the door of the ward like a guard. The small fisherman stood in front of the transparent window, the tear marks on his face had not dried up, and his eyes fixed on the inside of the ward.

Several senior executives of the Binhai People's Hospital also waited outside the ward. The people in the ward are very small. If there is a problem in the hospital, their troubles can be big, so they must be present in person, and by the way, they have a good relationship with the army ants.

“How is the situation?” Zhao Min and several senior executives of the hospital greeted him and stopped next to Xiaoyu.

"The doctor is checking, there is no result." Xiaoyu shook his head slightly, his face was awkward.

“Why is it suddenly sick?” Zhao Min looked through the transparent glass and looked at Chen Mo, who was surrounded by the doctor.

"I don't know. When I went in, he was sleeping. Suddenly, this painful symptom appeared. Like last time, this time seems to be more serious." Xiao Yuguang did not leave Chen Mo, his face was a bit painful.

Upon hearing this, Zhao Min’s face changed slightly.

The last time Chen Mo was also having problems while sleeping, this time it was still the case, and it was even more serious, so she could not help but worry.

The air is a bit dignified, and everyone has a haze in their hearts. Chen Mo fell ill, this sudden news, disrupted her many plans.

"Everyone blames me."

"What does this have to do with you? Don't think about it."

While Zhao Min comforted Xiaoyu, the door of the ward opened and a doctor came out.

"How is Chen Mo?" Xiao Yu rushed over, and his heart was a little embarrassed, for fear of any unwillingness to hear the news.

"Oh, Ms. He, don't worry." The doctor looked at Xiaoyu and looked at the appearance of Xiaoyu. Naturally, he knew that Xiaoyu and Chenmo had different relationships. He is a little envious in his heart. If his daughter has such a good blessing, he will wake up when he dreams.

After a brief envy, the doctor opened his mouth.

"According to the careful examination of several experts in our hospital, Mr. Chen does not have much problem in his body. Everything is normal and there are no symptoms of the disease. It is just that the blood sugar is too low, maybe Mr. Chen thinks about working for a long time and the cause of excessive consumption.

The slight fever just now is now back to normal. As for the headache problem you said, we did not find that Mr. Chen’s head had an abnormal condition. It is not excluded that the nerves are overused, resulting in hypoxia of the nerves, resulting in nerve fatigue. Nerve fatigue is a symptom of nervous tingling. You may have to wait until he wakes up and ask Mr. Chen's situation to draw further conclusions. ”

"When can he wake up?" Xiao Yu heard the answer, relieved, and his face was still anxious.

"The result of the inspection is that Mr. Chen's body function is not a problem, even more healthy than the average person. It is reasonable to say that it should not be too long to wake up, maybe wake up tonight, maybe tomorrow. But after waking up, you should pay attention Do not over-think, severe neurological fatigue, may lead to paralysis."

"Doctor, he won't..." Xiao Yu was in a hurry.

"Miss He, you can rest assured that Mr. Chen Mo does not have this situation." The doctor naturally understood the meaning of Xiao Yu and immediately interrupted her.

"That's good." Xiao Yu's face is rare to relax: "Can I go in and see him?"

"Yes." The doctor nodded. "Now Mr. Chen is recovering. He hasn't woken up yet. Don't be too noisy, so as not to disturb the patient."

"Do not worry!" Zhao Min patted Xiao Yu's shoulder and turned to the doctor: "Trouble you to help keep confidential, don't disclose our boss to the outside world."

"This matter, we will arrange it. All the doctors and nurses who give Mr. Chen a doctor, we will issue the password, and will not disclose this to the outside world." A hospital executive immediately agreed.

"Thank you guys." Zhao Min nodded and expressed his gratitude.

"you are welcome."

It is an honour for the executive to be overjoyed and get the friendship of the marching ant company.

After all the doctors and nurses came out, Xiaoyu carefully walked into the ward and sat down at the bedside. Seeing Chen Mo's pale face, tears fight again in his eyes.

chapters.title: Chapter 313: :Wake Up
chapters.body:
Chapter 313: :Wake Up

Chen Mo seems to be in the darkness of endlessness. I don’t know how long it took to see a glimmer of light. Then slowly zoom in and turn into a white light.

Seeing the white ceiling, the nose is a touch of syrup.

Chen Mo smiled, no need to know where he is.

The horrible message invaded his mind and made him feel like his head was exploding. After the pain, he was fainted.

Before the coma, he also heard the cry and shout of Xiao Yu.

Regaining his attention, Chen Mo feels warmth in his hand. Turning his head slightly, Chen Mo saw that he was lying beside the bed. Holding a small fish that his hand fell asleep.

This scene reminds him of the scene when he first woke up in the hospital.

At that time, Xiao Yu was taking care of him. It was also because of this that he was determined that the girl was the one he wanted.

Still a familiar scene.

Chen Mo wanted to take Xiao Yu to rest on the bed, and was afraid of awakening her, some tangled. At this moment, White Pearl pushed the door in, holding a lunch box in his hand, and saw Chen Mo woke up with a look of surprise.

"boss."

Under the instructions of Chen Mo, the white pearl glanced at the small fishing rod on the side of the bed, putting light footsteps and the sound was as low as possible.

"How long have I been in a coma?"

"About 19 hours, yesterday at noon to the present. Miss Xiaoyu has been guarding, and did not sleep last night, we advised not to listen. Just now she asked me to buy some porridge back, saying that it is for you to wake up and eat."

White pearls gently put the lunch box in the hand on the table next to the bed.

This fool is really love and pity. Chen Mo looked at the small fisherman lying on the hospital bed, and his eyes flashed with pity.

Seeing Chen Mo’s appearance, White Pearl left the ward with interest.

Chen Mo gently released Xiao Yu’s hand and just wanted to get out of bed and take Xiao Yu to the bed to rest. She woke up from her sleep. Faces are licking, and there is no tiredness to dissipate.

Originally, there was no focal length, and a glimmer of light appeared.

Xiao Yu is still weeping, and tears are still on the eyelashes, making people feel distressed.

Chen Mo wiped the tears of Xiao Yu and gently squatted in his arms.

After a minute, Xiao Yu began to weep, holding Chen Mo’s waist tightly, his face on his chest, for fear of losing again.

"Ok."

Xiao Yu feels the love of Chen Mo, nodding his head, and is sad and happy.

Xiaoyu suddenly remembered something, immediately released Chen Mo, grabbed the lunch box that Baizhu had just sent in, and began to prepare breakfast for Chen Mo.

Seeing the eagerness of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo is not good to stop.

After a while, Xiaoyu walked to Chen Mo with a bowl of steaming porridge: "When you eat porridge, the doctor said that you will wake up today, I will let the pearls prepare, and still hot."

Xiao Yu took a spoon and blew a little porridge and put it in front of Chen Mo.

Xiao Yu did not let Chen Mo take over and sent the porridge to his mouth.

Seeing the red and swollen eyes of Chen Yu, Chen Mo’s heart was soft in an instant, and he could only accept the porridge that was sent to his mouth.

In the ward, he was in a quiet state. Chen Mo quietly looked at Xiao Yu and enjoyed the food that was delivered to his mouth. There was only a warm scene in the ward, and there was no sound at all.

Ten minutes later, this sweet and greasy breakfast was finished.

Looking at the small fisherman who wiped his mouth with a paper towel, Chen Mo smiled slightly, and pulled the waist of the small fisherman into his arms. He did not wait for the small fish reaction and kissed him.

Understand the meaning of Zhao Min, Xiao Yu shy and wish to find a place to sew down.

Chen Mo shook his head and smiled. Zhao Min’s ridicule was also helpless. Xiao Yu’s face was thin and there was no way to entangle this topic: “How come?”

"Wang Hai informed me that when you wake up, I will come over, it seems that it is not the time to come." Zhao Min smiled.

"Zhao Jie." Xiao Yu said with a blushing face.

"Well, don't say you." Zhao Min was able to stop, did not continue to ridicule, and said: "Why is it suddenly coma? And what is your headache? This is not the first time."

This topic came out, Xiao Yu also refused to be ashamed, looking at Chen Mo with a worried face.

"Nothing, a little thing, is my body not good?" Chen Mo said.

He could not tell Zhao Min that he was because of the technology of the science and technology library, and the amount of information received in an instant was too large.

"It's still a small thing? It's a fever, and it's a coma. You look like that, almost scared us to death." Zhao Min doesn't think it's a trivial matter.
