This metaphor makes Zhao Min turn his eyes and does not believe at all: "You were in a standby state lying on the bed!"

"The software in the background is running." Chen Mo pointed to his head.

"You... I am too lazy to say you." Zhao Min is a bit speechless: "If you don't want to say the reason, you still have to confirm, is it a serious illness that is holding us?"

"It's an accident. It may be too urgent to study, causing nerve fatigue, nothing big." Chen Mo said.

"Well, since you said so, I also believe in you." Zhao Min said.

She also believes Chen Mo, Chen Mo's research and development speed is indeed too fast, she does not know what Chen Mo's head is made of. Such a horrific research speed naturally requires strong mental support, and excessive consumption is completely normal.

"But I hope that you can take a good rest for a while, your research and development speed is fast enough, there is no need to worry so much."

"My body is really fine." Chen Mo said: "There is no need to rest, there is a lot of technology to study."

"Chen Mo, take a break for a while." Xiao Yuhong looked at Chen Mo, and if Chen Mo dared to refuse, the tears would definitely fall off in an instant.

Seeing Xiao Yu’s pleading eyes, Chen Mo surrendered instantly: “Well, listen to you, rest, I will give myself a holiday for a while, and spend a good time with my family.”

Zhao Min on the side was speechless.

"You show love, can you think a little about the old man next to the empty slot."

chapters.title: Chapter 314: : Controllable Light Nuclear Fusion
chapters.body:
Chapter 314: : Controllable Light Nuclear Fusion

Determining that Chen Mo is fine, Zhao Min simply said that some companies have left the hospital. Xiao Yu went to wash the fruit, and there was only Chen Mo alone in the ward.

After quietly, Chen Mo began to think about the technology obtained from the technology library.

Just thinking back, the huge amount of information came to his mind, as if imprinted in my mind, all the technology is clear.

Controllable light nuclear fusion technology.

This is the energy technology he got in the library.

The huge amount of information in nuclear fusion technology has caused Chen Mo to suffer, but this time the harvest is not small. Once this technology is completed, global energy issues will be directly resolved and the world situation will change dramatically.

The theoretical principle of nuclear fusion technology flashes in Chen Mo's mind and slowly forms a rough model of controllable light nuclear fusion.

The task of this time is to design a controllable light nuclear fusion reactor. Like holographic technology, the technical theory is complete and the model needs to be designed by itself.

But considering the sensitivity of nuclear fusion technology, Chen Mo numbs the scalp.

Nuclear energy is the most sensitive technology. This technology is more sensitive than any military weapon. If it is not handled well, it is a catastrophe.

This kind of technology, he himself must not be able to study indiscriminately, otherwise the problem will be serious, and the only way is to cooperate with the official.

While Chen Mosi was thinking, Xiaoyu entered the ward with a plate of cut fruit.

“Is there something I want to study?” Xiao Yu saw Chen Mosi’s appearance and his face was worried.

"Thinking about some information."

Chen Mo can't bear to lie to Xiao Yu, telling the truth, but what kind of information he wants, it is impossible for Xiao Yu to know. After all, this thing is very sensitive, I don't know, but it is a kind of protection for her.

"Chen Mo, you promised me, rest for a while, don't study the projector." Xiao Yu clenched Chen Mo's hand tightly, with a pleading in his eyes.

"I promised you, the wedding will be held after the study, don't you have a wedding?" Chen Mo squeezed her face and said funnyly.

"I don't want a wedding, as long as you are good."

When I heard this sentence, Chen Mo was filled with emotion. He knows that wedding is the most sacred and meaningful ritual of a woman's life. Xiao Yu did not think about it and said this sentence, showing how much determination.

"Well, I don't study the projector. Even if I study it, I have to study it with my little fisherman. I have a good rest during this time, can I?"

"Yeah." Xiao Yu once again got Chen Mo's affirmative answer, only to smile, picked up an apple and handed it to Chen Mo: "Eat apple."

"Let's kiss, I will eat." Chen Mozhen passed the waist of Xiao Yu, and pulled her into her arms, smirked.

"Where is you like this, childish."

Xiaoyu leaned in Chen Mohuai's arms and looked shy. He glanced at the door of the ward and determined that no one would come in. He raised his head and kissed him. It took half a minute to loosen.

"You can eat it."

"Well, let me see, it is the sweet kiss of my little fish, or the sweetness of apples."

"Bad egg, you know to bully me."

Oh...

When the two were tired of you and yelling at me, the ward door opened again, and the rapid footsteps poured into the ward.

"Little silence..."

When the anxious voice just remembered, it stopped abruptly.

Xiao Yu saw Chen Mu, Zhen Zhen, Xin Xin three people standing at the door of the ward, looked at them with a strange look, only to realize that they are still in the arms of Chen Mo.

The next moment, Xiaoyu's face smashed into the ear, and hurriedly broke free from Chen Mohuai.

"Mom, Jane, how come you are here."

"I heard that Xiaomo is sick, come over and see, don't bother you." Zhen Zhen looked at Xiao Yu with a weird smile.

"No...no." Xiao Yu hurriedly waved his hand: "Mom, Jane, you sit, sit and say."

Xiao Yu feels hot cheeks and was hit twice today in this intimate scene. She was seen by Zhao Min, she was just shy, and it was all right to be ridiculed twice, but she was so intimate by the elders that she was ashamed to sneak out.

Even if Chen Mo is thick, it is a bit embarrassing.

"Mom, why don't you knock on the door?"

"How? Is it strange that Mom doesn't knock on the door? I don't know if I am informed of the family. If there is a lot of Xinxin, we still don't know." Chen was blamed for her mother tongue, but her eyes were looked at Chen Mo, and she did not find any of Chen Mo’s. Severe symptoms, only secretly relieved.

"Mom, I am so big, I have a cold, I have a fever, I have to inform my family. Isn't this a worry for you and Dad? I have a little fish around me. I am not all right now?"

"I still have a cold? I just asked the doctor. He said that it may be that you have been working for too long, and your nerves are fatigued and comatose." Chen mother snorted.

"Mom, it's my fault..." Xiao Yu said in a hurry.

"Small fish, don't explain it to him. Mom knows that you care about him. Although Mom hasn't read many books, but some things still understand. I study this research in the laboratory every day, and I don't see a small grandson with Xiao Yu. hold."

puff……

Hearing the last sentence, Chen Mo was almost caught by the saliva. Sitting in the small fish next to Chen Mo, almost buried his head in the chest. Even Zhen Zhen and Zhang Xinxin’s mother and daughter couldn’t help but laugh.

"Cough, Mom... That, Dad, he is all right?" Chen Mo was a bit embarrassed, and he was a hard-moving topic.

"Your dad and your coward, and the little fish dad, have opened a seafood supermarket. Xiaoyu Dad and your coward, some of the experience and contacts accumulated in the past, have some help, leisurely on the right track, your father is also Help, I won’t be too bored at home, my body is very good. I don’t have much to do, I’m sick, and if I have a grandson, I’ll be fine.”

"Mom, I am preparing for pregnancy, you can hold your grandson next year." Xiaoyu heard the hope of Chen’s mother tongue and said.

"Oh... well."

When Chen Mu heard the little fish, she immediately showed a pleasant smile, as if she was young, but the wrinkles in her eyes could not be eliminated.

"Small fish, you usually do not have to work too tired, raise your body, prepare for pregnancy, buy what you want, if Chen Mo bullies you, you tell Mom, Mom helps you clean up."

"Mom, Chen Mo, he is very fond of me, will not bully me, we are still preparing to leave the hospital, take a break, go home with you and Dad."

Chen Mo tightened the palm of Xiao Yu’s palm. He communicated with his parents less. Xiao Yu replaced him to do this, which made him very moved. For the sake of him, the small fishing area can get a small fishing, which is estimated to be his luckiest thing.

"Mom, this time, I am going to take a break. Just one thing, you go back to discuss with Dad, and Xiaoyu parents, go back and choose a good day, I am going to hold a wedding with Xiaoyu."

When Chen Mogang finished speaking, he felt the soft, boneless hand in his hand tremble.

Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo with surprise. If it wasn't for the elders, she couldn't wait to immediately rush into Chen Mi's arms.

"Good!"

Chen Mu’s voice is full of joy, although the two have already obtained the certificate, but in the eyes of their older generation, only the wedding is considered a marriage.

The son is married, which is a big event for her.

I was still worried that Chen Mo’s illness had come over. Now Chen’s worries are completely smashed by good news.

"I will tell your dad about this happy event first, and then discuss with Xiaoyu's parents." Chen mother hurriedly took the mobile phone and left the ward.

Zhen Zhen and Zhang Xinxin also followed and left the space to Xiao Yu and Chen Mo.

"Is this true?" Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo, with a deep expectation in his eyes.

"When did I fool you? I said that letting you be the happiest bride can definitely do it." Chen Mo scraped the nose of Xiao Yu.

Upon hearing this news, Xiao Yu’s eyes were instantly red, and the tears went straight down.

"Don't cry. Isn't this good news? How did you cry?"

"I don't worry about holding a wedding. You don't have to be so tired. It's because of this, you are tired." Xiao Yu remembered the painful appearance of Chen Mo yesterday, and felt guilty in his heart.

"Your husband is so tired, should you reward rewards, how can you cry and cry? Come and kiss one."

"Bad man."

Xiaoyu looked up and looked at Chen Mo with tears. He kissed him desperately, and wanted to break himself into Chen Mo’s body, and no one would come in the ward.

chapters.title: Chapter 315: : Discharged
chapters.body:
Chapter 315: : Discharged

About twenty minutes later, Chen Mu was full of smiles coming in from outside the ward and walking a lot.

"That's good." The happy color of Wang Lan's face can't be concealed: "I just talked with my parents about it. I still want to hear your thoughts. When will it be held? We all have to discuss the customs of the two and do something. Arrange, and have friends and family ready to entertain."

However, it will be better to pick up friends and family. Everyone has the habit of choosing a good day, so that people can pick out a few good days, and I will choose another one as a wedding day. ”

Chen Mo simply thought about it and gave a reply.

"Good."

Chen Mu nodded frequently, this is a big event, how can we say it can not be sloppy. The small fisherman of the holographic projection also agrees.

"As for the layout of the venue, I will be looking for a professional wedding company."

After simply discussing the wedding, Chen Mu is full of red light. Now she doesn't care about Chen Mo's problem in the hospital. It is a little ill, not enough to cover up the joy of the big happy event.

Zhen Zhen, Xin Xin and Chen Mo chatted together, they were some trivial things. After about an hour, Chen Mu took the two to leave the ward.

According to the doctor's statement, just a little bit of burning, overworked, rest well, they are concerned about chaos, the child is now growing up, do not worry about everything, so did not bother, leave time to Chen Mo rest

"Small fish, I originally wanted to live here for a few days, look after Xiaomo. But the doctor said, after Xiaomo wakes up, he only needs to pay attention to rest, nutrition is all right, there is you, and I don't need me here.

Now there is such a big happy event, I am going to go home tonight, and discuss with your parents about the specifics of the wedding. Xiao Mo will hand it over to you. He is also tired during this time. You look at him and let him rest well. Mom will not bother your two worlds. ”

"Mom, you can rest assured that I will take care of him," Xiao Yu heard the last sentence, still a little embarrassed, after all, the intimate actions of the two were seen.

"Look at him later, don't let him be so crazy, study every day, it is easy to be tired." Chen said seriously.

"Ok."

"And, you have a rest, listen to Shin Shin, you didn't have a good night's sleep until noon yesterday, and you don't eat much. You look at your face, you are all stunned, you have to rest well, otherwise small No one is taking care of it, and you are also preparing for pregnancy, don't get tired of your body."

"Well, yes." Hearing Chen’s concern, Xiao Yu’s heart was a little moved.

After sending Chen Mu and Zhen Zhen and others, Xiao Yu returned to the ward again and saw Chen Mo, who was holographic projection on the bed. Seeing the rounded small parts of the holographic projection, Liu Mei is slightly stunned.

"What are you designing? You promised me to rest, not work." Xiaoyu just wanted to take Chen Mo's mobile phone, and Chen Mo grabbed his hand and pulled it into his arms.

"I am not at work, I am designing a wedding ring." Chen Mo pointed to something on the holographic projector.

"Wedding ring?" Xiao Yu carefully looked at the round small parts, as if it was indeed the appearance of the ring, but also happy and worried: "You just woke up, brainstorming things, can not do."

"Stupid, this is not a brain-thinking thing for me. I can design things that are so complicated with holographic mobile phones. This wedding ring can only be regarded as an appetizer, without too much brains." Knocked at Xiao Yu’s head and smiled.

"That won't work, wait until you completely recover."

"Okay, come back and say." Chen Mo reluctantly put the phone on his mobile phone: "Mom and Jane are gone, now I have nothing to do, let's take a break."

Xiao Yu is sleeping in the morning for less than an hour, and he is busy for a long time. Now he is a little tired in the look, but the people are holding hard.

"Good." Xiaoyu nodded, just wanted to stand up, and then Chen Murray returned to his arms.

"You don't have to go to the rest bed next to you, just go here, this bed is big enough."

"Ok."

Xiao Yu did not refuse, and nodded well, lying down on the bed next to Chen Mo, holding Chen Mo's arm, not long after, it sounded a slight nasal noise.

It is really tired.

After a day of sleeplessness, I experienced fright and surprise, sadness and excitement, and my mood was ups and downs. Now Chen Mo is in the body, my mind is relaxed, and I suddenly slept.

Looking quietly at the small fisherman who was sleeping with a slight smile, Chen Mo caressed her forehead and smiled unconsciously. When Xiaoyu was asleep, Chen Mo also picked up his mobile phone and continued the wedding ring of ‘DiY’.

In the next two days, Chen Mo was killed by the small fisherman, and the power of the housekeeper was fully exerted. It’s okay to play games on the computer, but it just doesn’t work. Chen Mo wanted to find an opportunity to sort out the information about the controllable light nuclear fusion, but it has not been found. After that, he can only cultivate with peace of mind, occasionally play a small fishing, or design a wedding ring.

In these two days, Chen Mo has done several different checks. This is what Xiao Yu asked. If many people know, Chen Mo thought that he was being studied as a mouse. It was determined that the body was ok, and Xiaoyu promised him to leave the hospital.

"All right."

Xiaoyu stood in front of Chen Mo, and slightly arranged the T-shirt of Chen Mo. After confirming that there was no problem, he took a step back and carefully looked at Chen Mo. He seemed to appreciate his work. After all, Chen Mo’s clothes were all responsible for the design. Customized.

"Is it very handsome?" Chen Mo said narcissisticly.

"Less and smug." Xiao Yu's eyes bent into a crescent, and the smile on his face could not be covered.

"Go."

After finishing the arrangement, Chen Mola took the hand of Xiao Yu and left the ward.

I have been in the hospital for three days. On the second day, Chen Mo was ready to leave the hospital. However, Xiao Yu asked him to check one more day. Chen Mozhen did not, so he stayed until now.

After continuing to stay, Chen Mo felt that his bones were rusting.

Leaving the hospital, Chen Mo stretched out and tried to breathe in the air. The air outside, there is no smell in the hospital, it smells refreshing.

"Go, take you to a place."

"Where are you going? Don't you go home?"

“Jewelry shop, custom wedding ring.”

Chapter 316: : How Is The Feel?

Chen Mo came down from the car, put on a pair of black-rimmed glasses, and arranged the dress a little, then took the small fishing hand and walked toward the shopping plaza. The dressing of the two is just an ordinary couple's costume, not eye-catching.

Today is on the weekend, there are many people in the shopping plaza, all kinds of women, all kinds of women dressed up in stalks, abound.

This is the most prosperous shopping plaza in Marina City - Marina Square. There is a huge shopping mall on the ground floor, and the ground is surrounded by shopping malls. Some luxury brands are easy to find here.

Because of the marching ant company, Binhai has been a very strong domestic player in the past two years, and its development is much faster than before.

It can be said that the marching ant company has let Binhai City get rid of its unsettled status and has now become the fastest growing city in China.

Looking back at the shopping plaza, in the lively shopping street, there are also many things that Chen Mo is familiar with, which is the holographic projector of the marching ant company.

In some high-end clothing stores, outside the luxury store, there is a holographic projector of the marching ant company, which is playing holographic advertising. The holographic beauty is very real, just the existence of light, in order to make people distinguish this is a holographic projection. Many people, after advertising, can't help but look back and see more.

This novel holographic advertisement has risen since the projector appeared, and it is now very popular. When the holographic projection advertisement just came out, some stores put holographic advertisements on the door of the store, which attracted enough onlookers every time.

Only a few months later, with the participation of various high-end brands, there are more and more holographic advertisements for holographic projectors in shopping malls. After the sensation of the beginning, people are now getting used to holographic projections in their own lives.

"It seems that the sales of holographic projectors should be good."

Chen Mo was very satisfied with the holographic beauty advertisement that introduced the door of each brand, and seemed to be very satisfied with his masterpiece. After all, it is his holographic projector that is mass-produced. The present life is indeed getting closer and closer to the future.

"Now the output of holographic projectors has been able to basically meet the needs of the domestic market." Xiao Yu said that the holographic projector in the shopping plaza said.

She is following Zhao Min, and she can easily know these simple data.

"But the move into the international market is not very smooth." Xiao Yu said: "The resistance in the international market is quite large and comes from various resistances."

"Don't talk about work, go shopping." Chen Mo patted Xiao Yu's head and said.

"Ok."

The little fisherman nodded, holding Chen Mo's arm, stopped working, and set his sights on the shopping plaza.

There are a lot of people in the shopping plaza, and the holographic projectors are already eccentric, but there are always a few wonderful things. When the holographic advertisement is next to the beauty, it will reach out to the chest of the holographic projection beauty. The ‘touch’ past, a look of wretched smile, regardless of the contemptuous look.

Uh? ?

Is there such an operation?

Chen Mo’s mouth was pumping and he didn’t know what to say.

After a beautiful advertisement in a high-end clothing store, Chen Mo thought about it, and reached out with a bad taste, and “touched” toward the holographic beauty model.

hiss!

The palm just passed through the holographic projector, and Chen Mo felt the pain coming from the waist, and couldn't help but **** a cold breath.

Xiao Yu looked at the opposite side of the couple who came across them and looked at them with strange eyes. The red face whispered in Chen Mo’s ear, and the right hand fingers did not know when the soft meat of Chen Mo’s waist had been licked.

"I am not curious? I have researched things, I did not expect this kind of operation." Chen Mo hurriedly explained.

"How is that feeling?"

Xiao Yu looked up at Chen Mo, and his fingers reached Chen Mo’s waist again.

"Hey! It's all air, I don't feel anything." Chen Mo didn't dare to talk about it, or he would suffer from sin at the waist.

"The desire for survival is quite strong."

Xiao Yu loosened the soft flesh of Chen Mo's waist and held Chen Mo's arm in both hands.

“Go to Jewelry Street first, customize the ring.”

Not long after, the two went to the Jewelry Street in the shopping plaza.

Jewelry Street brings together several world-renowned jewellery brands, ten well-known domestic jewellery brands, plus a variety of jewelry stores of all sizes, which are connected to a street in the shopping plaza.

This kind of discovery may not be able to fire. After all, the cottage version of 'Old Horse', or a celebrity version of a celebrity or a star can fire, come out with a person similar to Chen Mo, this is a giant of the era, there is no reason not to be concerned. .

Chapter 317: : Big News (First More)

Zibo Ming is browsing Weibo in front of the computer. As a professional paparazzi, in addition to shooting stars, he usually pays attention to the star's Weibo, so as to grasp the dynamics of those stars at the first moment, and write the article materials of Bo eyeballs.

Today shifts, he is responsible for watching the stars of Weibo, others go out to defend the stars.

When updating the news again, Zibo Mingyi, because he saw a Weibo. His friend Sun Haofa.

A person who looks like Chen Mo?

The text of this Weibo immediately attracted Zibo Ming to click on the picture.

Some people really look like Chen Mo, it is estimated that they can be fired. It is no problem to search on the hot. In a curious mind, Zibo clearly opened Sun Hao's Weibo photo.

After seeing the photo, Zibo Ming lived, it was not like Chen Mo, but Chen Mo.

Although Chen Mo does not belong to the category of entertainment, as long as it is a person who pays attention to the news, Chen Mo will not be unfamiliar. As a professional paparazzi, his confession is professional.

The stars are wrapped like scorpions, and they can all be recognized according to the way they walk, not to mention wearing glasses, not too disguised Chen Mo.

Looking at the past from this angle, the basic determination is Chen Mo.

But Chen Mo has a woman next to him. Zibo Ming immediately discovered the key point. Chen Mo took a woman to go shopping?

Big news!

It is understood that Chen Mo’s rumored girlfriends are not many, because Chen Mo rarely appears in public, and there are fewer women with female partners. Occasionally there are some 18-line stars who sing the heat of Chen Mo, but no one has ever been the same thing. There are rumors that Chen Mo's girlfriend is Xu Jiaxin's daughter Xu Xinxin, and there is Zhao Min, the president of the marching ant, and the insider of the army ants, an assistant from Zhao Min.

However, Chen Mo has always had a positive response to these things, so it has not been confirmed.

All parties know that Chen Mo’s news is not daring to be arbitrarily compiled, so they are all speculative and do not dare to make any big rumors. After all, Chen Mo is not the same as the average person. If you talk about it, make a big deal, you can't eat it, and Chen Mo never participates in entertainment activities. So there are very few things about Chen Mo's girlfriend.

Now Chen Mo is shopping with a woman, and the man that countless women dream of is already famous.

Hurry and get the heat!

I don’t want to think about it. Zibo Ming took out his mobile phone and rummaged through it, dialing Sun Hao’s phone.

"Sun Hao, you sent it on Weibo, Chen Mo's article, where was it taken?" Zibo Ming directly entered the theme.

“呃??” Sun Hao in Marina Square, heard the phone, was amazed, did not understand why Zibo Ming was so anxious: "Is that like Chen Mo?"

"Yes, where was it?"

"How are you so eager?" Sun Hao is not clear.

"This is big news, can I not be anxious? You don't know what I am doing." Zibo Ming said anxiously.

"It looks like Chen Mo, although it’s rare, don’t you worry so much?”

"What is it? That is Chen Mo."

"I rely on? Is it really Chen Mo?" Sun Hao asked in amazement.

"Crap, professional eye rating, that is Chen Mo." Yan Boming said: "Where do you want to see where you want to die? I want to grab hot traffic, or your microblog is forwarded, by those big The media number learned that I couldn’t get a hot spot."

"Is it really Chen Mo? I saw it on the jewelry street in Marina Square. It seems that I entered a jewelry store with a woman. The two are very close, that is, the woman on the photo."

"The Marina Square Jewelry Street? Proper, Chen Mo's girlfriend is out, this is big news. I borrowed your photo, I will invite you to dinner."

Zibo Ming hang up the phone, can't wait to save the photos on Sun Hao Weibo, and immediately convene the staff of the office: "Everyone, first-hand news, Chen Mo took a woman to visit the Jewelry Street in Marina Square."

"Hold the grass? Isn't it? I look at it"

Everyone was shouted by Zibo Ming, and he refused to work on his hands, and immediately surrounded Wei Boming’s computer.

"The photo is here."

Zibo Ming directly clicked on the photos kept from Sun Hao Weibo.

"Rely, looking at the professional dog eyes of my single twenty-five years, it is Chen Mo."

"Great, Ming Ge, are you not responsible for Weibo today? Where are the photos?"

"There are countless girls who are crying in the toilet, and my husband is robbed."

The onlookers all found that although the photos are a bit far away, there is absolutely no mistake in appearance. It is Chen Mo, and the body looks like. And Chen Mo is only wearing glasses, not much disguise, even no mask.

"Boming, will be in the photo studio group. Whether going out or taking time off, or people here, everyone, will be responsible for the website number, from the media number and public platform, all replaced by Chen Mo girlfriend, the fastest Speed, grab the heat."

"Remember not to write indiscriminately, Chen Mo did not respond, we can not really confirm, just guess, and this is a photo of passers-by, remember to write in a guessing tone, with pictures, or annoy Chen Mo, otherwise we are finished. Boming this time Well done, everyone started working."

The person in charge of the studio opened the door, and everyone in the work room returned to their seats, and they began to write articles.

In just three minutes, more than a dozen media numbers, all updated the same news topic.

#陈默的女孩#

In less than three minutes, there have been thousands of reposts, and it is growing in the snowball position. There have been big media and big V forwarding their microblogs. In less than ten minutes, Weibo officially sent the topic directly to the hot. Search the list.

And all this, Chen Mo did not know.

Chen Mo took Xiao Yugang into the jewelry store, and a female clerk greeted her with a professional smile. After seeing the appearance of Chen Mo, the female clerk stunned. This look is familiar, seems to have seen it?

"We want to customize the ring." Chen Mo reported with a smile on the eyes of the female clerk.

It seems that she found her impoliteness. The female clerk awakened and smiled aloud at Chen Mo and Xiao Yu. "Sorry, sir, it’s a bad mood. I feel that you are familiar, so I took a look."

"Oh, is it? Many people say this." Chen Mo touched his nose and smiled: "Don't say that I look like your boyfriend, or I will die."

Hearing this, the small fisherman next to him gave him a blank eye. This guy, occasionally likes naughty.

The female clerk glanced at Xiao Yu and smiled lightly: "Sir, you are so funny, what should I call you?"

"My surname is Chen."

"Mr. Chen, please come with me."

The female clerk led the two to sit down on the sofa and handed a ring catalogue to Chen Mo.

“This is the style of all our jewellery. Every style of the ring is limited and customized. The design style is fashionable, light and elegant, and it is the most suitable for the aesthetics of young people...” The female clerk tried to introduce the ring to the two. Design, just from time to time will take a look at Chen Mo's face, after all, this face is really familiar.

Chen Mo took the catalog and looked through it again. He handed the catalogue to Xiaoyu. The ring inside was really beautiful. It was very suitable for young people's tastes, and people liked it at a glance.

"Ms. What kind of style do you like?" The female clerk looked at Xiaoyu.

Xiao Yu directly looks at Chen Mo.

“We have our own designed ring, can we customize it with our design?” Chen Mo asked.

chapters.title: Chapter 318: : He Is Mr. Chen Mo (Second More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 318: : He Is Mr. Chen Mo (Second More)

“Do you design yourself?”

The female clerk looked at Chen Mo with surprise. She worked for so long, and for the first time I heard that someone had customized the ring I designed.

Is this gentleman a professional jewelry designer? Still want DiY's own style? The wedding ring is designed by itself, which is quite special, but it is ruined if it is not good.

In my heart, the female clerk did not say it, and her face still smiled. She looked up at Chen Mo: "Sir, we can provide custom-made psychics. You only need to provide a design drawing, we can customize it for you, but In terms of price, it may be higher."

"money is not a problem."

Chen Mo took the holographic mobile phone and put it on the table to open it. When he saw the holographic mobile phone, the female clerk's eyes lit up. The holographic mobile phone is now the most popular technology product. Although she still hasn't, she still saw the pig running.

However, the shape and color of Chen Mo's holographic mobile phone is somewhat different from that of holographic mobile phones on the market. However, the female clerk did not think much, waiting for Chen Mo to release the design.

Xiao Yu also looked at Chen Mo with hope. She knew that Chen Mo was designing a wedding ring when he was sitting in a hospital bed while sitting in a hospital. However, Chen Mo has never let her see it, saying that she will show it after she has finished. Therefore, she has been looking forward to what kind of wedding ring Chen Mo designed.

After a while, a holographic light column emerged, and a pair of rings appeared in the middle of the light column.

At the moment of seeing the ring, the female clerk opened her mouth, even if she had seen too many jewels, she couldn’t help but admire the pair of rings.

so beautiful!

Xiao Yu saw the moment of the ring, stayed for a moment, and then stared at the ring with two kinds of light. If she didn't know that it was a projection, she could not wait to wear it immediately.

Simple but chic, the ring has seven lines of fine hair like silk, intertwined with each other, such as rainbow intertwined, beautiful but not flamboyant, has a natural beauty, looks very comfortable.

She is also the first time to see this color pattern, it is natural, perfect just right, even if there is a slight change in the line, it will destroy its beauty.

This is the wedding ring designed by Chen Mo.

Thinking of this, Xiao Yuxin felt filled with happiness in an instant, watching Chen Mo’s eyes with infinite tenderness.

"Like it?"

"Ok."

The small fishing heavy focus, even the ordinary ring, as long as Chen Mo gave her, she likes it, not to mention the ring designed by Chen Mo, she can't wait to wear it now, the happiest woman in the world.

"Sir, is this your design? Too beautiful, your girlfriend is really happy." The female clerk said with amazement.

She knows that wedding rings are not like engagement rings. This is a token of mutual exchange when they are married. They are often worn on the body, so the design of the ring is more simple, so the wedding ring is generally not too gorgeous. The Chen Mo pair is not only simple, but also has a chic aesthetic.

Hearing the praise of the female clerk, Xiao Yu’s face showed a proud color. This is his man, always the most powerful.

"Sir, I can take the liberty to ask, what is the unique texture of the ring? It's so strange, but it's so beautiful, it's natural." The female clerk stared at Chen Mo's ring, and her eyes were beaming. If she could, she would have no choice but to own it. One.

"Fish scales." Chen Mo smiled.

"Fish scales? So strange fish scales, have such beautiful fish scales?"

"Yes! Mermaid."

Xiao Yu body gently trembled, heard this answer, my heart was happy and shy, Chen Mo's answer, how to listen is like a different kind of love. If it is not too many people, she can't wait to kiss him.

"Good special ring."

A woman's exclamation sounded in the jewelry store, this exclamation, attracting the attention of all customers, seeing the exclaimed woman, also followed her eyes to see where Chen Mo is.

When I saw the ring projected on the holographic mobile phone, many people screamed and hurriedly gathered up. All of a sudden, the ring projected on the holographic phone became the protagonist of the jewelry store.

"How much is this pair of rings in your store? I want a pair." A man asked about the female clerk who was calling him.

When the men’s words are opened, others will also agree, and they hope to have a pair.

If you can come here to buy jewelry, there is no shortage of money. Such a beautiful ring is given to your wife and girlfriend. He is not happy.

The female clerk who was inquired glimpsed it in her mind, still did not use the message of this ring, took the catalog and rummaged it again, and there was no record.

Is it privately customized?

"Poetry, when did this ring come out, it seems that there is no record of this ring in the store?" Other clerk directly asked the female clerk who greeted Chen Mo.

"This ring is not in the store, it is designed by Mr. Chen himself, and it must be customized." Liang Shihui said.

This design has already surpassed any design in their jewelry store. It belongs to the top design and is put into the jewelry design competition. It is definitely a winning work.

It’s just this young gentleman who still makes her feel familiar. She has to wonder if Chen Mo is a jewellery design genius she has ever seen.

The manager of the jewelry store has also come over. It is a young woman. She looks like she is in her thirties. She just made up her makeup and didn’t know the specific age. When the female manager saw the ring, she was amazed in her eyes: "Sir, are you a professional jewelry designer?"

“It’s a designer, but not a jewelry designer.”

He is really a designer, holographic mobile phone, holographic projector and many other company's products, all designed by him.

“Do you sell this ring design? We are willing to buy it at a high price.” The female manager looked at Chen Mo with hope.

"Sell?" Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu.

"Sorry, we don't sell." Xiaoyu said politely and with a firm attitude.

"Ms., are you the gentleman of this gentleman? You are so beautiful." The manager saw the fisherman and sighed with sincerity, and immediately said: "Our company is willing to pay 300,000 and buy your design."

As the manager of the jewelry store, she naturally knows that this ring contains huge business opportunities. If you can acquire the design drawings and hand them over to the head office, you will definitely be rewarded by the head office.

"Thank you for your compliment, but I am really sorry, we don't sell the design." Xiaoyu still shook his head.

"Fifty thousand." The female manager said with a silvery bite.

"Sell it, there are a lot of 500,000, you can buy a lot of rings." The people on the side are attached, they also want to buy this ring, the design is sold to the jewelry store, they can also customize.

"It's not a question of money, we don't have money. Can you customize this ring? If you can, we can customize it. If it doesn't work, I will go to other homes." Chen Mo put his hand on the holographic phone.

Seeing that the holographic projection of the ring disappeared, the onlookers were annoyed, and they forgot to take a photo of the ring. Take a photo and you can go and find a custom jewelry company.

Seeing the holographic mobile phone in the hands of Chen Mo, Liang Shihui flashed a shadow in his mind, his face was suspicious, and he could not take the other, hurriedly took out the mobile phone, she wanted to confirm a possibility.

"Sir, don't you sell it? 500,000 is not low. If you are not satisfied, you can do it higher. You can open a price."

The female manager seems to be determined by this design. A good jewel can bring a lot of benefits to a jewelry company. Their company, which is also a world-renowned company, will definitely be recognized by more consumers if it can produce such a good design for a press conference.

"It's not a question of money." Chen Mo shook his head: "In this case, I will go to other homes to customize."

"Sir, you and so on. We can customize it for you for free, and buy one million for your design." The female manager called Chen Mo.

This condition allows the people on the field to breathe in the air. A design of one million, this year, the money is so good to earn.

"It really is him."

An exclamation immediately attracted everyone's attention.

Looking for the sound, I saw Liang Shihui holding a mobile phone and watching Chen Mo excitedly. When she came in from Chen Mo, she felt very familiar, but she couldn’t remember who it was.

When Chen Mo picked up the holographic mobile phone, she flashed the army ant company in her mind, and suddenly she remembered that the face she had seen in the news seemed to be a bit like the gentleman in front of her eyes. Now use the phone to find Chen Mo, and let her determine a fact.

"Poetry, what's wrong?" The female manager browed slightly and seemed to be unhappy about her sudden interruption.

"He is Mr. Chen Mo."

chapters.title: Chapter 319: : Announced (Third More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 319: : Announced (Third More)

"Mr. Chen Mo?"

The female manager looked shocked.

Living in Binhai, this name is no stranger. You don't know who the mayor of Binhai is, but you can't help but know who Chen Mo is, or he is ignorant.

The founder of the marching ant company, known as the era giant, is synonymous with genius. In just three years, it has become the most advanced technology company in the world. It is known as the "Iron Man" of China, and the "Tesla" of China has a future head.

"It's really Mr. Chen Mo." The scream of a girl rang, she saw her holding a holographic mobile phone in her hand, and the holographic flat screen was a hot search message on Weibo: "Now Mr. Chen Mo's hot search on Weibo The top of the topic list, as well as his girlfriend, the news pushed, and the topic of Mr. Chen Mo."

Some people subconsciously took out their mobile phones, and they saw the hot search about Chen Mo. The picture above is the current dress. The news said that it was seen in Marina Square. This is the Marina Square. It has already been recognized and sent his photos to the Internet.

Take a look at Chen Mo’s previous photos. Except for glasses, the rest of the face is exactly the same. It’s just the temperament of a real person, much better than a photo.

"Mr. Chen Mo is so young and handsome, and wearing glasses is so temperament. I have to take a photo and send it to a circle of friends. My husband has been taken away."

"Chen Mo has a girlfriend, but also designed the ring so carefully, I have to get married, the girl is so happy, I am in love."

......

A few women on the field saw the small fishing around Chen Mo, with envious light in his eyes. I don't know if this woman saved the earth in her lifetime and was so lucky. If the woman next to Chen Mo is himself, she must be happy to die.

The person next to me heard a few women's self-talking words, couldn't help but roll their eyes, and her husband was so happy to be robbed, and it was the first time I saw it. However, looking at the small fish around Chen Mo, my heart is also a little envious.

The small fish is not short, and the potential medicine is used to transform the body. The height is raised a little and the standard goddess level is reached. In addition to the potential of the body to shape the body, the proportion is more perfect, temperament does not belong to any woman.

The two stood together, and it was indeed a golden boy and a girl.

And Chen Mo hand in hand, like a normal couple out shopping, and Chen Mo also personally designed a wedding ring for her, enough to show how lucky this girl.

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu suddenly became the protagonists on the field.

Searched on the hot?

Chen Mo took a look at the mobile phone that Xiaoyu had handed over. He was a little surprised. He wanted to calm down and accompany Xiaoyu to go shopping. The result was recognized as a sneak shot, and it was hot search so soon.

"Mr. Chen Mo, can I take a photo with you?" A daring girl took her mobile phone and rushed towards Chen Mo.

Wang Hai and Bai Zhu and others also came out of the crowd and stopped her from coming forward.

Chen Mo’s identity has not been discovered. They can be transparent people. Now they are recognized, and they can’t be close to others.

"Nothing."

Chen Mo patted Wang Hai’s shoulder and motioned that he did not need to block.

Being allowed to take a photo, the girl's face was so excited that she ran to Chen Mo. For Chen Mo, they are more likely to see how legendary in the news, so close contact, for the first time.

"Wang Hai, you can help shoot it."

Chen Mo took the girl's mobile phone and handed it to Wang Hai. The small fish around him also consciously retreated to the side. This is not the first time. In the company, occasionally a company employee who sees Chen Mo will look for Chen Mo, she is already strange.

"Mr. Chen Mo, you are my idol, can my girlfriend and I take a picture with you?" The girl just finished shooting, a couple also came out and looked forward to Chen Mo.

"Yes." Chen Mo smiled and nodded.

......

Fortunately, there are not many customers in the jewelry store. Together with the employees of the jewelry store, each person has a photo, and soon finished, Chen Mo also secretly sighed. This is why he came out to go shopping for a little disguise. After being discovered, he can't go shopping quietly.

“Can the ring be customized? If you can't customize it, I will go to other stores.” Chen Mo looked at the female manager.

“Can you!” The female manager no longer has any hesitation. I just wanted to spend money to buy Chen Mo’s design. Now I know that I’m whimsical, and they can customize the wedding ring for Chen Mo. If you know it, it’s definitely a good one. ad.

Chen Mo looked at Liang Shihui next to him. After all, he greeted his clerk. He also knew that the employees of the jewelry store had commissions for every transaction.

"Shi Hui also comes in together, Mr. Chen Mo is your customer." The female manager is also smart enough to immediately understand Chen Mo's meaning.

When she heard the manager’s words, Liang Shihui’s heart was happy and glanced at Chen Mo’s eyes gratefully.

Chen Mo pulled up the hand of Xiao Yu, and simply greeted the onlookers and entered the VIP area with the female manager.

"Xi Hui, you measure the size of the ring for Mr. Chen Mo and his fiancee." After the female manager ordered Liang Shihui, he greeted Chen Mo and sat down: "Mr. Chen's custom ring is ready for marriage? Do you need other jewelry? We can Customized for you according to your requirements."

"Others are not used for the time being, I want it, you can't give it."

The female manager immediately became aware of the wealth and status of Chen Mo, and the jewelry at the wedding would never be ordinary jewelry. "Mr. Chen, what are your requirements for the ring?"

Chen Mo took out his mobile phone and clicked on the holographic projection of the ring: "The embryo of the ring is made of platinum. The color pattern on the top is filled with colored gold. If the size ratio is on the design, the jeweler will understand it. The requirement is strict. Create according to the design drawings."

"Okay, we have written down your request. We will ask the top jewelers to create this pair of rings for you. In terms of price, we will give you some discounts."

About half an hour, the requirements and dimensions of the ring, as well as some details, were negotiated, and Chen Mo and Xiao Yu left the VIP area.

"The boss, there are a lot of reporters outside." Just came out, the white pearls came over.

“Reporter?” Chen Mo was slightly surprised: “Is this long? Is it so fast?”

"You brought Miss Xiaoyu to the Marina Square and uploaded it on the Internet. This is the city center of Binhai. In addition to the major shopping malls, there are many big companies. There are many news studios nearby and some entertainment magazines. The reporters don’t know what channels they use, knowing that you are here, they are all running, waiting in the store."

"Mr. Chen Mo, do you need me to help?" The female manager also knew the reason for the matter and asked.

"For the time being, thank you."

Chen Mo shook his head and looked at the little fisherman next to him: "It seems that today's street is not going to go shopping, other jewelry for marriage, I will prepare for you. Today's task is to relax, since we can't go shopping, let's go eat."

Xiao Yu is still immersed in the full happiness at the moment, she can't wait, on the wedding day, Chen Mo personally put on the ring for her. When he heard Chen Mo’s words, Xiaoyu nodded and said, “Okay.”

Chen Mo pet touched Xiao Yu’s head and took her hand and walked outside.

"Mr. Chen Mo, what is your relationship with Miss Xiaoyu?"

"Mr. Chen Mo, are you and Miss Xiaoyu ready to get married?"

"Mr. Chen Mo..."

Chen Mogang and Xiao Yu came out from the VIP area, and several reporters rushed over, but they were blocked by the security guards of the jewelry store and Wang Hai and others.

In the face of this posture, Chen Mo subconsciously pulled Xiao Yu to the side and protected her with half of the body. Seeing the intimate behavior of the two men, the reporters on the field took the camera and pressed the shutter.

This is the first time Chen Mo was photographed holding a girl's hand. They have already recognized it in the previous news. This girl is Zhao Min's assistant He Xiaoyu and Chen Mo's rumored girlfriend.

In the face of the camera, Chen Mo was very helpless in his heart, but there was no way to suppress the hand, and the field immediately quieted down.

"I and Xiaoyu have already registered for the certificate, and will hold a wedding soon, so media friends don't have to guess our relationship. This time it is a custom wedding ring."

Chen Mo directly announced a heavy news.

There is nothing to dare to admit about him and Xiaoyu. It has not been exposed before, it is not necessary. Now that it has been paid attention to, it is not necessary to hide it. He is not a star who earns traffic by brain powder.

I heard Chen Mo openly the relationship between the two, Xiao Yu was a little nervous, and some moved, looking at Chen Mo's eyes, very gentle.

This is the first time Chen Mo has admitted the relationship between the two in front of the public. Although she does not care about this, she can feel that Chen Mo is very concerned about his own ideas, fearing that he is wronged by outside speculation.

"Mr. Chen Mo, when did you and Miss Xiaoyu start to fall in love, when will you get the certificate?"

"Mr. Chen Mo, is Miss Xiaoyu pregnant? Will she be anxious to get married?"

"Mr. Chen Mo, when is the date of the wedding?"

......

Various problems were thrown out, so that Chen Mo had to admire the eyes of these reporters.

"Thank you for your concern, we are married, it is a matter of course. It is not as complicated as the outside world. Xiaoyu and I fell in love at university. She accompanied me to start a business, accompanied by me. I also believe that I have been a lifetime, I hope. I am blessed by all of you, thank you.” Chen Mo simply said a few words, holding the hand of Xiao Yu to protect her, and left in the road where the security guards separated.
