Alexander was sitting in the office, and his attention was on the computer screen. It was the news that Chen Mo was getting married.

Seeing this news, Alexander had a smile on his face. He wanted to call Chen Mo and thought about whether to put down his mobile phone.

Recently, the Roche family has been in high spirits. After deep cooperation with the marching ant company, especially the holographic mobile phone, they became the first family to reach a strategic cooperation with the army ant company, and the income is huge.

Now customers' confidence in them is also multiplied, and the business in all areas of the family benefits one after another.

Moreover, there is also a starfish company, an aphrodisiac and a breast enhancement medicine that cooperates with Jianghe Pharmaceutical. When the two drugs enter the market, they quickly occupy the market in an aggressive manner, making them earn a full profit. They also borrowed this advantage and began to enter the pharmaceutical market.

Now the family has no more opposition to his cooperation with the army ant company. Instead, his vision is that he is likely to become the new generation of the Roche family.

The potential of the horror of the marching ant company is in front of us. As long as they cooperate and hand in hand, the future benefits will be quite a lot, and maybe they can use this to restore the family to glory.

"Sir, Mr. Chen Mo came to the video call." Suddenly, the reminder of the mobile smart assistant on the desk interrupted Alexander's thinking.

"Chen?"

Upon hearing the name, Alexander looked happy and hurriedly picked up the holographic phone.

Just turned on, the holographic mobile phone will pop up the half-length hologram of Chen Mo, only the size of the palm, the naked eye is very real, there is a kind of face-to-face communication.

"Chen, I haven't seen you for a long time." Alexander took the lead.

"Long time no see, Alexander."

The intelligent assistant in the holographic mobile phone has the function of instant translation, so the two people can communicate normally although the language is different.

"I just saw the news that you and Ms. Xiaoyu are getting married, congratulations. I wanted to call you and found that you are now at night, afraid to disturb you. You contact me this time, are you invited to the wedding? Alexander laughed.

"The wedding day has not yet been fixed, but soon, I will definitely inform you at that time. Calling you today is another thing, you need help." Chen Mo said.

"Oh? We are friends, don't have to see, as long as I can do it, I will definitely help you." Alexander smiled.

"I need to buy a set of jewellery and wear it for Xiao Yu at the wedding. The person I can think of is you." Chen Mo said.

The Roche family is one of the shareholders behind De Beers, the world's top jewellery giant. De Beers has historically monopolized South Africa's diamond mines. Although it is not as horrible as it used to be, in the jewellery world, De Beers' status is still very important. The network of contacts in this area is also very wide, and the Roche family has many contacts in the field of jewelry.

He wants to find some good jewels and find someone from the Roche family to help, which is undoubtedly the best choice.

"It turned out to be this. In this respect, I know some people. What jewelry do you need?"

"Necklaces, bracelets, earrings, rings. If there is no suitable, good quality loose diamonds, money is not a problem."

"Chen, you are looking for the right person." Alexander smiled. "I know that there are two collectors in the hands of the collection of what you want, and even the outside world does not know that they exist."

"What are they collecting?" Chen Mo came to an instant.

"Two red diamonds of 8.62 carats. It is said that when the mines are mined, the two stones are connected together and have a special shape. They are processed into olives. The two diamonds are the same shape, cut and weight, and are extremely rare blood red. Very precious, he is called "the eye of angels", is the perfect diamond for making earrings. I am his friend, and I was fortunate enough to see it once.

There is also a precious big diamond in the hands of another guy, a 38.85-carat blue diamond, flat-shaped teardrop shape, because it is pure sea blue, known as ‘the tears of mermaid.’ After getting these three diamonds, they never showed them to the outside world, so the outside world did not know that they had it in their hands, and only a few people knew it. De Beers wanted to acquire the three diamonds, but they were all rejected. ”

"Then you have a way to let them shoot?" Chen Mo asked.

“Before, it’s not very likely, because they don’t need money, but it’s fine recently. Their recent company’s business is not very good. Recently, some collectibles were auctioned to ease the company’s financial situation. I’m going to tell them the price. If they match their wishes, they should give me a face. But the price of three diamonds may not be low."

"As long as it is right, don't worry about money, but I can't go abroad for a while. If you need to, you can invite them to come to China for a detailed discussion, or I will assign a staff member to go."

"Chen, can you trust me?"

"Of course, we are also friends, why are you asking?" Chen Mo asked in surprise.

"Since we are friends, I naturally want to help out. If you trust, I can buy it for you and then give it to you at the price he gave."

"Yes." Chen Mo thought about nodding. In this case, Alexander would not lie to him. After all, the two still have long-term cooperation.

"Okay, I will contact them now. As for bracelets and rings, if you need diamonds, you can buy loose diamonds and find ones that are unique. I will help you pay attention to these gems."

"Okay thank you."

Telling the jewelry he needs and Alexander, Chen Mo will hang up. Back to the room, Xiaoyu has already showered and squatted in bed to play with the phone.

"Get it?" asked Xiao Yu.

"You have to wait for the news, but the problem should not be too big, you will wait for the surprise." Chen Mo scraped the small fisherman's nose and laughed.

"Since everything is done, just go to sleep, tired today."

"I have prepared surprises for you, is it necessary to give some practical rewards." Chen Mo leaned in front of Xiao Yu, looked at her with bad eyes.

"Bad egg, no reward." Seeing Chen Mo's fiery gaze, Xiao Yu immediately understood what he was thinking and shy.

"I am getting bad guys again? Come, I will give you a bad look."

"Well~~ No, you just left the hospital today, and you are tired for another day. After two days..."

chapters.title: Chapter 321: : Mansions At Xianglutan Beach (Fifth)
chapters.body:
Chapter 321: : Mansions At Xianglutan Beach (Fifth)

The next morning, when Chen Mo woke up, Xiao Yu was no longer around. After washing, go to the hall and smell the fragrance from the kitchen. Just want to go, Xiaoyu is carrying a casserole, coming out of the kitchen, carefully placed on the dinner table, as always.

"Just good, come have breakfast, I cooked bird's nest porridge."

Open the casserole cover, the aroma filled, so that Chen Mo's stomach could not help but screamed, the index finger moved: "My family is more and more fish chef style."

Xiao Yu was sitting next to Chen Mo and handed the porridge to Chen Mo. "Don't be a poor mouth, you have to eat a little more. The body is just right, but also not honest all day." Think of the two people wrapped around last night. Mian, Xiao Yu is angry and shy.

"I am mentally tired, not physical fatigue, and more exercise can help relieve stress!" Chen Mozhen said.

"Bad egg." Xiao Yu took a look at Chen Mo's waist and slowly ate it. Suddenly think of something, Xiaoyu stopped the spoon in his hand: "The beautiful color pattern on the wedding ring yesterday, is it really the fish scale of the mermaid?"

"I said yes, do you believe it or not?"

"letter."

"A silly girl, your husband has never seen a real mermaid, so easy to believe me."

"If you don't believe in you, you won't be deceived by you."

"But there is nothing to lie to you, it is indeed a mermaid." Chen Mo stared at Xiao Yu: "Design inspiration comes from you."

"Do I have this kind of color on my body?" It was compared to Chen Mo's mermaid, and Xiao Yu's heart was extremely sweet. Chen Mo occasionally naughty and talked about love, she liked it very much.

"The above lines are as thin as the hair, it's your hair. Every time I wash my head, I help you blow your hair. I use hair as a source of inspiration, give different colors, and let the ink women use the company. The superconducting computer to help calculate the tens of thousands of combinations before designing this seemingly simple and comfortable color pattern. Do you think that my husband is a genius? Quickly praise me."

"Where are you asking someone to praise you?" Xiao Yuzhan Yan Xiaoxiao "but it is really beautiful, I like it very much."

“Like it.” Chen Mozhen smiled: “After breakfast, go to the house in Xianglutan.”

"it is good."

After breakfast, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu went to the Xianglutan Villa.

The incense burner beach villa has been renovated six months ago. The 56-acre mansion, backed by the mountains, facing the sea, the air environment is good, and it is not too remote. It is a real feng shui treasure. It is estimated that there are not many people who have the horrible handwriting of Chen Mo. .

Chen Mo knows that he lives in a general villa area and is not always good. There must always be a house of your own, arrange security, or do other things, it is also convenient, after all, the identity is different.

But after the villa was built, they have not planned to move in.

Although the incense burner beach environment is good, but for Chen Mo and Xiao Yu, the villa is too big, too empty, and a sense of warmth.

In about twenty minutes, the team was close to the villa.

This is the first time Chen Mo saw the appearance of the mansion. Although the drawings of the house were designed by the ink girl according to Chen Mo, the physical building, Chen Mo was the first time he saw it.

Retro design with a sense of futuristic technology. It seems that two completely opposite styles are integrated into the design of the villa.

In the villa, security personnel who have already been screened by Wang Hai and others have settled in.

The entire villa area, under the intelligent management, has reached full intelligence, in addition to the necessary security personnel in the villa, there are many intelligent robots. And the entire villa area is under the 24-hour monitoring of the intelligent security system.

"not bad."

Chen Mo glanced at the main building of the villa, and then looked at the grass in the distance, the sea in front and the small beach. The environment is very good and very comfortable, typical seaside mansion.

“CSC is built entirely according to your design.” Xiao Yu said: “8 bedrooms, 6 kitchens, 18 bathrooms, a meeting hall, a library, a grass, a beach. Temperature control System and lighting system are all intelligently controlled..."

Chen Moi first handed over the new family to Xiaoyu, so Xiaoyu came here several times and understood the situation here. Although Chen Mo has not been here, the house is designed according to his meaning. Chen Mo knows the basic situation here.

"Welcome back, Mercedes, Xiao Yu sister."

When Chen Mo and Xiao Yuyi entered the gate, the holographic projection of the ink girl appeared next to them. Or the dress of the ancient style, a cute little cute girl, sometimes Chen Mo wants to pinch her face, but unfortunately there is no entity.

"Well, let's take a look." The smart housekeeper here is the ink girl, so Chen Mo is not too surprised by the appearance of the ink girl.

The luxurious decoration of the house, there is no luxury feeling, more is the introverted retro style, but also full of the taste of future technology, belonging to low-key luxury.

Intelligent butler, robot, holographic projection, the entire wall is the display, the landscape Chinese painting on the wall, are all displayed on the display. There are all kinds of famous works and photos in the mainframe. If you like other styles, you only need one order, and the decoration style of the whole room can be changed. Holographic projectors are built throughout the building to simulate any environment, anytime, anywhere.

When you enter the room, you can set your favorite decoration style in advance through your mobile phone. If necessary, in the house, you can also choose through a holographic projector anytime, anywhere. Or directly in a sentence, let the smart butler choose according to the owner's conditions.

Inside the building, there is a 1.5-meter-deep super-sized swimming pool that is connected to the outside balcony and has four shower rooms and two dressing rooms.

There are also a few cars in the underground garage. Although Chen Mo is not a car-loving person, as a means of transportation, these are always available, including RVs, sports cars, and commercial vehicles. Although not the most expensive luxury car, it is specially customized, with good security and intelligent driving system.

“Is furniture and decoration all you buy?” Chen Mo asked. He is responsible for the design, but the purchase of home and other decorations is not from his hands.

"Well, you were busy at the time, no time, I bought it as I like it, like it?"

"My wife likes it, I like it, and my wife has a good eye, very beautiful." Chen Mo smiled.

"Poor mouth." Xiao Yuxin is very sweet, the house is designed by Chen Mo, the furniture decoration, she bought it, think about it, here is also the nest of the two people working together.

"After the wedding, I moved in here."

"Well, here is our home in the future." Xiaoyu nodded gently.

"Home?" When he heard the word, Chen Mo smiled.

"The place with you is my home."

"Wife, I found that you have the gift of telling love, come, my husband kisses one." Hearing the words of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo's heart warmed and turned and said.

"In the chaos, the ink girl looked at it." Chen Mozhen couldn't get a kiss, Xiao Yu was shy and anxious.

"Don't ignore me, you continue to abuse the dog, or the kind of intelligence. You have to mate with a baby, I have a holographic video, comparable to live broadcast, do you want to watch?" Ink looks at the pure big eyes Said the two.

"I blame you, I was teased by the ink girl." Hearing this sentence, Xiao Yu's face was blushing, and Chen Mo was secretly stunned, and Chen Momo licked his mouth. Chen Mo is also speechless, and he is ridiculed by the ink girl.

"Go to the library and see." Chen Mo took the hand of Xiao Yu and walked toward the top floor.

The library is a separate building, located not far from the main building, with access to the tunnel, designed in accordance with the style of the science and technology library.

The hundreds of meters of bookshelves in the science and technology library can't be imitated, and there is no space to see the end. It can only imitate its design style, and the bookshelf is only ten meters high.

Entering the library door, you can see the large red wooden table in the middle, as well as a large red book placed on top.

The red-skinned book imitates the red book in the Science and Technology Library. It is a "book-type" holographic computer. Through this 'Red Book', it is possible to find all the books in the library, and let the book images appear in the book through holographic projection. In front of the person.

After the holographic image of the book is placed, the intelligent robotic arm mounted on the top of the bookshelf will take off the books and send them to the readers. This is an ultra-low-end technology library.

The collections here are books, there are no precious celebrity manuscripts, and there are no collections of famous paintings. They are just some famous books, such as famous philosophy, human history, and mathematics and chemistry.

The paintings on the walls are all displayed on the display screen. The arched dome of the library is an infinite starry sky with holographic projections. Humanities and technology have a good combination in this library.

This library, the most complicated design in the villa, is also the most careful place for Chen Mo design. There are more than one hundred design drawings, occupying one-third of the entire villa area design.

I walked through all corners of the mansion and learned about the environment. The two talents left.

The news that Chen Mo wants to get married is still fermenting. However, after Chen Mo responded to that time, he never showed up again and did not pay any attention to this news.

In the next few days, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu strolled around the tourist attractions of the surrounding cities, and after a small vacation, they rushed back to their hometown. Both of them are discussing the wedding, as the protagonist, they naturally cannot be absent.

chapters.title: Chapter 322: : Falcon
chapters.body:
Chapter 322: : Falcon

Flower City.

Looking at the familiar city, Chen Mo was a little emotional.

Since leaving home to study, the number of times to go home every year has become less and less, and the number of accompanying family members has become less and less.

It is also a time off for a while, just in preparation for the wedding, he will come back. There are no other brothers and sisters in the family, and my parents refused to go to Bin Binhai to live. Chen Mo is also very helpless.

"Mom, I am back."

Going to the door of the house, Chen Mo directly opened the door.

In addition to their parents, there are also treasures and publicity at home. At this time, they are talking and laughing. When Chen Mo came in, several people first stunned and then showed the color of surprise.

"Say Cao Cao Cao Cao will arrive." Zhang Yang laughed.

"Xiao Mo is back." Chen Mu saw Chen Mo and Xiao Yu go home, and immediately stood up from the seat and greeted him.

"Parents, this is for you." Xiao Yu handed the tonic to his mother.

"You, this child, there is no shortage of these at home, you can't finish it, don't buy so much in the future." Chen mother smiled and took the tonic in the small fisherman's hand. After all, it was the child's heart, the mouth was not happy, and my heart was still happy. of.

"Zhen Zhen, Uncle Zhang, you are all there." Xiao Yuchao and Zhang Yang asked for a good voice.

"Small fish, pay attention to the title, you and Xiaomo have already obtained the certificate. Although there is no wedding, it is also a door. Now it is Chen's wife. You have to follow Chen Mo, call me a coward, you can't call Zhang Shushu. Zhang Yang said.

Xiao Yu was so ridiculous as Zhang Yang, some shy, and once again said: "coward."

"That's right, come sit down, just talk about your business, you will be back." Zhang Yang smiled and said: "Alright, save you from calling."

"Xiao Mo and Xiao Yu just came back, definitely hungry, beautiful, you cook some rice, fry three or four dishes." Chen mother snorted.

"Okay, ma'am." Ami looked at Chen Mo and looked at Xiao Yu. She took the things in the hands of Chen and went into the kitchen.

"This is a babysitter hired? When did you come over?"

Chen Mo took a look at Ami's back, a young girl in her twenties, not ugly, skin like wheat, wearing a nanny's clothes, looking like a plain, very simple.

"She is the child introduced from her hometown, called Chen Meimei. She just finished college. The family is not very good. Her father was sick some time ago and needs a sum of money for surgery. I just went home and told the village head that there was a missing one. The nanny, let him introduce a diligent girl in the village, after all, the people in the village know the roots, there is no bad thoughts.

The village chief told me about her situation. When she saw that she was clever and simple, she was also filial at home, and she had academic qualifications. She asked her to come over as a nanny and paid her a salary in advance for her father’s surgery. . I have been here for two months and I am very diligent in my work.

Although there is a robot cleaning at home, the tea is handed over. But the robot is a thing that the mother used is not used to, is still a little popular with people, and will not take the initiative to do things. The United States and the United States come over and sometimes can accompany me to go shopping and chat. ”

"That's very good."

Chen Mo took Xiao Yu and sat down on the sofa in the hall.

"On the day of marriage, we have already looked at the gentleman and watched six auspicious days. I will choose one for you. The dates above are all Chinese."

Chen Shanhe handed out a piece of red paper and handed it to two people, with six lines on the beautiful line.

Chen Mo took the red paper and looked at the date a little. He said, "That's April 16th. This day is very special. How do you feel about Xiaoyu?"

"It's very good." Xiaoyu took a look at the calendar with his mobile phone.

"I just bet with your dad, I guess you will choose this day, and it doesn't matter." Zhang Yang smiled.

"Since the date is certain, let us inform Xiaoyu's parents, marriage and customs, we have also negotiated, you do not have to worry about these things. Then you have to think about the classmates and friends who need to entertain, prepare the wedding invitations." Chen Shanhe said.

"Dad, wedding invitations and banquets, prepare the list of relatives and friends at home, and let the wedding company get it together. Also, the house on the side of the incense burner beach is also in the house, and after the marriage, I and Xiao Yu Go inside and live there."

"Hey, this is good, just double happiness." Chen Ms. Shao Xuemei opened her eyes and smiled, and the crow's feet in her eyes were full of joy.

"From your wedding date, there are still more than two months, two of you work hard and strive for more than one good news." The side of Zhen Zhen also looked at Chen Mo and Xiao Yu.

Xiao Yu was ashamed of the moment and didn’t know what to answer.

......

At Binhai Airport, two oriental faces appeared at the airport gate.

A man and a woman, a man in a black jacket, with a knit hat and headphones, pushed a small black suitcase. Women wearing wool hats and sunglasses, wearing loose red sweaters, pushing red suitcases, at first glance, like ordinary travel couples.

The two just arrived at the door, looked around and began to wait patiently.

After a while, a car slowly stopped in front of the two people, saw the young driver in the car, the two looked at each other, opened the trunk and put the luggage, directly on the train.

"Are they coming?" The woman spoke.

"Being with me." The young driver named Bai Feng said: "They have been two years earlier than you, and they are waiting for your news. After all, the task is in your hands."

Fifteen minutes later, the car stopped in the courtyard of a single-family cottage in Binhai.

The young driver glanced at the movement around him and led the two men into the house. I saw three men in the hall, doing their own things.

One is in a quiet gun, one is playing a holographic mobile game, and one is watching a TV with dumbbells.

The young driver came in with two people. The three looked back and ignored them and continued to do things in their hands.

"Come on." The woman walked to the table in the middle of the hall and opened the laptop.

The three stopped their movements and went to the table to sit down.

"The action is really slow." The white man who wiped the gun said yin and yang: "My guns are rubbing fast."

"I found that China is very good, technology is so developed, holographic mobile phones and holographic projections. I also watched a holographic action film of the island country last night, it is really wonderful, it is a live broadcast." Playing holographic mobile games The young excitement said: "There are holographic games, and the heroic holographic games have been developed. It’s just a bloody..."

Muscular man playing with dumbbells looks to the woman: "What is the mission?"

"Wait." The young driver opened his mouth and took out a finger-sized instrument to open it on the table. The next moment, the young man playing the phone, saw the game in his hand disconnected.

"The game hasn't finished playing yet! This is a pit teammate." The young man playing the mobile game groaned dissatisfiedly: "You look at this game so much fun, the mobile phone does not attend the meeting, it does its own thing, there is nothing wrong with it. ......"

The young driver took his cell phone and turned it off directly.

"I have to remind you here that here is different from other places. After the island country last attempted to steal the technology of the marching ant company, the city of Binhai has been heavily targeted by the Huaxia National Security Bureau, secretly taking a lot of the same as us. People.

This holographic mobile phone is a product of the marching ant company with artificial intelligence. How advanced is the artificial intelligence of the marching ant company, you should know. In order to prevent accidents, during the meeting, in addition to the necessary computers, all mobile phones must be turned off, and the computer should be disconnected. I don't want to be stared by the China National Security Bureau. ”

Although a few people are not convinced, they still shut up.

When the preparation is complete, the woman opens the hidden folder in the computer and projects the data in it: "This is the goal of our mission."

A photo appears on the projection. If the outsider is here, it will definitely be recognized. The person above the photo is Chen Mo.

"The above requires us to seize the target, take away from China, to live, the action code: Falcon."

chapters.title: Chapter 323: : Dreams Have Been In The Sea
chapters.body:
Chapter 323: : Dreams Have Been In The Sea

Shao Guangming looked at the luxurious villa in front, as well as the bodyguards outside, and hesitated.

"Dad, don't go back," said the woman next to him. She is Shao Guanglin, the eldest daughter of Shao Guangming: "I have the ability to do it without having to worry about Chen Mo."

"Yeah, Dad, that's not good." Shao Zhenye in the driver's seat said: "The last time I asked my aunt to borrow 500,000, I still have trouble with him. It's not good. After all, our family was like them. ""

"It was your mother's suspicion that forced your family to pay back the money, which caused an irreparable situation." Shao Guangming sighed. After all, I haven’t been in the past for more than a decade. Now that Chen Mo has developed, they will come back and make a good impression.

"Is there anything wrong?" The three-person car just arrived at the door and was stopped by the guarded bodyguard.

"Troublely let me know, I am Chen Mo's 舅舅 Shao Guangming, come and visit my sister's family." Shao Guangming said by pressing the window.

"Please wait a moment." The bodyguard glanced at the three people in the car and said a few words to the headset.

"Xiao Mo, you and your cousin cousin came over." Chen mother Shao Xuemei looked at Shao Guangming's car on the monitor screen, hesitantly looked at Chen Mo, with an expectation in his eyes.

Seeing the look of his mother, Chen Mo nodded: "Then ask them to come in and sit down."

He was not so bad about this embarrassment. After all, when he was poor, he borrowed money to spend the most difficult time. It was just not very good for the aunt, but she did not come over. Now parents don't care about their suspicions, and he doesn't deliberately go to war.

When Chen Mo was heard, Chen mother laughed. After all, the blood was thicker than water, and she was a relative. She did not want her brothers and sisters to become enemies. When her nephew forced them to pay back the money, Chen Mo had already made a note at that time. What she was most afraid of was Chen Mo’s opinion.

Seeing the door open, Shao Guangming's face was loose. Shao Meilin and Shao Zhenye are also complex, and finally enter the car slowly.

Shao Guangming is wearing a military green coat with dark skin and is an ordinary middle-aged man. Shao Zhenye cut his flat head and looked a bit honest. Shao Meilin wore a windbreaker, with a pair of black-rimmed glasses, a bit of literary style, dressed as a fashionable young woman.

Looking at Shao Guangming and Shao Meilin and Shao Zhenye, they walked into the villa. Chen Mo stood up and nodded to the three people: "Hey, cousin, cousin, come and sit down."

"Hey, good." Shao Guangming heard Chen Mo say hello, his face with a surprise smile, looking at the small fish next to Chen Mo: "This is a small fisherman? Very beautiful, very good, good vision."

"Oh, good." Xiao Yu also made a minor ceremony for Shao Guangming.

The matter of their family, Chen Mo and she said that more than a decade ago, now, regardless of the former suspicion, one more relative, the two are also happy.

"Hey." Shao Guangming took two red packets from his pocket and handed it to Xiaoyu: "The red envelope is small, don't mind."

"Thank you." Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo and got the acquiescence of his eyes before he took Shao Guangming's red envelope.

"Aunt, my uncle is good." Shao Zhenye and Shao Meilin asked Chen Mo's parents a good voice, and then they greeted Chen Mo: "Chen Mo cousin."

The atmosphere was a bit stiff, they hadn't seen each other for more than a decade, and they were a bit strange to each other.

"Well, Zhenye brother, Meilin sister, come over and sit down first." Chen Mo slightly greeted, indicating that the three were seated.

"Xiao Mo, I am coming here today, there are so many things. I heard that you and Xiaoyu are married, and come to Daxi." Shao Guangming sat down and spoke directly.

"Thank you." Chen Mo nodded.

"There is something that may have been done wrong in the past. These years are also quite self-blaming, and it is not easy to speak. Today, I heard that you are back, I will apologize. I will use tea to make a drink and a penalty." Shao Guangming picked up the teacup and drank it.

"They are all relatives, and there is no big hatred. It has passed in the past." Chen Shanhe said on the side.

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded and took a cup and took a drink.

"Yes, they are all relatives." Shao Guangming showed a relaxed smile.

“What is the work of Zhenye and Meilin now?”

Shao Xuemei looked at the two people sitting on the side. After all, they are all older generations. Some things can still be seen. Shao Guangming is not easy to speak. Only she can introduce this topic.

"Aunt, I didn't go to college after I finished high school. I didn't have much experience. I started to have a fruit shop in the first few years and accumulated some experience. Last time you borrowed 500,000, plus a few years of savings, now you are doing something. The small business of fruit acquisition.” Shao Zhenye said a little nervous.

“I just graduated from graduate school this year, and I have a master's degree in management. Now I am a manager assistant in a company.” Shao Meilin also answered.

Chen Mo’s legendary story, they all heard as young people, so when facing Chen Mo, although he was a cousin, he was still somewhat cautious.

"Does this? Xiaomo, what position does your company have for your cousin's cousin, you can arrange for them to go in. Working for others is also a part-time job, and the family can still have a care." Shao Xuemei said.

Upon hearing these words, Shao Guangming gratefully glanced at Shao Xuemei and became more and more embarrassed about his own practice.

Today, he was wearing a thick face and carrying two people. In addition to He Xi and an apology, there is also for this matter. After all, the future of the son and daughter is more important than his face. With Chen Mo's photo, his son and daughter are not afraid of nothing.

"If you think about changing your work environment, you can consider coming to our company. But come to our company, start from the bottom, wait for the business, then go to a higher position. If you don't want to, I can borrow two million of your venture capital. You start your own business. If you make money and count your own, if you lose money in normal business, it will count me."

When Chen Mo’s words fell, Shao Guangming’s face was a joy.

He hopes that his children will have a good future, so he will let the following come. He does not expect Chen Moen to be like them to Zhang Yang’s Shaozhen family. As long as they recognize their relationship and are willing to help, they are satisfied.

"Zhenye, Meilin, what are your opinions?" Shao Guangming looked at the two.

"Let me go to such a big company, I don't have any education, I don't have much skill, and I can't go too high. I started my own business." Shao Zhenye said.

"I will go, start with ordinary employees."

Chen Mo wants them to enter the company, but also wants to have more people to trust. What is needed in the future is also convenient.

After dinner, Chen Mo dialed Zhao Min’s phone.

For Shao Meilin to enter the company, I still have to say to Zhao Min, the company is managed by Zhao Min, Shao Meilin is suitable for which position, and Zhao Min will be better.

"Big boss, call me now, do you want to ask me?" When the phone was connected, Zhao Min’s ridiculous voice was heard.

"I am at home, I don't want to make an appointment." Chen Mo smiled.

"Also, you are getting married soon. I really envy the little fishermen and let someone publicly admit the certificate. Many people want to be a small three, and no one wants to be old."

“呃???” Chen Mo’s brain has a few black lines, and his face is speechless: “Would you like me to send you a small advertisement for marriage?”

"Get out of the way, sister is not no one wants." Zhao Min was laughed at by Chen Mo: "Whenever you let this big boss enjoy the holiday, call me personally."

"My cousin wants to enter the company. You can see what kind of position you have and arrange for her. The specific resume information, I sent it to your mailbox."

"Just this little thing?"

"No, the company knows better than me, there is management, you can better arrange according to her situation." Chen Mo said.

"When is it coming back? I found that I haven't seen you during this time, I miss you."

"Go back in a few days and rest almost."

"I went in and saw the wedding dress that you gave to Xiaoyu yesterday. If a lot of it is not finished, I will try it on. I will design a set for me."

"When you get married, say."

"I used to be a waterman. When you meet such a good man, how can I still see other people? My sister hated the corner where I didn't dig a small fisherman. You designed it for me to collect it. The sister carefully considered whether or not to marry. People, anyway, men are almost like cucumbers."

puff……

Chen Moqing is not eating now, or he has to be killed: "The reason is, who told you to go to sea?"

"My dreams."

"you win……"

After hanging up the phone, Chen Mo took a small fishing and went out with his parents to go to the night market.

Next, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu went home together for a few days, and the two also met to arrange the wedding related matters. Arrange everything, and I almost rested for a month. It was confirmed that Chen Mo was already good. Xiao Yu was able to let go, ending the vacation and rushing back to Binhai.

chapters.title: Chapter 324: :Fantasy Wedding Dress
chapters.body:
Chapter 324: :Fantasy Wedding Dress

"Welcome back, big boss."

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu just returned to the company, Zhao Min greeted him. Seeing the spirit of Chen Mo, Zhao Min showed a smile.

When Chen Mo was in a coma, she could be scared.

Chen Mo is the spiritual pillar of the company and her main heart. If Chen Mo has something to do, the company may face no small trouble.

Now Chen Mo is fine, and after the break is over, she is also relieved.

"Small fish, let your husband give me a hug."

Chen Mo cheeks twitching, full of black lines.

"You can only hug." Xiao Yuchao Chen Mo's eyes.

"..."

Chen Mo did not know how to describe his feelings at the moment. He did not expect Xiao Yu to follow the naughty.

Zhao Min smiled slightly and turned and hugged Chen Mo: "How about this vacation? Look at your red face, Xiao Yu should not treat you badly."

"It’s also a vacation trip, travel around, and accompanying the family by the way, what else can you do? It’s too bad for too long, and your brain is rusting.”

"This time, come back, don't mess around, you will see the same situation again, then we must not scare us all."

"Hey? I pay attention."

Chen Mo shrugged. There is no guarantee that this can be guaranteed. No one can guarantee that the next time he enters the technology library to get the technology, the same situation will not occur. This is not something he can control.

"Small fish, this can't be done. Just in case, someone has to look after him, or do you want to be a close-knit secretary?" Zhao Min said.

"Zhao Jie, I can't do it." Without waiting for Chen Mo to speak, Xiao Yu shook his head and refused.

Although the two have already obtained the evidence, they love each other, but there are some things, Xiao Yu still understand. The secretary of part-time Chen Mo, occasionally reporting some work with Chen Mo. But if it is the kind of personal secretary, the work and life are all together all the time, and Chen Mo is always in charge. The two are very prone to conflicts.

"Zhao Jie, you can hire another secretary for Chen Mo."

"You are not afraid of the secretary I hired him. Is it a big beauty?"

"That would be cheaper for him. Anyway, the beauty secretary is with him and let him raise his eyes."

"Have you ever asked my opinion?" Chen Mo looked speechless when he saw that the two men had nothing to discuss with him to find a secretary.

"Your opinion is not counted, it happened twice, but it was discovered early, and someone must look after you early." Xiao Yu said.

"How can my opinion not be counted? I am the big boss, I am the chairman!"

"I am the wife of the chairman."

"..."

Zhao Min, who was on the side, smiled and swayed. She saw Chen Mo’s appearance, and it was quite fun.

"Hey, reason, you think, who can be my secretary? I often know about the situation in Building 1 and the lab, Building 1 and the lab? Are you sure to let the new secretary go in?"

When I heard Chen Mo’s words, the two suddenly realized.

In Building No. 1, there are too many advanced technologies hidden. Including room temperature superconductor materials, superconducting computers, high-precision 3D printers, ink-making artificial intelligence, as well as a variety of strange robots, a variety of new materials and potential drug sample formulations, are inside.

Any technology can be created to create a large enterprise, even the world is shocked. It can be said that Building No. 1 is a top-secret forbidden place. Without 200% trust, it is impossible for people to enter casually.

The entire marching ant company, except Chen Mo, was able to freely enter and exit the No. 1 building, and only two of them. Including Julie, Li Lingfeng and a group of senior researchers, can't enter without permission. Even if you enter, there will be restrictions on the area of activity.

"Is nothing to say?" Chen Mo saw the two men quiet, showing a smile of victory: "So, don't think about finding a secretary for me, not everyone can do it. The company's business, Zhao Min, you deal with, Usually trivial things, there are robots and ink girls, my secretary, almost idle, and small fishermen can do anything, anyway, usually nothing to do."

"Well, whatever you want, I wanted to find a beauty secretary for you. Since I don't know how to enjoy it, then forget it. I should go back to work."

"Remember not to be too tired."

Xiao Yu was solemn and silent, and he followed Zhao Min to leave Chen Mo’s office.

"Merg brother." The two left, the holographic projection of the ink girl also appeared in the office: "Small fishing sister's wedding dress has been completed."

"Oh? Look at the past." For Chen Mo, this is an unexpected news.

However, according to his calculations, the wedding dress should indeed be completed within this month, just a little ahead of what he expected.

Just entering the No. 1 building, the lab where the wedding dress is located, Chen Mo saw the wedding dress on the transparent dummy model.

The wedding dresses are all made of dreamy fiber textiles. The whole body is pure white and the long skirt is simple and elegant. It gently touches the wedding dress, and the soft touch is like touching the girl's skin.

"Let's change and see." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, Mom."

When the words of the ink girl fell, a light column fell on the wedding dress. The next moment, the pure white wedding dress changed.

The colorful glow slowly emerges from the wedding dress. In a flash, the pure white wedding dress becomes colorful, and the lights are fascinating, like a dream. As if breathing, the wedding dress slowly turns into a sea blue, a little flash under the light, a white diamond inlaid with dream fibers, like the waves of the sea, pure and agile, and then excessively into a noble purple...

Since the successful synthesis of the dream fiber, the wedding dress has entered the production stage.

In order to make this wedding dress, Chen Mo deliberately found a seamless knitting technique similar to 3Du-Knit from the technology library. This technology makes clothes without the need for cutting, sewing and other follow-up work, and there is no waste of materials. The clothes have no stitching, so they can fit the body curve and enhance the comfort.

Knitting machines were made, and the wedding design was carefully calculated by the ink girl. So dozens of intelligent robots were processed 24 hours, and it was completely completed until now.

Not worth the value of dream fiber, the production of this wedding dress, including material synthesis, machine development and production, costs up to 60 million. If you count the new material of dream fiber, its value is immeasurable. It can be said that this dream wedding dress is the crystallization of high technology.

Chen Mo looked at the wedding dress, very satisfied, he promised Xiaoyu, and finally did it. Xiaoyu saw this wedding dress and would definitely like it.

"Mer. Brother, do you want to tell Xiaoyu to try it on?"

The holographic projection of the ink girl falls by Chen Mo.

"No, next time give her a surprise." Chen Mo suddenly looked forward to Xiaoyu wearing this wedding dress.

After staying in the lab where the wedding dress is located for a while, Chen Mo returned to the physical laboratory.

Among all the labs in Chen Mo, the physics lab is the biggest one. Involved in physical research and development, including laser applications, holography, high-precision laser 3D printing, material physics and other technologies, are completed here, and now, in the physical laboratory, there will be another field of research.

After the last coma, Xiao Yu was not allowed to study his brains, and the management was a bit strict. He was not good at deceiving Xiao Yu, so he had not touched the research and was safe to take a vacation. Going back to the company now is also the time to start the next technology.

"Ink girl, it's time to work." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, Mom, what kind of technology are you going to study next?" Some women asked.

“Controllable hydrogen nuclear fusion.”

chapters.title: Chapter 325: :Star Ring
chapters.body:
Chapter 325: :Star Ring

During the rest of the period, Chen Mo promised that Xiao Yu would not study, but he did not idle, and he was digesting the acquired technology at all times.

Among the technical materials obtained by the Science and Technology Library, there are a variety of methods for achieving controlled nuclear fusion, the simplest of which is anti-gravity constraint, laser ignition [star furnace].

The anti-gravity device suspends the fusion helium gas in a vacuum vessel, and then uses a high-energy laser to collect the ignition in the air mass to make the air mass reach the fusion temperature. This method is similar to the artificial sun, has no stagnation loss, and consumes less sputum. However, there is no pressure inside the sun, and high-energy lasers must be used to maintain nuclear fusion.

However, in the technology, only high-energy laser technology is described, and there is no anti-gravity device technology. Without anti-gravity, the air mass is suspended in a vacuum, and there is no container to accommodate nuclear fusion at a high temperature of hundreds of millions of degrees. Therefore, this method of [Star Furnace] is not yet possible.

Chen Mo chooses the method of magnetic confinement. Regardless of the premise of anti-gravity device, the magnetic confinement is more complicated than that of [Star Furnace], but now the technology can be realized.

The main device of this magnetic field constraint is called [Star Ring]. The star ring device is mainly composed of tokamak device and imitation star device, but it is different from the two. It can be said that it is a new type of imitation star device. But the star ring technology he got, running, and better stability.

In the obtained technical data, the core theory of nuclear fusion is complete, and the principle theory of the star ring is also recorded in detail. As a divertor against neutron radiation and plasma radiation during nuclear fusion, the material requirements are very strict. Such low activation, low enthalpy retention heat resistant materials are also formulated in the art. As a core material superconductor for making superconducting star ring devices, it has already been available.

Controlled nuclear fusion can be achieved by designing the star ring design.

However, the characteristics of nuclear fusion are complex and involve a wide range of fields. This is the first time humans have encountered problems covering almost all disciplines. It involves physical, mechanical, electrical, materials, processing, production and other fields, and knowledge integration reaches a very high level.

Chen Mo is sure that nuclear fusion technology is the most difficult in the technology apprenticeship stage.

The science and technology library allowed such a huge amount of knowledge information to flow into his brain instantly, which was the cause of his brain's serious consumption and coma.

To make such a nuclear fusion reaction device, it is still very difficult to use Chen’s current ability, unless the hands are unscrupulous, but this thing can not be manufactured.

While sorting out technical materials, Chen Mo is also thinking about the application of controllable nuclear technology.

After all, once the commercialized operation of the controlled nuclear fusion technology is permanent energy, it is clean, safe and efficient, which will completely solve the energy crisis facing humanity in the future.

Undoubtedly, this technology is vital to any country and cannot be left in the hands of private companies and operated by private companies.

The situation is special and it seems necessary to cooperate with the official again.

Chen Mo thought about it, knocked his head, and now the technical information is still in the finishing stage. After the technical data is finished and the simulation test is to be carried out, this is the problem that needs to be considered now.

"Let's go ahead."

Chen Mo shouted a female ink and continued to focus on organizing technical materials.

......

“It’s very difficult to get the target.”

The blue wolf stood by the wall and circled the small blackboard on the wall. There were various photos of Chen Mo.

He was the original young driver. In front of him, four men and one woman sat around the small table. Everyone was doing their own thing, not like having a serious meeting.

"Crap, if the goal is easy to catch, can he still get us started?" The young man is playing with the game console.

No one is on the scene, no one on the field.

"According to the information we know, there are five roads between Chen Mo's villa and the company. He goes to the company and changes routes every day. We are not sure which route he will take next time."

The blue wolf pointed at a map on the wall. If Chen Mo is here, I can definitely know that the red line on the map is the route between him and the company.

"It is not practical to work near the villa area and the marching ant company. There is a public security bureau near the villa area, and a special police force is stationed next to the marching ant company. The police will come over the first time no matter where they start."

"We choose a road to wait, one-fifth of the chance to catch a rabbit, wait a few more days, and there is a lot of time anyway." The youth continued to speak.

"The line does not work." The blue wolf shook his head directly: "The five roads are working at work hours, and the traffic volume is relatively large. Let's not say whether we can catch the problem, even if we succeed, it is also a problem to escape. Our task is to seize Chen Mo, and he lived away from China. In the time of robbing Chen Mo, it is easy to cause confusion. This road is chaotic, and it is easy to cause traffic jams. We can't escape."

"And, Chen Mo started from the villa area, his car, two cars in front and behind, and a free car, three cars as security, at least four security personnel per car, all through layers Selected excellent veterans.

Their cars are all specially made vehicles, and their safety performance is good. Unless they are anti-equipment weapons, it is no different to rely on us to catch Chen Mo. ”

The blue wolf began to analyze the stakes based on the information obtained.

"It doesn't work either, it doesn't work, the mission announces failure?" The young man's words attracted the eyes of everyone on the field.

"Ruth, what do you think?"

The blue wolf looks at the **** **** the court. She is the leader of this action and the chief person in charge of this action.

“It’s a bit of a hassle.

Ruth bites her red lips and puts the information in her hand down.

"The information shows that two mercenaries of Blackwater Company were hired. At that time, the security of Chen Mo was not so perfect now, they were also caught, indicating that he has a master around him. Since then, the security around Chen Mo Villa has also been placed. Power, it is not feasible to sneak into the villa to catch people.

The espionage of the island nation has directly died in the middle of the road, and there are many hidden actions that we do not know. Want to seize Chen Mo from the coastal city, in addition to Chen Mo's security, Huaxia's security department can not be underestimated. ”

“Are rich people so afraid of death?” the young man muttered.

"Shut up, talk nonsense, I kill you, there is no need for idiots here."

Muscular man playing with dumbbells is black face, he knows that this guy is deliberately asking these no brain problems, but listening to more will be annoying.

"Don't be angry, violent." The young man shrugged and did not care about the anger of the muscular man. He played with the game machine and said: "His family should be better. What technology we need can start with his family. Kidnapping his family and forcing him to hand over the technology."

"Remember, our mission goal is to take Chen Mo away from China, not his family." Ruth said.

"Can you attack his family and start on the way he goes back?" asked the white man wiping the gun.

"No."

Young people are undecided and shrug: "Why?"

"After stunned, once he is prepared, there is still the attention of the Chinese security department. We don't even have a chance at all. Even if we can leave China, it is a problem, and the action must be done in one go."

"Well, what do you say?"

Ruth stretched her finger and clicked on a position on the map: "Since there are no conditions to do it, we create the hands-on conditions in this place."

chapters.title: Chapter 326: :Arson
chapters.body:
Chapter 326: :Arson

"Damn, come back."

A small gambling filled with all kinds of smoke and alcohol. In the field, a man in a white shirt fell off his hand and stared red like a crazy gambler.

The red-eyed Yan Wenbin turned his head in anger. After seeing the coming person, like a male duck caught in the neck, all the sounds disappeared instantly.

"Why didn't my mother teach me? My mom said, I must reason, tell the law, teach me to pay back the debts." The big man squatted on Yan Wenbin's shoulder and left the small gambling. The field went to the side alley. : "The money you borrowed expired, plus interest of 150,000, when is it?"

If you want to be civilized, I don't mind following uncivilization." The head-shaped scull-shaped man swayed his hand, and several people in the back surrounded Yan Wenbin.

"I control your artificial intelligence or artificial mental retardation. If you don't pay back, you don't make sense. If you don't make sense, then you can talk about fists." Jin Ge ignited a cigarette and waved his hand: "Tell him a fist, don't hit Face, don't break your foot, I have to keep his hands and feet to pay back, let him wake up and wake up."

"Gold brother...ah..."

When Yan Wenbin’s words were not finished, they were put on the stomach with one foot. Two minutes later, the sound of screams and punches and kicks stopped.

"Give you another week, then we will continue to make sense. If you let me talk about the fist again, remember that you are not so lucky next time. First break your hands and feet, or some of your organs, also worth a few You can escape the money. You can escape, don't forget that you still have family, if you are caught by me, hehe... you know the consequences." The big man patted Yan Wenbin's face and smiled coldly.

Yan Wenbin, who was curled up, trembled and chilled, forgetting the pain.

"The three thousand, count the cost of today's Laozi reason, let's go." The headed scorpion big man got up and left the alley.

"Frighten him, how many times have you said it, do our work, reason and law. We don't do anything to break the law, the fist is to let him know what is life." Jin Ge lost his cigarette **** Looked at the alley next to it: "Go."

A group of people walked away, a man and a woman came out of the alley and saw Yan Wenbin coming out of the Hutong and followed.

"Yan Wenbin."

"Golden brother, I will pay back the money within a week." Yan Wenbin heard the sound, his foot was soft, and he almost fell to the ground.

"Yan Wenbin, I am not coming to find you for debt."

"Isn't it a debt to scare Laozi?" Yan Wenbin saw a man and a woman with a mask, an angry face, just a stomach is not sent, now seems to find the object of catharsis.

"Give you money."

The young man with a mask opened the zipper in his hand and slammed it in front of Yan Wenbin.

A stack of red 彤彤 票 从 从 从 从 从 从 从 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严 严?"

"It seems quite smart, no wonder it can be a small business executive at the factory." The young man smiled and looked around and said: "Here is one million, you just need to help us do one thing, we Give you three million."

"Four million?" Yan Wenbin has a longing for his eyes.

"Thinking, with your current salary, four million, how many years will it be, and you only need to do one thing for us," the young man said.

"What?" Yan Wenbin asked with a flash of gaze.

The young man smiled with a smile: "Let a fire."

"You have to deal with the marching ant company?" Yan Wenbin suddenly realized that he was gambling, but not a fool, looking for him to set fire, certainly to the army ants company.

"It's very smart. I like to work with smart people." The young man said: "In addition to this vote, there will definitely be opportunities to cooperate in the future. Do you want to do it?"

"But there is artificial intelligence monitoring in the factory. I set fire to it and I will definitely be discovered by the camera."

Listening to the plain voice, Yan Wenbin’s body was stiff and began to fear uncontrollably. Set fire in staff quarters? This is to want people to live.

"How? Don't dare? No courage, how to make big money? The marching ant company has made so much money, and how many don't give you? It's pitiful," the young taunted. Immediately squat down and put the money on the ground back into the bag.

Looking at the money was taken back, Yan Wenbin swallowed his mouth and his eyes were bright.

"Since you don't want to cooperate, then I am going to find someone else." The youth picked up the book and turned and left.

"Wait, let a fire, really four million?"

Yan Wenbin gritted his teeth and hurriedly stopped the youth.

“Want to cooperate?” The youth stopped: “Four million, one point will not be less.”

"I have to take money first, cash." Yan Wenbin said.

"Oh, very smart, then why do I believe in you, will you do the money if you take the money?" The young man taunted: "Have you seen the boss pay the employee first, and let him do things?"

"Then if you don't give me the remaining three million, I can't find you." Yan Wenbin said.

"Wait." Yan Wenbin looked at the back of the young man and bit his teeth and called him. Anyway, if he couldn’t get the money from Jin Ge in a week, he would die. It’s better to gamble: "I did, I hope you will be left. Give me the money."

"The right choice, wait for my message, start now, until I start, my people will pay attention to you in secret, it is best not to make any trouble, but then it is very serious, more serious than you think, we can know your daughter. At the third elementary school in Binhai. Do this vote, and have the opportunity to do it later, and let you do it again, a lot of money."

Looking at the back of the youth, Yan Wenbin felt that he had entered a big pit, and his heart was a little panic, but when he saw the red ticket in the bag, all the fear disappeared, leaving only the color of greed.

"You are not afraid that he does not talk about credit?" In the car, Ruth glanced at Yan Wenbin, who fled with a book, and turned to look at the youth.

"Credit? We should know that we must know that a gambler who has nowhere to go has more chips for him. Is other things important? This kind of person has seen more, his greed will keep him abiding. It is our failure to keep Credit, because we won't give him the rest of the money, and there won't be the next cooperation. Go back and get ready for the plan, only once."

The young man lost his cigarette **** and started the car, disappearing into the night.

chapters.title: Chapter 327: : Action Begins
chapters.body:
Chapter 327: : Action Begins

"Before telling the plan, I want to remind you that our mission is to capture the target and take him away from China. Be careful not to kill him."

Ruth looked serious, sitting on the table in front of her, surrounded by five people. Playing games, wiping guns, playing with dumbbells, reading materials, everyone is doing their own thing.

“Do you understand?” Ruth became accustomed to this scene.

“From the beginning to the present, I have said more than three times.” The young man dug his ears and continued to play his own game console: “Can you come up with something new?”

"So now let's talk about the action plan."

Ruth glanced at the young man, opened the computer in his hand and projected it directly onto the wall. Above is a map of the coastal city, criss-crossing the roads of the coastal city.

“This is Binhai City, close to the sea, which has created favorable conditions for us to quickly send our targets away from China. I have already contacted the above, and after grabbing the target, I will take him away from Binhai City by water. When there will be a ship, use He sent him to the open sea at the fastest speed."

"Are you sure you want to send people to the dock? There are customs offices there, and there are a lot of people coming and going. We are like this, the target is significant and it is easy to expose."

"Who said to the dock? Listen to me." Ruth snorted coldly: "We sent him to this position."

Ruth clicked on a spot on the map.

"This is a small beach. The locals call Hutou Beach. There will be a small boat waiting for us when we are in action. As long as Chen Mo is sent to the city to leave the city, it is not so easy for Huaxia people to find Chen Mo."

唠叨 Young people know how to shut up, look at the location of the map, and continue to play the game console.

"The next step is the detailed plan. The place where we act is the section between the hospital and the target villa. This road is in the morning, there are fewer vehicles, it is easy to operate, and it can go straight to the beach. After succeeding, the first time Send people to Hutoutan.

After the target went out, there were four cars, the main car in the middle, two guards, one left and the team to the intersection of Phoenix Road, we started to act.

The blue wolf dragged the free car, leaving two cars, the black cat, you are responsible for getting the car behind, dragging it, don't let them keep up, as for the remaining guard car..."

Ruth began to arrange the plan. Here is Huaxia. There are not many people. If you want to catch Chen Mo, you must carefully plan the plan. Otherwise, it is no different from finding death.

Ruth was stopped when all the people were assigned to work.

"Any questions?"

“Yes.” The young man immediately said: “How do you know that the goal will definitely go to this hospital?”

"Because this hospital is closest to this spare parts factory and warehouse, if the employees of the army ant company are injured and die, they will definitely go to this hospital. And the big boss of the target, it is impossible to be indifferent." Ruth said coldly.

"It's very fun, I am looking forward to this game." Young people rarely have to stop the game console in their hands: "When do you start acting?"

"Four o'clock tomorrow morning."

Yan Wenbin twirled on the bed and looked at the silent night outside the window. He couldn't sleep, and looked at the mobile phone from time to time. It was almost the appointed time.

Next to his desk, there is a table tennis ball. This is a solid petrol ball. Yan Wenbin knows that he has entered a big pit.

If you follow the instructions of the other party, after being discovered, you will definitely be sentenced to death. If you don't do it, take the other person's money, and you don't have a way to live. Maybe you will even be tired of your family.

He now regrets a bit, why he promised the other to do these things and gamble his future.

I can get rid of gambling. Addiction, usually save a little money, ask others to borrow some money, and after a few months, he can pay off his debts quickly with his salary. Now that I have taken the money of the other party, I have no turning back.

Oh...

Suddenly, the vibration of the mobile phone made Yan Wenbin, who was tangled and panicked, trembled. When he saw a strange incoming call, Yan Wenbin swallowed the swallow and pressed the button.

It’s still coming.

"It's time to get started." There was a cold voice in the phone: "I don't want to take money and don't do anything?"

"How do you give me the remaining three million?" Yan Wenbin asked.

"Three million is ready. After the event, it is still the old place at noon. I will send the money to you, cash. Please be careful, as long as you don't let others discover it, we can cooperate next time. Our goal is to march ant company. As long as you cooperate, money will not be enough for you."

Yan Wenbin blinked a few times, and after a while tangled, he stood firm: "Good."

......

"Damn, sleep less water next time."

Dong Donghui got up from the bed, staring at his sleepy eyes, and groping for the bathroom. With the sound of a stream of water, Dong Donghui also exhaled a refreshing voice.

Suddenly, a burning smell was introduced into his nose, so that his sleepiness was half awake. The smoky smoke came in from the window of the bathroom, and it became thicker and thicker, causing his brow to wrinkle and hurriedly pulling up his pants and aiming at the window.

The red flames, accompanied by black smoke from the dormitory downstairs, can feel the heat waves in the air through the window.

"Fire."

The screams of the patrol guards downstairs awakened the night of sleep.

Dong Donghui had only a little sleepiness, disappeared in the roaring sounds, and had no time to think about it. He rushed out of the bathroom.

"It’s a fire, hurry up, hurry up, get a fire."

Dong Donghui screamed a few times in the dormitory and awakened his sleeping colleagues. Before they could react, they ran to the corridor and directly tapped the button of the fire alarm.

Oh...

The fire alarm bell, together with the alarm, rang through the entire dormitory and awakened people still sleeping.

"Fire."

Dong Donghui yelled at the corridor with a scorpion, and now the smoke began to be rich, and he was not sure how big the fire was.

"Hurry to the safe exit, divert the crowd to maintain order, prevent the fire from blocking the security exit." Seeing the wake-up, the colleague rushed out, Dong Donghui screamed at several people, picked up the fire hydrant and rushed to the stairs. mouth.

"hurry up."

When a few people just came out of their heads, they felt a heat wave hit. It is obvious that the fire is not small. I don’t have time to think about it and rush to the various security exits.

"Ami's 503 fainted. In the room, I couldn't carry her." A panicked girl ran over and yelled at Dong Donghui, who was maintaining order, and rushed into the escape crowd.

"Damn, old cow, you maintain order, let everyone pay attention to lowering the body and licking your mouth and nose, don't panic and push to prevent falling and stepping on."

Dong Donghui ran with the fire extinguisher and ran to the fifth floor.

The entire dormitory building began to fall into the mood of panic. Cries, panicked footsteps, sirens and shouts of various shouts.

"Well, now the prologue has officially begun." The blue wolf looked at the dormitory in the distance.

"According to the plan." Ruth standing next to him gently nodded and picked up the headset and said: "Now plan to start, pay attention to the point, the target goes out, let us know."

"Understood, this time the action is really tiring, not looking at the time, not letting people sleep well."

The young man squatted and glanced at the door of the villa community where Chen Mo was located. He looked at the silent night and continued to play with the game console in the car.

chapters.title: Chapter 328: : Preparing To Close The Net
chapters.body:
Chapter 328: : Preparing To Close The Net

"Chen Mo, Chen Mo."

When Chen Mo was still asleep, he heard a gentle call. As soon as I opened my eyes, I saw a little fishy anxious face.

"Well, what's the matter?" Chen Mo asked with some awkward sleepy eyes: "What is so anxious?"

“Zhao Jie came to the phone and there was a fire in the employee dormitory of a factory.” Xiaoyu handed the phone to Chen Mo.

"Fire?"

Chen Mo sat up from the bed and had no sleep.

"What happened?" Chen Mo took the call and spoke directly.

“The factory in Fenghuang North has a fire in the staff quarters.” Zhao Min’s tone is somewhat dignified: “The fire is now under control.”

"How is the situation? Is anyone injured?" Chen Mo's look is also dignified.

"Current statistics, 2 deaths and 11 injuries."

"How could it be so serious?" Chen Mo's face suddenly darkened.

"The fire broke out at 4 o'clock in the morning, and many people were asleep. Fortunately, it was discovered early. There were employees evacuating people on the spot, otherwise the consequences would be disastrous. Two employees lived in the upper floors, escaped with elevators, and were suffocated by smoke." Sensing voice is obviously a little angry.

"You are at the scene of the fire now?"

"No, I was in the hospital in Fenghuang North, the wounded were sent here." Zhao Min said: "I have sent you a video of the fire scene, you can look at it."

"Ink girl, open the video." Chen Mo said.

When the words fall, the holographic projection of the mobile phone jumps out of a light curtain, and the above is the picture of the firefighters who are fighting the fire.

“Why is there a fire? Is the fire safety work in the staff quarters not done?” Chen Mo looked angry with anger.

“The director said that the fire safety is all carried out according to the standard, and it is not regularly checked. And the fire is a bit strange. I asked the security personnel who patrolled. They said that there was no explosion. After seeing the ignition, suddenly The smoke is rolling, the fire is getting bigger, and even if the circuit is short-circuited, there is no possibility of an uncontrollable fire in an instant."

"What do you mean, someone deliberately set fire?" Chen Mo immediately understood the meaning of Zhao Min.

"Do not rule out this possibility, the police have opened a case investigation." Zhao Min said: "After all, this fire is a bit embarrassing."

“Is the injured seriously injured?” Chen Mo asked.

"It's not too serious. It's all bumps in the escape process, or it's got smoked. There is a small area burn, it's more serious. It's called Dong Donghui, it is to save an employee, accidentally hurt, The injuries of others are not that serious."

"I have a look at the past."

Chen Mo came down from the bed and quickly walked over to the washroom. After simply brushing his teeth and washing his face, Chen Mo put on the clothes that Xiaoyu had already prepared and left the room in a hurry.

"I will accompany you in the past." Xiao Yu took Chen Mo's hand and followed his footsteps and left the villa.

"Go to Phoenix North Hospital." Chen Mo said on the car, he said to Wang Hai.

Wang Hai nodded and said in the headset, starting the car and leaving the villa area.

The young man who is playing the game machine suddenly looks at him and immediately picks up the telescope: "Everyone, the goal has already come out."

At the same time, a few people who heard the news, the body shocked, all spirited.

"According to the original plan." Ruth said with a dignified voice.

"Okay." The youth put down the game console in their hands, started the car, and slowly followed Chen Mo’s team.

At this moment, Chen Mo did not know at all. This was a conspiracy against him. He was sitting in the car and watching the news while talking to Zhao Min. It is now at six in the morning, and this kind of thing happened. Some media have already arrived at the scene and broadcast live on the scene of the fire.

After all, the place where the fire broke out was the factory of the marching ant company. They have always been the focus of media attention. It is impossible to ignore such a major fire accident.

“This is the fire scene of the marching ant company factory. At 4 o'clock in the morning, there was a fire in the staff dormitory of the Fenghuang North Plant of the marching ant company. At present, at least 2 people were killed and 11 people were injured. The wounded situation is still in the statistics. All the injured have already Was sent to the nearest Phoenix North Hospital.

The fire at the scene of the fire has been controlled, and the cause of the fire is still under investigation. According to the news from the hospital, Zhao Min, president of the marching ant company, has rushed to the hospital to visit the injured and his family..."

“This is the Central News Channel. The latest news is broadcast below. The marching ant company is in a fire in the staff quarters of the Phoenix North Factory District in Binhai City. It has caused 2 deaths and 11 injuries...”

"..."

Chen Mo adjusted a few channels, all about the fire report. Looking at the dead man who was sent to the ambulance in a bag, Chen Mo’s face was not very good-looking.

This can be said to be the biggest accident that has occurred since the establishment of the marching ant company.

"What is the situation of the wounded and family members now?" Chen Mo looked at Zhao Min in the holographic video.

"Just got the news, the burned employee, the operation was successful, and the situation has stabilized. We have already informed the families of the deceased." Zhao Minzhen’s headache: "If it is the safety hazard of the factory itself, the responsibility for this investigation." I will never let go. If it is artificial, this thing is probably more troublesome. There is a second time for the first time."

"When the police give us the answer, let's discuss this issue."

"No. 2 found the target vehicle." While Chen Mo and Zhao Min were talking, a pair of eyes were watching their team and drove from the front.

"Action No. 2." A low and discreet voice came from the headset.

The blue wolf responded and slowly started the vehicle. In the four cars, the car that was free behind the team began to accelerate.

"The deputy team, there are vehicles behind to follow up." The driver of the free vehicle glanced at the rearview mirror.

The co-pilot's Black Hawk also glanced at the rearview mirror, his brow wrinkled, and there was no car at the moment. He felt that something was wrong: "When did it appear?"

"The fork just followed up," the driver said.

"The fork just now? This is not a residential area. The average person will not appear here so early." The Black Hawk thought for a while: "Slow down, don't let him get close to the boss's car."

After the order is finished, the Blackhawk picks up the headset.

"Captain, there is a car behind, I will go see the situation."

“Yeah.” Wang Hai, who was sitting in the driving position of Chen Mo’s car, glanced at the rearview mirror and gave a soft voice. He turned his head and said to the co-pilot’s white pearl: “Ready.”

White pearl nodded lightly.

"The other party wants to overtake, don't let him overtake, stop him to see the situation." Black Hawk looked at the car that changed lanes and said.

Their current speed is already very fast, and the other party wants to overtake. It is obviously a bit wrong, like intentional.

"Good." The driver nodded.

Seeing that the free vehicle slowed down, indicating that he was stopping, the blue wolf's mouth was tilted up, and there was no deceleration. One foot accelerator accelerated and slammed up.

boom!

A collision sounded, accompanied by fierce brakes, and the bodyguards in the car were shocked and hurriedly protected.

"The other side is chasing the tail." The driver slammed on the brakes and held the body to stop.

"Control him." The black eagle immediately ordered when the vehicle stopped. Two bodyguards in the back seat immediately rushed out of the car and ran to the rear of the vehicle.

"No. 2 to complete the task."

The blue wolf stopped on the brakes and saw the bodyguard who came over. He took off the headset and went to the seat. He opened the door and went out.

Ruth, standing in a grove, heard the news of the blue wolf and smiled at the corner of her mouth. All the plans are in her grasp.

"No. 3, No. 4 began to move, and the target was rushed into the net. On the 1st, the speed was over and the net was ready."

chapters.title: Chapter 329: : This Is An Attack
chapters.body:
Chapter 329: : This Is An Attack

"Captain, there is a car behind it that suddenly comes up. Look at this speed, I want to overtake."

Wang Haigang wants to contact the Black Hawk, and the voice of the rear bodyguard is heard in the headset. Just after listening to the report, Wang Hai saw the deceleration of the lead car, and did not think much, stepping on the brakes slightly.

"Captain, there is a truck suddenly appearing in the middle of the road, not letting us overtake." The voice of the former car Anan came from the headset.

"There is something wrong with it, let everyone raise the spirit." Wang Hai brows a wrinkle: "Black Hawk, what is the situation on your side?"

"It’s being chased." The voice of the Black Hawk came from the headset: "The other party wants to call the police and is ready to find our theory."

"How can I catch up?"

"The other party said that they rushed to Phoenix North Hospital, and then wanted to overtake. Just when we braked, we ran into it. Now we want to solve the problem."

"There are some things wrong. We also have two suspicious vehicles here. You control the driver and now keep up with us."

Wang Hai immediately realized the embarrassment.

First, the fire, now the Black Hawk's car was dragged again, and the cars appearing in front and behind were acting strangely. He experienced special training and naturally felt that something was wrong.

"What's the matter?" Chen Mo later saw Wang Hai talking, and asked.

"The Black Hawk's car was chased. There is a truck in front of it blocking the road. There is a car behind us. I suspect that this fire is a conspiracy against the boss." Wang Hai said.

"For me?"

"Just guessing it, use the fire to attract the boss. Here is Phoenix North Road. This road is an ordinary two-way single lane. It just allows two cars to pass. Now we are blocked by the road. If there is an ambush, it will definitely be very trouble."

Upon hearing these words, Xiao Yu’s body unconsciously leaned against Chen Mo’s side and seemed to find a sense of security before he could relax.

After Chen Mo listened to Wang Hai’s words, his face also appeared a little cautious. After all, he was encountered in this incident.

On the other hand, the Black Hawk got the command of Wang Hai, looked dignified, and looked at the young driver in front of him: "Control him and keep up with the boss."

"Big brother, can't I call the police? I believe that I will lose money for you. I am in a hurry. My brother's unit is in a fire. He is injured in the hospital. I don't want to, your car suddenly brakes."

Hearing the Blackhawk to search for him, the young driver looked a little panicked.

"A fire broke out?" The Black Hawk looked at it.

"Yes, I will lose money for you. It is my fault to crash. You should not beat me." The young driver said anxiously.

The Black Hawk took a deep look at the young driver in front of him and did not let go: "Catch him."

When I heard this sentence, the young driver’s face changed slightly. The timidity just disappeared and became angry. “Why do you arrest me? Is there any Wang Fa? Don’t think that you are more than I am afraid of you, there is a rear-end collision, you There are also half of the responsibilities. You dare to catch me, I want to tell you to go to jail."

Seeing the bodyguards coming over, the blue wolf eyes flashed and the footsteps subconsciously retreated. The bodyguard who took the lead was much more alert than he had imagined.

At the moment when the bodyguard touched him, the blue wolf eyes condensed, and the backhand grabbed the bodyguard, and the body retreated slightly, turning to the back of the bodyguard to buckle his throat.

Hey!

I didn’t think about it. The blue wolf twisted the neck of the bodyguard and bullied it to the Black Hawk.

Everything happened between the electric and the flint, and the bodyguard did not expect that the green wolf would suddenly take it back, and it was a deadly killing technique until the body's life was lost, still with an incredible color.

The black eagle saw the means of the green wolf fruit, the pupils shrank, his face was dark, his body bowed, his hand raised his hand to block the fist of the blue wolf and hit the throat, and he did not stop his body shape. The black eagle retreated backwards. The knees coming down.

"Damn."
