The blue wolf saw two fatal attacks, all of which were easily blocked, and his face changed slightly. He didn't dare to let the Black Hawk pull away from him, his body tilted, and he punched his waist toward the waist.

He had just discovered that the Black Hawk had a gun in his arms. If he did not hold the Black Hawk close, he could not leave. Nowadays, a lot of filming, so close to the bullets, can not do well, and the other is a professionally trained person.

His mission was to drag the Black Hawk and avoid being suspicious in order to delay more time. He did not carry weapons on his body. It’s just that he didn’t think of Chen Mo’s bodyguard, his alertness was beyond his imagination, and his skill was so terrible that he could easily block his two fatal attacks.

The Black Hawk did not fight and greeted the blue wolf. He used to be a special soldier retired, executed a secret mission, went to the battlefield, and walked through the rain of bullets. It was because of this that Wang Haicai came to him and served as the bodyguard of Chen Mo.

Some time ago, the body has also developed potential. No matter the speed, strength, muscle strength and endurance, it is much stronger than the peak time. Naturally, it is impossible to fear to fight against the blue wolf.

"Notify the captain that this is an attack."

boom!

After Wang Haigang heard the news from the Black Hawk, there was a violent collision. After looking at the rearview mirror, Wang Hai’s face changed.

The rear vehicles have started to collide, and the rear cars are blocking their vehicles near Chen Mo. This is not a car accident, the other party is coming to them.

"This is the attack, Pearl, you are responsible for the safety of the boss and Miss Xiaoyu, Anan, open the road ahead."

Anan, who was driving in the front of the car, listened to Wang Hai’s order and pulled out the pistol on his side and shook the window to the tire.

Oh...

Oh...

A series of gunshots accompanied by a thunderous explosion, the tires on the right rear of the truck in front exploded, the truck was unstable, and it rushed directly into the green belt on the roadside.

"Lutong, speed up the past, first protect the safety of the boss." Wang Hai calmly, glanced at the two cars still colliding behind, one foot throttle began to accelerate.

Chen Mo looked back and looked a little unsightly. He reached out and took the small fishing rod in his arms.

"Look at it."

"Ok."

Xiao Yu also realized that things were wrong, and there was some confusion in his heart. I felt the temperature and breath of Chen Moshen’s uploading, and I was close to Chen Mo’s waist, and I was relieved.

"Put the bulletproof vest." Chen Mo found the bullet-proof vest on the small fishing body from the rear storage box.

"you wear."

"Wear, there is still here." Chen Mo directly put the vest on the small fisherman.

The vehicles are specially made to order, in addition to bulletproof functions, body armor, first aid kits, gas masks, oxygen cylinders and weapons.

"Ink girl, contact Zhao Min."

"Okay, My Brother." The ink girl responded with a holographic video call with Zhao Min.

Zhao Min is now visiting the injured employee in the hospital and waiting for Chen Mo to arrive. The staff dormitory building was on fire, 2 deaths and 11 injuries. This is a major event in human life. As a president, she is the best way to appease people.

Suddenly, the voice of the mobile phone call, let her pause. Seeing Chen Mo’s call, Zhao Min shunned it a little.

"what's wrong?"

"I was attacked by unidentified people on the road. The other party seemed to be premeditated, and the police in Phoenix North came over."

"What?" Zhao Min's face changed greatly. He couldn't think too much. He ran to the side of the Phoenix North Public Security Bureau, Li Dong. "Our boss Chen Mo was attacked on Phoenix North Road and immediately sent people to rescue. Immediately."

Li Dong, who heard the news, changed his face slightly and immediately picked up the walkie-talkie of the policeman next to the case.

"In addition to the personnel who maintain order, all other personnel, all rushed to Phoenix North Road, say it again, all personnel, immediately go to Phoenix North Road."

After that, I left the hospital with Zhao Min.

They all realized that I am afraid that this fire is directed against Chen Mo, otherwise it would not be so smart and was attacked on the road of Chen Molai.

If Chen Mo is here, his official career is over, and ten of them are not as important as a Chen Mo.

As soon as the order fell, all the police officers near Phoenix North left the sirens and left, so that the reporters who were broadcasting live reports were slightly stunned and watched the direction of the police car leaving.

Everyone is still stunned, why the police car suddenly left the hospital. Some journalists who smelled the news immediately drove up.

On the other side, Ruth, standing by the edge of the grove, is listening to the report. Now Chen Mo's car is like a small fish that they are chasing along the stream. Just rushing him to the net, it is much easier to catch him.

Seeing Chen Mo’s car appear in the field of vision, Ruth’s face smiled: “Close the net.”

chapters.title: Chapter 330: : Gunshots In The Woods (Third More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 330: : Gunshots In The Woods (Third More)

Anan sat on the co-pilot and looked dignified, including the bodyguards in the back seat and the driver next to him. His face was very dignified.

They have all determined that this is an attack against Chen Mo.

"Everyone pays attention to whether there is an ambush around and cheers up."

Originally, the bodyguards of ordinary people could not carry guns. It was only that Chen Mo’s identity was special, and their special status before retiring, so Li Chengzhi gave them special rights after giving them potential drugs.

"The vice team, there is a car in front." The driver next to him, Anan naturally saw that an off-road vehicle was rushing towards them.

Looking at the muscles of the car, the bloodthirsty smile, Anan changed his face, hurriedly out of the window, and pulled the trigger against the muscle man in the driver's seat.

Seeing this scene, the muscular brawny twitched and hurriedly leaned over and stepped on the gas pedal and ran into the front car.

"Jumping, let him hit."

Seeing the desperate muscle man, Anan's face changed slightly. Pressing the seat belt and opening the door smoothly, jumping down the roadside, other bodyguards saw the situation is not good, but also hurriedly opened the door and jumped out.

They can rush into the green belt to avoid the collision with the other side, but Chen Mo's car is not far behind them. If they dodge, the car will directly rush to Chen Mo's car, so this collision can not escape.

The muscular brawny saw them jumping, showing a sneer, and quickly opened the door and jumped.

boom!

The loud noise of the collision between the two cars shook the quiet morning.

"Damn, the captain, there is a heavy truck in front." Anan, who fell off the green belt, saw the rear of the two cars colliding, and the pupils shrank. Behind the buggy, there was a heavy truck rushing towards them.

"I saw it." Wang Hai at the rear saw the change in the front and his face was very ugly.

From the beginning to the end, less than ten minutes, a series of movements, the other party is fully prepared. First, use the fire to induce Chen Mo to go to Phoenix North, and then ambush here.

Look at this situation, this heavy card is trying to hit them.

The black eagle looked at the body of the young driver in front of him, and his look was very dignified. From the perspective of the opponent's decisiveness, it is a professionally trained agent. All moves are the most vulnerable places to attack the human body. Even if they are punched, they will lose their fighting power. Fortunately, they have been solved.

"The boss is out of the situation, hurry up now to support." The black eagle said to the sideguard.

"it is good."

It was too late to deal with the body of another bodyguard, and the two rushed to their car.

Oh...

The roar of the engine caused the black eagle to change its face. When looking to the rear, the pupils shrank. A heavy truck is rushing towards them. This speed does not mean to stop.

"All leave the car here."

The Black Hawk saw a bad situation and hurried to the side.

Rumble...

The huge impact sound made everyone's face change, and then their car was hit into the green belt on the side of the road. The heavy truck has also grown.

In the car, the young man took the earphones and glanced at the rearview mirror. The evil charm smiled: "The bumper car is also good."

At the same time, Wang Hai looked at the heavy truck that rushed over, and rushed the steering wheel to pull the handbrake, and the drift turned to the front of the car and accelerated back.

"Captain, there was a heavy truck behind and it crashed. Our car was destroyed and we were trying to catch up."

Wang Hai, who just returned, heard the report of the Black Hawk, his face changed, and looked around: "The boss, the front and rear roads are broken, the other two heavy trucks, the car is not safe, we need to get off to the side The woods, waiting for support."

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded.

If the other person wants his life, he will not be able to rush to the other side. I don’t have to think about it now, the fire is just to lead him out.

"Pearls, protect the boss and get out of the woods."

"understand."

The white pearl untied the seat belt, the car just stopped, the white pearl jumped out of the car, took out a suitcase and opened it, and the bulletproof board fell, completing a simple shield and protecting the door.

“First protect the small fishing and get off the bus.” Chen Mo patted the back of Xiao Yu and opened the door.

"I want to go with you." Xiao Yu holding Chen Mo's arm, his face is somewhat white.

"it is good."

Looking at Xiao Yu's pale face, Chen Mo couldn't bear it. Xiao Yu is just an ordinary girl. He has never encountered such a thing. Now he must be scared. No matter who it is, this kind of thing happens to oneself and certainly cannot be calm.

"Don't worry, it will be fine."

Appease the small fishing, the two are also under the cover of white pearls, into the woods of the green belt.

Bang!

The heavy truck in front slammed into the two cars and rushed over here. Wang Hai changed his face and raised his gun at the driver's seat.

Seeing the gun in the hands of Wang Hai, the white man in the driver's seat couldn't think of it and hurriedly leaned down.

Hey!

I felt the bullets rubbed from the top of my head, and the white man’s face felt numb. In advance, they did not have complete information about the bodyguards around Chen Mo. I didn’t expect Chen Mo to have such a strong person around him. The shooting method was so accurate.

If you just take a step back, it is now estimated to see God.

There was too much sigh, too, and the white man quickly looked up and looked at the road ahead, controlling the steering wheel and hitting the place where Wang Hai was.

Bang! !

Feeling a huge earthquake, the heavy truck collided with Chen Mo’s car. He saw that Chen Mo had entered the grove, so he was not worried that the target would be killed.

The next moment, the white man untied his seat belt and picked up the gun at hand and fired in the direction of Wang Hai jumping out.

Da da da……

Hey! !

After two shots, the white man felt a sharp pain in his shoulder, his face changed greatly, and he hurriedly retracted his body and jumped out to the other side of the door.

"Damn, the gunmanship is so accurate." The white man looked at the wound at the shoulder, sucked his mouth and said cold air, and said to the headset: "Flies, is there no?"

"Oh, oh, it’s getting faster, this game is very exciting. On the way I just came, I found that the nasty stuff was going to see God, it’s really bad.” On another heavy truck, the young man with headphones With a look of excitement, the two cars that were scrapped on the side of the road turned over: "The bumper car is really enjoyable, oh, it seems that the black cat is also a ghost."

"Don't underestimate the enemy, Chen Mo's bodyguards are more difficult to deal with than we think. I ate a peanut, just like being ***." The white man bit his teeth and glanced at the wound.

"Hey, hey, you are very bad, go back to your own broken chrysanthemum, try this feeling." End the call, the youth speed up.

Wang Hai’s face is more dignified than ever, and the other side has a rifle. This is the most troublesome: “Anan, what is the situation on your side?”

"The fire is a bit fierce. The **** muscular man has two rifles in his hand and one player is injured."

"Let other people enter the woods, protect the boss, drag them, the other person does not seem to be much." Wang Hai issued an order, other uninsured bodyguards, quickly rushed into the woods.

Chen Mo is now at the side of the white pearl, with a gun in his hand. The small fisherman is sandwiched between the two, holding Chen Mo’s other hand tightly. Only in this way can he find a sense of security.

"Ink girl, will drive the car at home to rescue." Chen Mo said with a mobile phone.

"Okay, Mom, brother." said the ink girl.

After finishing the ink girl, Chen Mocai turned to look at the small fishing.

Xiao Yu is just an ordinary girl who lives a quiet life. There are not many demands. I have never encountered such a big change. If you switch to another girl, you may be scared to cry when you encounter this kind of attack. Although Xiaoyu is pale, he is still calm.

Chen Mo touched Xiaoying’s pale face.

"Don't worry, the police in Phoenix North are now coming over, and the journey takes no more than fifteen minutes. As long as you persist for a while, it will be fine soon."

"Yeah." The small fishing heavy focus, some panic hearts settled a lot.

Suddenly, Xiao Yu’s eyes were inadvertently glanced, and the panic on his face slowly enlarged.

Ruth had a relaxed smile at the moment, and the gun in her hand had already aimed at the back of the white pearl. Just want to pull the trigger, Ruth's smile is a stiff. Xiaoyu found her, and the two were already on the eye. She saw panic in her eyes.

The next moment, Ruth's mouth tilted slightly, and the muzzle in her hand turned.

"Chen Mo, be careful."

Seeing the muzzle turning around, Xiaoyu has lost his ability to think, and he has forgotten the danger of coming, instinctively rushing toward Chen Mo.

boom!

A gunshot sounded through the grove.

chapters.title: Chapter 331: : Small Fishing Gun
chapters.body:
Chapter 331: : Small Fishing Gun

Hearing the sound of gunshots and small fishing, the white pearl changed his face and turned back. He pointed to the back of the gunshot, and whether or not he hit it, he hurriedly protected Chen Mo behind the big tree with a bulletproof board.

She wants to rush, but reason tells him that Chen Mo’s safety is the most important. She can’t leave Chen Mo’s side. She did not expect that the ambush in this small forest was their back hand.

"Small fishing, wake up, small fishing..."

Suddenly, Chen Mo’s face changed dramatically, and he saw a small fish that fell in his arms. His brain exploded and his body trembled. The brain, which has always been calm, lost its sense of proportion at this moment and became confused.

"Small fishing, small fishing..."

"Cough and cough..."

The little fish in his arms seemed to hear the call, and coughed a few times to open his eyes. Seeing Xiao Yu woke up, Chen Mo almost fell into tears, panic brain, and finally there was a trace of calm.

"Husband, I am so hurt."

"It will be fine, it will be fine soon."

Chen Mo grabbed Xiao Yu’s hand, just like the porcelain doll that he had recovered. He was afraid that it would be bad if he tried a little hard.

"Husband, will I die?"

"Don't say stupid things, you hurt your shoulders, not fatal injuries, just a pain, the bullets are taken out and it's okay."

"Hus husband, didn't you lie to me?"

"No deception, I have never lied to a small fisherman."

Chen Mo said cautiously, his heart was infinitely angry, but the talent in front of him was the most important, and he could only bear it first.

"Ok."

Xiao Yu showed a weak smile.

......

Hearing the gunshots from the woods, Wang Hai’s face changed slightly. He has experienced countless battles, he is very calm, it is the kind of calm, so that he can come back alive in various dangerous tasks. At this moment, he began to panic. If Chen Mo had an accident, the consequences would be unimaginable.

The meaning of Chen Mo is not comparable to that of ordinary people. He may decide the future of China's science and technology. If something goes wrong, it will be the loss of the whole of China.

As the captain of the security team around Chen Mo, Chen Mo did not protect him. The biggest responsibility is him. He did not expect that the other party would ambush in the woods, it seems to be accurate, they will enter.

"Pearl, what happened inside?" Wang Haigang wanted to rush out of the bunker and was forced to come back.

"There is an ambush, Miss Xiaoyu shot, need to be treated quickly." White pearl face unprecedented weight: "There seems to be only one person, there is no other ambush temporarily uncertain."

"The cover boss and Miss Xiaoyu have withdrawn." Wang Hai shouted at the headset: "Others are going to support."

Xiao Yu was injured. He was able to understand Chen Mo’s current mood. If something happened, things would be troublesome. Now it is necessary to solve the threat outside quickly and let the boss and the small fish safely withdraw.

Hey... Hey!

Hearing an empty noise, Wang Haiyi hi, did not hesitate to stand up and fire at the position of the white man.

"Fak..."

The white man hurried back to the back of the truck. Wang Hai's precise shooting method, he has already experienced it, do not want to appreciate it again.

"Hell, no bullets. Flies, when are you coming? Ruth has already started, but then, you are waiting to collect the corpse from Laozi." Through the mirror, I saw Wang Haichao rushing out of him, the white man 瞳孔一Shrink.

"Don't worry, the courier has been delivered, please check it out."

The young man on the heavy truck saw Wang Hai, who was rushing toward the white man. He smiled and kicked the gas pedal and slammed into the position where the two men were.

Wang Hai’s face changed slightly, and he shot two shots into the cab and hurriedly jumped away.

Rumble...

Wang Hai’s bunker, the car that Chen Mo took, was hit five meters away, accompanied by a brake, the scene fell into a short quiet state.

"Damn, flies, do you want to kill Laozi?" The white man climbed up from the ground and glared at the young man.

"You should thank your grandfather for saving you. This guy is very dangerous. Dragging him, Ruth has succeeded and is coming out." The young man threw a rifle to the white man, and he was afraid of swaying.

He felt a sense of danger in Wang Hai, which was the first time he felt this way. Just now Wang Haina had two shots. If he didn't evade in advance, I am afraid that his life is now accounted for.

Re-finding the bunker, Wang Hai's face is extremely ugly, and now my heart is anxious. The battle that was just about to end is interrupted by the sudden heavy card. Now there is another person, more trouble.

There was danger in the boss, the Black Hawk couldn’t catch it, Anan didn’t respond, and the back bodyguards couldn’t come over. The situation is a bit dangerous now. You must solve the problem of leaving the two people so that the boss can safely withdraw.

It was very lively outside and it was not calm in the woods.

"Boss, let's take Miss Xiaoyu to leave here first." White Pearl got the order from Wang Hai and immediately spoke.

Now there is no other ambush in the woods. The other side is attacking them here. It is definitely prepared. It can be said that it is more dangerous than outside.

"it is good."

Chen Mo picked up a small fisherman and looked a little anxious. Now Xiaoyu needs to be treated quickly.

"It's really troublesome."

Seeing the white pearls and Chen Mo ready to leave, Ruth looked cold and took out three table tennis-sized smoke bombs from the waist and pulled them away at the location where Chen Mo was.

The thick smoke filled the surroundings with an instant, and the horizon was also in a white.

The white pearl changed his face and protected Chen Mo. He continued to retreat: "Leave this smoke." The other party put a smoke bomb at this time, not to cover their whereabouts, but more likely to limit their horizons.

Chen Mo did not hesitate, picked up a small fisherman and rushed out of the smoke.

Hey!

The two just wanted to leave the smoke range, and the gunshots behind them rang again. The white pearls snorted and fell to the ground, with pain on his face, apparently shot.

"It really doesn't make people worry. It seems that this gadget is still a bit useful."

A cold voice appeared in Chen Mo's ear. Turning his head, he saw a black hole with a muzzle pointing at him. He was a woman with a gun, a special pair of glasses, and a soft smile on his lips.

"I don't want to kill you, let me go." The woman lost her glasses and said in standard Chinese: "Otherwise I can only use it."

"Your goal is me, can I let her down first?"

Chen Mo holds a small fisherman, and there is anger in his voice, but this time he knows that he must endure. The other party carefully planned, no doubt, the goal is him. If this happens, the other party is likely to hurt the small fish.

Ruth looked at Chen Mohuai’s Xiaoyu and said, “Is this your little lover? You have to say, it’s brave. Yes, you can cooperate with it. If you play tricks, I don’t mind letting your little lover go first. Hell is waiting for you."

"You are here waiting for the rescue." Chen Mo gently put down the small fishing in his arms.

"But what do you do? Cough and cough..." Seeing that Chen Mo was hijacked, Xiao Yu became confused, and his already pale face was bloodless, as if he would be unconscious at any time.

"I will be fine." Chen Mo slowly stood up and said with a sigh: "They are not asking for my life."

"You must not have something." Xiao Yu tears rushing down.

"Let's go." Ruth's palm rested on Chen Mo's shoulder and slowly left the smoke.

"do not move."

Just outside the smoke, two bodyguards who just rushed into the grove, saw Ruth and Chen Mo coming out of the smoke, their faces changed a lot, and there was a hint of jealousy in their eyes.

"Oh, you try my gun fast, or your guns are fast." Ruth posted behind Chen Mo, with Chen Mo as the shield, facing two bodyguards: "Let's leave the road, otherwise I don't guarantee, will Will not accidentally kill your boss."

Chen Mo's face was a bit ugly. Looking at the two bodyguards, he said in an unquestionable tone: "You retreat, the small fishermen and the pearls are shot, and they are sent to the hospital."

The two bodyguards hesitated and slowly retreated to the side, but their attention was still on Ruth.

"now it's right."

Ruth carefully walked out of the woods on the shoulders of Chen Mo.

chapters.title: Chapter 332: : Hijacked
chapters.body:
Chapter 332: : Hijacked

Outside the grove.

Wang Hai saw that Chen Mo was taken out by a woman and his face changed dramatically. The most worrying thing still happened. Now Chen Mo is in the hands of the other party. They will start to shoot the mouse.

"What is your purpose? How much does it cost?" said Wang Hai with a black face.

"It’s not the money to ask for money. We don’t have to think about delaying time. We have some small obstacles on the road. The police are not so coming.” Ruth said with a sneer, turning to look at the young man: "What about other people?"

"There was a dead man and the black cat was dead. The big man didn't respond. It is estimated that he also saw God." The young man shrugged and said.

"go."

Ruth's face was a bit ugly, and the price seemed to be bigger than she expected.

"it is good."

The young man hurriedly opened the heavy-duty container and climbed in. After a while, an off-road vehicle came out of the container and stopped in front of Ruth: "The sound of this car, you listen, like a tiger roaring, go back to me. Also buy one."

"Go in."

Ruth has become accustomed to the nonsense of the youth, and will launch Chen Mo into the car and grow away.

Seeing that the three men left with Chen Mo, Wang Hai’s face was gloomy and watery, but he was helpless: “Black Hawk, what about your side?”

"Just stopped a passing car, is going back to your side." On the way, the black eagle face was ugly. The boss was attacked and they couldn’t do anything, leaving him with no anger.

"The boss has been hijacked and is going back to you. It is a red Land Rover, no license plate."

"The boss is being held hostage?" The black eagle's face changed completely: "I stopped them."

"Don't push too tightly, lest the other dog jump over the wall, the boss will be in danger, and the boss must be safe."

"it is good."

......

"hurry up."

On the other hand, Zhao Min was anxious like an ant on a hot pot.

Chen Mo was attacked. Now the situation is unknown. The phone has not responded. The police car is moving so slowly that she can only be anxious and every second is suffering.

Not only is Zhao Min, but the head of the Public Security Bureau, Li Dong, is also anxious. If Chen Mo has an accident within his jurisdiction, that is his responsibility, and the trouble is certainly not small.

"Accelerate the speed." Li Dong is also constantly urging.

The police officer driving the police car subconsciously stepped on the gas pedal to speed up. Just came all the way, encountered a lot of obstacles, no way to fast, the leading police car, a few tires.

When Zhao Min was anxious, the caller tone made her wake up, and it didn't appear to be electrically displayed.

"Chen Mo?"

"President, I am Wang Hai, the boss has been tied up." Wang Hai's voice carries a heavy blame.

"What?" The news, Zhao Min's face was pale and the voice was a bit hysterical: "What about the gangsters?"

"Running, now Miss Xiaoyu is shot, need to be treated quickly."

boom!

The news came one after another, which made Zhao Min feel that his brain was blown up and almost fainted. Chen Mo was robbed, a small fisherman, two news, for her, it is undoubtedly a blue sky. She knows what Xiaoyu means to Chen Mo. She can't imagine that if Xiao Yu had an accident, Chen Mo would be rescued and would not know what crazy things would be done.

"We will arrive soon, Xiaoyu must not be in trouble." Zhao Min's voice was a little panic: "Director Li, Chen Mo was taken away by the criminals, and immediately pursued."

Li Dong’s face changed: “I immediately contacted the special police squadron and asked them to send a helicopter to hunt down and block the city from the city.”

......

At the same time that Chen Mo was taken off the bus, two light curtains appeared in the laboratory of the 1st floor of the marching ant company.

"The target is successfully positioned, the satellite is being invaded, the satellite system is successfully invaded, the location is locked, and the tracking is successful. The Skynet system is successfully invaded and the city brain is successfully invaded."

Soon, two light curtains popped up. The image above is the satellite image of the vehicle where Chen Mo is located, as well as the monitoring screen of the Tiantian system and the traffic conditions at various intersections.

On a road in Binhai City, three unmanned vehicles carrying intelligent robots immediately turned around and accelerated toward the position of Chen Mo’s vehicle.

In the car, Ruth tightened Chen Mo's hands with a tie and took Chen Mo's mobile phone from her pocket. After confirming that Chen Mo had no positioning device, she would throw the phone away and sit quietly.

Chen Mo, who was found out of the mobile phone, blinked.

In the grove, he had already let the ink girl lock his position and drive the car out to rescue him.

In non-special times, he will never use these means. In this case, he must use all the means he can use to protect his own safety. Now Ruth has thrown away his cell phone and other things, and I don't know if the ink girl can still determine his position.

At this time, Chen Mo, sitting between the white man and Ruth, was held by two people.

When the white man and Wang Hai shot, two shots in the body, the situation is not very good, his face is a bit pale, because of excessive bleeding, now a little weak, it seems innocent.

Chen Mo looked at the saber of the white man's waist without leaving a trace, and immediately regained his eyes and thought about the way to escape.

Fire and ambush, this group of people calculated very accurately, and they were unpredictable and beat them by surprise.

The other party did not hurt him, indicating that the other party is not going to kill his own life, and watching their actions well-trained is certainly not as simple as a normal kidnapping.

Thinking for a while, Chen Mo took a deep breath. Although Xiao Yu was injured, he was full of anger, but now he can only press and force him to calmly say: "Who are you? I don't seem to provoke you, why kidnapped me?"

"You are so smart, this question is stupid. Do you think we will tell you our identity? You need a reason to kidnap? Money, technology, whatever is the reason?" The young man driving the car smirked.

"Do you want technology or money? I can give it to you."

"When we get to our place, you will naturally know that we want technology or money." Ruth looked at Chen Mo and said.

"You can't escape."

"You can't escape, it's not what you said. Now you can keep calm. I admire your courage. Others are in this situation, and they are scared." Ruth did not speak Chen Mo. Put it in your heart.

"Now the city has been blocked. No matter which way, you can't escape from the coastal city."

"Impossible? Sorry, we are taking the waterway."

The young man is proud of laughing.

"I'm not sure that the customs are waiting for you at the dock now. Now let me go, tell me behind the scenes, I can give you a sum of money, or the technology you want. Otherwise, you won't get anything."

"Oh, huh, don't dream. We died three talents caught, a lot of thoughts were abolished, and I thought about the money all the time." The young man laughed.

Chen Mo no longer speaks, the other party seems to be unable to enter the oil and salt, and he is not likely to put anything out of the other party's mouth.

Rumble...

The young man just finished talking, a violent vibration, let the car almost out of control, this moment, Ruth and other people face a big change. Just turned back, I saw a car in the rear, and the lights had been crushed.

"Hell, when did this car appear?" Ruth's face was ugly, and according to the plan, they couldn't catch up so quickly.

"It's the few bodyguards who are forced to drag on." The young man's face is also a bit gloomy: "They have a master in the car, and they are forced to be killed. I didn't expect to wait for us here."

"Hell." Ruth just wanted to reach back and fight back, and then there was a huge shock from the body, which made her have to return.

"I will kill them."

The weak white man sat up straight, revealing a sly smile, grabbed the rifle at hand, and opened the window to reach out.

The black eagle of the rear car driver saw the white man sticking out his head, his eyes cold, and he had been waiting for a long time, aiming at the white man's arm and not hesitating to shoot.

boom! what……

The gunshots were mixed with screams. In the car, the white man licked his arm and sweated on his forehead, his face paler.

"Grandma's, so accurate shots."

Seeing that the white man was stained with red blood, the young man was cold.

Today, Wang Hai, who he met, shot two shots and almost died. Now the man’s shooting method seems to be more accurate than that of Wang Hai. A shot in the car, directly abolish the arm of the fast gunner, Chen Mo's bodyguard, in the end are some people.

Ruth had a cold sweat on her forehead. She just wanted to go out and fight back. If she did, I am afraid she is now a dead body.

"Crashing over," said the Black Hawk.

"Okay." The driver next to him stepped on the gas pedal and ran into the other side.

Oh...

Repeated collisions caused several people in the car to feel severe vibrations.

"Play with my bumper car? See if I don't kill you."

"Now when playing a lot, our goal is to Chen Mo, get rid of them, can't let them keep following." Ruth said with a black face.

They are not many people now, and the other party is a master of guns. They are dragged here. It is very dangerous for the other party to confront each other. When the police in China come over, no one can escape.

"You are lucky." The young man stepped on the gas pedal and accelerated quickly. He picked up a bag from the small box next to him and handed it to Ruth: "Use this to get rid of them."

"You prepared this too?" Ruth saw the things in the bag, and her face was happy.

"It’s a habit to escape, a little practical experience, and it’s a bit of a hand."

chapters.title: Chapter 333: : This Is Unmanned (Third More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 333: : This Is Unmanned (Third More)

The black eagle looked at the car in front and looked dignified.

Now Chen Mo is in the car and must rescue Chen Mo. Otherwise, once Chen Mo is taken away, their situation will be more troublesome.

He couldn't force it to stop, and he didn't dare to shoot in the car, afraid of hurting Chen Mo. This can only continue to create pressure on the other side, and not let the other side despair, lest the other dog jumped into the wall.

From this attack, it can be confirmed that there are not many people in the other side. Now there are three people in the car. As long as there is an opportunity, he has the confidence to solve the three.

Suddenly, the Black Hawk looked at him, and he saw that the speed of the other party seemed to be a lot faster.

"The vice captain, the other side accelerated," the driver next to him said.

"Accelerate to catch up and press them."

"Okay." The driver's bodyguard nodded, stepping on the gas pedal and speeding up.

Suddenly, a few people changed their faces. They saw more than twenty black things, flying out of the window and scattered on the road.

"Brake." The Black Hawk hurriedly spoke, but the speed was too fast, and it was too late.

Hey!

A muffled sound caused the vehicle's giant earthquake to lose control. With the sudden sound of the brakes, the car directly hit the green belt on the side of the road.

"It's a triangle nail!"

Several people saw a few triangular studs embedded in the tires, and their faces were dark. I didn't expect the other to carry them.

"Notify the police, the gangster who hijacked the boss, has left Phoenix North Road, is a red Land Rover, no license plate." Black eagle slammed on the front cover of the car, can only helplessly look at each other's car far Go, this is the second time today.

"Get rid of it."

In the car, Ruth breathed a sigh of relief and relaxed a lot.

The black eagle's shooting method has given her a lot of pressure. If she can't get rid of it, her task will be a little troublesome.

Chen Mo did not speak, just the car, he can guess that it is a black eagle. The Black Hawk used to be a sniper of the army. The shooting method is more accurate than that of Wang Hai. Only the Black Hawk can be so confident that it hurts this white man.

Now that the Black Hawk is smashed, you can only rely on yourself.

Chen Mo did not leave a trace and glanced at the saber of the white man's waist, quickly regained his gaze and closed his eyes.

He was thinking about ways to escape. If the ink woman could not determine his position and brought a smart robot, he could only escape on his own. It’s really a problem to be caught by these people. From all kinds of signs, the other party is definitely not asking for money.

Seeing Chen Mo's eyes closed, Ruth stopped talking and ended, but he still did not say anything.

Chen Mo’s calmness made her feel a little unusual. But in her opinion, Chen Mo is just a researcher with no hands and no strength. Now that his hands are tied, it is good to stay calm.

Shaking his head, Ruth is more willing to believe that she wants more: "How is the situation of the fast gunner?"

"Can't die, but the situation is not good, the hand is abolished." The voice of the white man, with anger in the weak, the blood has been dyed red.

"After boarding the ship, take out the bullets and speed up." Ruth snorted and began to pay attention to the movement behind: "How long does it take to get to the destination?"

Before Chen Mo was sent away from China, it was not safe for her. It is now that the Binhai City police have not locked their position. Before they are locked in their position, it is safe to send Chen Mo to the ship.

"About ten minutes." The young man looked at the navigation map and said.

"I speed up, I always feel a little wrong." Ruth frowned. Chen Mo is already in their car, but she is still not at ease.

Booming...

When Ruth’s words just fell, the roar of the engine was introduced into the ears of two people, from far to near.

The voice gave the two people a slight glimpse and hurriedly looked back. I saw a red super-running, approaching them quickly.

"Do you keep up?"

唠叨 Young face is a little cautious, is not paying attention to the movement of super-running from the rearview mirror.

"It shouldn't be, maybe it's just people on the street, they can't know our route." Ruth decided to shake her head.

"It has to overtake, what should I do?"

"Let it go over, take a look." Ruth tightened the gun in her hand.

The young man also picked up the pistol and his attention was on the super run.

At this time, the two people are like a bird of surprise. If Chen Mo’s bodyguards come up again, their situation becomes very troublesome. The other party knows their location, which means that the coastal city police know their location.

Seeing that the super-running passed by, there was no attack, and the two men put a lot of heart.

"How do I feel that something is wrong?" The young man said a little strangely. He felt that the car just now seemed to be missing something.

"where?"

The young man looked at the super-running in front and thought about it. Suddenly his face changed slightly. He couldn’t think of other things. He slammed on the brakes and let all the people in the car hit the chair in front.

"What happened?" The sudden change made Ruth nervous.

"The other side is rushing to brake, it is to rescue." The young man clenched the steering wheel, and the emergency brake that just ran over, almost let him hit it.

Ruth glanced at Chen Mo, who was next to him, and found that Chen Mo did not have the same feeling, and he turned his attention to the super-run in front.

"Crashed..."

Hey! Ruth’s words had not been finished yet, and huge crashes and brakes came from the rear, and several people in the car slammed into the back of the chair.

"There is a car behind."

The young man glanced at the rearview mirror, his face was extremely ugly, and the front and rear pinch, meaning their car had been locked.

"Do you have a positioning device on your body?" Ruth glared at Chen Mo. There are cars chasing now, meaning their location is exposed. The only possibility is that Chen Mo has a positioning device.

"Would you like me to take off? Light to show you?" Chen Mo looked at the super-run in front, and the sound was still calm. He knows that the car controlled by the ink girl has arrived.

"If I find that you have a positioning device on your body, you will be born to die, don't think I don't dare to move..."

Ruth reached out and touched Chen Mo.

Hey!

Ruth was inexhaustible, and the words had not been finished yet. The rear car ran into it again, and the people in the car stunned.

The youth always pay attention to the movements of the two cars. The two cars seem to have telepathy. Once they enter and retreat, they are perfectly matched and at the same speed, sandwiching him in the middle.

He wants to speed up the front car, the two cars will accelerate at the same time, the rear car will crash, forcing him to slow down and control the car. As soon as he slowed down and prepared to open the back door, the two cars would follow the deceleration, and they could not reach it completely. He wanted to vomit blood, but his car did not run faster. The two cars are like two wolves, occasionally coming over and taking a bite, then pushing them away quickly, making him very uncomfortable.

"Open a little, I kill the people behind."

Ruth was hit and uncomfortable, grabbing the rifle at hand and aiming at the cab of the rear vehicle. Seeing the empty driver's seat, Ruth's face changed and seemed to realize what.

"This is unmanned."

Hey...Boom...Boom!

When Ruth just shouted out, she was covered up by the friction between the tires and the ground. With the sound of the collision, the car instantly turned over. The young man slammed into the steering wheel. He didn't expect that the super-running in front suddenly braked, and he was caught off guard, hitting it, and the car behind him hit their car.

Ruth, who had just stepped out, almost didn't faint in the collision, her arm hit the window, and the rifle in her hand was knocked off.

The white man was already weak and was hit by such a collision. He slammed into the front chair and touched the wound on his body and fainted. Chen Mo did not expect that the super-running in front would be a sudden brake, let them chase the tail, almost fell from the car to the front of the car, but fortunately fast, the body just hit the back of the car seat.

Sitting firmly on the body, Chen Mozhen's dizzy head, seeing the two people who are also in a state of compulsion, backhand pull out the saber of the white man's waist, straight into the heart of the woman next to him.

Chen Mo's movements were done in one go, letting Ruth, who had just recovered from dizziness, change his face, subconsciously opening the door, leaning back and avoiding Chen Mo's attack.

One hit, Chen Mo backhand stabbed Ruth's thigh. Ruth didn't think that Chen Mo's movement was so fast, completely beyond her imagination, and she saw the situation is not good, hurriedly loosened the legs supporting the body and rolled out from the door.

The young man in the driver's seat wakes up and grabs the gun that falls on his hand. Chen Mo did not dare to stay, his legs slammed and rushed out to the door opened by Ruth.

chapters.title: Chapter 334: :Kill
chapters.body:
Chapter 334: :Kill

Seeing that Chen Mo jumped out of the car behind her, Ruth looked cold. Did not wait for him to stand still, the right hand changed his claws into a fist, straight to Chen Mo's abdomen.

boom!

Under the circumstance, Chen Mo suffered from pain and stepped back in two steps.

The attack did not achieve the desired results, leaving Ruth a glimpse. In her subjective consciousness, the researcher should be the kind of scholar who has no power to use his hands, wear heavy eyes and concentrate on research.

Just now her attack was afraid that Chen Mo would be hurt too much, so the control force did not expect Chen Mo to be like nothing.

After the blasphemy, Ruth did not stop, his right foot slammed, hit the whip leg, and took Chen Mo waist.

If this foot is swept, it is enough for ordinary people to lose their resistance. Chen Mo did not dare to support the big, the tied hands were tight, blocking the calf swept over.

The successive attacks were blocked, and Ruth sank and sank again. The next attack was all escaping by Chen Mo, and Ruth's face changed completely.

Chen Mo is known as the era giant, and his research and development capabilities can be compared to several R & D teams. Because Chen Mo took the label of science and technology personnel, Chen Mo’s force was automatically ignored during the investigation.

Unexpectedly, Chen Mo has outstanding ability in research and development, but also has a good skill.

She remembered Chen Mo’s two knives. If she was hesitant, Chen Mo would have her life. Now she has escaped her own attacks. She needs to know that she is a professionally trained agent who has been easily attacked by a nerd who is studying science and technology, and Chen Mo’s hands are still tied without being unlocked.

From Chen Mo's reaction, he has the skills of those who are not inferior to their professional training.

In the attack on Ruth, Chen Mo half-blocked.

After the development of potential, there are only a handful of actual combat fights, because it is not necessary, and he will not be able to fight. But for the fighting skills, he did not let go, after all, this is the ability to save lives at a critical moment. When there is occasional air fitness, Wang Hai will be trained.

Only now that his hands are not unlocked, he can't let go, he can only be in a passive beating situation.

boom!

Blocking the woman's heavy stroke, Chen Mo's face was full. This time, dodge, let the other side appear a neutral, Chen Mo does not retreat, and turned back to Ruth a straight kick.

Chen Mo’s sudden counterattack made Ruth’s face change and hurriedly raised his hand to block the key. The next second, she felt a huge force coming from Chen Mo’s leg and slamming into her arm.

boom!

The collision between the two allowed Ruth to step back a few steps before standing still. The arm trembled slightly, and in the previous collision, she ate a dark loss.

At this time, the look of Chen Mo has completely changed.

She felt that she had paid enough attention, but found that she still underestimated Chen Mo. The blow just now is not inferior to the attack of professional fighting masters.

Chen Mo did not fight, and now his hands are still tied. The guy in the car has a gun in his hand. He doesn't have to be very hard. Now that he is not making a movie, he still can't do it with an enemy two, and he is a professionally trained agent.

"Want to run?"

Ruth’s numb arm quickly caught up. Without running a few steps, she stopped her body shape. She saw two robots coming down from the car that had just hit them and kept Chen Mo behind.

"The two robots, is your rescue?"

Oh...

Her words just fell, the roar of an engine came, I saw an unmanned large car rushed over and stopped at Chen Mo.

One by one, the intelligent robots came down from the RV, about twenty, and they were protected by Chen Mo. The eyes of all the intelligent robots fell on Ruth, and the scene was in a strange silence.

"It seems that there are not only two."

After letting the robot cut off the tie that tied the hand, Chen Mo looked at Ruth coldly.

"I thought that a few nanny robots can't stop us? Let's leave with us, don't kill you." Looking at the cold robot, Ruth's eyes flashed a hint of jealousy.

She suddenly remembered that Chen Mo was called Huaxia's 'Iron Man' and controlled the world's most advanced artificial intelligence technology and intelligent robots. The drones just now, as well as the current robots, seem to be reasonable, but it all happened before her eyes, she still can't accept it.

The task was almost completely successful. I didn't expect Chen Mo to escape at the most critical time. He also summoned a large group of intelligent robots.

The artificial intelligence that Chen Mo has mastered has reached the point where it can automatically judge and implement rescue missions.

Thinking of this, Ruth was in the cold.

However, fortunately, these robots are just ordinary butler robots. Although the action is very flexible, there is no way to compete with humans.

"You can try." Chen Mo said coldly.

The young man who just climbed out of the car and saw Chen Mo, who was protected by the robot group, couldn’t help but swallow.

smart robot.

The marching ant company has the most advanced intelligent robots, as long as people who follow the news know. But this kind of scene, only seen in science fiction movies, is now living in front of him.

The blue eyes seem a bit cold and weird, without any emotion. Staring at more than twenty robots, people feel a sense of chilling.

Human beings fear the unknown instinct, even if they are always timid, they are not emboldened at the moment.

Ruth’s eyes are uncertain.

The intelligent robots of the marching ant company, they have seen and even played. The robot will do housework, massage, chat, and eat healthy, encyclopedic, gentle and enjoyable.

Now I see smart robots, similar to the robots listed on the marching ant company, but the color and shape are somewhat changed, and the combat power should not be high.

Thinking of it, Ruth came up.

Chen Mo must seize, otherwise it will be difficult to find this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

As soon as she moved, the two robots left the team around Chen Mo and stopped her. Seeing the slow movement of the robot, Ruth smiled coldly and turned the fist into a claw, grabbing the robot's arm.

Just catching the robot's hand, the face changed dramatically. She felt a strong current coming from the palm of the robot, and half of the body was stiff. At this moment, she realized the trouble of these robots. The robot that kicked open and touched her body repeatedly retreated, and did not stand still. The next robot had already rushed up.

She thought of the game, the protagonist and the robot's battle screen, she is now the protagonist, just fighting these robots, she can't count a chance.

These are machines that have no pain and are not afraid of death. As long as they catch her, the powerful current will make her lose her fighting power instantly.

Ruth’s wolverine was in the expectation of Chen Mo.

These robots are based on the second generation of the enchanting robot, and after a simple modification, a discharge device is added to the hand. These robots fight without human flexibility, fighting power is not high, but the focus is no pain, not afraid of death, they are touched, strong current, will make a master lose combat power, against those who are bare-handed, these robots must not be underestimated.

This is his preparation of the home care robot for the incense burner beach villa, in order to add a little security to the incense burner beach villa, I did not expect the first battle will be here.

Seeing that two people want to escape, Chen Mo’s eyes are cold: “Block them.”

The roar of the three-car engine sounded, and the two men changed their faces and squatted, avoiding the car that hit them.

The young man just wanted to get up from the ground, and five robots had already rushed toward him.

Oh... ah...

A few shots accompanied by screams, Ruth followed the screams, only to see that the young man had been thrown on the body by several robots, the body trembled on the ground, and then stuck to the ground, not knowing.

Surrounded by several robots, there were three cars that sealed the retreat, and Ruth’s forehead was sweating, and there was no way to keep calm before.

She underestimated Chen Mo, Chen Mo, who controls artificial intelligence and intelligent robots, seems to be more dangerous than imagined.

"What do you want?" Looking at Chen Mo who came over, Ruth was somewhat unnatural.

"What do I want? Set fire to my company's staff quarters, ambush me in the middle, hurt my wife, and now ask me what I want?" Chen Mo sounds cold, thinking of the small fisherman's body being stained with blood, his heart will take the risk Endless anger: "Tell the master messenger behind the scenes, I will let you live a path."

"Impossible." Ruth firmly shook her head.

"Impossible? Then take a bite." Chen Mo asked the robot to take the gun from the young man's hand and align it with Ruth's thigh, and he did not hesitate to pull the trigger.

"Tell me, who is the master messenger behind the scenes?"

Chen Mo’s voice is cold, and even Ruth, who is full of pain, feels a little cold.

"Impossible, you can't get an answer from my mouth." Ruth said with a bite.

"Do you think you don't tell me, I can't find the master messenger behind the scenes? Ask you, just want to get the answer quickly."

Chen Mo raised his gun and pointed it to Ruth again.

"This is the last chance. Who is the master messenger behind the scenes?"

"I don't know." Ruth said directly to Chen Mo.

"The opportunity has already been given to you. This gun is the interest for the small fishing." Chen Mo pointed to Ruth's arm and did not hesitate to pull the trigger.

"Humph……"

Ruth had a painful sigh and snorted her arms. She knew that the task had failed completely because they had insufficient understanding of Chen Mo.

Chen Mo no expression, the muzzle points to her forehead: "This is my first murder, but also the price you touched me against the scales, and the master messenger behind you, I must accept my revenge. Do not think that you do not say No one will know."

boom!

A gunshot, the end of the ambush, is also the prelude to another storm.

chapters.title: Chapter 335: : Returning
chapters.body:
Chapter 335: : Returning

Zhao Min sat in a chair in the hospital corridor, holding a mobile phone in his hand and staring at the screen.

She is now anxious like an ant on a hot pot, but there is no way to vent it. Chen Mo’s security team has suffered heavy casualties. Xiao Yu just finished the operation, but he has not yet woken up, and Chen Mo himself was tied up. There is no news until now, and there is no phone call.

From various situations, it was not the ordinary organization that attacked Chen Mo. Chen Mo fell into the hands of the other party, and the consequences were unimaginable.

She knows that the technology that Chen Mo has in his hands can change the status quo of the world. If Chen Mo had an accident, she really didn't know what to do.

Oh...

A group of chaotic footsteps appeared in the corridor of the hospital, and Zhao Min followed the sound. Seeing the familiar figure of the leader, Zhao Min had a godless eyes, and the moment burst into excitement. He ran over the high heels and directly plunged into his arms.

"You are finally back."

Chen Mo is now extremely worried about the situation of small fishing, so after the safety, he rushed to the hospital in the first time. I just didn't expect that when I first came here, Zhao Min would lose his mind and throw it into his arms.

Is there something bad that happened?

"Small fish... how is it?"

Chen silently swallowed his mouth and couldn’t think about it, even the voices were vibrato. His body was a little trembling, for fear of hearing bad news, because he was the first to see Zhao Min so ill.

"Small fish is fine, the operation is successful, the bullet has been taken out, she is a little weak, and now she is asleep in the ward."

Upon hearing this answer, Chen Mo sighed and jumped to the heart of the blind man and put a lot of it down. Returning to reality, Zhao Min also hugged him tightly, and for a time let him be helpless. The bodyguards around Chen Mo also looked at him with enthusiasm and pretended not to see anything.

"I will go to see Xiaoyu first." Chen Mo reached out and photographed Zhao Min's back.

"Oh, good." Zhao Min reacted and realized that he was too excited. He still holds Chen Mo and hurriedly released him.

Chen Mo did not think too much, and quickly walked toward the ward where Xiaoyu was located.

Gently open the door and walk in, see the small fisherman lying quietly on the hospital bed, Chen Mo heart twitching, his eyes become red.

After sorting out the emotions, Chen Mocai slowed down to the bedside and gently gathered the little bangs that Xiaoyu was a little scattered.

“How is the small fishing situation? When can I wake up?” Chen Mo looked at the doctor responsible for the small fishing injury.

Liu Xueqin looked at Chen Mo with a cramped look. She is the chief physician of Phoenix North Hospital. She has been in this for the first time since she was a doctor for 20 years. This small fishing operation is responsible for the main knife.

"The injured person was shot in the shoulder, did not hurt the key, but excessive blood loss, resulting in physical weakness, plus the role of surgical anesthesia, can wake up when you sleep, there is not much problem." Liu Xueqin said.

"Thank you doctor." Chen Mo thanked.

The small fishing is not dangerous, and his hanging heart is completely lowered.

"Mr. Chen is not polite, this is my job." Liu Xueqin said: "The injured are not serious, but now they are resting, the ward should not be too noisy."

"Good." Chen Mo nodded.

Liu Xueqin left the ward, see Zhao Min want to stop, Chen Mo and Zhao Min left the ward. He knows that Zhao Min must have a stomach to say, just in the ward, afraid of noisy to small fishing.

"You are pale, is it hurt?" Zhao Min could not help but walk out of the ward. I didn't pay attention to it at first. She just found out that Chen Mo's face was much paler than usual.

"Spit," Chen Mo said.

"Spit? What happened? How did you come back?" Zhao Min hung up.

"The three people were killed by me, a little uncomfortable."

Chen Mo took a deep breath.

It was his first time killing, very uncomfortable, especially when he killed Ruth, which made him feel sick and spit.

"Three people were killed by you?" Zhao Min was shocked.

Chen Mo’s answer was beyond her expectations.

She knows that Chen Mo is good at hand, but she can escape if she has a weapon. This makes her very surprised. The other party is a specially trained professional, and after careful planning, Wang Hai and others will not lose that much.

Chen Mo now escaped from the other party and killed the other party, which made her very surprised.

"Have you been injured?" Zhao Min looked carefully at Chen Mo.

"Nothing," Chen Mo said.

"That's good." Zhao Min just saw some small scratches on Chen Mo's arm. Other things didn't matter, he let go of his heart: "I will deal with other things, you will accompany the small fish first."

Zhao Min did not continue to say other things. She knew that Chen Mo was not in the mood to deal with other things, so he left the space to Chen Mo and Xiao Yu.

Chen Mo was very calm, but she could feel the anger of Chen Mo’s heart. Whoever encountered this kind of thing would not feel too good.

Her things are quite a lot. When Chen Mo didn't have news, she didn't care about it. Now Chen Mo is safely coming back. Her heart is also assured that she should handle some things.

There was no way to conceal Chen Mo’s attack.

Their police car was so quiet that just a lot of reporters were on the air, and some reporters followed the police car. The scene of the attack was all unexpectedly exposed under the lens of the reporter.

The fire incident is now less important, and almost all news channels are reporting the incident of Chen Mo attack.

In the factory staff dormitory fire, Chen Mo encountered an ambush on the way to visit, and it was clear that the fire was a conspiracy that led to Chen Mo.

Known as the era giant, Chen Mo is a representative of Huaxia science and technology. Now there is such a serious hijacking incident. This incident caused a storm on the Internet, and the progress of the incident has affected the hearts of countless people.

In just one hour, creating a sensational world is tantamount to the assassination of a president of a country. Countless people are speculating about who the mastermind of this incident is, because from all sorts of clues, those who attempt to kidnap Chen Mo are not ordinary people.

Now outside the Phoenix North Hospital, it has been surrounded by various reporters. Half of the special police in Binhai City have been dispatched to take responsibility for security.

Seeing that Zhao Min came out in the protection of bodyguards and police, all reporters began to surge. If it is not a reporter who is not a special policeman to resist the turmoil, I am afraid that their security line will be broken in an instant.

“Ms. Zhao Min, I heard that Mr. Chen Mo has been kidnapped by criminals. Is it true?”

"Zhao Zong, did the gangster contact you for a ransom?"

“Zhao Zong, I heard that Chen Mo’s fiancee was injured in the attack? How is the injury?”

"With regard to this attack, do you know who the murderer is?"

"..."

All the lenses and flashlights were aligned with Zhao Min, and the scene was once chaotic. Not only the reporters were nervous, but the people who watched the live broadcasts all squeezed a sweat.

This is the first time that the executive of the marching ant company made its debut after Chen Mo was attacked, and it was Chen Min who was the most trusted and closest to Chen Mo.

Zhao Min took a deep breath and raised his hand. The reporters of all the turmoil were quiet and looked at Zhao Min. The microphones in their hands were also collected by security personnel and placed in front of Zhao Min.

"In the morning, there was an organized, premeditated attack against the chairman of our company. Our chairman is now safe and sound, is resting, not kidnapped by outside rumors.

We were shocked and extremely angry about this incident. We will actively cooperate with the police to find out the instigators. At the same time, our company offers a reward of 20 million, rewarding people who provide relevant clues to the event, and hopes that people familiar with the matter can provide the police with clues to solve the case. ”

Simply finished, Zhao Min turned and left, leaving a group of turbulent reporters.

"Ms. Zhao Min, there are rumors that Mr. Chen Mo has been kidnapped, and now he is safe to come back. Is it a ransom to the culprits?"

"Zhao Zong, how many ransoms or techniques do the culprits ask for, and they promised to let go?"

"Zhao Zong..."

Many reporters are surging again, but no matter how loud they shout, Zhao Min has no idea to look back.

chapters.title: Chapter 336: : Xiao Yu Wakes Up
chapters.body:
Chapter 336: : Xiao Yu Wakes Up

Zhao Min announced the news of Chen Mo’s security and quickly spread the whole world through various live broadcasts and platform headlines. Chen Mo is safe and sound, and some people are happy.

For the opponent, if Chen Mo accidents, it means that the marching ant company loses its support, and the marching ant company becomes a loose sand, and they can share it.

For friends and partners, if Chen Mo is in trouble, it is a blue sky. Fortunately, Zhao Min has already announced that Chen Mo has returned without a doubt, and many people’s fears have fallen.

It was only in Zhao Min’s short speech that Chen Mo’s specific situation was not revealed, and Chen Mo did not personally show up, so the speculation of Chen Mo’s situation has become more positive.

In just a few hours, various reports have appeared on the Internet.

Some people speculated that Chen Mo was seriously injured and is now recuperating in the hospital, and it is not convenient to go out.

It has also been speculated that Chen Mo may have been kidnapped by criminals, but Chen Mo agreed to the other party's conditions and was eventually put back, otherwise he could not explain why he had just been kidnapped and returned safely.

It is only for these articles that the marching ant company does not have any response. From the top to the bottom of the marching ant company, no one dares to disclose any news of Chen Mo.

As the protagonist of the event, Chen Mo is sitting at the bed of Xiaoyu at this time, his face is not very good.

Xiao Yu was still not awake, he was full of anger, nowhere to vent.

He is sitting here for a few hours. At this time, he also realized that Xiaoyu was waiting for the kind of suffering he was waking up at the bedside.

It is half past one in the afternoon. Just now he asked Zhao Min and the bodyguard team.

Four deaths and three injuries.

The white pearl was seriously injured and is still in the intensive care unit and has not passed the dangerous period. Anan had two shots in his body and did not hurt the key. This was fortunate in the unfortunate, and there was another minor injury in the collision of the vehicle. Both Wang Hai and Black Hawk, both in the police station, recorded the police for investigation.

He does not expect the police to find out, because the other party is not an ordinary person, and now all are dead, can not be found, so he can only rely on himself.

He has already let the ink girl start searching for the information of those people. As long as they find the identity of the other party and the organization behind it, they will never let the other party better.

"Husband."

Suddenly, a familiar call, Chen Mo, who was immersed in anger, awakened his eyes slowly. I saw the little fish on the hospital bed, and I opened my eyes and looked at him. The pale, bloodless face was so distressing.

"You are awake, great."

Chen Mo sorted out his emotions and showed a gentle smile. He didn't want to let those troubles be seen by Xiao Yu.

"I am not dreaming?" Xiao Yu reached out and rubbed his face in Chen Mo.

"No, you see that I feel painful, I am not a dream." Chen Mo rubbed his arm and gently held the hand of Xiao Yu.

"I dreamed that you were taken away by the bad guys."

"Fake, dreams are the opposite, your husband is so powerful, not so easy to be caught." Chen Mo gently licking Xiao Yu's pale hand, this feeling of loss and recovery makes him feel hot.

"I knew you would be fine."

Chen Mo stretched his head and kissed him on the forehead of Xiao Yu: "I still have a small fish to take care of, so I will definitely not have anything to do."

"Yeah." Xiao Yu showed a smile, letting the pale, bloodless face, a little more angry: "I am thirsty."

"I will pour you water."

Chen Mo said nothing, hurriedly got up from the position. Sitting for too long, the thighs are a bit numb, and when Chen Mo stood up, he almost didn't fall.

"It's a bit hot, you should be careful." Chen Mo raised a small fish and carefully sent the water to her mouth.

"Yeah." Xiao Yu drank two, looked up and looked at Chen Mo.

"What's the matter? Is the wound still painful?"

Xiao Yu shook his head slightly: "No, just want to see you."

"I can see it every day."

Chen Mo gathered up the small fish and scattered hair, and stroked her pale cheeks. Suddenly think of something, press the button on the bed: "First call the doctor to check it out."

After a while, Liu Xueqin took a nurse into the ward, Zhao Min, and Xiao Yu’s girlfriend, Li Ruoxi, followed.

Seeing that Xiaoyu had woke up, both of them showed a surprise smile, but they did not speak, waiting for Liu Xueqin to check Xiaoyu.

After a few minutes, Liu Xueqin took off the stethoscope.

"The injured person is now in a stable state, rest well, and wait for the wound to heal. In the following period, the left hand should not be too big to prevent the wound from cracking, and the wound should not touch the water."

"Okay." Chen slammed the doctor's embarrassment by default and nodded.

After finishing the problem that needs attention, Liu Xueqin and the nurse left the ward, leaving Chen Mo, Zhao Min and Li Ruojun three people, as well as a small fishing boat.

"Small fish, this time I was scared to death."

Zhao Min and Li Ruojun are both sitting next to Xiao Yu.

Li Ruojun is her best girlfriend. The two have nothing to say. Zhao Min is a close friend of Xiao Yu, and like a friend and a friend.

Seeing the two people worried about it, Xiao Yu was also very moved: "Let you worry."

“Don't you wear bulletproof vests? Why are you hurt?”

"The luck is not very good, just hit the exposed arm." Xiaoyu said weakly: "But it is also a great fortune in the unfortunate, not hitting the key, I thought I was dead."

"Children are unscrupulous..."

Chen Mo did not participate in their conversation, just watching it quietly. When several people are chatting, the door of the ward opens again.

Chen Mo's parents, Zhen Zhen's family, Xiao Yu's parents and sister Xiao Man, all came in, Chen Mo also saw a figure behind them, Li Chengzhi.

Fortunately, this intensive care unit is relatively large, and more than a dozen people are not crowded. Zhao Min and Li Ruojun saw them coming over and also let them know how to let go.

"sister."

"Small fish."

Seeing the small fish lying on the hospital bed, Xiao Yu Ma and Lan Man hurried past. Seeing her daughter's appearance, Wang Lan shed tears. He Zhenhua saw the small fish in the hospital bed, but also the red eyes, but after all, he still resisted tears.

"Dad, Mom, Xiao Man, you are all here." Seeing his parents, Xiao Yu showed a pale smile.

"Small fisheries are not serious enough?" Chen Ms. Shao Xuemei also walked to the bedside and looked worried.

"Mom, don't worry, it will be good soon." Chen Mo said.

"You still have a good time to say? Is the wings long and hard? Is it such a big thing, don't call the family, send a message, the phone can't get through. If you don't read the news, we are still in the drum. You know Are we and Xiao Yu's parents almost scared the sick?"

Chen Mo can only stand and let the mother reprimand. His mobile phone is gone, plus too much worry about small fishing, and suddenly forget to keep his home safe, now he can only be jealous.

"Children are fucking, well, Xiao Yu is still hurting, don't scare the little fish." Chen Shanhe said.

"Xiao Mo, today your mother rushed all the way, crying a few times. What happened in the future, remember to call home, or the family is in a hurry." Zhang Yang went to Chen Mo and said quietly.

"Know it." Chen Mozhen promised to come down.

Shao Xuemei did not reprimand Chen Mo, but took the prepared soup and gave Xiao Yu a bowl. Many families around the small fishing, Chen Mo can not insert, can only help but wait.

"Go out to chat?" Li Chengzhi on the side came over and asked.

"can."

Chen Mo comforted Xiao Yu and said something to his family. The family also seems to know that Li Chengzhi’s identity is special, there is no block, and the two talents leave the ward together.

chapters.title: Chapter 337: :Conversation
chapters.body:
Chapter 337: :Conversation

Under the leadership of Li Chengzhi, Chen Mo went to a room in the hospital.

In the room, a middle-aged man in a suit and a smocked face, with a thin face and dark skin on his face, his eyes were deep and straightforward. Next to him, there is a female assistant of about twenty-seven or eight, and the costumes are somewhat capable.

Seeing that Chen Mo and Li Chengzhi came in, the two also stood up to meet.

"This is the leader of the Security Bureau, Lin Zhengguo, this is the assistant of the team leader Wang Xiaofeng. On the attack, the team leader took over the investigation. Now the forest team leader wants to know some things, so I will talk to you." One of Li Cheng came in and began to introduce Chen Mo.

"Hello, Mr. Chen."

"Hello, Li leader."

Chen Mo reached out and the two held the grip, and the four also sat in the position.

"About what you were attacked, we are now taking over the investigation. We also know that Mr. Chen Mo was once hijacked by the gangsters and left the scene of the attack, and finally returned safely, and the three gangsters who hijacked you also died, so some things in the middle , we need to understand."

Lin Zhengguo spoke, and the female assistant on the side began to record.

"You said." Chen Mo nodded.

"Who killed the gangsters and saved Mr. Chen?"

Lin Zhengguo said that when they arrived at the second scene, there were only three gangsters and their cars. Chen Mo had left the hospital, so they did not understand the situation at the scene.

"I killed, killed two, the car, it should be too much blood loss." Chen Mo said calmly.

He does not have to hide these things. He is not afraid of the police to pursue his responsibilities, he can hire the best lawyers, and this matter can be fully characterized as legitimate defense. It’s just that the robot is involved, or let it go. The other party will recognize it. If he doesn’t ask, he won’t take the initiative to say it.

The female assistant in charge of the record next looked at Chen Mo with amazement and looked unbelief.

Chen Mo is a researcher. He killed two well-trained gangsters and was still hijacked. This sounds a bit unrealistic.

The answer to Chen Mo also surprised Lin Zhengguo. In that case, even a professionally trained person may not be able to escape.

"Mr. Chen is not kidding?"

"I won't be joking about this kind of thing. At that time they opened all my bodyguards. Who can save me? I can only save myself."

“Can you talk about the specific process? I am very curious, how did you kill three well-trained agents to get out?” Lin Zhengguo asked.

He did not believe that Chen Mo is a researcher. Although he is a very powerful researcher, in his opinion, the value of force will certainly not be too good. The other party is a well-trained agent. Chen Mo-neng has escaped very well and has also killed two people, and there are obvious signs of fighting on the spot.

He is sure that Chen Mo has concealed something.

"Lead leader, some things you may not understand, Mr. Chen is agile and comparable to trained special personnel. I dare say that even if you are now, you are not the opponent of Mr. Chen. As a researcher with no resistance, I am afraid that you will also overturn the ship in the gutter."

Li Chengzhi replied to Chen Mo.

The potential agent was developed by Chen Mo and is now used by the military for the Super Soldiers program. The efficacy of the pharmacy, he has seen it with his own eyes, Chen Mo is definitely useful on himself, but also after training, it is not unusual to be a professional.

According to him, this is the truth.

When I heard Li Chengzhi’s answer, Lin Zhengguo’s look was full of shock, and the female assistant on the side was even more unbelievable.

But they dare not doubt, because Li Chengzhi is the official contact with Chen Mo, he knows Chen Mo more than him, and Li Chengzhi said that it should not be a joke.

"It turns out that Comrade Chen Mo is still a hidden master."

Lin Zhengguo did not continue to ask the question just now. The process of Chen Mo killing two people? How to kill? These are really not very helpful in identifying the other party's identity. They are also not likely to sue Chen Mo's murder. Asking more of these things will lead Chen Mo's resentment.

Some things, he simply understands, someone will ask, but this person is not him.

After sorting out his thoughts a little, Lin Zhengguo continued to ask: "Have they said anything in the process of hijacking? Or have you contacted others to send you to where?"

"They said that they sent me out of the waterway, but I didn't say where I was sent. But I heard that I wanted to send me out of the country. From their conversation, they know that their boat is not far from where I escaped. About ten minutes drive, the speed is about 110." Chen Mo said.

"ferry?"

Lin Zhengguo nodded and turned to look at the female assistant next to him.

"Immediately let Xiao Ducha check, take the second scene as the center, about ten minutes by car, which docks or ports, let them investigate the suspicious vessels in the vicinity from 6:30 to 7:30 in the morning."

"it is good."

The female assistant did not hesitate to send information to the other members on the computer.

"After a while, did Mr. Chen have been threatened by anyone? Or is there any competition problem in business? Or has it rejected the request of other people?" Lin Zhengguo continued to return to the topic.

Chen Mo has simply said something about these issues. It is impossible for someone to dare to threaten him face to face and refuse the other party's request and cooperation. This kind of thing is everywhere in the army ants company. Not to mention the business, the areas he is involved in, those competitors hate him.

Next, Lin Zhengguo asked some other questions, did not get too much clues, and finally left.

After Lin Zhengguo left, Li Chengzhi and Chen Mo went to the large balcony of the hospital. It has already been cleared, and there are only players from Li Chengzhi around, and there are no other people.

"Some things he didn't say. There were seven people involved in the attack. One is Gu Qinghai's men. The one who dragged the Black Hawk team is Gu Qinghai, an orphan. The turtle who returned to Switzerland from Switzerland two years ago. During the time I went abroad, I have participated in some military summer camps, and I have no way to investigate who I have contacted.

The other five are all foreigners, three have no entry records, and their status is unknown; two have entry records, the nationalities are Austria and Norway, the specific background is not identified, this identity is likely to be false.

They are all dead, there is no identity on the body, I am afraid that the answer you want, it is difficult to give you. ”

Chen Mo nodded and was not surprised by this answer.

"There are two other things this time."

"what's up?"

"Invite you to participate in a special project."

"Sorry, I don't have time now, and I don't have the mood to talk about it." Chen Mo shook his head.

"I know, just say it to you in advance." Chen Mo's answer is in his expectation: "The artificial intelligence conference will be held in the capital next month. You should be invited. When you go to the capital, let's talk in detail. this matter."

"Another thing?"

Li Chengzhi took three black cards and three strings of keys from the briefcase and handed them to Chen Mo.

"This is the three houses in the courtyard of the Huacheng Military District. The courtyard is filled with retired cadres and family members of important military officers. I heard that your loved ones have settled in the city of Huacheng and are not used to the environment on the beach. This can be given to them, and you can feel at ease."

"Thank you."

Chen Mo did not have the feelings and reached out to pick up the keys and black cards.

"Don't thank you, you are very helpful to us. To be honest, this thing is insignificant compared to your help to us. In fact, not only is your family scared, we are also scared of cold sweat, you are now us 'National Treasure'.

I have applied to the above, and I will fight for a few super soldiers to come to you, and together with Wang Hai, serve as your bodyguard. This time, you are mainly lacking in weapons and being unintentional, which has caused the current situation. If my application is successful, there should be no such problem next time. ”

"Next month, I will go to the capital, just as I have a project that needs to work with you, but I have no mood during this time."

I remembered that he almost lost a small fishing, as well as the huge casualties of his men, Chen Mo looked with a cold mans. The master messenger behind this incident must pay the price.

chapters.title: Chapter 338: :Back Office
chapters.body:
Chapter 338: :Back Office

In the villa of Xianglutan, Chen Mo and his parents, Xiao Yu and his family, as well as a family of three, just ten people, sitting around the round table, eating breakfast.

It has been four days since the attack. Because the body of the small fish has been developed through potential, the wound healing is better. So yesterday, Xiaoyu was transferred from the hospital. Private doctors and nurses were invited to go home to recuperate.

In the previous villa community, his address was known by many people. There are many reporters around in the dark, and it is not convenient to go back. So come here.

The security is complete here, all intelligent plus manual management, servants and intelligent robots, quiet environment, very suitable for cultivation.
