The small fishing wound recovered quickly, although it did not completely heal, but there was not much problem. Now the color is no different from normal people, only the arms, but also wrapped in gauze.

When I saw the small fishing recovery, the hearts of several family members were all put down.

"Xiao Mo, see Xiaoyu recovering almost, we are also assured. Played enough in these days, idle is a bit boring, today I am with Xiao Yu Da, and your coward is ready to return to the flower city, into a little aquatic products, I will send you some over time and make up the body for Xiao Yu." During the meal, Chen Shanhe opened.

"Dad, the supermarket is handed over to other people for management, and there is no shortage of money at home. Come here and have a photo." Chen Mo said. The target of the attack was him. He could not guarantee that the next time someone would hit his family's idea.

"Busy for the rest of my life, I don't do anything at all, it's easy to get sick. When do you give me a baby with Xiao Yu, I will take it easy to enjoy it." Chen Shanhe said.

When I heard this, the people on the table laughed. Chen Mo and Xiao Yu also had no choice but to smile. They also know that there is no way to do so. They simply don’t stay strong. They know that it’s useless to say it.

"This is the key to the gate card and house of the Huacheng Military Region compound. You go back to the flower city to move in and live there. The environment is good and safe." Chen Mo took out the three keys and black cards that Li Chengzhi gave him to his father. Little fish dad and coward.

The house inside, many people want, but not the money can buy.

"also."

The three men looked at each other and took the keys and the door card. When this happens, they also have a lot of security. Chen Mo’s identity is different. In the past, there may be people who will use their safety to threaten Chen Mo, so Chen Mo’s mind, they did not refuse.

"I stayed with Xiao Yuma for a few more days, and when the small fishing was completely restored, we only went back." Shao Xuemei said.

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded.

After breakfast, Chen Shanhe, He Zhenhua and Zhang Yang left and rushed back to Huacheng. Zhang Xinxin also went back to school. Chen Mu and Xiao Yu Ma stayed to take care of Xiao Yu, and Xiao Yu’s sister Xiao Man.

"Momgo, the identity of the gangsters was found."

When the family was chatting in the hall, the ink girl came to inform Chen Mo. Seeing this message, Chen Mo’s eyes flashed a trace of coldness, and the whole person became dangerous.

"Chen Mo, what happened?"

The little fisherman around him noticed Chen Mo’s strange look after the information and asked.

"Nothing." Chen Mo showed a relaxed smile: "Someth, I have to go to the company."

"Go, don't stay with me all day at home. Moms are all there, and there are Xiaoman, if they are going to come to see me later, don't worry that I am bored at home."

"Well, it's not completely good now, don't go out to the beach and blow the sea breeze."

"Know it." Xiao Yu looked at the side and saw the two old people watching TV on the sky. Without paying attention to this, they stretched their necks and kissed Chen Mo’s face: "Respond to your business, I Will be obedient."

"Sister, my brother-in-law's face is sweet and not sweet?" Chen Mogang just left, Xiao Man took a pile of snacks and ran to the sofa next to the small fishing, and he reached over and screamed.

"You still peek at this?" Xiao Yu smiled.

"I am bright and see."

......

Chen Mogang went to the company headquarters, and the employees who went to work saw him and immediately showed a surprise smile and hurriedly said hello.

During this period, Chen Mo did not appear in front of any media. Even if Zhao Min said that Chen Mo was fine, the speculations about Chen Mo’s situation have never stopped.

It is said that Chen Mo may be injured, rested at home, or is, is cooperating with the police to accept the investigation. But now, four days before the attack, Chen Mo appeared again.

Many people in the company were worried about Chen Mo. After all, Chen Mo was the spiritual pillar of the marching ant company. Chen Mo had an accident and the whole company was full of people. Now Chen Mo is intact in the company, all the rumors, not attacking.

The news that Chen Mo came back, through the company's internal WeChat group and penguin group, quickly spread throughout the company. Including the various branches and branches of the marching ant company, I saw all the news and cheered.

All the employees of the company seem to have taken a reassurance, and the atmosphere in the office has become completely different.

Chen Mo naturally does not know that he is returning to the company, giving everyone so much encouragement. Just entering the office, Zhao Min came over, followed by Zhao Min, Wang Hai, Black Hawk and a group of bodyguards.

"boss."

Wang Hai took the lead and blamed himself. Everyone else has a head down, like a child who is doing something wrong. This time, Chen Mo was not protected, and Chen Mo was in danger. It was their dereliction of duty.

"How is the situation with pearls?" Chen Mo asked.

For the past four days, he went to see the deceased and his family, and the injured ones. Anan had two shots that didn't hurt the key. He woke up and was recovering. The situation of white pearls was more serious. He shot near the heart and almost died. When he went to visit, although he passed the dangerous period, Still in a coma.

"Pearl just woke up this morning, the doctor said, she is in good health and recovered well." Wang Hai said.

The four of them have developed through potential, and their physical fitness is better. It is precisely because of this that the white pearl has survived the dangerous period and returned to a life.

"This is my mistake, so that you and Miss Xiaoyu are in danger, and the responsibility lies with me." Wang Hai said.

"This time the attack, you have done enough, I don't know that the fire is a conspiracy, you don't have to blame yourself." Chen Mo shook his head and looked at Zhao Min: "Awei's aftermath is arranged." ?"

Zhao Min responded: "According to your point of view, each family gave eight million pensions and arranged a job for their families."

The bodyguard on the side bowed deeply toward Chen Mo.

For them, the few bodyguards who sacrificed were their brothers and comrades. Chen Mo arranged the family for them. They were also deeply grateful to Chen Mo. If you have an accident in the future, your family will be arranged, and your worries will be gone.

"You go back to the post first, and I have something to do with the president."

Wang Hai and others once again bowed to Chen Mo and quit Chen Mo’s office.

"On the other side of the factory, the medical expenses and compensation for the deceased and the injured were handled. In addition, the police came to the news that the suspect who had found arson in the dormitory, called Yan Wenbin, was the head of a production line. The debt is tempted to use, and the police will sue him for intentional homicide. I have let the legal department follow up."

"it is good."

Upon hearing this news, Chen Mo's face was not very good, just nodded gently.

This is the first time Zhao Min has seen Chen Mo’s ugly face. She also knows that Chen Mo is full of anger and has nowhere to vent.

"What happened to Xiaoyu now?"

“Recovery is very good and will be cured soon.”

"That's good, after work, I will go see Xiaoyu, I will go back first."

"it is good."

After Zhao Min left, Chen Mocai sat back to his office. From the beginning of the attack, he asked the ink girl to collect information about the gangsters. The collection was very fast, but it took four days to get the exact information.

He can't wait to know who is going to kidnap him. Chen Mo looked at his eyes and flashed his head: "Remove their identity information."

chapters.title: Chapter 339: : Chen Mo’S Revenge
chapters.body:
Chapter 339: : Chen Mo’S Revenge

On the other side of the ocean, in a private residence.

At this time, it was already at night, a woman sat at the desk and the index finger hit the table. If the outsiders do this again, they will definitely recognize that she is the US CIA director Linna Pell, who was just taking office, and the first female director in the history of the CIA.

As the first female director in the history of the US CIA, she has been working as an intelligence agent for more than 20 years, and she is known for her enthusiasm. When I took office, I also met with many oppositions because of the black spots. However, I took office smoothly and took control of one of the four most famous intelligence agencies in the world.

At this time, Linna stared at the information on the desktop of the office computer. The avatar on the data was a few people who attacked Chen Mo.

Falcon action is her order.

In her previous appointment, because of a team agent's mistakes, the CIA's espionage network in China was destroyed. Some agents were secretly executed by China, and some of them were exposed to danger.

Therefore, this action, she had to assign agents from other regions to enter China. Before the start of the operation, they were all ready to wait on the high seas.

According to the original plan submitted by Ruth, as long as the action is successful, Chen Mo will be sent back to their secret laboratory through special channels as quickly as possible.

Chen Mo is a scientific genius. In just three years, he has developed many advanced scientific and technological achievements, and countless people are coveted. As long as you get Chen Mo, you can let their technology continue to lead the world.

However, Chen Mo does not seem to have the meaning of immigration. Even the country has not taken a half step, so the only way is to go to China to kidnap.

Anyway, it is not the first time that they have kidnapped scientists.

But this time the kidnapping actually failed. Chen Mo was safe and sound, and she got the news that all the people involved in the operation died. The loss of personnel is small, the action has already been stunned, and it is almost impossible to catch Chen Mo next time.

These people, even if something goes wrong, the information can not be exposed, otherwise her troubles will be great.

"trouble."

Linna licks her temples and is thinking about the next steps.

After thinking for a long time, Linna’s eyes glanced at the data of several people, and moved her fingers to directly destroy the files of several people, together with the backup of their data stored in the u disk, and all of them were deleted.

Falcon action is one of the decisions she made to advocate, only she and a few people know. Now the action fails and all traces must be erased. The files of these people are destroyed, so no one in the world will know that they are CIA people.

Because from beginning to end, the information of these people was not uploaded to the CIA's secret agent files, only she knew their identity.

It’s just that she didn’t know that the file she thought was destroyed, when she opened it, when she opened it, she was already silently copied from the background by the ink girl, which was on Chen’s computer desktop.

"CIA?"

Looking at the files in front of him, Chen Mo’s face was cold.

He now finally understands why the Mexican woman could not find information on several people in three days. It was not recorded in the electronic files of major intelligence agencies. If it wasn't for the U disk that was opened on the computer today, I am afraid he could not find it.

Is the black hand behind the scenes an American? Thinking of this, Chen Mo was angry in his heart.

All along, he is as low-key as possible, and rarely loses his temper. It seems that these people are themselves soft persimmons.

"Momgo, what do you do now?"

The holographic projection of the ink girl fell on Chen Mo's table, sitting on the table and swaying his feet, and his eyes looked at Chen Mo.

"I am not a saint. It is impossible to have a hatred." Chen Mo’s voice was a little heavy.

This time he injured a small fisherman, he was also in danger. Several innocent people were killed. It is impossible to give up revenge because of the other world’s largest intelligence agency.

However, revenge also pays attention to the way. He can't be hard-pressed with the other side. If he is suspected of being on his head, I am afraid that he will never have a better day.

After thinking for a long time, Chen Mo thought of the way of revenge: "Ink girl, remember the last clown organization?"

"Remember, it was the clown organization that used the 'Clown Virus' to kidnap the national network of cities and extort ransom." The ink girl nodded.

"I remember that they also helped us step on us at the beginning. Now, as a price, we use his identity, it seems not too much." Chen Mo thought about it.

Since the extortion to the ransom, the clown organization has disappeared and disappeared completely into the online world. The identity cannot be investigated, leaving a mysterious shadow in the world.

Chen Mo did not mind letting it shake the world again. Chen Mo did not mind making its prestige a legend in the hacker world.

"What do you want to do with your brother? Are you kidnapping a city?" asked the inkwoman.

"Kid a city? No! I want to retaliate with the CIA. You invade the internal network of the CIA and copy all the archives of all of them, leaving no traces."

Chen Mo’s eyes were cold, and the CIA came to fight his ideas. He could also play the other’s idea. Is it not one of the four largest intelligence agencies in the world? Destroy your intelligence network and see if you can get it.

"I want the archives of all agents of the CIA?" asked the ink girl.

"Ok."

"Okay, My Brother." After that, the ink girl stared at Chen Mo for ten seconds. Just when Chen Mo was strange, the ink girl said again: "Okay."

"Okay? So fast."

"It's very simple, it's faster. The ink girl is really artificial intelligence, and supercomputer help. Now the network firewall is like my own home.

In human terms, the online world, the ink girl is God. The last time the Ink invasion invaded the island country’s spy satellite, it took only five seconds to lock your car. It took four days to collect the information of those people because their information was in the u disk and was discovered on a networked computer today. "The ink girl seems to be showing off like Chen Mo."

Chen Mo’s heart is also somewhat delighted by the more and more humanized emotions of the ink girl. At least he sees the ink girl growing up and learning.

The horror of the ink girl is beyond doubt.

This is an artificial intelligence that is enough to make people crazy around the world, so Chen Mo never talks to other people about the ability of the ink girl to control the network. He will not let the ink girl use these abilities without special circumstances.

"Momgo, all the agent files are on the desktop." After the ink girl finished, a compressed file package appeared on Chen Mo's computer desktop.

"open to take a look."

He just finished, the compressed file on the desktop was unpacked and opened.

Even if Chen Mo was prepared, after seeing the documents, he couldn't help but take a breath.

A copy of the file appeared in front of him, and each file was an agent or informant. Including their photos, real names, phone numbers and work done, as well as information collected.

Among these people, there are businessmen, journalists, government agencies, researchers, students, teachers, general staff of the company and other people from all walks of life.

There are many important countries in the world's five continents, especially in several developed regions, as well as in the United States, and there are many people.

In addition, some materials also record some underground secret facilities of the CIA, a list of target people.

If the CIA knows that Chen Mo has got the information, I am afraid to kill Chen Mo at all costs. This information is about the survival of the CIA.

Chen Mo’s eyes flashed with thoughts.

This is a bit crazy, and all the lists are released, which is tantamount to breaking the sky. This matter must be cautious and cautious, otherwise it will be hard to see.

After thinking for a long time, Chen Mo’s plan was shaped.

"Ink girl, using the identity of the clown organization, attacked the US CIA, pay attention to hiding the iP, use multiple fake iPs to take the opportunity to make a springboard, attack their network. Then use the 'Clown virus' to invade the CIA network, control their computers, and blatantly Stealing the files of their agents."

“So simple? Is there still?” asked the ink girl.

"Use the clown to organize the previous Twitter account and send a sentence in English." Chen Mo Shen said.

Even if the other party is terrible, this hate, he still has to report. He has the sharpest cyber weapon, and as long as he is properly planned, he can completely retreat and avoid being suspected.

"What's the matter?" asked the ink girl.

"My heart is like this face, half pure white, half shadow, I can choose to let you see, or you can not let you see. The new circus performance is about to open."

chapters.title: Chapter 340: : Clown Reproduction!
chapters.body:
Chapter 340: : Clown Reproduction!

"Dennis, your coffee."

"Okay, thank you. Your skin is getting better, Alice."

The CIA Cyber Security Office, a young man in a navy blue shirt, looks like only twenty-four-five-year-old. He just came in, took the coffee handed over by the blonde young woman, gently snorted, put the briefcase on, and walked to his position. it is good.

Anyone who knows him knows the story of Dennis. One of the infamous computer criminals, Dennis Moran. Has participated in a series of denial of service attacks, resulting in the closure of thousands of Internet sites. Unauthorized access to the US Air Force and US Army computer systems was also planned.

At that time, he was only 17 years old.

After being arrested, he was accused of seven A-class felony related to illegal hackers, and was eventually compiled by the CIA to become one of the CIA cyber security employees. Now responsible for CIA network security and performing network intrusion tasks.

In the CIA Cyber Security Office, one of Dennis's computer technology gods, who has been responsible for external cyber attacks and interceptions, has done a very beautiful job.

The CIA network firewall is also in the hands of Dennis, rising to a level.

Dennis took a sip of coffee and took a sip of the computer game: "Alice, today's coffee has less sugar. It must have been that your man didn't satisfy you last night, so you didn't satisfy me."

The young blond woman who was ridiculed in the office laughed and said: "It is your taste that is getting heavier, and I can't satisfy it."

"I'm just a light bundling, a whip, and the taste is not heavy." Dennis smiled. "Is there any difficult task today?"

"Invade the marching ant company network, you can do it, I can satisfy your unhealthy taste, and the bundled whip can do it." Along the side, Hu Hanzi said it.

There was another laugh in the office.

"The task is a bit difficult, no blessings."

Oh...

The sudden appearance of the tone, let everyone in the office stop talking to each other, focus on the computer.

"Are you going to die?"

Dennis slowly dropped the coffee, put his finger on the keyboard, and began to organize defense. They have become accustomed to this type of cyber attack.

Just like the years when he was young and frivolous, he wanted to invade the US Air Force computer network and became famous. Now the CIA is the hacker’s testimony.

As long as the computer system of the CIA is successfully invaded, it will surely become famous in the field of hacking. Only a few can think of him like this, successfully invaded. Unable to prove, the final result is naturally a prison sentence.

In the entire network security office, everyone is holding their breath and only tapping the keyboard. Across the network, there is a silent war at the moment. The keyboard in their hands is a weapon, and the code is a move.

As time went on, Dennis's face became more and more dignified. The attack on the other side was constant and it was getting more and more fierce, so he had to go all out.

"Be careful, this time it is likely to be a hacker organization," Dennis reminded. The other party used even the usual means, which was a blatant attack and did not seem to be afraid of exposing their position.

"Find the other iP, in San Francisco."

"Paris France."

“Huaxia Port Area.”

"Island of the island."

"..."

As the crowd rang, in the huge screen above the office, the red dot positions appeared. After finding each other's iP, they were not happy, but their faces became more and more dignified.

The number of red dots on the LCD screen has exceeded one hundred and is still increasing. There is no doubt that many of them are fake.

"You block the attack, I am going to reverse the crack tracking."

"Okay." A white and thin young man promised to use his foot to slap to another computer and let the position open to Dennis.

Dennis slammed his feet to the position where the youth let go, and the fingers banged on the keyboard. Inside the CIA Cyber Security Office, there is a chilling atmosphere, like a real battlefield.

Lina hurried into the Cyber Security Office and saw the people who were madly responding to the attack, frowning. Other people who came with it were very dignified.

Look at this tense atmosphere and you know that something will happen.

"what happened?"

"Someone wants to invade the computer system in the bureau." The blonde woman handing Dennis coffee hurried to Linna, her face was a little nervous.

"How is it going?"

"Get it done." Linna just asked for an exit, and Dennis knocked on the Enter key. As soon as his movements fell, the red dots on the LCD screen disappeared one by one.

"This may be a hacker organization, very powerful, almost let them successfully invade the network. Ready to let the action group arrest people, these people caught back to collect, may be a member of the information army." Dennis said.

"Yeah." Linna nodded.

"Wait, the red dots are all gone."

A scream came out, and Dennis and others glanced at the LCD screen and found it empty.

drop!

On the occasion of everyone's sorrow, the LCD screen flashed and jumped out of a half-black mask.

Clown organization.

A word jumps out of everyone's mind.

Seeing this familiar mask, Dennis's face changed dramatically: "Put off the network immediately." His voice was panicked, but it was already late.

His words have just been exported. In the CIA office, all the computer screens jumped, and all of them appeared half a hundred and a half black masks.

"Turn off the network and quickly cut off the network."

Dennis couldn't keep calm, his eyes were red, his face was a decadent color, and he hadn't been casual.

The people who responded, hurriedly unplugged the computer cable.

The mask is mysterious and has a weird smile that seems to be mocking. The entire CIA building was in a deadlock.

"Damn, can anyone tell me what is going on here? Isn't that done?"

Linna looked at the half-hundred and a half black clown mask in front of her eyes. This mask is no stranger to them. This clown organization that once kidnapped several cities is now on the CIA wanted list.

"The attack was just a slap attack. They hacked into our computer system from another channel."

Dennis had frustration on his face.

The last time the clown virus was raging, he could do nothing. This time the clown organization attacked their network, he still could do nothing.

"I will crack the virus immediately and see what is lost." Linna was uneasy, and the instincts of being a special agent for many years told her that the clown organization is definitely not as simple as an invasion.

"Secretary, the clown organization has made a special push." A male employee stumbled and ran to Linna with his mobile phone.

My heart is like this face, half pure white, half shadow, I can choose to let you see, or you can insist that you don't see it. The new circus show is about to open.

"The new circus show is about to open? Opening?"

Take the overture of the opening of the CIA? Still take the CIA as a circus monkey. She is now the director of the CIA. During her term of office, this shameful thing happened. This is a provocation. This is a red, naked, naked face.

She has never failed, and she is as proud as she can and cannot accept this failure.

Looking at the mask on the computer desktop with a strange smile, Linna was born from the gallbladder, and put the mobile phone in her hand on the screen: "At any cost, find me this **** organization, immediately crack this Damn the virus."

chapters.title: Chapter 341: : The Beginning Of The Stream
chapters.body:
Chapter 341: : The Beginning Of The Stream

Burrick browsed Twitter, and their company added a post dedicated to Twitter in the news section. The post is on duty, this week he is responsible for this post.

The beginning of this post is to pay attention to the Twitter president.

The unreliable president can always attract a global eye because of a tweet. It is precisely the timeliness of the news, so the company has specifically added a post that focuses on Twitter, in order to understand the news of the big news in the first time.

When I was concerned about Twitter, I was given a lot of news materials, so this position has also become a permanent job for the company. Twitter is no longer just to focus on the unreliable president, but also on other stars or groups that can make news.

Suddenly, Burrick refreshed Twitter’s hand. He saw a familiar Twitter account, which is the Twitter account of the clown organization.

Since the clown organization successfully kidnapped a city with the 'Clown Virus' and blackmailed a government, it disappeared without a trace.

This account seems to have been abandoned, has not been updated, but now send a message again.

My heart is like this face...

Seeing the familiar saying, Burrick's body was cold and his lips were dry. The clown organization that almost ruined the foundation of cybersecurity has come back. After thinking about it, Berwick still forwarded the message back to the company's news Twitter account.

The new circus show is about to open!

The account update status of the clown organization, the new tweet, immediately attracted the attention of many people. The person who saw this tweet had a trembling heart.

This news appeared, fearing that it would bring the entire online world into panic. At the beginning, it was a kidnapping of the entire city network, blackmailing the government's organization, and doing things unscrupulously.

Now, the clown organization appears again.

"The clown organization is coming back! 》

"The clown organization will release a message or will start a new round of cyber attacks. 》

"We don't welcome you! clown"

"The circus's overture - the CIA was black-handed by clowns! 》

"The CIA is attacked by clowns"

Countless media, the first time to report the news that the clown released Twitter. In a short sentence, it triggered a global shock, and the topic was immediately topped by major websites.

Once the clown virus kidnapped the shadow of a city, how many people have not dissipated now, and now they are making a comeback again, arousing the fear of many people.

It’s just a good thing, the tweet released by the clown just spread, the CIA was attacked by the clown, and the computer system was caught in the middle of it, and it could not be concealed and passed away.

A stone stirs up a thousand waves.

As one of the world's four major intelligence agencies, the CIA was taken by the clown organization to see how crazy the clown organization was and inherited the once unscrupulous style.

The West is in the daytime, this news, the first time was spread all over the corner.

Those who have shadows on the last ‘clown virus’ will unplug their home network at the first time to prevent the virus from being controlled again. Many office workers have also unplugged their computer cables and backed up their important information to avoid being embarrassed again.

This clowning organization, now disappearing, has triggered global panic about cybersecurity.

"The clown virus is programmed in Huaxia, a computer language that makes existing anti-virus software unrecognizable. Globally, this barbaric computer language should be blocked."

"Since the emergence of Chinese programming languages, the global network has been in crisis for many times. This computer language should be blocked. Damn Chen Mo, why should you write this language? And clowns, those people are damned."

"The killing of Chinese character programming viruses has long been available, and the anti-virus software released by the marching ant company can defend against these viruses, but many people are biased and refuse to use this software. I use it, the computer is very safe."

"The clown organization last kidnapped a city. This attack on the CIA, what is their purpose this time?"

"..."

The remarks about the network crisis also broke out because of the spread of the news of the clown virus invading the CIA. Even the attack that the CIA can't resist, the ordinary people's computer, in front of the clown organization, is even more ineffective.

The discussion of next-generation network security has once again become the hottest topic.

The clown organization attacked the network of the CIA, making other government agencies as enemies. According to the urinary nature of the clown organization, there will definitely be no end to it, and there will definitely be other actions.

“How long will it take?” Linna is constantly urging behind a group of technicians.

By her side, more than half of the seniors of the CIA are looking at the technicians in front of them. The entire CIA computer infected with the 'clown virus', the computer system was invaded, and how much data was taken away. It is still unknown. If important information is lost, their troubles will be great.

"Quick." An employee snorted and continued to concentrate on cracking. Not long after, the employee finally laughed: "Cracked."

The computer in front of him has returned to normal. Seeing this scene, everyone is happy.

"The virus threat is not that big." The employee said with some pride: "Don't worry about being kidnapped by a city for blackmail as it was last time."

After the clown virus crisis, their top network technicians are learning Chinese programming languages. For them, the unsolvable Chinese character programming language virus is not at a loss.

"The computer system has been blatantly invaded, and now it is untied. Are you proud?" Lina squinted and her voice was angry.

Now the news can't be wrapped, people all over the world know that the CIA's network has been invaded by clown organizations. The clown organization is in the face of people all over the world, slamming the face of their CIA, proud of her, certainly unacceptable.

The engineer who was scolded rose his face and eventually bowed his head and had nothing to say.

"Check it out immediately, the other party has no important documents to go black." Lina was chilly, and the whole person took a dangerous breath.

She didn't believe that the other party just came over and turned around, and it was so simple to take them.

The engineers on the field did not hesitate to hesitate and immediately began to check the passive traces in the computer system. It didn't take long for an employee to stand up, to stop talking, and to sweat coldly on his forehead.

“Which information is passive?” Linna had an ominous premonition to see the employees’ support.

"The other party penetrated the firewall and cracked the file system of the agents. The files of the agents and some confidential information have been copied."

"what?"

Linna’s eyes were black and almost passed out. Fortunately, the high-rise eye next to him was fast, and hurriedly held her before he fell.

Others heard the news and all their faces changed. Espionage personnel and agents are the basis of their CIA. If the information of these personnel is leaked, the consequences are unimaginable, which is related to the survival of the CIA.

Linna, who has been swaying, has eyes filled with blood and hysterical madness on her face.

"Let me find, use all means, and use the fastest speed to get the members of the clown organization out."

chapters.title: Chapter 342: :Blackmail
chapters.body:
Chapter 342: :Blackmail

The entire online world, because of the action of the 'clown organization', fell into a storm. As the initiator, Chen Mo is also in the study, and the ink girl always pays attention to the dynamics of the event.

The ‘clown organization’ attack was planned by him. He said that he must retaliate, otherwise he could not swallow the tone.

"Mer brother, they have cracked the virus." The ink girl suddenly spoke.

"The action is very fast." Chen Mo slammed.

"Mer brother, what do you do next?" asked the ink girl.

"Now I have just started, don't worry, let the bullets fly for a while. Now it's urgent, not us." Chen Mo laughed.

The virus was deliberately let the other party crack it. If necessary, he could turn the entire CIA computer into a brick.

It’s just that it’s not the style of a clown organization. Chen Mo wants to use this identity to do things. Naturally, he has to learn a bit like it, so as not to be suspected by the CIA.

Let the other party crack, and another purpose is to let the other party know that he has moved their information. It is now estimated that the CIA will not sleep well for the next two days.

"Mer brother, Xiao Yu sister came." In Chen Mo's thinking, the ink girl suddenly reminded.

Hey!

When the ink girl’s words just fell, the study sounded knocking at the door, and Xiaoyu also pushed the door and walked in. The small fishing arm is not completely good, and the arm is hung. However, the color is very good and the mood is good.

"Chen Mo, how did you get into the study for so long, Zhao Jie, if they are all there, your master is coming to the study." Xiaoyu said.

"A temporary thing."

Chen Mo said, forget it, it really has been more than 20 minutes.

"You let the ink girl inform me, why do you run it in person. The injury on your hand is still not good." Chen Mo left the seat and led the small fish out of the study.

"I was injured in the arm, not a foot injury. The weather is just right tonight, everyone is already grilling outside, so I will ask you to come out together."

"Good." Chen Mo promised to come down.

Just arrived at the grass outside the villa, I saw a few women around the barbecue, experience the fun of barbecue, as well as the live KTV composed of audio and holographic projection.

The two old people are not there. They should leave space for young people and go back to rest early.

Zhao Min and Xiao Man are in the column, Zhang Xinxin is also back, and Xiao Yu’s girlfriends, Li Ruojun, Zhou Wei and Wang Xiaolan, have also come to visit Xiaoyu today.

At this time, several people are singing singly, or busy to handle the food in their hands. Even Zhao Min, the female president, also put down the shelf and participated in the discussion of several girls. At least here, she is not an awesome female president, more like a big sister next door.

When Chen Mo and Xiao Yu came over, they attracted the attention of everyone.

"Chen Da boss, you as the master, do not entertain us a few guests, hide in the study, are you not waiting to see us?" Zhao Min opened his mouth.

"Yeah, don't you welcome us? Chen Giant." Zhou Wei, who was eating roasted chicken wings, also spoke.

"Nothing, the topic of your woman, I can't participate, so I went into the study and dealt with something?" Chen Mo naturally knew that several people were ridiculing him, not at all concerned.

"What makes you want to leave so many girls like flowers, in the study room?" Li Ruoxuan also spoke.

"Oh, the clown organization has appeared again, and it has also attacked the US CIA. It is very big." Chen Mo said that he didn't jump.

"Is there something?"

Zhao Min's eyebrows picked up and hurriedly took out his mobile phone to open the news page. There was an article about the clown organization attacking the CIA.

"Is it a computer virus? I remember when I was in college, the virus that called the eternal heart, Chen Mo helped us to clear it. At that time, the computer was ravaged. I thought it was caused by a small movie that Xiao Yu saw." Wang Xiaolan pushed the glasses and said.

"Speaking of this, I suddenly remembered that when Xiaoyu returned the computer to me, he also said that Chen Mo had opened a small movie in the library. I heard a classmate said that there was a person watching a small movie in the library that day. Said that the sound was quite big, and later ran away, that person should be Chen Mo."

He spit out the chicken bones in his mouth, a serious statement.

"Hey..."

Xiao Man took the lead and couldn't help himself. He almost squirted the red wine in his mouth and giggled. The other female brains made up the picture at the time and couldn't help but laugh.

Xiao Yu remembered the appearance of Chen Mozhen at that time, and also grinned, his eyes bent into a beautiful crescent shape.

"The library sees a small movie? I didn't expect the boss to have this kind of scenery history. Xiaoyu, tell me about the situation at the time." Zhao Min came to an instant and looked at Chen Mo with a narrow look.

"I want to hear too." Zhang Xinxin also joined in with excitement.

Seeing a few women around the small fishing in his black history, Chen Mo touched his nose, laughing and laughing. Can not participate in their topic, Chen Mo can only go to the barbecue.

"What do you want to eat? I will bake you."

"Chicken wings."

"small bun."

"eggplant."

"Oysters."

"You are really welcome, my feelings come over me, it is hard work." Chen Mo helpless, still put the ingredients they said on the barbecue.

With Chen Mo as a barbecue, several women are far away from the grill and sing to chat and chat. Looking at Xiao Yu, smiling happily, Chen Mo will smile.

This kind of relaxed life is also very good.

......

Early the next morning, Chen Mo finished breakfast and left with Zhao Min to go to the company.

Last night, Chen Mo asked the ink woman to attack the computer system and server of the CIA, and also took the account of the clown organization and released a message.

After a night of fermentation, the clown organization reappeared to form the world's craziest and hottest topic, and countless people are paying attention to the next move of the clown organization.

This organization, which once kidnapped the city network and blackmailed a country, touched the nerves of countless people every time. Many self-proclaimed experts have begun to express their opinions and speculate on the ultimate goal of the clown organization.

"The clown organization has robbed your headline." Zhao Min handed Chen Mo to the phone.

Yesterday, Chen Mo was innocently present in the company, and was naturally exposed. The rumors about Chen Mo’s serious injury were not broken. These two days were the news after Chen Mo was attacked. Now the clown organization came out and immediately seized Chen Mo’s headlines.

"It's better to grab it, you can be quiet." Chen Mo said helplessly.

"Ok."

Zhao Min does not care, not enough to see the news about the clown organization, his face is cautious.

"What do you think about this attack on the clown organization? Do we want to open the voice? Now on the Internet, a lot of voices say that our Chinese programming language is causing trouble, and even suspect that we are related to the clown organization.

After all, the virus of the Chinese character programming language cannot be transmitted in our termite computer system. If the clown organization spreads the virus, we are the direct beneficiaries. ”

"The last attack did not say that we have a relationship? People sit at home, the pot comes from heaven, and it is good to keep a normal heart."

Chen Mo shook his head. The initiator of this action was him. His purpose was clear. He was retaliating against the CIA and was not spreading computer viruses. If he wants to spread computer viruses, he can screw up the global network.

"Ok."

Came to the company, Zhao Minhui office, began to arrange for the work of the clown organization attack.

Chen Mo also went to the laboratory in Building 1.

"How is the situation now?"

“The Americans issued a global wanted order and offered a reward of 20 million US dollars to seize the members of the clown organization. The intelligence departments of all countries in the world are all dispatched, and members of the clown organization are wanted to be listed. The network security department is also on standby. Now the global network is In the respective monitoring of each country, in human terms, it is an undercurrent, but unfortunately they can’t monitor the ink girl."

The holographic projection of the ink girl falls by Chen Mo.

"The countries that are close to the United States are all clinging to the clown organization. Also, the original members of the clown organization seem to know that someone is using identity and wants to retake the Twitter account."

"It seems that the clown organization has reappeared and touched many people's nerves. The Twitter account can't be returned to them for a while." Chen Mo went to the transparent screen and thought for a long time before he looked up and said: "Now start the second step, release the push Remember. Don't use our iP."

"What is the content?"

"The CIA computer system intrusion incident was initiated by us. We have mastered all CIA secret agent files and some secret information, ransom 500 million US dollars, bitcoin settlement. Do not pay ransom within two days, at your own risk."

chapters.title: Chapter 343: :Corona
chapters.body:
Chapter 343: :Corona

The clown organization has obtained the CIA agent's archives and blackmailed the CIA? This tweet news is even more terrifying than detonating a nuclear bomb.

Last time, abducting several cities and blackmailing the governments of those countries showed a clever style of clowns. This time it is the unscrupulous style that directly extorts the world's largest intelligence agency.

All the agents' data are under the control, which means that the foundation of the entire intelligence organization is shaken. It is fatal to any spy agency.

Once the intelligence bureau is abolished, it means that a country loses the dark eyes.

The purpose of this clown organization is to provoke intelligence agencies from all over the world. Some countries’ intelligence agencies got the news and were chilling.

"I don't help the urinary bird, I will serve the clown."

"All beings are Bodhi fruit, and the wicked have their own evil people. The CIA monitors the whole world and the retribution comes."

"This crazy clown, I like it! The United States thinks that he is the eldest, he is the second child."

"Support the state to pay and buy the information in the hands of the clown organization."

"..."

There are mournings in major US networks and forums, but in countries that are less friendly to the United States, there is a good voice on the Internet.

The CIA suffered, and countless people applauded.

At the same time that the news caused global shock, many people are more worried about cyber security issues. The clown organization has appeared for the second time, once more rampant than once, not only worrying, what they want to do.

In addition to the fluctuations on the surface, there are also dark tides in the corners that ordinary people cannot see.

Line ant company building No. 1.

"Merg brother, someone posted a message on the deep Internet, want to buy the archives of all agents of the CIA." The ink woman interrupted Chen Mo's thinking.

"Deep net?" Chen Mo eyes condensed.

This deep net is the darkness of many people's legends. In reality, there is a black market in the underground, and there is also a black market in the network. The deep network is the network black market, because the traces of users are difficult to track, so the transactions involved are mostly things that are not visible, and there are many fraudulent information.

“Can you track their address?” Chen Mo asked.

"Yes, although it is a little harder than Mingwang, it is only a step between the two steps and the two steps for the ink girl." The ink girl said: "There are five accounts to buy, the specific iP is New York, Osaka, Moscow. , East China Sea, Tehran, identity information is unknown."

"So much?" Chen Mo was a little surprised.

But think carefully, it's normal. The account here, in addition to the Americans themselves, other countries are competitive relations with the United States, and even the enemy, the island country is a sinister country.

If you get the files of American agents in his hands, it means that you can spend the least cost and dismantle the spy network that Americans have worked hard for many years. It is definitely a profitable business.

"No hurry, now monitor the CIA's network and see the reaction of the Americans." The news has spread, Chen Mo has been able to imagine, some of the popular appearance.

The CIA office building, although it is now at night, is still brightly lit. In the office of the director, all kinds of messy sounds are echoing.

"Damn, oh. The son of the clown."

Linna took the file in her hand and squatted on the computer screen. The whole person's hair is scattered, his face is crazy, like a wild beast.

Knowing that the agent's file was moved, now the clown sends out this threat and extorts the ransom. Now she also got the news that someone in the deep network was looking for the information in the hands of the clown. Even if a ransom is paid to the clown organization, there is no guarantee that the clown will not sell the information to others.

In any case, it means that the espionage network operated by the CIA for many years is completely scrapped and the losses are immeasurable.

For more than 20 years of special agent career, she has always been very good at her emotional control, otherwise it is impossible to dance on the tip of the knife for more than 20 years.

But all the calmness and arrogance were spurred by the clown organization. Just now, the president personally contacted him and stole her. For the first time in 20 years, she was turned into a waste.

If the person in the clown organization is in front of her, it will definitely be able to swallow the other person.

"Secretary." When Linna was mad, an assistant knocked in and walked in. Seeing the chaotic scenes in the office, the subconscious swallowed.

"What? The people of the clown organization caught it?" Lina blinked red, with a murderous voice in her voice.

"No, the meeting is ready."

"You go out first." Linna sounds cold.

Assistants such as Meng Dazhen, subconsciously stepped out of the office. When I walked outside the office, I found that my back had been soaked in cold sweat.

Two minutes later, Linna came out of the office and resumed her ruthless appearance. It’s just the cold flash of the eyes, which makes people’s backs cool.

"Go."

Linna said coldly and walked over to the conference room.

There are more than a dozen chairs in the office, but only two or three people sit. Linna wore holographic glasses and appeared in a chair with a holographic figure. Everyone's face is not good, but their eyes are gathered on Linna.

They are the main high-level intelligence officers of the CIA, and the divisions are all over the world. Now this kind of thing has happened and they have to be called to open the holographic conference.

"Is there a news from the clown organization?" Linna sounded cold and endured endless anger.

"We investigated the iP address sent by the network security department in the past. There are no suspicious people. They are ordinary people. It is just their computer that has been used by hackers."

One of them opened the door and the rest of the crowd nodded, indicating that the situation was the same.

"Damn mouse." Linna squinted and punched at the conference table: "What good way do you have?"

"I don't think about it for a while.

"Are you sure the information is really gone? Maybe the clown organization is scaring us and wants to cheat our money."

Several other people on the field also spoke and agreed with this idea.

"The engineer said that the clown organization had the archives of the agents. As for how much it was moving, it is still being checked." Linna said, biting her teeth and screaming.

"Shit, hell."

"Fak..."

“Waste is waste.”

I got Linna’s affirmative answer, and all the people in the seat were swearing. Disclosure of information means that their identity may also be exposed at any time.

"To pay the ransom, do you want to return the information?"

When this was said, she was denied by Lina: "Impossible, we can't bow to those terrorists. Even if we give ransom, we can't rule out whether they will sell the information to other people or leak it. Those materials are taken. After leaving, it is no secret."

"If you don't pay, he will definitely leak out. If our mission fails, we will be in danger. Do you want to destroy the entire CIA?"

One of them looked at Linna angrily, and everyone should be.

"I don't want to destroy, it's a clown organization. How do I know that the CIA's firewall is so vulnerable? Why don't you ask the technical department's waste?" Linna also followed.

"Then what do you tell me now? Are you afraid to die?" The fire of a special agent was also ignited.

Dancing on the tip of the knife is dangerous enough, and now there is a gun on the head, not sure if it will suddenly fire. The feeling of waiting for death is simply a torment.

"We can't compromise with the clown organization, so you should withdraw it first. You are the main liaison for the informant, except for the personnel on the file, there are some important intelligence personnel who are not recorded in the file, only you have contact methods. The main Agents must first withdraw and minimize the risk. Important intelligence personnel will keep it, and after the storm, reorganize the information..."

Hey! The meeting was still going on. An assistant opened the door and stumbled in. His face was full of fear, his hands and feet were shaking, and he was panicked, as if he had encountered the most terrible thing.

"You better give me a reasonable reason, or you will die very hard to see." Linna, who was interrupted by the meeting, had a cold face and a murderous voice.

"The clown organization posted a list on Twitter." The assistant shuddered and handed the tablet in his hand to Linna.

Seeing the list above, Linna's eyes are wide, her body is unconsciously shaking, holding a tablet crazy, hateful: "Bastard, **** clown. Ah..."

"The clown raised by the bitch, hehe..."

After the madness, Linna squirted blood on the flat plate in her hand, and her eyes turned over and she was fainted.

chapters.title: Chapter 344: : Also Want A Ransom?
chapters.body:
Chapter 344: : Also Want A Ransom?

Li Jizheng sat in the office, and the head of the team leader under the jurisdiction, analyzed the information and investigation progress of some suspicious foreign informants.

When he received the unknown line report and completely removed the island country's Lingjiao Group from the domestic spy personnel, he was also valued by the organization and transferred to become the head of the anti-spyware office.

As the anti-espionage agency under the Ministry of National Security, their task is to secretly search for agents and informants who are inserted in China.

"Head, the clown organization announced a list of some agents." A team member took a list and ran to interrupt their meeting.

"let me see."

When he heard the clown organization, Li Jizheng lost his pen and took the list in his hand.

The clown organization he knows is the cyber hacking organization that has been raging today. Attacking the US CIA, claiming to steal the CIA's secret agent files, so that the intelligence security departments of various countries are worried.

At present, the important archives of their offices have been managed by the network. They are temporarily independent of the network. All other secret materials are all dealt with by the emergency network. This means that they will be attacked by clowns and will end up in the same way as the CIA.

The tragedy of the CIA’s computer system being easily invaded tells them that the network is indeed less secure.

Many people hate the clown organization, and they are the same. The clown organized this action and made them sleepless.

Looking at the contents of the list, Li Jizheng was not so happy, but his face was gloomy, like the sky before the storm.

"Action immediately, arrest people." Li Jizheng said coldly.

"Head, aren't you afraid that this is a fake list?" The captain of a team saw the list above, cold sweat, and there were many people with sensitive identities.

"There are ten countries and more than two hundred people. The clown is a hacker organization, not an intelligence organization. I would rather be credible. If it is a fake list, I assume responsibility." Li Jizheng decisively ordered.

For a time, the wind was rising.

In the countries where the list is on, the anti-espionage department is in the first place to act and start to catch people crazy. The ‘clown organization’ announced the list this time, completely stirring the world’s situation.

Originally thought that the clown organization extorted the CIA, it was already the climax of the incident. However, the list of spies who had no warnings on Twitter pushed the incident to a new height and became world-famous.

The first batch of published lists involved ten major countries and regions such as China, Russia, Europe, and the Middle East. There are only more than 20 people on each country's list. But the horror of this list is tantamount to a blockbuster. The people involved above are the most important line reporters of the CIA.

While the famous countries on the list seized the intelligence personnel, the Ministry of Foreign Affairs also condemned the United States once.

Countless people who eat melons are all things that don’t care about their high watch.

In addition to the sympathy for the CIA, the issue of cybersecurity is also known as the hottest topic of discussion.

When the clown organization first kidnapped a city, network security was fragmented. Now the ‘clown organization’ is making a comeback, once again triggering concerns about the global Internet security crisis.

With the news of all aspects of the fermentation, many people have once again turned their attention back to the clown blackmail CIA incident.

Now that the clown organization has proved that they have a list in their hands, will the CIA deliver the ransom? If a ransom is paid, the clown organization will keep its promise and destroy the list. If the ransom is not paid, will the clown organization publish the list or sell the information to an American opponent.

With a variety of mentality, the eyes of the world's major media, once again placed on the Twitter of the clown organization.

As the protagonist of the event, Chen Mo also paid attention to the direction of the incident in the study. Everyone did not know that the cause of the Internet earthquake was only a retaliation by Chen Mo for the CIA.

He made a temporary decision to announce a partial list, which is to know the meeting that Linna opened. It is absolutely impossible for the other party to pay the ransom, and he is naturally clear.

Therefore, he chose to publish the CIA's list of the heads of the most important intelligence stations in the world, as well as the most important informants, to shake the foundation of the CIA's global intelligence network.

Knowing that Linna was mad at vomiting blood, Chen Mo’s heart was out of his mouth.

The CIA's people not only planned to kidnap him, but also hurt the small fishing, which has already violated Chen Mo's bottom line. He will never stop until the other party has paid a large enough price. He could not send people to assassinate Reina, so he directly targeted the entire CIA, because Linna is the director of the CIA.

Chen Mo looked at the time, and now it is time for the CIA to choose whether or not to pay the ransom.

"Ink girl, send a message to the CIA."

......

Linna followed the assistant and walked behind a technician. On the computer screen of the technician, it is an email that was sent by the ‘clown organization’.

At this time, Linna’s face was frosty and her body was unstable: “How do they say?”

This time, the clown organization completely shattered her face and put it on the ground with her ankle. Being proud of her, she has never encountered such a shame.

"They ask us to pay the ransom, otherwise we will be at your own risk."

The technician gave the position and the contents of the mail appeared in front of Linna.

"I still want a ransom?" Linna trembled with anger.

The list of people published by the 'Clown Organization' was developed by the CIA after spending years or even more than a decade. These people are very latent and concealed and have the opportunity to enter important core institutions in all countries.

But now, the ‘clown organization’ is a list of light and ruined all their efforts, and they have no time to react.

At the moment she saw the list, she was so angry that she vomited blood.

The CIA’s nearly ten-year effort was ruined in her hands, an unprecedented failure and shame.

"Can you find the other person's iP?" Linna looked at others.

"The technical department is tracking."

"Respond to the clown, how can we guarantee that we will pay the ransom, so the information will be returned to us, not to the third party? First drag him. Give me the fastest speed, trace the other's position." Linna voice Sen Han, with There is a strong hatred.

The technical staff did not dare to oppose it and acted directly.

"The clown replied, they said, they will keep their promises, we have no choice but to believe."

"Damn." Linna snorted and the other party ate her, but she had no choice: "Tell him, time is too short, we can't raise $500 million in bitcoin."

"He said, give him all the bitcoin he can raise."

"Tracing the other's iP address, in Amsterdam." A technician suddenly started to start, excited.

"Ask him, where to trade, how to trade. Hold him, don't let him notice, let the action department immediately arrest people." Linna said coldly.

At the first time she ordered, the CIA made a phone call and directly notified the secret service personnel in Europe to start arresting people.

chapters.title: Chapter 345: : Watching The Show
chapters.body:
Chapter 345: : Watching The Show

The CIA went to Amsterdam to catch people?

The ink girl told Chen Mo the first time. Upon hearing this news, Chen Mo just smiled. He guessed that there would be such a result, the iP address, just a downtime controlled by the ink girl, as a springboard and the CIA dialogue.

For the ink girl, each iP is true, but each iP is also fake.

"Give them an hour. If you don't pay the ransom within an hour, you will be at your own risk." Chen Mo said: "In the dark network, after an hour, sell US agent files, a $20 million, bitcoin transaction."

Knowing that the clown organization had placed a trading message on the dark network, Linna was angry and almost smashed the computer.

"Damn, how dare they?"

At this time, Lina trembled like a bomb that exploded at any time. The people around them were frightened. They were the first to see this hot and ruthless director, and this kind of emotional out of control scene.

But think about it too. As the world's largest intelligence agency, they were played by a small hacker organization. This feeling of being controlled is really uncomfortable.

"Respond to the clown and return the Archives of the hacked, we are not guilty. The CIA needs their talents. If they can join us, they can get everything they want."

After Linna forced her to calm down, her eyes stared coldly at the computer screen, as if she wanted to see clearly, the **** clown was hidden in the computer.

The mail was sent out, but the message was sent out, but no reply was received. Time passed by, and the CIA’s office was quiet and terrible. It seemed that the air had to condense.

People in the office should be careful when they breathe.

Half an hour passed and everyone was waiting, and every minute was a torment for them.

Oh...

A telephone bell breaks the strange silence, and everyone looks at the source of the voice, which is the person in charge of the action department.

"The address in Amsterdam is fake, no one here."

"Damn."

Not only Lina, but also the technicians responsible for tracking, I also looked angry and had a feeling of being played.

The news made everyone on the field sneak and finally set their sights on Linna.

"Director, is it better to ransom the other party?"

A more prestigious high-level opening, everyone on the field turned his gaze to him.

"Now if we give him a ransom, they may not disclose the information. If we don't pay the ransom, the information will definitely be leaked out. This is a gamble. We have no choice but to fight together... ”

The top executive began to analyze the powerful relationship, and others saw it and nodded.

Think of that information as a bet worth two billion, they can only fight one. If the other party is trustworthy, they exchange the breathing time at a lower price. If the other party is not trustworthy, they can only admit that they are unlucky. But that information can shake the foundation of their CIA, and in any case, they must fight together.

"You will believe in a fear. Terror. Is it a credit?" Lina blackened her face.

"When they kidnapped several cities and received the money, they also kept their promises. Their purpose is money. If they don't give them money, then half an hour later, the information will fall into the hands of our enemies. China, Russia And Middle Easterners, they will be happy to buy the file for $20 million."

"Even if the information leaks, I will not compromise with them."

"Who is responsible? Who can afford this responsibility? The intelligence network is completely destroyed, can you afford the responsibility? Director." A senior executive is also angry.

"I am responsible."

"What are you responsible for? Take your abuse of the prisoner's stains? Take your position as the director? If the intelligence network that the CIA has worked hard for many years, if it is destroyed, is it a simple responsibility for you?"

"The files on the computer system involve up to half of the intelligence personnel. We have the foundation and can come back. If we compromise, the clown will publish the information again, we will become a joke around the world. It represents the United States, to a terrorist organization. Bow down, then did you know what was the loss?"

......

The dispute between the two sides has made the CIA full of gunpowder. Now the CIA executives are teamed up with their respective parties. One party supports the ransom and one party is against the ransom.

The time went by a little bit, the two sides were deadlocked, and the atmosphere was restored to a strange silence.

"The clown organization released Twitter. Since we did not pay the ransom within the specified time, they had to sell the intelligence in their hands, 20 million copies, and had already reached a deal with eight buyers."

"Now you are satisfied? You are ready to step down." A senior CIA officer snorted with a black face and turned away.

Linna angered and shuddered and walked back to her office. At the moment of closing the door, Linna also broke out completely.

"Fak, Bichi! Dog. Niang. Raised clown organization, don't fall in my hands, or I will make you worse than death... ah..." In the office, all kinds of broken voices scared people outside. Shrink the neck.

The entire CIA is a bleak cloud.

Another quiet place.

As the initiator of everything behind, Chen Mo, at this time, is sitting in the laboratory leisurely, paying attention to the reactions of all parties.

As he thought, the CIA did not compromise.

If the other party compromises and pays the ransom, he will release the information again, so Linna will step down. This is his purpose, but unfortunately it has not been reached, but it is enough for the other party to hurt for a while, and he has no idea to reinvent his idea.

In order to do a full set of drama, he sold the information to several people. As for the identity of the other party, Chen Mo was too lazy to check. Anyway, his purpose of revenge for the CIA has been reached.

"Momgo, what should I do next?" The holographic projection of the ink girl who fell in front of Chen Mo.

"Look at the show." Chen Moxiao smiled. The purpose of his revenge has been reached, and the next step is to think about how to end the incident. But before that, let the event ferment.

In the next few days, the world is in a lot of fun.

The clown organization really sold the information of the CIA's espionage network. This crazy practice has made countless people secretly admire their courage.

Dare to be so arrogant, there is only one such hacker organization in the world.

Shortly after the news from the ‘clown organization’, the CIA also issued a global wanted order, offering a reward of $30 million for members of the clown organization.

In the United States, the fermentation of clown events has attracted criticism from all sides. This also allowed the opposition party to seize the handle and directly attack the incumbent government, which led to many demonstrations.

The United States is very lively and other countries are not calm.

The country that got the archives of the CIA spy network was the first to act. In the corners that ordinary people are not paying attention to, the action of destroying the CIA intelligence network is being carried out vigorously. From time to time, there is news that an official has broken the rules or that a businessman has committed suicide or disappeared.

On the list, one of the informant agents was detained for interrogation or secret execution, and some of them got the wind and fled in advance. In the list of wanted people in various countries, there are many more when the ordinary people are not paying attention.

The intelligence network operated by the CIA for many years was destroyed in just a few days. The impact of the clown organization's invasion of the CIA event reached its climax in the past few days.

The impact of the incident, beyond the horror of imagination, many people are worried about which country the next target of the clown organization will be.

chapters.title: Chapter 346: :Game Over?
chapters.body:
Chapter 346: :Game Over?

According to Reuters news, the Paris police announced the arrest of former MP Bliss, an unnamed official suggested that the incident was related to the US CIA spy incident.

The SÜD reported that according to relevant sources, several senior government officials were under the control of the police and are under investigation.

According to Pravda, the Russian General Security Administration announced that the agency’s anti-spyware agency has captured more than 20 US spies who are trying to recruit Russian intelligence agencies. Among them, the spy named Fore is a member of the US Embassy in Russia and is engaged in spying work in Russia. The Russian side has summoned the US ambassador to Russia and expressed dissatisfaction with the US approach.

"People's Daily" news...

The news that suspected seizures of spies have been heard in various countries has ignited a huge wave around the world. This time, the clown organization not only stirred up the storm of global cybersecurity, but also provoked other waves.

But for these reports, the official of each country did not give an accurate reply. If you give a positive response, it is tantamount to side recognition, they have already got the list in the hands of the clown organization.

The ‘clown organization’ is now classified as a terrorist organization, and it is not a glorious thing to deal with them.

The international situation, because the clown organization sold the information of the US CIA, has now been undercurrent. People in many countries can't wait to kiss a 'clown organization'.

A list allows them to spend the least price and get the most results, almost uprooting the CIA's intelligence network in their country.

......

"Idiot, rice bucket, even a hacker organization can not catch, the CIA people are rice buckets?"

The White House, the president's office, an old man with a golden hair and a ruddy face, slammed the information in his hand on the table and pointed at Linna's swearing.

He is the current president of the United States, Donald Trump, a highly controversial businessman. Linna is the new CIA director appointed by him to rule out the dispute. He is also the first female director.

I just didn't expect that the CIA was played by the clown organization in the clown invasion, and it was in the face of people all over the world.

The news that was brought back to him now is not caught by members of the clown organization, but the intelligence network that has been working hard for many years, and most of them have been damaged.

After the clown sold the list, in the past few days, intelligence personnel scattered in various countries, as long as they were on the list, will disappear or die in various ways.

The global intelligence network has almost collapsed.

There is no worse news than this.

The fact that the clown leaked the list of agents has caused domestic dissatisfaction. Originally, his support rate in the country was not high. Now various demonstrations are held, and his ability to support the president is suspected.

There is a lot of pressure on the Congress and the opposition party, and he must also give an account. Because Linna is the director of the CIA he appointed, the CIA is also in the hands of Lina, and she was destroyed more than half.

Think of Trump, I can't wait to tear up the files in front of me.

Linna said nothing, facing the president's instructions, she could only bear to bear it. Because this is the case, in her hands, the intelligence network of the CIA was destroyed by more than half.

"What are you going to do now?" Trump seemed to have enough, calm down and sit back.

If this matter is not handled well, in the next election, it will become the handle of other politicians attacking him. Someone must be responsible for this matter, otherwise it will be very unfavorable to his political career.

"I will definitely pick up the people of the clown organization." Linna voice with hate.

"Sure? Now I don't even know where people are, what guarantee do you have?" Trump's ruddy complexion is gloomy, and if his team is not lacking, he will immediately ask Linna to resign.

Today, the CIA’s global network, because of the clown organization, has been ruined. At this time, if the CIA director resigns, it will only make the CIA, which has already been riddled with holes, become more troublesome.

"If I don't catch the clown organization within a month, I will resign."

When the last clown organization kidnapped the city, the director of the CIA was Pompey. She didn't care about this, so she didn't feel much about the clown organization.

Today she is the director, and she has just taken office.

In her hands, the CIA’s world intelligence network has almost collapsed and has completely shaken the foundation of the CIA intelligence network. The CIA became the protagonist of the clown invasion and was humiliated in the face of people all over the world.

Her proud character does not allow her to suffer such a failure.

Chen Mo, who is the initiator of the development of the event, saw a lot of reports and was a bit gloating.

The clown invasion incident, coupled with the destruction of the global intelligence network, as the director of the CIA, Linna's days are certainly not good.

Unfortunately, there is no evidence that Linna abuses the prisoner, otherwise Chen Mo does not mind publicizing, letting people clean her up.

Because of this revenge, it set off a storm that shocked the world.

Now that it is big enough, the revenge he wants is also reached, and it is time to end. Otherwise, it will continue to make trouble and shake the stability of the Internet. It really is not good.

"Ink girl, send a message on the clown's Twitter account." Chen Mo said.

"send what?"

The projection of the ink girl appeared next to Chen Mo.

Chen Mo touched his chin and said: "My heart is like this face, half pure white, half shadow, I can choose to let you see, or you can insist that you do not see.

This circus performance makes me excited, but it makes you afraid. Because you are beasts, I am a beast clown. The invasion of the CIA was successful, and the proceeds from selling the materials were $180 million. Late at night, the circus performance ended and I look forward to the opening of the next circus. ”

"Okay, it has been sent." The ink girl said: "Momgo, is this finished?"

"It’s over, it’s not over.” Chen Mo shook his head and said: "The revenge is over. As for how long the aftermath will last, it is not known."

The ‘Clown Organization’ appeared this time, and the CIA, which is known as one of the four largest intelligence agencies in the world, was half-mutilated. This incident once again caused people’s concerns about cybersecurity. How long after the aftermath subsided, it was not his control.

"What about the clown's account? Someone has been trying to crack the account password, and the ink girl is blocking it." The ink girl asked.

"Account? Let them crack, now the account is useless to us." Chen Mo said nothing.

It is estimated that the clown organization is mad at this time. It is not them who do this kind of thing, but they have to bear the anger from the whole world, and they still have no benefits. It can be said that it is the biggest network black pot.

game over?

The ‘clown organization’ suddenly announced that the people who were concerned about the news were all dumbfounded. Still the same way as the first kidnapping of the city, I took the money and ran.

Now that global cybersecurity concerns have been detonated, the CIA has also been played with a half-disability, and things have reached the peak of the tide. The protagonist of the trouble has ran.

This kind of abrupt way, people can not wait to tear the clown.

"Fak, Bi. Pool... Damn clown! Ah..."

When I heard the announcement of the clown organization, the most frustrating thing was Linna. This kind of unhappiness, just like the end of love half way, she can't go up, can't come down.

Now promised to the president, within a month, caught the clown organization, and now the other party does not play. If the other party disappears again, even if she has a great ability, it is impossible to pull the other party out.

She can only pray now, and after the announcement of the clown organization, she will still be active on the Internet, so that she will have the opportunity to seize each other.

After calming down, Linna's eyes braved the cold and picked up the phone and said, "Call CCi, Cog and the office of the Science and Technology Office."

chapters.title: Chapter 347: : Tomoki Amami
chapters.body:
Chapter 347: : Tomoki Amami

The island of Hokkaido, in the basement of a separate villa.

Tianhai Zhishu is focusing on the computer screen, and his fingers are constantly tapping on the keyboard. Looking at the code like a flowing window, he still looks blank.

He is a member of the clown organization.

When the Chinese character programming language first came out, someone started a communication group of Chinese character programming languages on the hacking forum, named the clown.

It happened that his father was Chinese. He mastered Chinese and wanted to learn this new computer language, so he joined it.

They have written a variety of codes and tools in Chinese programming languages many times, and the knowledge they have acquired has matured.

The virus that knew the Huaxia Jiangnan virus incident was originally written by the Chinese character programming language. They are all curious, what is the code of the virus, will be so crazy spread, so plan to steal the virus code.

They are ecstatic to discover the powerful spread of viruses and the ability to penetrate firewalls. In order to show their technology to the world, they planned a crazy action to kidnap a city.

This incident caused guilt inside the clown.

The founder and some of the clowns left, and the rest of the others formed a new clown organization.

Planning to kidnap a city successfully, a sense of accomplishment, they also lost money, they rarely disappeared.

However, a sudden burst of time ago, the 'Clown Organization' reappeared and invaded the CIA. As one of them, they are collectively forced.

They have the ability to kidnap a city because ordinary people's firewalls are easy to invade. There is also a strong spread of the 'Clown Virus', which has been successful after many people have planned for a long time.

But the successful abduction of a city's network does not mean they have the ability to break the CIA's computer system firewall.

Someone has done it now.

In the name of ‘clown’, even the style of speaking and arrogance is the same as them.

When they heard the news, they were all shocked and thought it was what other members did. The results were related to each other and it was discovered that the hands-on was not theirs and their Twitter account was hacked.

Not only is the account hacked, but it is also a black pot for others. This is simply a slap in the face of all of them.

If you admit that their account has been stolen, it is to play your own face.

They dared to kidnap a city in order to show their technology to the world. Pride is like them, it is impossible to admit that this kind of face-breaking thing happened to them, otherwise they are a joke.

So the clown organization owner, began to jointly deal with this 'counterfeit goods' and retrieve the Twitter account. After retrieving at least the account number, even if they don't clarify, they can get back a little face, and the name of the invading CIA will fall on them.

So with his current action to crack accounts.

In a few days, the account password still has no meaning to be cracked. It seems that there is an invisible wall in front of him, no progress, and other members have encountered the same problem.

But the cracking action is still going on, just want to use other methods to crack? Tianhai knows the tree.

Drops...

Suddenly, the computer's prompt interrupted his thoughts.

Seeing the words 'cracking success', Tianhai Zhishu dilated and the color of his face slowly emerged.

After cracking for a week, I tried all the means he could use, and did not crack the account password. It’s finally cracked, and it’s more exciting than the computer system he invaded into an organization.

Hesitated for a moment, Tianhai Zhishu hangs on the machine and starts trying to log in to the account.

......

At the same time, the CIA Command Center.
