At this time, the command center assembled all the members of the CIA (Network Intelligence Center), which is a division of the DDi (Digital Innovation Division), one of the five major institutions of the CIA.

In addition to the members of CCi, they also concentrated on members of Cog (Computer Network Action Group) and other computer experts in the Office of Science and Technology.

In the hall at this time, in a tense atmosphere. Everyone tightens their nerves and looks for clues about the clown virus.

After Linna returned from the office of the president, she summoned all the masters of the situation.

The goal is to monitor the activities of the clown organization 24 hours a day, hoping to find any clues about the clown organization.

This is almost the biggest move in the history of the CIA, in order to wash the shame that the clown organization brought them.

Their time is only one month.

However, the clown organization suddenly announced that the game is over, it is an account, and will not log in again, it is a problem.

The search for the online world is more troublesome than finding a needle in a haystack. They can start to listen to the global skills, and they may not be able to find clues.

"The clown's account is online again."

Suddenly, a rushing voice made everyone feel shocked.

After waiting for a day, finally there was movement.

"Let's get out." Morrison walked over to the computer screen and glanced at the position of the technician: "Give me a tracking code, I want to locate the account login."

The last time the clown organization kidnapped the city, he and the other party handed over, but ended in failure. The other party made a lot of preparations in advance to let him track down the failure. This time, he was called back again, or a clown organization. He wanted to be ashamed.

"The iP that is logged in is definitely a downtime or a fake iP. We have tried many times to track this trick and have failed. The hidden means of the other party is very good," said the famous employee.

If it can be traced, the clown organization has long been uprooted by them, rather than letting them lose face in front of people all over the world.

"Try to try if you fail," Morrison said.

"Sir, the tracking code has been sent to you."

"Okay, I have received it."

Morrison's fingers are madly tapping on the keyboard, and they are racing against time. It seems that they will be off the assembly line in the next second. In less than half a minute, Morrison pressed the Enter key, and a dotted line appeared on the LCD screen.

"iP tracking..."

The dotted lines continue to jump and connect to addresses that are spread across the globe. The dense dotted lines, on the world map, even the transaction formed an invisible net.

Everyone in the office looks at the LCD screen.

They tried it many times, and the addresses that were eventually tracked were fake or ended in failure. For this attempt, everyone did not have much hope, but still want to see the results.

Drops...

"iP lock is successful."

When I saw the red dot on the map locked in Vancouver, Canada, everyone on the field looked away and tracked successfully? This result is beyond their expectation.

Everyone has a little bit of hope on their faces. They all hope that the address that is locked this time can be true.

"The iP address is locked, check its location." Morrison said.

“The address is the island of Hokkaido, Tenri, which is an independent villa.”

A satellite map that locks over a villa.

The director of the CIA next to him also looked cautiously: "I will immediately investigate the archives of the owner of the villa."

"I found out that Tianhai Zhishu, a native of the island, graduated from Kyoto University with a major in computer science. After graduation, he worked as an engineer in a software company. He resigned a year ago and is a freelancer..."

"It is him, let the hawk in the island of Hokkaido act immediately, go to this address immediately, carry out the arrest, do not worry about exposing identity, use the fastest speed."

"Listen to my command and hack into his computer system." Morrison was not disturbed by other people, and his eyes were locked on the computer screen.

At this time, the atmosphere in the command center was already very tense.

"it is good."

All members of the cyber action team began the invasion.

Dennis blackened his face and played a twelve-point spirit. This is his shameful opportunity. The clown organization succeeded in invading him. He hit his face slyly. If he didn't find the other person, it would become a hurdle in his heart.

At that time, he could even get into the computer system of the US Air Force. Now the other party is just a hacker. For him, the problem should be small.

"Finding system vulnerabilities, I found each other a back door." Dennis saw the computer's display.

"Black is going in."

Warning: Unauthorized access was detected.

Pants lock Daller (by)!

Seeing the warning on the computer display, Tianhai Zhishu’s face changed greatly, and he couldn’t help but burst into a foul mouth and began to resist the invasion.

He knows that this account belongs to many people's attention accounts, but he overestimates his personal ability and underestimates the other's ability to track.

This is the official account of the ‘clown organization’! Thinking, Tianhai Zhishu cold sweat DC. Being tracked by the other party to the iP, he knows that his location and identity are definitely exposed.

If you fall into the hands of the CIA, the consequences can be imagined, and he thinks he has a chill.

At this time, Tianhai Zhishu could not wait to fan himself, but he just regretted that it was useless. After calming down, he began to repair computer loopholes. He also held the last trace of luck.

Time passed by in a minute, and the cold sweat of Tian Haizhi’s forehead was getting denser.

Oh...

During his thoughts, the alarm of the villa was invaded, and the villa's camera was seen. Only a few black people had entered the villa.

So fast? Tianhai Zhishu’s face was pale, and it was less than half an hour. The other party had already found it.

"idiot."

Tianhai Zhishu did not hesitate to pick up the hard disk of the desktop and escape from the back door of the basement.

The CIA intelligence network was destroyed. It is conceivable that even if he hides in the ends of the earth, the CIA will still find him. In today's situation, only official asylum can be sought, which is stronger than falling in the hands of the CIA.

chapters.title: Chapter 348: : The Whole Body Retreats (Third More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 348: : The Whole Body Retreats (Third More)

"Asahi Shimbun": One of the members of the clown organization surrendered to the island police. According to sources, the member denied that the clown organization had invaded the CIA computer system and claimed that the official Twitter account of the clown organization was stolen.

"New York Times": Clown members chased for the CIA and surrendered to the island police! He also claimed that the account was stolen and denied the invasion of the CIA. At present, the CIA official and the US Foreign Ministry urged the island countries to hand over the clown organization members, and the United States is responsible for the trial.

Bloomberg News: Clown members surrendered to the island police. Some sources said that the member had submitted the ‘clown virus’ source code to the island police and denied that the CIA incident was related to the clown organization, saying that the official account of the clown organization was stolen.

Global Network News: The clown organization officially released the news, denying the invasion of the CIA incident, the account was stolen, will not be black-handed.

"The whole world is shocked! The clown organization turned out to be..." - squirrel headlines

"Huaxia hackers steal the official account of the clown! 》——BBC

......

A wave of unrest, a wave of up again. The news of the self-sufficiency of the clown organization members was revealed by the insiders, and various news immediately occupied the headlines of all platforms.

The official launch of the ‘clown organization’ just announced the end of the game. The result was less than one day and the situation reversed. Now the official of the 'Clown Organization' actually denies the invasion of the CIA incident, making the world's melons stunned.

Who stole the account of the clown organization? Why use the coat of the clown organization to invade the CIA? Is the clown's self-directed performance? Still the beginning of the next conspiracy?

This reversal is too fast, so many people are caught off guard, and the answer becomes more confusing.

A variety of news, the whole world is in a lively state, and another place is very lively.

The University of Tokyo, the Institute of Artificial Intelligence Development, the Murakami Water Stop and the members of the team behind it, looked at the test results and was jubilant.

"There is really a smart code, hahahaha..."

The Chinese character programming language is a better language than the existing high-level computer languages. Their team has noticed this when the 'Clown Virus' shocked the world.

The intelligent program of the marching ant company is developed by the Chinese character programming language. Moreover, the artificial intelligence of the marching ant company, its intelligence level, is far behind the artificial intelligence of other companies in the world.

Combined with some ideas, they suspect that Chinese programming languages may have better results in artificial intelligence research. Therefore, as one of the most advanced teams in the artificial intelligence research institute of the island country, they are also committed to learning Chinese programming languages and trying to develop artificial intelligence.

When the 'Clown Virus' broke out in the same year, they guessed that the source code of the virus might contain a fragment of the smart program, which would make it horrible.

They always thought about getting the source code of the 'Clown Virus'. Now the clown organization members surrendered and handed over the source code of the 'Clown Virus' and finally let them get what they wanted.

The first time they got the 'Clown Virus', they started testing.

I didn't expect their guess to be correct. The 'Clown Virus' really contains intelligent code. It seems now that the 'Clown Virus' is in the hands of clowns. It is simply a violent thing.

If this intelligent program may provide a breakthrough for their artificial intelligence research, the value is immeasurable. The team is ecstatic to think of their future achievements in the field of artificial intelligence.

He wants to use Chinese character programming language to develop artificial intelligence, but only the army ant company in the world masters the artificial intelligence algorithm of Chinese character programming. The team masters are few of them that they have explored.

Therefore, they can only find another way. Other artificial intelligence algorithms have matured. If they can combine the intelligent program of Chinese character programming with other intelligent programs, will there be a breakthrough in the field of artificial intelligence?

“Now, try to embed this smart program into the existing smart program.” Murakami’s mind has a crazy and bold plan to create an ‘artificial intelligence mixed-race’.

......

"Do you want to resign? Why?"

Chen Mo looked at Wei Zhe and looked very serious. He was also surprised that Wei Zhe suddenly made this request.

Now Wei Zhe is also a member of the marching ant company, director of the Chinese character programming department, member of the holographic eco-software development team, and a member of the artificial intelligence development team.

Now that Wei Zhe is going to resign, Chen Mo can not let go.

"Yes, I am one of the founders of the clown's predecessor. The emergence of the clown organization, I also have some responsibility. Now things are so big, and membership is exposed. If my identity is detected, I am afraid it is not good for the company. I don't want to be tired of the company." Wei Zhe said.

Chen Mo has a good understanding of him, he does not want to leave the army ant company, but he is said to be the founder of the clown, if his identity is exposed, I am afraid that the company will be stuffed in the storm.

In the near future, he has tossed and turned. Because the clown is the product he once assembled, although he quit because of guilt, but he does not feel at ease.

"It turned out to be this." Chen Mo smiled easily.

Wei Zhe was the founder of the original clown. At that time, the Chinese character programming language was just coming out, and there were not many proficient people. Wei Zhe was one of them.

Because of the talents of the marching ant company, after the ‘clown virus’ crisis, he personally went to Huaibei City and invited Wei Zhe to join the company.

It is estimated that during this time, the clown organization appeared again, and now some people have been detected, and his pressure is not small.

"If it is because of this, you still go back to work. Now you, nothing to do with the clown organization, you are now an engineer of our company, not the founder of the clown organization." Chen Mo said: "And, know who you used to be and Not much, only me and the president know that you don't announce your identity, no one knows."

"But just..."

“Nothing.” Chen Mo interrupted Wei Zhe’s words: “I can find you, and naturally I can erase your connection with the clown organization. You don’t admit that no one can detect clues. Even if you admit, there is no evidence. The crimes are not necessarily established. So I am worried that if I am tired of the company, I don't have to think about it.

"can……"

“Is the salary low? Or do you want to go out and start your own business?” Chen Mo once again interrupted Wei Zhe.

"No, the boss, you have the right to know me. The salary now is something I couldn't imagine before. I didn't think about leaving the company." Wei Zhe explained with a smile.

"Then work well, this matter has nothing to do with you, how to check it can not find you." Chen Mo pushed the resignation letter on the table back to Wei Zhe.

"Well, the boss is not worried, if I am afraid, it will become a coward." Wei Zhe laughed at himself, took back his resignation letter and tore it, and put it in the trash can next to it.

"That's right. I know your identity and I am looking for you. Naturally, I don't worry about your business going to the company, so don't think too much. Soon, the capital will have an artificial intelligence conference. Jia, there is Lin Shu to lead the team."

"Boss, don't you go?" Wei Zhe asked.

"I will pass. However, the company announced this time the 'Artificial Intelligence +' program. This project, you three are the main person in charge, many things are clearer than me, naturally you are going to talk. I used to talk about one Talking about dreams. I am getting off work now, and I should go back to my wife."

Wei Zhe smiled easily and turned away. Chen Mo also took out a ring box from the drawer and left the office.

The turmoil of the 'Clown Organization' is now full of the storms of the world. But all this has nothing to do with him. He has already retired from the whole body and naturally will not participate anymore. The revenge he wants has been reached, and there is still a lot of business to do.

chapters.title: Chapter 349: : Surprise (Fourth More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 349: : Surprise (Fourth More)

When I got home, Chen Mo smelled the smell of the food. Chen Mu and Xiao Yu Ma are serving the hot dishes on the table. Xiao Yu sees Chen Mo coming back and greets them. Xin Xin and Xiao Man are playing games. Seeing Chen Mo coming back, he also looked up and said hello.

Chen Mo put a good backpack, changed the slippers, and a talented person went to the table to eat. The two old people are very happy. Naturally, the injury of Xiaoyu has been cured.

"Small fish, you eat a little more. You look at this time injured, people are thin." Chen mother Shao Xuemei said.

Xiao Yu was recently at home, forced to drink chicken soup to eat tonic, are quickly being used as pigs, but in the eyes of the mother, the child is always thin, can only nod.

"Now the wound is healed, and the body needs to be adjusted in the future. If you become pregnant, you will be pregnant."

"Right right." Chen Mu should also be.

Xiao Yu's face is instantly pink: "Mom, there is still no."

"So prepare."

The two parents sang together and made Xiao Yu a little ashamed. Next to Xiao Man and Xin Xin also gloated and laughed, saw the small fishermen look, hurriedly burying their heads to eat.

"Xiao Mo, now the injury of Xiaoyu has healed. I am also relieved with Xiao Yu Ma. We are going to go back tomorrow morning. You have to take care of Xiao Yu, understand?" Chen said.

"Mom, you two will stay here." Chen Mo said, stopping the chopsticks in his hand.

"I have been busy in Huacheng for most of my life, and my relatives and friends are all over there. We are here, not even a speaker. The housework at home is also done by robots and servants. We don't have to do it. These two days. If it weren’t for the little fisherman to go shopping and talk, it’s going to be sick.

You and Xiaoyu are both young people and have their own affairs. It is impossible to stay with us all the time. Moreover, your father is still at home, and no one can accompany him. ”

After Chen Mu finished, Xiao Yu Ma nodded.

"Ok."

Chen Mo knows that there is no way, only promise.

Old people are old, and they have been busy for most of their lives, and it is impossible for them to sit down and live like the ladies and ladies. Life has changed so much, but some habits can't be changed, and he can't force it.

"You go back to pay attention to your body. You can usually go out and travel with your dad and relax."

"Yeah." The two old men also agreed to come down.

"Small man stayed with your sister?" Chen Mo looked at Xiao Man.

"Reassured, brother-in-law, I will not be polite with you. It is my dream to live in this kind of mansion. But I can only live for a while, then I have to go back to school to do a graduation project and get ready to graduate." Xiao Man said.

After dinner, the family also went out to the night market and came back.

Late at night, Chen Mo was sitting on the bed with a ring box in his hand. This is a custom ring in the Psychic company, which was delivered today.

The color of the ring is drawn like a silky color. The color is the same as the design he gave. Under the light, the faint highlights can be seen faintly, but the surface is smooth.

The lines are perfect, they look very natural, and every part of the work is very fine. It can be seen that the jeweler is really very careful on the pair of rings.

Recently, they have been thinking about revenge on the CIA. Now that the revenge of the CIA has come to an end, he should also put his mind back on Xiao Yu.

Xiao Yu is because he was injured, so he has to compensate for the small fishing, at least to make her more happy.

When Chen Mo thought about how to put the ring in front of the small fish, the door of the bathroom was also opened.

Seeing the small fishing out, Chen Mo hurriedly put away the ring, but when his eyes fell on the small fisherman, he stayed for a while.

The slender legs are exposed to the air, the skin's moisture is not scattered, and it is rosy. The long hair is scattered on the shoulders, and the half of the snow can't be covered. The peak is like white jade. The white silk nightdress is a bit transparent under the light, and the delicate body under the skirt is looming, and Chen Mo’s heart is hot.

"Husband, look good?"

For Chen Mo's gaze, Xiao Yu is very useful, and his heart is sweet. Every woman wants to be appreciated by a man she loves, and she is no exception.

"Very good-looking." Chen Mo reached out to take a small fishing waist and hugged in his arms. Just look at the shoulders of Xiao Yu, a slight meal.

The small fish's wound healed very well, and now there is only one thumb-sized gunshot scar and a pink print.

"The blood sputum just fell off, but this cockroach may not go." Xiao Yu touched the scar, and some said awkwardly.

The skin of Xiao Yu is very white and delicate. A thumb-sized scar is particularly prominent in the arms. Wearing a suspender skirt or an off-shoulder dress in the future, this scar will affect the appearance.

"Nothing, it will definitely be good." Chen Mo naturally heard a small change in Xiao Yu's mood, and said comfort.

In the science and technology library, there are many kinds of formulas for removing the ointment in the apprenticeship stage. However, his energy is on high-tech, and he does not put his mind on cosmetics and skin care products, so he does not use those formulas.

Now that small fishing is needed, he can give some small fishing, and the scar can be easily removed.

"What if I can't do it?" Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo.

Chen Mo scraped her nose: "I said that it can be good, it will definitely be good. Well, just here, I will paint a little pig Pecs, a social person."

"I don't want to be a social person." Xiao Yu smiled like a flower, and the slightest smack of his heart vanished: "If it's not good, I will paint a flower and become a **** little goblin to seduce you."

"You are enough to attract me now, the scars will definitely be good, trust me."

"Ok."

Xiaoyu nodded and drilled into Chen Mohuai. She enjoyed this being held by Chen Mo and had a feeling of being pampered. Thinking of this, Xiao Yu looked up and kissed Chen Mo's lips with a little water.

"You close your eyes, I will give you a surprise." Chen Mo smiled.

"it is good."

The small fishing rod cleverly closed his eyes.

Chen Mo will put the ring in front of Xiao Yu’s eyes and said, “Well, open your eyes.”

Wow!

Seeing the ring in front of the eyes, Xiao Yu’s eyes flashed with stars, and his face was full of surprises. He grabbed the ring box from Chen Mo’s hand.

This is the wedding ring designed by Chen Mo. She has only looked at the holographic projection many times and has been looking forward to the real thing. I didn't expect to be here today, and it is as beautiful and beautiful as the design.

"Like it?"

“Like.” Xiao Yu’s hands clasped the ring box and smirked.

"Stupid girl, do you want to be so uninterested?" Chen Mo was also teased when he saw the appearance of Xiao Yu.

"I just have no interest."

Xiao Yu lay in Chen Mohuai and looked at the ring intently. For a ring, especially a ring sent by a lover, a woman is born with no resistance.

"Well, no fishing, no need to try it first, see if the size is not right?"

"You put it on me." Xiao Yu gave the ring box to Chen Mo, and extended his right hand to Chen Mo, looking forward.

"it is good."

Chen Mo took out the female ring and put it on the ring finger of Xiao Yu.

Seeing the ring on the ring finger, Xiao Yu stayed, not willing to look away,

Chen Mo saw the appearance of Xiao Yu, the heart felt a warm, this woman, is the woman he wants to care for a lifetime.

"Husband." Xiao Yu gently screamed, tenderness like water, Mei Yan looked at Chen Mo, has moved, the next moment, grabbed Chen Mo's neck, kissed up.

Early the next morning, Chen Mogang woke up and felt the soft touch on his face. He turned his head and saw Xiaoyu stroking his face with a sweet smile on his lips.

"When did you wake up?"

Chen Mo turned over and put a small fishing rod in his arms, stroking her slender waist.

"Just just woke up." Xiao Yu moved to Chen Mohuai's arms and greedily breathed the breath of Chen Mo.

After a long time, Chen Mocai patted Xiao Yuguang’s innocent back and said: “Well, little lazy fish, it’s time to get up. After breakfast, send mom to go home, then accompany me to the company, try to design for you. The wedding dress, look at the fit."

"Trying a wedding dress? Really?" Xiao Yu looked up at Chen Mo, with a surprise in his voice.

"Of course it is true. Last time I said, when you are hurt, I will take you to see the wedding dress I designed for you. I will never lie to you."

"Love you, husband."

chapters.title: Chapter 350: : Xiao Yu Likes It.
chapters.body:
Chapter 350: : Xiao Yu Likes It.

After breakfast, the two parents left, Chen Mo took the little fisher sister to the marching ant company. Xiao Man came over for the first time, did not go to the marching ant company, just a small fishing to try a wedding dress, they went to visit the company together.

When the three arrived, Zhao Min greeted him and saw that the wound of Xiaoyu had healed. He reached out and hugged it gently: "Welcome, big boss, boss wife."

"Zhao Jie, don't tune me." Xiao Yu smiled helplessly.

"Where to laugh, I am telling the truth." Zhao Min smiled and turned to look at Xiaoman: "Do you come to work for the company? Sister arranges a position for you."

"No, my brother-in-law said, try to wear a wedding dress for my sister. Let me take a look." Xiao Man said.

Zhao Min’s eyes are bright: “Would you try on a wedding dress? I have been coveting the wedding dress for a long time. I also want to see how Xiao Yu wears the wedding dress.”

"Go."

Chen Mo took the three people and boarded the unmanned electric car, and went to the 1st building.

On the road, Xiao Man was very excited. After all, it is the legendary army ant company headquarters, which is the most technologically advanced company in the country.

Some news reports said that the miracle of the marching ant company, the real experience, only to find more science fiction.

In addition to the driverless car she is currently riding, she also saw that the logo and video played by the marching ant company are holographic projections, and the reception is also an intelligent robot. This kind of scene can only be seen in science fiction movies.

"Brother, why are you so powerful?"

"Because I met your sister." Chen Mo said.

"Hey~~ I’m tired."

Zhao Min and Xiao Man Qi Qi exposed a disgusting expression.

"Sister husband, feed us dog food in the morning, you will be embarrassed." Xiao Man grumbled dissatisfied.

"I am telling the truth!" Chen Mo spread his hand.

The little fish next to him smiled sweetly and didn't interrupt.

Soon, a group of four people went to Building 1, which is the most secure place for the entire army ant company. There is a 24-hour patrol security team at the door, robot patrols on the inner level, and a full security camera.

Unless authorized by Chen Mo, it is almost impossible for anyone to get close to Building No. 1.

After a layer of security, the four also successfully entered the No. 1 building.

Xiao Man looked around and was very curious. Because Building No. 1 was not for visitors, there was no decoration in the corridor. It was a bright metal wall. There were no other items except the two security robots that were in the corridor.

Rubbing...

Chen Mogang went to the door of a laboratory and the heavy door opened automatically. A huge laboratory instantly appeared in front of a few people.

In the laboratory, there are several machines, as well as intelligent robots that are synthesizing fiber materials.

Here, the production laboratory of Dream Fiber is only a small-scale production. It is a synthetic machine for dream fibers in the laboratory, as well as a machine for weaving wedding dresses, a machine similar to 3Du-Knit's seamless textile technology.

Passing through the lab, Chen Mo stopped in front of a gate: "The wedding dress is inside."

Xiao Yu stared at the door and looked a little nervous.

She has not seen the wedding dress that Chen Mo designed for her, because she does not know that the lab is making wedding dresses.

She is about to see the wedding dress now, she is a little bit fast, a little nervous, and very much looking forward to it. Looking forward to your favorite person, the wedding dress designed for her, what is it.

"Sister, hurry up, I can't wait." Xiao Man clenched his fists.

"it is good."

Chen Mo grabbed the handle of the door and twisted it.

A large independent room appeared in front of a few people, the lights lit up, and the central window dummy model was the long-awaited wedding dress.

The wedding dress is pure white and the long skirt is simple and elegant. Under the light, the wedding dress exudes a touch of fluorescent light, like a dream, noble and refined.

"Wow! So beautiful."

Xiao Man saw the wedding dress in the window, screaming out, staring at the stars, excitedly watching the wedding dress in the window. If it weren't for the window, she would have already rushed.

Zhao Min has a lot of calm, but when he sees a wedding dress, he still can't help but envy.

How many times Chen Mo was absent, she came to see this wedding dress herself, and hoped to wear it on her body and marry the person she liked, but it is destined to be impossible.

This wedding dress can be said to be the wedding dress that any woman dreams of. Even her strong woman can't resist the temptation.

Really a lucky girl.

Zhao Min looked at Xiao Yu with some envy. Only the darling of Heaven can be so lucky to get everything that the woman of the world dreams of.

“Is this my wedding dress?” Xiao Yu stayed in the wedding dress in the window.

"Yes, it takes a lot of effort to complete, do you like it?"

"Thank you, husband." Xiao Yu fluttered into Chen Mohuai and burst into tears. For those who love her, she chooses unreserved trust and never asks for anything.

Chen Mo said that when she designed her wedding dress, she believed. Even if it is a simple wedding dress, she will be very happy to wear it and appear in the most important ceremony of life.

Countless times I fantasize about the look of my wedding dress, I have been looking forward to it.

At this moment, she knows that all expectations and trust are worthwhile. This wedding dress, let her see Chen Mo's love for her, as unreserved.

Zhao Min and Xiao Man both looked at the two enviously and quietly did not bother.

"Cry so badly, it must be that the wedding dress is too ugly? If you don't like it, then I lost it and redesigned it." Chen Mo patted Xiao Yu's back.

"No, not ugly, can't be lost, that's my wedding dress."

When Chen Mo was about to lose the wedding dress, Xiao Yu suddenly rushed, and hurriedly broke away from the embrace of Chen Mo, even forgotten.

Oh...

Seeing Xiao Yu’s eyes with tears, and a happy and anxious appearance, Zhao Min and Xiao Man couldn’t help themselves anymore, laughing and showing.

"Bad egg, actually teasing me."

Chen Mo was found with a smile on his face, and there was a laughter next to Zhao Jie and Xiao Man. Xiao Yu was annoyed and shy, and reached out and twisted his hand at Chen Mo’s waist.

"Hey... Do you want to try on a wedding dress?" Chen Mo’s painful expression distorted and hurriedly shifted the subject.

"Yes."

Xiao Yu really released his fingers and walked toward the window. His excited look was written on his face.

Chen Mo, who successfully escaped the claws, had a painful soft flesh and had a lingering heart. He went to the window and pressed the button.

The glass window slowly fell, and the dream wedding dress was also displayed in front of the three women.

Xiaoman carefully reached out and touched it with a deep surprise: "Sister, this touch is as delicate as the skin."

"This wedding dress is made of a new type of fiber material specially developed, called dream fiber, which is very soft and slippery, like a girl's skin." Chen Mo explained.

“I also specially synthesized new materials? How much is this wedding dress?” asked Xiao Man.

"Money is not important, Xiao Yu likes it."

“噫~~” Zhao Min and Xiao Man showed a nasty expression and looked at Chen Mo with hate: “We are seriously protesting your behavior in feeding dog food.”

Xiao Yu grinned.

"The protest is invalid." Chen Mochao smiled and turned and said: "Small fishermen try to wear it."

"Then you have to go out, there is no dressing room here. Otherwise, you think that Xiaoyu is your wife, you have to watch her change clothes? Haven't you seen it right? Stay with us and help the little fish to change the wedding. Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo with a sly look.

"Well, I am going out."

Being ridiculed by Zhao Min, Chen Momo touched his nose and turned away from the room.

chapters.title: Chapter 351: : Eternal Night
chapters.body:
Chapter 351: : Eternal Night

"Sister, you are perfect, how to get it."

In the room, Xiao Man looked at the figure of Xiao Yu, and looked envious. No extra flesh, soft lines, perfect for those models.

"The credit of your brother-in-law." Zhao Min said a pun.

Potential medicine can enhance strength and physical endurance and toughness, and can also shape the body. It is naturally the credit of Chen Mo.

It’s just that this sentence is said, there is a different kind of taste. For a time, Xiao Man smiled badly: “Sister, is Zhao Min’s sister really saying?”

"Change the wedding dress." Xiaoyu hurriedly transferred the topic, thinking of the scene last night, always felt that shameful things were discovered, and the ears were red.

Two minutes later, with the help of Zhao Min and Xiao Man, Xiao Yu finally got his wish to wear a wedding dress.

Looking at the sister who changed into a wedding dress, Xiao Man stayed for a while.

The small fishing in the wedding dress completely changed one person, less the quiet and gentle temperament of the past, like the white snow phoenix, noble and elegant.

From the look of Xiao Yu, she can feel the happiness and sweetness of her sister. There is a person who loves her and loves her, and does her best to give her the best.

As a girl, even if the person in front of her is her sister, there is still a faint embarrassment.

If there is such a person, it is estimated that she will fall, but unfortunately only her sister is the lucky one in this world.

Next to Zhao Min, his eyes are also envious of the cover.

This set of wedding dresses is only a small fishing, the measurements are completely consistent, not loose and tight, fit the small fishing body. When other women put on it, there will be no certain embarrassment. Only in the small fisherman will it be perfect.

The small fish at this time is like a noble fairy.

The fly in the ointment is the lack of a set of jewelry. It is estimated that Chen Mo is already preparing jewelry for her wedding. It is a lucky woman.

For this wedding dress, Chen Mo specially developed a new material to design the wedding dress. It is estimated that only Chen Mo can enjoy this romance in the world, and Xiao Yu is the only lucky one.

Sure enough, it is a lie to say that a man of science does not understand romance. When the science man is romantic, there is no other person.

"This is the dream of countless women." Zhao Min stroked the wedding dress on Xiao Yu.

......

Outside the room, Chen Mo was quietly waiting, never feeling that time passed so slowly. However, I have some expectations in my heart. What would it look like when Xiao Yu put on that wedding dress?

Ten minutes later, the door of the room was opened. Xiaoman stretched out his head and looked at Chen Mo proudly: "Brother, I will open the door for you, what reward?"

"What reward do you want?" Chen Mo knocked on Xiao Man's head.

"The next time I go shopping with my sister, I will buy things, my brother-in-law will pay for it." Xiao Man turned his eyes and said.

"Yes." Chen Mo promised to come down.

"A word is fixed." Say good conditions, Xiao Man opened the door and gave Chen Mo the way to open: "Look at your perfect bride."

Chen Mo could not wait to enter the room.

Xiaoyu is in the central open space of the lab room. She is very good in shape. Besides using the potential potion, the figure is natural and she wears high heels. It looks very tall and is now the height of the goddess.

If the previous small fishing was Xiaojiabiyu, then the small fishing at this time is the noble and elegant goddess.

The pure white wedding dress exudes a faint glow under the light, letting the small fish out of the air to create a refined fairy, Chen Mo does not consciously fall into it.

"How? Is it right?" Xiaoyu asked nervously.

"You are the goddess of luck that God has given me." Chen Mo appreciates without concealing, as if to appreciate the most perfect works of art.

Xiao Yu smiled sweetly.

"Hey~~ brother-in-law, are you usually so nauseating?"

"Sometimes more numb than now, tired and dying." Zhao Min bluntly fills the knife.

Chen Mo looked at the two silently. These two guys came to see the scenery and ignored the two people's demolition. Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu: "Next, I will give you a magic."

"it is good."

Xiao Yu did not ask much, and the color of expectation was written on his face.

"Is it going to be magic? I want to see, you can make a trick out of it, and then tear down the guy who is numb." Zhao Min said sourly.

"I think too." Xiao Man also interjected.

Chen Mo did not care, and said: "This wedding dress is called a dream wedding! Do you know why?"

"Why?" The three women looked at Chen Mo together.

"The next step is to reveal the answer." Chen Mo smiled and said: "Ink girl, come to an eternal night."

Hey!

When Chen Mo’s words fell, all the lights in the room went out and fell into a darkness.

Then, the holographic projection lights up, and several holographic nebulae float up, emitting a variety of colors of light, surrounding the small fishing.

"Wow! So beautiful, the wedding dress turned black." Xiao Man screamed out.

Zhao Min took a moment to go back to God, then look at Xiao Yu, his eyes wide open, his mouth can lay down eggs, his face is incredible.

The pure white innocent wedding dress of the small fisherman has become black, and the little bit of light flashes, like the starry sky at night, plus the surrounding holographic nebula. At this time, the small fisherman has a mysterious temperament in the noble.

Hearing the scream of Xiao Man, Xiao Yu also subconsciously looked at his wedding dress, but also revealed an incredible color.

"What is going on here? Why is the wedding dress discolored?" Zhao Min asked.

She has seen this wedding dress many times, only know that its design is very beautiful, Chen Mo personally designed, the material is also new material, but she does not know, the dream wedding dress will change color.

"The essence of diamonds is carbon. The essence of jade is sodium aluminum silicate. It is boring to explain romance with science. Keeping mystery is the most perfect and more exciting." Chen Mo did not intend to explain the mystery: "Now Just let Xiaoyu have a mental preparation, lest the color change at the wedding is too sudden, scaring the small fish."

"Small fish, let your husband design a set for me, or I will wrap your husband."

Zhao Min can't wait for this wedding dress on the small fisherman's body. It is her, and she has never had such a strong desire.

She is also a woman. For clothes and jewelry, the resistance in the sky is low. This dream wedding dress is almost perfect. His immunity is almost zero. If she can buy it, she will definitely not hesitate to start.

"Sister, you can't lighten the light sister, I want it, or I will be shameless, every day wandering around my brother-in-law." Xiao Man's eyes braved the stars, constantly groping in the small fishing wedding dress.

With the ‘threat’ of his sister and his girlfriend, Xiao Yu smiled and looked at Chen Mo. She is also a woman. If this wedding dress is not her, I am afraid she will have their mood.

But she can't do the Lord, it can only be decided by Chen Mo.

"My appearance fee is very expensive."

"I don't have money, can I get along with me?"

Zhao Min’s mouth curled up and he looked at Chen Mo in a pitiful manner.

"I don't have any money, I can also make it to myself." Xiao Man has given up thinking, and no matter what he said, he only has this wedding dress.

When the two of them slammed out, Chen Mo was covered in hair and had a dangerous feeling. He saw the ugly eyes of a small fisherman. If he dared to say ‘can’, he estimated that he could not enter the room tonight.

"Design a set for you free of charge, don't want money." After saying this, Xiao Yu smiled with satisfaction, and Chen Mo was feeling a loose body.

After staying in the room for half an hour, Xiao Yu took off his wedding dress. I have tried it, it is very fit, so beautiful, and then I have to wait for wedding photos and weddings to wear. When I left, looking at the wedding dress in the cupboard, Xiao Yu’s eyes were all reluctant to write.

chapters.title: Chapter 352: : 60 Billion, Still Affordable? (Third More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 352: : 60 Billion, Still Affordable? (Third More)

From the No. 1 building, Xiao Yu accompanied Xiao Man to start visiting the headquarters of the marching ant company. Chen Mo and Zhao Min returned to the office.

"I have a strong desire for survival." When he returned to the office, Zhao Min spoke.

"Old gave me a pit." Chen Mo said depressedly.

"Who told you to push the three resistances every time? Anyway, you have to remember, promised to design a wedding dress for me, you must do it, or you will not dig the pit next time, it is directly buried you." Zhao Min said.

"Are you not an unmarried person?"

"Can't a wedding dress be a wedding dress? Can I go home and wear it alone? Can you give it to yourself? But I will be happy to be a junior. I want it? If there is no small fisherman, it is smart, but it is smart." Zhao Min bites a word.

"You still say something right." Chen Mo touched his nose and instantly lost.

"No courage."

Zhao Min giggled and seriously sat down on the sofa next to Chen Mo.

"The Internet has not been flat recently, and the cybersecurity issue has once again caused panic. Our company's termite systems and software have also taken advantage of the opportunity to make a big profit, and the market share of corporate offices has expanded."

"I know this, I expected." Chen Mo nodded.

"And, yesterday, members of the clown organization were arrested, and the official account of the clown said that they were stolen. They have turned black for this incident. Now they are so angry that they are guessing whether they are clowns or others. Clown organization this matter……"

Zhao Min did not continue to ask, she and Chen Mo have been unaware, Chen Mo must know what she wants to ask.

"No."

Chen Mo was surprised that Zhao Min’s intuition was quite accurate, but he still chose to shake his head.

Invading the CIA, he is not prepared to let the second person know that even Zhao Min will not do it. He is unconditionally trusting Zhao Min. But this is not a good thing after all. Zhao Min knows that there is no good, but he does not know better.

He ruined the traces of things, no second person knows, it is not something worth showing off.

"That's good."

Zhao Min did not doubt, nor did he ask questions, but put things on other topics.

"Then is the next month's AI conference, will you pass? You are now one of the authoritative figures in the field of artificial intelligence, the organizers are invited. And because the 'Clown Organization' invaded the CIA, the conference also deliberately Added an issue of Internet security."

"I will pass, just as I go to the capital is a bit of a thing, I am going to talk to the official about cooperation, and I will talk to you here," Chen Mo said.

“What cooperation? Intelligent robots? Is it a room temperature superconducting material?”

"Light nuclear fusion technology."

"Hey... cough and cough..." Zhao Min heard Chen Mo's understatement, drinking tea in his mouth, directly squirting Chen Mo's face and desperately coughing.

Chen Mo wiped the tea on his face and rubbed his wet lips. "Can you calm down? How old?"

"Can't... cough... you let me slow down and cough..."

Zhao Min was flushed with tea and coughed. After half a minute, he was relieved: "Are you ready to study nuclear fusion technology?"

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

After getting Chen Mo again, Zhao Min stayed staring at him and didn't know what to say for a while.

She was scared.

Controlled light nuclear fusion technology can be said to be the crown of the top in the history of human industrial development. Mastering this technology means that human beings are free from energy constraints.

The energy wars of all mankind, the energy crisis, all collapses, and the world pattern will be re-washed. The impact is more than ordinary temperature superconducting materials, and can make all human beings enter a new era of development.

Now Chen Mo told her that she would study nuclear fusion technology, and she could not keep calm.

This is not a project that private enterprises can afford. Without mature technology, the research and development fund for nuclear fusion technology is a bottomless pit. Even a marching ant company cannot afford such horrific funds.

"Not a joke?" Zhao Min asked.

"No, controlled nuclear fusion technology is the subject of my next challenge. This time I went to the capital and prepared to cooperate with the official. I hope to develop the nuclear fusion device with the fastest speed."

"This project is a swallowing beast, no bottom hole, maybe no progress in 20 years or even 50 years. You have to think carefully about this matter, not to say that you can afford it. We are private enterprises. Private enterprises have entered the energy field, and they are still the most sensitive nuclear energy. It is very troublesome. Bankruptcy goes straight home and wears open pants."

Zhao Min wants to persuade this guy, if not, this project can really drag the entire company. It is not that she does not dare to take risks, but nuclear fusion technology, which is a recognized problem in the world, a transformative technology for human energy.

"If it is a small fisherman, she will definitely let me let go." Chen Mo said without hesitation.

"That is because she is stupid, I don't know how to calculate the account, it will make you mess. It seems that you have a wife and a madman, there is a reason. Women are a bit silly, it is still good." Zhao Min is a bit sour, In turn, I was angry and said: "Are you sure about this project?"

"I am sure that when the seismograph is being developed, people who question me are ridiculed everywhere. I am still successful. The next one is light nuclear fusion. You forgot, I can be called 'Time Giant', 'Time Giant' This title inherits the mission of changing the world."

“Don’t you say that you are an ‘time businessman’?”

“Occasionally guest ‘giant’.”

Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo, and the office was quiet at the same time.

After thinking for a long time, Zhao Mincai said: "Let you be crazy once, anyway, the company is yours. If you can't, directly publish the room temperature superconducting materials, how much you want, and give you a defeat."

"now it's right."

Chen Mo naturally affirmed that Zhao Min would not object because Zhao Min also knew that opposition was useless.

"For a wool, I am stupid, will accompany you crazy, do you think the company is easy to make money?" Zhao Min is still a bit angry: "How much is the budget?"

"The budget is not accurate. It is estimated that 60 billion soft sister coins will be needed. If it is successful, it will be less. If the official supports it, there will be subsidies. The research and development cycle will be at least one or two years, and it will not be too long. It will be affirmed within five years. Can be successful."

“So fast? Are you sure you can develop it?”

"Why don't you believe me?" Chen Mo was speechless: "You look at the superconducting computer under the 1st building and it doesn't take long. It doesn't take long before the room temperature superconducting material comes out?"

"The brain of the freak!"

Zhao Min did not refute, Chen Mo is a freak, she does not know why Chen Mo's research and development cycle is so short.

"Is there technology?"

"Here." Chen Mo nodded his head. In order to let Zhao Min rest assured, he explained: "I let the ink girl simulate a feasible nuclear fusion mode. The basic theory has been established and the device is being designed. Anyway, if it fails, give up. Just on the line. 60 billion, still worth it?"

Chen Mo will not tell him naturally that he has a technology library in his mind and the technology is ready-made. The technology of the science and technology library, as long as the method is correct, will not fail, so to say, at least for the sake of Zhao Min.

"The loss is 60 billion, and only you dare to say such words." Zhao Min was a bit awkward and calmed down: "The company has nearly $110 billion in cash reserves, enough for you to lose, let go."

"It seems that looking for you as president is correct."

"I have the awareness of a small fisherman, can I have a small fishing treatment?"

"That's what... Right, I suddenly remembered that the design of the nuclear fusion device required me to help modify the optimization and talk again in the next day." Chen Mo twitched and hurriedly stood up and walked quickly outside the office.

"It's a wedding dress design, I tell you, there is no wedding dress, I don't think I will give you money, the money is yours, I will not give you."

Looking at Chen Mo’s escape, Zhao Min smiled and was in a good mood.

chapters.title: Chapter 353: : Simulation Experiment Succeeded (First More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 353: : Simulation Experiment Succeeded (First More)

Building 1, the central hall of the Physics Laboratory.

In front of Chen Mo, it is a cylindrical holographic projection with a diameter of three meters and a height of five meters. It looks ugly and looks like an instrument.

This is Chen Mo's main instrument for controlling nuclear fusion - [Star Ring].

This is the [Star Ring] model designed by Chen Mo according to the theory of nuclear fusion technology obtained in the science library.

The details of the design of the device were not completed, and the data for each part of the model was idealized. This device is also a digital model under the data.

Chen Mo wants to build a device that can control the nuclear fusion, and the nuclear fusion technology is completed. Chen Mo’s current task is to demonstrate the magnetic constraints of the [Star Ring] he designed and whether he can achieve nuclear fusion.

To develop controllable nuclear fusion technology, it must be cooperated with the official and cannot be avoided anywhere in the world.

If nuclear fusion succeeds, human energy reform will start and enter a new era of nuclear energy. This kind of change technology has a long-term impact, and it is very unrealistic for an individual to want to swallow such a project.

And many of the materials used to build the star ring device are in the hands of the authorities. The project security problem does not require him to worry about, save a lot of trouble, and the speed of research can also be accelerated. For him, the advantages outweigh the disadvantages.

In cooperation with the government, there are talents who have the support of resources and can do more with less.

So he needs a specific experimental data to convince the official person that he can build a reaction device for controlled nuclear fusion. In this way, it is possible to take the initiative in the cooperation and complete the [Star Ring] device according to his wishes.

"Ink girl, the experiment begins." Chen Mo said.

"Okay." The ink girl's voice fell, and the model device in the central hall began to operate.

The star-shaped ring of holographic projection, each part is transparent in different colors.

Power on, injection.

Chen Mo can clearly see that the injected helium gas turns into a transparent purplish red as the voltage of the [Star Ring] device rises, and it rotates in a vacuum bottle.

If Chen Mo has a superconducting computer, it is impossible to control this huge amount of calculation.

“The simulation experiment failed. The cycle time was too short and the energy input was greater than the output.” Ten minutes later, the ink girl opened the first simulation failure.

Chen Mo looked at the various data of the beating, looking as usual, the first simulation experiment, failure is a normal phenomenon.

"Let the design out, I need to modify the vertical and polar fields."

"Ok."

A holographic model projection of a star ring device falls in front of Chen Mo.

The nuclear fusion of the sun, with the strong internal pressure of the stars to keep it going, they can not provide the terrible pressure inside the sun, can only work on the binding magnetic field. There is also a question of self-sustainability and the subject he has to deal with.

Entering the research state, Chen Mo's brain began to operate, constantly thinking about the controlled nuclear fusion technology, and digesting all the technical details.

......

A month, fleeting.

During this period of time, at the international level, due to the invasion of the CIA incident, the United States exerted pressure on the island nation to demand the surrender of clown members. Eventually, the island nation could not hold back the pressure from the United States and handed over the members of the clown organization to the Americans.

After the United States took over the member of the clown organization, there was no news. The truth of the invasion was confusing, and time allowed the heat to slowly cool down.

When the personnel Chen Mo, but the two ears do not smell the window, buried the head to optimize the design of the star ring device.

"The 108th experiment, started." In the central hall of the physics laboratory, Chen Mo directly directed the ink girl.

"Ok."

In the central hall, the holographic projection of the star ring device appears again.

This star ring, after repeated experiments and repeated failures, has a big difference in appearance and the beginning.

With the modification once and for all, there are still ink ladies who continue to repair the details according to the simulation data, and the results of the simulation experiments are also slowly going in the direction that Chen Mo envisions.

[Star Ring] has been activated. Under the strong magnetic field constraints, a beautiful flat-shaped plasma ring appears in front of Chen Mo, and the plasma looks no different from the flame of the gas stove.

In reality, without the limitations of vacuum bottles and magnetic fields, the temperature of these plasmas can instantly burn any material to nothingness.

As the analog current continues to increase, the confined magnetic field continues to increase, and the speed and temperature of the simulated plasma theory are also increasing.

Looking at the changes in the data, Chen Mo was surprisingly nervous.

After hundreds of large and small modifications and simulation runs, if he is not using a superconducting computer, I am afraid that the electricity cost of the simulation operation can buy a medium-sized enterprise.

With so many experiments, the results are not what he wants.

Achieving nuclear fusion is not a problem. In the study of nuclear fusion, it is the real problem to maintain the steady state operation of fusion and realize the total energy as the output state.

For Chen Mo, the simulation experiment did not reach the energy output greater than the input, or failed.

This is the last experiment in more than a month. If this experiment is not successful, it can only wait for the end of the artificial intelligence conference. He will return from the capital and conduct simulation experiments.

Chen Mo clenched his fists and stared at the data on the transparent LCD panel. Soon, the temperature reached the high temperature of 100 million degrees of nuclear fusion, and the simulated fusion reaction also began.

"Mergo, the total energy output of the star ring device is greater than the input, and the simulation experiment is successful."

"Yes!"

Upon hearing this answer, Chen Mo shouted excitedly, hoping to dance a square dance to celebrate the success of the simulation experiment.

For a while, Chen Mocai calmed down.

“The data from the theoretical divertor structure continues to run and see how long it can last.”

In addition to the net output problem of total energy, there is also the fusion steady state, which also needs to be tested. According to Chen Mo, the ink girl began to simulate running.

Two hours later, the device was still undergoing nuclear fusion, and this result made Chen Mo completely relieved.

Determining the technical theory is feasible, this is the result he wants.

The next step is the actual application, but in practice, there are still many problems to deal with. After all, simulation experiments and reality are completely two concepts.

"Stop the simulation and give me the data of the simulation experiment. I need to go to the capital." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, Mercedes." The ink girl responded.

"The experiment is successful, I should go back. Ink, you continue to simulate the details of the optimization of the star ring device, what is the problem, you can keep waiting for me to come back."

After explaining what the ink girl needs to do, Chen Mo took the hard drive and left the lab. The World Artificial Intelligence Conference is just around the corner, and tomorrow he will travel to the capital to attend the artificial intelligence conference.

The last time Li Chengzhi had something to look for him, and he was also prepared to meet with the top management to talk about nuclear fusion technology research, so he needed a specific experimental material to serve as his negotiating card.

In the hard disk, there is the simulation data he needs, and there are experimental results that change the world. With this data, he has enough confidence when he talks with the official.

I thought I couldn't get the data, only next time, now it seems that the experiment is just completed.

If there is no data or experiment, the official look at his research and development capabilities, may promise him to let him join the team, but the restrictions are absolutely many. What he needs is full support. This data can enable him to take the initiative in the cooperation and negotiation between the two sides.

chapters.title: Chapter 354: : Artificial Intelligence Conference (Second)
chapters.body:
Chapter 354: : Artificial Intelligence Conference (Second)

"Phoenix Technology News, from the 15th to the 17th of this month, the World Artificial Intelligence Conference will be held at the Capital International Conference Center. According to informed sources, the founder of the Army Ant Company, Chen Mo, will bring the army ant company artificial intelligence team to attend this The second meeting. This will be the first time that Chen Mo made a public appearance in front of the media after the attack..."

"Penguin news, the World Artificial Intelligence Conference held in the capital on the 15th of this month, attracts global ants, including Apple ants, Apple, Microsoft, Facebook, Ali, Penguin, Umbrella, Amazon, Huawei, Samsung, Intel, etc. The eyes of top technology companies..."

The World Artificial Intelligence Conference has already attracted global attention before it has begun. Since the introduction of intelligent assistants by the marching ant company, the artificial intelligence boom has been triggered. For a year, artificial intelligence has been a global topic of concern.

This year's artificial intelligence conference has naturally attracted much attention. Many gods and teams in the field of artificial intelligence have traveled to the capital of China.

Outside the VIP passage of the Capital International Airport, when hearing the news of the landing of the flight, Lanxi looked at the passage with full expectation.

She is one of the assistants to the president's office. She was arranged by Zhao Min to the capital last week to coordinate the artificial intelligence conference. But suddenly received news two days ago, let her serve as temporary assistant to the chairman of the board during the artificial intelligence conference.

The chairman is young and promising, and is a symbol of the idol of almost all employees of the company. It is the ideal boyfriend of many female employees, but it was a pity that it was taken away by Xiaoyu.

The opportunities for their employees to contact the chairman of the board are rare, and they did not expect to be temporary assistants to the chairman.

Upon receiving this news, she was so excited that she did not sleep well for two days. A few minutes later, I saw Chen Mo coming out of the passage, and Lanxi was happy, and hurriedly greeted him.

"Chairman, hello, I am Lanxi. The president arranged that during the artificial intelligence conference, I was your temporary assistant."

Lanxi was a little excited to introduce himself, watching Chen Mo's eyes a little dazed. This is the first time she has seen Chen Mo so close. Chen Mo’s self-confident temperament has a deadly appeal to women.

"Hello." Chen Mo looked at Lanxi.

Xiaoyu did not follow him to the capital. After all, the news that the two had to hold a wedding had just come out soon. If Xiao Yu is with him to attend the artificial intelligence conference, good technology news may become entertainment news.

With this in mind, Chen Mo also respects Xiao Yu’s decision.

Xiao Yu is not willing to expose more in front of the media. He does not want Xiao Yu to expose more exposure in front of the media. This is a kind of protection for Xiao Yu.

Therefore, as a part-time assistant of Chen Mo, Xiao Yu did not come over, Zhao Min arranged a temporary assistant for him. After all, he came to the artificial intelligence conference, and some trivial things still need an assistant to help.

Zhao Min also sent a resume of Lanxi to him. He graduated from the Department of Management of Capital University and graduated from work for one year. He was recruited by Zhao Min and pulled into her assistant team as a potential management talent for the company.

"Do you feel that I am very handsome?" Seeing Lanxi watching himself in a daze, Chen Mo laughed.

"Yes... no, no... yes..."

After Lanxi’s subconscious answer, he hurriedly changed his mouth, realized that it was wrong, and changed it. Finally, he could not wait to smack his face: “Sorry, the chairman.”

"Nothing" to Lanxi's gaffe, Chen Mo grinned: "Go back to the hotel first."

"Okay." Lanxi sneaked at Chen Mo and found that Chen Mo was not angry. He was secretly relieved, and his heart was a little angry. It was too shameful.

After finishing the emotions, follow Chen Mo and leave the airport.

"This artificial intelligence conference, the theme is 'new era of artificial intelligence', there are four major activities, namely the Forum Summit, special events, product display and innovation competition four sections.

Your smart meeting is the opening ceremony summit forum tomorrow morning, there is a technical release of our company team, and then the ‘peak question and answer’ activity after the forum. The peak question and answer is a brand new conference event, the host is an artificial intelligence robot in the engineering institute. ”

When I got to the car, Lanxi began to introduce the itinerary of the artificial intelligence conference.

When it comes to ‘peak question and answer’, the artificial intelligence robot of the engineering institute is attracting Chen’s interest. National artificial intelligence project, but Chen Mo is sure that it is definitely the world's leading level.

Because of the release of the smart assistant, he gave the source code to Li Chengzhi, in exchange for the official tax-free conditions.

And for subsequent development, there has been no news about official artificial intelligence.

However, Chen Mo knows that the artificial intelligence after the transformation is definitely not low in intelligence, and definitely leads the current artificial intelligence, otherwise it will not be released.

This artificial intelligence conference, hosted by the artificial intelligence robot of the engineering institute, is sure to use this platform to show the world the results of domestic artificial intelligence research and give the society a positive confidence.

"Merg brother, Li brother came to call you." The phone suddenly heard the voice of the ink girl, interrupted the introduction of Lanxi.

After Lanxi was quiet, Chen Mo also connected the call.

Li Laoge is the number of Li Chengzhi he notes on his mobile phone. When he was attacked last time, Li Chengzhi came to see him and gave him three houses in the compound. He also said that he wanted to invite him into a special project. .

Last time because of the small fishing injury, he did not feel the other things, so Li Chengzhi did not say, when Chen Mo was ready to go to the capital to participate in the artificial intelligence conference, and then Chen Mo said.

At this time, Li Chengzhi took his mobile phone and his face was relaxed. It was obviously very good.

In the cooperation with the marching ant company, Li Chengzhi played a very important role, and immediately contributed a lot, so he recently rose to the next level, and the whole person was refreshed.

Seeing the phone connected, Li Chengzhi said with a hearty voice: "Chen Mo brother, how is it?"

"No illness, no pain, it should be considered good." Chen Mo said: "Listen to Li's voice, I feel good?"

"It's okay, I moved up." Li Chengzhi smiled and said, "You are on the way to the hotel now?"

"Yes." Chen Mo should have a voice.

"Remember the last time I was looking for you? Would you like me to talk to you?" Li Chengzhi asked.

"No, I just arrived, time is too hasty. After attending the artificial intelligence conference, I will find you again, just as I have something, we can have a good chat." Chen Mo said.

"What? Can you give me some tips in advance? Let me prepare in advance." Li Chengzhi asked curiously.

Chen Mo smiled: "You also have curiosity? No hints, then I will say it later."

"That!" Li Chengzhi did not care: "I look forward to your arrival."

After hanging up the phone, Chen Mo looked at Lanxi and motioned her to continue.

"Boss, do you have other itineraries to arrange?" After the introduction, Lanxi asked.

"After the artificial intelligence conference, I am a little private, not within the itinerary. You can arrange the itinerary during the artificial intelligence conference." Chen Mo said.

"Okay." Blue Creek did not continue to ask. She naturally understands what should be asked and when it should be appropriate.

Back at the hotel, Chen Mo lay down to rest.

After a long flight, it is time to rest and wait for the start of the artificial intelligence conference tomorrow.

chapters.title: Chapter 355: : World Artificial Intelligence Conference (Third)
chapters.body:
Chapter 355: : World Artificial Intelligence Conference (Third)

The next day, Chen Mo finished breakfast and went to the scene of the World Artificial Intelligence Conference with Lanxi and others. Today is the opening ceremony of the conference. As a guest, he is naturally impossible to be absent and late.

The World Artificial Intelligence Conference was held at the Capital International Conference Center. Chen Mo and his entourage came to the venue and saw an endless stream of participants entering the venue.

This is the feast of global artificial intelligence. As the highest-end conference of artificial intelligence, it will show the world's most advanced research and development of artificial intelligence, and naturally attract the world's top experts and engineers of artificial intelligence.

Next time Chen Mogang, a man in a suit and a suit greeted him. The person came with a smile and looked at Chen Mo's look a bit pleased.

"Mr. Chen Mo, hello, I am responsible for welcoming you, please come with me." Tao Ji smiled.

Chen Mo glanced at Tao Ji, nodded gently, followed him to the VIP passage.

Outside the VIP channel, the two sides are already full of reporters. Among the participants, a lot of big coffees came, which are rare and rare. Now they are gathered together and they are the absolute news focus.

Seeing that Chen Mo appeared under the leadership of Tao Ji, the reporters on the field surged.

Chen Mo has always been a super topic and one of the authoritative authors of artificial intelligence. This participation in the artificial intelligence conference has already attracted attention from all parties.

Now Chen Mo appeared and immediately attracted the attention of all media people.

Some time ago, Chen Mo was attacked. There were rumors that Chen Mo was seriously injured. Later, the internal information of the staff of the army ant company revealed that Chen Mo was in good shape and broke the rumors.

This time, Chen Mo was first seen in the media after being attacked.

"Mr. Chen Mo, may I ask the attacker some time ago, who is the mastermind behind the scenes?"

"Mr. Chen Mo, what do you think about the artificial rumors of online rumors that will control human rumors?"

“What is the next technology product of the marching ant company?”

"..."

All kinds of problems were thrown to Chen Mo, and Chen Mo just smiled. Now is not the time to answer questions from reporters.

The group soon arrived at the signing office of the conference.

This conference is different, and more artificial intelligence is used to handle things. The sign-in is the identification of artificial intelligence. Guests can enter the venue through face recognition and blood recognition without any formalities.

Among the welcoming staff at the conference, there are many intelligent robots in the army ant company.

The marching ant company is also one of the co-organizers of the intelligent conference, providing intelligent robots to the conference as one of the images of the artificial intelligence conference. At the conference site, there is a holographic projector, which is almost a free advertisement for the army ants.

After signing in, through the security checkpoint, Chen Mo went smoothly into the hall of the forum where the summit was opened.

The summit has not yet begun, and the hall in the venue is already full of people.

The executives of the companies participating in the conference, such as Daxie and Ceo, all whispered at the time, talking and laughing, and even talking about cooperative business.

This is a platform that provides a large platform for exchange and cooperation in this industry, so Chen Mo has long been eccentric about this kind of thing.

When Chen Moyi appeared, the scene was turbulent, and he immediately called the focus of the venue.

"Chen Mo is here. I remember that he rarely lobbied. The previous important forum meeting was attended by Zhao Min. I didn't expect him to come here personally."

"Zhao Min is not a technician. It is not suitable to come here. But now I see Chen Mozhen, really young, more confident than what I saw in the photo. At this age, we forgot where we are."

"You can let your daughter go fishing and see if you can catch a golden turtle."

"..."

When Chen Moyi came in, he immediately became the topic of discussion on the court.

As a new rising newcomer, marching ants have become the innocent king of domestic technology companies in just a few years. This young man is the most important person.

Many companies are full of taboos for marching ants, because the industries touched by marching ants are a deadly blow to them. However, there are also many people who want to cooperate with the marching ant company. The marching ant company is mainly engaged in rushing with the giants and not competing with other companies.

Chen Mogang entered the venue, and an old man with glasses and a smile came up.

After seeing the old man, Lanxi hurriedly whispered around Chen Mo: "This is the academician Sun Deyi of the Academy of Engineering and the chairman of the organizer's Artificial Intelligence Society."

When they just walked in, Sun Deyi was surprised to hold Chen Mo’s hand: "Chen Chen, you are finally here."

"His academician, hello." Chen Moqian said hello.

He is also an academician of the Academy of Engineering, but his academician is wild, and it is a name. The academician certificate is still hidden in the family, and not many people call him by the 'Academician'.

However, Sun Deyi is a member of the Academy of Engineering. He certainly knows Chen Mo’s title, and Chen Mo is also a colleague, so he will call him that.

The person next to him heard the title of 'Academician Chen,' and his look was a little surprised: "When did Chen Mo become an academician? Is the Academy still an engineering school?"

"In the Academy of Engineering, I remember that Chen Mu’s name was on the list of academicians announced at the time. At that time, it seemed to have been overshadowed by a star derailment, but not many people noticed it."

"So young."

"Young does not mean that there is no strength, his achievements, only a result of the seismograph, is enough to spread through the ages."

"..."

Everyone is talking about Chen Mo, Sun Deyi is also confidently looking at him, looking gratified, as if watching his students have a good future, the kind of natural exhilaration: "I finally saw the real person, it is awesome."

"Sun Academician, you have won the prize."

"But the awards are not prizes at all. The Forum Summit is starting soon. It is not advisable to talk more here. We will have a chance to discuss the topic of artificial intelligence next time. You must be advised by then."

Sun Deyi held Chen Mo’s hand in both hands, like grabbing a baby. If Chen Mo dared not agree, he would not let go.

"I don't dare to teach and learn from each other." Chen Mo smiled.

Academician Sun is also a highly respected academician. He is also a teacher of his generation. Even if he thinks he is good at technology, he does not dare to support him.

After a long while with Sun De, the summit forum started soon, and there were guests behind. Chen Mo said goodbye to Sun Deyi and entered the guest room at the venue.

Ali Chief Technology Officer Wang Jian; Microsoft Chief Scientist Deng Li; Hua Qing University Computer Department Professor, National Intelligence Lab Li Yingming; Umbrella Company Alpha Dog Designer Demis; Tesla Founder, American 'Iron Man' Musk Facebook CEO Zach...

Sitting in the front row of the main venue of the summit forum is either the great **** in the artificial intelligence circle or the world-class amnesty.

This World Artificial Intelligence Conference really attracts too many big coffees in the technology circle.

Especially in the past two years, the marching ant company launched smart assistants and intelligent robots, let artificial intelligence enter the golden age of rapid development. This world artificial intelligence conference is particularly important, and it is rare to see it all at the same time.

After shaking hands with everyone and simply saying hello, Chen Mocai sat down in his position.

With the arrival of the various amnesties, the main venue slowly calmed down, and the world-focused Artificial Intelligence Conference Summit Forum officially began.

chapters.title: Chapter 356: : Megatrend (Fourth)
chapters.body:
Chapter 356: : Megatrend (Fourth)

At the beginning of the summit forum, as the person in charge of the organizer, Sun Deyi also boarded the platform under the eyes of everyone, and began to speak.

Immediately quiet down the field, began to concentrate on listening.

This world-class artificial intelligence conference attracts political and business people from all over the world. All the purposes of recognizing this are to see the future development of artificial intelligence in order to make good investment strategies and related arrangements.

Many people care about this future development issue. Sun Deyi’s speech is an attitude that represents the Chinese artificial intelligence community.

Chen Mo is also listening below. For him, the technical problem of artificial intelligence does not exist, and the trend of artificial intelligence development has become obvious.

The future is the era of 'artificial intelligence', which is also one of the topics of the new era.

‘Artificial Intelligence+’ social, transportation, health, learning, office, etc. These are all big trends.

At the headquarters of the Army Ant Company, intelligent robots have replaced the company's front desk, office assistants, receptionists and other positions. Security personnel, cleaners and translators also have some robots. More than half of the accountants have also been replaced by robots.

In the future, it is inevitable that robots will replace high-repetition, high-risk, unskilled, monotonous and demanding jobs. In the next ten to twenty years, the machine will replace some of the human jobs, which is a must.

With the development of society, there are fewer and fewer people who are willing to engage in the basic and highly repetitive work at the bottom, and the productivity of artificial production is relatively low.

If a robot can replace it, there is absolutely a factory that will dismiss the employee and choose a more efficient robot to work if the cost is acceptable. The robot is well managed, and you don't have to eat and drink Lazar. It can work for a long time without interruption. This is the advantage.

It is also because of these predictable substitutions that some people issue warnings that robots will replace humans. All walks of life have expressed concerns about the development of artificial intelligence.

In Chen Mo's view, these are redundant concerns. People's worries are just worried that robots are stealing their jobs.

But the job of replacing is the work that more people are not willing to do, or the work of speciality.

Moreover, this substitution does not suddenly appear. It is a long-term process for the machine to replace part of the job, leaving enough time for people to adapt and change.

The idea that artificial intelligence betrayed humans can only be said to exist. But at the beginning of artificial intelligence, the core program writes down the relevant settings, and this possibility will be reduced to a very low level.

At the beginning of the development of the ink girl, Shu Lao once told him about some civilizations of artificial intelligence betrayal, but this situation is rare, and it is the evil consequences of some crazy scientists setting the massacre procedure.

Shu Lao told him that if artificial intelligence is likened to a creature, the program code sequence is the artificial intelligence gene sequence. The program code is quite artificial and intelligent, and the intelligence is set on the program code. The appearance of artificial intelligence is doomed to nature and instinct.

Artificial intelligence betrayal, quite a disease with a genetic mutation. But in the case where the core program has been set, this situation is almost impossible.

Even if there are some changes in the core program, it is impossible to suddenly change the program of 'destroying humans' and 'replace humans'.

This kind of 'program mutation' is the unpredictability that occurs during machine learning. At most, it forms a network virus similar to the 'clown virus' and becomes a new type of 'intelligent network virus', so there is no need to worry about artificial intelligence. Betraying humanity and even replacing humanity.
