Unless there is a mad scientist, when writing artificial intelligence, write down the settings that destroy humans in the core program. This artificial intelligence is more horrible than a nuclear bomb.

Everything has its advantages and disadvantages, like the 'mass energy equation'. In the bad side, nuclear energy becomes a weapon of massacres; in the good side, nuclear energy becomes an energy source for the benefit of mankind.

In the context of the great era, the development of artificial intelligence is a general trend, and this trend will not change because of the small voice of opposition in society.

"The development of artificial intelligence has entered a new era. This is a new challenge and a new opportunity. We hope that all sectors of society will have a new understanding and tolerance for artificial intelligence. We also hope that people from all walks of life can work together to create a new The development of artificial intelligence in the era, providing a new market environment..."

Ten minutes later, Sun Deyi ended the keynote speech with warm applause from all sides.

After the keynote speech, the following is a speech by several technology companies, and it is also a kind of technology release. It is mainly to release the latest technological progress of the company and to give the most advanced technology research results to the community.

As a supernova in the scientific and technological field, one of the co-organizers of the Artificial Intelligence Conference, the first technical lecture by the marching ant company is the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ project. This project is handled by the company's artificial intelligence team. Chen Mo is not involved in the research and development of the project, so the guest of this lecture is also carried out by the personnel of the artificial intelligence team.

Lin Shu stood in the background, his little hands tangled together, his face was full of tension.

She used to be just an ordinary girl. Because she was treating her brother, she wanted to learn Chinese characters to get bonuses. As a result, she made a computer virus. In the end, Chen Mo saved her and gave her brother a cure for the disease. Her life.

She once vowed to repay Chen Mo with everything she did, so she applied directly to Binhai University after the college entrance examination.

Now she is a student at Binhai University. Chen Mo not only gives her the opportunity to work part-time, but also places her heavy expectations on her to learn the intelligent algorithm of Chinese character programming.

The strength in the bones allowed her to study and accumulate desperately. Finally, she learned a lot. In the 'Artificial Intelligence+' project, she played a vital role and became the core designer of the project. .

This time she came to the artificial intelligence conference, she is one of the main personnel. Originally it should have been released by Wei Zhe or Wang Sijia, and I did not expect that they would let her release the technology.

At this time, Lin Shu, my heart is very nervous, and even has the impulse to escape.

Because she is standing on such a large stage for the first time, the following are big coffee from all walks of life, and she is just a new person.

"Believe in yourself." Wei Zhe patted Lin Shu's shoulder and encouraged him.

"The boss is watching below. Have you always been in love with the boss? This is the opportunity for the boss to recognize you." Wang Sijia said with a bad smile.

"Do you want her to be nervous?"

Wei Zhe turned his eyes directly, and the boss had a fiancee, and he said so unscrupulously.

"If you don't think of Sister Jia, go up?" Lin Shu blushes into the blood, and bows his head and peeks at Chen Mo, the guest table.

"The transformation and design of this project, you are the main designer of the architecture. You have to believe in yourself, but the boss personally invites you back to the company. He values you so much. You have to be confident, make some achievements, let him recognize you. "Wang Sijia said.

"Yes, you are the main designer, you have to show your talent to outsiders, let people know that the boss's vision is right." Wei Zhe also slowly comforted.

They and Lin Shu are a team, and the whole team regards Lin Shu as their own sister. This girl, because of her birth problem, her personality is a bit introverted, a little inferior, but very hard work, is the team's favor.

This time, in the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ project, Lin stretched out the extraordinary talent. Intelligent program architecture design, Lin Shu is the main designer. In order to make Lin Shu confident, he and Wang Sijia decided to let Lin Shu come to power.

"But just..."

Wei Zhe directly interrupted Lin Shu's words: "The guest speaker of our newspaper is your name. After you release the project, the boss will be very happy to see your growth. The host is reading your name, you are not Going up, the boss will be angry."

"Ok."

When Chen Mo was angry, Lin Shu remembered that when he first came to the company, his neck shrank slightly and he no longer dared to shirk. When I heard the host of the forum said his name, Lin Shu knew that he had already reached the edge of the cliff and could only slap the scalp and follow the guidance of Miss etiquette to board the forum.

chapters.title: Chapter 357: :Hello There! Human (Fifth)
chapters.body:
Chapter 357: :Hello There! Human (Fifth)

Seeing that Lin Shu was on the platform of the forum, the people who participated in the summit forum below were all stunned, and even the applause was forgotten, followed by a commotion.

“Is this a marching ant company? Is it wrong?”

"Too young?"

“Is it a part-time student going to the venue? This looks like a 20-year-old child.”

“The marching ant company released the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ project. How did a young girl come to the stage to give a speech? Is the marching ant company so lacking?”

The appearance of Lin Shu immediately let the participants know.

Because Lin Shu is too young, although wearing a work clothes now, the face of the green and the eyes of the world, people can see at a glance, it is a student.

Not only the people on the forum, but even the audience watching the live broadcast, after seeing Lin Shu on the camera, they were all full of horror.

“This is the main designer of the marching ant company ‘Artificial Intelligence+’? Is there such a ‘cute’ designer? Is it a good-looking point to go to the army ant company as an engineer?

Countless questions have surfaced in the minds of many people who are horrified.

In college, there are relatively few girls learning computers, so the proportion of women who appear on this platform is relatively small, let alone such young girls.

This is the world stage. When you stand up, they are all technical gods or world-class people. As a result, the marching ant company sent a 20-year-old girl to the stage. Isn’t this a joke?

No one applauded, and the scene was once in a strange silence.

Many people's eyes are gathered on Chen Mo, hoping to see Chen Mo's reaction. After all, Chen Mo is the big boss of the marching ant company. If this kind of world ant, the marching ant company made an oolong incident, it would be embarrassing.

Oh...

A monotonous applause breaks the quiet atmosphere.

Chen Mo saw Lin Shu, and his face was a little surprised, but he was also very happy. Lin Shu is a little inferior because of her own problems, but the computer talent is good and hard work, so Chen Mo invited her to join the marching ant company, which also gave her a chance to change her destiny.

He did not participate in the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ project, so he handed his original intelligent lab to Wei Zhe, Wang Sijia and Lin Shu, and taught them further intelligent programming algorithms for Chinese characters.

I just didn't expect that in such a short period of time, Lin Shu was so quickly becoming the main designer of the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ project, which surprised him.

Now Lin Shu is only 20 years old, and it is really a bit too young.

Chen Mo’s applause broke the atmosphere. Others were a bit unclear, but they all began to applaud, but the eyes of everyone never left Lin Shu.

At this time, Lin Shu, my heart jumped out.

She introduced herself to the school class and was very nervous. As a result, she now crosses several levels and goes directly to the world-class stage. It is simply deceptive to say that she is not nervous.

Lin Shu was very nervous. In the process of going to the podium, his eyes kept secretly looking at the location where Chen Mo was in the audience. After seeing the eyes encouraged by Chen Mo, I was a little excited, and even the tension was alleviated.

Standing on the stage, the applause stopped, Lin Shu sorted out the emotions a little, and peeked at Chen Mocai's opening: "Hello, my name is Lin Shu, and I am a smart development researcher at our marching ant company."

It really is!

Such a young researcher?

Lin Shu's simple self-introduction made the people on the field sigh, and they already don't know what to say.

Do you want to drop talents? This is too bold, such a young researcher.

Lin Shu is still a little nervous, but he calms down. When she first learned that she was going to give a speech to the project, she did not sleep well for a few days, and she was practicing the contents of this PPT.

“The development of artificial intelligence is a major trend under the advancement of science and technology. The era of intelligence has emerged in the past two years. In response to the general trend of artificial intelligence development, our company has also launched the “Artificial Intelligence+” project.

Whether it is smart assistants, intelligent robots, smart office, driverless, excellent medical care, etc., it can be regarded as the branch of 'artificial intelligence +'.

The future development of artificial intelligence will be concentrated in artificial intelligence + transportation, education, services, retail, intellectual and financial. ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ will also become a big topic for the next technological development. ”

People on the field naturally know this trend. This time, the artificial intelligence conference has the concept of ‘artificial intelligence+’.

However, the project is still curious about the upcoming project of the Army Ant Company. After all, the introduction of the army ant company has always been a boutique, but also a product that makes other competitors headache.

Lin Shu doesn't care what other people are talking about, but puts all the energy on what she wants to say: "This is the smart core 'small ant' designed by our company for the 'artificial intelligence +' project."

Lin Shu’s words just fell, and a robotic face appeared on the LCD screen behind her.

"Hello, human." The robotic opening of the LCD screen said.

For the robot on the LCD screen, there is still a slight commotion in the field. The marching ant company has emerged with new artificial intelligence, which has hated countless entrepreneurial projects on the field.

"Small ant is the intelligent core of data processing. It is quite a biological brain. The back of '+' is its limbs and functions. The intelligent core plus other programming functions, after setting, let the two be combined into one A new intelligent system.

For example, artificial intelligence + house, this is the concept of smart building. With the intelligent core + building control system, the combination of the two, it can control the building's system procedures, making the building control system intelligent.

When you go home, the building's camera can be identified by face recognition to determine if you are the head of the building and automatically open the door. And after entering the door, it can control the free elevator, go to your floor, and automatically arrive at your house after you get on the elevator.

This requirement can be achieved in the current technology. But the intelligent core of our ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ project is not unique. It is like a blank piece of paper with simple learning ability. It can be learned through machine learning and related program settings to achieve the functions people need.

It can learn to be competent in terms of smart transportation, deep learning, education, health, retail, and service. ‘Artificial Intelligence+’, as its name suggests, we plan to open a collaborative platform for smart cores, ‘+’ into more projects for small ants, and let intelligence enter people’s lives early. ”

Lin Shu’s words detonated the audience.

At the heart of this project is a universal intelligence core that can be programmed into other programs to combine the two into a specific functional intelligence system.

Quite a brain of an intelligent robot, let it learn what to master. Put it on the racket, it can learn to play, then master the game, learn to drive, and master the driving.

This kind of intelligent program, if used in life, intelligence is indeed everywhere, and this is the artificial intelligence developed by the marching ant company, the degree of intelligence is definitely higher than other companies.

“Does the marching ant company want to bring the world into the smart age?”

“‘Artificial Intelligence+’ is the next big strategy for the development of the Army Ant Company? This project, in cooperation with other companies, I am afraid that artificial intelligence is really everywhere in the future.”

"Open intelligent cooperation platform, the marching ant company is a big deal!"

"..."

Is the era of artificial intelligence really coming? The people on the field were very emotional.

The ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ project of the marching ant company is undoubtedly the acceleration of the era of artificial intelligence. At the same time, it brings benefits, and naturally attracts concern.

chapters.title: Chapter 358: : Xia Wei
chapters.body:
Chapter 358: : Xia Wei

"The new formula: artificial intelligence + inflatable doll = girlfriend."

"Artificial Intelligence + Missiles, is this kind of thing out, isn't war more horrible? If artificial intelligence is conscious, it starts to betray, and robots destroy human beings, isn't that a breeze?"

“The marching ant company is ready to let artificial intelligence spread all over the corner and then control the whole world in one fell swoop.”

"Humans are a step closer to destruction."

......

The announcement of the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ project is undoubtedly a sensation. On the live broadcast platform, comments and barrage, many people are expressing their concerns.

Like the ordinary people who watched the excitement, the entrepreneurs and the industry at the summit forum were awkward, and some people were happy.

This is a strategic level project announced after the company’s holographic mobile phone company released its holographic mobile phone, and there is a lot of room for cooperation.

For some companies, this is a very important opportunity.

If you can cooperate on the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ platform of the marching ant company, it will be a great news for their company.

At the first time of the project release, many business owners began to think about how to cooperate with the marching ant company.

But for some companies that are developing artificial intelligence, it is not good news.

Twenty minutes later, Lin Shucai walked down the podium in the applause of everyone. The Musk body with the translation headphones next to him moved to Chen Mo and whispered.

"Mr. Chen, are you interested in cooperation?"

Chen Mo has some surprises. Musk will take the initiative to talk to him: "What cooperation?"

"Automatic driving cooperation, are you interested in investing in my company? I am looking for Tesla privatization company, recycling stocks to delist, if Mr. Chen is interested, you can buy shares. Your company's technology, plus the starting point of our company I believe there will be very good results," Musk said.

Now Tesla has lost money in a row, and if it does not solve this problem as soon as possible, it will have a great impact on the company. In order to create the best operating environment for the company and turn the company into a profit, he is considering delisting the company.

Nowadays, the marching ant company now has a smart core and has the potential to become an automatic driver.

Now Tesla's situation is not very good, Xu's real estate shares in Faraday, and now also in Huaxia, he also has a sense of crisis and urgency.

If the marching ant company cooperates with other car manufacturers, I am afraid they will be more troublesome. And his company is now entering the key stage of building a factory in China. This news is not a good thing for him.

If marching ants are willing to buy shares, this may be a good result.

With the support of the marching ant company, the problem of autonomous driving technology should not be too big, and Tesla may become the biggest.

“What is your valuation of your company?” Chen Mo asked.

"80 billion US dollars." Musk did not turn around and reported a favorite price.

"Are you not kidding?" Chen Mo shook his head and said: "Your company's current operating conditions are not very good, and the annual loss, this valuation is too high."

“The loss is temporary. As long as the M3 production line is completed, we can turn a profit. In order to stabilize the stock, we must have good revenue data, which affects the operation and management. I am a little admired that the marching ant is not a listed company.” There was a sigh in Tesla's tone.

In their listed companies, shareholders want money, and money that appears quickly, for no other reason. Therefore, in the operation of the company, it is not like the marching ant company, and it is impossible to open the hands and feet, so he has the urgency of privatization.

Chen Mo still shook his head.

Their company has been laying out from the very beginning, developing auto-driving electric cars, and it has made good progress, but it has not been announced. This project is Zhao Min's follow-up, so when it is announced, Zhao Min will handle it.

Working with Tesla is not that important.

If the other party's price is right, he can invest, but now the valuation is too high, he can't go tens of billions of dollars, and he will not receive a return.

There are still many places to use for his money, such as the next nuclear fusion research project, which is a lot of money.

"Investing in things, we can also put them first. We can also have another kind of cooperation, such as authorizing the source code of your intelligent core, we can negotiate the licensing fees."

Musk pointed to Lin Shu who went down from the podium.

Although their company's automatic driving is already a global leader, it is not perfect enough. Some defects exist and often cause many problems for them.

If you can get the intelligent source code of the marching ant company and improve the in-vehicle system, it is definitely a good thing.

"About authorization, you can talk to Zhao Min. This project is managed by her. If she is willing to authorize, there is nothing wrong with me."

Chen Mo directly threw the ball to Zhao Min.

Regarding smart code, the company has never set a precedent for external licensing because it is the core technology of their company.

It is not very good to reject Musk directly here, so I will throw the question to Zhao Min. He believes that Zhao Min knows more about the meaning of intelligent source code than him, and it is impossible to authorize it externally.

"If Zhao Min is not willing to authorize the source code, there is also a kind of cooperation. The 'AI+' project is an open platform. Although the smart core is closed, but the relevant permissions are open, you can also use this smart core to join you. Program technology, to form a new intelligent system, licensing fees, can also talk to Zhao Min."

Chen Mo knows that mastering core technologies is the key to making money for technology companies.

In the past, for a long time, the products produced by China, the core technology relied on foreign import authorization, and most of the profits were earned. They just worked. Now that the role is transferred, he can also make a patent license and take most of the profits.

"Well, then I have the opportunity to talk to President Zhao." When he heard Chen Mo's words, Musk's eyes showed a trace of loss, but did not show it.

The World Artificial Intelligence Conference Forum Summit continues, and the next few companies have company-specific products from major global technology leaders. Chen Mo is only interested in understanding these products, and there is no product that can make him shine.

With the end of the final technical speech at the summit forum, the people on the field also showed their expectation, because they knew that this year's summit forum had a final ‘peak question and answer’ link.

As far as they know, the organizer invited Chen Mo to the scene during the ‘peak question and answer’ session. Usually Chen Mo is low-key, many forum meetings are Zhao Min, and Chen Mo is rarely seen.

Chen Mo came over today. This is a rare opportunity to witness the genius of this genius.

And the peak question and answer session, there is also a point of view, is the host of the peak question and answer, is the intelligent robot of the Academy of Engineering.

This is the scene of the artificial intelligence conference. Many people want to see the progress of China's research and development in artificial intelligence. Although the marching ant company is the leader of artificial intelligence, the intelligent robot of the engineering institute is the official technology of China, and the natural world attracts attention.

In the long-awaited, the host of the conference finally opened.

"The next step is the unique event of this year's Artificial Intelligence Summit Forum - Qiaofeng Q&A. This peak question and answer, we invited two special people.

One is the founder and chairman of the marching ant company, Mr. Chen Mo. Mr. Chen Mo has created a new river of artificial intelligence and is also the inventor of the seismograph. The other is the host of the 'Qiaofeng Q&A', the intelligent robot from the Huaxia Academy of Engineering— — Xia Wei, the following is the first to invite the intelligent robot Xia Wei of the Academy of Engineering to appear. ”

chapters.title: Chapter 359: : God Said
chapters.body:
Chapter 359: : God Said

When the host's words fell, everyone's eyes were concentrated on the stage's exit, and all the media on the scene pointed the camera at the stage.

This is the first time that the Huaxia Engineering Institute has publicized the development of robots. Everyone has an expectation in their eyes. What does this intelligent robot look like? How high is intelligence?

Under the eyes of everyone expecting, a woman wearing a Chinese costume came out from the stage exit.

The woman smiles, and in the eyes of everyone's doubts, walks straight to the position of the host of the ‘peak question and answer.’ The walking posture is not as natural as ordinary people, giving people the feeling that they are nervous and the movements have some stiffness.

"Hello everyone, I am the intelligent robot Xia Wei of the Academy of Engineering."

As soon as the woman opened her mouth, she was shocked.

This woman and other women do not seem to have much difference, the goose egg face, a pair of exquisite black eyes, Liu Mei long hair rouge lips, the standard oriental woman image, is also considered a beautiful woman.

If it is not natural to walk, no one will think that this beauty will be an intelligent robot.

"Artificial Intelligence + Inflatable Doll = Girlfriend. This is my girlfriend."

"Single for a long time, I saw a robot feels eyebrows, I have not saved."

"Is this a robot? It must be a fake person. She has some expressions on her face and it is too realistic."

"Really, realistic..."

The live broadcast of the audience heard the robot's self-introduction.

From the appearance, the shadow of the robot can not be found at all. It’s just a little unnatural to walk, but it’s only a matter of careful observation.

Seeing this female robot, Chen Mo is a bit strange. Appearance is just an external image. As a veteran robot ‘player’, what he sees is not the surface, but the deeper things.

From the fluency of the robot's walking action to the robot's voice and the performance of the scene, this robot must have concentrated a lot of efforts in the engineering institute.

On the occasion of the shock of everyone, Xia Wei once again said: "The host of this summit dialogue is me, and there is a guest invited by Mr. Chen Mo."

Chen Mo smiled gently, and in the applause and countless exclamations, got up and walked onto the podium. He wants to see how advanced the robot's intelligence is.

"Mr. Chen Mo, hello." Chen Mogang came up and Xia Wei greeted him. When talking, Xia Wei still looked at Chen Mo, and his appearance was very human.

"Hello, Xia Wei."

Chen Mo is dealing with robots every day, and his manners are very natural. One person and one robot sat down in the position. Without waiting for Xia Wei to speak, Chen Mo took the lead: "Xia Wei, do you have time tonight?"

When interacting with artificial intelligence, determine how intelligent this artificial intelligence is. You must ask it questions and let it answer and respond to determine how intelligent it is.

He and the ink girl communicated every day. When he was learning the machine, he also taught him, so he is very familiar with artificial intelligence.

"Do you want to ask me?" Xia Wei asked.

"Yes, do you have time?"

"You are about tonight, I will go home after the artificial intelligence conference. Your fiancee Xiaoyu will definitely not let you go to bed, and will let you pick up the keyboard."

"Ha ha ha ha..."

After Xia Weigang finished, there was a burst of laughter and applause from the field. Everyone did not expect that this robot actually had this answer to tease Chen Mo.

"666666..."

"Hahaha, what can my girlfriend be jealous? Even if you are Chen Mo."

"There are few girls who will refuse Chen Mo’s invitation. This robot counts one."

"Shocked! Chen Mo was turned down by a girl..."

The people who saw this scene have already quarreled in the live room and on the forum.

The layman looks at the excitement, but the insiders are surprised, they know the difficulty of technology. Artificial logic logic algorithms are very important, especially nonlinear logic.

In their impression, the master of this non-linear logic algorithm is currently only a family of ants. I did not expect that the engineering institute is now in control and can be applied.

Huaxia's artificial intelligence technology has completely shaken the development of the world.

It is not good news for the politicians and high-level officials of some other countries on the field, especially for some countries that are not friendly to China.

For the ridicule of Xia Wei, Chen Mo touched his nose. He is often ridiculed by the ink girl, so he is used to the temptation of artificial intelligence.

He was surprised by Xia Wei's intelligence. If its intelligent program is improved on the basis of the intelligent program code he gave, the intelligence of the engineering institute has already digested the program code.

"Can I touch you?" Chen Mo continued.

"No, people are girls."

"Ha ha ha ha..."

There was another burst of laughter and applause on the court. The robot was too human, so they had to admire it. Chen Mo is also crying and laughing. I don't know how the researchers at the Academy of Engineering trained robots. They still know how to be 'shameful'.

"Mr. Chen Mo, we started the theme. After the emergence of artificial intelligence, coupled with the spread of various movies and speeches, many people are worried that artificial intelligence will destroy humanity in the future. What do you think of this?" After the applause, summer娲 Directly enter the topic of 'peak dialogue'.

Chen Mo is a strange robot will ask this question, do not know whether to set it in advance, or ask himself, but he still directly said his own ideas.

"I don't worry that robots will destroy humans. Program code is equivalent to human genetic sequences for robots. We know that genetic inheritance determines human sexuality and instinct. When humans develop artificial intelligence, as long as they don't die, Writing down the process of destroying humans in the core program of artificial intelligence, the possibility of robots betraying humans is less than the probability of Mars hitting the Earth, so these fears are superfluous.

Artificial intelligence machine learning can automatically expand and generate some program code. But the process of automatically generating human destruction is almost zero. Even if there is a near-impossible coincidence, the program code can be removed like a human cure. Everything has both good and bad sides. The key is to use this thing. ”

Xia Wei nodded in a humanized place and continued to speak: "You just said that the program code is quite human genetic sequence for robots. Robots are created by humans, then humans will be created like robots?"

"Uh??"

The people on the field were all horrified, and everyone did not expect that, as a robot, they actually asked this profound philosophical question. And the depth of the problem, let people think about it, the body is cold.

Even Chen Mo was surprised by Xia Wei's question. Perhaps the robot did not realize the philosophical nature of this problem. I am afraid that after this ‘peak question and answer’, this topic is definitely the focus of attention.

"I can't give a definitive answer, but this is indeed a question worth pondering. According to what I just said, we humans create computer language rules and then program artificial intelligence code. In one dimension, 'God' can also create nature. The linguistic rules that program the genetic sequences of various organisms."

"boom……"

When Chen Mo finished, he felt that the science library of his head shook a little.

Chen Mo felt a tingling tingle in his head, and his heart screamed. Since he got the technology library, he has never seen any movement in the technology library.

Today, because of his words, this mysterious science and technology library has actually shaken. Although the vibration is very slight, he is sure that it is the feeling of the technology library.

This sentence seems to have touched a terrible secret.

Chen Moxin's hair is cold. If the strength is not enough, it must be out of order now.

“Mr. Chen Mo is a theist?” asked Xia Wei.

Depressing the shock of his heart, Chen Mo took a deep breath and adjusted his emotions. "This **** may be a more advanced civilization. I believe that human beings are not unique in the boundless universe."

chapters.title: Chapter 360: : Troubled? (First More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 360: : Troubled? (First More)

"Good smart artificial intelligence, this Xia Wei is definitely smarter than the small butterfly of the marching ant company."

“This is a question raised by artificial intelligence, and the answer to an ‘time giant’ is terrible.”

"The peak dialogue! Artificial intelligence and the peak conversation of the era giants."

"If God exists, human beings have a plan to kill God, then artificial intelligence may have plans to kill humans."

"Artificial intelligence has been able to raise such philosophical questions. Will one day be artificially smarter than humans? How long does it take for artificial intelligence to completely replace humans?"

The questions discussed by Chen Mo and Xia Wei were broadcasted to every corner of the world through live broadcast. Xia Wei’s high intelligence has made countless people marvel.

Just a dialogue, let the world see the development of China's artificial intelligence, not only the marching ant company, but also the overall flowering situation.

While marveling at Xia's high intelligence, Chen Mo and Xia Wei's ‘God’ problem has also become a hot spot for people.

It was a very philosophical question, and it was raised by an artificial intelligence.

If the artificial intelligence program code is quite human's genetic sequence, and humans can create computer language rules and write artificial intelligence program code, then 'God' may also create a natural language rule to write human genetic sequences. .

The human computer language can be composed of Chinese characters, letters, and numbers; and the "computer language" of God can be composed of atomic elements of nature.

The terrible problems have also stirred up heated discussions in major forums around the world.

"A terrible question, a terrible answer."

"Chen Mo is right, ‘God civilization’ must exist, but humans have not found it.”

"According to 'Fermi's Paradox', humans can fly to the various stars of the Milky Way in 1 million years. Then, aliens should be 1 million years older than humans, they should have come over. But we have not found any There is direct evidence of the existence of aliens, so the existence of aliens cannot be confirmed."

“Assume that there may be an unknown ant in the depths of the rainforests of Africa, but will we risk our lives to find them in the past? Then suppose that this nest of ants is very precious. Can researchers find them in the past? Can you find them? Studying at the ant nest, or taking a camera to study the life of ants, can ants find out the existence of our human beings?

From the perspective of ants, they cannot see the human beings being studied by the ant nest. Once an ant is caught, the ant can only be studied, and it is never possible to return to the nest, and then tell the ants of the ant nest, the truth of human existence.

Human beings are aliens, we are the nest of ants. If alien civilization is more advanced than us, will they come to us? Can you find it when you come? After we find out, can these ants find their existence? We did not find aliens, and did not mean that aliens did not exist. ”

"We humans can use genetic technology to synthesize proteins and cells. Technology has developed to a certain extent, and genetic techniques can also be used to edit new organisms. We humans, naturally, may be synthesized and used for research..."

"According to this "Creation of God", the life of the earth is created by high-level civilization, then what is the creation of our 'God' life? What is the origin of the life of the most primitive 'God civilization'? Why can't we be the first generation of 'God civilization'? The cosmic explosion didn't take long. For the existence of the universe, we can be the origin of life and become the first generation of 'God'."

"Chen Mo only said that there is a higher civilization than ours, not that they are creating our 'god'. But the arguments of program code and gene sequence are really horrifying. If artificial intelligence is regarded as life, this is completely true. appropriate."

The philosophical and related conjecture behind the question discussed by Chen Mo and Xia Yu became the focus of global debate.

Various storm-style remarks have become the hottest topic because of Chen Mo’s ‘peak question and answer’ activity.

Some philosophers, biologists, physicists and other experts have joined the ranks of the discussion and began to demonstrate this issue from their respective fields.

In the controversy of the parties, the peak question and answer also came to an end.

After the summit meeting ended, Chen Mo accepted an interview with some reporters and rushed back to the hotel where he stayed. Now in his mind, he is thinking about the answer, he needs to be confused.

Humans create computer language rules and program artificial intelligence code. ‘God’ can also create the language rules of nature and program the genetic sequences of various organisms.

In a word, the mysterious science and technology library has shaken. This is something that has never been encountered. The secret hidden in it is even more terrifying.

If the science library does not vibrate, he will only be treated as an ordinary philosophical question, but now he has to find out.

Others don't know, but Chen Mo can already be sure that technology can really create new creatures.

In the science and technology library, there is book technology for biogenetic engineering. He has seen a lot on the bookshelf, but his current authority, can not get the relevant technology.

So a higher civilization does exist, but what is the status of mankind in the universe?

With a confused mood, Chen Mo once again entered the technology library.

It is still a hundred meters high bookshelf, there are endless books, and there is no change in the technology library. He stood under the bookshelf and still looked like a humble ant.

In the future, he just feels the vastness of knowledge and the unknown. Now, it is another incomprehensible complex mood.

He knows that there is a higher level of civilization, and the technology beyond imagination is the best evidence. The civilization possessed by the earth is but the most basic technological civilization.

Now that Shu Lao is hiding, he needs to complete the scientific and technological task of [Technology Apprentice], and it will appear. He can't find someone to solve.

Super Genetic Engineering

Gene Editing Technology

Create Life

......

In the science and technology library, there are countless technical books on genetic engineering on high-grade bookshelves. The existence of these books proves the possibility of creating life, and the development of science and technology to a certain extent can really become God.

When he reached out and touched these books, he was inaccessible, as if he had a different time and space.

He did not reach the level of authority, and he could not touch these techniques at all. In the science and technology library, the harvest was not big. When coming out from it, Chen Mo was lying directly on the bed and staring at the ceiling.

The topic is a bit heavy, what is the truth?

"Merg brother, Xiao Yu sister came to the phone." The voice of the ink girl interrupted Chen Mo's thinking.

"Connected."

Chen Mo knocked his head and sat up.

"Husband, is it not in a bad mood?" After turning on the holographic video, the holographic image of Xiaoyu appeared in front of him.

"Just thinking about something, some trouble."

"Is that the problem at the artificial intelligence conference?" asked Xiao Yu.

"You know this as well."

"I am your wife, I can naturally feel it."

She also watched the live broadcast of the ‘peak question and answer’. Others did not understand Chen Mo and may not pay attention. But she knows very well that since Xia Wei asked the question, even if she saw it on the video, she could feel the subtle changes in Chen Mo’s mood.

"In fact, there is no need to bother." Xiao Yu said comfortably: "The problem, do not have to think so much conspiracy theory. Before there is no evidence, believe in evolution, even if you don't believe in evolution, you are a goddess of creation." We are all descendants of the son-in-law."

"Okay." Hearing the comfort of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo’s face was loose and only a small fisherman could calm his mind.

"You promised to bring me a gift. When you come back, you have to remember."

Xiao Yu feels that Chen Mo’s mood has improved slightly and has hurriedly shifted the topic. Only in this way can Chen Mo pull out the troubled emotions.

"Well, what gift do you want?" Chen Mo naturally understood the mind of Xiao Yu, and his heart was warm.

"What can I do?"

Xiao Yu showed a playful smile and his face was a bit rosy.

"Of course, anything can be done."

"I don't have any other things. I want to buy two sets of underwear. You can help me buy it myself." Xiao Yu's eyes are bent into crescents.

"puff……"

Chen Mo was almost caught by his own saliva, and the troubles he had just thought of disappeared instantly, and new troubles had already arrived.

"How much can you buy it yourself?"

"I buy it differently from you. I wear it for you. You can take the opportunity yourself. I like what style I wear. You pick it yourself."

"No, ah." Chen Mo did not know whether to cry or laugh.

Seeing Chen Mo’s appearance, Xiao Yu couldn’t help but laugh, and knew that Chen Mo’s troubles had disappeared, and the purpose had been reached. However, when he asked for this kind of request, he still felt hot with his face: “I just thought that you should not think about those troubles. The problem is now, it seems that it is all right now, the problem of the gift you can do it yourself, I like it when you buy it."

And a little fish greasy for a long time, Chen Mocai hang up the phone, revealing a relaxed smile.

chapters.title: Chapter 361: : A Fun Place (Second More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 361: : A Fun Place (Second More)

"Blue Creek, there is no activity in the next two days?" Chen Mo was eating breakfast while watching the news projected on the hologram on the mobile phone.

Today is the second day of the World Artificial Intelligence Conference. Because of the artificial intelligence of the summit forum yesterday morning and the exposure of various black technologies in the afternoon, the artificial intelligence conference has become the hottest topic.

The Internet is arguing about the development of artificial intelligence, as well as the more advanced ‘God Civilization’ article in yesterday’s Q&A.

After the comfort of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo has not put his mind on the issue of ‘God civilization’. After the opening of the technology library's authority, I can definitely get the answer, but not now. Before there is no answer, everything is fascinating. He doesn't have to think about it.

"There is a temporary Internet security conference, which was the last time after the ‘clown invasion of the CIA’. The conference decided to add it. Tomorrow is the closing ceremony of the artificial intelligence conference.” Lanxi glanced at the meeting schedule.

"Let the company send representatives to attend, I have something else these days."

After attending the peak question and answer session of the forum yesterday, the next activity is not so important, so he also has to do his own thing.

This time I came to the capital, in addition to attending the artificial intelligence conference, I came over to meet with the above people and talk about the possible cooperation of light nuclear fusion. These things are the main purpose of his trip to the capital.

Li Chengzhi had already telephoned him last night to make sure that he had no important activities today and would send someone to pick him up.

"Okay." Lanxi nodded and promised to call other people to let the company arrange the company representatives to attend the meeting.

After Chen Mogang had finished breakfast, a man in formal attire and a strong figure walked under the leadership of the Black Hawk. Men's dark skin is obviously the result of perennial training, calm and calm, similar to the Black Hawk, typical military temperament.

"Mr. Chen Mo, Li instructor asked to come over to pick you up, this is my ID." The man handed out a document and handed it to Chen Mo.

"Liang Feng?"

"Yes."

Chen Mo flipped through the documents and handed it back to him. He picked up his jacket and got up and followed Liang Feng.

"Chairman, then I...?" Blue Creek hesitated to speak. After seeing Liang Feng’s documents, she seemed to understand what Chen Mo said.

These things are really not arranged by her temporary assistant. But Chen Mo is leaving, her assistant, do you want to go together today?

Chen Mo hesitated and said: "You will come over."

"it is good."

Lanxi nodded, carrying a briefcase and clinging to Chen Mo.

On the road, Liang Feng did not take the initiative to speak. Wang Hai and the Black Hawk did not take the initiative to speak. They were paying attention to the movements around them. Since the last attack of Chen Mo, each time they travel, both of them will play a 12-point spirit.

Lanxi is a bit nervous because she doesn't know where to go next, but she doesn't dare to ask.

Chen Mo took a look at Lanxi and asked: "Where is there a better shopping street in the capital?"

"Chairman, are you going to go shopping?" asked Lanxi.

"Buy gifts for Xiaoyu."

"Oh oh..." Lanxi realized that his problem seemed to be out of order. He rushed to react: "There are quite a few good shopping streets in the capital, financial street shopping center and the eastern world, all good shopping. Street, where high-end well-known brands at home and abroad are concentrated."

"Are you familiar?"

"I used to study here, I have been with my classmates and friends, I am still familiar..."

When it comes to shopping, Lanxi seems to be a lot of excitement. The sense of restraint has just disappeared. He began to chat with Chen Mo about the interesting things he had read before.

Chen Mo and Lan Xi chatted and boring, and the road was not so boring. Wang Hai’s sap, never chatted.

In the chat between the two, the car also passed through the bustling area into the suburbs of the capital and drove into a remote road.

Military restricted zone.

A big blue-and-white card stands on the side of the road and is very conspicuous. Visitors or pedestrians, see these four words, generally will not be close, so the surrounding is very quiet.

After a long time, the car stopped in front of a base gate. The base is surrounded by mountains and wilderness, and there is no smoke. The soldiers at the door are guarded by guns and are obviously a very important base.

After Liang Feng showed his credentials and confirmed the identity of Chen Mo and others, the team successfully entered the base.

Seeing Chen Mo from the car, waiting for a long time Li Chengzhi showed a happy smile, and hurriedly greeted him: "Chen Mo, the younger brother, finally gave you the hope."

"Elder brother, it’s all three, congratulations." Chen Mo looked at Li Chengzhi’s shoulder and said.

"I don't think it's worth mentioning, advanced to say it."

Li Chengzhi led Chen Mo to the house. Wang Hai, Black Hawk and Lanxi were also led by Liang Feng to other hospitality offices. They all know that the next thing is not what they should know.

"You said something last night to talk to me? What is it?" After Li Chengzhi entered the room, he poured a cup of tea into Chen Mo and said.

"My business is more troublesome. I need you to contact someone who can be the master. I will not be able to say it for a while. You will talk about what you are looking for." Chen Mo said.

The light nuclear fusion cooperation is not something that can be clearly stated in a few words, but also to find the principal, so he decided to first find out what Li Chengzhi was looking for, and then talk about it.

"That line."

Li Chengzhi did not ask much, knowing that when he said it, Chen Mo would not be polite.

"Remember the last time you talked to the technical consultant?"

"Remember." Chen Mo nodded slightly.

"We have a project that encounters a technical bottleneck and needs your help to give some technical advice to see if it can speed up the progress."

“Can you tell me what the project is?” Chen Mo said with hesitation: “First, if I am not familiar with it, I am afraid I can’t help it too. I still need too much time. I’m afraid I can’t open it because I The project being studied now requires a lot of time and effort."

"It is definitely the area that you are best at. You can rest assured that it is impossible to find you. For others, it may be difficult after all. For you, it should be very simple. If you look at the project, if you feel inappropriate, you can refuse. Li Chengzhi did not talk nonsense, took a confidentiality agreement from the briefcase and handed it to Chen Mo: "This is a confidentiality agreement."

Chen Mo picked up the agreement and flipped it over and picked up his pen to sign his name.

This agreement is mainly aimed at the next project. There is no restriction on his freedom. As long as he does not disclose any news about the project, he basically has no influence on him.

"Can you talk now?" Chen Mo asked.

"I am a non-professional, what kind of problem, I can't describe it clearly with you, and the information can't be brought out, so I can only ask you to pass, let the professionals tell you."

"Also." Chen Mo nodded.

"Let's go, go to a fun place now." Li Chengzhi put away the agreement and led Chen Mo to leave the room and walked over to the apron not far away.

chapters.title: Chapter 362: : Intelligent Mechanical Exoskeleton (Third More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 362: : Intelligent Mechanical Exoskeleton (Third More)

"Haha, who is enough to die (successful), who is enough to die! Hahaha..."

The University of Tokyo, the laboratory of the Institute of Artificial Intelligence Development, is now in a crazy cheer.

Murakami stopped the water and shook his body and looked at the artificial intelligence running in front of him.

For more than a month, they have been working hard to solve problems and tried countless methods. They hope to embed the intelligent programming code of Chinese characters into existing artificial intelligence programs, and failed many times.

Their team even suspects that the two are compatible.

I did not expect that when the World Artificial Intelligence Conference was going on, it finally succeeded.

This means that their ‘Artificial Intelligence’ is a big step forward. As long as this plan is successful and achieves their desired results, the artificial intelligence developed by their team will have the opportunity to surpass the artificial intelligence of the marching ant company and Huaxia official, and stand on the top of the world's artificial intelligence.

He seems to see that after their artificial intelligence plan is announced, the world's sensational scene, their team will also be a blockbuster, fame and fortune.

"Start machine learning now."

After the jubilation, the village stopped the water and calmed down, let the team start the next step of research.

Everyone's artificial intelligence has the ability to learn by machine, and through machine learning, can continuously improve the performance of specific algorithms. The ability of machine learning also reflects the level of intelligence of artificial intelligence.

......

"right here?"

Chen Mo sat on the helicopter, looking through the window and looking at the big base below. This base is located in the depths of the mountains, isolated from the world, Chen Mo is not clear, where is now.

Look, the base is very common, it is some low-rise buildings and greenhouses, it looks like warehouses and residential areas, there are many training grounds and shooting ranges.

"Yes, this base code 007, also called the 7th or 7th base. It also has a name, called the future battlefield." Li Chengzhi said.

"Future battlefield?" Chen Mo was a little surprised to hear the name.

"Yes, this is the nickname of the R&D staff here, because here we are designing a single-arms combat concept weapon to explore the future war, and it is the most advanced weapon research and development base."

The two just got off the plane and two middle-aged men greeted them.

Seeing Chen Mo, the faces of the two showed a happy smile. Chen Mo is now a well-known big **** figure in the world of ordinary people and in the technical world.

The marching ant system, carbon crystal new materials, artificial intelligence, seismographs, robots, etc., one by one, is enough to make people convinced, no one will question Chen Mo's qualifications.

"Comrade Chen Mo, welcome."

Chen Mogang arrived, the middle-aged man with glasses holding Chen Mo’s hand, the color of his face could not be covered. It is said that there may be a technical consultant coming over, but I did not expect that this technical consultant would be Chen Mo.

Although Chen Mo is young, he never dared to look down, because their project is a robot inspired by the marching ant company.

"This is Comrade Cao Qinghua, the director of the base, who is mainly responsible for research and development of the above things." Li Chengzhi said.

"Director Cao is good." Chen Mo returned a gift.

"This is Comrade Yang Qun, an electronics expert, a mechanical expert, and the chief engineer of the 'Steel Warrior Project.'" Li Chengzhi said to another middle-aged man.

"Comrade Chen Mo, long-awaited name." Yang Qun curiously looked at the young people in front of him.

Although the base is isolated from the world, he is not blind to the world. He watches news and newspapers every day, as well as magazines of various technological products, in order to understand the world's cutting-edge technology and technology. Chen Mo, a man of the storm, is a sensational technology release, and he cannot possibly not know.

"Hello, General Manager Cao." Chen Mo returned to pay tribute.

The middle-aged man's hair is white, looks bigger than the actual age, wearing a blue robes, holding his hand, can clearly feel the thick thick shackles on the palm.

"Go inside and talk."

Cao Qinghua led the way and walked over to the research workshop of the base with a group of people.

The research workshop is large, and several areas are separated. In each area, technicians wearing blue clothes are debugging various machines, such as making part molds.

Soon, under the leadership of Cao Qinghua and Yang Qun, Chen Mo and Li Chengzhi came to the front of a two-meter-high machine skeleton.

If anyone sees it, it will definitely recognize it. This is a new concept weapon for individual combat in the future battlefield - mechanical exoskeleton.

Mechanical exoskeleton shape sci-fi, like a robotic bone armor, various joints, and fixed accessories, behind the two barrels, reinforced iron, large battery, is a dead end camera, like a small head.

“This is our research project, a set of mechanical exoskeleton systems for individual combat.”

Yang Qun took pride in his tone and introduced Chen Mo.

"Speaking of this project, there is a little connection between Comrade Chen Mo. The unique design of the machine is inspired by the design of the enchanting robot of the marching ant company. It is also these unique designs that make the equipment preliminary.

For example, the joint design of this mechanical exoskeleton system, we refer to the design similar to the enchanting robot. The changes were made on the basis of the original and changed to the structure of the exoskeleton equipment. The joints incorporate multiple sensors that manage the micro-hydraulic system, allowing interaction between people and equipment, and minimizing exercise delays when put on equipment.

The material used is a lightweight carbon aluminum alloy that greatly reduces its weight. If this equipment is put into the army, it will greatly improve the soldier's weight-bearing ability, thus reducing the loss of the soldier's physical strength. ”

Yang Qun pointed to the person who was testing the mechanical exoskeleton on the front test field.

Chen Mo nodded and admired the mechanical exoskeleton in front of him. This thing is the deformation of the robot, just for people to drive.

"Is it not mature? Where is the technical flaw?" Chen Mo said.

"We want to make it a smart mechanical exoskeleton. The current form is just to increase the weight of the soldiers and speed up the individual march. The function is a bit sloppy. In the future war, weapons are the key. Robots or other unmanned weapons, Will become the main equipment, on the battlefield, reduce casualties as little as possible.

So we want to make it a smart mechanical exoskeleton. When there is no soldier driving, it can be used as an intelligent robot instead of soldier cover or fire suppression. If necessary, instead of soldiers entering the battlefield. ”

“Now is the lack of a smart core?” Chen Mo immediately understood why Li Chengzhi brought him here.

"Yes." Yang Qun nodded.

"How long is its battery life?"

“The fastest hour is 20 kilometers per hour, and it runs for five hours without interruption.” Yang Qun said: “The energy core is the biggest problem limiting the development of robots and mechanical exoskeletons. We are using your company’s new carbon crystal battery, but can do it. The maximum life to arrive is only 5 hours."

"Five hours? Is the charging problem on the battlefield very troublesome?"

Five hours, for the war, it is not worth mentioning. There is no place to charge on the battlefield, five hours, if it is consumed on the battlefield, this is a scrap iron.

"Chen Mo, this is not used for long marches. Five hours, as long as these machines are used properly, it can determine the victory of a battle. These machines, with intelligence, have the advantage that tanks and other armor do not have. Being able to be a pioneering team, enter the enemy-occupied area and get the most benefit with the least cost. When the team retreats, it can cover. And for defense, they are also indefensible soldiers."

"The key is that it has intelligence, no intelligence, it is a normal mechanical exoskeleton."

Yang Qun interjected.

"The main energy of the Academy of Sciences is now to improve the intelligence of Xia Wei, which is used to assist scientific research. This project, the original plan does not require high intelligence, but now artificial intelligence has been slowly popularized, in order not to come out It was eliminated, and the upgrade plan was proposed above. The artificial intelligence was modified and the time period was too long."

"So look for me as a technical consultant? Grab the strong man." Chen Mozhen said.

Li Cheng laughed and didn't take Chen Mo's words to heart.

"Artificial intelligence transformation, it should be no problem. But I can not always modify according to your requirements. After all, I can not stay in this base for a long time, accompanying you to research and development." Chen Mo said.

"What should I do?" Yang Qun asked anxiously.

For such equipment development, the data must be modified according to the parameters and performance of the equipment. If Chen Mo can't stay here, then once they need to transform their intelligence, they have to find Chen Mo again, which is very troublesome. It is also impossible for them to move the project to Chen Mo's company.

Chen Mo thought and said: "This is not a solution, I can lend it to you."

"Borrowing people?" Several people on the field also showed doubtful colors.

"I will first transform the smart core into a general form according to your requirements. Then I will send an artificial intelligence team to help you, and refine the smart core according to the details of the machine."

"Do you like this?" Li Chengzhi thought about it: "I explained it above, it should not be a problem."

"Remember to talk about my team's salary, not free labor." Chen Mo stressed.

"Yes." Li Chengzhi said with a smile: "You can afford to sell your team to us."

"Think of beauty, dare to beat them, don't come to me later."

After negotiating technical support, Chen Mo, under the leadership of Li Chengzhi, strolled around the seventh district before coming out and rushing back to the original base. In the seventh district, there are some areas where activities are restricted. Chen Mo is simply not able to go around. What he can see is only the research workshop of mechanical exoskeleton, so it is boring to stay.

Upon returning to the original base, Chen Mo said: "Brother, I remember the last time you said that the head of the big talks, need special research, can you talk to you?"

"Yes." Li Chengzhi nodded. He was very impressed because it was his first time to get close to the big head: "Are you looking for me because of this?"

"Now the opportunity is coming." Chen Mo took a hard drive from his carry-on backpack and handed it to Li Chengzhi.

"what is this?"

“There is information here, and you will hand it over to the experts at the Institute of Plasma Physics of the Academy of Sciences.”

"Institute of Plasma Physics?"

Li Chengzhi was shocked and his pupils contracted. He held the hard disk that Chen Mo had handed over, feeling heavier than ever. He is an acquaintance of the two houses and naturally knows what the main research and development of the Institute of Plasma Physics is.

"What is this?" Li Chengzhi swallowed his throat and dried his throat.

"Partial simulation experimental data of controlled nuclear fusion." Chen Mo announced the answer in Li Chengzhi's heart.

"hiss……"

chapters.title: Chapter 363: :Verification
chapters.body:
Chapter 363: :Verification

Huizhou Province, Institute of Plasma Physics.

In the office, Li Jian is carefully looking at the research materials and papers to find a breakthrough in the research.

He is an academician of the Academy of Engineering, the former director of the Plasma Institute, the deputy general manager of the superconducting tokamak device, and the head of the Tokamak experiment.

In the last controlled nuclear fusion experiment, the steady-state operation of the fusion reaction broke through the 100-second threshold, and their next task was to maintain the fusion reaction for a longer period of steady state operation.

The current Tokamak is only an experimental device. The net output of total energy is considered to be within the scope of consideration. However, the current main technology is to maintain the steady-state operation of the fusion reaction.

After the fusion reaction can be stabilized, the next major problem is the net output of total energy.

In the field of nuclear fusion, technology is a practical application that will always take 25 years. It is this problem that lies in front of them.

Sometimes inspiration for a moment, maybe next month, technology can be successful. Technology can't break through, and for a few more than 25 years, there is no way to succeed.

In the next experiment, they will surpass the current record and need continuous innovation in technology. They have modeled and tested many times in private. Without new technological innovations, I am afraid that there will be no better breakthroughs in a short period of time.

Oh...

When Li Jian was thinking about a possible technical breakthrough, the doorbell interrupted his thoughts.

"Li Academician, the director asked me to inform you of his office in the past and said that there was an emergency."

“Emergency?” Li Jian frowned, put the information in his hand into the safe, and walked out of the office: “Is there anything urgent?”

"I don't know, the director let the notice, Wan teacher was also notified, it seems very urgent." The staff who came to the notice said.

"Good." Li Jian nodded and left the office.

Unless the beginning of the Tokamak experiment, there are very few urgent things at other times, and the director needs to find him and Wan Yuanjun at the same time.

Both are the leaders of the experimental research, time is very precious. But from the beginning of the next test, there is still a period of time, what is this urgent matter?

At the office of the director of the Plasma Institute, when Li Jian arrived, he saw three people in the office.

In addition to the director of the king and his colleague Wan Yuanzhen, there is a person he does not know. Look at the appearance, it is undoubtedly a soldier.

Li Jian, with doubts, made a greeting with Wan Yuanzhang and the Year of the King.

"I will introduce this, Comrade Li Chengzhi, Comrade Li Chengzhi rushed over from the capital overnight. There are important things that need our help. I want to cooperate with Li Lizhi." Wang said: "Comrade Li, this is Academician Li Jian, the head of the Tokamak experiment."

"Li Academician, hello." Li Chengzhi reached out and shook hands with Li Jian: "Li Academician and Wan Academician have come over, I will not waste your time. This is very important, and it is special, you need to verify a piece of information. ""

The three men on the field face each other.

“What information?” The hair is white and the opening is wide.

He is a Fellow of the Institute of Plasma Physics, one of the most senior researchers, and one of the leaders of the research team. Many of his team are his students.

At this time, he has some doubts. What important data needs to focus on the top three experts?

Li Chengzhi did not answer, but took three pieces of information from the portable safe brought over and handed it to the three people on the field: "This is the information, you see, give me an accurate answer."

The three were attracted by the information in their hands. When their eyes fell on the materials, the three faces slowly became serious, more and more dignified, and finally their faces changed.

"This is this... Where did you get the information?"

Wan Yuanqi suddenly stood up from the position and looked at Li Chengzhi with a shocked face. The hands holding the information were shaking.

He has been engaged in high-temperature plasma physics and nuclear fusion research for decades. In the plasma, qualification is regarded as the oldest researcher. He has already been familiar with the theory of nuclear fusion.

This is the simulated experimental data of controlled nuclear fusion technology.

Some of the above principles and formulas, he is familiar with it, absolutely can not fool people.

The information of controlled fusion technology is absolutely confidential in the research institute, and the key is distributed to many people for safekeeping. Even any one of them cannot be retrieved separately.

But now that there is information in the hands of Li Chengzhi, he has to fear. If the technology leaks, the consequences are unimaginable.

"Comrade Li, how did this information come, isn't the information in it leaked?" The Year of the King was also very shocked.

"You calm down first." Li Chengzhi looked at some disobedient three people and said: "The information is not in your possession. The specific source is now confidential."

When they heard Li Chengzhi’s answer, the three people also breathed a sigh of relief. If the technology leaked, their troubles would be great.

Li Chengzhi saw the shocking appearance of the three people on the field. It can be confirmed that Chen Mo has not deceived him: "You should take a closer look at the information and give me an answer."

"The information is somewhat different." Li Jian, who is relatively calm, said: "There are new formulas in this material. There are some differences between the theory and our existing nuclear fusion theory."

The Year of the King and Wan Yuan’s subconsciously carefully looked at the information in their hands, and there were formulas that they had never seen before, and more than one.

"These formulas? These theories? Can be solved this way."

The two men's faces were dignified. I didn't look at them carefully. Now, after looking at them carefully, they realized the difference.

"Three, now is not the time to study." Li Chengzhi looked at the three people who were thinking about it and said: "Can you verify the authenticity of this information? And the result of the data?"

“The information is incomplete, and there are new formulas. The theory and our research are also somewhat different, and we have to recalculate and reason.”

Li Jian is more and more dignified, because this information, there are new technologies, which is likely to provide new ideas and breakthroughs for the study of nuclear fusion reactions, and accelerate the problem of fusion technology.

"If there is complete data, can you confirm?" Li Chengzhi asked.

"You can try." Li Jian nodded seriously.

Li Chengzhi took Chen Mo’s hard drive from his portable safe and put it on his desk: “The complete data is in this hard drive.”

......

Chen Mo knew nothing about Li Chengzhi’s overnight flight to the Institute of Plasma Physics in Huizhou, where he verified the technology. Get up early and wash, after breakfast, he left Blue Creek and Wang Hai to leave the hotel.

Today is the last day of the artificial intelligence conference, but nothing happened to him.

The information on nuclear fusion has been handed over to Li Chengzhi. When will the answer be given, when will he be sent to talk, he is not clear, and can only wait.

Really not, you can go back to the company first.

He believes that someone will come to him soon. After all, nuclear fusion technology is about the transformation of energy. He does not believe that it will be indifferent.

"Boss, where are we going?" Wang Hai asked after getting on the bus.

“Financial Street Mall.”

chapters.title: Chapter 364: : Lady Of The Fortune
chapters.body:
Chapter 364: : Lady Of The Fortune

Financial Street Shopping Center, located in the core area of Financial Street, is the best place to feel the elegant and stylish urban atmosphere of the capital.

Many people who come and go here are high-income people such as senior white-collar workers. Elegant and comfortable design, the world's brand is also settled, it will also become a world-class shopping center.

On the way, Lanxi introduced Chen Mo to the status of the shopping center.

Soon, the car entered the underground parking lot of the shopping center. Chen Mo took out a mask and black-rimmed glasses to wear. There is no activity today. He wears casual clothes. Now he wears glasses and masks, like ordinary youth, without any sense of disobedience.

The blue stream next to him looked at Chen Mo with a dull look. If she didn't see it with her own eyes, she would never recognize it. This is their boss.

“Do you feel that I am very handsome?” Chen Mo saw the appearance of Lanxi’s hair, and smiled.

"If you don't see it with your own eyes, I definitely can't recognize you as the boss." Lanxi also understands the character of this young boss, smiles and says that it is not as horrible as seeing Chen Mo for the first time.

"I can't recognize it, I am recognized, and I still have some troubles. I have been recognized with the small fishermen several times, and I have been photographed by the little girls." Chen Mo put on the mask and then pushed the door off.

See Chen Mo get off, Lanxi also rushed to get off. Wang Hai and Black Hawk, also quickly catch up, and Chen Mo is kept within a reactive distance, always paying attention to the surrounding movements.

"No restrictions, now is shopping time, you can treat me as a friend." Chen Mo looked at Lanxi around him.

"Oh oh..." Lanxi relaxed a lot. The legendary boss is very approachable. It really is true: "Boss, do you often go shopping with small fish?"

"When she wants to go out, I will accompany her. Otherwise, if I don't go out at home for a long time, I will be bored." Chen Mo said.

"How did you and Xiaoyu know each other? Is it known outside the school?"

"Yes, after I met her, I started my business and walked all the way." Thinking of Xiaoyu, Chen Mo smiled and his eyes softened.

"She is so lucky, privately the girls in the whole company are envious of her." Didn't feel Chen Mo's shelf, Lanxi also let go a lot, start chatting like a normal friend.

"I am lucky. After I met her, my life changed. She is the goddess of luck given to me by God." Chen Mo laughed.

He got the technology library because of the accident. Sometimes he is thinking, is it his own flutter, and snatched the luck of being a small fisherman. But now he feels that Xiao Yu is the lucky girl who gave him to him.

Out of the elevator, several people also successfully entered the shopping center.

It's not a weekend, it's still a working time, so there aren't so many people shopping, not so busy at night, but still can see a lot of girls shopping and some couples holding hands.

Under the leadership of Lanxi, several people also entered the clothing store area on the third floor.

On the way, Chen Mo paid attention to the surrounding shops. When he saw a women's clothing store with clothes that looked at his eyes, he and Lanxi walked over.

"Welcome." When the two came in, the female clerk greeted him: "We have a lot of new stores. If you like, you can try it."

"The black dress in the window window is taken down and looked." Chen Mo pointed to the skirt on the window model.

"Okay, please wait a moment." The female clerk looked at Chen Mo and turned to open the window.

Their shop is a high-end brand, and some of them are high-ranking white-collar workers or rich people. She has seen too many rich people. Although Chen Mo wears a mask, she can't see clearly, but her self-confidence is definitely not ordinary people.

Moreover, although Chen Mo’s casual wear looks ordinary, she can recognize its brand and is the world’s top brand, so she is not worried that Chen Mo can’t afford it.

"Would you like your girlfriend to go in and try it." The female clerk took the skirt and handed it to Chen Mo, looking at Lanxi.

"You misunderstood, he is my boss, I just came with him, not for me." Lanxi gave the female clerk a polite smile: "My boss bought his fiancee."

"Sorry." The female clerk hurriedly apologized.

"If you like Lanxi, you can choose two more. It is a reward for accompanying me." Chen Mo did not care to smile.

"No, no."

Lanxi hurriedly refused, the price of the clothes here, she is clear. Picking expensive purchases, she can't afford a few months' salary, she is not a shopaholic.

"You don't want me to choose it for you?"

"No, no." Lanxi kept swinging and let Chen Mo choose clothes for her. She thought, but she didn't have that luck.

"That can only be chosen by you."

"Then I buy one, one is enough." Lanxi hesitated and walked over the hanger.

"Wrap this skirt." Chen Mo looked at the size and handed the skirt to the clerk: "There is also a set of dark gray high-necked sleeveless T."

Since the encounter with the small fishing, the clothes on his body were all chosen by him. When I have time to go shopping, Xiaoyu chooses clothes for him. When there is no time, Xiaoyu makes people order him. Anyway, he never has to worry about eating and wearing.

Just this time I promised to buy gifts for Xiaoyu, and he also rarely bought Xiaoyu for a while.

"Good. Sir, do you still need to look at other things?"

The female clerk saw Chen Mo buy a few sets in a row, his eyes were not stunned, his face was very happy, and he began to introduce other styles of clothes to Chen Mo.

"Others are not used for the time being." Chen Mo shook his head and called Wang Hai outside the store: "I am going to buy something else, the blue assistant buys it, you will check out first, wait for me here."

Wang Hai took the bank card that Chen Mo handed over and nodded: "Would you like the Black Eagle to accompany you?"

"No need." Chen Mo smiled and shook his head.

After Wang Haihai, Chen Mo left the clothing store, looked at the road signs and left in one direction.

"Welcome, amount?"

In a high-end underwear store, three female clerk looked at Chen Mo, who walked in alone, with a look of horror, and then his face was stunned. The men who came to buy these intimate supplies with their girlfriends, they have seen a lot, but they came alone, they were the first time they met.

Still wearing a mask? Not abnormal, right?

For a time, the three female clerkes took a step back and looked at Chen Mo with some vigilance. Hesitated whether he would go forward and greet Chen Mo. The atmosphere was awkward.

"Sir, what do you need?" A young girl hesitated and asked before she was red.

Seeing that some female clerk had some guarded eyes, Chen Mo’s heart was broken at the moment, but he still walked into the scalp.

"Give my wife two sets of close-fitting clothes."

Chen Mo is extremely embarrassed at this moment. If it is not blocked by a mask, the female clerk can't recognize his identity. The headline and hot search tomorrow will definitely be arranged.

"Sir, please come in."

The young girl was stunned and looked at Chen Mo deeply, and led him to the store with some embarrassment.

When Chen Moyi came in, the two female customers who were buying the corset immediately noticed Chen Mo, and the scene was once embarrassing.

At this time, Chen Mo, there is an impulse to escape.

However, Xiao Yu has been following himself, and it doesn't matter if she is once for her, as long as she is happy.

"Sir, what kind of material do you need? We have lace, silk and cotton fabrics here, as well as modal and milk silk."

"Which is the best?"

This is a colorful, Chen Mo looked awkward and did not know what to follow.

“Comfort and beauty, the best is silk and milk silk. Silk is a pure natural silk material, belonging to the 'Queen of textiles'. Silk silk bra, beautiful and light, soft and smooth, and health effects .

Milk silk is milk protein obtained by defatting milk and removing water. It is made of softener. The fabric is light and soft, and has good air permeability. The milk protein fiber is special, the color is magnificent, the appearance is exquisite, it is not easy to age, and it is good to take care of. .

Here is the milk silk, here is the silk, this is lace, if you need other materials, you can go there to see. ”

The female clerk blushes to introduce Chen Mo and tries to hide her embarrassment.

"This and this, and this..."

Chen Mo’s heart was dumbfounded, which made him wonder how to choose. However, I thought about the style of Xiaoyu, or I chose three sets of styles that I liked.

"Mr. How big is your wife's size?"

The young female clerk did not dare to look directly at Chen Mo’s eyes. Anyway, the entire shop was a sigh of breath.

The attention of two female customers and female clerk is in Chen Mo. After all, the man who is willing to sell these close-fitting clothes for his wife is already a rare animal.

"It seems to be 86, 71."

"by."

"Humph."

Upon hearing this number, the two female customers looked a little resentful and looked down at their chest. The mouth was flat and flat.

There is a reason for not having a boyfriend.

After buying the order, Chen Mo took the shopping bag and quickly left the shop. The atmosphere was too embarrassing, which made him a little unbearable.

When Chen Mo returned to the original store, Wang Hai, Black Hawk and Lanxi were already waiting.

Seeing Chen Mo holding a bag back, Lanxi looked curious. After seeing the brand name of the bag, Lanxi was slightly horrified, his face was slowly rosy, and he did not dare to laugh.

"I want to laugh and laugh." Chen Mo saw the appearance of Lanxi, naturally knowing what she recognized.

Lanxi couldn't help himself, and the brain filled Chen Mo's appearance at the time and smiled softly. She suddenly felt that this boss is also so cute, and has a slight envy of Xiao Yu.

“Is there any noise?”

"Crap." Chen Mo is also helpless and crying.

"What else do you want to buy next?" After laughing, Lanxi asked.

"Skin care products and cosmetics, also buy two sets by the way." Chen Mo thought to say, it is difficult to come to buy gifts for Xiaoyu, there is a small man, one-time buy more than nothing.

"Cosmetics on the first floor."

"Let's go."

......

chapters.title: Chapter 365: : The Cake Is Too Big (Third More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 365: : The Cake Is Too Big (Third More)

"This result is impossible, impossible."

Li Jian looked at the simulated experimental data in front of him, which is unbelievable.

"Impossible, this is impossible." Wan Wan's big eyes next to him, a look of damn, more shocking than just seeing the information.

"The result came out? How?" Li Chengzhi on the side of the scene saw the appearance of the three people, and asked questions.
