"Don't bother me first." Li Jian was anxious. He was eager to know if the result was wrong: "Look, the formula and data have gone wrong."

If it is not an error, an epoch-making result will appear.

When Li Chengzhi saw it, he did not continue to speak and waited quietly.

"The formula is not wrong."

"The data is no problem."

"Recalculate it again." Li Jian and Wan Yuanzhen almost opened at the same time, staring at the computer screen, eager to see the results.

“The results came out,” said the institute responsible for computer operations.

"Really, this is true."

Li Jian and Wan Yuanzhen looked at the results of the calculations, as if they had the children who loved the toys. They laughed wildly and ignored the image.

"Director Li, how did the experimental data come from?" After the ecstasy came over, Wan Yuanzhen immediately seized Li Chengzhi's inquiry.

"Yes, tell us quickly, how did this information come?" Li Jian also excitedly grabbed Li Chengzhi's hand, for fear that he would run away.

"What is the information?"

Li Chengzhi expressed his understanding of the excitement of several people. He has a lot of researchers, and many researchers are excited to get the results they need.

“The self-sustaining, total energy is the net output state. This experimental data solves the biggest problem of controlled nuclear fusion. In theory, controlled nuclear fusion can enter the commercial operation stage.”

The three were ecstatic, they exhausted their efforts, and devoted half of their youth to this research, and now they finally see the dawn of success.

"Really?" Li Chengzhi was overjoyed.

“Really, there are some new formulas in the data. These formulas are the key to success, but we don’t have the theoretical data of these formulas. Can you tell us how this information came from? Who gave it to you?”

"Now is the confidential stage."

Li Chengzhi now understands why Chen Mo is so confident in giving this information to him and looking for their cooperation. It turned out to be such a sigh.

"Remember, this data is top secret, and no news can be released, including experimental results. This data is different from any previous experiment." Li Chengzhi said: "You know the confidentiality regulations."

He was afraid that these people were excited and announced the results. The consequences were unimaginable.

The controlled nuclear fusion simulation experiment was successful, and the result was released, even if it was just a sentence, enough to make a sensation around the world.

"We know this." Wan Yuan's face is ruddy, seems to be caused by excitement: "There is no complete theory of these formulas, and the theory of the star ring technology mentioned here. With these theories, our Tokamak experiment A breakthrough will be made, and the era of nuclear fusion is close at hand."

"Not yet." Li Chengzhi said.

"When is it?" The three men showed the color of hope.

"I can't tell you this." Li Chengzhi shook his head. He also wanted to have it. The key is that the information is given by Chen Mo, and the technical theory is in the hands of Chen Mo. Chen Mo will give this data to them, certainly not for no reason, the specific conditions, I am afraid to discuss: "I need a test report of data now."

"Good." Wang Nian nodded.

An hour later, Li Chengzhi got the report and took the hard drive to leave the institute.

Now Chen Mo should still be in the capital. It is necessary to ask first and confirm Chen Mo’s plan. He also reports to the top. This is a trivial matter.

Li Chengzhi did not know that when he was running around and tired, Chen Mo was in the middle of a boutique, picking earrings.

Lanxi looked at Chen Mo with some surprise.

The jewellery in this boutique is made of silver, or silver-plated, stainless steel jewellery. One piece is also tens of hundreds of pieces, which is not expensive. She did not expect Chen Mo to be short of money, would choose to come here to buy these jewelry for Xiao Yu.

"These two bags are wrapped up."

Chen Mo handed the earrings to the clerk and turned to see the blue-eyed look of surprise.

“Is it amazing that I will come to buy these?”

"Yes." Lanxi nodded honestly.

“Xiaoyu has a lot of jewelry at home. When I go shopping, I will buy it for her. The girl is too expensive. I only wear it when I go out for a formal occasion or go shopping with me. I usually go to work at the company and wear it. These are ordinary. But these jewellery work is very delicate and diverse. If it is rare to meet, she will choose two pairs for her. She should like it."

Lanxi suddenly realized that it is no wonder that so many women are fishing for small fish. Now she is a little embarrassed. How much blessing will you get Chen Mo’s unconditional favor.

"Mer brother, Li brother calls."

The voice of the ink girl interrupted their conversation. Chen Mo signaled that Lanxi waited in the store and turned to call.

"Brother, is there something?"

"Chen Mo, my brother, I am now in Huizhou."

"Hands and feet are very fast, so ran so quickly." Chen Mo said with some surprise.

"I don't want to be fast! After you left yesterday, I have been non-stop, busy until now, and I rushed to Huizhou last night, and I have not had a good rest."

"Then call me now, is the result coming out?"

"Several national treasures of the institute, if you don't let me go, you will be forced to confess." Li Chengzhi smiled bitterly and turned to a serious tone: "Old brother, I know you too, technology you will definitely not transfer. Your This technology, what do you want now? Give me a reply, I will reflect it."

There are many contacts with Chen Mo, and Li Chengzhi has a lot of understanding of Chen Mo. Chen Mo gave this information to him, indicating that technology would not be transferred, and the value of technology could not be judged. Therefore, he will not mention this aspect, because knowing it is useless, but it is easy to cause contradictions.

"Cooperation! This cake is too big, I can't eat it alone, I can't eat it. Cooperation and win-win. As for how to cooperate, we can discuss it. I am confident that I can break through the technical difficulties and make nuclear fusion power generation commercialized." Chen Mo said.

"Well, I will report your original words. It should be time to send people to contact you. As for when, I am not sure. After the artificial intelligence conference, you can go back to the company and get the reply above. I will go find you again."

"Well, I am looking forward to your good news."

After hanging up the phone, Chen Mocai returned to the boutique, took the bag of the earrings, and left with Lanxi and Wang Hai.

"Today's artificial intelligence conference is over?"

"Yes." Blue Creek should have a voice.

"Book the ticket for this evening, stay in the capital for the time being and do nothing, first return to the company." Chen Mo said.

He knows that the issue of nuclear fusion technology cooperation is not coming.

This news is too important, and it takes time to make decisions. Instead of waiting for a reply here, it is better to go back to Binhai City, etc., in the coastal city, it seems that there is more home advantage.

chapters.title: Chapter 366: : Bottom Line
chapters.body:
Chapter 366: : Bottom Line

"Brother, are you back?"

Chen Mogang returned to the villa in Binhai City, watching Chen Mo in the hall and the robot playing the game with a little surprise.

"Yeah." Chen Mo looked at the hall: "What about small fish?"

"Sister is taking a shower in the room." Xiao Man looked at Chen Mo's two suitcases: "Brother, my gift?"

"So anxious." Chen Mo directly opened the suitcase and took out the gift belonging to Xiao Man: "This is yours."

"Thank you brother-in-law, hey, I went back to the room to unpack the gift, don't bother your two worlds, she is taking a shower, I don't know if you are coming back, Xiaobie won't win the wedding." Xiao Man finished, carrying a few gift bags, Run back to your room.

Chen Mo shook his head and pushed the suitcase back to the room.

"Small man, help me bring the nightdress."

Chen Mogang just entered the room, and the small fishing in the bathroom seemed to hear the movement, shouting. Chen Mo did not speak, took a nightdress from the closet and went into the bathroom.

Seeing the back of the mist in the mist, Chen Mo smiled and sneaked away, grabbing Xiao Yan's waist from behind.

"Ah??" was suddenly attacked, Xiao Yu screamed, just want to struggle to see the familiar palm, immediately became a surprise: "husband."

“Did you miss me?” Chen Mo will take Xiao Yu in his arms.

"I want to think every day." Xiao Yu turned and gently slammed Chen Mo: "Why don't you come back and make a call?"

"Give you a surprise."

"Not counting, it was scared just now, now I have to punish you and help me bathe." Xiao Yu said with some shame.

"Is this a punishment?"

"Of course, don't you accept the penalty?"

"Recognize, you must recognize."

It didn't take long for the bathroom to be beautiful and touching. Half an hour later, Chen Mocai held his face blushing, and the shameless little fish came out of the bathroom and put it back on the bed.

After a while, Xiaoyu recovered some physical strength.

"Bad bad."

"The bad guys give you a gift." Chen Mo changed his clothes, took out large and small bags from the suitcase, and placed them in front of the small fish.

"so much."

Xiao Yu was full of joy, and the body's powerlessness swept the air before he began to look at the gift. Just picked up a bag and slammed it: "This? I am joking, do you really buy it?"

"You like it, I will buy it for you."

Xiao Yu also giggled: "Is there a color? Wolf?"

"You are still a little unconscience and laughed. It was very embarrassing at the time. If I was recognized, I was completely ruined by my famous name. Fortunately, I was wit." Chen Mo said.

"Thank you husband." Xiao Yu kissed Chen Mo's face.

"Don't break your gift, I will blow your hair."

Chen Mo took out the hair dryer from the drawer to blow the hair to Xiao Yu, and Xiao Yu was quietly sitting on the bed and unpacking the gift bag, and his face was happy.

......

Early the next morning, Chen Mo ate the breakfast and Xiao Yu to the company. When he arrived at the office, Zhao Min walked in.

"Muske contacted me yesterday and asked us to authorize the smart code of the little ant to him, and I refused."

"At the artificial intelligence conference, he also let me invest in Tesla, but the valuation is too high, don't let me refuse, he wants to get the smart code authorization of the small ant, I let him find you." Chen Mo said.

"Tesla is now being stared at by the bears, the factory has not yet been fully established, and the company has suffered a serious loss. The valuation of Musk's privatization is a bit high, so it is indeed a bit of a problem."

"How is your harvest in your capital?"

"Yes, it's all done. Someone should come over and talk to us soon. You have to prepare for this." Chen Mo said.

The information on the nuclear fusion simulation experiment has been given to Li Chengzhi, and now they will wait for their reply. Chen Mo feels that it should not be too long.

"Do you really have the technology to succeed?"

"I have been hiding in Building No. 1 for more than a month. I am studying this. The simulation test has been successful. This is why I dare to confidently give the data to Li, the information is the biggest voice, and we can win for us. The biggest benefit," Chen Mo said.

“Is the simulation test successful?” asked Zhao Minzhen.

"Yes, I simulated successfully the afternoon before I went to the capital."

"You are perverted." Zhao Min couldn't help but say: "Is your head a super brain?"

"Amount? This has been discovered by you, it is really a super brain." Chen Mo smiled: "I wondered when to go to participate in the super brain variety show. With my unforgettable skills, take a championship to play It should not be a problem."

Zhao Min rolled his eyes and did not take Chen Mo’s words as one thing: “Can technology be applied?”

“Thinking too much, very early, the success of the simulation test is only the beginning. It is also necessary to build an experimental device to determine its true effect.

From drawing to physical, it is still a relatively long process, and technical problems are discovered during the test. The experimental device successfully determines the net energy output state, and the technology is truly commercially valuable. ”

"No matter what, it needs to be treated with caution now. After all, it is too important. We have to be the best preparation, the worst plan. This technology will definitely seek control. It is impossible to let it fall into the control of private enterprises. No matter how you think, this is inevitable, you have to be mentally prepared." Zhao Min said seriously.

She knows what the energy that is never exhausted means what it is now, and the big reshuffle of the global pattern. It’s not so bad that they can’t afford it.

"This is natural. From the beginning of the study, I have thought about this problem." Chen Mo said.

No matter which country he is, this technology cannot be controlled by the private. At the beginning of the study, he was already psychologically prepared.

This cake can't be swallowed, and his power can't protect its integrity. Cooperation is the most sensible way.

The official is the most powerful umbrella, and he has no reason to leave it.

Money, now only a figure for him, he just wants to make the [Star Ring] soon, it is the task of completing the technology library.

"You are mentally prepared, I am afraid that you will come to the chaos." Zhao Min said: "What is our bottom line for possible cooperation?"

"For the greatest benefit, 51 is impossible, we will keep the bottom line of 49." Chen Mo said: "On this basis, we will seek greater benefits."

"Understood." Zhao Min nodded: "Now your simulation test is successful, then you are more free next time?"

"It’s just that research is not so anxious. In terms of technology optimization, you need to use your brains. And some new materials about building [Star Ring] should be synthesized. But the next step is to talk about cooperation with the above. After talking about cooperation. I have to prepare a wedding with Xiaoyu. It is still relatively easy during this time."

"Then my wedding dress, remember to take time to design for me! After designing, I will give you a reward." Zhao Min smiled.

Chen Mo’s eyelid jumped and jumped: “What reward?”

"My sister's first kiss is for you."

"Do not reward, give it to you for free." Chen Mo Waterfall Khan, helplessly looked at Zhao Min: "You said so, I dare not design for you."

"If you didn't design me before you and Xiaoyu's wedding, my sister's first kiss will be given to you."

"I……"

Chen Mo is crying and laughing.

Now that Zhao Min is getting bolder, he doesn't know whether he is joking or really, it is a headache.

"Well, joking. I will go to prepare for cooperation, and plan ahead." Zhao Min saw Chen Mo's appearance, smiled and got up and left the office.

chapters.title: Chapter 367: : Protector
chapters.body:
Chapter 367: : Protector

In a quaint office, two old people are sitting.

If anyone sees it, it will definitely recognize the identity of the two old people. It is the two oldest people in China's core, and the helm of China's big ship.

At this time, they have a report in their hands, which is the report that Li Chengzhi brought back from the Institute of Plasma Physics. The information that Chen Mo gave to Li Chengzhi had already alerted them.

"What do you think of this?" The head of the tunic suit was calm.

"This kid can do anything, it really makes people feel incredible." The old man next to the glasses, with a literary atmosphere, wise eyes with a hint of praise.

"It's really unbelievable. Maybe he is the giant of our China! In modern times, the era giants have not appeared in our land of China. Now his appearance may be a sign of the rise of China."

The head of the big man showed a peaceful smile.

“What is even more rare is that this child has a national mindset, from artificial intelligence to seismographs, as well as potential medicines. In these few things, this child is very mature and has a vision and courage beyond his age, which is very rare.”

"If you let other people know that you praise him so much, you will be scared." The No. 2 head nodded slightly and agreed with the head of the big head: "This child is really smart. He knows that the cake is too big and needs a shared person. It’s just that Mu Xiu Yu Lin, this wind is too big.”

"Then we will be a guardian, we can't let the pillars be destroyed. I want to see if he is the builder of China. The old man, this thing is handed over to you."

......

Chen Mo did not know that he had been alarmed to the highest level. Even if you know, it won't be unexpected, because nuclear fusion technology is too shocking.

However, when Chen Mo focused on research, a long-lost old friend also found it.

Not an official person, but Alexander.

Not long after the wedding day, in order to find a better jewelry for Xiao Yu as a marriage, he found Alexander to help.

There was no news, I didn’t expect to come over suddenly, and I took two people.

An old man with white curly hair, with a long white beard and gold glasses with a successful person. The other is a middle-aged man with a hooked nose, blue eyes, and a typical white skin in the West.

"Long time no see, Mr. Alexander." Chen Mo saw Alexander and walked up quickly.

"Long time no see." Alexander said with a smile, turned to the old man with white curly hair and said: "The two are my friends, this is Mr. Richard, a low-key gem collector, art investor."

"Hello, Mr. Richard," Chen Mo said with a sly English, and smiled politely.

"Hello, Mr. Chen." Richard did not see, carefully looked at Chen Mo. This young man has achievements that are not matched with his age, and he is very calm and admirable.

"This is Paul, also a collector, one of the shareholders behind the Duke Group." Alexander pointed to the eagle hook nose middle-aged man introduced.

"It's nice to meet you, Mr. Paul,"

"Me too, Mr. Chen."

After the guest set, several people were officially seated.

"These two are the friends I told you last time. Mr. Richard has the 'Angel's Eye' in his hand. Mr. Paul's collection of 'Tear of the Mermaid', I took a lot of effort to convince the two. I heard that if you need to get married, you will endure love. They come here and want to know you about this young legend."

"Then I thank you both first." Chen Mo smiled.

"I will open your eyes to you first." Eagle hook nose Paul's assistant waved his hand, took the safe in his hand and put it on the coffee table.

A diamond necklace slightly larger than the pigeon egg is quietly lying in the middle of the box. It is pear-shaped, pure sea blue, transparent and flawless. It shines under the light of the office. Every cut surface is full of skill, like the tears of mermaid.

If you let a woman see it, this diamond is enough to make them crazy.

"This is the tears of mermaid. A diamond miner found in the abandoned diamond mine, I bought it and processed it. The original stone weighs 78.83 carats and is processed into the current 38.85 carats.

The perfect sea blue, it is a masterpiece of God, so I call it ‘the tears of the mermaid.’ I never took it out in public, and only Alexander knew that I didn’t expect him to betray me. I forgive him for seeing him give me a good drink. ”

Several people on the field laughed and knew that he was joking.

"I heard that Mr. Chen wants to get married and needs this. I even make a friend with Mr. Chen and sell it to Mr. Chen. Let others appreciate its perfection." Eagle Hooker Paul said with some reluctance.

"Thank you." Hearing the translation of the robot, Chen Mo nodded with a smile.

"If the price is $160 million, it should not be expensive." Paul looked at Chen Mo.

Alexander gave Chen Mo a positive hint that the diamond was taken out of the auction and it was absolutely possible to shoot the price. Although it is smaller than the ‘Hope of Hope’, which is known as the Heart of the Sea, it is definitely the rare and rare diamond.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded. He doesn't know much about this, but he believes that Alexander will not lie to him. After all, the two have a company with such a big deal. He is still alive.

"Mr. Chen is really refreshing, your fiancee is really lucky." Paul sees Chen Mo without hesitation, and is a little surprised, this price, eyes are not stunned, most people will not have this kind of courage.

"Thank you." Chen Mo smiled: "Your account is given to me, I will remit the money to you now."

"Ok."

Eagle hook nose Paul was infected by Chen Mo, and he readily told Chen Mo.

After the deal was reached, Chen Mocai looked to Richard.

"Next to me."

Richard admired the ‘the tears of the mermaid. As a gem collector, the opportunity to see such a perfect diamond is rare, and he has opened his eyes. After the two transactions were completed, he also asked his assistant to put the safe on the coffee table.

Two nail-sized blood-red diamonds appear in the field of view of several people, the same size, the same cut, as if they were twins. The narrow olive shape, like the eyes of an angel, is clear of blood red, bright and not demon. The smashing under the light can't help but be attracted to it.

Even the well-informed Paul couldn’t help but admire.

"Perfect, perfect, I have the urge to steal."

A few people are smiling in good faith.

"'Angel's Eye', the rough stone I bought from a special channel, the original stone is two long and narrow twin stones, which are joined together at the time of mining and weigh 38 carats. In order to maintain the maximum weight, the two stones are processed into olives. shape.

The 68 cuts, each weighing 8.62 carats, are perfectly identical, which is the largest red diamond known in the world and is two. It’s just that I didn’t show it to the outside world. There are no more than five people who know it. There is no doubt that I was betrayed by Alexander. ”

Alexander next to him smiled helplessly and did not speak.

"I heard that Mr. Chen is eager to use it for marriage. In the words of your Chinese, it is ‘the beauty of adults’, and the price should be worth $70 million.”

Chen Mo did not hesitate to buy two red diamonds.

"The two are coming to our company for the first time. I will take you to visit." After the transaction was completed, Chen Mo led several people to leave the office and visit the company.

chapters.title: Chapter 368: :Cooperation! (Third More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 368: :Cooperation! (Third More)

"Richard and Paul are collectors. Why did Alexander bring them to you?" After receiving a few people and returning to the company from the top club, Zhao Min asked questions.

"Sell something for me, and also make a friend by the way." Chen Mo said.

“Is the weather right today? When are you interested in the collection?” Zhao Min was even more surprised.

She never heard that Chen Mo likes collectibles.

This crazy science student has always been interested in high-tech, even his own house, is the future of science and technology, she has never seen any famous paintings, strange robots, but a lot.

"I didn't seem to say that I am not interested in this?" Chen Mo smiled.

"What did you buy this time? I want to see what it is that will make you a pure science student."

"It didn't take long for the wedding. I talked with the official about this cooperation. I have to prepare for the wedding, so I bought a wedding jewelry jewellery for Xiaoyu. Just the Roche family is the shareholder of De Beers. They have people. I just found Alexander."

Chen Mo went to the safe and took out a few exquisite big boxes and put them on the coffee table.

Zhao Min picked up the first box and opened his eyes and jumped. They are all white diamonds of the size of a nail, and there is an oval diamond in the middle of the egg size. There is nothing unusual, but there are too many, which is dense, at least dozens.

"Why do you buy so many loose diamonds? Rings, necklaces, earrings, don't use so much." Zhao Min couldn't help but laugh: "In the eyes of your science students, is diamond not a carbon element?"

“Hey?” Chen Mo said without a word, shook his head and smiled: “These loose diamonds are for the small fishing bracelet.”

"So many diamonds get a bracelet?"

"Yes indeed."

"Perverts, **** local tyrants, unscrupulous local tyrants, really poor limits my imagination, you should be pulled out to fight." Zhao Min muttered.

"You seem to be a little rich woman, and less say that there are billions of net worth."

"Not as terrible as you are."

Zhao was eager to open another box and saw two red diamonds lying quietly on top, and couldn't help but breathe.

She was the first to see such a big red diamond, and there are two. The value of a red diamond here is more than the value of dozens of white diamonds.

The olive-shaped red diamond, bright and not demon, like the eyes of the phoenix, perfect and noble, fully attracts Zhao Min's gaze. If it is not enough, she can't wait to take these two diamonds for themselves.

"This big red diamond, is this used to get a ring or a necklace?" Zhao Min asked enviously.

"It's called the eye of an angel. I bought it for Xiao Yu to make a pair of earrings." Chen Mo said.

When I heard Chen Mo’s words, Zhao Min was not calm: “You are a dead local tyrant, such a good diamond, what do you use as a earring? What about the necklace?”

"Here." Chen Mo picked up another box and opened it: "This is the tears of mermaid."

Wow……

The moment I saw the ‘the tears of the mermaid’ necklace, Zhao Min screamed.

This sea-blue diamond, which is slightly larger than the pigeon egg, is pure and flawless. It is definitely close to 40 carats. This blue diamond is unique. The pure and translucent sea blue is definitely the highest level.

The only thing that can surpass the tears of this mermaid is that only the legend will bring the name of the doom ‘Hope.’

Women are naturally resistant to this sparkling diamond, and Zhao Min, the president of the marching ant group, is no exception. In front of Chen Mo, she did not have to hide her feelings, and the small temperament of the exclusive woman was released.

She was the first to see such a perfect diamond, and she saw three at a time, each of which was worth a lot.

"They are actually willing to sell such a perfect diamond to you?" Zhao Min exclaimed, carefully picking up the tears of the mermaid necklace, I wish I could wear it.

"The money is a bastard, it can do a lot of things." Chen Mo laughed.

"How much is this ‘the tears of the mermaid?’

"$160 million."

"Perverted, unscrupulous local tyrants, ruined family, you can't be overwhelmed by this kind of person. It's just that the price seems to be expensive."

"It doesn't matter. After all, he is unwilling to take it. I am also a favorite. It is acceptable for one or two million. After my hand is collected, it will appreciate." Chen Mo said.

The intelligence information obtained from the CIA last time sold nearly 200 million US dollars. He can still accept this money.

Zhao Min is speechless. If this diamond is exposed by Chen Mo's wedding, I am afraid it is really like Chen Mo's appreciation. After all, this is a rare gem.

After the excitement, Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo with a grudge: "My sister suddenly wants to marry you."

"I have a small fishing."

"Well, the guy who has no conscience. The same is your woman, how is the difference in treatment so much?" Zhao Min reluctantly put down the tears of the mermaid in his hand, his eyes can not cover the envy.

"Uh??"

Chen Moman’s brain is black and he feels wrong.

......

In the next two days, Chen Mo hid in the laboratory, simulated several fusion experiments, and continuously improved the detailed design of the [Star Ring] device.

Occasionally, there is time to prepare new materials for the synthesis of the [Star Ring] device.

[Star Ring] The device is a bit complicated, and now it is ready in advance, and it can save a lot of time. However, special metals and materials require specific channels, and the materials are not coming. He is also a good woman who can't be without rice. He can only synthesize new materials with raw materials.

However, when Chen Mo focused on research, Li Chengzhi’s phone was also called.

"Brother, is there news?"

"Yes." The phone made a simple voice from Li Chengzhi: "I just received the news, and I promised to cooperate. I will go with your delegation tomorrow and talk about the details of your company's cooperation. You have to prepare."

"Well, I am waiting for you at the company tomorrow."

Hanging up Li Chengzhi’s phone, Chen Mo contacted Zhao Min to come to the lab. The delegation above will come over tomorrow, they must prepare.

As long as the cooperation is negotiated, then the next thing to build a star ring device is much easier. The research tasks of nuclear fusion technology can also be completed quickly.

“What?” Zhao Min went into the lab and asked.

"Just brother Li contacted me about the nuclear fusion technology research, there is a reply." Chen Mo poured a cup of tea and handed it to Zhao Min.

"What is the situation?" Zhao Min immediately became serious.

"Cooperation!"

Upon hearing this answer, Zhao Min’s heart was loose.

Just two words, it is the best answer. Chen Mo wants to study the most sensitive areas at present, and if she can, she will never touch this field.

For ordinary people, it is a restricted area. If you are not careful, you will never be able to recover. Now it is the best answer to be willing to talk about cooperation, rather than directly letting them hand over the technology prohibition study.

"How is your preparation work over there?" Chen Mo asked.

"Wait." Zhao Min took out a u disk and opened a copy of the information and handed it to Chen Mo: "This is the condition I am going to cooperate in these days. You see, what needs to be modified."

Chen Mo picked up the information and turned and nodded. In some conditions, Zhao Min considered him more carefully than he expected.

Not bad.

"I don't use it now. When we show these conditions, they will definitely not agree. What needs to be modified, after the negotiation, we will make changes and strive for the best interests."

"How much success rate do you say this cooperation?"

"Who can say it right? Since we are willing to cooperate with us in this field, there is hope." Chen Mo shrugged and said, after all, the situation is special, no one can say.

“If you didn’t talk about it?” Zhao Min asked: “To be the worst plan.”

"I didn't talk about it again. Anyway, the project didn't start. Anyway, there should be no big problems, controlled nuclear fusion technology, and our chips are big enough."

chapters.title: Chapter 369: : Both Conditions
chapters.body:
Chapter 369: : Both Conditions

In the car, Xiao Zhengyi is listening to Li Chengzhi's understanding of Chen Mo and others. Among all the entourages, Li Chengzhi and the marching ant company have the most contact, which is undoubtedly the most well-understood person.

As a representative of the ants company talks, he can be said to be very rare. Because he knows what is the content of the cooperation with the marching ants.

Collaborative research on controlled nuclear fusion technology.

This epoch-making technology, I did not expect the marching ant company to dare to study, but also cooperate with the official. He was shocked when he heard the content of the cooperation.

As a veteran of the negotiations, he was appointed as the head of the delegation.

In addition to Li Chengzhi, there are experts from the Plasma Research Institute. Controlled nuclear fusion technology is the specialty of these experts, so bring it over and use it when necessary.

Shopping malls such as battlefields, conference round tables are battlefields without knives, which are related to the distribution of benefits. So knowing yourself and your opponent's information is very important. Before he came, he had carefully studied the information of Zhao Min and Chen Mo.

A good understanding of the opponent's personality hobbies and psychology helps to gain the upper hand in the confrontation. Although it is cooperation, we must also maximize the benefits of cooperation.

The team entered the headquarters of the marching ant company.

Xiao Zheng just got off the bus and saw Zhao Min coming over.

The president of the marching ant company, it is hard to imagine that the world's most advanced technology oligarchs are rising in the hands of a young woman.

Although Chen Mo's research ability is the key to supporting the army ant company, Zhao Min is the most important factor in the growth of the army ant company.

In the era of capital solidification, the rise of any startup is inevitably targeted by the giants.

Under the pressure of the giants, startups will choose to compromise, finance, step by step, and eventually be swallowed up by acquisition. But the marching ants broke this imprisonment and became the giant of the unicorn in the shortest possible time.

In addition to the horrific scientific research strength, the company's crazy expansion is also crucial.

The marching ant company initially focused on online sales, exposing enough gimmicks to avoid the period of financial difficulties. The expansion of the mid-term horror, when many giants did not respond, grew up to be their behemoths.

When the giants reacted, it was impossible to curb the growth of marching ants. Therefore, the marching ant company is now in full control of Chen Mo’s hands.

If the marching ant group chooses to go public, Chen Mo's wealth will create a new record for mankind.

Behind everything, Zhao Min is the main pusher. This young and over-extended woman created an era oligarch.

"President Zhao, hello." Xiao Zheng and Zhao Min shook hands.

"Xiao, hello." Zhao Min smiled and responded.

Both of them are looking at each other and want to get some information they want from the other words and deeds. A collision of eyes, both sides know that this is a difficult opponent.

"What about Mr. Chen?" Xiao Zheng asked.

"The boss's research is at a critical moment, it is impossible to separate, and all matters of negotiation, he let me take full responsibility." Zhao Min smiled.

“When I first came to your company, can I take the tour first?” Xiao Zheng asked.

He is limited to the literal and Li Chengzhi's understanding of the marching ant company, and has not really seen it. Through this visit, I can get close to the culture of the marching ant company, and it is very necessary to understand Zhao Min's opponent.

"is my pleasure."

Zhao Min nodded gently and took the delegation to the company's sightseeing car.

Xiao Zhengyi may have information about her, but she knows nothing about Xiao Zheng. From the information level, she certainly has some shortcomings. When Xiao Zheng wants to know her, she also needs to seize the opportunity to understand this opponent.

They all have their own minds, and both of them will take the initiative to ask some questions and talk like old friends. The atmosphere and harmony, only two people know that the invisible game has officially begun.

Half an hour later, a group of talents visited and began formal negotiations.

The marching ant company, led by Zhao Min, Li Lingfeng, Li Huai, Zhu Li and Xiao Yu, and other key figures in the decision-making high level were present.

Everyone's face is more serious than ever before, especially Li Lingfeng. They also know about the previous two days that the boss is conducting research on nuclear fusion technology.

When I heard the news, several people were scared. Nuclear fusion technology, this technology, the boss actually dared to develop, and achieved some results, ready to cooperate with the official. At the same time, I was even more impressed by the god-like boss.

This negotiation is related to the interests of the next cooperation, they have to pay special attention.

On the official side, headed by Xiao Zhengyi, and Li Chengzhi, Li Jian of the Institute of Plasma Physics and other negotiating experts and legal experts are sitting in danger.

Everyone's face is very dignified. They all know that this is the cooperation of research on controlled nuclear fusion technology. The importance is self-evident. It is said that all of them must be treated with enthusiasm and concern for official interests.

"Xiao, you said first, or do we say it first?" Zhao Min asked.

"Zhao always said first." Xiao Zheng said with a smile.

"Well, I will first say my conditions. When technology is developed, we will invest 30 billion yuan to establish a joint venture company, which will account for 60% of the company's shares. The company is managed by us. The necessary technical positions are supplemented by the personnel you provide."

Xiao Zheng immediately shook his head.

“President Zhao, although the future of technology research and development, your company may contribute. But the amount of output is still unknown, the specific research and development funding is unknown. Your company invested 40 billion in the early stage, and in the next study, provide 70% of research and development funds, you can get 15% of the joint venture company, this is our condition."

Zhao Min was unmoved and seemed to have expected this kind of thing.

"Basic technical information is provided by us. The future research and development is definitely based on our boss. It can be said that the main technologies are almost all provided by us. You are only assisting research. 60% of shares and management rights, this is a must As a condition, we can provide 60% of research and development funds."

The two sides adhere to their own conditions and do not give in to each other. In addition to Zhao Min and Xiao Zhengyi, the rest of the audience are expressionless, carefully looking at the cooperation terms handed over by the other party, hoping to find the conditions favorable to them, and first reach cooperation on favorable conditions. . However, it is clear that the conditions of both sides are beyond their psychological bottom line and the situation is also deadlocked.

After an hour of negotiations, neither side achieved any results, and the first negotiation did not end.

"How's it going?"

Zhao Mingang entered the laboratory, and Chen Mo, who was looking at the holographic projection, turned his head and looked at it, continuing to optimize the design of the device.

"This is different from the general business cooperation. Both sides are tempted, and they can't rush. They can't break their own bottom line. The bottom line will be passive. Now, see who is more patient. In the next few days, the results will not be great. Zhao Min said.

Chen Mo nodded slightly.

This is the cooperation of controlled nuclear fusion. If cooperation is reached within a short day, then there is a problem.

“What's the harvest?”

Zhao Min shook his head: "No, the conditions of the other party are beyond our expectations. Our conditions should also exceed their expectations. On the positive side, we are definitely in a weak position. But technology is in our hands, this is our advantage, as long as With enough patience, you will get the ideal harvest."

chapters.title: Chapter 370: : We Are Businessmen
chapters.body:
Chapter 370: : We Are Businessmen

On the second day, the two sides held two talks in the morning and afternoon. Zhao Min was still stubbornly reluctant to regress and insisted on the initial conditions. Xiao Zheng also adhered to the original conditions and there was no progress in cooperation.

On the third day, the cooperation talks continued, but the location of the discussion was no longer the headquarters of the marching ant company, but was changed into the office meeting room of the coastal city government. The two sides once again held a confrontation at the conference table, insisting that their conditions did not regress, and the scene of the negotiations was once in a stalemate.

Both sides are trying to find out the other side's bottom line.

On the fourth day, the negotiations were still deadlocked. Both sides knew that whoever regressed first means who lost the initiative in this cooperation.

Both sides have enough patience. Although the scene is deadlocked, at the crucial moment, Zhao Min and Xiao Zheng will alleviate the atmosphere and have no interest in the table. They all understand that cooperation must be carried out, but they must obtain the highest income from their own.

The hotel where the hotel stayed, the official delegation gathered in a conference room, everyone is studying the results of today's conference table, hoping to find the bottom line of the marching ant company.

Xiao Zheng and members of the delegation are frowning.

No one on both sides took the initiative to break the deadlock, and they did not know the bottom of the marching ant company.

The easiest Li Chengzhi, he is a matchmaker. Although he is a member of the delegation, he does not ask him about the cooperation. He only helps Xiao Zheng and others to understand the army ant company, so he does not have to worry too much about the negotiation.

Li Jian is more anxious, he is a researcher. Since getting the information, their team is working hard to study those formulas.

Without theoretical support, they only know one result, and the process in the middle is blank. That feeling, like the itching of the boots, can't go up.

"Xiao headmaster, this way, when will you talk about it?" Li Jian frowned.

"Now is just the beginning, the conditions now, we can't promise. The joint venture company must be controlled by us. This is the minimum bottom line. They know this, so they will bite and get more benefits. Controlling fusion is clearer than me. This is not a general technique, not an achievement, and it requires patience." Xiao Zheng said.

From the first day, he knew that Zhao Min was difficult, and he did not expect it to be more difficult than he thought. The ability to develop a marching ant company into today's situation is unquestionable.

"Now I have to start the second half." Xiao Zheng finished, led the people to leave the meeting room.

On the other hand, Zhao Min and the team members are also frowning about the current situation. Because of the few days of negotiations, both sides are killing temptations, and there is not much progress in real terms. If you go on like this, you can't finish it in a month.

"President, it is not a way to consume this." Julie said.

"The more this time, the more patience, this is a game. In principle, we are on the weak side. Once we loosen our mouth, we will be more passive. We have time consumption. Then we will follow the original arrangement. The field is starting soon, let's go."

Zhao Min looked at the time and led the crowd to the venue for discussion.

She doesn't know what the official bottom line is, but she will definitely negotiate according to her bottom line. She will pretend to die before she reaches the expected return.

Entering the meeting place, Zhao Min and Xiao Zheng habitually shook hands and went to the conference table to sit.

"President Zhao, still, the conditions are too high." Xiao Zheng took the lead to break the atmosphere on the court.

"Technology is mainly our boss's research and development, research and development funds, we also promised to contribute 60%, take 60% share, it seems that there is no problem. Our money is not from the wind, the capital is so high, naturally want to earn back, we run the company, It is also reasonable." Zhao Min calmly opened.

“Mr. Chen Mo’s research and development is still unknown, but we will also send teams to research and develop. And middle-level technical talents, materials, channel resources, equipment, etc. These are intangible inputs, and the most important security issues are also ours. Responsible. 15% to you, already very high." Xiao Zheng said.

"That is to go back to the original point." Zhao Min said with no expression.

The scene is once again in a stalemate.

"President Zhao, this time everyone's purpose is to cooperate?"

"Yes, otherwise we will not sit here." Zhao Min nodded.

"In this case, I also express my sincerity. The joint venture company must be a state-owned enterprise. The sensitivity and importance of this technology is self-evident. Your conditions are not likely to be reached next year." Xiao Zheng said firmly. .

Seeing that Xiao Zheng has a loose mouth, Zhao Min thought about it. She knows that this is a bottom line that was anticipated before the start, so it is not unexpected.

"You and I both understand people, and it doesn't make sense to stay dead. Since Xiao represents the clear, I don't insist, then we account for 49.99%."

Xiao Zheng has no choice but to shake his head: "Up to 20%."

"This is definitely not going to work. We can make one step, 49.98%. It doesn't make sense to stay deadlocked. We have already given in."

"..."

Concession 0.01%, which is a concession? Xiao Zheng is crying and laughing.

Initially breaking the deadlock, a new round of business (draw) talks (skin) started again, and the battle on the corner of the squad did not give in.

In the next two days of negotiations, the progress has been smooth, and the confrontation between the two sides has also entered a stage of white-hot.

"Our company takes 49% of the shares, and invested 30 billion yuan as the initial fund in the early stage, and then bears 60% of the funds. The technology of research and development is owned by both parties. This is the final bottom line. If you don't agree, the cooperation will not continue. I No more concessions, you can continue to waste time."

Zhao Min threw the final bottom line and his attitude was tough.

Xiao Zheng’s finger tapped his left arm and looked at Zhao Min.

During the two days of negotiations, the marching ant company bite 49% of the share does not relax, look at Zhao Min's attitude, and then talk about it will not regress, obviously the bottom line.

And the bottom line he got is also more than half of the share. Because of the sensitivity of the technology, the joint venture must be absolutely controlled, 51% obviously achieve the expected results, and Zhao Min certainly knows this.

"Yes." Xiao Zheng nodded.

After a few days of negotiations, the first difficult condition was reached, and the two sides finally finally breathed a sigh of relief.

“The next step is the management of the company. We must participate in the management of the company. 40% of the top decision-makers are appointed by us. The position of the chairman, you can find someone to serve as the general manager, and we hire someone to serve. ""

"This can't be done." Xiao Zheng said: "The company is special and must be managed by us."

"We have to pay for it, and our boss is studying technology. Now the management right still wants to grab it? There is no such good thing." Zhao Min firmly shook his head.

"We can provide some management positions, and your people will serve." Xiao Zheng said.

"What I want is the decision-making level."

"President Zhao, you know, this is a special company."

"I know special, but also make concessions. If it is not special, we have long studied it ourselves, rather than choosing to cooperate with the official. Our company has to invest tens of billions and provide technology.

Now it is our cooperation with both parties. It is a PPP model, not a registered country. There are enterprises. The public sector, the technical department, what you said, has already yielded. But before the deadline expires, the company's operations must be decided by us. The position of the general manager, we hire people to serve, this is the bottom line, what else do you want? ”

"President Zhao, this company is not suitable for your business."

"Our interests must be protected. The company's money is not blown by the wind, there is no financial subsidy. We invest money to make money. The BooT model is not satisfied? Also. We change the way to adopt the Boo model? Our company Can bear all the technology research and development costs, all construction facilities, owned by our company forever, you only have the supervision." Zhao Min said with no expression.

"This is impossible."

"That cooperation can't continue, our interests can't be guaranteed. We are businessmen, the purpose is to make money, not to do charity. This is restricted by your various conditions, the marching ants company can't hold back, this technology does not need to cooperate research. ”

chapters.title: Chapter 371: : This Is A Game
chapters.body:
Chapter 371: : This Is A Game

In the hotel's room, Xiao Zheng stood in front of the window with a cup of water, overlooking the bustling traffic, and the eyebrows were twisted into a shackle.

Now that the negotiation is going to the final step, it will be completed, and I did not expect to be stuck at the last pass. The attitude of the marching ant company is very clear. Looking at Zhao Min’s appearance, there seems to be no room for negotiation.

If you talk about it this way, you don't know when it will be done.

Thinking for a long time, Xiao Zheng picked up the phone and dialed a number. This incident is indeed a little troublesome. He can’t be arrogant on his side. He must reflect it above and determine what attitude is above.

The phone is connected, it is a good middle-aged male voice: "What is it? Director Xiao. Is the cooperation completed?"

"Not yet, the conditions of the marching ant company have been confirmed to be similar, but there is still a final step. The marching ant company has a firm management attitude to the company."

The phone was silent and seemed to be thinking.

For a while, the voice on the other end of the phone came: "This matter needs research and research. You should first find a way to see if you can let them loose."

"Ok."

Xiao Zheng promised to hang up and hang up.

In the next few days, Xiao Zhengyi was trying to find Zhao Min’s mouth to take control of the company. But he tried his best and Zhao Min was still unmoved.

This is the final question, and it is also a problem that cannot be avoided. In such a company, management is of the utmost importance and both parties are reluctant to let go.

......

In the laboratory of Building 1, Zhao Mingang came in and saw Chen Mo focusing on the experiment.

The holographic projection [Star Ring] device in the middle of the lab hall is running, and Zhao Min can see the purple-red ring ‘flame’ rotating at high speed in the middle, which looks beautiful.

“How is the progress?” Chen Mo turned to look at Zhao Min.

"It is still the last one. According to the cooperation model of PPP, the right to operate should be ours, but they also want to run the company. In this case, I will never let go."

Zhao Min handed over the information on the conditions already reached by both parties to Chen Mo.

"Some words I can't say at the negotiating table. As a company and an official, we have been weak in cooperating with us. Now even these basic conditions have to limit us. It is a bit unsatisfied. If they let them operate and lose money for years, we invest. All the money must be squandered, and the final result is still theirs.

It’s not that I don’t trust them, but that two barrels of oil can report losses, so it’s hard to worry about them. Moreover, this is PPP, not a country. There are enterprises. We are responsible for the company's operation and management, and it is reasonable, so the company's management rights must be obtained. ”

Chen Mo nodded and expressed understanding. Although he and the official cooperation, just to study nuclear fusion technology, but it is impossible to waste money, it is also necessary to make money.

With tens of billions of investment, and also providing nuclear fusion technology, this right is not excessive.

"If they don't agree, how are you going to deal with it?" Chen Mo asked.

"Drag, drag on indefinitely, they don't let go, I will never let one step."

“How many years does the company transfer?”

"The two sides talked for 60 years. When they handed over, they needed to pay a transfer fee."

"It is not a way to drag on. I will talk about my views." Chen Mosi said for a while: "The company's income must be guaranteed. The management right you said is a must. In a compromise, we have 30 years. After 30 years of operation, all costs and benefits should be recovered. The company’s management rights are given to them, and we will act as shareholders and enjoy dividends for the remaining 30 years.”

“Is it too short for thirty years?”

"It's not short. We have only been creating marching ants for three years. After 30 years, it is enough to happen. At that time, maybe money is not so important to us. Moreover, I only participate in the research on the fusion reaction of the joint venture company. I will not participate in the study," Chen Mo said.

Chen Mo opened, Zhao Min did not say much, promised to come down.

On the other side, Xiao Zheng is also anxious. This cooperation has been talked for for half a month. It is still stuck in the last step. I don’t know. I thought they were spending money to eat and drink, and they didn’t want to work.

However, the marching ant company did not loosen the mouth, and there was no clear reply on it. He was sandwiched in the middle. Negotiations on business cooperation between countries may be longer than they are now, but the negotiations are tiring.

Suddenly, the ringing of the mobile phone interrupted his thoughts. After the connection, he heard a familiar voice: "The heads responded, giving them up to 40 years of management rights."

"Good." Xiao Zheng sighed with relief. There is this bottom line, and there is some confidence in the negotiations.

The new round of negotiations was reopened. The place of this choice was the conference room of the marching ant company.

Every time I entered the marching ant company, the delegation’s people praised it once. The technology here is a technology company in science fiction movies, full of the future.

The marching ant company negotiated with them for so long and was emboldened.

After the two people sat down, the invisible atmosphere was much easier. They have all taken the bottom line, then the next situation should not be deadlocked.

"President Zhao, if you drag on, it is not a solution, and you are not willing to make concessions. It is better for us to choose a compromise." Xiao Zheng took the lead in breaking the atmosphere.

"Speaking to Xiao, please say." Zhao Min said with no expression.

"Give you fifteen years of management rights, and it is suitable for each other." Xiao Zhengyi stroked his fingers.

Zhao Min did not expect that Xiao Zhengyi would come forward and be happy. "The fifteen years is too short, and the technology may not be successfully applied. We have to be fifty years."

“President Zhao, this technology is about national strategy. You know, in general, this kind of company belongs to state-owned enterprises.”

"Then you study technology yourself." Zhao Min is not willing to fight back.

The next Li Jian heard that Zhao Min’s words were speechless. For the world, their research progress has already taken the lead in the world. After seeing Chen Mo's data, they found that Chen Mo's progress is better than them.

Xiao Zheng did not expect Zhao Min to be so direct. If they could study it, they would come out early in the morning and certainly would not cooperate with marching ants. However, he is also a veteran and hastened to shift the topic.

“The company is managed by us, it is more beneficial to the coordination of all parties, and development can be faster. It has been a big concession for fifteen years.”

"The parties coordinate, there are directors appointed by you, and hiring them is not a free meal. This is not the reason. We will be fifty years old."

"Twenty years, we will take another step."

"Give the Institute of Plasma Research Institute 20 years of research technology to see if it can come out."

The stalemate opened again, and the two men argued in the conference room, like a lion fighting for the territory, you come and go, blushing.

"At least forty years."

"Up to thirty years."

"Give you a plasma for 30 years and see if you can study it."

"You can't change words?"

"No."

“It’s reasonable to say that it’s been a lot in 30 years.”

"I still tell me the truth? We have a lot of research and development funds, and the technology will be our boss's problem. What do you tell me about what we didn't talk about?"

"..."

About half an hour later, the two men stopped arguing and quietly drank tea.

This is a game. The more you end up, the calmer you will be. You can't let the other side see that this is your bottom line.

The two stopped and the atmosphere between the two sides was much easier. After controversy, the conditions given by the other party have already reached their basic requirements, and they can continue to fight for the other side to make a concession.

chapters.title: Chapter 372: :Result
chapters.body:
Chapter 372: :Result

After a slight rest of the two, the smoke in the second half reappeared. Both of them looked at each other, and they looked calm, not letting the other person notice their strangeness, and let the other party know that the other party's conditions are in line with their bottom line.

The two sides do not retreat from each other and know each other. Although they have reached the initial target, they must fight for greater gains.

As time goes by, the conditions for negotiations between the two sides are getting closer and closer.

"35 years, up to 35 years." Xiao Zheng's face is a bit ugly.

"37 years." Zhao Min's eyes popped up and stared at Xiao Zhengyi: "37 years is the bottom line, you can continue to fight, I will never bargain."

"President Zhao, we will not back in 35 years."

"Then I also said that in 37 years, I will not retreat. You must continue to insist, then we will calm down and calm down each other. After you calm down, we will continue to talk. On this issue, I can't go back. Today is over. Maybe I will change my mind tomorrow, it will take 40 years."

Zhao Min got up and wanted to leave.

Xiao Zheng quickly stopped: "Wait, President Zhao, this is the last step, not as good as ours, 36 years."

"No." Zhao Min said without hesitation.

Zhao Min has already noticed that Xiao Zheng is no longer as tough as the beginning. There is an invisible looseness in the obvious tone. She knows that the bottom line of Xiao Zheng has already appeared, so she is very determined.

"Yes, 37 years." Xiao Zheng promised to come down. The above gives him the bottom line for up to 40 years. He can argue for this. In his opinion, nuclear fusion technology is not so mature. It doesn't matter if it is more than a year or two. He has already completed the task.

Zhao Min’s heart is loose, Chen Mo gave her 30 years of conditions, and she competed for 7 years, which is also a good harvest.

"Next talk about other conditions."

After reaching the most basic conditions for cooperation, the atmosphere of the next negotiation was not so tense. After five hours, the two parties finalized the conditions for cooperation.

At the end of the day, everyone was tired. The painstaking cooperation negotiations finally ended, and the members of the negotiations were relieved.

"The results are coming out."

Zhao Min entered the laboratory and handed it to Chen Mo with a document. The documents were the terms of the cooperation between the two parties. Now only need to obtain the permission of Chen Mo, the two parties can sign the contract of the project.

"With 37 years of management rights, in 37 years, 70% of the company's earnings will be returned to us. After the expiration, the management rights will be transferred to them, and we will pay dividends according to the shares. According to the agreement, in the technology research and development stage, we invested 30 billion yuan in the early stage, and then bear 60% of research and development funds until the commercial application of fusion technology is successful.

The Plasma Institute will send teams to assist in technology development, and nuclear fusion technology will be owned by both parties. Facilities, equipment, laboratory sites, raw materials, security facilities, etc., all provided by official channels. ”

“They are willing to let 70% of the gains?” Chen Mo was slightly surprised.

“The investment in the early stage of the project needs to be measured. Before the fusion technology is successfully commercialized, it must be continuously invested. They already have the ‘Science Island’ project in Huizhou.

So let us take 60% of research and development funds, you also undertake the heavy responsibility of major technology research and development, and they invest 40% of research and development funds. Provide technicians, equipment, raw materials, venues and security.

Perhaps they think that in the future, technology may not be commercialized. So I took the opportunity to get this benefit, and they agreed to this condition. Zhao Min said.

In the negotiation process, I encountered many difficulties.

Because nuclear energy technology is too special, ordinary companies cannot study it at all. Therefore, there are many restrictions in the negotiation process. After a long period of negotiations, it is very good to be able to achieve this.

If it weren't for Chen Mo's technology, the official would not cooperate with them at all.

Although the joint ventures of both parties are PPP mode, they are different from the general PPP model. The official promised to provide many resources and personnel convenience, is already considered a national shareholding.

“It is expected that nuclear fusion technology will be commercialized within a few years?”

Chen Mo turned to look at the holographic projection model in the middle of the hall. He said: "The current progress is smooth, and the device is constantly optimized. If the official cooperates fully and provides the materials I need, it will be successful as soon as next year."

He developed nuclear fusion technology and made money second.

If he wants to make money, there are countless technologies in the technology library that can cover any field, and he will not be short of money.

The development of controlled nuclear fusion technology is mainly to complete the task of the technology library. Only in this way can we explore the mysterious technology library faster.

There are too many unknowns in science and technology libraries, and controlled nuclear fusion is only a technology-level apprenticeship.

In the eyes of the world, controlled nuclear fusion technology may be very precious, but in his eyes, it is not so precious.

On the bookshelf of the Science and Technology Library, Chen Mo looked at the technology of the excessive sub-field, as well as the anti-matter field, the field of genetic engineering, and some supernatural fields, which he could not reach.

His goal is to enter the more advanced areas of scientific and technological civilization in areas not currently covered by mankind. His eyes are not on these technologies.

When he heard Chen Mo’s time, Zhao Min’s eyelids jumped.

Chen Mo will be able to commercialize controlled nuclear fusion technology in the next decade, and their company will be able to live in the money pile.

The huge profits in the energy field make the world capital crazy, so there will be an endless Middle East war.

Now Chen Mo said that the application of controlled nuclear fusion power generation will be realized as early as next year. If this is the case, the days when they are lying in the pile of money will be ten years ahead of schedule.

In real time, the wealth of the marching ant company will be enough to make any capitalist jealous.

"How to arrange next?" Chen Mo asked.

"The joint venture company to be established, named Huaxia Nuclear Energy Group Co., Ltd., has a registered capital of 300 billion. After five days of signing ceremony, there will be a press conference, and you need to come out personally." Zhao Min said:

"can."

"Then the next question is the location of the experimental site. You are the chief engineer and person in charge of this project. You said these things."

"Early election. Ink girl, will release the map of the coastal area."

After Chen Mo finished, the map of Binhai City appeared on the huge transparent LCD screen at the rear, including the map of the sea area, all of which were holographic displays.

"Located on this island."

Chen Mo clicked on an island in the map, and the terrain of the island quickly expanded.

Finally, a large holographic projection of a tray appears in the hands of Chen Mo, the shape of the island, the terrain and the vegetation at a glance.

“This island is close to the coastal city and is an undeveloped island. It is big enough to be the experimental base for fusion.”

"Then I will contact them."

"Well, it’s hard work." Chen Mo said: "The matter is not urgent, the contract has not been signed, and it is not bad for these two days."

After Zhao Min left the lab, Chen Mo re-thought his mind on the experiment. The above promised cooperation, and the negotiation progressed smoothly. The next step was the construction of the [Star Ring] device.

chapters.title: Chapter 373: : The World'S Attention
chapters.body:
Chapter 373: : The World'S Attention

Five days passed by, the signing ceremony also arrived as scheduled, He Dong driving the car, looking at the Marina Theatre not far away.

They were notified that there was a signing ceremony for a joint project between the army ant company and the Academy of Sciences. Hearing the name of the marching ant company and the academy, Yang Dong came with his assistant without hesitation.

The marching ant company either has no news or is a big move. This time it is a cooperation with the Academy of Sciences. It is definitely not an ordinary cooperation project.

Need two giants to join forces on the project, their first idea is artificial intelligence.

The signing ceremony was held at the Binhai Theatre. When they arrived near the Grand Theatre, they were intimidated by the security situation outside the stadium. They were surrounded by special police officers and police cars with special police officers on the road were patrolling.

"Dong Ge, what do you say about the cooperation project between the army ants and the academy? This is a big squad." The assistants of the co-pilot were shocked by the strict security situation.

"I don't know, I will know when I get there. It is definitely not a small project."

The car was very good in the open-air parking outside the Grand Theatre. Yang Dong and his assistant took the instrument to the scene.

After a rigorous security check, the two talents entered the venue smoothly.

The field has been filled with reporters and some watching the lively audience, participating in the maintenance of order, as well as the intelligent robots of the marching ant company, many onlookers are taking photos around the robot, very strange.

On the big stage is a huge LCD screen with a popular science video of nuclear fusion technology.

"Dong Ge, this project of cooperation between the army ants company and the Academy of Sciences will not be this nuclear fusion technology?" Helping the big screen with a finger is not sure.

"The marching ant company is no longer willing to touch this? It may be an artificial intelligence project. At the artificial intelligence conference some time ago, the dialogue between Chen Mo and artificial intelligence should be remembered."

"What is the science video that puts this nuclear fusion?"

"Who knows, maybe it is science." Yang Dong is also somewhat uncertain.

The two just got into the seat and sat down. Suddenly, the video on the LCD screen just finished, and a large subtitle appeared on the screen: the signing ceremony of the high temperature plasma research project of the Academy of Sciences and the marching ant group

“What is high temperature plasma research?” asked a person who was unclear.

"Nuclear fusion research."

hiss! !

Oh...

As soon as the subtitles appeared, the people on the field were amazed, especially the reporters on the field.

Big news, absolutely big news.

The study of high temperature plasma is aimed at achieving nuclear fusion. Should the marching ant company develop nuclear fusion technology with the Academy of Sciences?

The information revealed in one sentence is enough to shock.

I did not expect the marching ant company to launch the ‘Artificial Intelligence+’ program, and then come to a high-temperature plasma research project in cooperation with the Chinese Academy of Sciences.

"East brother, the director let us broadcast live."

"Live."

"Now start broadcasting."

Many reporters have received a reply from the live broadcast.

"The following news is inserted. The cooperation project between the Academy of Sciences and the Army Ant Group is held at the Binhai Theatre. According to the reporters on the scene, the project of the Academy of Sciences and the Army Ant Company is the research and development of high temperature plasma..."

"This reporter sent back the latest news from the front line. The Academy of Sciences and the Army Ant Group will jointly develop high-temperature plasma. At present, the signing ceremony of the two companies is about to be held. The following is a picture returned by the reporter from the scene..."

The major news platforms, the first time live broadcast, even some network platforms, open the live broadcast in the first time.

The marching ant company is preparing to enter the field of controlled nuclear fusion technology, which will be the first private enterprise in China to participate in nuclear energy development projects, which is absolutely a historic moment.

On the field, there are many foreign media reporters who also contacted the headquarters at the first time to open a live broadcast mode of global connections.

"The station's correspondent in China sent back the latest news. The marching ant group and the Huaxia Academy of Sciences are preparing to jointly develop nuclear fusion technology. At present, the signing ceremony for both parties is about to begin. The following is a live report from the Huaxia reporter..."

“Huaxia official and marching ant group will jointly develop high temperature plasma technology...”

“The marching ant group wants to develop nuclear fusion technology...”

The reporters invited to this ceremony are all well-known media in the world. The news of such a large nuclear fusion technology directly allows them to open a global live broadcast.

The pictures of the signing ceremony scene are directly spread around the world through various media platforms.

"President, Huaxia sent back news, the marching ant company is preparing to conduct research on high temperature plasma technology with Huaxia official."

At the White House in the United States, a presidential assistant entered the office of the president, holding a live broadcast of his hand in front of the white-skinned president.

"Don't use technical terms, I don't understand. Simple, what is the technology of high temperature plasma technology?"

“High temperature plasma research and development is to achieve controlled nuclear fusion.”

"..."

In addition to the United States, European countries, Russia, island countries, India and other high-level government officials are watching this news.

In just 10 minutes, the scene of the signing ceremony has attracted worldwide attention.

Controlled nuclear fusion technology. This is the technology of human energy transformation, and the new entry is the marching ant group, a miracle company. The head of the marching ant group is Chen Mo, who is known as the new generation of 'time giants'.

From seismographs, robots, to holographic technology, these technologies that should belong to the future are all broken by the army ants, and they are from Chen Mo.

Now the marching ants enter the nuclear fusion and have to pay attention to them. Although they don't think Chen Mo can succeed, there should be no problem in speeding up the research and development.

"I just received the news. Now, at the conference, I am being broadcast live by major media. The foreign news media is also broadcast live in the world." Zhao Min was surprised when he heard the news and turned to tell Chen Mo.

“It’s so fast?” Chen Mo said with amazement.

They did not announce to the reporters at the beginning of the signing ceremony. Because they were worried that the impact was too great, the signing ceremony was crowded by various people. Therefore, the reporters were chosen to come, and the cooperation project was announced after the start.

I just didn't expect it to be a global connection for ten minutes. I have to say that in this information age, the speed of information dissemination is terrible.

"The global attention, will this be too high-profile?" Chen Mo asked.

"Paper can't hold fire. We are working with the Academy of Sciences to study such a large project of nuclear fusion. If you want to know, you will know that it is not necessary to hide it. Moreover, the signing ceremony was held by the Academy of Sciences. I have no way. Estimated to promote the model of cooperation between government and enterprises, and encourage the development of science and technology." Zhao Min said.

"Okay." Chen Mo smiled and turned to look at Yao Yi and Wang Nian and others: "The time is almost up, now it is time to play."

"Let's go." The Year of the Kings nodded and went out with Chen Mo shoulders.

Under the eyes of the whole world, Chen Mo and his party entered the venue in the eyes of the public. The reporters on the field immediately stunned and directed the shots to Chen Mo.

All the guests were seated, and a male host wearing a suit was holding the microphone and took the stage with a smile. He didn't know that it was being broadcast live around the world at this time, otherwise he could still stand still, still a problem.

" Distinguished guests, everyone, I am Hao Wenbin, the host of today's press conference. Thanks to all the friends, the guests took the time to come to the scene of the signing ceremony of the cooperation between the Academy of Sciences and the Army Ant Group.

The signing ceremony is about to begin. Please allow me to introduce the guests present today: Secretary Yao Yi of Binhai City; and the Academician of the Institute of Plasma Physics of the Academy of Sciences; and then Mr. Chen Mo, Chairman of the Army Ant Group; Representative of the Nuclear Industry Group Mr. Shao Zhengyang; Ms. Zhao Min, President of the Army Ant Group..."

The applause of the scene was uninterrupted and lasted for a long time. All the heavyweight guests were introduced, and the hosted personnel calmed their mood a little.

"Today, the project of cooperation between the Academy of Sciences and the Army Ant Company is a high-temperature plasma research project. The study of high-temperature plasma may be a bit strange to everyone, but there is another rhetoric that everyone knows. It is the 'artificial sun'. High-temperature plasma Research is to achieve nuclear convergence into a purpose.

The research ability of the marching ant company is among the many domestic technology companies, and it has an unparalleled research and development strength. The Academy of Sciences also gathered the best team of experts in the country. The combination of the two will definitely lead to different sparks.

The signing ceremony, starting right away, is very happy to witness the moment of history with everyone. Next, I would like to invite the Director of the Institute of Plasma Physics, Academician Wang Nian, and Mr. Chen Mo, the Chairman of the Army Ant Company. ”

chapters.title: Chapter 374: : Tens Of Billions
chapters.body:
Chapter 374: : Tens Of Billions

Chen Mo and Wang Nian, also with the help of the host, took the signing seat.

The signing ceremony is cumbersome, but it is very simple. After accepting the agreement handed over from the lawyer, signing his name, signing the contract and signing, the simple signing ceremony was officially completed under the global attention.

It’s just that outsiders don’t know, after a simple signing ceremony, how many days of intrigue negotiations have only been a minute on the stage.

After the signing ceremony is completed, the next step is to celebrate the successful opening of the champagne and photo session.

The process of signing the ceremony was repeated. After the official slogan of the Year of the King and the official speech of the rules, it was also the turn of Chen Mo, the boss of the army ant company.

At the moment Chen Mo appeared, all the shots were concentrated on him. The speech of this young man determines the direction of the marching ant company.

Especially this time, the marching ant company entered the high temperature plasma research.

This is a technology that transforms the world's energy.

If Chen Mo succeeds, the status quo of the world's energy will change. Humans no longer need to worry about energy, and the process of industrial civilization will go further.

Under the eyes of the world, Chen Mo calmly went to the small podium.

Yao Yi and others on the field don't know that they are currently broadcasting live around the world, but he knows. After the signing ceremony, it was enough to attract a global headline news, and this is just a cooperation. If Chen Mo puts out the success of the simulation test, I am afraid that I will put a bomb in the storm.

In the middle of the stage, Chen Moli took care of the ear-mounted microphone.

"Hello everyone, thank you friends for coming to the cooperation signing ceremony held by our company and the Academy of Sciences. I am very pleased that the marching ant group can cooperate with the Academy of Sciences to carry out joint research and development of the high temperature plasma project.

First, tell everyone a story. A scientist once said that on the second day of his research, a beautiful girl was scattered at dusk. After dark, the stars appeared and the night sky was very beautiful and spectacular. The pretty girl yelled and said, "How beautiful the stars are!" And the scientists smugly said: Since yesterday, I have known why they shine.

The girl smiled and said nothing. Later, this beautiful girl married someone. This incident tells us that the romance of scientists is sad. ”

Chen Mo’s words fell, and laughter and applause sounded on the field.

"The straight man is excellent, you don't understand."

"True, single by strength."

"As a science man, now I finally understand why I don't have a girlfriend yet..."

Looking at the live broadcast of the audience, a piece of music, have a variety of teasing. However, everyone was brought in by Chen Mo’s story.

When the applause stopped, Chen Mocai continued to speak:

"The scientist of this sad story is Fritz Otmes. In March 1929, physicists Fritz Otmeiss and Robert Atkinson voted for the German Journal of Physics. A paper titled "Possibility of the Internal Elemental Structure of Stars."
