The paper firstly proposes that the energy mechanism of the star is a thermonuclear fusion reaction, and theoretically calculates the possibility that the hydrogen atom will become a helium atom at a high temperature of several tens of millions of degrees, which lays a theoretical foundation for nuclear fusion.

Afterwards, scientists pursuing 'creating the sun' began to chase this beautiful energy, and various possible methods of controlled nuclear fusion were also proposed by scientists, the emergence of vacuum magnetic constraints, which can constrain the high temperature plasma. Let humans see the possibility of controlled nuclear fusion.

In China, thermal power generation is still the mainstream, and this brings with it a serious environmental burden. This is not a case. On a global scale, the burning of long-term fossil energy has made the earth's greenhouse effect more and more obvious. Today, human beings face the crisis of depletion of fossil energy and the double test of environmental degradation.

Humans urgently need a clean, pollution-free energy source to replace fossil energy.

The radioactive products of nuclear fission have always limited its development. Human beings are also cautious about the construction of fissile nuclear power plants, which is not a long-term solution.

So the scientists locked their eyes on the 'sun' in the sky, took off the 'sun' in the air and put it in the stove, so that it provided humans with clean energy that never dried up. The study of high-temperature plasma came into being..."

Chen Mo’s speech was eloquent, and everyone on the field listened carefully. This scene is broadcast live to all corners of the world.

Today, the marching ant company has become a big company with a world-leading technology. Chen Mo’s words have to let the world listen carefully.

Everyone hopes to get more information from Chen Mo's words, hoping to get Chen Mo's progress in studying this technology.

“After the successful holographic technology research, I started to look for new challenges after I was free. I studied some papers on controlled nuclear fusion technology and finally decided to challenge this problem.

Because of marching ants, there is a need to explore the unknown adventure spirit. Fortunately, my thoughts have been supported by the official and the Academy of Sciences, and I have joined forces with the Academy of Sciences. I believe there is a chance to break through the bottleneck of this human clean energy..."

Five minutes later, with the warm applause from the field, Chen Mo’s speech was successfully completed, and some people watching Chen Mo’s speech lived differently.

The marching ant company wants to enter the nuclear fusion, this is not a game that a private company should play.

However, Chen Mo’s terrible research ability has attracted their attention. In the event that Chen Mo, the ‘time giant’, once again tackled the successful nuclear fusion technology, the entire scientific community will be shrouded in the shadow of Chen Mo.

Sending people to investigate the progress of cooperation, and find ways to get Chen Mo's research materials, this is the first thought of all concerned people.

After the speech was finished, I went to the free question and answer session of the reporter.

There was a surge in the field, and almost all the reporters raised their hands in a subconscious manner, looking at the host with hope, and hoped that the host would give them precious questions.

"This gentleman with glasses." The host called the man who raised his hand.

The reporter who was called was delighted and took the microphone to stand up: "Hello, Mr. Chen Mo, I am a reporter for the Technology Times. We all know that this research is to burn money, how much money your company is prepared to invest in the study?"

"Thank you for your question. We are not sure about the specific funds. But the current status of our company's funds will definitely support this research. My president and I said that the previous budget was 60 billion, and then another investment was made according to the research and development progress. If necessary, we will continue to invest more money."

"Mr. Chen Mo, hello, I am a reporter for the Southern Newspaper. High temperature plasma research, we know that it is a worldwide problem, talent shortage, and the funds needed are bottomless. For this invisible research, you invest so much. Will funding make your company's capital operation difficult? What if you can't succeed?"

"The research on high-temperature plasma technology is successful, and its return will be endless. You can't do research and development because you are worried about the failure of R&D. It is not the style of a marching ant company. It should be tens of billions. I should still be able to afford it."

Oh...

Chen Mo’s last sentence was exported, and the scene was in turmoil. All the reporters were commotion, and even the audience watching the live broadcast was shocked.

How many billions is it, still worth it?

How many billions? And already?

Still worth it?

chapters.title: Chapter 375: : Wave
chapters.body:
Chapter 375: : Wave

"The evil capital."

"System Tip: Install a world-class force, reward: 60 billion hate value."

"I cried out in a wow, too much to bully people."

"Hello everyone, here is the world's pre-competition contest. This year's 'The strongest installment of the year. Forced. King' is: Chen Mo!"

"I don't help the urinary bird, just serve Chen Mo."

"Small target Wanda Lin, did not touch the money Jack Ma; ordinary family twist vine, I do not know the wife and the face blind East; Areyouok Rebs; Chen Mo how to pick this sentence? My nine years of compulsory education did not learn well, ask God to help."

"..."

Chen Mo said that the whole network was shocked.

In just one sentence, let everyone see the richness of the marching ant company. Even the other domestic leaders do not dare to say that the loss is 60 billion. This loss is fatal for most companies, but Chen Mo dared to say so, and it was like saying something very common.

In the scene, the free question and answer is still going on, and the atmosphere is very active. When Chen Mo makes the next question, all the reporters are vying to raise their hands and want to get a rare opportunity to ask questions.

"Wang Academician, why does the Academy of Sciences cooperate with the choice of marching ant groups? What are the difficulties in achieving controlled fusion?" An official media reporter who was seen looked at Wang Nian.

"High-temperature plasma research is not a successful closed-door vehicle. The research and development capabilities of the marching ant group are very good, and more than one person has more power. I believe that the addition of the marching ant group can inject new blood into the research of high-temperature plasma. New ideas."

The year of the young man smiled.

"As for the difficulty, the difficulties in achieving controlled fusion of the world's tokamak devices are mainly self-sustaining problems, polarizer material problems and the problem of maintaining the steady-state operation of the fusion reaction. As long as these problems are solved, controlled nuclear fusion Commercialization will also be possible."

He couldn't tell the outside world that Chen Mo has already got the data for the simulation experiment, and it is the data for the successful energy output.

The news of their cooperation can be released, but the progress of the research cannot be announced.

Most of the reporters who were called next time asked the question of Chen Mo, but the host will also come to the event, and will call some reporters of the official media to ask questions about the Year of the King, so that the Queen will not sit next to him.

After more than half an hour passed, with the answer to Chen Mo’s last question, the signing ceremony was also announced, and Chen Mo and Wang Nian also got up and left.

"Chen Chen, the cooperation agreement has been signed, can those theoretical technologies show me?"

On the way, Wang Nian started to open his mouth.

He has read Chen Mo’s information to Li Chengzhi, and some formulas of that material have greatly inspired their research. But there are still a lot of theories that don't understand, making them feel like it's itching, very uncomfortable.

"Director Wang, those technical theories are top secret. Although the two sides share the technology together, according to the agreement between the two parties, they need to join the R&D team to see."

Chen Moxiao smiled.

"When you join the R&D team and sign an agreement with the company you set up, you can see the information. I welcome President Wang to join, but it depends on who is willing to come over there."

"This..." The Year of the King was a bit embarrassed.

He is the director of the Plasma Institute, and it is certainly impossible to join Chen Mo's R&D team. But those technical theories are indeed the technology of the newly formed group companies, which can only be seen by the company's researchers.

But joining the team means that he is going to participate in the research of Chen Mo.

There are already many tasks in his body. They are too busy to come, and it is even more impossible to lose those jobs. They will come to participate in the research of Chen Mo, and the Academy of Sciences will not let people go.

“Do you have to join the R&D team?”

"This is the terms we agreed with Xiao representative, and the agreement is written. Joining the company's R&D team and signing the agreement to view the information, this is the principle, but also for the data security. Otherwise, you take the information, I have no help here, then I am not very troublesome."

Chen Mo spread his hands and said that he could do nothing.

In the Year of the King, the eyebrows are locked, so that if you want to check Chen Mo’s technical theory, you must participate in Chen Mo’s research and development, which is a bit of a hassle.

Chen Moile has a relaxed time.

Now the details of the [Star Ring] device are constantly improving, and the data obtained is getting better and better. Now it is only the construction problem of this device.

Not far from him, Zhao Min was discussing the construction of the institute with representatives of the Nuclear Industry Group. As long as it is negotiated, the design drawings of the institute will be handed over to the nuclear industry group, and the others will be handed over to the nuclear industry group.

The group left the Grand Theatre and went to celebrate the banquet.

At the end of the signing ceremony, this news has attracted the attention of countless people around the world through various platforms.

No one believes that the marching ant company can develop controlled nuclear fusion technology.

This is a worldwide problem. Controlled nuclear fusion is also known as the 'artificial sun' and is the top crown in the history of human energy.

Nuclear fission atoms appear. In a very short time, humans control the energy of nuclear fission and turn it into a controllable energy source for human use.

So after the successful bomb explosion, many scientists are excited to believe that this inexhaustible energy will soon be applied by humans. However, in the past few decades, the technical bottleneck of nuclear fusion is still a hurdle. .

Countries are building their own nuclear fusion devices, but progress is slow. Soon, countries realized that to break through this technology, they must concentrate on the wisdom of the entire human race.

Therefore, the world's most important powers jointly launched iTeR, a temporary international organization, to jointly tackle nuclear fusion technology.

iTeR concentrates on the world's top physicists. So far, the technical bottleneck has not been successfully solved, and its difficulty can be imagined.

Although Chen Mo entered the field of high-temperature plasma research, there are not many people who are optimistic about him.

Except for the shock at the beginning, the rest are all mocking. Laughing at Chen Mo's arrogance, as well as the ad hoc force of the marching ant company.

This is not a technology that a company should study.

Now the marching ant company wants to enter the market and conduct research on controlled nuclear fusion technology, which has to make sense, how silly the decision of the marching ant company.

“The 60 billion people want to study the controlled nuclear fusion technology? It’s just a dream, it’s too naive.”

"A ridiculous marching ant."

"The technology of the marching ant company is stealing our Samsung, and is also qualified to develop nuclear fusion technology? In addition to stealing technology, the marching ant company has nothing to do."

“When did the controlled nuclear fusion turn to a company to study? The experiment exploded and the whole city disappeared. For humanitarian purposes, the United States should sanction Chen Mo and open the technology of the marching ant company to the world free of charge.”

"The arrogant Chen Mo will bring the marching ant company into the abyss."

The international network is ridiculous, and the same situation has also appeared in China.

On the show of a well-known news platform, the issue of marching ant companies preparing to enter the field of nuclear fusion is also being discussed.

"Professor Tang, what do you think about the joint research between the army ants and the Academy of Sciences to study high temperature plasma?" The female host asked the expert who looked gray.

"Ignorance is fearless. Interlaced like a mountain, Chen Mo has achieved results in artificial intelligence and holographic technology, as well as robots. But that is the computer field, the laser application field and the robot field. It is now a very unwise move to enter the nuclear energy field. I can only send him four words: ignorance and fearlessness.

In these years, the marching ant company achieved a little achievement, which made him feel inflated and thought he could do anything. The funds needed to study this technology are a bottomless pit, and the results are unknown. There may be countless investments, and not necessarily a little result. Now that the marching ant company wants to enter the market, it is likely that the large army ant company will be dragged into the abyss by high temperature plasma research. ”

The commenting guests next to me also nodded in agreement.

"Professor Tang is doing a good job. Chen Mo is a bit arrogant. A country does not dare to study technology alone. A company comes in to join in the fun. The result can be imagined. The controlled nuclear fusion technology will be the funeral of Chen Mo’s fall to the altar. He has This money is better than donating to the poor. There are still tens of millions of poor families in China, and Chen Mo is not going to help these families."

Another guest shook his head: "Although I don't think that marching ants can succeed. But the cooperation between marching ants and the Academy of Sciences is undoubtedly an indirect provision of funds for research by the Academy of Sciences. This is a good thing in itself."

Chen Mo's preparations to enter the controlled nuclear fusion research have already stirred up waves around the world. Unlike the criticisms of ordinary people, the preparation of the ant company and the research and development of controlled fusion technology by the Huaxia Academy have attracted the attention of some countries.

chapters.title: Chapter 376: : Not Raining And Planning
chapters.body:
Chapter 376: : Not Raining And Planning

US CIA headquarters.

Linna looked at the video of Chen Mo’s press conference, her eyes lit up, flashing with inexhaustible light, and I didn’t know what I was thinking.

After a long time, Linna picked up a satellite phone and dialed a number.

After the last time the clown organization invaded the computer system of the CIA, the intelligence networks of the most important countries and regions suffered a devastating blow. As the director, she suffered the biggest failure in her career and was greatly humiliated.

Although she seized a member of the clown organization of an island country, after interrogation, she knew it was luck.

Someone pretending to be a clown organization attacking the CIA, and the mysterious hacker has been unsure of his identity, and the traces are handled very cleanly, making it impossible for her to check it out. This can only be lost.

Now the situation of the CIA has gradually stabilized, and the basic espionage network has been re-established in various countries, but this requires a process. If there is no tree building, I am afraid that she will be covered with an incompetent hat.

The last time I kidnapped Chen Mo failed, it was her decision to do it privately. I don't know it.

This may be an opportunity.

Chen Mo’s horrific research and development capabilities are clear to many people. The Chinese politician must have trusted Chen Mo's research and development capabilities and will choose to cooperate with the marching ant company.

If Chen Mo’s research is successful, getting Chen Mo’s research results is definitely a remarkable achievement.

After a while, the phone was connected, and a lazy voice came to the head: "He head, I am sunbathing on the beach to see the beauty, go back and talk."

"There are tasks, come back."

At the same time, the British MI6, a bald man wearing sunglasses handed a piece of paper to the man with yellow skin and black hair in front of him: "You go back to China, in the past, the coastal city, always pay attention to the high temperature plasma research of the marching ant company. The progress, if there is an opportunity, get the information back."

"Understood, sir." The man nodded, took out the lighter and burned the paper in his hand.

“Going to the coastal city to lurk, I want to find a way to obtain the nuclear fusion research data of the marching ant company.” The Russian Security Service also issued the same instructions.

In addition, Israel, the island nation, South Korea, France and other national intelligence agencies, all issued the same order.

Binhai City has become the target of the global intelligence network. For a time, the undercurrent is gathering in the coastal city and is brewing.

......

In Chen Mo's lab, Zhao Min walked in with a document. She has become accustomed to Chen Mo immersed in the laboratory every day, so the work report, most of the time in the laboratory.

Seeing the beautiful ring in the middle of the lab, Zhao Min sighed. This technique is beyond her understanding, but the magenta plasma ring in the middle is pretty.

"There are a lot of reports about you on the Internet, and the outside world doesn't seem to be optimistic about this research."

"When I developed the seismograph, I had already become the object of ridicule." Chen Mo stopped to observe the experiment and could not help but spread his hand.

With the technical theory acquired by the science and technology library, coupled with his own super brain and the support of the ink girl, he is fully confident to successfully develop controlled nuclear fusion technology.

After the success of technology, it is the best answer, and it is also the best response for those people.

"You are not affected." Zhao Min handed out a approval letter to Chen Mo: "This is the above approval. The official has allowed us to use this island as a research institute for high temperature plasma."

"It's very fast." Chen Mo said with amazement.

"I also feel very fast, only after submitting the application for a few days, the approval is down. This is a very smooth event. It is estimated that the merits of your experimental materials have made the high-level attention to this matter."

“How is it with the Nuclear Industry Group?” Chen Mo asked.

"I talked to them yesterday. They promised that as long as the design drawings and funds of the institute are in place, construction will begin. Now the design drawings of the institute are missing, do you want to find and design the office?" Zhao Min asked.

"No need to."

Chen Mo shook his head and took a u disk from his pocket and handed it to Zhao Min.

"There is a design drawing of the Institute of Construction in the U disk. You contact the people of the Nuclear Industry Group and give them this project, so that they can start construction on the island, the sooner the better."

"Where is this?" Zhao Min asked in amazement.

The design of a research institute, without thousands of drawings, is impossible. And there are computational mechanics, load-bearing, etc., the workload can be imagined.

"Ink design." Chen Mo smiled.

"Okay." Zhao Min is not surprised, because Chen Mo said that the mansion in the incense burner beach is designed by the ink girl, and now there is nothing strange about the design institute.

After Zhao Min left, Chen Mo continued to focus on the central analog equipment, and the ink holographic projection of the ink girl fell by Chen Mo.

"Merg brother, the ink girl monitored the spy agency to send spies into the coastal city, the task is to pay attention to our high temperature plasma research."

"Oh?"

Chen Mo eyebrows picked and turned his attention to the ink girl.

"Which institution?"

"I have only monitored the intelligence agencies of France, South Korea, the island countries, and India. They have issued orders through telephone or the Internet. It is unclear whether other countries have issued orders online," said the Mexican woman.

Hearing this, Chen Mosi asked.

The study of controlled nuclear fusion is very important for any country. It is known that Chen Mo has unparalleled research and development capabilities, and if it succeeds, it will lead the transformation of energy.

So those countries are also concerned about normal.

And certainly more than three countries, some intelligence agencies, through the offline channels to issue orders, the ink girl can not be monitored.

"Can you find out the information of the sneaked spies?" Chen Mo asked.

"Can find India, France, the other two can not find." said the ink girl.

"From today, I will monitor all the foreigners living in Binhai City or the ‘sea turtles’ who have returned to study, and find out that their identity is suspicious, remind me.” Chen Mosi said after the claim.

"understood."

"Next, you simulate the experiment to collect the data, I go back and take a break."

"it is good."

Leaving the lab, Chen Mo went straight to his office.

After the last attack, he knew that weapons of self-defense were important. Otherwise, if you fall into the hands of the enemy, you can only kill anyone. The purpose of the last CIA was not to have his life, but to give him a chance to escape. If some countries ruined his mind, he might not be so lucky next time.

Therefore, there must be some special self-defense things, otherwise not every time the robot can come to the rescue in time.

The spies who are lurking in are simply not sure when they will start, they can only plan ahead.

Back at the office, Chen Mo went into his lounge and lie down into the technology library.

The self-defense he can think of is something, technology. Technology is omnipotent, this is a true portrayal of science and technology books.

In the science and technology library, as always, the bookshelves are so quiet that the tall bookshelves feel very small. Chen Mo went straight to the central table and opened the dark red books on the table.

Chen Mo’s current authority is [Technology Apprentice], because the task of the [Technology Apprentice] stage is to select one of the eight areas of technology to let Chen Mo complete.

Now that he has not completed it completely, he can't get all the technology in the [Technology Apprentice] stage, and he can only view the technology of the completed field. However, in the completed field, there is no weapon article, and Chen Mo can only look to the equipment weapon of the [trainee] authority.

"Electric spider"; field: robot, weapon; permission level: trainee; product introduction: anti-small intelligent small robot, size 1.5 * 3 * 1, flexible movement, built-in high voltage. Note: Trainee technology, no intelligent core, must be written by yourself.

......

"Tracking Bomb": Field: Weapons; Grade Permissions: Trainee; Product Description: Egg-shaped, with tracking function, after four seconds of activation, automatically search for animals within ten meters, automatically scroll to the side of the animal to explode.

......

"Super body armor": field: chemical materials; grade authority: apprentice; product introduction: olefinic synthetic fiber, white, ultra-high strength, light weight, can reduce impact, impact, strong toughness, knife can not cut.

......

Seeing the list of weapons and equipment technology, Chen Mo’s eyes jumped straight.

He is so confusing that he has never heard of the name, and most of them have been dazzled. In the same category, there are many similar technologies. Chen Mo can only find the categories he needs, and then look for the self-defense technology of the subdivision.

After looking for a long time, Chen Mocai selected several of his self-defense equipment technologies suitable for his current situation.

chapters.title: Chapter 377: : Optimized To Complete
chapters.body:
Chapter 377: : Optimized To Complete

The joint ant company and the Academy of Sciences collaborated to study high-temperature plasma technology, which has now received global attention and the heat of discussion continues unabated.

Because it is the first time that private enterprises have participated in the research of controlled nuclear fusion technology, and this company is also the most topical army ant company.

On the Internet, TV news commentary programs are arguing about the development of controlled nuclear fusion technology by marching ants.

The outside world is very lively and there is also an undercurrent in the coastal city.

The matter of controlled nuclear fusion has attracted the attention of people around the world. Recently, there have been many outsiders in the coastal city, and some people have been around the headquarters of the army ants company, which has also attracted the attention of the security department of the coastal city.

A few days later, the Binhai Municipal Bureau announced the news on the official website of the Municipal Bureau and arrested six spies. Two of the island countries borrowed, two South Korea borrowed, and two did not disclose their identity.

When the news came out, it caused an uproar in the world.

The marching ant company and the Academy of Sciences announced their cooperation soon. The Binhai City Council announced the arrest of spy personnel so quickly, which is obviously warning some people with ulterior motives.

Everyone speculated that these spy personnel came from cooperation projects with marching ants and the Academy of Sciences. However, the real situation is unknown.

The island country and the South Korean foreign affairs department also responded in the first time, demanding that China be released, but it was a painless response.

For a time, some spies sneaked into the coastal city, and in the coastal city, many people began to nervous. Some people found suspicious people to report spontaneously.

The excitement outside has nothing to do with Chen Mo, he is still focused on research.

Six spy personnel, it looks a lot, but it is not much. It’s just a few exposed, spy people hiding in the dark, still don’t know how many.

The spies of those powerful intelligence agencies have not found one, but they do not mean no.

Therefore, Chen Mo still raised a heart for the spy personnel. Because those people don't know where they are lurking, and when they will appear are unknown.

In the Physics Laboratory of Building No. 1, Chen Mozheng looked at the [Star Ring] device in the central holographic projection of the hall. During this time, Chen Mo is constantly improving the design of the [Star Ring] device.

After this period of optimization, the defects are getting smaller and smaller. When Chen Mo thinks, the holographic projection of the ink girl falls on his side and reminds him.

"Mergo, the [Star Ring] device has been optimized, and the experimental device needs to be officially run, and the specific data can be obtained to further optimize."

“Well, save the final optimized design.” Chen Mo said: “Give me a design for the spare parts of [Star Ring].”

“Do you need to put in the parts design drawings for special materials?”

"We can not put the parts that we can produce ourselves." Chen Mo thought about it.

"Okay." The ink girl should have come down. After a while, a robot came over with a mobile hard disk and handed it.

Chen Mo took the hard drive and took off the lab robe and left the lab.

Now the [Star Ring] device has reached the optimization that can be done by the simulation experiment. If it needs to be improved, the specific device operation data is needed.

The installation requires the completion of the construction of the institute.

It will take some time for the Institute to start construction orthogonally by the Nuclear Industry Group.

The liquid metal materials required for the divertor are also being synthesized and tested. In addition to the design of the [Star Ring] device, other special materials required are formulated in the given technology. There are recipes for the synthesis of ink women, and there are not many things that he needs to worry about.

After the completion of the plasma research institute, he can further build the [Star Ring] and move on to the next stage.

"Ah... the chairman is good."

Chen Mogang entered Zhao Min’s office and was surprised by Lanxi, who was working at the door of Zhao Min’s office.

"Small fish?"

Chen Mo looked at the empty position of Xiao Yu.

"She just took a document to go to the personnel side and arranged for the job of the president, but she hasn't come back yet," Lanxi said.

"Well, go in for two cups of tea."

After Chen Mozhen’s Lanxi, he went straight into Zhao Min’s office.

"It’s rare, the science and engineering otaku will come over to me personally." Zhao Min saw Chen Mo coming in and smiled and opened his mouth. "Come to me, or come to your little fisherman?"

"Looking for you."

Chen Mo sat down on the sofa and took the tea coming in from Lanxi. Lanxi left the office and took the door of Zhao Min’s office.

"What are you doing now?"

"The management of the nuclear energy company." Zhao Min also sat down on the sofa next to Chen Mo.

“How much have you found?”

“However, they are the management personnel of some energy companies. It is estimated that they are looking for a headhunting company to help us dig people.”

“The ‘sea turtle’ and the inaccurate information returned to the country in the recent past are not used.”

Chen Mo reminded me.

Now the whole world is staring at them. The two Huaxia Nuclear Energy Groups, which are jointly established, will definitely become the preferred potential targets. Chen Mo has to remind him.

"Good!" Zhao Min immediately understood Chen Mo's meaning and nodded. After all, what happened in recent times, they all look in the eyes: "What is the important thing that the rare boss came to me personally?"

Chen Mo shook his head and smiled. He took out a hard disk and handed it to Zhao Min.

"This is the component of the [Star Ring] device. You place an order for the Nuclear Industry Group to let them produce a batch according to the design requirements. When the institute is successfully built, it can be assembled directly [Star Ring] to save a little time."

Zhao Min took the hard drive, put it in the safe of the office, and walked back to the sofa and sat down: "Is the experiment completed now?"

"To come to an end, the next step is to continue the experiment to verify, that is, to verify the actual data of the [Star Ring] device. The research institute has just started construction, and it will take some time to complete. The construction of the [Star Ring] must be completed before the study is completed. So the first parts are processed and assembled directly," Chen Mo said.

“When is the researcher from the Academy of Sciences coming over? Do I need to arrange a temporary research institute?” Zhao Min returned to the sofa and sat down, handing a glass of water to Chen Mo.

"For the time being, the Academy of Sciences now has the 'Super Ring' experiment on Science Island, and there are other Tokamak devices under construction. In this area, the shortage of professionals is the status quo. We are not building the Institute, they will not send teams to come over. of.

Moreover, the coastal city is not so flat recently, there are still many mice hiding in the dark. Those researchers are engaged in top-secret work, and it is impossible to appear in the research institutes and residences that are temporarily arranged by our company. ”

"Isn't that nothing after that?"

"How could it be impossible? The divertor material of the [Star Ring] device is synthesized by the robot. What I need is to check those materials and study several fun toys."

"What kind of toy? What is the aphrodisiac? Feng. Chest medicine?" Zhao Min asked curiously.

Chen Mo: "--!"

chapters.title: Chapter 378: : With The Blessing Of The Old Lady, Roll!
chapters.body:
Chapter 378: : With The Blessing Of The Old Lady, Roll!

"Welcome to this train, the train is about to arrive at Binhai Station. Please take your luggage and get ready to get off. Thank you. welcometotakethistime..."

In the Binhai City Station, a young man in a white shirt came out with a black suitcase. Sven, confident appearance, attracted the attention of many girls passing by.

Dong Quan had a relaxed smile on his face and turned a blind eye to the girls around him.

Out of the station door, Dong Quan looked up at the blue sky of Binhai City, and looked at the direction of the marching ant company. The smile on his face was still relaxed, but it looked awkward.

“Is this the coastal city? The environment is not bad.” Dong Quan murmured and stopped a taxi.

"Handsome, where are you going?"

"Big Marina Hotel." Dong Quan said an address.

“A handsome guy is coming to Binhai for the first time?” The taxi driver looked at Dong Quan through the rearview mirror.

"How do you know that I came to Binhai for the first time?" Dong Quan asked.

"Listen to your accent, not like a local."

“I heard that Binhai has great potential and the urban environment is good, so I am ready to come here.” Dong Quan showed a gentle smile.

"Then you have come to the right place. In the past few years, since the establishment of the marching ant company, the economic development of Binhai has become better and better, and the city brain has been established. The transportation is convenient, the crime rate is low, and the coastal environment is good. Dawan District It is also established, and it is now one of the most competitive cities in the country.

The marching ant company is even more incredible. The largest private enterprise in the country, the annual revenue is comparable to the gDP of a city. That is the pride of Binhai. The son of a friend of my cousin, working in a marching ant company, that salary and welfare, I drove a year, can not compare with others for two months. And what kind of research institutes, such as what was recently put on the news, also started, on the islands in the south..."

The taxi driver heard Dong Quan praise the city of Binhai and also boasted. Twenty minutes later, the taxi stopped at the entrance of the Binhai Hotel.

“The marching ant company? It seems that the task is not that simple.”

Looking at the taxi that left, Dong Quan smiled lightly. Then he might have to stay in Binhai for a long time. I am afraid that the task should be well planned.

......

During this time, the construction of the research institute of the army ants and the Academy of Sciences, as well as the two Huaxia Nuclear Energy Groups jointly established, have been uploaded in the media. During this period, various reports were brought up again. Let the marching ants study the controlled nuclear fusion technology, the heat continues unabated.

It was not long before the cooperation was announced, and it was obvious that the construction of the institute was started. It seems that the marching ant company is too eager to study the controlled nuclear fusion technology.

These things have also attracted speculation from all sides.

It’s just that the institute is on the island, and it has now been classified as a martial law in the restricted area. Ordinary people simply cannot go to the island. The appearance of the Institute can only be guessed by speculation and official announcements.

The outside world was not small, but after Chen Mo participated in the signing ceremony, he did not come out again, and declined all interviews, focusing on the development of self-defense equipment.

In the coastal city, there are still a lot of spy personnel hidden in the dark. Even if they catch it, before they reach the goal, they may send new personnel to come over and it is difficult to uproot.

To be on the safe side, he must be prepared, and no one knows when the next attack against him will be.

If there is another danger of the last time, he can't guarantee that he is still as lucky as he was last time.

As time went by, the marching ant company and the Academy of Sciences collaborated, the heat of research and development of nuclear fusion technology slowly subsided, and the heat of espionage was also fading. A drunkard who took a knife and wounded a street and was killed by the incident also took away the heat. People’s attention was also placed on the emerging hot events.

Time shift attention has no effect on Chen Mo. When Chen Mo focused on researching self-defense equipment, his family’s phone was also hit.

"Xiao Mo, are you off work now?"

When the phone is connected, the holographic projection of Chen’s mother pops up with a gentle smile on her face.

"I am still in the lab, ready to go home, is there anything?"

"Still in the lab? The project you worked with the country, is it busy? Is there time?" asked Chen.

"The research institute of the project has not been built, and it is not particularly busy. I am in the laboratory, just make some small things." Chen Mo answered subconsciously.

"Since it is a small matter, don't work overtime, go back early."

"Okay, I will go back now." Chen Mo hurriedly promised.

"Well, you and the fishery wedding have not forgotten? From the wedding day, there are still half a month, remind you, now you have to start preparing. If you are particularly busy, you have to say in advance, postpone it." Chen Mu reminded.

"No need to postpone." Chen Mo said, he did not forget such an important matter.

"Since there is no need to postpone, I have to send invitations in the past few days. There are wedding photos of you and Xiaoyu, as well as hotels that have banquets, and they must be booked in advance. You like to follow the young people’s ideas, we can’t insert the old people. Hands, you can only prepare for the home first.

Don't forget these things. If the matter at hand is not important, let go first and prepare for the wedding. This is a top priority. Did you hear it? ”

"Well, I will start preparing tomorrow, Mom, you can rest assured."

"The first thing to do, go back to dinner early. At home, my parents will do it for you. We can't help you with the young people on your side. Follow your heart. Now it's off work, don't work overtime, no. If you have a bad time, pay attention to your body."

"Row."

Hanging up the phone, Chen Mo showed a smile, took off the lab robe and left the lab.

After two days of busy work, he also had to prepare for the wedding. After all, he promised Xiaoyu to make her the most beautiful bride. This wedding, with modern technology, made it a unique, most luxurious wedding.

When leaving the lab, Chen Mo dialed Zhao Min’s phone.

"Boss, now I am off work, you call me, do you want to ask me?" The holographic image of Zhao Min jumped out of the phone, and the smile was a bit charming.

"Give a small fishing leave for a while."

"Leave a vacation? Prepare for the wedding?"

"Yes."

"You are the boss, you said, it is a guy with no conscience." Zhao Min's voice is a bit sour and slick: "Do it, give a small fishing holiday for a month. My little sister, who is smart and sensible, will hand it over to you." It is."

“Which partners have a banquet, give me a list.”

"Being fed dog food, I still have to work hard. How can my life be so bitter?" Zhao Min said a little.

Chen Mo has become accustomed to the appearance of Zhao Min, and he said: "When you want to give a red envelope, you don't have to be too big, you can do it."

"..."

Zhao Min was anxiously white, and he couldn't wait to kill him.

"With the blessings of the old lady, it’s rolling."

Hanging up the phone, Zhao Min looked at the phone in front of him intricately. The **** guy, so angry that she didn't even have a meal, and she must revenge later.

After hearing the sound of Zhao Min’s last anger, Chen Mo was happy, grinned and put away his mobile phone and went home.

chapters.title: Chapter 379: : I Think So Much.
chapters.body:
Chapter 379: : I Think So Much.

Just entering the door, Xiaoyu greeted the house. At this time, the small fisherman still had a thin sweat on his forehead, which was obviously just finished from the kitchen.

Seeing Chen Mo, Xiao Yu showed a soft smile: "The rice is just cooked, eat first."

"it is good."

Chen Mo reached out and wiped the sweat on the forehead of the small fishing fish and walked in with Xiao Yu. Xiaoman, who is playing the game, sees Chen Mo coming back, and also drops the game he is playing to keep up.

At the dinner table, there is a steaming four-in-one soup, which is obviously a masterpiece of Xiaoyu. The scent of the food into the tip of the nose makes Chen Mo feel warm.

"Sister husband, I went back to school in two days, and I have to prepare my graduation thesis." Sitting at the dinner table, Xiao Man opened his mouth. Stayed here for so long, and I can’t bear to leave.

"Do you want to study? If you want to study, your brother-in-law will send you to study."

"I don't want to study." Xiao Man shook his head.

"What job do you want to find after graduation? You and your sister said that she can arrange for you to enter the company." Chen Mo did not force Xiao Man, although the graduate study can improve his academic qualifications and increase some knowledge, but he is not willing, he will not force what.

"Still forever, my sister and I look so much. When you go in, you know that you are a sister. You will definitely be treated specially, and then I will talk about it behind my back. My face is not so thick." Xiao Man smiled and shook his head.

"The brother-in-law gave you money to start a business."

"But I don't know what industry to enter."

"It’s been a while since you graduated. During this time, you should think about it. I thought about it and my brother-in-law said, my brother-in-law will invest in you."

"What about the failure of entrepreneurship?"

"Nothing, if the business fails, it will be fine. Just accumulate experience and do it with your heart."

"Thank you brother-in-law." Xiaoman surprised.

The character of Xiao Yu is quiet and gentle, occasionally a little wild, and the character of Xiao Man is lively and cheerful. If they are not like two people, they will not be reminiscent of the two being sisters. However, both sisters have one thing in common. After they have died, they are all embarrassed.

After talking about Xiao Man, Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu.

"Small fish, I will help you to leave Zhao Min, and I don't have to go to work tomorrow."

"What's wrong? Why don't you go to work? My body is fine." Xiao Yusheng gave a bowl of rice and handed it to Chen Mo, asking for doubts.

"The day of the wedding is coming, and tomorrow I will start preparing for the wedding."

"Yeah." Xiao Yuqi nodded his head, his face could not cover the joy: "First eat, you eat more."

"Sister, my heart is very sweet, I am looking forward to it?"

"So many foods can't stop your mouth." Xiao Yu picked up a piece of meat and stuffed it into Xiao Man's mouth, his face also showing a sweet smile.

That night.

Xiao Yu snuggled in Chen Mi's arms, using a notebook to write a list of classmates and friends who need to be invited, the sweet smile of his face was not lost, it was a little woman immersed in happiness.

She is now preparing for the most important day of her life. And the men around him are pampering themselves, loving themselves, the joyful mood, can not be expressed in words.

Now I am already dreaming about the wedding scene.

"If you, you and Xiaolan are bridesmaids, and I am a cousin, four are enough, what about you?" Xiao Yu looked up at Chen Mo.

"The same table in high school, a few buddies in the university dormitory. I haven't seen each other for a long time, just in time to invite them to come and meet."

After the list was finished, Xiaoyu put down his notebook and sat quietly in Chen Mohuai.

"Why are you looking at your husband like this?" Chen Mo smiled badly and his hands were upset.

"Bad egg." Feel the temperature of Chen Mo's palm, and with an aggressive look, the small fish face is shy and squeaky.

"How come a bad guy? This is a couple's life. Your husband's brain power is severe, so now you have to relax physically and mentally. Studies have shown that couples' life can release stress, relax body and mind, or the flavor of the two.

From a mathematical point of view, this is a math problem with 1+1 greater than 2. From a chemical point of view, we are now preparing for a neutralization reaction, releasing water and heat, and creating a new 'substance'. From a physics point of view, this is the process of relative motion of objects, but the theory of relativity tells us that the speed of love and love cannot be too fast, otherwise the length of some objects will become shorter. From biological interpretation, this is the process of reproduction, the natural instinct of the organism.

In the end, when the bad guys are also good, you can do bad things that bad guys want to do. ”

"Big bad guys, there are so many things."

Xiao Yu listened to Chen Mo's explanation and was ashamed. He gently wrapped around Chen Mo's waist, twisted his body, sat in Chen Mohuai, and let go of all the defenses. The red lips gently clicked on Chen Mo's face and gave Chen Mo an offensive signal with practical action.

Not long after, Xiaoyu’s position was completely framed, and both body and mind were handed over to Chen Mo’s hands.

For a time.

Spring is boundless, and you are so comfortable.

In the early morning, Xiao Yu wakes up from his dream, and his long eyelashes tremble, revealing a clear pair of eyes. With a flattering look, Qiong Nai greedily sniffs the familiar atmosphere, and the corner of his mouth bends into a happy arc.

Seeing that Chen Mo has not yet woken up, Xiao Yu will gently drill into his arms like a lazy kitten.

"Wake up so early."

Chen Mo’s arm was held, and the small fisherman was put into his arms, feeling the softness and temperature of the small fisherman’s body. The mind couldn’t tell the ease, and the palm was not disturbed. Only when accompanied by the small fishing time, is his most relaxed time, completely empty, do not have to think about anything.

"This is a habit. Uh ~ husband, I was tossed so many times last night, now I am weak, people want to sleep back, don't mess?"

Xiao Yu and Chen Mo have climbed the big hand of Xuefeng, the tone seems to be spoiled, and once again drilled into Chen Mo’s arms, feeling a little more comfortable, only to calm down.

It’s rare to be lazy once, and Chen Mo also took a nap and fell asleep.

After half an hour, Xiaoyu only woke up again. Seeing that Chen Mo was still asleep, he squatted and got out of bed. Just seeing the strawberry print on the soft part of her body, let her think back to the scene last night, sweet and shy.

After washing, Xiaoyu went downstairs and began to prepare breakfast.

......

"After breakfast, go to the wedding company." At the dinner table, Chen Mo said with hot milk: "Ink girl, you can find some information about a better wedding company."

"it is good."

After the ink girl answered, a holographic projection light curtain fell in front of the dinner table. The light curtain is the information of the famous wedding company in China.

"Do you want to go out together with Xiao Man? You have to go back to school in two days, just to take you out to play." Chen Mo looked at the small man who was still suffering.

"Okay! Ok!" Xiao Man nodded quickly.

During this time, Chen Mo went to work, Xiao Yu went to the company, and the big villa, she stayed alone playing games, went out shopping alone, the bones were rusted, just went out.

"Which go? I look."

Chen Mo looked at the information of the wedding company, Xiao Yu was also watching, and the eyes of both of them finally brightened.

"this home."

The two are unanimous.

“Hey~~, I was fed a dog’s food with a heart and soul in the morning. Is there a human body for a single dog?”

Xiao Man, who was eating breakfast next to him, was depressed, but he was used to the love of both. Seeing the name of the wedding company, Xiao Man is also a bright spot.

Ten miles of red makeup

Listening to the name is very romantic.

This is also a famous wedding company in China. It has hosted many weddings of stars and big figures, and one-stop wedding service just meets the demand.

"Ten Li Hong makeup, this name is very artistic. And just in the coastal city has a branch, go to this place to see." Chen Mo made a conclusion.

After eating breakfast, waiting for Xiaoyu and Xiaoman to change clothes, Chen Mocai left the villa with two people.

chapters.title: Chapter 380: : Liang Jing'S Excitement
chapters.body:
Chapter 380: : Liang Jing'S Excitement

Ten miles of red makeup.

Sun Lili sat at the front desk, staring at the door of the company, waiting for the presence of the guests.

Now she has no guests and she looks at the computer. The news on the computer is about Chen Mo’s news. Recently, the news is everywhere on the Internet. This young and handsome man is the best standard for countless women to choose their mate.

Unfortunately, some time ago, this legendary man has announced that his heart belongs. This news has envied countless women.

I don't know if my other half of the future can be rich with one thousand of his.

It has been four years since the wedding was held. She said that she did not know how many weddings were romantic to the couple. Unfortunately, she was still a single.

Suddenly, several people appearing at the door interrupted Sun Lili’s cranky thoughts.

Without looking at the other side's face, Sun Lili hurried up.

"Mr., madam, welcome, here is the Shili Red Makeup Wedding Company. I need to know you..." Sun Lili habitually spoke, just halfway through the words, she stopped and looked at her eyes.

God? Who do I see?

Sun Lili was unbelievable in her heart. She wondered if she had just looked at the picture of the computer and saw that her brain was short-circuited. Keep your eyes open, or the familiar face, young, handsome, with the confidence to attract countless women.

"Chen... Chen Mo? Are you Mr. Chen Mo?" Sun Lili still dare not accept this reality.

"Hello." Chen Mo looked at the woman in front of her, nodded slightly.

“Is it Mr. Chen Mo?” Sun Lili’s mouth was incredibly ‘o’, and she was a little overwhelmed: “You please please inside, please inside.”

Chen Mo is also welcome, holding the hand of Xiao Yu, followed Sun Lili into it. On the way to the VIP room, Sun Lili constantly indicated to her colleagues, and informed the manager.

Xiao Yu wears a beige long dress, which has a light makeup, a tall figure, a sweet smile on his face, and looks more beautiful. Xiao Man also wore a skirt, followed by a small fisherman, curiously looking around.

Wang Hai and Black Hawk are both left and right, following Chen Mo.

This lineup came in and immediately caught everyone's attention.

"God, what seems to be Chen Mo?"

"How could Chen Mo appear here... It seems like Chen Mo. And is that a pair of twins?"

"That is Chen Mo's fiancee, so beautiful, so good."

A female employee looked enviously at the small fishing around Chen Mo, and other female employees were screaming in their hearts. Why not stand by Chen Mo is not himself.

Chen Mo did not know that his arrival made the wedding company not calm. Fortunately, there were no couples who consulted the wedding on the field. Only the staff of the ten-mile red makeup did not attract too much vibration.

Zhang Lili led several people into the VIP room, poured a cup of tea to Chen Mo and Xiao Yu sisters, and secretly looked at Xiao Yu, who was sitting next to Chen Mo, with a deep envy.

"You drink tea first, Mr. Chen came over. Is it a matter of understanding the wedding? Our company has more than 20 years of wedding experience and has the best wedding planning team in China..."

Sun Lili finally got back a little calm, her face was full of professional smiles, and she began to introduce Chen Mo.

"Manager, manager."

Liang Jing took the coffee and was watching a wedding plan. He heard an anxious shout from outside the door. The rushed footsteps approached and the office door was pushed open.

Liang Jing brows slightly and looks at the employees who rushed in. The look is a little displeased: "What is the hell?"

In her impression, this girl's work is also diligent, not so ill-advised, after all, they work special, the image is very important.

"Manager, that, Chen Mo is coming."

"Silent? What silence? How many times have we said, we must pay attention to words and deeds, do not take the risk of losing, will give the guests a bad impression." Liang Jing said with dissatisfaction.

"It is Mr. Chen Mo, Chen Mo, who is an army ant company. He and his fiancee have come over." The girl's voice was anxious, for fear of going back later, Chen Mo would run away.

"Which Chen Mo? What did he come to us?"

Liang Jing took a sip of coffee and tasted Sun Lili's two words. It seemed to react. Suddenly, the coffee was sprayed out, and I ignored the coffee-wetting wedding plan. I suddenly got up from the seat and my face turned red. I don't know if I am excited or be jealous.

"Cough... You mean the cough of the marching ant company... Chen Molai came to our company?"

"Right right!" The girl was busy nodding.

"Don't lie to me cough?"

"Manager, I dare to lie to you, just in the VIP room, Sun Lili is entertaining, she let me come to inform you." The girl said anxiously.

"Fast, take me with me."

Liang Jing refused to take care of the other, speeding up the pace and trotting to the VIP reception room, completely disregarding the high heels he wore.

To the VIP reception, Liang Jing stayed in the footsteps, took care of his hair and dress, cleared his throat, adjusted his smile on his face, and then knocked on the door.

Sun Lili saw Liang Jing coming in, and the big stone that fell in her heart fell.

Receiving such an important guest, Chen Mo, if the business talks well, it is a promotion and salary increase, but if it is lost, I am afraid that her work is not guaranteed.

Now the manager came over and handed Chen Mo, the guest, to the manager. She talked that she had rewards, lost talks, and had nothing to do with her.

"Mr. Chen, hello, I am the manager of the Shili Red Makeup Branch. I am sorry to hear from you." Liang Jing saw Chen Mo, and his heart was overjoyed and hurriedly greeted him: "Mr. Chen is going to consult you and Ms. Xiaoyu's wedding. The matter? You only need to make a call, we will find you in the first time, no need to bother you personally."

"No trouble, I don't really like what time to book."

Chen Mo and Liang Jing shook hands.

Seeing that Chen Mo does not have the shelves of those big people, Liang Jing relaxes a lot. Going to the sofa opposite Chen Mo, he still has a standard smile on his face.

"Mr. Chen, our company has the most mature wedding planning team, has hosted a lot of weddings and banquets for wealthy people and stars. For your different needs, we have a variety of different planning solutions to ensure your satisfaction."

Chen Mo pointed to Sun Lili: "These, the lady just said, don't need to introduce these."

"That, I don't know what Mr. Chen has for your wedding with your fiancee?"

Liang Jing is also nonsense, open the door and enter the theme. According to her ability to observe and observe things over the years, she can see that Chen Mo does not like to talk too much.

"My request is quite special. I don't know for a moment." Chen Mo took a u disk from his pocket and handed it to Liang Jing: "The specific content is in the u disk. If you can follow the requirements, plan a A viable solution, our wedding will be handed over to your company for planning."

"Where, we will ask the planning team of the head office to plan." Liang Jing excitedly took the u disk in the hands of Chen Mo: "I don't know when Mr. Chen's wedding date is? Is it urgent?"

"There are still half a month."

"Then we will plan your plan the day after tomorrow. Mr. Chen, do you have other needs? For example, wedding photos and wedding dress customization? We have the most extensive wedding photography team here, and also cooperate with internationally renowned wedding design companies. These are the highest-end wedding dresses of our company."

Liang Jing took the album from Zhang Lili and handed it to Chen Mo. Above are some wedding dresses, as well as wedding photos.

"We have all the wedding dresses and dresses, we have to confirm the wedding photos." Chen Mo took the album and looked at it.

"Well. What else does Mr. Chen need to know?"

Chen Mo thought for a moment and shook his head: "There is nothing else, wait until your plan is out and talk about it."

“Well, we will give the plan with the fastest speed.”

Liang Jing nodded quickly.

This is a trivial matter. If you successfully take the list of Chen Mo's wedding preparations, you will definitely make their company the top wedding company in China, with real fame and fortune.

Sending Chen Mo and Xiao Yu, Liang Jing was excited, and said nothing, the first time dialing the phone number of the head office.

chapters.title: Chapter 381: : Is This Still A Wedding?
chapters.body:
Chapter 381: : Is This Still A Wedding?

Donghai City, Shili Red Makeup Headquarters.

Zhong Xu is writing a planning plan. As the top ceremony planning company in China, they are well-known in the industry. The banquets of wealthy people and the wedding of celebrity artists will find them.

The case in his hands now is a wedding plan for a second-line star.

For this matter, he wants to break his brain.

After all, those celebrity artists have too high demands on the wedding and demand perfection. I want to borrow wedding topics, increase their visibility and traffic, and expand their network.

So the case was a bit of a hassle. After a few changes, the other party was still not satisfied. He had to start from scratch.

"Sir, Bai He assistant is on the phone!"

The prompt of the intelligent assistant interrupted Zhong Xu’s thoughts.

At this time, the assistant to the general manager calls, the boss looks for him? Zhong Xu was full of doubts, or connected to the phone: "White assistant, something?"

"The boss informed that the heads of all the planning teams of the company immediately put down their work, went to the conference room, and had an emergency meeting." At the end of the phone, Bai He’s voice was a little trembling, not knowing whether it was excitement or other reasons.

"Oh? Good, go right now." Zhong Xu eyebrows pick one.

This is the first time that an emergency meeting is held.

Entering the conference room, Zhong Xu found that the other people had arrived, and the general manager sat in the first place and hurried to sit down in an empty seat.

Li Zhiyong is a bit excited at the moment, and a little worried.

Liang Jing of Binhai City just sent back a good news to him.

Chen Mo, a marching ant company, and his fiancee are preparing for a wedding and need a planning plan. If the plan makes him satisfied, their company can host Chen Mo's wedding.

However, Chen Mo’s request for Chen Mo’s request made his excitement cool by three points. Even if they are famous wedding planning companies in China, in the face of Chen Mo’s request, there is still no bottom.

He managed the wedding company for so many years, and this is the first time I saw it.

"People are all there, then I will talk about the content of the meeting." Li Zhiyong cleared his throat and said: "Today, the branch of Binhai City called, they received a case to plan the wedding of Chen Mo, the founder of the marching ant company. ”

"Hey..."

In the conference room, there was an uproar, and then everyone was ecstatic. Received the planning of Chen Mo's wedding, this is definitely a big case.

"Don't be too happy first."

Li Zhiyong knocked on the table and the meeting room was quiet.

"Chen Mo's request is a bit special. You should first look at the content he requested, and make a feasible plan with the fastest speed. The plan makes Chen Mo satisfied, we can get the right to organize the Chen Mo wedding, the program did not meet the requirements, We will give this opportunity to the opponent."

“What is Chen Mo’s request?” asked a director next to him.

"Before you look, I remind you that the content is kept secret, don't divulge it, or our company's reputation will be ruined. Chen Mo is dissatisfied, all of you have to be unemployed, and the company suffers."

Li Zhiyong snorted and asked the assistant to open the files on the computer desktop.

There is a short video and a document on the file.

At the moment when the short video was opened, everyone in the conference room was shocked. Is this still a wedding? Is this a technology conference?

Large holographic projector.

The marching ant company already has a large holographic projector? They have never heard of it, it seems that it did not appear on the market, and I did not expect to use it at the wedding.

And what about the wedding dress?

Such a fantastic wedding dress, so that the female planner in the conference room can not cover the marvel. The perfect wedding dress, they have never seen such a beautiful wedding dress, this is the first time I saw it.

This is not a wedding, it is simply a feast of technology. The only people in the conference room came up with the only idea.

These two technologies alone prove the horror of the scientific and technological strength of the marching ant company, which makes people scalp numb. These two technologies, even if they are one of them, are worth a hundred times higher than his company.

Technology that has never been available, used for the first time at a wedding.

How terrible is Chen Mo?

I want to use these technologies to create an unparalleled wedding, a grand and romantic scene. Holographic images are already there, but implementation needs to be coordinated. They have never planned a similar scene, which is beyond their scope.

The requirements of this wedding have surpassed any wedding they have planned. The grand scene, the gorgeous technology, each one is the focus, but also highlight the protagonist position of the newcomer. If they are not strong enough, they can't express that scene and they will become imperfect.

"This is Chen Mo's request, this wedding planning, what do you think? Can you come up with an implementation plan?" Li Zhiyong asked.

The meeting room was silent, everyone was quiet and head down.

They have never planned or directed a similar wedding, which is unique. The scene that Chen Mo needs, they can't host and direct the director. If they mess up and mess up Chen Mo's wedding, they will be completely finished.

"Nobody can do it?" Li Zhiyong hit the table with a pen and looked serious.

Everyone looked at each other but did not volunteer. Now is not the time to volunteer, it is messed up, and their work is gone.

Two minutes later, Zhong Xu hesitated to raise his hand.

"General Li, I am afraid that our ability is not competent, but I have an idea."

"Talk." Li Zhiyong looked at Zhong Xu.

"Chen Mo's wedding has gone beyond the general meaning of the wedding. We can ask the big director to help direct the director's wedding. They have the experience of directing the large-scale ceremony program, and our company assists and matches.

Providing to those directors a chance to know Chen Mo, our company will harvest the fruits of this wedding success, gain popularity and win-win. And the ability to participate in Chen Mo's wedding is definitely a big man, so a good platform to expand the network, those big directors should not miss this opportunity. ”

Li Zhiyong has a bit of a move, their company can prepare for the wedding of the big star, after all, it is within the normal range. But Chen Mo’s wedding has already surpassed their cognition, unprecedented. A director who must have seen a big scene can be competent: "Which director should I please?"

"The directors have been very large in the program, and they are well-known in China. They don't necessarily have time, and they don't necessarily agree. You have to call them to contact them." Zhong Xu said.

Li Zhiyong nodded. At present, this is indeed a relatively good method, but it must be contacted now. They must use the fastest speed to give Chen Mo a plan.

"Then go back first, think about whether there are other executable methods. Give me a reply before tomorrow morning.

Back at the office, Li Zhiyong began to find the contact information of the big directors. Because they have done some star weddings, and have seen some big stars, it is not difficult to get to the contact information of the big directors.

......

Chen Mo went to three wedding companies that they were interested in, and also told the other party that as long as they can come up with a feasible plan, which company the wedding sponsorship belongs to.

After confirming the wedding company, the preparations for the wedding can be handed over to them, and he does not have to worry too much.

But there is still a problem now, that is, the issue of wedding photos. Chen Mo was thinking, going back tonight, would you like to invite a famous photographer to come and give them a wedding photo.

"Brother, this is delicious for you."

Chen Mo’s thoughts were interrupted by the scream of Xiao Man’s excitement. I saw Xiao Yu and Xiao Man’s hands carrying two boxes of cuttlefish pills.

Now a few people are on the lively pedestrian street, surrounded by lively people.

"Sister-in-law, it is impossible for someone to stare at your face all the time. It may not be recognized at first sight. Also, when people eat, it is the ugliest, you still wear glasses, others will definitely not recognize it. You." Xiaoman laughed.

"..."

Xiao Yu, who was eating fish **** next to him, looked at Xiao Man without a word.

Chen Mo also had no choice but to talk about Xiao Man’s words. He took off his mask and took the squid pill from the small fisherman.

In addition to being photographed last time, Xiaoyu is rarely exposed, so he is not worried about being recognized. But he is different, and moving is his big news.

He accompanied Xiaoyu in the lively streets, and he used masks and eyes to carry out simple camouflage. Otherwise, he would be seen as a giant panda baby, and he would be chased for photos. Personal safety is also one thing. After all, for him. It is not twice a time.

"Brother, there is a photography shop over there, there are art photos and wedding photos, why not go and see?"

Xiao Man sat in satisfaction with the squid pill, and suddenly saw the photo shop next to it. Now Chen Mo and Xiao Yu want to take a wedding photo, even if Chen Mo will not shoot at this house, it doesn't matter.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded and took the hand of Xiao Yu and walked over.

chapters.title: Chapter 382: : Previous Photos
chapters.body:
Chapter 382: : Previous Photos

"Welcome, handsome guys want to take an art photo?" Chen Mo and Xiao Yu Xiao Man just entered the photography point, a handsome girl looked up and smiled at the three.

Chen Mo, who feels wearing glasses, is a bit familiar. When he doesn't dare to stare at him, it is rude.

"Let's take a look." Chen Mo politely nodded to the handsome girl.

"Okay." The girl showed a slight smile, not asking. There weren't many guests on the field, only two young girls, but the attention was on the wall of the photo shop.

"Brother, you look at it. These photos are so interesting. Every photo has a small poem on it." Xiao Man took two of the pictures on the wall and found the little poem behind the photo, just like discovering the New World.

The little poem is handwritten, and the font is an artistic one. The poetry of the poems just fits the picture of the photos. Although these poems are not handed down, they have the taste of tea.

There are a lot of photos on the list, there are hundreds of pictures, all of them are street shots. It seems to be inspirational and easy to shoot. It is very natural and artistic.

There are laughter from the old man, crying from the child, a couple who are shopping, a bird under the rain curtain, or a grass, all kinds of, each one is very delicate, and there is a small poem behind.

“Our boss is a photography enthusiast and poetry lover. I usually like to capture some scenes that make him inspiration, and then write a small poem behind the photo and put it on the wall of the store for the guests to enjoy.

If you like, you can take two photos to the donation box and take the photo. After removing the cost of washing the photos, our boss will donate all the remaining money to the charity, and each person can only buy one. ”

The beautiful girl saw Chen Mo’s likes, and said.

"This is quite creative." Chen Mo picked up a photo and looked at it. He did see a small poem above.

"Brother, you see that photo, you and my sister's computer desktop and mobile wallpaper." Xiao Man pointed to the most conspicuous position above the photo shop, was framed by a photo frame, hanging a photo on the wall.

The photo is a lover who kisses under the night light. The night is dark and I can't see the couple's appearance. The movements of the two people are very natural under the support of the night, and the shyness and sweetness between the lovers overflows, which is very infectious.

This photo, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu are familiar.

This was captured by a photography enthusiast when Chen Mo took away the first kiss of Xiao Yu. The photographer also asked for their opinion that they would take part in the photo contest. At the time, they couldn’t recognize their appearance, and he didn’t mind.

"This photo is also your boss?" Chen Mo asked at the photo frame.

"That is the most proud work of our boss. The name is "Luminous". This is the last time he participated in the National Photo Contest. When I went out to find inspiration, I captured this scene. This photo, I got the National Photo Contest. Gold award.

At that time, the photography contest was based on the theme of "love", with family, friendship, love and other classifications. This is a love gold award, very artistic. ”

The beautiful girl saw Chen Mo interested in the photo. Anyway, if there is no guest for the time being, she is proud to introduce it to Chen Mo. After all, the National Photo Contest Gold Award, only a few in the country, also shows that their boss's photo skills are still very good.

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu were also a little surprised. The photographer told him that he had already entered the photo contest, but he did not expect to win the gold medal in the final.

“Is the copyright sold? I want to buy the copyright for this photo.”

"There are quite a few people looking for a photo of the boss to use for publicity, but the copyright of other photos is sold. The copyright of this photo, he has been reluctant to sell." Hearing Chen Mo to buy copyright, the girl is a little surprised: "I help you Call the boss, he is now estimated to find inspiration in the street, you personally told him."

The Qingxiu girl took out her mobile phone, dialed a number, and rang a few times. After the opposite refused to connect, the Qingxiu girl also knew that the boss had received his call, and several people began to wait.

"Sister, you and your sister like this photo, I know, why do you want to buy copyright?" Xiaoman curiously asked.

She has seen it many times. Chen Mo and Xiao Yu’s mobile phones and computers are on the desktop. This is the photo that she just saw when she saw this photo. Now, when Chen Mo wants to buy copyright, I don’t understand it.

"Wait to tell you later." Xiao Yu also opened.

This is a photo of Chen Mo who took her first kiss. It is very memorable. Now I think about the mood when my first kiss was taken away. Xiao Yu’s heart is a bit shy and a little sweet.

"There are stories, there are sorrows." Xiao Man saw the appearance of Xiao Yu, and immediately knew that there was a story inside.

Two minutes later, a young man walked into the photo shop, dressed in a plaid shirt, with a small plaque on his back, a beard, a pair of black-rimmed glasses, and a camera on his neck that looked like an artist. taste.

"Qiao Qi, are these three people taking pictures?"

Liang Zhihang looked at Chen Mo, and there was a small fish next to it. When he saw the two, he had a sense of familiarity, but he couldn’t remember where he had seen it.

"The boss, this gentleman wants to buy the copyright of the "Night Light", I will inform you back." Qingxiu girl explained.

"Buy the copyright of "Night Light"?" Liang Zhihang shook his head directly and refused to say: "Sorry, handsome guy. The copyright of this "Luminous" will not be sold."

"Oh? Why not sell?"

"The situation at that time was a bit special. I didn't agree with the couple's consent, although I later asked them to agree to let me take photos to participate in the photo contest, but I can't privately make a profit. This is disrespect for them. Moreover, this is the perfect piece of work that I feel is not sold."

"100,000."

Chen Mo gives a price.

When I heard this price, the girls were scared. A photo of 100,000, this is the price that I can't even think about.

Liang Zhihang was also shocked by the price of Chen Mo. In the end, he still shook his head: "Mr., it is not a question of money, it is a matter of principle."

Seeing that Liang Zhihang was unmoved, Chen Mo was a little surprised, but he admired the other side. After all, there were not many people who insisted on the principle. However, if you think about selling photos and collecting donations, it means that people in front of you are still a bit interesting.

"The protagonist of this photo wants to buy the copyright, are you willing to sell it?"

"What do you mean?" Liang Zhihang glanced at him and saw Chen Mo.

"It is what you understand." Chen Mo took the hand of Xiao Yu, took off his glasses, and smiled at Liang Zhihang.

"Chen Mo?"

Liang Zhihang saw Chen Mo take off his glasses and immediately recognized it. This face, often appearing in the news, is definitely more famous than the mayor in Binhai.

Just now he just felt familiar, and appeared on such an ordinary pedestrian street, and did not think about Chen Mo.

"How are you here?"

"I was thinking about strolling around, I didn't expect to see this photo. Did you forget the situation when you took this photo?" Chen Mo pointed to the photo frame on the wall.

Liang Zhihang looked at the photos, and then looked at the two people carefully, and suddenly recalled the situation that captured the photo that night. For a long time, he didn't mean to remember the two people at the beginning. Now think back, it seems that the couple who took the shot at the beginning slowly overlap with the two people in front of them.

God? what did I do? When Chen Mo was in love and kissed, I was caught by it.

Liang Zhihang did not know how to describe his feelings. The protagonist of his favorite photo is already the famous Chen Mo, but he does not know, no wonder he will feel familiar.

"Can copyright be sold?"

"Well, the copyright is free to you. I did not expect that the captured people will be the big guys in the future." Liang Zhihang no longer insisted.

“Is this photo shop yours?” Chen Mo asked when Liang Zhihang went to mention photo copyright information.

"Yes, photography and writing poetry are my only two hobbies. I have a photography store without other skills. At the same time, I love work, and enjoy it." Liang Zhihang said.

"Husband, it is better to ask him to take a wedding photo for us. It is also a rare fate." Xiao Yu went to Chen Mo and said.

Chen Mozheng had this intention, but did not expect Xiaoyu to come up.

After a long time, Liang Zhihang gave the photo of the license agreement and the original photo of the photo to Chen Mo. The permanent copyright of the photo was owned by Chen Mo.

"In the future, this photo was renamed "The Silent Fish."" Chen Mo handed the license agreement to Xiaoyu. "How much is your bank account? I will give you a royalty."

"No, I said that free is free. After all, I was also embarrassed at the beginning. I didn't think that the person I used to capture was actually a legend, and my photo also got a gold medal. When I said this, I felt magical."

Liang Zhihang said half a joke.

Chen Mo did not insist on it. This Liang Zhihang character is indeed strange and has his own principles.

"I and Xiaoyu are going to hold a wedding. Now I am going to take a wedding photo. We are also interested. I want to invite you to help us take a wedding photo. Can you?" Chen Mo asked.

"Mr. Chen, don't you invite a more powerful photographer to help you shoot?" Liang Zhihang asked in surprise. Chen Mo’s current identity, I would like to ask any famous photographer to come, he is just an unknown photographer.

"The star wedding photos taken by famous photographers are not much different from those of ordinary people. Besides, please don't come." Chen Mo laughed.

"Yes, I picked up this business." Liang Zhihang did not re-enter the feelings, and readily agreed to give Chen Mo a wedding photo, which is also an honor.

"When is it free, I let the driver come to pick you up?" Chen Mo asked.

"Tomorrow, I am ready to prepare today."

"Okay, then I will let the driver pick you up tomorrow." Chen Mo nodded. "I took this photo, I took it away?"

"Yes." Liang Zhihang did not give up.

After Chen Mo left, Liang Zhihang still felt magical. At first, I grabbed it and I didn't expect this kind of surprise coincidence.

"Boss, do you know Chen Mo?" Qingxiu girl was surprised to see her boss, feeling the first time to know the literary ‘uncle’ boss.

Just now, the legendary man Chen Mo of Binhai City actually talked and laughed with his boss.

"The protagonist of the photo just now is him and his fiancée. They were captured by me when I first caught it. I just thought about it."

Liang Zhihang walked into the photography store, leaving a beautiful girl with a stunned look.

"Brother, why do you have to buy this photo?" Xiao Man took a photo frame and looked at it. He didn't find any secrets about the photo.

"Ask your sister." Chen Mo did not answer.
