"Sister, let me say quickly." Xiao Man can't wait to see Xiao Yu. She did not hear the conversation between Chen Mo and Liang Zhihang just now, so it is still unknown.

"The hero above is us. It was my first kiss. I was caught by him at the time." Xiaoyu said with some shame.

“0o0” is quite stunned: “You kissed in public on the seawall? What is the feeling of the first kiss?”

"..."

chapters.title: Chapter 383: : Zhang Fengyun Was Invited
chapters.body:
Chapter 383: : Zhang Fengyun Was Invited

"The murderousness of Baili's eyes is particularly strong. This drama is killing. In your eyes, there must be a kind of murderousness that puts your opponent to death. Killing him is your desperate goal..."

On a deserted Gobi, a middle-aged man with a gray cap is teaching the actors. No one on the field dares to speak, it is a portrait of Dun Dun.

The middle-aged man is the famous domestic director Zhang Fengyun. Although he is nearly seventy years old, his body is still tough and he seems to be only in his fifties. On the qualifications, he is an internationally famous big director, actor, screenwriter, and well-deserved old man in the domestic film industry.

The opening ceremony of the international large-scale sports events and international forums held in China are all from his hands. The scenes of the opening ceremony of each event are full of people's hearts, and also show the charm of China to the world.

On the control of visual effects and big scenes, there are only a handful of them.

In addition to being good at war films, he is also good at shooting martial arts dramas and literary films. It is such a large number of award-winning directors who still maintain a consistent low-key, quietly preparing new plays and constantly cultivating new actors.

This unique style is also the reason why many actors respect.

"Now ready to continue..."

"Zhang Dao, there is a call to find you." Just as Zhang Fengyun was preparing to shoot, the assistant ran over with a holographic mobile phone.

"who?"

"Unfamiliar phone call, he said that Li Zhiyong, the general manager of Shili Red Makeup Company, wants to cooperate with you once, and Shili Red Makeup is a famous wedding company in China."

"We are looking for me at the wedding company? You should take a break and familiarize yourself with the lines and think about how your character's character should be expressed." Zhang Fengyun frowned and took the phone.

The mobile phone on the assistant's hand is his work number. Generally speaking, this phone is a friend at work. The other party calls to find him to cooperate, and refuses without saying anything. It is a bit bad.

"Hello, I am Zhang Fengyun." Zhang Fengyun said over the phone.

"Zhang Dao, hello, I am Li Zhiyong, the general manager of Shili Red Makeup Company. There is one thing I want to work with. It is a bit anxious and I don't know where you are, so I can only contact you by phone."

"Oh? What?" asked Zhang Fengyun.

"There is a special person who wants to hold a wedding. The ceremony requirements are a bit high. Our company is afraid that we can't control the scene and need a director to help. Don't hang up the phone, listen to me."

Li Zhiyong was afraid that Zhang Fengyun would hang up the phone because he had not finished the previous two times. When the other party heard that he was going to direct the wedding, he hanged directly.

"Well, you said." Zhang Fengyun said.

A wedding company asked him to give this director a director's wedding. He was not interested in this kind of thing. However, since the general manager of the other party called, he was also a famous wedding company in China, and he was not good enough to hang up out of courtesy.

"The identity of this big man, wait for Zhang director to be able to guess, I will not say it for a while. I can send you a short video with his request for the wedding, you spend a few minutes watching the short video, if you don't want If you cooperate, just send me a text message, because things are a little urgent." Li Zhiyong said.

"Good. The mailbox is..." Zhang Fengyun informed Li Zhiyong of his email address.

"I have sent it, Zhang Dao, trouble the content of your short video, don't expose it, we have the obligation to keep confidential here, otherwise you and I will have trouble." Li Zhiyong reminded.

"This will be." Zhang Fengfeng hang up the phone, let the assistant find the notebook to log in.

He wants to see, in the end what wedding, the famous domestic wedding company is afraid to direct, need to ask him. Let him direct the wedding, there is a feeling of killing chicken with a knife.

However, Li Zhiyong’s identity as a special person has made him a little curious.

Open the mailbox, and I saw an email signed by Li Zhiyong. Did not think too much, Zhang Fengyun directly download files to open short videos.

At the moment when the video was opened, Zhang Fengyun’s eyes were condensed and somewhat surprised. He has seen big scenes and directed a very large ceremony, so that he will not be surprised by too much.

"Zhang Dao, the scene of this video is a special effect synthesis?" The assistant next to it shocked the computer screen.

"A very interesting thing that opened up the new world."

Zhang Fengyun stared at the computer screen carefully, for fear of missing any details. Although his film has many special effects, he is the first time he sees this.

“Large holographic projectors? There are also wedding dresses that will change color? Zhang Dao, the marching ant company has not released large holographic projectors. There is no such technology yet. Is this a special effect synthesis?”

The assistant is still unbelievable.

A large holographic projector projecting nearly 30 meters, even the ant company that released the holographic projector, did not launch this product. There are also wedding dresses that will change color, I have never heard of it.

When I heard the assistant say that the army ant company, Zhang Fengyun guessed a little about who Li Zhiyong said, and thought about it and turned off the finished video.

"You go to work first, this video, don't disclose it." Zhang Fengyun is serious.

"Good." The assistant did not say much, turned and left.

Zhang Fengyun picked up his mobile phone again and dialed Li Zhiyong’s phone.

"Zhang Dao, have you finished reading? Are you interested?" Li Zhiyong opened the phone and asked.

"The person you are talking about is Chen Mo of the marching ant company?"

"Zhang Dao really can guess, is the wedding of Chen Mo, the founder of the marching ant company."

really.

Zhang Fengyun’s heart.

Can play these epoch-making high-tech as a toy, and the world is only the kind of strength that Chen Mo has.

Although he is a big man, as a big director, he has directed many opening ceremony of international events held in China, and he has been in contact with many high-tech products.

"Zhang Dao, our company is fortunate to get this case, Chen Mo said that a feasible implementation plan is needed before the case will be given to us. Our company's planning, can not control the scene, so I am ready to help you.

We will introduce you to Mr. Chen Mo, who will direct the wedding, our company will help, maybe Chen Mo will agree, how do you see it? This is a century of big marriage, but also a good opportunity to know Chen Mo. ”

I have to say that he has some heart. It is not the identity of Chen Mo, but this large holographic projector.

This large holographic projector allows him to see new possibilities for filming. Just as he has a large iP on his hand, he needs that special big scene, and there is a large holographic projector that can definitely express the big iP.

After the medium holographic projector of the marching ant company came out, he always paid attention to it. Holographic technology has given the film a new possibility. It is quite the same time that "Avatar" entered the era of bringing movies into the 3D era. Holographic technology can make movies enter the holographic era.

Although holographic projectors are popular, holographic movies are not. They are short holographic advertisements and small holographic short videos.

Because the technology is unfamiliar, many directors are reluctant to try holographic movies. He always wanted to enter, but no chance, maybe this is a good opportunity.

"I have directed several large-scale events and filmed a lot of grand movies. I have never tried this director's wedding," Zhang Fengyun said.

"What does that guide mean?"

“When is the time?” Zhang Fengyun asked.

Li Zhiyong was interested in hearing about Zhang Fengyun. His heart was overjoyed: "After half a month, his wedding is likely to start from these days."

"So?"

Zhang Fengyun thought about it.

Now that I am filming, I need to make a trade-off. If I agree, it means that he will postpone the shooting time by one month. After a delay of one month, for the crew, the funds for the white flowers are burning.

However, if you can get the help of the large holographic projector of the marching ant company, you may be able to create new possibilities in the field of film, and he will also achieve new heights in the field of film.

His money for filming is not bad, but this opportunity is only once.

Zhang Fengyun does not speak, Li Zhiyong is also anxious. In his view, Zhang Fengyun is undoubtedly the best director. If he has his help, it is definitely not a problem to win Chen Mo’s wedding preparation.

"Yes, I will go back tomorrow." Zhang Fengyun finally decided.

"Then I am waiting for Zhang Dao, Zhang Dao, you go directly to Binhai City, I am waiting for you in Binhai City. When I go to see Chen Mo together." Li Zhiyong's voice concealed the joy of ignorance. This is an opportunity for the company to go further, and it is also an opportunity for him to get in touch with those big people.

Hang up the phone, Zhang Fengyun went back to the shooting scene.

"The notice goes on, the filming is paused first, and the filming task is rescheduled."

This sudden news made everyone on the field dumbfounded. The filming was well done and suddenly rescheduled, which made some people caught off guard.

"Zhang Dao, is there something wrong?" asked an actor on the field.

"I have something to do, I need to leave for a trip." Zhang Fengyun said: "I may be sorry for everyone's arrangements. I am sorry."

"Zhang Dao, don't say that." The actor immediately shook his head and expressed his understanding.

"I am here today, everyone is going to work. The specific shooting task, maybe one month later, I will inform everyone, I will say sorry to you again."

......

That night.

In the villa of the incense burner beach, Xiao Yu stayed in the wedding dress in front of the window. The creamy white wedding dress is flawless. Under the light, the small diamonds set in the wedding dress are flashing, like stars, perfect.

Because of the wedding photos to be taken tomorrow, Chen Mo has moved the wedding dress from the company's No. 1 building in the afternoon and sent it back to the villa.

Such as a dream wedding dress, this is Chen Mo tailor-made for her, belongs to her wedding dress. Every time I saw it, I couldn’t help but want to wear it. I imagine that I will wear this wedding dress to appear in the most important ceremony of my life, and declare that I belong to her favorite man. Xiao Yu’s heart is full of expectation.

"If you want to wear it, just take it out and wear it. It belongs to you." Seeing Xiao Yu’s longing eyes, Chen Mo spoke.

"Don't wear it tomorrow." Xiao Yu touched the wedding dress and said: "Thank you, husband."

She knows that Chen Mo has spent a lot of thought and energy in order to promise her wedding. She has always been clear, but she can't help, and she doesn't know how to persuade. She can only take care of this man who belongs to her with all her care.

"Thank you, I will give birth to a bunch of little babies in the future."

"How many piles is there?"

"a hundred."

"You are when I am a sow." The little fisherman slammed Chen Mo's chest and did not dare to force.

"Let you be the most beautiful bride, this is my promise to you. You are the goddess of luck given to me by God. I will not give you any more. Don't say thank you in the future. If you say these kind words, I will hit you ass. ”

"Dare to hit my ass, you will not let you go to bed."

chapters.title: Chapter 384: : Like A Chameleon
chapters.body:
Chapter 384: : Like A Chameleon

Duanmu Qing sat in the car, admiring the scenery of the incense burner beach, feeling relaxed, sitting next to her is her sister and colleague Wang Xiaona.

Both of them are the most professional stylists and make-up artists. They are image designers and often make styling and makeup for some of the stars of the filming.

Yesterday, their company asked them to come to Binhai City today, saying that they came to give a bride a wedding photo, design, and did not say who it is. In their view, it should be a star to marry, ready to secretly take a wedding photo.

While Duanmu Qing was watching the scenery outside the window, she felt that her arm was moved. When she turned her head, she found Wang Xiaona’s curious face.

"Qing Qing, you said which star is going to get married this time?"

"I don't know, I have to go there to know." Duanmu Qing shook his head. In Binhai, she couldn't think of any big star here: "What are you curious about?"

"Pure ask, at least first know which star, we can now think about which image is best for her?" Wang Xiaona said.

"That must also look at the wedding dress worn by the bride. It is useless now."

"Okay." Wang Xiaona was quiet.

Not long after, the car turned into the villa's door to stop, sitting in the driver's seat Anan opening reminded two people: "Come."

hiss……

Great villa.

Duanmu Qing and Wang Xiaona came down from the car and saw the villa in front of them, being shocked.

The villa is not a common retro style, but rather full of technology and futuristic, so stylish villas, they are the first to see. And the mountains and the water, behind the mountains, the front is the sea, the scenery is pleasant, the location is not very remote.

"Green sister, you see there are two robots standing in the station, marching ant company robots." Wang Xiaona pointed to the robot in charge of security in the distance.

"Handsome guy, take the liberty to ask, is your boss?" Duanmu Qing asked Annan to ask.

"Our boss is Chen Mo." Anan did not hide, and there is no need to hide.

"Chen... Chen Mo?" Wang Xiaona blinked, unbelievable. In the coastal city called Chen Mo, living in such a smart mansion, I am afraid there is only one person: "Why didn't you tell us?"

"You didn't ask." Anan answered directly.

"Ok."

Duanmu Qing did not ask much, followed by Anan, and looked curiously. This is Chen Hao’s mansion, but this is the first time I have seen it. So big, you can enter the realm of world-class luxury homes, and sure enough people will enjoy life.

Not long after, the two followed behind Anan and entered the lobby.

Chen Mo was playing the game in the hall. When he saw Anan coming in with two people, he put down the gamepad and said hello to the two people: "Hello, is the makeup artist of Linglong Studio?"

"Yes, Mr. Chen, my name is Duanmu Qing."

"My name is Wang Xiaona."

The two met Chen Mo and hurriedly said hello. Secretly watching Chen Mo a few eyes, this is a legend, the first time I saw so close, younger than them. And still playing games, it seems no different from ordinary peers.

"Don't be too restrained, just do it, I don't want to eat anyone." Chen Mo saw that they were a little nervous, but smiled helplessly: "Xiaoyu is upstairs, remember to help me dress her as the most beautiful bride."

"We will do our best." The two will have nothing to do with Chen Mo, and relax a lot.

"I will not delay the time, Anan, take them up."

"it is good."

Anan nodded and led the two upstairs. Just arrived at the door of the room, and the white pearl opened the door and looked at a few people.

“This is a makeup artist and a stylist,” Anan said.

"Okay, please."

The white pearl nodded, letting the door lead the two into the room, and Anan turned and went downstairs.

The room is a large suite, there is a small hall, after all, wide, a few people did not feel crowded. In addition to white pearls, there is a robot in the small hall.

"Miss Xiaoyu is changing her wedding dress. Please wait a moment, what kind of drink do you need?" White Pearl asked.

"No, give us a glass of water." Duan Muqing said, then pointed to the dressing table in the small hall: "Is this cosmetics? Can we have a look?"

"Yes." White Pearl nodded: "You can do it casually, don't be too restrained."

Duanmu Qing and Wang Xiaona went to the dressing table and saw the cosmetics on the dressing table, and the eyelids jumped straight. They are engaged in this line, the cosmetics above, they are familiar, but they are the world's top makeup brands, each of which is expensive. A lipstick will cost them a month's salary.

However, it is still calm, to make stars, high-end cosmetics, they have also been in contact with a lot. Chen Mo’s fiancee, using these high-end cosmetics, is not unusual.

But these cosmetics are brand new and make them a bit confusing.

"This is brand new, can we open it and see?" Duanmu Qing asked at the dressing table.

"You are makeup artists. These are up to you and can be opened."

When the two were familiar with cosmetics, Xiao Yu also changed the wedding dress in the room, Xiao Man is helping. Seeing the little fishing in the wedding dress, the little man looks with joy and envy. Happy because the person in front of her is her sister, envy is because her sister has found someone who loves her the most for the rest of her life.

"Sister, wait for the wedding day, your bride will definitely be stunning, it's beautiful."

She is not the first time to see this wedding dress. Every time I see it, I still feel amazing. Especially after the small fish is put on, it completely sets off the perfect body and temperament of Xiaoyu, which is the unique wedding dress for Xiaoyu.

"Yeah." Xiao Yu looked at himself in the mirror, his heart was very sweet: "The makeup artist and the stylist are coming, let's go out and make up, don't delay shooting wedding photos."

Now only one makeup is made and everything is ready.

When Duanmu Qing and Wang Xiaona were concentrating on checking cosmetics, the door of the room suddenly opened. The two stopped subconsciously and looked at the door.

When Xiaoyu wore a wedding dress, the two completely caught.

The wedding dress is flawless, and the unique skirt is like the tail of a mermaid. It is held in the hands of a small fish. Under the light of the room, the wedding dress emits a faint glow, like a dream.

Such a perfect wedding dress, did not steal the limelight of the small fishing, but completely outline the small fisherman's natural body, perfectly expressing the noble and elegant temperament of Xiao Yu.

It’s not perfect for one point and one point. Now it’s just right. At this time, the small fish is noble and elegant, like a pure ice phoenix.

What a nice view.

All the adjectives in the minds of the two people make up two words.

"How are you."

See the two people worry, Xiao Yu smiled and said hello.

"Hello." Duan Muqing and Wang Xiaona returned to God and hurriedly said hello.

chameleon? ?

Seeing Chen Mo’s huge mansion, even if Liang Zhihang and Qiao Qi were prepared, they were secretly screaming. There are dozens of acres of large mansions, pastures and beaches. It is definitely a world-class mansion.

Under the leadership of the Black Hawk, the two also came to the meeting hall.

"It’s enough to follow my own personal shooting ideas, but there are certainly no conditions for the big stars to shoot magazines in the studio."

chapters.body:

"Sister, do you want to see your brother-in-law quickly?" Xiaoman asked near Xiaoyu.

The little fisherman who was poked into his mind, tapped on Xiao Man’s head and looked at himself in the mirror. The smile is self-evident.

Women are pleasing to others.

Chen Mo is her only buddy.

"Let's go out, the photographer should be waiting for us." Xiaoyu said.

White Pearl hurriedly walked over to open the door, and Xiao Man also carefully helped Xiao Yu with the wedding dress skirt, and several people slowly walked out of the room.

Sitting next to Liang Zhihang, Qiao Qi’s eyes are on Xiao Yu, admiring and admiring. Liang Zhihang next to it also agreed to nod, grabbed the camera at the small fishing, and snapped it.

Now the small fishing, let Chen Mo look at it. The sweet and elegant appearance of Xiao Yu makes him feel that all the preparations are worthwhile.

"How?" Xiao Yu looked forward to ask.

"gorgeous."

"Ok."

I was praised by Chen Mo, and Xiao Yu’s heart was sweet as honey, and I felt that this moment was the happiest person. The compliments of other people are not important. Chen Mo likes it. It is the most important thing for her. The simple two words are enough.

"Sister, my sister is ready. What about you?" Xiaoman said at the right time.

"My soon." Chen Mo turned to look at Duanmu Qing: "It’s bothering you."

"No trouble."

The two hurriedly waved their hands and followed Chen Mo into the room.

In less than ten minutes, Chen Mo came out of the room. The hairstyle has been sorted out, wearing a long dress with a swallowtail, and the whole person's temperament has become graceful. The design style of the swallowtail long suit is the same as that of the small fishing bridal, obviously a pair.

"So fast? Don't be handsome?" Xiao Man was surprised to see Chen Mo.

"I don't have to make up my makeup. It's almost like getting a haircut. I don't know how handsome it is. It doesn't matter if my bride is pretty." Chen Mo went to Xiaoyu and said.

"loquacious."

Xiao Yu smiled sweetly and reached out to Chen Mo to organize the bow tie. Everything was very natural. Just like Chen Mo went to work before going to work, he arranged clothes for him.

Seeing Xiao Yu’s natural movements, Liang Zhihang’s eyes lit up and he hurriedly grabbed the camera in his hand to focus on the two and set the scene. Liang Zhihang checked the photos taken and was very satisfied with the snapshots he had just taken. It was a rare photo.

The expression of a person, in the state of natural performance, is the most beautiful and most spiritual, and this is not possible.

The intimate movements of the two people, just like the daily little wife tidying up her clothes for her husband, the natural and intimate feelings that are revealed between each other are absolutely impossible to show.

Xiao Yu did not know that her habitual action was photographed by Liang Zhihang, and after finishing Chen Hao’s bow tie, she looked at them.

"You can go to shoot now." Chen Mo said to Liang Zhihang: "Right, before shooting, there is a scene that tells you in advance that you can design a wedding photo."

Chen Mo made a snap, and the dark red light of the rose from the holographic projector in the lobby of the meeting gathered on the small fisherman. During the time, the wedding dress on the small fisherman, the dark red slowly invaded and spread, until the whole wedding dress became a deep rose red.

Duanmu Qing and Wang Xiaona are quite calm, but they are also amazed. But look at the small fishing, with a change in the color of the wedding dress.

The white wedding dress just now, on the small fisherman, the small fishing is like a noble ice phoenix, and it is like an inspiring elf. Now the deep rose red, bright and not demon, like the flowers in the rose sea, noble and glamorous.

After adjusting the shock of his heart, Liang Zhihang also returned to God: "Can the wedding dress be partially transformed into a pattern?"

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

"Perfect, it is God's artwork. The person who designed this wedding dress must be a genius." Liang Zhihang was excited.

"..."

Xiao Yu smiled sweetly and looked at Chen Mo’s eyes with pride, as if to praise himself.

"I have a new inspiration, come to a set of themed wedding photos. They are the wood elves, the flower fairy, the water mermaid, the mountain goddess. This dusty atmosphere can be perfectly expressed." Liang Zhihang wondered, can The discolored wedding dress means that there are countless possibilities for wedding photos: "But some of the scenes are going to other cities, not too far, just next to Jiangzhu."

"According to your framing arrangement, other cities are fine." Chen Mo said.

The group left the meeting hall and walked towards the beach of the villa.

The weather is very good, the sea breeze is slowly, the sky is blue, the sun is covered by naughty clouds, the bottom is a cool, the sea in front of you, is also the clear sea blue.

"The skirt of the wedding dress is spread out, the bride's shoes are taken off first, and they are snuggled in the groom's arms, and their feet are close together. Yes, that's it, the wedding pattern is changed into the mermaid's scale..."

When he arrived at the shooting location, Liang Zhihang began to prepare according to his ideas.

In addition to Qiao Qi, there are also Xiao Man, White Pearl and Duan Muqing, all become assistants, and began to provide assistance in accordance with Liang Zhihang's meaning.

"Right, that's the feeling, the mermaid and her hit."

Liang Zhihang's camera is aimed at two people and presses continuous shooting.

"The next step, the groom's hand is placed on the bride's waist, the hand is a little, the position of the lower abdomen, right. The bride looks at the groom's eyes, right."

Seeing the two people who were together, Liang Zhihang felt almost nothing, touched his own beard, thought a little, suddenly flashed, and laughed.

Now it’s a pose, the movements and expressions of the two people, more or less lacking a natural feeling.

"Groom, you said to your bride that she is shy and sweet, and the whisper of the pillow, only you can hear it, don't give it to us."

Several people next to them laughed and saw the two sweet-spoken people, and they all had envy in their looks.

"Do you make you shy?" Chen Mosi asked, smiling and watching Xiaoyu: "I want to eat red (xing) fish tonight."

This is a unique love story of the two, Xiao Yu naturally understands, suddenly shy and difficult.

"No."

After Xiao Yu finished, he smiled sweetly.

Oh...

The two people's sweet confrontation was captured by Liang Zhihang's lens, and Xiaoying's smart and shy eyes were clearly recorded. Seeing the photos taken, Liang Zhihang was very satisfied and nodded. For a long time, there was no such time for inspiration, so he could not wait to write two poems.

"The next step is to go to the rose sea of the vanilla world in Jiangzhu, as well as Baimulin and Shennvfeng. Unfortunately, snow is a little troublesome, otherwise it will be perfect to have another ice snow woman."

chapters.title: Chapter 386: :Carry Out
chapters.body:
Chapter 386: :Carry Out

Jiangzhu City, adjacent to Binhai City, is a two-hour drive from downtown Binhai.

The city is built on the riverside, the seasons are like spring, the scenery is pleasant, and the developed economy, it is called the pearl of the riverside, named Jiangzhu City.

The vanilla world is one of the most famous spots in Jiangzhu City and is known as the Provence of the East.

Here is the world of flowers, there are aromatherapy gardens, rose seas, tulip gardens, etc. The gardens are nearly 100 acres, and there are various kinds of vegetable orchards and plantations, as well as cultivation bases.

Romantic scenery has become a choice for couples to travel. Every day, many new people come here to take photos and take wedding photos. It has also become the location of Liang Zhihang.

Chen Mo took the hand of Xiao Yu and carefully entered the flowers.

In front of the two, it is the most beautiful rose sea in the vanilla world. Chen Mo and the people in the scenic area contacted and were allowed to enter the most beautiful shot of the Rose Sea Center.

This season, when the rose is in full bloom, the rose is in the sea, and the red rose is blooming and looks romantic and beautiful.

Not long after, the two went to a small open space in the center of the Rose Sea.

Xiaoyu stands among them, and the rose-red wedding dress is placed in the sea of flowers by Xiaoman and others. It is integrated with Huahai, like a fairy in flowers, noble and glamorous, and plays the romance of ten-mile red makeup.

"You look at the bride, so beautiful."

"It's really beautiful, like a flower fairy."

"The wedding dress, I want it, why is the bride not me?"

There are a lot of girls around the Rose Sea. When I saw the little fisherman wearing a red wedding dress, I was amazed and envious in the look, but I could only look far away and couldn’t get close.

Chen Mo also sat in front of Xiao Yu, according to Liang Zhihang's embarrassment, such as the old man, the body of the swallowtail long suit, the color became black, the bow tie of the shirt was removed, as if the ancient side is a retro wind prodigal.

"Well, the bride stares at your groom and thinks about the feeling of heart when you first met." Liang Zhihang, holding the camera, shouted at Xiaoyu.

When I heard Liang Zhihang’s words, Xiao Yu didn’t think that when she was at the Binhai University Library, Chen Mo rushed over to her and blocked her from the fallen bookshelf.

At that time, I began to feel my heart, until I gave him everything. Thinking of this, Xiao Yu’s eyes are filled with joy, like a flower fairy.

Oh...

As the shutter sounds, the picture is fixed.

It seems that he is not satisfied. Liang Zhihang has found a few more angles to shoot a few more before putting down the camera.

The fairy in the flower is the hologram of this kind of fireworks.

Looking at his own satisfied works, Liang Zhihang is very happy. For a long time, there is no such feeling of thinking, and today's artistic cells are stimulated.

The wedding photos of others are all embraced and converted, and the framing is also the same, this time is different. This set of wedding dresses, set off the atmosphere of small fishing dust, plus special, only to make wedding photos more possible.

Unfortunately, the time is too short, Chen Mo will not bother to travel around the world to view, but this is enough. Their wedding photos are still unique.

"Well, go to the next place now." Liang Zhihang shouted at the two people.

A few people left the Rose Sea and went to the next attraction aromatherapy garden. After the framing of the vanilla world was completed, they rushed to Baimulin and Shennong Peak.

Throughout the day, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu are shooting wedding photos in accordance with Liang Zhihang's arrangement. Xiao Man and Duan Muqing and others are also closely following.

Every time a wedding dress arrives at a scene, it changes a color and pattern. Every time I see it, I can't help but marvel.

Until the evening, under the boulder of the goddess peak, in the sunset and sunset, the pictures of the two were fixed, and the wedding photos of the busy day were finally completed.

Binhai City, Lanhai Building.

A black Audi slowly stopped in the parking lot of the Blue Sea Building, the door opened, Zhang Fengyun came down from the car, wearing a signature black windbreaker, the spirit looked good, and his assistant was accompanied by him.

Yesterday, the shooting of the new drama was stopped. After the matter was arranged today, he rushed to Binhai.

Large holographic projectors have been a great help for film shooting. As long as you see Chen Mo, with the help of a large holographic projector, it will be a new starting point and opportunity for his next film creation.

Although he is a well-known domestic director and has many excellent works, in recent years, the movie blockbuster is still unsatisfactory. He also needs a groundbreaking work to give himself a proof and make his creation a new level.

Now he has a large iP in his hand, which is an opportunity.

The content and quality of this big iP are very good, and the picture described is fantastic. The popularity is very high, and there is a fan base. He only needs to present this big iP, which is definitely a good work.

Coupled with the name of the first holographic film, it is possible to surpass "Avatar" and become the starting point for another journey in the film field. He will also become the legend of the director. Because of this, he will come to Binhai City without stopping.

Li Zhiyong, who was welcoming, saw Zhang Fengyun coming down and smiled and greeted him: "Hello, Director Zhang, I finally waited for you to come over."

"Hello there."

Zhang Fengyun also politely returned to a ceremony.

"I have booked a box in the clubhouse. Director Zhang is tired of catching the plane. Let's talk while drinking." Li Zhiyong said.

"Okay, let's go."

Zhang Fengyun did not refuse, and entertainment was a common practice for him. It is most convenient to make friends like this on the wine table.

"This is written by our company's planning team. You can see the implementation plan of Chen Mo's wedding." In the box, Li Zhiyong handed out a plan from the briefcase and handed it to Zhang Fengyun.

They are also famous wedding companies in China. The planning team is absolutely not bad, so they will have today's results. It’s just that Chen Mo’s wedding is too special. In their company, the ability to execute the director is not enough to control the scene, so I just came to Zhang Fengyun.

Zhang Fengyun took over the documents of the program and began to look at it.

"You look at it first. I will call Chen Mo now and talk about what I will meet tomorrow."

Li Zhiyong dialed Chen Mo's number and waited. After a while, the phone was connected and Chen Mo's voice was heard.

"Hello there."

"Hello, Mr. Chen Mo, I am Li Zhiyong, the general manager of Shili Red Makeup." Li Zhiyong immediately reported to his home.

"Well, you said, General Li."

"This is the case, your wedding plan, our company is ready here, do not know if you have time tomorrow? In the Blue Ocean Club, we will show you the plan." Li Zhiyong said.

"Yes, then let's talk about it in detail tomorrow."

"Okay, then I will not bother you. At 10 o'clock tomorrow morning, we will wait for you at the Blue Ocean Building." The appointment was very smooth, and Li Zhiyong hung up with a happy heart.

“Is there a hurry?” In the hotel where Jiangzhu City settled, Xiaoyu looked at Chen Mo.

"The phone of the manager of Shilihong makeup said that the wedding plan came out. I will talk about it tomorrow. It is not an urgent matter." Chen Mo said: "Running for one day today, you should take a bath and rest, and return to Binhai City tomorrow morning."

"What about you?"

"I look at the email that Zhao Min sent me. The list of important partners of the company has been sent. Some friends and business partners need me to call in person and inform them to come to our wedding." Chen Mo said.

"Well, don't be too tired."

chapters.title: Chapter 387: : Zhang Fengyun'S Thoughts
chapters.body:
Chapter 387: : Zhang Fengyun'S Thoughts

Chen Mo was a little surprised to see the list of people Zhao Ming sent. There are dozens of names on the list, and they are well-known big-name figures at home and abroad. In addition, there are many CEOs of big companies.

He does not manage the company's affairs, and there are not many people he has met, but Zhao Min manages the company for him, participates in many economic forums and international conferences, and it is normal to know so many big men.

Zhao Min has already indicated to him, who needs to call in person to invite in person, and who will send invitations in the past.

Want to confirm it again, Chen Mo dialed Zhao Min's phone.

"Big boss, call me so late, do you want to ask me?" When the video call is connected, Zhao Min’s lazy voice is heard. The holographic video that jumped out is the appearance of Zhao Min wearing a pajamas mask.

"You will also apply a mask?" Seeing the appearance of Zhao Min's home, Chen Mo smiled.

"Laughter fart. My sister is now old and yellow, and I don't care for it. When Xiaosan is no one wants it." Zhao Min said with deep meaning.

“呃??” Chen Mo’s smile on his face froze, his face twitching: “You look like a girl of twenty-three, obviously young.”

Zhao Min was amused by Chen Mo's words, and he was very happy. "The younger brother hasn't seen it for two days, but his mouth is sweet. Say, what's the matter with your sister?"

“The list of guests who need a banquet, only those who have mail?” Chen Mo asked.

"Yeah, it’s too small? There are a lot of them. When some bosses come over, one person brings a female companion, but there are many people." Zhao Min lay on the sofa and said lazily: "Those people, but my sister worked hard. The hardships give you the accumulated connections. Your wedding is a good opportunity for you to expand your network. Business, contacts and resources are sometimes more important than money. You must remember to thank your sister."

"Well, what are the needs in the future, even though." Chen Mo said.

"Really?"

Zhao Min took the film below and looked at Chen Mo with a bright look.

"Really, don't be too messy." Seeing Zhao Min's appearance, Chen Mo's eyes jumped straight, and his heart was a little bottomless.

"Remember your words, my sister wrote down." Zhao Min was in a good mood and lay back on the sofa comfortably and said: "When you finish the wedding, come back for honeymoon, thank you again, Xiaoyu?"

"She is taking a shower. I just finished the wedding photo today, and I am tired enough." Chen Mo said.

"It seems that the little days are very moist." Zhao Min's voice is a bit sour: "Hang up, don't bother your love of the couple, poor me, to be alone."

"..."

Hanging up the phone, Chen Mo began to call to inform the guests. The names above are all big names in the Internet technology circle, and he has to personally inform him.

It took more than an hour to invite all the big ones Zhao Min had tossed and talked about some family members. Make sure they will come over, Chen Mo will put down the phone and get up and go back to the room.

After the notice tonight, he found that his oral English level needs to be improved.

The next day, Chen Mo rushed back to Binhai with Xiao Fisher. Xiao Man went to the school to prepare a thesis, Xiao Yu sent her to the airport, Chen Mo also went to the Blue Sea Building.

Li Zhiyong and Zhang Fengyun had already waited at the Blue Ocean Building. Seeing Chen Mo was led by the reception staff of the clubhouse and immediately greeted him.

"General Li, hello."

Chen Mo and Li Zhiyong shook hands and then saw Zhang Fengyun, some surprised. Zhang Fengyun is a big director in China. Although he does not pay attention to this aspect, he still recognizes it. I did not expect Zhang Fengyun to come with Li Zhiyong.

"Director Zhang, hello."

"I didn't expect Mr. Chen to know me. It is an honor." Zhang Fengyun smiled.

"Mr. Chen, let's sit down and talk."

Li Zhiyong greeted Chen Mo to sit down, and the accompanying personnel also sat down and began to enter the topic. He handed out the planning plan and handed it to Chen Mo to start the introduction.

"This is the case, Mr. Chen. The content you requested, our company's plan has come out. In terms of implementation, our company decided to ask Director Zhang to implement this program, and the expression will be more perfect."

"When General Li was looking for me, I was also very surprised. The day before yesterday I was filming in the crew. After seeing the video content of Mr. Chen Mo, I left the work of the crew and rushed back. I have to say, Mr. Chen. Is a romantic person." Zhang Fengyun said.

"With the addition of a director, it seems that my wedding must be no problem." Chen Mo heard Zhang Fengyun's plan to execute his wedding, a little unexpected: "But I have a problem, director Zhang will not be for me. Small wedding, just give up the new play, run back?"

“Mr. Chen is laughing.” Zhang Fengyun smiled heartily: “To tell the truth, the things in your video appeal to me. I am also an unqualified artist, and I have a special liking for these romantic things, but I really have an idea. Come back."

"Talk."

"I have a large iP in my hand, I hope to seek the help of Mr. Chen." Zhang Fengyun said.

"Oh? How can I help? Invest?"

"No, I don't want to invest, but if Mr. Chen wants to invest, I will not refuse."

"what is that?"

“I can help Mr. Chen to direct the wedding for free. I hope that Mr. Chen can rent 30 large holographic projectors from my team for new drama shooting. The price of the projector rental can be discussed in detail. Of course, even if Mr. Chen is not willing to rent I will also help you with this wedding. It is familiar with the technology in advance and may be used later."

Zhang Fengyun looked at Chen Mo with some expectation.

"You are going to replace the special effects scene with the holographic projection holographic scene?" Chen Mo immediately understood Zhang Fengyun's plan, 30 large holographic projectors, can completely create a huge holographic scene to meet the needs of shooting.

"Guess the right half, I am going to shoot the first domestic holographic film, iP needs that majestic scene and fantasy style."

Zhang Fengyun did not conceal Chen Mo and directly informed him of his ideas. After all, he would seek Chen Mo’s help.

"Large holographic projectors can satisfy the majestic special effects and create the mysterious colors. This is a holographic film, a pioneering work, I am confident that I can surpass "Avatar" and become a new world movie field. At the peak, and the holographic film came out, it is also helpful for the sales of Mr. Chen’s holographic projector.”

"Does this?" Chen Mosi thought for a moment and nodded slightly: "The product I invented was originally used. Although it has not been introduced to the market for the time being, it is entirely possible to rent it to you."

Hearing Chen Mo’s answer, Zhang Fengyun’s smile piled up the wrinkles on his face.

With a large holographic projector, he can create his own special effects scenes as he wants, and play all his imaginations as he pleases. He almost moves the fantasy world into reality. He can fully express the imagination of the sky and the sky, thus reducing Special effects costs.

This effect will be of great help to his filming.

"On the issue of renting, after the wedding, Director Zhang can contact Zhao Min, the specific details can be discussed with her." Chen Mo said.

"The clothes that can change colors? Can you rent them?"

"That can't be done. It's a brand new material. The production process is troublesome and easy to be remembered by people."

"In this case, then this is all right, just need a holographic projector, and I wish you a happy cooperation." Zhang Fengyun is in a good mood: "I will inform my team today to give Mr. Chen a wedding ceremony."

"Then trouble Zhang director."

The two people reached a cooperation, the most happy is Li Zhiyong, which means that the Chen Mo wedding will be handed over to their company to organize, which is a very rare opportunity for their company.

After talking with Zhang Fengyun, Chen Mo began to talk to Li Zhiyong about the wedding preparations.

Half an hour later, all aspects of the wedding were finalized. Chen Mo will hand over the list of guests to Li Zhiyong. After signing the cooperation agreement, the cooperation between the two parties will take effect.

chapters.title: Chapter 388: :Message
chapters.body:

Shili Red Makeup Company also used the fastest time to prepare invitations and distribute Chen Mo. Zhang Fengyun found his own team and prepared the scene of the wedding ceremony. Everything was going on step by step.

......

Zhuo Jiu is dealing with this week's entertainment.

As a professional paparazzi, the celebrity of those stars is his means of gaining traffic and eyeballs.

These photos on the computer are enough for him to break the news. If the heat is enough, the stars will take the money to buy back the photos, and he can make a fortune.

"Mr. Jiu, Ahu calls."

After the prompt of the smart assistant, the phone rings and breaks the quiet of the office. The mouse in Zhuo Jiu’s hand was picked up and picked up the phone.

"Zhuo Jiu, there are big things." There was an excited voice coming from the phone.

"Oh? What is the big material?" Zhuo Jiu asked. In the past few years, he has been able to get mixed up. The informants have helped a lot, and many headlines of entertainment news have been created by him. There are even a lot of stars who want to get rid of the popularity of the scandal and will use his hand.

"Chen Mo will hold a wedding this month and has already invited guests."

"Chen Mo's wedding?" Zhuo Jiu's eyebrows pick: "Is the message accurate? This can't be messed up. If it's fake, the marching ant company will stare at me and it will be troublesome."

"Accurate. I have heard a few gossips. Many of the big sisters have already received Chen Mo's invitation. I will send you the photo on the back of the invitation." The phone said.

"Okay, then I will grab a headline."

Zhuo Ji hangs up the phone, opens Weibo, and directly sends a dynamic picture with an invitation: See you on Wednesday. According to reliable news, the most talented and youngest in China will hold a wedding this month. Silence is gold, silence is gold, silence is gold, and important things are said three times. @行军蚁科技@微博娱乐......

"I rely, silence is gold? Is it Chen Mo?"

"Nine dogs, is it Chen Mo?"

"So obvious hints, still ask? The most talented, the youngest big sister, who else can you have in addition to Chen Mo? Didn't you see the official microblog of Aite marching ants?"

"I don't believe it, that's my husband..."

It didn't take long for Zhuo Jiugang to send the news, and the following comments were started to go crazy. In just half an hour, the amount of forwarding has reached tens of thousands, and some entertainment microblogs immediately forwarded the comments and successfully boarded the hot search list.

Chen Mo has always been the object of concern of many people. With the fermentation of this news, some people do not believe it, but it has been confirmed with the confirmation of various media from various channels.

Chen Mo will be married this month.

The news was confirmed, the entertainment media began to write crazy, and various articles reported bombing reports.

"Chen Mo married! 》

"Authoritative news: Chen Mo is about to hold a wedding, the date has been confirmed. 》

"Chen Mo will hold a wedding this month, the bride is her. 》

"Century Marriage: A woman who captures the ‘time giant’. 》

"Chen Mo is getting married, are you missing love?" 》

......

On the Internet, because of this news, a storm broke out and many people felt unbelievable.

As the world's youngest super amnesty, the legendary figure of the army ant company, Chen Mo's genius research ability and self-confidence temperament, is the idol of countless young people, is also the ideal prince of countless women, is such a man, so I am getting married soon.

You must know that the young and rich second generation is playing for thirty or even forty years old. After changing a few women and playing almost the same, they will choose a female star or a tender model who is younger than their own. However, Chen Mo is only in his twenties, and he is at the most intriguing years. No one has ever seen him and who has had an affair.

It is such a good man. Some time ago, Chen Mo and his fiancee were engaged in the engagement ring. The news of Chen Mo’s upcoming wedding is now coming. This news has made countless women dream.

"I am going to count the statistics. How many women will fall in love with this news."

"My male **** is getting married! The bride is not me."

"I lost love, the woman took my male god, so sad, hehe..."

"This is not true, I don't believe it, I want to jump off the building."

"Chen Mo, I want to marry you."

"This is the biggest tragedy of the year, and hundreds of millions of girls have lost love on the same day."

"..."

On Weibo and in the circle of friends, with the news of Chen Mo's big marriage, ‘Sorrowful and sorrowful,’ countless women forwarded the news for the first time. In addition to blessings, there were comments, and all the words were envious and hateful.

Because of the follow-up reports of various media, Chen Mo’s wedding has become an event of concern to all.

It’s not long before the wedding of Chen Mo, at this time, the island of Changqin in Binhai is being arranged in full swing.

There is a developed resort in Changqin Island. There are beaches, meadows and pleasant scenery. It is the best place for weddings, so Chen Mo’s wedding ceremony is held here. The island of this resort was also occupied by Chen Mo.

Zhang Fengyun’s team has arrived, and with the assistance of the wedding company, the final arrangement is on the grass. Just according to his design, this wedding will become an uncompromising century wedding.

"The last projector, is it better?" Zhang Fengyun, holding a small speaker, shouted at the person who installed the large holographic projector.

"nailed it."

The shouts of the installers made it easy for the entire team.

On the grass of three hundred meters, there are nearly two hundred holographic projectors, large and small. In order to meet the calculation amount of all projectors' linked projections, a large mainframe was transported directly from the marching ant company to the island, and the workload was not large.

There is still a week before the wedding, and it’s good enough for them to rehearse.

“Very good, start testing below and connect all projectors.”

"connection succeeded."

The technical staff supported by the marching ant company made a gesture to Zhang Fengyun.

“Turn off all the lights on site and get ready to play the test hologram.”

Looked at the already dark sky, Zhang Fengyun issued instructions, the light is too strong during the day, the effect of holographic projection will be relatively poor, this time is about to enter the night, is the most appropriate time, and the wedding ceremony is also this time.

His voice was a little anticipated. He was also the first to use so many holographic projectors, and the effect of two hundred holographic projectors linked to it made him look forward to it.

The prepared holographic videos are all provided by Chen Mo. Zhang Fengyun did not know how Chen Mo came to spend so much time and team to make holographic videos, but he did not go deep into the mystery of Chen Mo. After all, Chen Mo is sometimes against the common sense.

With the instructions of Zhang Fengyun, the lights went out and the surrounding environment fell into a dim light. The technician clicks on a holographic video in the computer.

Nearly two hundred holographic projectors illuminate at the same time, illuminating from the sky, the side, and the front and rear, covering the entire grass.

The next scene, shock everyone.

"Unbelievable."

chapters.title: Chapter 389: : Old Friends
chapters.body:
Chapter 389: : Old Friends

"Chen Mo's wedding guest list is exposed! 》

"Exclusive news: Chen Mo wedding ceremony venue has been confirmed! It turned out to be here"

"Internal news: Chen Mo wedding menu exposure, look at the local tyrants to eat dishes"

"The complete version of Chen Mo's wedding guest list! Stars gathering

......

As time went by, the popularity of Chen Mo’s wedding news did not diminish, but it became more and more popular. Many media are very concerned about the events held by Chen Mo's wedding, and all kinds of true and false news are transmitted through various channels.

The media copied and pasted each other, and seized the heat. The speed was very fast. Many star names were listed. People had to suspect that some people were speculating. They were quickly denied by the marching ants officially. .

There is a live broadcast platform also contacted the marching ant company, wanting to buy the full live broadcast rights of Chen Mo wedding, no accident, was directly rejected.

After Chen Mo’s exposure, the news that broke out many times was the headline of the front page, and the exposure was very high. Now it has become a super topic of quite two traffic stars.

All kinds of news media are following up on the situation of Chen Mo's wedding. Through various means, I hope to get the latest progress of Chen Mo's wedding. However, from the beginning to the end, Chen Mo did not say a word.

On the day of the big marriage, there are only two days left.

Chen Mo is looking at the book on the sofa in the living room, and from time to time reply to the chat information sent by Xiao Yu. The wedding is now almost ready. Xiaoyu has stayed with his parents to the small villa and waited for the wedding to begin.

Zhang Fengyun has already replied to him, and the scene of the wedding ceremony has been arranged. The wedding company's various matters, menus, banquets and guests staying at the hotel, and pick-up and drop-off vehicles are also ready.

Everything is arranged properly, the wedding is coming, he is mainly relaxing now, waiting for the two-day wedding day to come, to meet the small fishing back.

When Chen Mo concentrated on reading the book, the ink girl also reminded him that a guest came.

The robot led the three into the villa, which is the three old brothers of the university, Zhu Gang, Li Zilong and Pu Yuan.

I used to be tall and thin, like a bamboo pole, so the number is bamboo pole, Li Zilong is nicknamed black fat, because he likes to play games to open black, and the smallest one is Wu Puyuan, known as Puyuan master.

Look at the three people again, the appearance is not small.

I wish my height is one meter and ninety-five. I used to be tall and thin, and people are as famous. Now they are very strong and look handsome. The fat meat of the fat dragon also disappeared a lot, wearing a suit and having the appearance of a boss. Puyuan master, still thin and small, a bit sly. Trivial appearance.

Five roommates from the university, three people came. Liu De was not prepared to study abroad, and another Amin, who has a relationship with Chen Mo, went out to run the ship after graduating from college. The whole world ran around and could not be reached.

"Chen Mo Shizhu, don't come innocent." Puyuan saw Chen Mo, his hands clasped together, and he said with anger.

"Master, have you not brought the ‘female donor’ who brought you in?” Chen Mo said.

"Ah, my old man is good, and he is not a guide."

"Ha ha ha ha..."

Still familiar with the dialogue, a few people on the field laughed, long time reunion, or the same taste. Chen Mo and the three gently embraced one and led several people to the living room.

"I rely on the holographic projection of "Hero", comrades, open black."

Entering the living room, seeing the holographic projector in the living room and the "Hero" game of the computer, the fat man is excited. This game has carried a lot of happy hours in the university for four years, and is also the youth of the university for four years.

Now it is a map of holographic projections. The map of the canyon of "Hero" is holographically projected. The whole tile is in front of several people. Like the sand table on the ancient battlefield, all the movements are clear at a glance. The invisible places are filled with white fog.

This is the holographic gameplay provided by Heroes after the holographic projector comes out. Many people have bought a holographic projector to experience the fun of this holographic MoBA game. When Chen Mo is bored, he will play two sets as a pastime.

"Come on, open black." Bamboo poles are also welcome, pick up their sleeves and grab the game keyboard.

"Amitabha, the donors, and so on." Puyuan ran up and ran in front of the holographic projection map and took another keyboard and mouse.

Chen Mo is also happy with the appearance of the three people. He is afraid that these old friends will become restrained because of his current status. Now, it seems that they are still the same.

Chen Mo also joined the black team, chatted in the living room, began to talk about the interesting things of these years, and the friends reunited, there are always words to talk about.

......

Xiao Liwei sat in the car and looked at the sea view of Binhai City. After receiving a call from Chen Mo, he rushed back from Zhejiang University and prepared to give the former old man the best man.

Thinking of seeing Chen Mo’s news on various channels, he was emotional. Friends who used to work hard together, fight together, and fight for the university together, have now become famous.

A few years have come, like a flower and a dream. The days of the past are gone forever.

"Your brother, is it really Chen Mo?"

Sitting next to him is a long-haired girl, dressed in a little retro style, looks like a literary talent, named Shangguan Yaner.

At this time, Shangguan Yaner is still a little unbelievable. She has been in love for six years, her good brother, once a buddy, is actually a legendary Chen Mo, and she knows nothing about it.

"Yes." Xiao Liwei nodded with a smile.

"Why didn't you tell me?" asked Shangguan Yaner.

"I have nothing to show off with others, Chen Mo is my good brother? I said that others thought I was bragging." Xiao Liwei said.

"I am someone else?" Shangguan Yan's voice is a bit bad.

"No, no." Xiao Liwei was so scared that he hurriedly waved his hand.

The car stopped at the door of the villa, and the two entered the villa under the leadership of the robot.

"Li Wei, I haven't seen you for a long time."

Seeing Xiao Liwei, Chen Mo withdrew and the three men went black, and walked toward Xiao Liwei, and came a big hug.

After the college entrance examination, the two went to different universities, and the chances of meeting each other were much less. After graduating, Xiao Liwei took a postgraduate degree to Zhejiang University, which was too far apart and had fewer opportunities.

When I meet now, the emotions are just as kind.

"Long time no see, now it is time to call you Chen Giant." Xiao Liwei smiled.

"Giant wool, or let me name a little bit." Chen Mo greeted the two to sit down and watch Shangguan Yaner: "You don't introduce me to introduce?"

“She is called Shangguan Yaner, and now she is a graduate student at the Capital Conservatory of Music, learning Guzheng.”

"No wonder, temperament is outstanding. I used to see you in the circle of friends in the past, I want to give you a punch in the mountains and mountains. Now I am taking a graduate student together, how can such a good girl be met by you?" Chen Mo smiled and reached out and shook hands with Shangguan Yaner: "Come here as your own home, without restraint."

"Yeah." Shangguan Yaner gave Chen Mo a polite smile.

"You still said me, you are not honest, a girlfriend does not tell me, suddenly announced that there is a fiancee, I still know through the news, hiding deep enough."

"You didn't ask."

Chen Mo laughed and said nothing, led the two to sit down on the sofa.

"I will introduce, these three are my college friends. Zhu Gang, Li Zilong and Wu Puyuan, this high school together with the bed, played together, and enjoyed the beautiful party, Xiao Liwei, this is His girlfriend, Shangguan Yaner."

"You have enjoyed the beauty together? How do you appreciate it?" Shangguan Yaner looked at Xiao Liwei with a smile.

Chen Mo ignored Xiao Liwei's resentful little eyes: "We used to be at the same table, and the third year of high school would sit by the window. When the class came to see the beauty of the next class, she commented on her leg length, measurements, and looks a bit. ”

For a moment, Xiao Liwei felt a pain in his waist and his face was bitter. Several people also noticed the secret action of Shangguan Yaner, laughing wildly.

After the joke, several people greeted each other and began to chat. The way men make friends is simpler, they have a common hobby, two glasses of wine, and they can talk together.

chapters.title: Chapter 390: :Eve
chapters.body:
Chapter 390: :Eve

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu used to live in small villas.

The small fishing rod leaned against the bed in the room, looked at the photos of the two people in the phone, and thought about the bitterness of Chen Mo’s encounter and love, and the face was sweet.

Tomorrow is the day of the wedding, when Chen Mo will come here, the wind and the light will marry him. She will also announce to the world that she will always belong to this man.

Thinking of wearing a wedding dress and marrying her loved one, Xiao Yu is a little sneak.

"Sister, smile so sweet, want a brother-in-law?" Xiao Man entered the room, saw Xiao Yu's smile, and immediately understood her mind.

"Just think of the previous things." Xiao Yu did not deny.

"You have to marry tomorrow, go out to spend with your parents."

"Yeah." Xiaoyu put down his mobile phone and left the room with Xiaoman.

He Zhenhua and Wang Lan saw Xiaoyu out and smiled on his face. The daughter is going to marry, and it is a good family. They are naturally happy.

However, after being happy, I am worried that Xiaoyu is aggrieved. After all, the conditions of the two sides are too wide. Although they also like Chen Mo's children, as parents, they still can't help but worry. And my favorite, most sensible daughter will marry in this way, or there will be disappointment.

"Small fishermen, if you are wronged, you will go home, and Dad will raise you."

"How do you say this? Xiaomo this child will hurt people, and certainly will not let Xiaoyu suffer wrong. After Xiaoyu, you will live well and have a child early. When the child is there, Xiaomo will mature, and Mom will wait. Hold your grandson."

"Parents, you can rest assured. Chen Mo, he hurts me, your daughter will not be wronged." Xiao Yu was sitting between his parents, his heart was full of emotion.

Chen Mo is in the living room, lying on the sofa and looking at the book quietly. Sitting next to his sister Zhang Xinxin, next to the sofa, is a smiling parent, and Jane and Uncle, talking about the wedding tomorrow.

He didn't listen carefully, but concentrated on reading the book. It is not a mathematical book with a lot of formula calculations, nor a philosophy with deep life. It is a physics book called "The Shape of Time", which tells about the development of relativity.

He deliberately slowed down the reading speed, and tasted the interesting and easy-to-use text expressions in the book. The easy-to-understand sciences are very good examples.

Tomorrow is the wedding of him and Xiaoyu. There is a kind of excitement in his mood. Xiao Yu is not around. Only reading a book can calm his mood.

"Brother, I will go through the door with a small fishing rod tomorrow, high unhappy?" Zhang Xinxin stretched his head and came over.

Chen Mo closed the book: "I am looking forward to it. Do you have a good study at the university? What do you want to learn? Next year, brother will send you to study, and then come out and enter the company."

"Brother, don't talk about this topic." Zhang Xinxin spoiled.

Changqin Island.

Zhang Fengyun stood in a temporary studio, looked at the video, and used the walkie-talkie to direct the staff at the scene and started to be there.

The rehearsal of the wedding has been carried out ten times and is constantly improving. Tonight is the last time. Tomorrow is the day of Chen Mo’s wedding. After the rehearsal is completed, everything will be ready.

"Now, holographic projection is ready, newcomers come into play."

With Zhang Fengyun's order, the entire ceremonial venue, all the holographic projectors lit up, and one male and one female two rehearsal actor also stepped on the red carpet to enter the ceremony.

The moment the two set foot on the red carpet, the holographic scene on the field changed. As if a signal, with a newcomer as the center, a romantic holographic world is displayed in front of everyone.

Zhang Fengyun still feels through the screen.

Other rich people are the fragrant car cruises, the rose paving, the splendid luxury, but also the beauty of the companion, the accumulation of jewels. But I have never seen Chen Mo like this, using high technology to express his unique romance.

......

Liang Jing looked at the person in charge of each project on the field and personally arranged the task for tomorrow. Tomorrow afternoon, Chen Mo’s wedding started here, and she had to pay attention to it.

At this wedding, many big people arrived at the scene, and safety was the most important.

Although the marching ant company will send security personnel there, she must also ensure that their people do not have problems, and that they will not let them have a lot of trouble.

“Menus, tableware glasses, tables and chairs, and confirm the quantity again to ensure the hygiene of the tableware. There are chefs, waiters, and welcome ladies; these people have to be confirmed again, they can’t be replaced temporarily, and they can’t be mixed. In the team.

Remember, everyone remembers me that no strangers are allowed to enter the wedding venue tomorrow. Even if you can't come over temporarily, you can call me directly and don't allow strangers to enter your venue instead of your work.

Especially in the kitchen, make sure the ingredients are fresh and ensure the health and safety of the kitchen. No non-kitchen workers are allowed to enter the kitchen, I will send someone to supervise.

There will be face recognition at the entrance of the kitchen. The information of the kitchen staff has been entered. It will be severely punished if you find that you are carrying non-kitchen staff and entering tomorrow. There are special circumstances, you can explain the application to me. ”

The wedding was held in Changqin Island and has been exposed by the media.

Many news media and paparazzi want to get into the wedding scene. Liang Jing must emphasize it. Otherwise, she will be confused if she is mixed into someone.

......

"A group of players, you must ensure the safety order outside the venue, remember not to let the reporters enter the scene, there will be police assistance. The second group is responsible for security inspection, signing face recognition device, pay attention to the guests.

The three groups protect the order of the wedding scene, must pay special attention to find suspicious personnel and report in time. Four groups are responsible for the kitchen, don't let suspicious people mix into the kitchen..."

Black Hawk is at the banquet site in Changqin Island to confirm the layout and coordination of security personnel tomorrow.

At this wedding, many big people have to gather together, and safety is very important. In the event of an accident, the problem will be very large, related to Chen Mo's wedding, but also related to Chen Mo's face.

Many people are concerned about Changqin Island, and even want to mix into the venue, so Wang Hai asked him to come to Changqin Island in advance, responsible for the security layout of the venue.

......

"Ye Bo, usually you have more ideas, can you get the scene of Chen Mo's marriage tomorrow?"

"This is in accordance with normal thinking, no way. Tomorrow's security check is definitely very strict, and it is unlikely to be mixed in." Ye Bo shook his head: "But there is a way, maybe you can try."

"Talk."

Lu Wenzhao immediately came to interest.

"This wedding, there are some neighbors of Chen Mo's neighbors. The wedding will definitely go to the ceremony, we will pay, please send them photos and videos of the wedding scene with the mobile phone. We will use those videos and pictures, put them on online."

"Good idea." Lu Wenzhao applauded: "This matter is handed over to you, giving you a thousand dollars."

If you can get the first-hand news of Chen Mo's wedding, you can definitely attract a lot of traffic and attention for their media number, and a thousand pieces definitely worth the money.

Due to high attention, various media are trying to find the news of Chen Mo's big marriage tomorrow, even if it is some lace news. Some lace news has appeared on the Internet, and it is speculated that Chen Mo’s wedding will be a wedding.

Guests who are ready to attend the Chen Mo wedding will also book a ticket and prepare for the trip to Binhai tomorrow.

Under the night, everyone has a different world.

chapters.title: Chapter 391: : Science Students Who Don'T Understand Romance (First)
chapters.body:
Chapter 391: : Science Students Who Don'T Understand Romance (First)

In the morning, the first sun shattered through the sky and the new day began to recover.

Early in the morning, Chen Mo woke up in the call of his mother and began to prepare for the wedding day. Brush your teeth, wash your face, take a hot bath, and scrape the scum, as usual.

Xiao Liwei, fat man and other people also got up early and began to prepare for the bridegroom. In addition, Li Lingfeng also rushed over.

The guests who came here this time have many big-name figures. Xiao Liwei and the fat man are ordinary people, and certainly can't call. As the vice president of the company, Li Lingfeng served as the best man of Chen Mo. When Chen Mo did not have time to greet those people, Li Lingfeng could entertain him on his behalf.

And Xiao Liwei and others can call out their old classmates and relatives and friends.

A few men are ready to start playing games in the living room, discuss the matter of picking up the bride, the relatives and friends of the home come, let the villas lively, the atmosphere is festive.

Looking at the luxurious villa, Chen Jianming was very envious in his eyes. He suddenly remembered what he was going to do, and hurriedly picked up his mobile phone and filmed a small video.

He is Chen Mo's cousin. Chen Mo's father is his father's cousin. Although he is not a close relative, his blood relationship is still there. Chen Mo is married and naturally invites them to their home.

Because Chen Mo is now a rich man, they want to see Chen Mo's home and bride in Binhai, so he came to Binhai City in advance. Last night, a reporter contacted him. Today, Chen Mo’s home was attended for a wedding. Some photos of the bride and groom were taken, or Chen Mo’s mansion was a photo, and he was given 800.

It’s normal to take a photo and get a circle of friends. It’s not a bad thing. Confirming that the other party is a reporter, he promised to come down and received the 800 yuan paid in advance by the other party.

After the video and photo were taken, Chen Jianming directly opened a circle of friends and sent photos of Chen Mo’s mansion he photographed.

"coming."

Ye Bo heard the news of the reminder, and quickly opened a circle of friends, with a surprise in his face. The reporter couldn't enter Chen Mo's wedding, but someone could go in. He was somewhat admired for his wit.

Seeing Chen Mo's mansion, Ye Bo was amazed, and the villas of the rich are really sentimental. Such a large villa is comparable to the largest villa, not hundreds of millions, and there is no way to build it.

Now, after Ye Bo simply processes the photos, click on the media number and Weibo to start the graphic push.

"Decryption: Chen Moxiang furnace beach luxury home exposure, the cost is unknown"

There are many reports about Chen Mo on the Internet, but there are very few exposures to the mansion. Now it is the day when Chen Mo is getting married. When Ye Bo’s news came out, it immediately attracted a lot of attention.

Not long after, after the news of Chen Mo's big marriage, the news of Chen Mo's mansion was also on the second place in the hot search list.

In the villa, everyone’s face is smiling, and they are envious in their eyes. Such a big villa, I saw it for the first time.

"Well, the children of the old Chen family have a good time. This villa is so big, it can be tens of millions."

"Yeah, the first time I saw such a big villa, here, tens of millions can not only, listen to my family said that such a villa, to hundreds of millions."

"This high-tech TV is called an instrument. I heard that it costs tens of thousands. There are robots. I heard that there are millions of people. I heard that it is a company of old Chen children. How much does it cost?"

"congratulations."

"The old Chen family is blessed, congratulations."

"..."

Wedding banquets in the evening, some relatives and friends who came in advance in the home, want to see Chen Mo's house, but also want to see the bride quickly, with a smile, come here. Some came with children, and the villa was so busy.

The relatives and friends of these hometowns are mostly ordinary people, with the care of ordinary people. The children of other people have a good life, they envy themselves, and they want to have a relationship. Except for some wonderful relatives and friends, the rest will not have bad thoughts, and will not say that extreme dissatisfaction is emotion.

Chen’s father and mother are laughing and laughing, and have lived for most of their lives. The children have a good life. In front of those relatives and friends, they naturally have a face, and let the servant nanny release the prepared refreshments and entertain them.

This day, there are many people in the family, and there is a festive taste.

"Ji Shi arrived, now in the past, pick up the bride back." Chen Mo and others changed the dress, Jane went upstairs notice.

"Take a kiss to go." Li Zilong and others immediately squatted, and the former screamed, and Chen Mo Deng boarded the wedding car and rushed toward the bride's small villa.

On the other side of the villa, a few bridesmaids have been refitted at this time, Duanmu Qing and Wang Xiaona are also finishing makeup for Xiao Yu, not long after, the bride makeup.

"The groom got off the team and set off. Is this good?" After receiving the phone call, Xiao Yuma also came up and knocked on the door.

"Okay." Xiao Man reminded.

"Little fisherman is really beautiful." At the bedside, a handsome girl looked at Xiaoyu and said with amazement. She is Xiaotang’s cousin who grew up together, He Qiaoqiao, this time Xiaoyu married, the family asked her to come to Xiaoyu as a bridesmaid.

At this time, Xiaoyu wore a dream wedding dress, sitting on the red bedding, the blue silk hanging down like a waterfall, being restrained by a small donkey, the veil was soft and long, the hair on the top of the head was up, and the two dragons were scattered in front of the forehead, delicate and elegant. It is extravagant in gentleness.

Seeing the small fishing in front of him, Zhao Min also showed an envious smile. Li Ruoxi, Zhu Li, Zhou Wei and Wang Xiaolan and other bridesmaids could not help but marvel at the envy, and the white pearls responsible for the safety of small fishing were also amazed.

This lucky girl has taken away the men that countless women have dreamed of, but they can't afford to live a trace.

"Let's take a photo with our bride." Li Ruoxi shouted.

"Zhao Jie is coming over too, and there is a pearl sister." Xiao Yu looked at Zhao Min and White Pearl.

"Okay." Looking at the sister group that was in trouble, Zhao Min did not consciously smile and walked over. Her identity is not suitable for being a bridesmaid, but it is still okay to come here to send a small fish to marry.

In the company, Xiaoyu is nominally her assistant, but she has never regarded Xiaoyu as an assistant, more like a sister.

In her eyes, Xiao Yu is a self-reliant and self-reliant girl with a gentle personality and a favorite. When she saw Xiaoyu at first sight, she liked the girl, so she directly became the assistant of Xiaoyu, who had just graduated.

The character of Xiao Yu, even if she gets Chen Mo, others can't afford it, because that is what she deserves.

White pearls also smiled and walked over.

After the photo was taken and a circle of friends was sent, Wang Xiaolan said: "The bridegroom is leaving. We have to prepare the checkpoint. When the bridegroom comes over to grab the bride, I must test him. I can't let him take our most beautiful fishing. ”

“How many levels are best?”

Julie joined the topic of several sister groups.

“Ten?” Zhou Wei ate a snack and found that several sisters were watching themselves. He said: “It’s not right to play local tyrants, take red envelopes?”

"Is this going to be too much? Reduce it a bit, but set it up a bit more, let the brother-in-law smash the red envelope and get the hint." Xiao Man also interjected.

The small fishing plate sat on the red bedding and looked at several sisters with joy.

"First ask Xiaoyu, you have been together for a few years, what else is it that you are more regrettable, or is Chen Mo not doing it?" Li Ruoxuan spoke, and everyone else looked at Xiaoyu.

chapters.body:

In the eyes of Cheng Fanghua, after taking a small video, she began to take pictures of the two people, and I wish I could have two more mobile phones in my hand.

She saw such a beautiful bride for the first time. If it was herself, she must be happy.

I am happy that my daughter has found a good family and can enjoy it later. Reluctant to be the most sensible, the most well-behaved daughter, so married, and later people are people, although they all know that the son-in-law will respect them, but still give up.

"Nothing, happy, I will go back to see my parents often." Chen Mo also knows the emotions of Xiao Yu, and hurriedly took out a paper towel to comfort.

"Well, thank you, husband." Xiao Yu gently leaned on Chen Mo, she knew that this was her future dependence.

"Well, don't cry. Cry and swollen eyes, I will turn the wedding dress into a black and white panda. Let them see that I am a giant panda."

Oh...

Xiao Yu laughed, crying and laughing, making people pity.

The car team left slowly until the team disappeared, and He Zhenhua and Wang Lan regained their gaze.

Cheng Fanghua was pleasantly surprised to look at the photos and videos she had taken. She is such a beautiful bride, she is a life, and this bride is her cousin.

I don’t want to think about it. Cheng Fanghua is directly equipped with a picture of Jiugongge, and the beauty of different angles is sent to Weibo.

When Weibo was just finished, all kinds of comments and concerns appeared insane. In just 15 minutes, the number of reposts has been thousands.

Soon, Cheng Fanghua Weibo, was noticed by many entertainment media, immediately forwarded the report.

"Chen Mo's Bride Exposure, The Most Beautiful Bride"

"Shock! Chen Mo’s bride is so beautiful...”

On the Internet, reports from various media exposed Xiao Yu’s appearance in a wedding dress. Beauty has always been the most concerned topic of the network. When this photo came out, it immediately set off the heat of the network.

#陈默的新娘# This topic, directly on the hot search list of all major platforms, all the people who saw the photo of Xiao Yu wearing a wedding dress were amazing.

Gu Rencheng sat in front of the computer and was thinking about jewelry design.

Jewelry design requires a very inspirational, not as simple as imagined. So when he was relaxed, he came online to see if he could find the inspiration that flashed in a flash.

Now on the Internet, there is news of Chen Mo’s big marriage, and any hot news will be covered up by the heat of this news.

Seeing the news of the push, Gu Rencheng subconsciously went in. Others pay attention to the beauty of the bride, but he is a professional, only concerned about the bride of Chen Mo, what jewelry is worn.

Seeing the jewelry on the neck of Chen Mo’s bride, Gu Rencheng’s body was shocked.
