"My God, such a large pear-shaped blue diamond." Gu Rencheng was shocked by the necklace on the neck of Xiao Yu. As far as he knows, such a large blue diamond is unique, and there are only a few in the world. And look at this color, it is perfect.

Why do rich people like jewelry? Jewelry is now a symbol of the identity of the rich. Some things can be bought without money.

After opening Weibo, Gu Rencheng cut off the picture of the jewelry worn by the bride. He rarely sends Weibo, and he can't help but send one.

"The most expensive bride, Chen Mo's bride's jewelry, is the perfect piece. The necklace looks at nearly 40 carats of blue diamonds. The earrings are about 7 carats of red diamonds. They are all rare gems. I have been looking at the bride for many years. Jewelry, worth at least 1.2 billion."

Gu Rencheng's Weibo certification is a jewelry designer. The people who care about him are some jewelry magazines and jewelers, and some people who like jewelry.

Seeing the microblog of Gu Rencheng, and related to Chen Mo, some people subconsciously went in.

At least 1.2 billion worth?

Oh my God.

This price shocked the person who saw the news. What is local tyrant? What better than this?

A set of jewellery, at least 1.2 billion.

No one doubts Gu Rencheng's words, because he is a famous jewelry designer, and because it is Chen Mo's bride, no one doubts Chen Mo's financial resources.

In the era of information explosion, this news quickly shocked many media and people.

Soon, the hot search again has a topic of #最贵的新娘#.

"In primitive society, people used animal bones and animal teeth as symbols of honor and status; ancient emperors used gold nuggets as a symbol of status; now gems and diamonds are symbols of the status and wealth of the rich. With its market, It has its value, and different markets have different market expressions."

“Why don’t Chen Mo donate this money to poor families?”

"Respond to the upstairs: Mom's mental retardation."

"Why do I feel that such a precious piece of jewelry is just a foil to this bride? If you don't remind me, you won't notice these jewelry."

“The wedding dress is also perfect. Can anyone tell me where the wedding dress is customized? I will get a set of the same paragraph when I get married.”

Chen Mo's big marriage directly dominated the hot search of the top rankings of the major platforms, and its popularity has overwhelmed all topics. The majestic mansion, the most beautiful bride, the price of jewelry, and what is not known to the outside world? The people who attended the wedding broke the news and flooded the entire network.

In the middle of the ceremony, there was only one open space, no red carpet, and it looked very simple. The area of relatives and friends of the man’s side and other areas of the guest are arranged reasonably.

After sending the photo to the reporter, Chen Jianming also began to wander around. The wedding reception is in the hotel next to it, here is the ceremony, there are also buffet desserts and drinks. The entire island was covered by Chen Mo, as a guest, he can casually eat and play.

However, the holographic projection of flowers and arrangements, this is quite new, with a dreamy effect, giving a novel feeling.

After thinking about it, Ye Bo directly sent pictures.

"Exclusive: Chen Mo wedding scene exposure, simple layout, there are many mysterious instruments. 》

After the text was finished, Ye Bo began to wait for the heat to rise.

"..."

Seeing the exclusive breaking news, and related to Chen Mo's wedding, Ye Bogang was pushed shortly after being sent, and instantly attracted a lot of attention.

Some media saw reports and forwarded them one after another.

At six o'clock, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu also arrived at the wedding scene of Changqin Island and began to welcome guests. In addition to Chen Mo's family, there are Zhao Min and a group of bridesmaids.

The wedding ceremony begins an hour and guests are coming soon.

"wow, sobeautiful, congratulations."

Alexander took the lead and saw Chen Mo and Xiao Yu, marveling forward. Come with him, Paul and Richard, who sold Chen Mo’s Eye of the Angel and ‘ tears of the mermaid.

"Welcome, thank you." Chen Mo and Alexander shook hands.

"It seems that our 'Angel's Eyes' and 'The Mermaid's Tears' are not selling the wrong. The bride is simply a perfect combination of angels and mermaids, so beautiful."

Eagle hook nose Paul was amazed at the small fishing, next to the white curly hair, Richard with a noble atmosphere also nodded and agreed.

"thank you very much."

Xiao Yu naturally understands the English of the two, with a smile.

"This is a new wedding gift that I specially prepared for you, a duck fat jade." Alexander took the gift box in the hands of the staff next to him and said in a less standard Chinese: "I heard that Tilian is in your Chinese summer, there is a lot Good meaning, symbolizing the love of husband and wife, happiness, this is my blessing."

"thank you very much."

Chen Mo took over the gift box of Alexander, and Xiao Yu also gave Alexander a candy. Then Paul and Richard also sent a new wedding, and the three also entered the wedding ceremony under the guidance of Julie.

Then, Li Chengzhi, Yao Yi, Wu Bing, Wu Zhen and others also came to the group.

......

Cheng Fanghua entered the wedding scene early. She is not a particularly important guest. Naturally, she does not have to meet Chen Mo personally.

Today, in her circle of friends and Weibo, I saw all kinds of envious comments, let her flutter. After all, attending such a high-level wedding is the first time.

Suddenly, seeing Chen Mo’s guests, Cheng Fanghua’s eyes widened. There are big people appearing, and I didn’t even think about it. I used my mobile phone to point to where Chen Mo is, far away.

chapters.title: Chapter 395: : The Ceremony Begins (Fifth)

To the father's words, Xu Xinxin showed a stubborn smile. It is also a difficult decision to come to the wedding with my father today.

From small to large, there is no man who makes her heart. She thinks that her family, education, ability and appearance are all perfect. Even if her identity is higher, she is worthy.

When she first met Chen Mo, Chen Mo’s self-confidence attracted her, and it was rare to find a man of the same age and worthy of her.

The flowers fall in love with the water, and the water is not in love.

Chen Mo told her that Xiao Yu was already his fiancee, and the meaning is self-evident. They are impossible between them and refused in disguise.

Chen Mo refused in disguise and made her fight a lot.

This scene made everyone open their mouths and was shocked.

Only the phoenix into the fantasy, in a picture less than ten seconds, in front of their eyes, real interpretation. At this time, the small fishing, like the phoenix on the phoenix tree, noble, does not provoke the dust, so that the surrounding dreamy scenery is eclipsed.

"I also want to marry... Why is the bride not me... oh..." Some sensuous girls were crying for the beauty of the little fish in front of them.

When Chen Mo and Xiao Yu were on the stage, all the scene decorations became a festive color. The red makeup was paved and the flowers were clustered like a fairyland in the novel. The petals still floated in the air, like a fairy flower.

call……

The ceremony was not long, but in just two minutes, it was enough for all of them to be shocked. The picture was fixed, and all the talents recovered from the shock, and the applause and the amazement melted into one.

Everyone was amazing and applauded.

The wedding in this dream made them feel the charm of high-tech, and Chen Mo, who was so mad, used high technology to move the dream wedding into reality.

"With new technology, Chen Zhen is an accident, too beautiful." Alexander looked at the glass and looked surprised, but also very happy. In the temporary studio, with the end of the wedding ceremony, Zhang Fengyun leaned back in the chair and sighed with a deep breath, wiping off the sweat on his forehead.

Zhang Xinxin did not bother Xiaoyu and walked toward the hall. Chen Mo is watching the news at the moment, and some comments about his wedding are being broadcast on the news.

Last night, he was busy with the wedding reception, but did not know that the wedding had caused such a big shock in one night. Now on the mobile phone, on the computer, and on the TV news, there are videos and photos exposed by his wedding, as well as various reports.

"Brother, you have sprinkled a wave of dog food in front of people all over the world. How much did you spend on the wedding of the nephew?" Zhang Xinxin asked as he sat down next to Chen Mo.

chapters.title: Chapter 399: : Back To Her Family (Fourth More)
